label:
暴君之爪
Claws of the Tyrant

Claws of the Tyrant.name: 暴君之爪 Claws of the Tyrant
Claws of the Tyrant.description:
《暴君之爪》是一部冒险合集，背景设定在昔日的终焉之墙国度及其周边地区，如今那里被称为死坟末土。这些冒险讲述了女神阿拉兹尼重返死坟末土的故事；这一次，她要确保一批强大的遗物——阿拉兹尼的血石——不落入她昔日囚禁者塞尔德格·贝德利斯之手。阿拉兹尼从盖布挣脱后，塞尔德格放弃了自己作为那个国家间谍首脑的身份，如今侍奉一位新主人，塔巴丰。但塞尔德格对默语暴君的忠诚掩盖了他真正的动机。塞尔德格打算利用这些血石（以及另一件遗物——奥泽姆圣杯）来为一场仪式提供力量，而这场仪式将永远改变阿拉兹尼与艾奥梅黛两位女神的历史。塞尔德格相信，通过交换这两位女神的命运，他能够将阿拉兹尼从她那悲惨的过去中“拯救”出来——并借此救赎自己。

Claws of the Tyrant is an anthology of adventures set in and around the former nation of Lastwall, now known as the Gravelands. The adventures follow the story of the goddess Arazni as she returns to the Gravelands, this time to ensure that a collection of powerful relics, the Bloodstones of Arazni, stay free from the hands of her former captor, Seldeg Bhedlis. After Arazni’s escape from Geb, Seldeg abandoned his role as that nation’s spymaster and now serves a new lord, Tar-Baphon. But Seldeg’s loyalty to the Whispering Tyrant conceals his true motivations. Seldeg intends to use the Bloodstones (along with another relic, the Chalice of Ozem) to power a ritual that will forever alter the histories of both Arazni and Iomedae. By swapping the fates of the two goddesses, Seldeg believes he can “save” Arazni from her tragic past—and in turn, redeem himself.
Claws of the Tyrant.caption:
直面死坟末土的恐怖！两位女神的命运正悬而未决，失宠的墓骑士塞尔德格·贝德利斯正准备举行一场改写历史本身的仪式。勇敢的英雄与邪恶的反派齐聚一堂，试图阻挠或协助塞尔德格实施他的计划。
Face the terrors of the Gravelands! The fate of two goddesses hangs in the balance as disgraced graveknight Seldeg Bhedlis prepares a ritual to rewrite history itself. Brave heroes and wicked villains alike assemble to hinder or assist Seldeg in his plans.

Of Blood And Faith Loop.name: 血与信仰循环 Of Blood And Faith Loop

Preparing the Defenses.name: 准备防御措施 Preparing the Defenses

First Circle Of Hell.name: 地狱第一层 First Circle Of Hell

The Blighted Bower Loop.name: 凋疫林环路 The Blighted Bower Loop

Dame Talia's Casket.name: 塔莉娅女爵的灵柩 Dame Talia's Casket
Dame Talia's Casket.tokenName: 塔莉娅女爵的棺匣 Dame Talia's Casket

Dame Talia's Longsword.name: 塔莉娅女爵的长剑 Dame Talia's Longsword
Dame Talia's Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为武装剑，可以是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑刃较重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Dame Talia's Steel Shield.name: 塔莉娅女爵的钢盾 Dame Talia's Steel Shield
Dame Talia's Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和大小。虽然比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们也耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Dame Talia's Casket.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{事件5：墓穴中的灾难}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts}
Dame Talia's Casket.prototypeToken: 塔莉娅女爵的棺匣 Dame Talia's Casket

Constan Russi's Chest.name: 康斯坦·鲁西的箱子 Constan Russi's Chest
Constan Russi's Chest.tokenName: 康斯坦·鲁西的箱子 Constan Russi's Chest

Lung Bloodstone of Arazni.name: 阿拉兹尼的肺血石 Lung Bloodstone of Arazni
Lung Bloodstone of Arazni.description:
阿拉兹尼的肺血石象征着苦难。当你携带肺血石时，你获得将自己的痛苦化作对抗敌人的武器的能力。

启动——力量源于痛苦 r（专注）

频率 每小时一次

触发 你受到伤害

效果 你让痛苦在体内回响，使自己变得更强。直到你下个回合结束前，你下一次打击或法术攻击检定获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0bwavSwP7XUMO9J1]{Effect: Strength Through Pain}

启动——训诫 2（听觉、情绪、无力化、心灵）

需求 你信奉阿拉兹尼，或受她眷顾

频率 每天一次

效果 你用手指指向60尺内一个曾冒犯过你的生物，并对其进行口头训诫。该生物每拥有你的1个等级便受到@Damage[1d4[mental]]伤害（对抗你的职业DC进行@Check[will|against:class|basic]豁免）。若豁免失败，该生物还会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}（若大失败则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 3}）。

毁坏 要摧毁肺血石，一名阿拉兹尼的信徒必须自愿用血石带角的船首像刺穿自己，对自身造成@Damage[3d6[piercing], 3d6[persistent,bleed]]{3d6点穿刺伤害和3d6点持续流血伤害}。随后，肺血石会蒸发成一团有毒蒸气，如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{毒云术}（DC 28），并在其持续时间内跟随着摧毁血石的生物。

The Lung Bloodstone of Arazni represents suffering. While you carry the Lung Bloodstone, you gain the ability to turn your pain into a weapon against your enemies.

Activate—Strength Through Pain r (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take damage

Effect You allow the pain to resonate within you, making you stronger. You gain a +1 status bonus to your next Strike or spell attack before the end of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.0bwavSwP7XUMO9J1]{Effect: Strength Through Pain}

Activate—Admonish 2 (auditory, emotion, incapacitation, mental)

Requirements You worship Arazni or are favored by her

Frequency once per day

Effect You point your finger at a creature within 60 feet that has wronged you, and you verbally admonish them. The creature takes @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage for every level you have (@Check[will|against:class|basic] save against your class DC). On a failed save, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure).

Destruction To destroy the Lung Bloodstone, a worshipper of Arazni must willingly impale themself with the Bloodstone's horned figurehead, dealing themselves @Damage[3d6[piercing], 3d6[persistent,bleed]]{3d6 piercing damage and 3d6 persistent bleed} damage. The Lung Bloodstone then evaporates into a cloud of noxious vapors, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Toxic Cloud} (DC 28), that follows the creature that destroyed the Bloodstone for its duration.

Constan Russi's Chest.name: 康斯坦·鲁西的箱子 Constan Russi's Chest
Constan Russi's Chest.description:
这个红木箱制作精良，配有一把普通的锁。箱子本身价值 20 gp，若附带钥匙则价值 30 gp。

This redwood chest is finely made and fitted with an average lock. The chest alone is worth 20 gp, or 30 gp if the keys are included.

Constan Russi's Chest.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.8sGvoOyehQxYBv4u]{事件6：牧师的房间}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.8sGvoOyehQxYBv4u]{Event 6: The Priest's Quarters}
Constan Russi's Chest.prototypeToken: 康斯坦·鲁西的箱子 Constan Russi's Chest

Corpselight.name: 尸火 Corpselight

Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet.name: 尸体感知（精确）30尺 Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet
Corpse Sense (Precise) 30 feet.description:
尸火能够感知射程内的尸体。这是一种精确感官，且即使隔着厚度不足 5 英尺的实体障碍物也能起作用。

A corpselight can sense dead bodies within range. This is a precise sense that functions through solid barriers less than 5 feet thick.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光失能 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
暴露在阳光下的尸火会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，且无法认领尸体。

A corpselight exposed to sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, and cannot Claim a Corpse.

Wisp Form.name: 灵光形态 Wisp Form
Wisp Form.description:
当尸火与一具尸体融合时若其生命值降至0，它会改为降至1生命值，同时尸体坍塌倒地，而尸火则以灵光形态现身。

处于灵光形态时，尸火为超小型，且除“占据尸体”或“飞行”外不能执行任何动作。

若尸火在其回合开始时处于灵光形态，则必须在其回合结束时进行一次@Check[flat|dc:16|immutable:true]；若失败，则失去1点生命值。若尸火在灵光形态下生命值降至0，则会被摧毁。

When a corpselight is reduced to 0 Hit Points while merged with a corpse, it is instead reduced to 1 Hit Point as the corpse collapses to the ground and the corpselight emerges in its wisp form.

While in wisp form, a corpselight is Tiny and can take no actions other than Claim Corpse or Fly.

A corpselight that starts its turn in wisp form must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:16|immutable:true] at the end of its turn; if it fails, it loses 1 Hit Point. A corpselight reduced to 0 Hit Points while in wisp form is destroyed.

Claim Corpse.name: 占据尸体 Claim Corpse
Claim Corpse.description:
先决条件 尸火处于灵光形态，且与一具在过去24小时内未被尸火占据过的中型或小型尸体相邻

效果 尸火与尸体融合，使尸体站立，并恢复 @Damage[3d6[healing]] 生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.auJ02rr1Jr88oD3Z]{效果：占据尸体 - 血肉}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.3np7EyJ8pyrVlpie]{效果：占据尸体 - 骸骨}

Prerequisites The corpselight is in wisp form and is adjacent to a Medium or Small corpse that hasn't been claimed by a corpselight in the past 24 hours

Effect The corpselight merges with the corpse, causes the corpse to Stand, and regains @Damage[3d6[healing]] Hit Points.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.auJ02rr1Jr88oD3Z]{Effect: Claim Corpse - Fleshy}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.3np7EyJ8pyrVlpie]{Effect: Claim Corpse - Skeletal}

Death Light.name: 死亡之光 Death Light
Death Light.description:
先决条件 尸火位于一具尸体内

效果 尸火从它的口中和眼中射出一道病态的蓝色光束，形成一个 @Template[cone|distance:20]。该区域内所有活着的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:18|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] 强韧豁免。如果至少有1个生物豁免失败，尸火恢复 @Damage[2d6[healing]] 生命值，超过其最大生命值的部分转为持续1分钟的临时生命值。

尸火在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Death Light]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用死亡之光。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[1d6[void]|options:area-damage] 虚空伤害。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[2d6[void]|options:area-damage] 虚空伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

大失败 该生物受到 @Damage[4d6[void]|options:area-damage] 虚空伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}。

Prerequisites The corpselight is in a corpse

Effect The corpselight emits a sickly blue beam of light from its mouth and eyes in a @Template[cone|distance:20]. All living creatures in this area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:18|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] saving throw. If at least 1 creature fails its save, the corpselight regains @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points, gaining any that exceed its maximum as temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

The corpselight can't use again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Death Light]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Corpselight.publicNotes:
一只饿死的鬼火可能会化为一个冰冷、蓝色、发光的潮湿海绵状球体——尸火。尸火会本能地寻找一具可供栖身的宿主尸体，因为如果不藏身于死去的生物体内，它的物理形态就会迅速腐坏。

A will-o'-wisp that starves to death might rise as a cold, blue, glowing sphere of spongy wetness-a corpselight. A corpselight instinctively seeks out a host corpse to dwell within, as its physical form quickly deteriorates if not hidden within a dead creature.

Plague Zombie.name: 疫病丧尸 Plague Zombie

Slowed.name: 迟缓 Slowed
Slowed.description:
你的动作更少了。迟缓总是包含一个数值。当你在自己回合开始时重新获得动作时，你重新获得的动作数量减少等同于你的迟缓值。由于迟缓在你回合开始时生效，如果你在自己的回合中变为迟缓，你不会立刻失去动作。

You have fewer actions. Slowed always includes a value. When you regain your actions at the start of your turn, reduce the number of actions you regain by your slowed value. Because slowed has its effect at the start of your turn, you don't immediately lose actions if you become slowed during your turn.

Jaws.name: 颚咬 Jaws
Jaws.description:
需求 该丧尸已使一个生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚} 状态。

Requirements The zombie has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
丧尸会永久陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，且不能使用反应动作。

A zombie is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Zombie Rot.name: 丧尸腐病 Zombie Rot
Zombie Rot.description:
受感染的生物在治愈该疾病之前，无法治疗其因丧尸腐病受到的伤害。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害（1天）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害（1天）

阶段 5 死亡，立即作为疫病丧尸复起

An infected creature can't heal damage it takes from zombie rot until it has been cured of the disease.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage (1 day)

Stage 5 dead, rising as a plague zombie immediately

Plague Zombie.publicNotes:
疫病丧尸身上充满了可怕的传染病。

丧尸唯一的欲望就是吞食活人。它们毫无思想，永不停歇地蹒跚前行，是死亡的先驱；只有在被摧毁时，丧尸才会停下。

Plague zombies are infested with horrible contagions.

A zombie's only desire is to consume the living. Unthinking and ever-shambling harbingers of death, zombies stop only when they're destroyed.

Shambler Troop.name: 蹒跚尸群 Shambler Troop

Slowed.name: 迟缓 Slowed
Slowed.description:
你的动作变少了。迟缓总是带有一个数值。当你在自己回合开始时重新获得动作时，你获得的动作数量会减少，减少值等于你的迟缓值。由于迟缓是在你的回合开始时生效，如果你在自己的回合中变为迟缓，你不会立刻失去动作。

You have fewer actions. Slowed always includes a value. When you regain your actions at the start of your turn, reduce the number of actions you regain by your slowed value. Because slowed has its effect at the start of your turn, you don't immediately lose actions if you become slowed during your turn.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
蹒跚尸群会永久处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}状态，且不能使用反应动作。

A shambler troop is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Grave Tide.name: 墓潮 Grave Tide
Grave Tide.description:
蹒跚尸群比大多数部队更缺乏组织性。它可以移动进入其他生物的空间，其他生物也可以移动进入它的空间。它的空间对其他生物而言属于困难地形。

The shambler troop is less organized than most troops. It can move into other creatures' spaces, and other creatures can move into its spaces. Its spaces are difficult terrain to other creatures.

Shambling Onslaught.name: 蹒跚猛袭 Shambling Onslaught
Shambling Onslaught.description:
1 至 2

频率 每轮一次

效果 腐行者猛击其所在方格内或 @Template[emanation|distance:5]{5尺} 内的任何敌人（@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] 豁免）。伤害取决于动作数。

1 @Damage[(2d6+5)[bludgeoning]] 伤害

2 @Damage[(2d6+9)[bludgeoning]] 伤害

1 to 2

Frequency once per round

Effect The shamblers lash out at any enemies in their squares or within @Template[emanation|distance:5]{5 feet} (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(2d6+5)[bludgeoning]] damage

2 @Damage[(2d6+9)[bludgeoning]] damage

Troop Movement.name: 部队移动 Troop Movement
Troop Movement.description:
每当部队进行大步移动时，它会先以自由动作（）整队，压缩成一个20英尺乘20英尺的区域（减去任何缺失的方格），然后再移动，距离最多等同于其速度。这与一个超巨型生物的移动方式完全相同；例如，如果部队的任何一个方格进入困难地形，额外的移动代价会适用于整个部队。

Whenever a troop Strides, it first Forms Up as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), then moves up to its Speed. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving; for instance, if any square of the troop enters difficult terrain, the extra movement cost applies to the whole troop.

Shambler Troop.publicNotes:
这团腐朽血肉组成的蹒跚之物以迟钝却专一的目标行动。

死灵法师最常将这些无心智不死造物制造成顺从、可随意牺牲的仆从。若任其自行活动，丧尸只会寻求吞食活物，唯有当它腐烂的身躯再也无法维系时才会停下。

This shuffling mass of decaying flesh moves with dull but singular focus.

Necromancers most often create these mindless undead as obedient, expendable servitors. Left to its own devices, a zombie seeks only to consume the living, stopping only when its rotting body can no longer hold together.

Skeleton Guard.name: 骷髅卫兵 Skeleton Guard

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Skeleton Guard.publicNotes:
最常见的骷髅仆从不过是卫士。

活化骷髅是不死生物中最常见的类型之一。

The most common skeletal minions are mere guardians.

Animated skeletons are among the most common types of undead.

Zombie Shambler.name: 蹒跚丧尸 Zombie Shambler

Jaws.name: 颚咬 Jaws
Jaws.description:
需求 丧尸抓住或束缚了一个生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}。

Requirements The zombie has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
丧尸会永久处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}状态，且无法使用反应动作。

A zombie is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Zombie Shambler.publicNotes:
蹒跚丧尸是一种行动缓慢的恐怖怪物，在数量较多时尤其危险。

丧尸唯一的欲望就是吞食活物。它们是不假思索、永远蹒跚前行的死亡使者，只有在被摧毁时才会停下。

A zombie shambler is a slow-moving horror dangerous in larger groups.

A zombie's only desire is to consume the living. Unthinking and ever-shambling harbingers of death, zombies stop only when they're destroyed.

Constan Russi's Remains.name: 康斯坦·鲁西的遗骸 Constan Russi's Remains
Constan Russi's Remains.tokenName: 康斯坦·鲁西的遗骸 Constan Russi's Remains

Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》 Acts of Iomedae
Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教文献，记述了凡人时期的艾奥梅黛在升格为神祇之前所完成的十一项功业。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽 Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这枚白银符号上饰有代表女神艾奥梅黛的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以拿在手中。

This silver symbol is emblazoned with an image representing the goddess Iomedae. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Silver Key.name: 白银钥匙 Silver Key
Silver Key.description:
一把镶嵌着红色紫水晶的白银钥匙。是康斯坦·鲁西及其副手持有的一对配套钥匙中的一把。

A silver key inlaid with a red amethyst. Part of a matching pair held by Constan Russi and his second.

Constan Russi's Remains.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{事件 5：墓穴中的灾难}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts}
Constan Russi's Remains.prototypeToken: 康斯坦·鲁西的遗骸 Constan Russi's Remains

Dame Talia's Remains.name: 塔莉娅女爵的遗骸 Dame Talia's Remains
Dame Talia's Remains.tokenName: 塔莉娅女爵的遗骸 Dame Talia's Remains

Dame Talia's Breastplate.name: 塔莉娅女爵的胸甲 Dame Talia's Breastplate
Dame Talia's Breastplate.description:
尽管被称为胸甲，这种护甲实际上由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用以保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时还包括髋部和小腿。它在策略性地提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽 Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这枚白银圣徽饰有代表女神艾奥梅黛的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以手持。

This silver symbol is emblazoned with an image representing the goddess Iomedae. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Dame Talia's Remains.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{事件5：墓穴中的灾难}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.h1JTVQOssVuNHGBV]{Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts}
Dame Talia's Remains.prototypeToken: 塔莉娅女爵的遗骸 Dame Talia's Remains

Priest's Remains.name: 祭司遗骸 Priest's Remains

Mace.name: 硬头锤 Mace
Mace.description:
硬头锤有着结实的柄杆和沉重的金属锤头，坚固耐用，能让持用者打出强力的重击，并砸凹护甲。

With a stout haft and a heavy metal head, a mace is sturdy and allows its wielder to deliver powerful blows and dent armor.

Crying Angel Pendant.name: 哭泣天使坠饰 Crying Angel Pendant
Crying Angel Pendant.description:
启动 2（专注）

当你启动这枚雪花石膏坠饰时，使用医疗尝试进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{急救}，并在此次检定中获得+1物品加值。如果你成功了，且你试图维稳术，则目标恢复1点生命值，失去濒死状态并如常恢复意识。如果你成功了，且你试图止血，则流血结束。

Activate 2 (concentrate)

When you activate this alabaster pendant, attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid} using Medicine with a +1 item bonus to the check. If you succeed, and you were trying to stabilize, the target regains 1 Hit Point, losing the dying condition and becoming conscious as normal. If you succeed, and you were trying to stop bleeding, the bleeding ends.

Holy Water.name: 圣水 Holy Water
Holy Water.description:
启动 A 打击

这个小瓶中装有由一位仁善神祇祝圣的水。你通过将一瓶圣水作为一次打击投掷出去来启动它。它是一种简易投掷武器，射程递增为 20 尺。

圣水造成 1d6 精魂伤害和 1 点精魂溅射伤害。圣水只能伤害具有邪秽特征的生物。

Activate A Strike

This vial contains water blessed by a benevolent deity. You activate a vial of holy water by throwing it as a Strike. It's a simple thrown weapon with a range increment of 20 feet.

Holy water deals 1d6 spirit damage and 1 spirit splash damage. Holy water can damage only creatures with the unholy trait.

Priest's Remains.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.SBRSwz1gqFWFiB0r]{A1. 万旋大教堂}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.SBRSwz1gqFWFiB0r]{A1. All-Spiral Cathedral}

Cast-Iron Creations.name: 铸铁工坊 Cast-Iron Creations

Blacksmithing Artisan's Toolkit.name: 铁匠工匠工具包 Blacksmithing Artisan's Toolkit
Blacksmithing Artisan's Toolkit.description:
你需要这些工具，才能用制作技能以原材料制造物品。不同的工作需要不同的工具套组，由GM决定；例如，铁匠工具包与木工工具包不同。如果你穿戴着你的工匠工具包，你可以将其取出并收回，作为使用它的动作的一部分。

You need these tools to create items from raw materials with the Craft skill. Different sets are needed for different work, as determined by the GM; for example, a blacksmith's toolkit differs from a woodworker's toolkit. If you wear your artisan's toolkit, you can draw and replace it as part of the action that uses it.

Grappling Hook.name: 抓钩 Grappling Hook
Grappling Hook.description:
你可以把一根绳子系在抓钩上并将其投掷出去，使攀爬更容易。要固定抓钩，进行一次远程攻击检定，使用你的简易武器熟练度，对抗一个取决于目标的DC，通常至少为DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密（特征）。成功时，你的抓钩会牢牢钩住；但大失败时，抓钩看起来像是钩稳了，实际上会在你爬到一半时脱落。

You can throw a grappling hook with a rope tied to it to make a climb easier. To anchor a grappling hook, make a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your hook has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the hook seems like it will hold but actually falls when you're partway up

Warhammer.name: 战锤 Warhammer
Warhammer.description:
这种武器有一根木制长柄，末端连接着一个大型而沉重的金属锤头。锤头可能是单面的，也可能是双面的，但它始终能够造成强力的钝击打击。

This weapon has a wooden shaft ending in a large, heavy metal head. The head of the hammer might be single-sided or double-sided, but it's always capable of delivering powerful bludgeoning blows.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。虽然比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们也耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Half Plate.name: 半身板甲 Half Plate
Half Plate.description:
半身板甲由全身板甲所用的大部分上半身甲片构成，手臂和腿部则采用较轻或较稀疏的钢板防护。这使其在提供部分全身板甲防护的同时，拥有更好的灵活性和速度。一套这种护甲附带一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{棉甲} 和一双 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Half plate consists of most of the upper body plates used in full plate, with lighter or sparser steel plate protection for the arms and legs. This provides some of the protection of full plate with greater flexibility and speed. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Cast-Iron Creations.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.90PUGPoLuDduUi8y]{A2. 铸铁工坊}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.90PUGPoLuDduUi8y]{A2. Cast-Iron Creations}

Ghost Commoner.name: 平民幽灵 Ghost Commoner

Site Bound.name: 场所束缚 Site Bound
Site Bound.description:
一个典型的幽灵通常只能离它被杀死之处或它作祟的地方一小段距离。典型的限制是120英尺。有些幽灵则不是被束缚在某个地点，而是被束缚在对它而言很特别的房间、建筑、物品或生物上。

A typical ghost can stray only a short distance from where it was killed or the place it haunts. A typical limit is 120 feet. Some ghosts are instead bound to a room, building, item, or creature that was special to it rather than a location.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
纠正导致这名平民死亡的不公，使其得以前往来世。

当一个幽灵被摧毁后，它会在 [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天} 后于其所缚缚的地点内重新成形，并完全恢复。只有当有人查明它存在的原因，并纠正阻止该精魂安息的事物时，幽灵才能被永久摧毁。

Setting right the injustice that led to the commoner's death allows it to move on to the afterlife.

When a ghost is destroyed, it re-forms after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location it's bound to, fully healed. A ghost can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting.

Frightful Moan.name: 惊惧哀号 Frightful Moan
Frightful Moan.description:
幽灵哀叹自己的命运，迫使 @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30尺} 内的每个活着的生物进行一次 @Check[will|dc:21] 意志豁免。失败时，生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}）。成功时，生物在1分钟内暂时免疫此幽灵的惊怖哀嚎。

The ghost laments its fate, forcing each living creature within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} to attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save. On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} on a critical failure). On a success, a creature is temporarily immune to this ghost's frightful moan for 1 minute.

Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the.name: 居所学识（适用于该幽灵所束缚的地点） Dwelling Lore (applies to the place the ghost is bound to)

Ghost Commoner.publicNotes:
平民幽灵是一个相信自己死得不公的普通人。

当一些凡人因悲剧性的境遇死去，或带着未了之事离世时，他们的灵魂可能会逗留不去，并在一处对他们生前意义重大的地方作祟。

The ghost commoner is an ordinary person who believes they died unjustly.

When some mortals die through tragic circumstances or without closure, their souls can linger and haunt a locale significant to them in life.

Ghoul Shopkeeper.name: 食尸鬼店主 Ghoul Shopkeeper

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼邻近一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物尸体。

效果 食尸鬼吞食尸体的一大块，并恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值。

它每具尸体只能恢复一次生命值。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Whispers.name: 食尸鬼低语 Ghoul Whispers
Ghoul Whispers.description:
需求 一个处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 的生物位于食尸鬼的触及内

效果 食尸鬼向该生物耳中低语黑暗的念头与邪恶的渴求。该生物必须对“禁忌渴求”诅咒进行豁免。

禁忌渴求 (诅咒) 生物即使因该诅咒而恶心，仍然可以进食和饮水

豁免 @Check[will|dc:17|traits:curse]

阶段 1 携带者，没有不良影响（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}，直到其食用生肉为止（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2

阶段 4 同阶段2，除非目标在过去24小时内食用了生肉；若未食用，则其受到 @Damage[4d6[void]] 伤害并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}，直到其食用生肉为止；

阶段 5 如果该生物在过去24小时内吃过生肉，它就会死亡并以食尸鬼的形态复生；如果没有，则回到阶段4

Requirements A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} creature is within the ghoul's reach

Effect The ghoul whispers dark thoughts and vile cravings into the creature's ears. The creature must save against the forbidden cravings curse.

Forbidden Cravings (curse) A creature can still eat and drink while sickened by this curse

Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:17|traits:curse]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effects (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} until it consumes raw meat (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2

Stage 4 as stage 2 unless the target has consumed raw meat in the past 24 hours, then it takes @Damage[4d6[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} until it consumes raw meat;

Stage 5 if the creature has eaten raw meat in the past 24 hours, it dies and rises as a ghoul, if not, it returns to stage 4

Grave Knowledge.name: 坟墓知识 Grave Knowledge
Grave Knowledge.description:
[[/r 1d20+7]]{+7} 技能调整值

频率 每小时一次

效果 食尸鬼会调用其在过去 7 天内吞食过的一名生物所保留的知识。食尸鬼尝试进行一次技能检定，使用该被吞食生物受训过的一项技能（如果不清楚该生物是否受训，则由 GM 决定）。食尸鬼在该技能上视为受训，并使用适用于其等级的高技能调整值。进行此次检定所需的动作或时间与通常相同。

食尸鬼也可以改为自动获知其在过去 7 天内吞食过的一名生物所知晓的某条特定信息，例如一处@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}宝藏的位置，或某位挚爱之人的名字。对于同一名生物，无论食尸鬼吞食了其多少血肉，食尸鬼都只能这样做一次。

[[/r 1d20+7]]{+7} skill modifier

Frequency once per hour

Effect The ghoul calls upon knowledge it retains from one creature it has consumed in the past 7 days. The ghoul attempts a skill check using a skill in which the consumed creature was trained (if it's unclear whether the creature was trained, the GM decides). The ghoul is treated as trained and uses the high skill modifier for the ghoul's level. This takes the same amount of actions or time as usual for the check.

The ghoul can instead automatically learn something specific known by a creature it consumed in the last 7 days, like the location of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} treasure or the name of a loved one. The ghoul can do this only once for a given creature, no matter how much of its flesh the ghoul consumed.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
食尸鬼跳跃至多相当于其速度一半的距离。此移动不会触发反应动作。

The ghoul jumps up to half its Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Ghoul Shopkeeper.publicNotes:
食尸鬼潜猎者是贪婪饥渴的不死，它们徘徊于墓地并啃食尸体。

很少有生物能像被称为食尸鬼的食肉不死那样，如此普遍地出没于阴森之地，例如荒凉的墓地和破败的地穴。

Ghouls stalkers are ravenous undead who haunt graveyards and eat corpses.

Few creatures are more ubiquitous to sinister locations such as lonely graveyards and ruined crypts than the flesh-eating undead known as ghouls.

Omelia.name: 奥梅莉亚 Omelia

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧的皮革与模压的硬化皮革混合制成，能在提供一定防护的同时，保持最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸鬼邻近一具在过去1小时内死去的生物尸体。

效果 食尸鬼吞食尸体的一大块，并恢复 @Damage[(1+(max(0,floor(@actor.level/2))))d6[healing]] 点生命值。

它从任意给定尸体中恢复生命值都只能一次。

Requirements The ghoul is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The ghoul devours a chunk of the corpse and regains @Damage[(1+(max(0,floor(@actor.level/2))))d6[healing]] Hit Points.

It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Whispers.name: 食尸鬼低语 Ghoul Whispers
Ghoul Whispers.description:
需求 一个处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 状态的生物位于食尸鬼的触及内

效果 食尸鬼向该生物耳中低语黑暗的念头与邪恶的渴求。该生物必须对“禁忌渴求”诅咒进行豁免。

禁忌渴求 (诅咒) 生物即使因该诅咒而恶心，仍然可以吃喝。

豁免 @Check[will|dc:22|traits:curse]，使用该食尸鬼等级对应的高法术DC

阶段 1 携带者，无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}，直到其食用生肉为止（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2

阶段 4 同阶段2，除非目标在过去24小时内食用过生肉；若食用过，则其受到 @Damage[4d6[void]] 伤害并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}，直到其食用生肉为止；

阶段 5 如果该生物在过去24小时内吃过生肉，则其死亡并以食尸鬼的身份复生；否则，它回到阶段4

Requirements A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} creature is within the ghoul's reach

Effect The ghoul whispers dark thoughts and vile cravings into the creature's ears. The creature must save against the forbidden cravings curse.

Forbidden Cravings (curse) A creature can still eat and drink while sickened by this curse

Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:22|traits:curse], using the high spell DC for the ghoul's level

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effects (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} until it consumes raw meat (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2

Stage 4 as stage 2 unless the target has consumed raw meat in the past 24 hours, then it takes @Damage[4d6[void]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} until it consumes raw meat;

Stage 5 if the creature has eaten raw meat in the past 24 hours, it dies and rises as a ghoul, if not, it returns to stage 4

Grave Knowledge.name: 坟墓知识 Grave Knowledge
Grave Knowledge.description:
[[/gmr 1d20+13 #坟墓知识]]{+13} 技能调整值

频率 每小时一次

效果 食尸鬼会调用它在过去7天内吞食的一名生物所保留的知识。食尸鬼使用该被吞食生物受训的一项技能来尝试一次技能检定（如果无法确定该生物是否受训，则由GM决定）。食尸鬼视为受训，并使用+13调整值。为进行此次检定所需的动作或时间与平时相同。

作为替代，食尸鬼可以自动获知它在过去7天内吞食的一名生物所知晓的某条特定信息，例如一处@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}宝藏的位置，或某位挚爱之人的名字。对于同一名生物，无论食尸鬼吞食了其多少血肉，它都只能这样做一次。

[[/gmr 1d20+13 #Grave Knowledge]]{+13} skill modifier

Frequency once per hour

Effect The ghoul calls upon knowledge it retains from one creature it has consumed in the past 7 days. The ghoul attempts a skill check using a skill in which the consumed creature was trained (if it's unclear whether the creature was trained, the GM decides). The ghoul is treated as trained and uses a +13 modifier. This takes the same amount of actions or time as usual for the check.

The ghoul can instead automatically learn something specific known by a creature it consumed in the last 7 days, like the location of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} treasure or the name of a loved one. The ghoul can do this only once for a given creature, no matter how much of its flesh the ghoul consumed.

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
奥梅莉亚指定一个她能看见且听见的生物，或一个她正在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的生物，作为她的猎杀目标。她在对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}的察觉检定，以及对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的求生检定上，获得+2环境加值。每轮中，奥梅莉亚第一次命中她指定的猎物时，会额外造成1d8精准伤害。这些效果会持续，直到她再次使用猎杀目标。

Omelia designates a single creature she can see and hear, or one she's Tracking, as her prey. She gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey. The first time Omelia hits her designated prey in a round, she deals an additional 1d8 precision damage. These effects last until she uses Hunt Prey again.

Swift Leap.name: 迅捷跳跃 Swift Leap
Swift Leap.description:
食尸鬼向上跳跃，距离最多为其速度的一半。此次移动不会触发反应动作。

The ghoul jumps up to half its Speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Gravelands Lore.name: 死坟末土学识 Gravelands Lore

Omelia.blurb:
变体女性食尸鬼猎手
Variant female ghoul hunter

Skeletal Rat Swarm.name: 骷髅鼠群 Skeletal Rat Swarm
Skeletal Rat Swarm.tokenName: 骷髅鼠群 Skeletal Rat Swarm

Ravenous Sickness.name: 暴食症 Ravenous Sickness
Ravenous Sickness.description:
受感染的生物无法治疗其因该疾病受到的伤害，直到该疾病被治愈

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

阶段 1 携带者，无不良影响（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害，且目标为避免饥饿所需的食物量是其体型生物的两倍（1天）

阶段 3 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害，且目标为避免饥饿所需的食物量是其体型生物的三倍（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[1d6[void]] 伤害，且目标每小时受到 @Damage[1[void]] 伤害，直到其吃下一顿饱餐为止（1天）

阶段 5 死亡，在啃食掉自己骨头上的血肉后立即化为骷髅。

An infected creature can't heal damage it takes from this disease until the disease is cured

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage and the target requires twice as much food for a creature of their size to avoid starvation (1 day)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage and the target requires three times as much food for a creature of their size to avoid starvation (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[1d6[void]] damage and the target takes @Damage[1[void]] damage each hour until it eats a full meal (1 day)

Stage 5 dead, rising as a skeleton immediately after it devours the flesh off its own bones.

Swarming Bites.name: 鼠群噬咬 Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description:
虫群空间内的每个敌人受到 @Damage[3d4[piercing]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物会暴露于暴食症。

Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[3d4[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails this save is exposed to ravenous sickness.

Skeletal Rat Swarm.prototypeToken: 骷髅鼠群 Skeletal Rat Swarm

Mindless Grudge.name: 无心怨恨 Mindless Grudge
Mindless Grudge.description:
触发 一个生物对鸟群造成伤害

效果 鸟群对触发生物怀恨在心。鸟群的鸟群饥渴对该生物额外造成3点伤害。如果鸟群改为对另一个生物怀恨在心，此效果结束。

Trigger A creature deals damage to the murder

Effect The murder begrudges the triggering creature. The murder's swarming hunger deals 3 extra damage to that creature. The effect ends if the murder begrudges a different creature.

Swarming Hunger.name: 鸟群饥渴 Swarming Hunger
Swarming Hunger.description:
乌鸦群的喙与利爪对虫群空间内的每个敌人造成 @Damage[2d6[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] 豁免）。豁免大失败的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态，持续 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}，因为乌鸦群会集中攻击抓挠该生物的眼睛。

The murder's beaks and talons deal @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage to each enemy in the swarm's space (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} as the murder focuses its attacks on clawing out the creature's eyes.

Yeast Ooze.name: 酵母泥怪 Yeast Ooze

Motion Sense 60 feet.name: 动态感知 60 尺 Motion Sense 60 feet
Motion Sense 60 feet.description:
酵母泥怪可以通过振动以及空气或水的流动感知附近的生物。

A yeast ooze can sense nearby creatures through vibration and air or water movement.

Monstrous Yeast.name: 可怕酵母 Monstrous Yeast
Monstrous Yeast.description:
每当感染了可怕酵母的生物受到寒冷伤害时，他们都可以以+2环境加值进行一次新的豁免。失败不会使疾病推进

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

潜伏期 1轮

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（1小时）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1} and 措手不及（1小时）

阶段 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2} and 措手不及（1天）

Whenever a creature infected with monstrous yeast takes cold damage, they can make a new saving throw with a +2 circumstance bonus. Failure doesn't advance the disease

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

Onset 1 round

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 hour)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and off-guard (1 hour)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and off-guard (1 day)

Yeast Ooze.publicNotes:
城市污染滋生出各种新奇有趣的软泥怪生物。

野生酵母与炼金术结合，形成了这种可怖的泡沫翻腾软泥怪。

Urban pollution breeds all kinds of new and interesting ooze creatures.

Wild yeast and alchemy combine to form this monstrous frothing ooze.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
一只丧尸熊会永久处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}状态，且不能使用反应动作。

A zombie bear is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Murderous Mauler.name: 残暴猛击 Murderous Mauler
Murderous Mauler.description:
丧尸熊对其已使其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{抓握} 的生物进行伤害掷骰时，获得 +2 环境加值。

The zombie bear gains a +2 circumstance bonus to damage rolls against creatures it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}.

Decrepit Bridge.name: 破旧桥梁 Decrepit Bridge

Perilous Sway.name: 危险摇摆 Perilous Sway
Perilous Sway.description:
触发 一个中型或更大的生物在桥梁的区域内大步移动了10尺或更多

效果 桥上的所有生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|dc:18] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} ，直到其下个回合开始。

失败 该生物倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物从桥上坠落，落入下方20尺深的沟壑中。

Trigger A Medium or larger creature Strides 10 feet or more in the bridge's area

Effect All creatures on the bridge must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the beginning of its next turn.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The creature falls from the bridge, landing in the ravine 20 feet below.

Collapse.name: 坍塌 Collapse
Collapse.description:
破旧桥梁在首次之后每次触发其危险摇摆时，都要进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:5]。失败时，桥梁坍塌。桥上的所有生物都会坠落到下方 20 英尺深的峡谷中，并照常承受坠落伤害（@Damage[10[bludgeoning]|options:fall-damage] 伤害）。

Each time the decrepit bridge triggers its Perilous Sway after the first, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5]. On a failure, the bridge collapses. All creatures on the bridge fall 20 feet into the ravine, taking falling damage normally (@Damage[10[bludgeoning]|options:fall-damage] damage).

Decrepit Bridge.hazarddescription:
这座30英尺长、10英尺宽的桥在通行者的重量下发出吱呀声。

The 30-foot-long, 10-foot-wide bridge groans under the weight of those who cross it.

Grove of Despair.name: 绝望林地 Grove of Despair

Healing Potion (Lesser).name: 治疗药水（次级） Healing Potion (Lesser)
Healing Potion (Lesser).description:
启动 A (操作)

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用时会带来一阵刺痛般的酥麻感，随后饮用者的伤口迅速愈合。当你饮用治疗药水时，你恢复 @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] 点生命值。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain @Damage[(2d8+5)[healing]] Hit Points.

Haunting Echoes.name: 萦绕回响 Haunting Echoes

Manifest.name: 显现 Manifest
Manifest.description:
触发 一个生前为这些精魂所认识的生物进入作祟区域

效果 这些精魂伴随着可怕的哀嚎显现。区域内的每个生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:20] 意志豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}）。陷入恐慌的生物在其保持恐慌期间处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。随后，该作祟掷先攻。

Trigger A creature the spirits knew in life enters the haunted area

Effect The spirits manifest with a terrible wailing. Each creature in the area must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:20] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure). Frightened creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for as long as they remain frightened. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Haunting Echoes.disable:
@Check[diplomacy|dc:20]（未受训）以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}精魂离开，或@Check[religion|dc:18]（受训）以驱邪这些精魂

@Check[diplomacy|dc:20] (untrained) to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request} that the spirits leave or @Check[religion|dc:18] (trained) to exorcise the spirits
Haunting Echoes.hazarddescription:
社区成员们的灵魂在悲惨死去后依然徘徊不去。

The spirits of community members linger on after their tragic deaths.
Haunting Echoes.reset:
一旦所有惊惧的生物死亡或其惊惧（状态）值降至 0，这个作祟就会沉寂 24 小时。在此期间，未处于惊惧状态的生物可以通过一次 @Check[religion|dc:18] 宗教检定来驱逐这些精魂，从而永久摧毁该作祟。

The haunt falls silent for 24 hours once all frightened creatures die or reduce their frightened condition's value to 0. During this time, a creature that isn't frightened can exorcise the spirits with a @Check[religion|dc:18] check, permanently destroying the haunt.
Haunting Echoes.routine:
（1 动作；听觉、情绪、恐惧术、心灵）作祟以亡故亲人的声音轰炸每个生物，尝试进行一次威吓检定，使用 [[/gmr 1d20+11 #Intimidation]]{+11} 调整值，对抗每个处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧}（状态）的生物的意志 DC。

大成功 该生物受到 @Damage[2d4[mental]] 伤害，且其惊惧状态增加 1，最大至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 3}。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[1d4[mental]] 伤害。

失败 该生物不受影响。

大失败 该生物的惊惧状态减少 1。

(1 action; auditory, emotion, fear, mental) The haunt attempts an Intimidation check with a [[/gmr 1d20+11 #Intimidation]]{+11} modifier against the Will DC of each @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} creature as it bombards them with the voices of their dead loved ones.

Critical Success The creature takes @Damage[2d4[mental]] damage and its frightened condition increases by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d4[mental]] damage.

Failure The creature is unaffected.

Critical Failure The creature's frightened condition is reduced by 1.

Bright Barrel Brewery.name: 亮桶酿酒厂 Bright Barrel Brewery

Princastle Family Crest.name: 普林卡斯尔家族纹章 Princastle Family Crest
Princastle Family Crest.description:
一块刻有普林卡斯尔家族纹章的木牌（两只冒着泡沫的酒杯位于“希望战胜悲伤”这句话上方）

A wooden plaque bearing the Princastle family crest (a pair of frothing mugs above the words “Hope triumphs over sorrow”)

Bright Barrel Brewery.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.1v8K3QRJl6MUDqD2]{A9. 亮桶酿酒厂}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.1v8K3QRJl6MUDqD2]{A9. Bright Barrel Brewery}

Crusader's Remains.name: 圣战士的遗骸 Crusader's Remains
Crusader's Remains.tokenName: 圣战士的遗骸 Crusader's Remains

Full Plate.name: 全身板甲 Full Plate
Full Plate.description:
板甲由相互咬合的甲片构成，几乎将全身都包裹在一层钢铁甲壳之中。它价格高昂且十分沉重，穿戴者往往还需要他人协助才能正确穿上，不过它所提供的防护是护甲所能提供的最佳防御之一。这套护甲附带一件内衬的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{绗缝甲} 和一对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Plate mail consists of interlocking plates that encase nearly the entire body in a carapace of steel. It is costly and heavy, and the wearer often requires help to don it correctly, but it provides some of the best defense armor can supply. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木盾一样，钢盾也有各种形状和大小。虽然钢盾比木盾更昂贵，但它们要耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Longsword.name: 长剑 Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为单手剑，可以是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑身很重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Crusader's Remains.prototypeToken: 圣战士的遗骸 Crusader's Remains

Desk Drawer.name: 书桌抽屉 Desk Drawer

Scroll of Infuse Vitality (Rank 1).name: 灌注命能卷轴（1环） Scroll of Infuse Vitality (Rank 1)
Scroll of Infuse Vitality (Rank 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2iQKhCQBijhj5Rf3]{灌注命能}

从卷轴施放法术需要你单手持握卷轴，并以该法术通常所需的动作数进行一次施法（行动）来启用它。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于是你在施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的根源相应的特征（奥术、神术、异能或原始）。

任何实体材料成本都已在卷轴制作时提供，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从资料库或资料库浏览器拖入一名PC、NPC或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2iQKhCQBijhj5Rf3]{Infuse Vitality}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Desk Drawer.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.RTJyDJHSCX3bsiyA]{A6. 开锅餐馆}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.RTJyDJHSCX3bsiyA]{A6. The Open Pot}

Fine Tankard.name: 优质大酒杯 Fine Tankard

Finely Wrought Pewter Tankard.name: 做工精巧的白镴酒杯 Finely Wrought Pewter Tankard

Fine Tankard.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.RTJyDJHSCX3bsiyA]{A6. 开锅餐馆}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.RTJyDJHSCX3bsiyA]{A6. The Open Pot}

Flatpine's General Goods.name: 平松杂货铺 Flatpine's General Goods

Elixir of Life (Minor).name: 真实生命灵药（次级） Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

真实生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：真实生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).name: 炽火胶（次等） Alchemist's Fire (Lesser)
Alchemist's Fire (Lesser).description:
启动 A 打击

炽火胶是挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时会点燃。炽火胶造成1d8点火焰伤害、1点持续性火焰伤害和1点火焰溅射伤害。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 1d8 fire damage, 1 persistent fire damage, and 1 fire splash damage.

Flatpine's General Goods.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.rfBVrvDEeJEqyy1Y]{A3. 平松杂货铺}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.rfBVrvDEeJEqyy1Y]{A3. Flatpine's General Goods}

Hope's Breath Inn.name: 希望之息旅店 Hope's Breath Inn
Hope's Breath Inn.tokenName: 希望之息旅店 Hope's Breath Inn

Bedroll.name: 铺盖卷 Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一个卷起的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Antiplague (Lesser).name: 抗疫剂（次级） Antiplague (Lesser)
Antiplague (Lesser).description:
启动 A (操控)

抗疫剂能够强化身体对疾病的防御。饮用一剂抗疫剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免获得+2物品加值；这也适用于你对疾病进展进行的每日豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +2 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Elixir of Life (Minor).name: 生命灵药（初级） Elixir of Life (Minor)
Elixir of Life (Minor).description:
启动 A（操作）

真实生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程和免疫系统。饮用此灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[1d6[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内，对抗疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：真实生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[1d6[healing]] Hit Points and gain +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Healer's Toolkit.name: 治疗者工具包 Healer's Toolkit
Healer's Toolkit.description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医疗检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗创伤}所必需的。若你穿戴着治疗者工具包，你可以将取出和收回其中工具作为使用它们的那个动作的一部分。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace its tools as part of the action that uses them.

Hope's Breath Inn.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.VFuOb3aPbo9eqkea]{A4. 希望之息旅店}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.VFuOb3aPbo9eqkea]{A4. Hope's Breath Inn}
Hope's Breath Inn.prototypeToken: 希望之息旅店 Hope's Breath Inn

Mordesha House Lodge.name: 摩德沙会馆 Mordesha House Lodge
Mordesha House Lodge.tokenName: 摩德沙会馆 Mordesha House Lodge

Wayfinder.name: 寻路仪 Wayfinder
Wayfinder.description:
许可 开拓者协会成员

这枚小巧的罗盘重新利用了古老科技，从被称为灵子石的神秘魔法物品中引出奇异力量。它既是开拓者协会特工的身份徽章，也是各类冒险者间的身份象征。寻路仪可作为罗盘使用。

寻路仪中央的凹槽可容纳一枚灵子石。将一枚灵子石放入此凹槽后，你会获得如同该灵子石环绕你头部时的全部好处，但它也因此更不容易被注意到或被盗走。你同时为寻路仪及其中的灵子石进行投资，它们在你的投资上限中仅算作一个物品。嵌入寻路仪中的已投资灵子石还会赋予其共鸣能力。

如果你在同一时间身上携带超过一个装有已投资灵子石的寻路仪，它们共鸣产生的破坏性干扰会使你无法从其中任何一个获得好处。你仍然可以从其他环绕头部的灵子石中受益，只是不包括装在寻路仪里的那些。

启动—光亮术 A (专注)

效果 寻路仪成为一个1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮术}法术的目标。

Access member of the Pathfinder Society

This compact compass repurposes ancient technology to draw fantastic powers from the mysterious magical items called aeon stones. It serves as a badge of office for agents of the Pathfinder Society and as a status symbol among adventurers of any stripe. A wayfinder functions as a compass.

An indentation in the middle of the wayfinder can hold a single aeon stone. Placing an aeon stone in this indentation provides you all the benefits of having the aeon stone orbiting your head, but it protects the stone from being noticed or stolen as easily. You invest a wayfinder and the aeon stone within it simultaneously, and they count as only one item toward your investiture limit. An invested aeon stone slotted in a wayfinder also grants its resonant power.

If you have more than one wayfinder with an invested aeon stone on your person at a given time, destructive interference from their resonance prevents you from gaining benefits from any of them. You can still benefit from additional aeon stones orbiting your head, just not in wayfinders.

Activate—Light A (concentrate)

Effect The wayfinder is targeted by a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} spell.

Mordesha House Lodge.prototypeToken: 摩德沙会馆 Mordesha House Lodge

Town Hall Rubble.name: 城镇大厅石砾 Town Hall Rubble

Scroll Case Containing a Map to Vellumis.name: 装有前往维鲁米斯地图的卷轴匣 Scroll Case Containing a Map to Vellumis
Scroll Case Containing a Map to Vellumis.description:
这个带有白银封头的卷轴匣价值 2 gp。它里面装着一张尤娅之望周边区域的地图。地图上标出了几个主要地点，包括城市维鲁米斯。

This silver-capped scroll case is worth 2 gp. It contains a map of the area surrounding Yua's Hope. Several major locations are marked on the map, including the city of Vellumis.

Town Hall Rubble.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.v0RtmWyajB4I1SdO]{A8. 城镇大厅}

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.v0RtmWyajB4I1SdO]{A8. Town Hall}

Loose Floorboard.name: 松动的地板条 Loose Floorboard

Predator's Claw.name: 掠食者之爪 Predator's Claw
Predator's Claw.description:
启动 F （专注）

触发 你使用所附着的武器进行攻击检定并大成功

这只爪子固定在铁扣和链条上，通常来自一只大型掠食者。你启动这只爪子时，触发此次启动的攻击获得该武器的大成功专精效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Vvl1GFfuvFzvOkbD]{效果：Predator's Claw}

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You critically succeed at an attack roll with the affixed weapon

This claw set in an iron clasp and chain is usually that of a large predator. When you activate the claw, the triggering attack gains the weapon's critical specialization effect.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.Vvl1GFfuvFzvOkbD]{Effect: Predator's Claw}

Loose Floorboard.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.PgcfffdBy13csfpW]{事件12（25/50里程）：废弃小屋}

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.PgcfffdBy13csfpW]{Event 12 (Mile 25/50): Abandoned Cottage}

Fallen Crusaders.name: 陨落的圣战士们 Fallen Crusaders
Fallen Crusaders.tokenName: 陨落的十字军 Fallen Crusaders

Greatsword.name: 巨剑 Greatsword
Greatsword.description:
这把巨大的双手剑几乎与持用者一样高。它的下半截剑刃通常会稍微磨钝，以便在近身战斗中握持来获得额外的杠杆力。

This immense two-handed sword is nearly as tall as its wielder. Its lower blade is often somewhat dulled to allow it to be gripped for extra leverage in close-quarter fights.

Shortbow.name: 短弓 Shortbow
Shortbow.description:
这种较小的弓由整块木料制成，深受散兵和骑兵青睐。

This smaller bow is made of a single piece of wood and favored by skirmishers and cavalry.

Handwraps of Mighty Blows.name: 强击缠手带 Handwraps of Mighty Blows
Handwraps of Mighty Blows.description:
当你将这些绣花布条灌注时，你必须冥想，并缓慢地将它们缠绕在双手上。这些强击缠手上刻有武器符文，使你的徒手攻击获得这些符文的益处，让你的徒手攻击如同魔法武器一般运作。例如，+1 striking handwraps of mighty blows会使你的徒手攻击获得攻击检定的+1物品加值，并将你徒手攻击的伤害从1个武器伤害骰提升为2个（通常为2d4而非1d4，但如果你的拳头使用不同的武器伤害骰，或者你拥有其他徒手攻击，则改为使用该骰型的2个骰子）。

你可以像对武器那样升级、添加和转移强击缠手上的符文，也可以将护符附在强击缠手上。为此，将强击缠手视为属于斗殴组、负载为轻的近战武器。若属性符文适用于你所使用的徒手攻击，它们才会生效。例如，必须附加在挥砍武器上的属性，在你用拳头攻击时不会起作用；但如果你以爪击或其他挥砍类徒手攻击进行攻击，你就会获得其益处。

As you invest these embroidered strips of cloth, you must meditate and slowly wrap them around your hands. These handwraps have weapon runes etched into them to give your unarmed attacks the benefits of those runes, making your unarmed attacks work like magic weapons. For example, +1 striking handwraps of mighty blows would give you a +1 item bonus to attack rolls with your unarmed attacks and increase the damage of your unarmed attacks from one weapon die to two (normally 2d4 instead of 1d4, but if your fists have a different weapon damage die or you have other unarmed attacks, use two of that die size instead).

You can upgrade, add, and transfer runes to and from the handwraps just as you would for a weapon, and you can attach talismans to the handwraps. Treat the handwraps as melee weapons of the brawling group with light Bulk for these purposes. Property runes apply only when they would be applicable to the unarmed attack you're using. For example, a property that must be applied to a slashing weapon wouldn't function when you attacked with a fist, but you would gain its benefits if you attacked with a claw or some other slashing unarmed attack.

Fallen Crusaders.prototypeToken: 陨落的圣战士 Fallen Crusaders

Chernasardo Chomper.name: 切尔那萨多咬碎者 Chernasardo Chomper
Chernasardo Chomper.tokenName: 切尔那萨多撕咬者 Chernasardo Chomper

Bite.name: 夹住 Bite
Bite.description:
触发 一个生物移动进入包含该陷阱的空间

效果 陷阱的颚咬猛然闭合，咬住该生物的腿，造成 @Damage[(4d8+14)[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] 豁免）。失败时，该生物会被陷阱夹住并处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} DC 22）。

Trigger A creature moves into the space containing the trap

Effect The trap's jaws snap shut on the creature's leg, dealing @Damage[(4d8+14)[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save). On a failure, the creature becomes caught in the trap and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC 22).

Chernasardo Chomper.disable:
@Check[acrobatics|dc:26]（受训）以在陷阱触发前移步避开，或 @Check[thievery|dc:22]（受训）以无害地触发陷阱

@Check[acrobatics|dc:26] (trained) to step clear the snare before it springs, or @Check[thievery|dc:22] (trained) to trigger the trap harmlessly
Chernasardo Chomper.hazarddescription:
这些动物陷阱被改作驱退不受欢迎的闯入者之用。当一个生物踩上陷阱时，带有锋利牙齿的颚咬会合拢，咬住该生物的腿。

These animal snares have been repurposed to discourage unwanted intruders. When a creature steps onto the snare, jaws with sharpened teeth close around the creature's leg.
Chernasardo Chomper.stealthdetails:
（受训）以发现这个陷阱

(trained) to spot the snare
Chernasardo Chomper.prototypeToken: 切尔那萨多撕咬者 Chernasardo Chomper

Chernasardo Ranger.name: 切尔那萨多游侠 Chernasardo Ranger
Chernasardo Ranger.tokenName: 切尔那萨多游侠 Chernasardo Ranger

Snare Kit (Specialist).name: 陷阱工具包（专精） Snare Kit (Specialist)
Snare Kit (Specialist).description:
这个工具包包含用于制作陷阱的工具和材料。陷阱工具包让你能够使用手艺（技能）来制作陷阱。专家陷阱工具包会使你的该检定获得+1物品加值。

This kit contains tools and materials for creating snares. A snare kit allows you to Craft snares using the Crafting skill. A specialist snare kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的羽饰保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Double Shot.name: 双发连射 Double Shot
Double Shot.description:
游侠用短弓进行两次打击，以两个位于短弓第一射程增量内的不同生物为目标。这两次打击都使用游侠当前的多重攻击减值，但每次打击都要承受 –2 减值。

The ranger makes two shortbow Strikes targeting two different creatures within the shortbow's first range increment. Both Strikes use the ranger's current multiple attack penalty, but each strike takes a –2 penalty.

Quick Draw.name: 即时备战 Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description:
游侠拔出一件武器，然后用那件武器进行打击。

The ranger draws a weapon, then Strikes with that weapon.

Chernasardo Ranger.prototypeToken: 切尔那萨多游侠 Chernasardo Ranger

Commander Arsiella Dei.name: 指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊 Commander Arsiella Dei
Commander Arsiella Dei.tokenName: 指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊 Commander Arsiella Dei

Ranger Warden Spells.name: 游侠守护者法术 Ranger Warden Spells

Soothing Mist.name: 抚慰之雾 Soothing Mist
Soothing Mist.description:
你召唤出一片魔法迷雾，将一个生物笼罩其中。迷雾使一个活体目标生物恢复 2d8 生命值，并终止其所受的一种持续性的强酸、流血、火焰、毒素或虚空伤害来源。如果该生物正因多个来源承受持续伤害，则由你选择移除其中哪一个。对于一个不死目标，你造成 2d8 活力伤害（基础强韧豁免）；如果其豁免失败，它还会受到 @Damage[(@item.rank)[persistent,vitality]] 伤害。

升阶（+1） 治疗量（或对不死目标造成的伤害）增加 1d8，且对不死生物造成的持续活力伤害增加 1。

You call forth a magical mist that envelops a creature. The mist restores 2d8 Hit Points to a target living creature and ends one source of persistent acid, bleed, fire, poison, or void damage affecting it. If the creature is taking persistent damage from multiple sources, you select which one is removed. Against an undead target, you deal 2d8 vitality damage (basic Fortitude save); if it fails the save, it also takes @Damage[(@item.rank)[persistent,vitality]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing (or damage to an undead target) increases by 1d8, and the persistent vitality damage to an undead creature increases by 1.

Gravity Weapon.name: 重力武器 Gravity Weapon
Gravity Weapon.description:
你积聚重力，并将其导入你的打击之中，使你无论使用刀剑还是弓箭都能发动更强力的攻击。在每轮你的第一次武器打击时，你获得等于武器伤害骰数量两倍的伤害状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.tNjimcyUwn8afeH6]{法术效果：重力武器}

You build up gravitational force and funnel it into your blows, leading to more powerful attacks with blade and bow alike. On your first weapon Strike each round, you gain a status bonus to damage equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.tNjimcyUwn8afeH6]{Spell Effect: Gravity Weapon}

Irgal's Axe.name: 伊尔加尔之斧 Irgal's Axe
Irgal's Axe.description:
这些斧头被明确设计为武器，而非工具。它们通常更轻，斧柄以金属箍或铆钉加固，且刃部更锋利，使其更适合砍断肢体而非劈柴。

These axes are designed explicitly as weapons, rather than tools. They typically weigh less, with a shaft reinforced with metal bands or bolts, and have a sharper blade, making them ideal for chopping limbs rather than wood.

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
尽管被称为胸甲，这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用以保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时也保护臀部和小腿。它在策略性地提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Leather Armor.name: 皮甲 Leather Armor
Leather Armor.description:
这种护甲由柔韧与定型的煮制皮革混合制成，在提供一定防护的同时，保有最大的灵活性。

A mix of flexible and molded boiled leather, a suit of this type of armor provides some protection with maximum flexibility.

Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛圣徽 Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这块木制或白银制的物品上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。某些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。宗教圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以持握。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Blind-Fight.name: 盲斗 Blind-Fight
Blind-Fight.description:
阿尔西艾拉以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}生物为目标时，无需成功通过纯骰检定。对于那些对她而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{藏匿（状态）}的生物，她不会处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}（除非她因藏匿状态以外的其他原因而对其措手不及），并且只需在以藏匿生物为目标时成功通过一次@Check[flat|dc:5]。

Arsiella doesn't need to succeed at a flat check to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} creatures. She isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to creatures that are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from her (unless she's off-guard to them for reasons other than the hidden condition) and only needs a successful @Check[flat|dc:5] to target a hidden creature.

For Nirmathas!.name: 为了尼尔玛萨斯！ For Nirmathas!
For Nirmathas!.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 阿尔谢拉对同一目标进行两次战斧打击。两次打击都使用阿尔谢拉当前的多重攻击减值，但每次打击还要承受 –2 减值。若目标在同一回合内被这两次攻击都命中，则还必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:26] 强韧豁免，否则被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

Frequency once per round

Effect Arsiella makes two battle axe Strikes against the same target. Both Strikes use Arsiella's current multiple attack penalty, but each Strike takes a –2 penalty. A target hit by both attacks on the same turn must also succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:26] saving throw or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Heavenly Strike.name: 天佑打击 Heavenly Strike
Heavenly Strike.description:
阿尔西艾拉呼唤她父亲的精魂与艾奥梅黛的力量来灌注她的武器，随后用该武器进行一次打击。若此次打击命中，阿尔西艾拉会额外造成一个武器伤害骰的活力伤害。

Arsiella calls on the spirit of her father and the strength of Iomedae to infuse her weapon, then Strikes with that weapon. If the Strike hits, Arsiella deals an extra weapon die of vitality damage.

Hunt Prey.name: 猎杀目标 Hunt Prey
Hunt Prey.description:
阿尔西艾拉指定一个她看得见且听得见的单一生物，或一个她正在追踪的生物，作为她的猎杀目标。她对其猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}的察觉检定，以及对其猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的求生检定，获得+2环境加值。每轮中她第一次命中指定的猎物时，会额外造成1d8精准伤害。她在攻击其猎物时，还会无视在第二个射程增量内进行远程攻击的减值。这些效果会持续，直到她再次使用猎杀目标。

Arsiella designates a single creature she can see and hear, or one she's Tracking, as her prey. She gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} her prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} her prey. The first time she hits her designated prey in a round, she deals an additional 1d8 precision damage. She also ignores the penalty for making ranged attacks within the second range increment when attacking her prey. These effects last until she uses Hunt Prey again.

Quick Draw.name: 即时备战 Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description:
阿尔西艾拉拔出一把武器，然后用那把武器进行一次打击。

Arsiella draws a weapon, then Strikes with that weapon.

Skirmish Strike.name: 游击打击 Skirmish Strike
Skirmish Strike.description:
阿尔西艾拉要么先跨步然后打击，要么先打击然后跨步。

Arsiella either Steps and then Strikes, or Strikes and then Steps.

Iomedae Lore.name: 艾奥梅黛学识 Iomedae Lore

Commander Arsiella Dei.blurb:
切尔纳萨多守望者和奥泽姆堡指挥官
Chernasardo Warden and Commander of Fort Ozem
Commander Arsiella Dei.prototypeToken: 指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊 Commander Arsiella Dei

Electrified Entrance.name: 带电入口 Electrified Entrance

Sizzle.name: 滋滋作响 Sizzle
Sizzle.description:
一个生物穿过门口移动

效果 电弧闪过门槛。触发该效果的生物受到 @Damage[(4d8+18)[electricity]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:23|basic] 豁免）。失败时，该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，持续1分钟。大失败时，该生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1分钟，随后再陷入目眩1分钟。

A creature moves through the doorway

Effect Arcs of lightning flash across the threshold. The triggering creature takes @Damage[(4d8+18)[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:23|basic] save). On a failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute. On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute and then dazzled for an additional minute.

Electrified Entrance.disable:
@Check[acrobatics|dc:26]（受训）在符文触发前跳过门，@Check[thievery|dc:28]（专家）刮除符文，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（4环；反制 DC 24）来反制符文

@Check[acrobatics|dc:26] (trained) to jump through the door before the runes trigger, @Check[thievery|dc:28] (expert) to scratch out the runes, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (4th rank; counteract DC 24) to counteract the runes
Electrified Entrance.hazarddescription:
魔法符文会电击任何跨过门槛的人。

Magical runes electrocute anyone who crosses the door's threshold.
Electrified Entrance.stealthdetails:
（受训）以发现刻在门框上的符文

(trained) to spot the runes etched into the door's frame

Engerra.name: 萤火灵 Engerra

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Invoke Spirits.name: 唤请亡魂 Invoke Spirits
Invoke Spirits.description:
死者衣衫褴褛的幽影升起，追猎生者。它们对区域内每个活着的生物造成 2d4 心灵伤害和 2d4 虚空伤害，进行一次基础意志豁免。此外，重度失败豁免的生物会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，并且在 1 轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑} 状态。

在后续轮次中，每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以将该区域在法术射程内移动至多 30 尺。新区域内活着的生物必须以与上述相同的效果进行豁免，但重度失败不会使它们逃跑。

强化（+2） 心灵伤害和虚空伤害各增加 1d4。

Ragged apparitions of the dead rise to stalk the living. They deal 2d4 mental damage and 2d4 void damage to each living creature in the area, with a basic Will save. Additionally, creatures that critically fail the save are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

On subsequent rounds, the first time you Sustain the Spell each round, you can move the area up to 30 feet within the range of the spell. Living creatures in the new area must attempt saves with the same effects as above, except that critically failing doesn't make them flee.

Heightened (+2) The mental damage and void damage each increase by 1d4.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标无论语言为何都能理解所有词语，也能说其他生物的语言。处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并使用该生物能够理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Crisis of Faith.name: 信仰危机 Crisis of Faith
Crisis of Faith.description:
你攻击目标的信仰，使该生物充满怀疑与心灵上的纷乱，造成6d6心灵伤害；如果它能够施放神术法术，则改为造成6d8心灵伤害。其效果由其意志豁免决定。

对许多神祇而言，若无重大缘由便对你所信奉的同一神祇的追随者施放此法术，属于禁忌。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害；若目标能够施放神术法术，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续1轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}，持续1轮，且在1轮内无法施放神术法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高2d6（若目标为神术施法者，则提高2d8）。

You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells. The effects are determined by its Will save.

To many deities, casting this spell on a follower of your own deity without significant cause is anathema.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage; if the target can cast divine spells, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and can't cast divine spells for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 (or by 2d8 if the target is a divine spellcaster).

Holy Light.name: 圣光 Holy Light
Holy Light.description:
你射出一道炽烈的光线，其中带有圣洁能量。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成 5d6 火焰伤害。若目标具有邪秽特征，你额外造成 5d6 精魂伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害。

成功 目标受到全部伤害。

若这道光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，圣光 会尝试反制该黑暗。若你需要判定这道光线是否穿过某片黑暗区域，在你自己与该法术的目标之间画一条线。

升阶（+1） 火焰伤害增加 2d6，而对邪秽生物造成的精魂伤害增加 2d6。

You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target has the unholy trait, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, holy light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against unholy creatures increases by 2d6.

Enfeeble.name: 虚弱术 Enfeeble
Enfeeble.description:
你削弱目标的力量，效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，直到你的下个回合开始。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 3}，持续1分钟。

You sap the target's strength, depending on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你以命能力量强化攻击。目标数量等于你施放此法术时花费的动作数。每个目标的徒手和武器打击额外造成 1d4 点活力伤害。（这种伤害通常只会伤害不死生物。）如果你具有圣洁特征，你可以将该特征加入此法术以及受此法术影响的打击中。

升阶（3环） 伤害增加至 2d4。

升阶（5环） 伤害增加至 3d4。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

You empower attacks with vital energy. The number of targets is equal to the number of actions you spent casting this spell. Each target's unarmed and weapon Strikes deal an extra 1d4 vitality damage. (This damage typically damages only undead). If you have the holy trait, you can add that trait to this spell and to the Strikes affected by the spell.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) The damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Infuse Vitality}

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
你创造出一个光球，以你选择的颜色在20尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的20尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿生物所处的同一空间内创造该光球，你可以将光球附着在该生物身上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以通过维持该法术将光球移动至多60尺；作为此次移动的一部分，你可以将其附着到一个生物身上或使其脱离。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光亮术生效时再次施放该法术，你必须选择一个现有法术使其结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

高阶化（4环） 该光球在60尺半径内发出光照（并在接下来的60尺内提供昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Stabilize.name: 维稳术 Stabilize
Stabilize.description:
生命能量将死亡拒之门外。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 状态，但在 0 生命值时仍处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}。

Life energy shuts death's door. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Firefly's Remembrance.name: 萤火虫之忆 Firefly's Remembrance
Firefly's Remembrance.description:
萤火灵体现了敬重死者的理念。当萤火灵对一个它曾听到其临终遗言被大声说出的生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}时，它将其掷骰结果的结果视为高一级的成功等级。

Engerras embody the ethos of honoring the dead. When the engerra @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recalls Knowledge} about a creature whose final words it has heard spoken aloud, it uses the outcome one degree of success better than the result of its roll.

+1 Status Bonus to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status Bonus to All Saves vs. Magic

Disperse.name: 分散 Disperse
Disperse.description:
萤火灵进行大步移动或飞行。此次移动不会触发反应动作。在此次移动期间，萤火灵可以穿过被占据的空间和超小型裂缝，并且无视困难地形和强效困难地形。随后，它重新凝聚回其正常形态。

The engerra Strides or Flies. This movement doesn't trigger reactions. During the movement, the engerra can move through occupied spaces and tiny cracks, and it ignores difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain. It then coalesces back into its normal form.

Dying Breath.name: 垂死之息 Dying Breath
Dying Breath.description:
萤火灵从周围会呼吸的生物身边抽走空气，让它们产生自己正吸入最后一口气的感觉。区域内的敌人必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:26|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] 豁免。若至少有一个生物豁免失败，萤火灵可以将偷来的气息赋予 40 尺内一个自愿的生物，使该生物获得持续 1 分钟的 [[/gmr 2d6 #Temp HP]] 临时生命值。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(2d6+7)[mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

大失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(3d6+10)[mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，并在 1 分钟内变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}。

The engerra draws the air from around breathing creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40], giving them the feeling of drawing their last breath. Enemies in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:26|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save. If at least one creature fails the save, the engerra can gift the stolen breath to a willing creature within 40 feet, granting that creature [[/gmr 2d6 #Temp HP]] temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(2d6+7)[mental]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[(3d6+10)[mental]|options:area-damage] damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 minute.

Final Words of Doom.name: 毁灭终言 Final Words of Doom
Final Words of Doom.description:
萤火灵向40尺内的一名敌人低语厄运之言。该生物必须进行一次 @Check[will|dc:26] 豁免。

大成功 同成功，且该生物获得1分钟的暂时免疫。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(3d8+13)[mental]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{末运 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(4d8+18)[mental]] 伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{末运 2}，持续1分钟。
