The engerra whispers words of doom to an enemy within 40 feet. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:26] save.

Critical Success As success, and the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(3d8+13)[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[(4d8+18)[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2} for 1 minute.

Final Words of Wisdom.name: 智慧终言 Final Words of Wisdom
Final Words of Wisdom.description:
萤火灵找到话语来鼓舞一名生物的精神。萤火灵花费10分钟与一名自愿的生物说话。如果该生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，它便不再处于疲乏。该生物在1年内不能再次从任何萤火灵的智慧终言中受益。

The engerra finds words to bolster a creature's spirits. The engerra spends 10 minutes speaking with a willing creature. If that creature has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} condition, it's no longer fatigued. The creature can't benefit from any engerra's Final Words of Wisdom again for 1 year.

Engerra.publicNotes:
诞生于那些为比自身更伟大的事物献出生命者，萤火灵看起来如同一群发光的萤火虫，有时会被误认为是鬼火，或只是光影造成的错觉。它们最常见于传奇英雄的陵墓之中，但凡有此类英雄咽下最后一口气的地方，它们也可能徘徊不去。

萤火灵相信，关于高尚牺牲的故事蕴含着强大的力量。它们收集那些为崇高事业而死之人的记忆，然后将这些记忆分享给可能从中获得激励或慰藉的凡人。萤火灵标志性的光辉既是悲伤的象征，也是希望的象征，因为它同时将一位伟大英雄的死亡，与铭记并继承那位英雄遗志的决心联系在一起。

Born of those who sacrificed their lives for something greater than themselves, engerras resemble swarms of glowing fireflies and are sometimes mistaken for will-o'-wisps or simple tricks of the light. They are most often encountered in the tombs of legendary heroes but might linger anywhere such a hero has drawn their final breath.

Engerras believe that tales of worthy sacrifice hold great power. They gather the memories of those who died in service of a noble cause and then share those memories with mortals who might be inspired or cheered by them. An engerra's trademark glow is a sign of both sorrow and hope, for it simultaneously associates the death of a great hero with the determination to honor that hero's legacy.

Iomedae's Flame.name: 艾奥梅黛之焰 Iomedae's Flame
Iomedae's Flame.tokenName: 艾奥梅黛之焰 Iomedae's Flame

Flaring Flame.name: 燃烧火焰 Flaring Flame
Flaring Flame.description:
触发 生物移动进入火焰光照半径内，或在该半径内开始其回合

效果 艾奥梅黛之焰 猛然闪耀，并根据火焰当前的颜色产生不同效果。艾奥梅黛的追随者对抗火焰效果所进行的所有豁免，其结果均视为提升一级。这些效果可累积；进入红色火焰半径的生物也会触发白色、黄色和蓝色火焰的效果。

白色火焰 火焰施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE]{显光尘}（DC 28）。

黄色火焰 火焰对光照半径内的每个生物施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{恐惧术}（DC 28）。

蓝色火焰 火焰摇曳，狂风拍击区域内的生物。处于火焰光照内的任何生物都会受到 @Damage[8d4[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。此伤害对活体生物具有非致命（特征）。

红色火焰 火焰释放出一阵突如其来的强烈热浪。处于火焰光照内的任何生物都会受到 @Damage[4d6[fire],4d6[spirit]|options:area-damage|traits:holy]{4d6 fire damage and 4d6 spirit damage} 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。此伤害具有圣洁（特征）。

Trigger A creature moves into the radius of the flame's light or starts its turn in the radius

Effect Iomedae's Flame flares, producing an effect determined by the flame's current color. Followers of Iomedae treat the result of all saving throws against the flame's effects as one step better. The effects are cumulative; a creature that enters the radius of the red flame also triggers the effect of the white, yellow, and blue flames.

White Flame The flame casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0qaqksrGGDj74HXE]{Revealing Light} (DC 28).

Yellow Flame The flame casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear} (DC 28) on each creature in the light's radius.

Blue Flame The flame flickers as winds buffet creatures in the area. Any creature in the flame's light takes @Damage[8d4[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). This damage has the nonlethal trait against living creatures.

Red Flame The flame releases a sudden pulse of intense heat. Any creature in the flame's light takes @Damage[4d6[fire],4d6[spirit]|options:area-damage|traits:holy]{4d6 fire damage and 4d6 spirit damage} (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). This damage has the holy trait.

Iomedae's Flame.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:30]、@Check[nature|dc:30]、@Check[occultism|dc:30]或@Check[religion|dc:30]（专家）以用对立魔法熄灭火焰；每次成功使火焰的颜色降低一级（从红色到蓝色，蓝色到黄色，依此类推）。大成功使火焰的颜色降低两级。当火焰为白色时成功，则会永久停用该危害。

@Check[arcana|dc:30], @Check[nature|dc:30], @Check[occultism|dc:30], or @Check[religion|dc:30] (expert) to snuff out the flame with opposing magic; each success reduces the flame's color one step (from red to blue, blue to yellow, and so on). A critical success reduces the flame's color two steps. A success while the flame is white permanently disables the hazard.
Iomedae's Flame.hazarddescription:
一道魔法火焰会随着奥泽姆要塞的警戒状态改变颜色，作用范围为 @Template[emanation|distance:10]{10英尺半径}。

A magical flame changes color in response to Fort Ozem's alert status, with a @Template[emanation|distance:10]{10-foot radius}.
Iomedae's Flame.reset:
该危害每轮自动重置。1小时后，火焰恢复为默认状态的白色火焰。

The hazard resets automatically each round. After 1 hour, the flame reverts to its default status of a white flame.
Iomedae's Flame.prototypeToken: 艾奥梅黛之焰 Iomedae's Flame

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木盾一样，钢盾也有各种形状和大小。尽管比木盾更昂贵，但它们也耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Half Plate.name: 半身板甲 Half Plate
Half Plate.description:
半身板甲由全身板甲所用的大部分上身甲片构成，手臂和腿部则采用更轻或覆盖更少的钢板防护。它在提供部分全身板甲防护的同时，拥有更好的灵活性和速度。一套这种护甲附带一件 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{绗缝甲} 和一对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{护手}。

Half plate consists of most of the upper body plates used in full plate, with lighter or sparser steel plate protection for the arms and legs. This provides some of the protection of full plate with greater flexibility and speed. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Deep Resilience.name: 坚韧毅力 Deep Resilience
Deep Resilience.description:
复国骑士的信念坚定其心智，使其能够抵御外来的影响，并帮助盟友保持坚强。该骑士及其30尺内的盟友在对抗心灵效果的豁免时获得+1环境加值；若对抗源自不死的心灵效果，该加值提升为+2。

The knight reclaimant's convictions steel their mind against outside influences and help their allies remain strong. The knight and their allies within 30 feet have a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against mental effects, which increases to +2 against mental effects originating from undead.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持握着一面盾牌。

你调整盾牌的位置以保护自己。当你已执行举盾时，你获得其所列出的 AC 环境加值。你的盾牌会一直保持举起，直到你的下个回合开始。

Requirements You are wielding a shield.

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

Sudden Charge.name: 突袭冲锋 Sudden Charge
Sudden Charge.description:
频率 每回合一次

效果 骑士进行两次大步移动。如果其移动结束时处于至少一个敌人的近战触及内，则骑士可以对该敌人进行一次近战打击。

Frequency once per turn

Effect The knight Strides twice. If they end their movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, the knight can make a melee Strike against that enemy.

Gravelands Lore.name: 死坟末土学识 Gravelands Lore

Mirmicette.name: 觅宝精 Mirmicette

Claw Feint.name: 爪击虚招 Claw Feint
Claw Feint.description:
觅宝精进行一连串迅捷的爪击攻击，先以第一次攻击使其敌人对来自不同角度的第二次攻击陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}。它进行两次爪击打击，且都针对同一目标。目标会自动在第二次攻击中处于措手不及。觅宝精照常将其多重攻击减值应用于这些打击。

The mirmicette makes a series of quick claw attacks, using the first attack to throw their foe @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against a second attack from a different angle. They make two claw Strikes, both against the same target. The target is automatically off-guard against the second attack. The mirmicette applies their multiple attack penalty to these Strikes normally.

Copied Clutter.name: 复制杂物 Copied Clutter
Copied Clutter.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 觅宝精制造出其看见的一个1负载或以下物体的数十个复制品。这些赝品如雨般落下，覆盖40尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]。该区域内的地面变为困难地形，直到这些物品被收集并移走。区域内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[reflex|dc:24|options:area-effect,damaging-effect]豁免。

成功 该生物受到@Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害。

失败 该生物受到@Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害，并陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，持续1轮。

大失败 该生物受到@Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害并被击倒为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

Frequency once per day

Effect The mirmicette creates dozens of copies of an object of 1 Bulk or less that the mirmicette can see. The counterfeit items rain down in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] within 40 feet. The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain until the items are collected and removed. Creatures in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:24|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

Success The creature takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[8d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Create Counterfeit.name: 制造赝品 Create Counterfeit
Create Counterfeit.description:
觅宝精复制一个他们能看见、负载为1或更低的物品。该物品出现在觅宝精手中，或出现在40尺内的一处空间中。就外观而言，这个复制品与原物完全一致，但实际上只是毫无价值的仿制品。这个赝品是真实的，但不具有任何魔法属性；如果将其用作武器或工具，则视为一件劣质物品。可以通过一次 DC 35 的回忆知识检定，以制作（或与该物品相关的技能；例如，针对复制的宗教圣徽可用宗教）来辨认出被复制的物品，不过如果该物品距离创造它的觅宝精超过40尺，则 DC 降为25。

The mirmicette creates a copy of an object of 1 Bulk or less that they can see. The object appears in the mirmicette's hands or in a space within 40 feet. To all appearances, the copy is an exact duplicate of the original object but is in fact a worthless reproduction. The counterfeit object is real but has no magical properties and is treated as a shoddy item if used as a weapon or tool. The copied object can be identified with a DC 35 check to Recall Knowledge with Crafting (or with a skill related to the item; for instance, Religion for a copied religious symbol), though the DC drops to 25 if the object is more than 40 feet away from the mirmicette who created it.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description:
觅宝精对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}的生物额外造成2d6精准伤害。

The mirmicette deals an additional 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Mirmicette.publicNotes:
觅宝精是物质至上的妖精，会近乎痴迷地收集小工具、家居用品以及类似的小玩意儿。虽然它们并不算特别恶毒，但觅宝精觉得自己收集的物品比制造这些物品的智慧生物更有趣。它们长着平淡不起眼的灰色面孔，以及末端带有爪状指甲的细长手指，并用这些手指把自己垂涎的任何物品从其原本安放之处摘走。

觅宝精四处游荡，寻找可加入自己不断扩大的收藏中的宝藏。当觅宝精偷走一个物体时，它们往往会用一个几乎完美的复制品替换失窃之物。只要妖精就在附近，觅宝精的复制品便极具迷惑性；而随着觅宝精与该物体之间的距离拉大，这些复制品会迅速失去光彩。尽管这种调包行为让许多冒险者大失所望，但在遭遇觅宝精时，失去财物远非人们可能经历的最糟结果。觅宝精厌恶任何未经许可触碰它们赝品的人，且常常会把那个物体本身当作武器来对付那个企图行窃者。

Mirmicettes are materialistic fey who obsessively collect small tools, household goods, and similar trinkets. Though not particularly malevolent, mirmicettes consider the items they collect more interesting than the sentient creatures who create them. They have nondescript, unassuming gray faces and spindly fingers that end in clawlike nails, which they use to pluck any item they covet from its resting place.

Mirmicettes wander from place to place in search of treasures to add to their ever-growing collections. When a mirmicette steals an object, they often replace the stolen item with a near-perfect copy. Mirmicette copies are most convincing when the fey is close by, quickly losing their luster as the distance between the mirmicette and the object grows. While this swapping has led to the disappointment of many an adventurer, a loss of material goods is far from the worst outcome one might experience when encountering a mirmicette. Mirmicettes dislike anyone who touches one of their counterfeit items without permission, often using the object itself as a weapon against the would-be thief.

Names of the Nameless.name: 无名者之名 Names of the Nameless
Names of the Nameless.tokenName: 无名者之名 Names of the Nameless

Disappearing Door.name: 消失的门 Disappearing Door
Disappearing Door.description:
触发 一个生物进入房间

效果 一面幻象墙横亘在房间入口处出现。成功通过 @Check[perception|dc:30] 检定的生物会识破该幻象，从而能够离开该区域。随后，该作祟进行先攻掷骰。

Trigger A creature enters the room

Effect An illusory wall appears across the room's entrance. A creature who succeeds at @Check[perception|dc:30] check disbelieves the illusion, allowing them to leave the area. The haunt then rolls initiative.

Names of the Nameless.disable:
@Check[perception|dc:26] 以辨认无名死者所说出的一个名字，或 @Check[religion|dc:28] （专家）以让无名死者安息。大声说出三个名字会使该作祟失效。任何大声说出其他名字的生物都必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:28] 意志豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Conf乱}，持续 1 轮。

@Check[perception|dc:26] to discern a name spoken by the nameless dead, or @Check[religion|dc:28] (expert) to put the nameless dead to rest. Speaking three names aloud disables the haunt. A creature that speaks any other name aloud must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.
Names of the Nameless.hazarddescription:
无名死者的声音侵入生者的心智。

The voices of the nameless dead intrude into the minds of the living.
Names of the Nameless.reset:
如果该作祟被禁用，神术光辉便会洒遍该区域。区域内的活体生物恢复 @Damage[4d8[healing]] 生命值，而区域内的不死生物受到 @Damage[4d8[vitality]] 伤害。所有生物离开该区域1分钟后，该作祟便会停止活动，但会在之后立刻重置。

If the haunt is disabled, divine light washes through the area. Living creatures in the area regain @Damage[4d8[healing]] Hit Points, and undead creatures in the area take @Damage[4d8[vitality]] damage. The haunt deactivates 1 minute after all creatures leave the area but resets immediately thereafter.
Names of the Nameless.routine:
（1 个动作；听觉、神术、情绪、恐惧、心灵）亡者的灵魂将它们的名字低语到房间内生物的心智中，造成 @Damage[(2d10+11)[mental]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}）。

(1 action; auditory, divine, emotion, fear, mental) Spirits of the dead whisper their names into the minds of creatures in the room, dealing @Damage[(2d10+11)[mental]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails the save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure).
Names of the Nameless.stealthdetails:
（受训）听见低语声

(trained) to hear whispering voices
Names of the Nameless.prototypeToken: 无名者之名 Names of the Nameless

Priest of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛牧师 Priest of Iomedae
Priest of Iomedae.tokenName: 艾奥梅黛牧师 Priest of Iomedae

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神术预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神术专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Crisis of Faith.name: 信仰危机 Crisis of Faith
Crisis of Faith.description:
你攻击目标的信仰，以疑虑和心灵上的动荡折磨该生物，造成 6d6 点心灵伤害；若其能够施放神术法术，则改为造成 6d8 点心灵伤害。其效果由它的意志豁免决定。

对许多神祇而言，若无重大理由便对与你信奉同一神祇的追随者施放此法术，乃是禁忌。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害；若目标能够施放神术法术，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1 轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1 轮，且 1 轮内不能施放神术法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6（若目标是神术施法者，则改为提高 2d8）。

You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells. The effects are determined by its Will save.

To many deities, casting this spell on a follower of your own deity without significant cause is anathema.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage; if the target can cast divine spells, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and can't cast divine spells for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 (or by 2d8 if the target is a divine spellcaster).

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.description:
你激发目标内在的英雄气概，使其获得攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免和技能检定+1状态加值。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至+2。

升阶（9环） 状态加值提升至+3。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{法术效果：英雄气概}

You unlock the target's inner heroism, granting it a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Heightened (9th) The status bonus increases to +3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{Spell Effect: Heroism}

Holy Light.name: 圣光 Holy Light
Holy Light.description:
你射出一道带有圣洁能量的炽烈光线。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成 5d6 点火焰伤害。若目标具有邪秽（特征），你额外造成 5d6 点精魂伤害。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害。

成功 目标承受全部伤害。

若这道光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，则圣光会尝试反制该黑暗。若你需要判定这道光线是否穿过一片黑暗区域，在你与该法术的目标之间画一条线。

升环（+1） 火焰伤害增加 2d6，且对邪秽生物造成的精魂伤害增加 2d6。

You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target has the unholy trait, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, holy light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against unholy creatures increases by 2d6.

Consecrate.name: 祝圣 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
区域 以你所信奉神祇的一座固定祭坛、神龛或圣物为中心、半径40英尺的爆发

次级施法者 2名，且必须是你所信仰宗教的崇拜者

你将一处场所祝圣给你的神祇，吟诵赞歌并创造一片神圣空间。处于该区域内时，你神祇的崇拜者在攻击检定、技能检定、豁免和察觉检定上获得+1状态加值，而对你神祇而言属于禁忌的生物（例如，对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛}来说是不死，或对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{撒恩蕾}来说是某些对象）在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。如果你神祇的神术圣化允许你选择神圣或邪恶，你也可以选择让该祝圣场所成为神圣或邪恶。如果该神祇的圣化必须是神圣或邪恶，则你必须让该场所与该圣化一致。你神祇的崇拜者在该区域内进行的打击获得该场所的圣化特征（如果有）。

大成功 祝圣成功，且其持续时间变为10年而非1年，或覆盖半径加倍的区域。偶尔在你神祇的眷顾下，这还可能产生更惊人的效果，例如永久祝圣的区域，或效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣成功。

失败 祝圣失败。

大失败 祝圣惨烈失败并激怒了你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少在1年内，进一步祝圣该地点的尝试都会失败。

升阶（7环） 该祝圣区域还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制你神祇崇拜者的传送。花费提高为200 gp × 法术环阶。

Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those rolls. If your deity's divine sanctification allows you to choose holy or unholy, you can choose to make the consecrated site holy or unholy as well. If the deity's sanctification must be holy or unholy, you must make the site match that sanctification. Strikes made by worshippers of your deity within the area gain the site's sanctification trait, if any.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell rank.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变为其所属类型的一件普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Enlarge.name: 变巨术 Enlarge
Enlarge.description:
在魔法力量的强化下，目标体型增大至大型。其装备也随之变大，但如果被移除，会恢复为自然体型。该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。其触及增加 5 尺（如果起始为超小型，则增加 10 尺），并获得近战伤害的 +2 状态加值。此法术对大型或更大的生物无效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{法术效果：变巨术}

升阶（4环） 该生物改为增大至巨型。近战伤害的状态加值变为 +4，且该生物的触及增加 10 尺（如果该生物起始为超小型，则增加 15 尺）。此法术对巨型或更大的生物无效果。

升阶（6环） 选择此法术的 2 环或 4 环版本之一，并将其效果应用于至多 10 个自愿生物。

Bolstered by magical power, the target grows to size Large. Its equipment grows with it but returns to natural size if removed. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}. Its reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if it started out Tiny), and it gains a +2 status bonus to melee damage. This spell has no effect on a Large or larger creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{Spell Effect: Enlarge}

Heightened (4th) The creature instead grows to size Huge. The status bonus to melee damage is +4 and the creature's reach increases by 10 feet (or 15 feet if the creature started out Tiny). The spell has no effect on a Huge or larger creature.

Heightened (6th) Choose either the 2nd-rank or 4th-rank version of this spell and apply its effects to up to 10 willing creatures.

See the Unseen.name: 见不可见 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光能够穿透幻觉，发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}生物和精魂。你可以看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的特征会显得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你还可以看见虚体生物，例如幽灵，在距离某个物体表面10尺以内时，它们若从物体内部穿过该物体，会呈现为透过那些物体所见的模糊形体。更细微的线索还会使你对幻觉进行识破时的检定获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报术 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你为一片区域设下防护，以便在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。施放警报术时，选择一句口令。每当一个小型或更大的实体生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，警报术会按你的选择发出一道心灵警报（在此情况下，该法术获得心灵（特征））或一个可听见的警报，其声音与音量如同手铃（在此情况下，该法术获得听觉（特征））。无论选择哪种方式，都会自动将你唤醒，而铃声会让区域内的每个生物都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:15] 检定来醒来。知晓警报存在的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须成功通过一次对抗该法术DC的隐秘检定，否则便会触发该法术。

高等化（3环） 你可以指定一个触发条件，以决定哪些类型的生物会触发警报术。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify a trigger for which types of creatures sound the alarm spell.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了是否存在魔法之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻觉魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻觉灵光但外观并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍可被正常侦测到。

强化（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

强化（4环） 如同3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于此范围，则为最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神术能量射线。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 2d4 点精魂伤害（若大成功，则伤害加倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择要将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。若目标使用了该加值，则该法术结束。无论是否如此，目标随后都会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导活力能量来治疗生者或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复 1d8 点生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的活力伤害，且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (专注) 该法术的射程为 30 尺。如果你在治疗活体生物，则恢复的生命值增加 8 点。

3 (专注) 你将活力能量分散于一个 @Template[emanation|distance:30] 中。这以爆发中的所有活体生物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害量增加 1d8，且双动作版本的额外治疗增加 8 点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你用命能力量强化攻击。目标数量等于你施放此法术时所花费的动作数。每个目标的徒手和武器打击额外造成 1d4 点活力伤害。（这种伤害通常只会伤害不死生物。）如果你具有圣洁特征，你可以将该特征添加到此法术以及受此法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环） 伤害提高至 2d4。

升阶（5环） 伤害提高至 3d4。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

You empower attacks with vital energy. The number of targets is equal to the number of actions you spent casting this spell. Each target's unarmed and weapon Strikes deal an extra 1d4 vitality damage. (This damage typically damages only undead). If you have the holy trait, you can add that trait to this spell and to the Strikes affected by the spell.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) The damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Infuse Vitality}

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
你创造出一个光球，在你选择的颜色下，于20尺半径内发出明亮光照（接下来的20尺为昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿生物所处的同一空间内创造该光球，你可以将其附着在该生物身上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以通过维持该法术将光球移动至多60尺；作为此次移动的一部分，你可以将其附着到一个生物身上或从其身上分离。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在已经有四个光亮术生效时再次施放该法术，你必须选择一个现存的法术使其结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

高阶化（4环） 该光球在60尺半径内发出明亮光照（接下来的60尺为昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起盾牌”动作，使你在下个回合开始前获得 AC +1 的环境加值，但使用它不需要占用手。

当该法术生效时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）。该护盾具有 5 点硬度。你可以使用此法术的反应动作（）来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也是如此。在你使用盾牌格挡后，此法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 护盾的硬度提高 5 点。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，下次你进行攻击检定时，掷两次并采用较好的结果。该攻击无视对此次攻击检定的境况减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。随后，你会暂时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：料敌机先}

The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}. You are then temporarily immune to sure strike for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Weapon Surge.name: 激发武器 Weapon Surge
Weapon Surge.description:
你将武器高举，向其中灌注神术能量。在你下个回合开始前，用那把武器进行的下一次打击中，你的攻击检定获得+1状态加值，该武器额外造成1d6点精魂伤害，且此次打击获得受祝特征。激发武器会在你完成此次打击或该武器离开你持有时结束。

升阶（5环） 该攻击额外造成2d6点精魂伤害。

升阶（9环） 该攻击额外造成3d6点精魂伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{法术效果：激发武器}

Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy. On your next Strike with that weapon before the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 status bonus to the attack roll and the weapon deals an additional 1d6 spirit damage, and the Strike gains the sanctified trait. Weapon surge ends once you complete this Strike or the weapon leaves your possession.

Heightened (5th) The attack deals 2d6 additional spirit damage.

Heightened (9th) The attack deals 3d6 additional spirit damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{Spell Effect: Weapon Surge}

Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛圣徽 Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这块木制或白银制的物件上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教圣徽来施展某些能力并施放某些法术。宗教圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以手持。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Healing Hands.name: 治疗之手 Healing Hands
Healing Hands.description:
当牧师施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 时，他们掷d10而非d8。

When the priest casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, they roll d10s instead of d8s.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果另一名生物的反应动作会打断牧师的施法动作，牧师进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:15]。如果牧师成功，他们的动作不会被打断。

If another creature's reaction would disrupt the priest's spellcasting action, the priest attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If the priest succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

Iomedae Lore.name: 艾奥梅黛学识 Iomedae Lore

Priest of Iomedae.prototypeToken: 艾奥梅黛牧师 Priest of Iomedae

Snake's Mane.name: 蛇鬃藤 Snake's Mane

Barb Spray.name: 倒刺喷射 Barb Spray
Barb Spray.description:
一个生物进入包含蛇鬃藤的区域，或蛇鬃藤受到伤害

效果 藤蔓喷洒出一阵酸性尖刺，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]。区域内的任何生物受到 @Damage[(4d10+18)[acid]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。若大失败，该生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 1 分钟。

注意：Paizo 未为此能力提供豁免。本处给出的 DC 是依据 GM 核心中危害构建规则、按该危害等级设定的困难 DC。

A creature enters an area containing snake's mane or the snake's mane takes damage

Effect The vine sprays a hail of acidic barbs in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10]. Any creature in the area takes @Damage[(4d10+18)[acid]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect] save). On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Note: A saving throw for this ability was not provided by Paizo. The DC presented here is a hard DC for the hazard's level based on the GM Core hazard building rules.

Snake's Mane.disable:
@Check[nature|dc:27]（专家）以去除藤蔓上的倒刺，使其变得无害，或者 @Check[stealth|dc:30]（受训）在不惊动蛇鬃藤的情况下穿过其中

@Check[nature|dc:27] (expert) to strip the barbs from the vines, rendering them harmless, or @Check[stealth|dc:30] (trained) to move through the snake's mane without disturbing it
Snake's Mane.hazarddescription:
一团羽状的绿色藤蔓看似无害，但会向任何惊扰它的东西喷射一阵酸性尖刺。

A tangle of feathery green vines appears innocuous but fires a spray of acidic barbs at anything that disturbs it.
Snake's Mane.reset:
1小时，藤蔓长出一组新的倒刺

1 hour, as the vine grows a new set of barbs
Snake's Mane.stealthdetails:
（受训）辨认周围植被中的蛇鬃藤

(trained) to discern the snake's mane from the surrounding vegetation

Stelemora.name: 藤塑精 Stelemora

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Fire).name: 再生 20（被火焰停用） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Fire)

Flurry of Vines.name: 藤蔓连击 Flurry of Vines
Flurry of Vines.description:
藤塑精以-2减值进行两次藤蔓打击，每次分别以不同目标为对象。这些攻击会计入藤塑精的多重攻击减值，但在其完成所有攻击之前，多重攻击减值不会增加。

The stelemora makes two vine Strikes at a –2 penalty, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the stelemora's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after they make all their attacks.

Slithering Vine.name: 爬行藤蔓 Slithering Vine
Slithering Vine.description:
藤塑精的藤蔓打击的触及增加10尺，直到其回合结束。

The stelemora increases the reach of their vine Strike by 10 feet until the end of their turn.

Sow and Sprout.name: 播种发芽 Sow and Sprout
Sow and Sprout.description:
藤塑精在它正擒抱的一名生物体内植入一枚种子。目标必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:25] 豁免。

成功 藤塑精未能植入种子，且目标不受影响。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。当处于恶心状态时，开花的藤蔓会从其血肉中生长出来，目标还会受到 @Damage[4d6[persistent,piercing]] 伤害。在其从恶心状态中恢复之前，目标无法结束该持续性伤害。

大失败 同失败，但目标改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

The stelemora implants a seed inside a creature they're grappling. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save.

Success The stelemora fails to implant a seed, and the target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. While sickened, the target also takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,piercing]] damage as flowering vines sprout through its flesh. The target can't end the persistent damage until it recovers from the sickened condition.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Tangle of Vines.name: 藤蔓纠缠 Tangle of Vines
Tangle of Vines.description:
直到其下一次行动之前，藤塑精看起来就像一团普通的开花藤蔓。它在伪装成非生物植物时，其欺瞒检定与DC的结果自动为35（在森林中为38）。

Until the next time they act, the stelemora appears to be a normal tangle of flowering vines. They have an automatic result of 35 (38 in forests) on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a non-creature plant.

Stelemora.publicNotes:
藤塑精是热爱自然的精类，致力于通过诱捕毫无戒心的生物，并将其身体由内而外变形成精巧的树篱雕塑，来美化自然世界。除了它们那鼓胀、带刺的种荚外，藤塑精全身完全由藤蔓构成，而这些藤蔓可以随其心意生长、收回和脱落。藤塑精能以惊人的速度再生受损的藤蔓，使它们随着时间推移几乎能从任何伤势中恢复。

年轻的藤塑精游历世界，寻找一片可以据为己有的荒野。一旦选定合适的地点，它们便会用藤蔓设下陷阱捕捉路过的生物，在固定住目标的同时，强行将自己的种子植入受害者体内。被植入的种子随后会生根发芽，将该生物本身作为养料，缓慢地把其身体转化为一团藤蔓与叶片。待完成这一过程后，藤塑精便会脱去自身的藤蔓，并在新的地点重新生长，开始打造下一件杰作。

尽管藤塑精更喜欢用曾经活着的生物来填充自己的花园，但如果无法捕获心仪的对象，它们也会用藤蔓将无生命的物体封裹起来。众所周知，藤塑精还会把雕像、宝箱，甚至整座建筑物都变形成树篱雕塑，以此引诱它们偏爱的猎物上钩。

Stelemoras are nature-loving fey dedicated to beautifying the natural world by ensnaring unsuspecting creatures and transforming their bodies into elaborate topiaries from the inside out. Aside from their bulbous, spiked seed pods, stelemoras are composed entirely of vines, which they can grow, retract, and shed at will. Stelemoras regrow damaged vines at an alarming rate, allowing them to recover from nearly any injury over time.

Young stelemoras travel the world looking for a piece of wilderness to call their own. Once they select a proper spot, they use their vines to snare passing creatures, holding their target still as they forcibly implant their seeds inside the victim. The implanted seeds then take root, using the creature itself as fertilizer and slowly transforming its body into a mass of vines and leaves. Once they complete their work, the stelemora sheds their vines and regrows in a new location to begin their next masterpiece.

While stelemoras prefer to fill their gardens with once-living creatures, they entomb inanimate objects in vines if they can't capture their preferred subjects. Stelemoras have also been known to transform statues, treasure chests, and even entire buildings into topiaries in order to lure in their favored prey.

Thieves' Lament.name: 盗贼哀歌 Thieves' Lament

Flash Flame.name: 火光一闪 Flash Flame
Flash Flame.description:
触发 一个生物尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}，或在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable the Device} 时失败

效果 符文被触发，从锁中释放出一阵火焰爆发。触发该符文的生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:25] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到 @Damage[(2d10+9)[fire]] 伤害。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(4d10+18)[fire]] 伤害，且其手指被烧伤，使其在 1 小时内进行盗贼检定时承受 –1 环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.6E8blr21VWk0L4sv]{效果：手指烧伤}

大失败 同失败，且该生物的盗贼工具包损坏。

Trigger A creature attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock} or fails to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable the Device}

Effect The rune triggers, releasing a burst of flame from the lock. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:25] saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[(2d10+9)[fire]] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(4d10+18)[fire]] damage and their fingers are burned, imposing a –1 circumstance penalty to Thievery checks for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.6E8blr21VWk0L4sv]{Effect: Burned Fingers}

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature's thieves' toolkit is broken.

Thieves' Lament.disable:
@Check[thievery|dc:30]（专家）以刮除符文，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（4环阶；反制 DC 24）来反制这些符文

@Check[thievery|dc:30] (expert) to scratch out the rune, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (4th rank; counteract DC 24) to counteract the runes
Thieves' Lament.hazarddescription:
刻在锁内侧的一枚符文会释放出一阵火焰，灼烧窃贼的双手及其工具。

A rune inscribed on the inside of the lock releases a burst of flame that burns the thief's hands and their tools.
Thieves' Lament.stealthdetails:
（受训）以发现锁内的符文

(trained) to spot the rune inside the lock

Brumesgarth.name: 布鲁姆斯加斯 Brumesgarth

Occult Innate Spells.name: 神秘天生法术 Occult Innate Spells

Occult Items Only Spells.name: 仅限神秘物品法术 Occult Items Only Spells

Overwhelming Presence.name: 压倒性威仪 Overwhelming Presence
Overwhelming Presence.description:
你以超自然的辉煌环绕自身，显现为一位神祇或类似的庄严存在，其外貌、服饰与象征标记皆由你选择。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论结果如何，随后该目标都会暂时免疫 1 分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标必须向你致敬两次。致敬要求目标花费一个单动作，该动作具有移动（特征）（当其鞠躬时）或操作（特征）（当其双手献上信物时）。如果可能，他们每个回合都必须至少致敬一次。受影响期间，目标被你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated}，且不能对你使用敌对动作。

失败 同成功，但目标总共必须致敬六次。

大失败 同失败，但目标必须将其所有动作都用于致敬，并且在致敬全部完成前，他们不能采取其他动作。

You surround yourself with supernatural splendor, appearing to be a god or similarly majestic being, with an appearance, regalia, and iconography of your choice. Targets must attempt a Will save. Regardless of the outcome, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target must pay tribute to you two times. Paying tribute requires that the target spend a single action, which has either the move trait (as they bow) or manipulate trait (as they offer up a token in their hands). They must pay tribute at least once on each of their turns, if possible. While affected, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by you and can't use hostile actions against you.

Failure As success, but the target must pay tribute a total of six times.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target must spend all its actions paying tribute, and they cannot take other actions until the tribute is fully paid.

Phantasmagoria.name: 幻景万华 Phantasmagoria
Phantasmagoria.description:
你以无穷无尽的影像充满目标的心智，仿佛无数梦境与人生彼此碰撞。汹涌而来的信息会对每个目标造成 @Damage[16d6[mental]] 伤害，效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，且直到你的下个回合开始前不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标受到全额伤害，且直到你的下个回合开始前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，且陷入混乱 1 分钟。

You fill the targets' minds with endless images, like countless dreams and lives colliding with each other. The onrushing information deals @Damage[16d6[mental]] damage to each target, depending on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and can't use reactions until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until the start of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is confused for 1 minute.

Wails of the Damned.name: 受诅者哀嚎 Wails of the Damned
Wails of the Damned.description:
你发出一声被诅咒灵魂的哀嚎。区域内的每个活体敌人受到 8d10 点虚空伤害，并且必须进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到全额伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失} [[/r 1d4]]。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 4}。

You howl a lament of damned souls. Each living enemy in the area takes 8d10 void damage and must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} [[/r 1d4]].

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Disappearance.name: 消失术 Disappearance
Disappearance.description:
你将一个生物遮蔽于他者的感官之外。目标变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}，而且不仅仅是对视觉如此，而是对所有感官皆然，因此无论观察者具有什么精准感官和模糊感官，目标都可视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}。不过，生物仍有可能通过搜索、寻找被扰动的尘土、听出声音频谱中的缺口，或以其他方式察觉一个原本无法被探知的生物的存在。

You shroud a creature from others' senses. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, not just to sight but to all senses, allowing the target to count as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} no matter what precise and imprecise senses an observer might have. It's still possible for a creature to find the target by Seeking, looking for disturbed dust, hearing gaps in the sound spectrum, or finding some other way to discover the presence of an otherwise-undetectable creature.

Hidden Mind.name: 隐匿心智 Hidden Mind
Hidden Mind.description:
强大的防护会将一名生物隐藏起来，使其不受会窥探它或影响其心智的魔法所侵扰。目标对抗心灵效果的豁免获得 +4 状态加值。隐匿心智会尝试反制任何侦测、揭示和探知效果，视同其法术环阶比实际环阶高 1。成功时，该效果照常运作，但无法侦测到关于目标及其携带物品的任何信息。例如，侦测魔法仍然可以侦测区域内的其他魔法，但无法侦测到目标身上的任何魔法。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{法术效果：隐匿心智}

Powerful wards hide a creature from magic that would spy on it or affect its mind. The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Hidden mind attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects as if its spell rank were 1 higher than its actual rank. On a success, the effect functions normally except that it detects nothing about the target and its possessions. For instance, detect magic would still detect other magic in the area, but not any magic on the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{Spell Effect: Hidden Mind}

Quandary.name: 两难困局 Quandary
Quandary.description:
你将目标传送进一间来源神秘的异位面谜题房间，并将其锁在其中。目标每回合一次，可以用一个单动作尝试进行一次神秘检定、察觉检定或盗贼检定，对抗你的法术DC来解开谜题。传送术效果无法将目标带出谜题房间，除非它们也能跨越位面，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{跨位面传送}。当该法术结束时，目标返回它被放逐时所占据的空间；若原本的空间现在已被占据，则返回最近的空间。

大成功 目标解开谜题并逃脱。

成功 目标正走在通往解答的正确道路上。如果它已经在正确道路上，则解开谜题并逃脱。

失败 目标在解答谜题方面没有任何进展。

大失败 目标没有任何进展，并且如果它原本在正确道路上，也不再处于正确道路上。

You transport the target into an extraplanar puzzle room of mysterious origin, locking them there. Once each turn as a single action, the target can attempt an Occultism check, Perception check, or Thievery check against your spell DC to solve the puzzle. Teleportation effects can't carry the target outside the puzzle room unless they can also traverse the planes, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport}. When the spell ends, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was banished, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled.

Critical Success The target solves the puzzle and escapes.

Success The target is on the right path to the solution. If it was already on the right path, it solves the puzzle and escapes.

Failure The target makes no progress toward a solution.

Critical Failure The target makes no progress and, if it was on the right path, it no longer is.

Duplicate Foe.name: 复制敌影 Duplicate Foe
Duplicate Foe.description:
你制造出一个敌人的临时复制体，为你而战。目标可以尝试一次强韧豁免来扰乱该法术。复制体出现在与目标相邻的一个未被占据的空间内，并拥有目标的攻击调整值、AC、豁免调整值、察觉和技能调整值，但它只有70生命值，且不具备目标的特殊能力，包括免疫、抗力和弱点。它没有任何魔法物品，武器效能符文除外。

该复制体获得仆从（特征），并且它只能进行大步移动和打击。它的打击造成目标的正常伤害，但不会附加额外效果，因为它没有特殊能力。如果复制体的生命值降至0，法术会自动结束。

复制体会尽其所能攻击你的敌人。你也可以尝试向它下达额外指令；当你维持该法术时，你也可以将指挥仆从作为你动作的一部分，但复制体是否遵从你的命令由GM决定。

复制体并不稳定，因此在它每回合执行完它的动作后，便会失去4d6生命值。它不是活着的生物，并且永远无法以任何方式恢复失去的生命值。

大成功 你未能创造出复制体。

成功 复制体以其打击造成一半伤害，且持续时间最多缩短为2轮。

失败 复制体如上述描述运作。

升环（+1） 你能够作为目标的生物等级提高2级。复制体拥有额外10点HP。

You create a temporary duplicate of an enemy to fight on your behalf. The target can attempt a Fortitude save to disrupt the spell. The duplicate appears in an unoccupied space adjacent to the target and has the target's attack modifier, AC, saving throw modifiers, Perception, and skill modifiers, but it has only 70 Hit Points and lacks the target's special abilities, including immunities, resistances, and weaknesses. It has no magic items except weapon potency runes.

The duplicate gains the minion trait, and it can only Stride and Strike. Its Strikes deal the target's normal damage but don't apply added effects, since it doesn't have special abilities. The spell automatically ends if the duplicate's Hit Points drop to 0.

The duplicate attacks your enemies to the best of its abilities. You can also try to give it additional instructions; when you Sustain the spell, you can also Command a Minion as part of your action, but the GM determines whether the duplicate follows your command.

The duplicate is unstable, so each turn after it takes its actions, it loses 4d6 Hit Points. It's not a living creature, and it can never regain its lost Hit Points in any way.

Critical Success You fail to create a duplicate.

Success The duplicate deals half damage with its Strikes and the duration is reduced to a maximum of 2 rounds.

Failure The duplicate works as described.

Heightened (+1) The level of creature you can target increases by 2. The duplicate has 10 more HP.

Energy Aegis.name: 能量神盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你以一道强大且持久的能量屏障保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、活力和虚空伤害的抗力 5。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：能量神盾}

强化（9环） 这些抗力提升至 10。

You protect the target with a powerful, long-lasting energy barrier. The target gains resistance 5 to acid, cold, electricity, fire, force, sonic, vitality, and void damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{Spell Effect: Energy Aegis}

Heightened (9th) The resistances increase to 10.

Mask of Terror.name: 恐惧面具 Mask of Terror
Mask of Terror.description:
目标会呈现为一只令人毛骨悚然且恐怖的生物。该效果对每个观察者而言都是独特的，因此，一个观察目标的人类可能会看见一只长着染血獠牙的恶魔，而一个观察目标的恶魔则可能会看见一张发光的天使面容。

当任何生物试图对目标采取敌对动作时，该生物必须进行一次意志豁免。随后，它会暂时免疫该效果，直到其下个回合结束。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在使用其动作前变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

大失败 该生物变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}，且其动作失败并被浪费。

升环（8环） 你的目标最多可以为5个生物。如果一个生物使用会同时影响多个目标的敌对动作或反应动作，则它只需要针对恐惧面具进行一次豁免。

The target appears to be a gruesome and terrifying creature. The effect is unique to each observer, so a human viewing the target might see a demon with bloody fangs, but a demon observing the target might see a glowing angelic visage.

When any creature attempts a hostile action against the target, the creature must attempt a Will save. It is then temporarily immune until the end of its next turn.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} before using its action.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}, and its action fails and is wasted.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 5 creatures. If a creature uses a hostile action or reaction that affects multiple targets simultaneously, it needs to attempt only one save against mask of terror.

Spellwrack.name: 法术折磨 Spellwrack
Spellwrack.description:
你使施加在目标身上的任何法术都溢出其能量，形成有害的激涌。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 每当目标受到一个具有持续时间的法术影响时，目标受到 @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] 伤害。每当它因法术折磨受到持续力场伤害时，就会使影响它的法术的剩余持续时间减少1轮。只有对抗你的法术DC成功的 @Check[arcana] 检定才能帮助目标从该持续伤害中恢复；该诅咒和持续伤害在1分钟后结束。

失败 同成功，但该诅咒和持续伤害不会自行结束。

大失败 同失败，但持续力场伤害变为 @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]]。

You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Whenever the target becomes affected by a spell with a duration, the target takes @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] damage. Each time it takes persistent force damage from spellwrack, it reduces the remaining duration of spells affecting it by 1 round. Only a successful @Check[arcana] check against your spell DC can help the target recover from the persistent damage; the curse and the persistent damage end after 1 minute.

Failure As success, but the curse and persistent damage do not end on their own.

Critical Failure As failure, but the persistent force damage is @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]].

Spirit Blast.name: 灵魂冲击 Spirit Blast
Spirit Blast.description:
你将虚体能量集中起来，攻击一个生物的精魂，造成16d6点精魂伤害，并进行一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6。

You concentrate ethereal energy and attack a creature's spirit, dealing 16d6 spirit damage with a basic Fortitude save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Teleport.name: 传送术 Teleport
Teleport.description:
你和目标会被瞬间传送到射程内的任意地点，只要你能够精确辨明该地点——既要知道它相对于你起始位置的方位，也要知道它的外观（或其他识别特征）。对该地点外观的错误认知通常会导致法术失败，但也可能改为传送到一个你不想去的地点，或发生其他由GM决定的异常差错。传送术在超远距离下并不精确。目标会出现在距离预定目的地约等于总旅行距离 1% 的某处，方向由GM决定。对于短途旅行，这种不精确无关紧要；但对于长距离，这一偏差最多可能达到 1 英里。

强化（7环） 你和其他目标可以旅行到 1,000 英里内的任意地点。

强化（8环） 你和其他目标可以旅行到同一颗行星上的任意地点。如果你旅行超过 1,000 英里，则你抵达时只会偏离目标 10 英里。

强化（9环） 你和其他目标可以旅行到同一恒星系内另一颗行星上的任意地点。若你对该地点的位置和外观有准确了解，你会在新行星上偏离目标 100 英里处抵达。

强化（10环） 如同 9 环版本，但你和其他目标可以旅行到同一星系内的任意行星。

You and the targets are instantly transported to any location within range, as long as you can identify the location precisely both by its position relative to your starting position and by its appearance (or other identifying features). Incorrect knowledge of the location's appearance usually causes the spell to fail, but it could instead lead to teleporting to an unwanted location or some other unusual mishap determined by the GM. Teleport is not precise over great distances. The targets appear at a distance from the intended destination equal to roughly 1 percent of the total distance traveled, in a direction determined by the GM. For short journeys, this lack of precision is irrelevant, but for long distances this could be up to 1 mile.

Heightened (7th) You and the other targets can travel to any location within 1,000 miles.

Heightened (8th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on the same planet. If you travel more than 1,000 miles, you arrive only 10 miles off target.

Heightened (9th) You and the other targets can travel to any location on another planet within the same solar system. Assuming you have accurate knowledge of the location's position and appearance, you arrive on the new planet 100 miles off target.

Heightened (10th) As the 9th-rank version, but you and the other targets can travel to any planet within the same galaxy.

False Vision.name: 虚假视觉 False Vision
False Vision.description:
你制造出一个虚假的影像，欺骗任何试图探查某个区域的行为。任何探知法术所看到、听到、闻到以及以其他方式侦测到的，都会是你希望在该区域内呈现的内容，而非该区域内实际存在的事物。你可以每轮维持该法术，以随心所欲地改变这个幻象，包括演出一个复杂场景。如果探知法术的环阶高于虚假视觉，施法者可以尝试进行一次察觉检定来识破该幻象；但即使成功，他们也无法得知该区域内真正发生的事情。

You create a false image that fools any attempts to scry on an area. Any scrying spell sees, hears, smells, and otherwise detects whatever you wish within the area, rather than what is actually in the area. You can Sustain the spell each round to change the illusion as you desire, including playing out a complex scene. If the scrying spell is of a higher rank than false vision, the scryer can attempt a Perception check to disbelieve the illusion, though even if they're successful, they can't learn what's truly going on in the area.

Scouting Eye.name: 侦查之眼 Scouting Eye
Scouting Eye.description:
你在自身500英尺内一个你能看见的位置制造出一只 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}、漂浮的眼睛，直径1英寸。它以你正常的视觉感官朝所有方向视物，并持续将它所看见的内容传送给你。

每轮中你第一次维持该法术时，你可以选择将这只眼睛移动最多30英尺，但只能看见眼睛前方的事物；或者将它移动最多10英尺，并看见其周围所有方向的一切。眼睛能移动到离你多远没有限制，但如果你与眼睛曾经不再处于同一存在位面，该法术便会立刻结束。若你想用它来进行察觉检定，你可以通过这只眼睛尝试搜索动作。对这只眼睛造成的任何伤害都会将其摧毁并结束该法术。

You create an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, floating eye, 1 inch in diameter, at a location you can see within 500 feet. It sees in all directions with your normal visual senses and continuously transmits what it sees to you.

The first time you Sustain the spell each round, you can either move the eye up to 30 feet, seeing only things in front of the eye, or move it up to 10 feet, seeing everything in all directions around it. There is no limit to how far from you the eye can move, but the spell ends immediately if you and the eye ever cease to be on the same plane of existence. You can attempt Seek actions through the eye if you want to attempt Perception checks with it. Any damage dealt to the eye destroys it and ends the spell.

Slither.name: 蛇行术 Slither
Slither.description:
一团由阴影构成的蛇群升起，捕捉区域内的生物。你施放该法术时，区域内的每个生物都会因蛇的噬咬受到 @Damage[3d6[piercing]] 伤害和 @Damage[1d6[persistent,poison]] 持续毒素伤害，并根据其反射豁免结果陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被攫抓} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{被束缚}。在区域内结束其回合的生物也必须进行此次豁免，即使它已经被蛇群攫抓或束缚。你可以解消该法术。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并被一条蛇攫抓。蛇的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} DC等于你的法术DC。生物可以攻击一条蛇以释放该生物。蛇的AC等于你的法术DC，且如果它一次受到12点或更多伤害，就会被摧毁。只要法术持续，新的蛇就会不断再生，因此摧毁蛇并不能阻止蛇行术捕捉更多生物。

大失败 同失败，但该生物受到双倍伤害，且被一条蛇束缚。

升阶（+2） 持续毒素伤害增加1d6，蛇的生命值增加6。

A mass of snakes made of shadow rise up to capture creatures in the area. Each creature in the area when you Cast the Spell takes @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage and @Damage[1d6[persistent,poison]] damage from a biting snake, and it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} depending on its Reflex save. A creature that ends its turn in the area must also attempt this save, even if it's already grabbed or restrained by the snakes. You can Dismiss the spell.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is grabbed by a snake. The snakes' @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC is equal to your spell DC. A creature can attack a snake to release the creature. A snake's AC is equal to your spell DC, and it's destroyed if it takes 12 or more damage at once. New snakes continually regrow as long as the spell lasts, so destroying snakes doesn't prevent slither from capturing more creatures.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and is restrained by a snake.

Heightened (+2) The persistent poison damage increases by 1d6 and snake HP increases by 6.

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你以奇异的冲动扰乱目标，使其随机行动。其效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标语无伦次，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}，持续 1 分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时再次尝试一次豁免，以结束困惑状态。

大失败 目标陷入 Confused，持续 1 分钟，且不能通过豁免提前结束。

升环（8环） 你的目标至多可以为 10 个生物。

You befuddle your target with strange impulses, causing it to act randomly. The effects are determined by the target's Will save. You can Dismiss the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The target is Confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
目标可以在空中翱翔，获得等同于其速度或 20 尺的飞行速度，以较高者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{法术效果：飞行}

升阶（7环） 持续时间增加至 1 小时。

The target can soar through the air, gaining a fly Speed equal to its Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.MuRBCiZn5IKeaoxi]{Spell Effect: Fly}

Heightened (7th) The duration increases to 1 hour.

Translocate.name: 跨界传送 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你瞬间将自己以及你正穿戴和持握的任何物品，从你当前的空间传送到你视线内射程内一处未被占据的空间。若这会让另一名生物与你一同被带走——即使你是将其装在异次元容器中携带——则该法术失效。

强化（5环） 射程增加至1英里。你不需要能够看见你的目的地，只要你过去曾到过那里，并且知道它相对于你的位置与距离即可。随后你会暂时获得1小时的免疫。

You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to an unoccupied space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you—even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container—the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Hypercognition.name: 超认知 Hypercognition
Hypercognition.description:
你迅速整理并汇编与当前情境相关的信息。作为施放此法术的一部分，你可以立即使用最多6次回忆知识动作。对于这些动作，当你回忆知识时触发的任何特殊能力、反应动作或自由动作都不能使用。

You rapidly catalog and collate information relevant to your current situation. You can instantly use up to 6 Recall Knowledge actions as part of Casting this Spell. For these actions, you can't use any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when you Recall Knowledge.

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
通过一次粗略的心灵接触，你试图读取目标的思想。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。随后，目标会在1小时内暂时免疫你的读心术。

大成功 当你施放该法术时，目标会从你这里感知到模糊的表层思绪。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于、等于还是低于你的。

失败 当你施放该法术时，你会从目标那里感知到模糊的表层思绪，并得知它的智力是高于、等于还是低于你的。

大失败 如同失败，并且在法术的持续时间内，你可以维持该法术以再次探测目标的表层思绪。目标不会获得任何额外的豁免。

With a cursory mental touch, you attempt to read the target's mind. It must attempt a Will save. The target then becomes temporarily immune to your mind reading for 1 hour.

Critical Success The target perceives vague surface thoughts from you when you Cast the Spell.

Success You find out whether the target's Intelligence modifier is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Failure You perceive vague surface thoughts from the target when you Cast the Spell, and you find out whether its Intelligence is higher than, equal to, or lower than yours.

Critical Failure As failure, and for the duration of the spell, you can Sustain the spell to detect the target's surface thoughts again. The target doesn't receive any additional saves.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你扭曲目标周围的时间流动，减缓其动作。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 轮。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 2}，持续 1 分钟。

升阶（6环） 你最多可以将 10 个生物作为目标。

You dilate the flow of time around the target, slowing its actions.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

False Vitality.name: 虚假活力 False Vitality
False Vitality.description:
你用通常用于操控不死的能量强化自己的血肉。你获得10点临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 临时生命值增加3点。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{法术效果：虚假活力}

You augment your flesh with the energies typically used to manipulate the undead. You gain 10 temporary Hit Points.

Heightened (+1) The temporary Hit Points increase by 3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.PANUWN5xXC20WBg2]{Spell Effect: False Vitality}

See the Unseen.name: 见不可见 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光能刺穿幻觉，发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物与精魂。你可以看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的细节仍然模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你还可以看见虚体生物，例如穿过物体并位于某个物体表面10尺内的幽灵；透过这些物体观察时，它们会呈现为模糊的形状。更细微的线索还会使你在进行识破幻觉的检定时获得+2状态加值。

强化（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Shatter.name: 粉碎术 Shatter
Shatter.description:
高频声波攻击会粉碎附近的一个物体。你对该物体造成 2d10 点音波伤害；如果该物体的硬度为 4 或以下，则忽略其硬度。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d10，且该法术可忽略的硬度提高 2。

A high-frequency sonic attack shatters a nearby object. You deal 2d10 sonic damage to the object, ignoring the object's Hardness if it is 4 or lower.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10, and the Hardness the spell ignores increases by 2.

Alarm.name: 警报术 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你对一片区域施加防护，以便在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。当你施放警报术时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大的实体生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，警报术会按你的选择发出一种心灵警示（在这种情况下，该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出一个音量和声音都如手铃般的可听警报（在这种情况下，该法术获得听觉（特征））。无论哪种选项都会自动唤醒你，而铃声会让区域内的每个生物都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:15] 检定来醒来。知晓警报存在的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须在对抗该法术DC的隐秘检定中成功，否则就会触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以指定一个触发条件，以决定哪些类型的生物会触发警报术。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify a trigger for which types of creatures sound the alarm spell.

Daze.name: 眩晕术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的心智，并以一次心灵冲击使其眩晕。该冲击造成1d6点心灵伤害，进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标严重失败该豁免，它还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 伤害增加1d6点。

You push into the target's mind and daze it with a mental jolt. The jolt deals 1d6 mental damage, with a basic Will save. If the target critically fails the save, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+2) The damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除魔法存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻术灵光但在外观上并不具欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

升阶（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官相似，你不会得知其确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于此范围，则为最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Figment.name: 幻影 Figment
Figment.description:
你制造一个简单的幻象声音或影像。声音会为该法术添加听觉（特征），且该声音不能包含可理解的词语或复杂的音乐。影像会添加视觉（特征），其大小不能超过一个5尺立方体，且若从15尺内观看，会显得明显粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你可以借助该幻象尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{转移注意}，并在你的欺瞒检定中获得+2环境加值。若此次尝试对某个生物失败，则该生物会识破这个幻影。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：幻影}

You create a simple illusory sound or vision. A sound adds the auditory trait to the spell and the sound can't include intelligible words or elaborate music. A vision adds the visual trait, can be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and is clearly crude and undetailed if viewed from within 15 feet. When you Cast or Sustain the Spell, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion} with the illusion, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Deception check. If the attempt fails against a creature, that creature disbelieves the figment.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{Spell Effect: Figment}

Illusory Disguise.name: 幻象易容 Illusory Disguise
Illusory Disguise.description:
你制造出一个幻象，使目标看起来像另一个体型结构相同，且身高（相差不超过6英寸）与体重（相差不超过50磅）大致相近的生物。这种伪装通常足以隐藏其身份，但不足以冒充某个特定个体。该法术会改变其外貌和声音，但不会改变举止。你可以改变其衣物和穿戴物品的外观，例如让其护甲看起来像一件连衣裙。手持物品不受影响，而任何从该生物身上取下的穿戴物品都会恢复其真实外观。

施放幻象易容视为为欺瞒的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 用途设置伪装；它会忽略目标因将自己伪装成不相似生物而可能承受的任何处境减值，对欺瞒检定提供 +4 状态加值以防止他人看穿伪装，并且即使未受训，也允许目标将其等级加到此类欺瞒检定中。你可以结束该法术。

强化（3环） 目标可以看起来像任何同体型的生物，甚至是某个特定个体。你必须见过某个个体，才能复制其外貌；你必须听过其声音，才能复制其声音。

强化（4环） 你最多可以将10个自愿生物作为目标。如果你以多个生物为目标，你可以为每个目标选择不同的伪装，但都不能冒充某个特定个体。你可以分别结束每个伪装，或将其一并结束。

强化（7环） 如4环，但你可以选择能冒充特定个体的伪装。你必须见过某个个体，才能复制其外貌；你必须听过其声音，才能复制其声音。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{法术效果：幻象易容}

You create an illusion that causes the target to appear as another creature of the same body shape, and with roughly similar height (within 6 inches) and weight (within 50 pounds). The disguise is typically good enough to hide their identity, but not to impersonate a specific individual. The spell changes their appearance and voice, but not mannerisms. You can change the appearance of its clothing and worn items, such as making its armor look like a dress. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

Casting illusory disguise counts as setting up a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception; it ignores any circumstance penalties the target might take for disguising itself as a dissimilar creature, gives a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to prevent others from seeing through the disguise, and lets the target add its level to such Deception checks even if untrained. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) The target can appear as any creature of the same size, even a specific individual. You must have seen an individual to replicate its appearance, and must have heard its voice to replicate its voice.

Heightened (4th) You can target up to 10 willing creatures. If you target multiple creatures, you can choose a different disguise for each target, but none can impersonate a specific individual. You can Dismiss each disguise individually or all collectively.

Heightened (7th) As 4th, but you can choose disguises that impersonate specific individuals. You must have seen an individual to replicate its appearance, and must have heard its voice to replicate its voice.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3Ktyd5F9lOPo4myk]{Spell Effect: Illusory Disguise}

Phantasmal Minion.name: 幻影仆从 Phantasmal Minion
Phantasmal Minion.description:
你召唤一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{幻影仆从}。该仆从大致呈类人生物的形状。你可以选择让它处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}状态，或呈现出短暂虚幻的外观，但它显然是魔法效果，而不是真实的生物。

You summon a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.j7NNPfZwD19BwSEZ]{Phantasmal Minion}. The minion is roughly the shape of a humanoid. You can choose to have it be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} or have an ephemeral appearance, but it's obviously a magical effect, not a real creature.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法任你差遣。只要你维持此法术，你就可以施展简单的魔法效果。每次你维持此法术时，你可以从四个选项中选择一个。

  • 烹调 冷却、加热，或为1磅非生物材料调味。
  • 抬起 将一个无人持用且负载为轻或以下的物体缓慢抬离地面1英尺。
  • 制造 创造一个临时物体，其负载可忽略不计，由凝结的魔法物质构成。该物体看起来粗糙且人工痕迹明显，并且极其脆弱——它不能被用作工具、武器、法器，也不能作为法术的代价。
  • 整理 为一个负载为轻或以下的物体上色、清洁，或弄脏它。你可以用10轮专注影响一个1负载的物体，而更大的物体则需要每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩不能造成伤害或导致不利状态。对物体造成的任何实际改变（除上述说明外）都只会持续到你维持此法术为止。

The simplest magic does your bidding. You can perform simple magical effects for as long as you Sustain the spell. Each time you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of four options.

  • Cook Cool, warm, or flavor 1 pound of nonliving material.
  • Lift Slowly lift an unattended object of light Bulk or less 1 foot off the ground.
  • Make Create a temporary object of negligible Bulk, made of congealed magical substance. The object looks crude and artificial and is extremely fragile-it can't be used as a tool, weapon, or locus or cost for a spell.
  • Tidy Color, clean, or soil an object of light Bulk or less. You can affect an object of 1 Bulk with 10 rounds of concentration, and a larger object at 1 minute per Bulk.

Prestidigitation can't deal damage or cause adverse conditions. Any actual change to an object (beyond what is noted above) persists only as long as you Sustain the spell.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 法师之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮的、不可见或幽灵般的魔法之手，抓住目标物体，并使其缓慢地向任意方向悬浮移动，最多20尺。当你维持该法术时，你可以使该物体额外移动20尺。若该物体在法术结束时仍在空中，则该物体会坠落。

升环（3环） 你可以将一个负载为1或以下的无人持用物体作为目标。

升环（5环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以将一个负载为1或以下的无人持用物体作为目标。

升环（7环） 射程增加至60尺，且你可以将一个负载为2或以下的无人持用物体作为目标。

You create a floating, magical hand, either invisible or ghostlike, that grasps the target object and levitates it slowly up to 20 feet in any direction. When you Sustain the spell, you can move the object an additional 20 feet. If the object is in the air when the spell ends, the object falls.

Heightened (3rd) You can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 1 or less.

Heightened (7th) The range increases to 60 feet, and you can target an unattended object with a Bulk of 2 or less.

Wand of Wall of Force (Rank 6).name: 力场墙魔杖（6环） Wand of Wall of Force (Rank 6)
Wand of Wall of Force (Rank 6).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{力墙术}

这根短杖约有一英尺长，内含一个单一法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加过载

效果 你以所标示的环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次该法术所列环阶的施放。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{Wall of Force}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Wand of Shardstorm (7th-Rank Spell).name: 碎片风暴魔杖（第7环法术） Wand of Shardstorm (7th-Rank Spell)
Wand of Shardstorm (7th-Rank Spell).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{力场连矢}

这根魔杖顶部饰有一颗雕刻的龙首，中段镶嵌着一颗抛光金属球体。

启动 施放法术

频率 每日一次，外加超载

效果 你以第7环阶施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{力场连矢}。

在你施放该法术后，你的每个回合开始时都会有额外的一枚或多枚碎片从魔杖中释放出来，如同你施放了 力场连矢 的1动作版本一样。每次都重新选择目标。此效果持续1分钟，直到你不再持握这根魔杖，或直到你再次尝试启动这根魔杖为止。

制作需求 提供一次适当环阶的 力场连矢 施放。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage}

This wand features a carved dragon's head at its top and a polished metal sphere set in its midsection.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency Once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM]{Force Barrage} at 7th rank.

After you cast the spell, an additional shard or shards are released from the wand at the start of each of your turns, as though you cast the 1-action version of force barrage. Choose targets each time. This lasts for 1 minute, until you're no longer wielding the wand, or until you try to activate the wand again.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of force barrage of the appropriate rank.

Stored Items.name: 储存的物品 Stored Items
Stored Items.description:
储存物品 布鲁姆斯加斯可以将物品储存在自己体内，详见下文。布鲁姆斯加斯可以通过交互来取出或储存一件物品。如果布鲁姆斯加斯的身体被摧毁，任何储存的物品都会出现在他的骨骸之间。

  • 臂中魔杖（异次元）布鲁姆斯加斯可以将至多两根魔杖储存在一只手臂的桡骨和尺骨中。这些魔杖可以如同被持握一般使用，且无法被缴械。如果一根臂中魔杖被过度充能，那么若该魔杖损坏，布鲁姆斯加斯受到 @Damage[20] 伤害；若其被摧毁，则受到 @Damage[40] 伤害。

  • 法术典籍 布鲁姆斯加斯在自己的胸腔内放置了一本精心制作、充满魔法力量的典籍。这本典籍最多可以容纳三个由窃法反制能力窃取的法术。

  • 储存武器（异次元）布鲁姆斯加斯可以储存一把负载为 1 或更低的单手武器，并将其与刻在自己一只手臂骨骼上的特殊符文相连。布鲁姆斯加斯的物品栏中列出了一把连枷。布鲁姆斯加斯所持用的武器造成额外伤害，数值等于他手部打击骰子数量的一半。

Stored Items Brumesgarth can store items inside his body, as detailed below. Brumesgarth can Interact to remove or store an item. If Brumesgarth's body is destroyed, any stored items appear among his bones.

  • Arm Wands (extradimensional) Brumesgarth can store up to two wands in the radius and ulna of one of his arms. These wands can be used as if wielded, and they can't be disarmed. If an arm wand is overcharged, Brumesgarth takes @Damage[20] damage if the wand is broken or @Damage[40] damage if it's destroyed.

  • Spell Tome Brumesgarth has a carefully crafted tome, filled with magical power, placed inside his ribcage. This tome can hold up to three spells stolen by the Spellstealing Counter ability.

  • Stored Weapon (extradimensional) Brumesgarth can store a single one-haded weapon of 1 Bulk or less, linked to special runes carved into the bones of one of his arms. Brumesgarth has the flail listed in his items. A weapon Brumesgarth wields deals additional damage equal to half the number of dice from his Hand strike.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality.name: 对抗活力时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Vitality

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当布鲁姆斯加斯被摧毁时，他的灵魂会立刻转移到他的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NEbr7nKuiluJgBHT]{灵魂囚笼}中。只有找到并摧毁他的灵魂囚笼，才能将布鲁姆斯加斯彻底消灭。

When Brumesgarth is destroyed, his soul immediately transfers to his @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.NEbr7nKuiluJgBHT]{Soul Cage}. Brumesgarth can be permanently destroyed only if his soul cage is found and destroyed.

Spellstealing Counter.name: 窃法反制 Spellstealing Counter
Spellstealing Counter.description:
触发 布鲁姆斯加斯看见的一个生物施放法术

需求 布鲁姆斯加斯的法术典籍中储存的法术少于三个

效果 布鲁姆斯加斯消耗一个与正在被施放的法术同环阶的法术位，以反制触发该反应的生物的施法。布鲁姆斯加斯失去该法术位，如同他施放了该触发法术一样。然后布鲁姆斯加斯尝试反制该触发法术（反制调整值 [[/r 1d20+35#Counteract]]{+35}）。若成功，该法术被反制并被加入布鲁姆斯加斯的法术典籍中。

Trigger A creature Brumesgarth can see Casts a Spell

Requirements Brumesgarth has fewer than three spells stored in his spell tome
