Effect Brumesgarth expends a spell slot of the same rank as the spell being cast to counter the triggering creature's casting. Brumesgarth loses his spell slot as if he had cast the triggering spell. Brumesgarth then attempts to counteract the triggering spell (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+35#Counteract]]{+35}). If successful, the spell is countered and added to Brumesgarth's spell tome.

Consult the Text.name: 调阅文本 Consult the Text
Consult the Text.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 布鲁姆斯加斯使他的法术典籍书页翻开，显露出一个由他选择的9环或以下的异能法术。在当天剩余时间内，布鲁姆斯加斯可以施放该法术，视同它是他所知法术之一，且适用于从其基础环级到9环的每一个环级。

Frequency once per day

Effect Brumesgarth causes the pages of his spell tome to flip open, revealing an occult spell of 9th rank or lower of his choice. For the remainder of the day, Brumesgarth can cast that spell as if it were one of his spells known for every rank of its base rank up to 9th.

Drain Spell Tome.name: 汲取法术典籍 Drain Spell Tome
Drain Spell Tome.description:
效果 布鲁姆斯加斯调用储存在他的法术典籍中的魔法，施放他已反制的一个法术。该法术与被反制的法术环阶相同，但使用布鲁姆斯加斯的法术DC和法术攻击。以这种方式施放法术后，会将其从法术典籍中移除。

Effect Brumesgarth draws upon the magic stored in his spell tome to cast one of the spells he has countered. This spell is the same rank as the one countered, but it uses Brumesgarth's spell DC and spell attack. Casting a spell in this way removes it from the spell tome.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果某个反应动作会打断布鲁姆斯加斯的施法动作，他会尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:15]。成功时，该动作不会被打断。

If a reaction would disrupt Brumesgarth's spellcasting action, he attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the action isn't disrupted.

Summon Weapon.name: 召唤武器 Summon Weapon
Summon Weapon.description:
需求 布鲁姆斯加斯的手臂中储存有一把武器，且那只手是空着的

效果 布鲁姆斯加斯将他储存的武器召唤到那条手臂的手中。

Requirements Brumesgarth has a stored weapon in his arm and has that hand free

Effect Brumesgarth summons his stored weapon into that arm's hand.

Brumesgarth.publicNotes:
在对更强大魔法力量的无情追逐中，一些巫妖利用自己腐朽的躯体来保存魔法秘密，将珍贵的典籍藏在胸腔之中，把配方刻写在枯槁的血肉上，甚至用强大的魔法物品替换部分骨骼。这个过程极其艰苦，因为灵魂囚笼会试图修复这些改造所造成的任何伤害。

对永生的渴望驱使施法者成为巫妖，而死灵知识则让这种渴望成为现实。典型的巫妖会选择最直接的道路，让自己的不死形态与生前的外貌大致相近。但对于那些对自身可能成为什么抱有较不传统看法的人来说，不死也能带来更大的自由。群巫妖与符文蚀刻巫妖会将自己彻底重塑。

In their relentless pursuit of more magical might, some liches use their rotting forms to hold magical secrets, hiding precious tomes in their ribcage, inscribing formulas on their withered flesh, even replacing some bones with powerful magical items. The process is painstaking, as the soul cage tries to repair any damage caused by such alterations.

A desire to live eternally motivates a spellcaster to become a lich, and necromantic knowledge makes the desire real. The typical lich takes the most direct path, keeping their undead form fairly close to their appearance in life. But undeath can also bring greater freedom for those with a less conventional view of what they can become. The horde lich and runecarved lich reshape themselves entirely.
Brumesgarth.blurb:
变体符文蚀刻巫妖
Variant runecarved lich
Brumesgarth.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. vitality

Carnivorous Mold.name: 食肉霉菌 Carnivorous Mold

Spore Explosion.name: 孢子爆炸 Spore Explosion
Spore Explosion.description:
触发 一个活着的生物移动到邻近霉菌的位置，或对霉菌造成伤害

效果 距离霉菌15尺内的所有生物都暴露于食肉孢子。

Trigger A living creature moves adjacent to the mold or damages the mold

Effect All creatures within 15 feet of the mold are exposed to the flesh-eating spores.

Flesh-Eating Spores.name: 食肉孢子 Flesh-Eating Spores
Flesh-Eating Spores.description:
食肉孢子在溶解目标肉体时，会在其皮肤上留下红色环纹。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:44]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[4d10[void]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[6d10[void]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[8d10[void]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 3}（1 轮）

The flesh-eating spores leave red rings on the skin as they dissolve the target's flesh

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:44]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[4d10[void]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d10[void]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d10[void]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} (1 round)

Carnivorous Mold.disable:
@Check[religion|dc:42]（传奇）以中和为霉菌提供活力的虚空能量，或 @Check[survival|dc:36]（大师）以在不触发孢子的情况下移除霉菌

@Check[religion|dc:42] (legendary) to neutralize the void energy that animates the mold, or @Check[survival|dc:36] (master) to remove the mold without triggering the spores
Carnivorous Mold.hazarddescription:
孢子向附近的生物爆裂喷散，霉菌溶解暴露在外的血肉，留下道道肿痕。

Spores explode onto nearby creatures, leaving welts as the mold dissolves exposed flesh.

Chained Norn.name: 链缚纺命女 Chained Norn

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天赋法术 Occult Innate Spells

Freeze Time.name: 时间静止 Freeze Time
Freeze Time.description:
你暂时为除自己以外的一切停止时间，让你能够使用若干动作，而在他人看来几乎没有经过任何时间。在施放时间静止后，你立刻可以使用至多9个动作，这些动作分为3组，每组至多3个动作。

每完成一组动作后，会经过1轮，但这只对你、专门以你为目标或影响你的效果，以及你在时间停止期间创造的效果生效。其他所有生物和物体都不会受到你的攻击影响，而且你不能以任何方式将它们作为目标或影响它们。

当你完成自己的动作后，时间会再次开始为世界其他部分流动。如果你创造了一个持续时间超出时间静止持续时间的效果，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{火墙术}，它会立刻再次影响其他对象，但不具有那些仅在你首次施放该法术时才会发生的效果。

You temporarily stop time for everything but yourself, allowing you to use several actions in what appears to others to be no time at all. Immediately after casting freeze time, you can use up to 9 actions in 3 sets of up to 3 actions each.

After each set of actions, 1 round passes, but for only you, effects specifically targeting or affecting you, and effects that you create during the stoppage. All other creatures and objects are invulnerable to your attacks, and you can't target or affect them with anything.

Once you have finished your actions, time begins to flow again for the rest of the world. If you created an effect with a duration that extends beyond freeze time's duration, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire}, it immediately affects others again, but it doesn't have any of the effects that happen only when you first Cast the Spell.

Phantasmagoria.name: 幻景万华 Phantasmagoria
Phantasmagoria.description:
你用无尽的影像填满目标的心智，仿佛无数梦境与人生彼此碰撞。奔涌而来的信息对每个目标造成 @Damage[16d6[mental]] 伤害，其结果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害，且直到你下个回合开始前不能使用反应动作。

失败 目标受到全部伤害，并且直到你下个回合开始前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，并陷入困惑状态 1 分钟。

You fill the targets' minds with endless images, like countless dreams and lives colliding with each other. The onrushing information deals @Damage[16d6[mental]] damage to each target, depending on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and can't use reactions until the start of your next turn.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until the start of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is confused for 1 minute.

Hidden Mind (Constant).name: 隐匿心智（恒定） Hidden Mind (Constant)
Hidden Mind (Constant).description:
强大的防护结界将一名生物隐藏起来，使其不受会窥探它或影响其心智的魔法所侵扰。目标对抗心灵效果的豁免获得+4状态加值。隐匿心智会尝试反制任何侦测、揭示和预言效果，视同其法术环级比实际环级高1级。若成功，该效果照常运作，但侦测不到关于目标及其携带物品的任何信息。例如，侦测魔法仍会侦测到区域内的其他魔法，但不会侦测到目标身上的任何魔法。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{法术效果：隐匿心智}

Powerful wards hide a creature from magic that would spy on it or affect its mind. The target gains a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Hidden mind attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects as if its spell rank were 1 higher than its actual rank. On a success, the effect functions normally except that it detects nothing about the target and its possessions. For instance, detect magic would still detect other magic in the area, but not any magic on the target.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.DBaMtFHRPEg1JeLs]{Spell Effect: Hidden Mind}

Migration.name: 迁徙术 Migration
Migration.description:
目标会自然地变成最适合其移动方式与环境的动物形态。每个目标获得 40 尺的地面、掘穴、攀爬、飞行和游泳速度，并且可以变成对于特定移动方式与环境而言最合适的超小型或小型动物。它还获得对轻度、重度和极度严寒与酷热的免疫，以及其他任何当地野生动物常见的免疫，由 GM 自行裁定。在探索模式中，目标可以移动得快得多，旅行速度为每小时 20 英里。

目标处于动物形态时不能打击、施放法术，或使用大多数操作动作，但它可以通过维持该法术来恢复正常形态。它也可以再次维持该法术以恢复动物形态。

The targets naturally take on animal forms most fitting their movement and environment. Each target gains a land, burrow, climb, fly, and swim Speed of 40 feet, and can transform into a Tiny or Small animal most appropriate for a given movement and environment. It also gains immunity to mild, severe, and extreme cold and heat, along with any other immunities common to the local wildlife, at the GM's discretion. In exploration mode, a target can move much faster, at a travel Speed of 20 miles per hour.

A target can't Strike, cast spells, or use most manipulate actions in animal form, but it can resume its normal shape by Sustaining the spell. It can Sustain the spell again to resume animal form.

Quandary.name: 两难困局 Quandary
Quandary.description:
你将目标传送进一个来历神秘的异位面谜题房间，并将其困在其中。目标每回合一次，可以用一个单动作尝试一次对抗你法术DC的神秘检定、察觉检定或盗贼检定来解开谜题。传送术效果无法将目标带出谜题房间，除非它们也能穿越位面，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{跨位面传送}。当法术结束时，目标返回其被放逐时所占据的空间；如果原本的位置现已被占据，则返回最近的空间。

大成功 目标解开谜题并逃脱。

成功 目标走在通向解答的正确道路上。若其已经走在正确道路上，则解开谜题并逃脱。

失败 目标在解答谜题上没有任何进展。

大失败 目标没有任何进展，并且如果其原本走在正确道路上，现在也不再是了。

You transport the target into an extraplanar puzzle room of mysterious origin, locking them there. Once each turn as a single action, the target can attempt an Occultism check, Perception check, or Thievery check against your spell DC to solve the puzzle. Teleportation effects can't carry the target outside the puzzle room unless they can also traverse the planes, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport}. When the spell ends, the target returns to the space it occupied when it was banished, or to the nearest space if the original is now filled.

Critical Success The target solves the puzzle and escapes.

Success The target is on the right path to the solution. If it was already on the right path, it solves the puzzle and escapes.

Failure The target makes no progress toward a solution.

Critical Failure The target makes no progress and, if it was on the right path, it no longer is.

Collective Memories.name: 集体记忆 Collective Memories
Collective Memories.description:
你接触其他凡人的记忆、知识、传说、故事，以及关于某个主题的学识。该主题必须是一位重要的人物、地点或事物。若该主题在场，你的主要技能检定的成功等级提高一级。若你在尝试该仪式之前对该主题只有模糊的信息，你的主要技能检定的成功等级降低一级。若你让主题在场，但几乎没有任何底线信息，则这些调整值会相互抵消。

大成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你梳理这些大多连贯的记忆，较为准确或有用的信息会比记错的知识或夸大的故事更为突出。

成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你获知对进一步调查有用的信息，但这些信息通常仍不完整或晦涩难解。由于凡人记忆与故事的本性，你很可能会得知多个彼此矛盾的版本。

失败 你未能获知任何有用的传说。

大失败 你的心智被你可支配的海量知识所淹没。你在1周内无法感知或回应当前的任何事物，只能进行呼吸、睡觉之类的基本生理活动。然而，当你恢复时，你可以将自己的一个技能重训为一项基于你所接触主题知识的学识，如同你花费了1周进行重训一样。

You tap into other mortals' memories, knowledge, legends, tales, and lore about a subject. The subject must be an important person, place, or thing. If the subject is present, increase the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. If you have only vague information about the subject before attempting the ritual, decrease the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. These modifiers cancel each other out if you have a subject present with little to no baseline information.

Critical Success For 1 hour after the ritual ends, you sort through memories that are mostly coherent, emphasizing more accurate or useful information over misremembered knowledge or exaggerated tales.

Success For 1 hour after the ritual ends, you learn useful information for further inquiry that remains generally incomplete or enigmatic. As is the nature of mortal memory and stories, you are likely to learn multiple contradictory versions.

Failure You fail to learn any useful legends.

Critical Failure Your mind becomes overwhelmed with the vast array of knowledge at your disposal. You can't sense or respond to anything in the present for 1 week except to perform necessities like breathing and sleeping. When you recover, however, you can retrain one of your skills into a Lore based on the knowledge of a subject you were accessing, as if you had spent 1 week retraining.

Execute.name: 处决 Execute
Execute.description:
你指向一个生物，唤起万物的终焉。目标受到70点虚空伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。若目标是不死生物，或以其他方式具有虚无治疗，该法术失去死亡和虚能（特征）特征，并获得命能（特征）特征，且目标受到70点活力伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。

升环（+1） 伤害增加10点。

You point at a creature and invoke the demise of all things. The target takes 70 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. If the target is undead or otherwise has void healing, the spell loses the death and void traits and gains the vitality trait, and the target takes 70 vitality damage with a basic Fortitude save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 10.

Retrocognition.name: 追溯认知 Retrocognition
Retrocognition.description:
你向心灵回响敞开心智，从你当前位置曾发生的过往事件中获得印象。追溯认知会在持续时间的第一分钟内揭示过去一天中发生事件的灵能印象，接下来的下一分钟则揭示再往前一天的印象，依此类推。这些回响并不会像幻象那样重演，而是揭示出情绪与隐喻的印象，为过去提供晦涩的线索与细节。若你通过某个印象目睹了创伤性或动荡的事件，则该法术结束，除非你成功通过一次 DC 至少为 30、且根据事件严重程度最高可达 50 的意志豁免。GM 决定某个事件是否具有创伤性，并选择 DC。

高阶（8环） 你每专注 1 分钟，获得的是前一年内发生事件的印象，而非前一天；不过细节会减弱，使你更难分辨除最重大事件之外的印象。

高阶（9环） 你每专注 1 分钟，获得的是前一个世纪内发生事件的印象，而非前一天；不过细节会减弱，使你几乎不可能分辨除最重大事件之外的印象。

Opening your mind to mental echoes, you gain impressions from past events that occurred in your current location. Retrocognition reveals psychic impressions from events that occurred over the course of the last day throughout the first minute of the duration, followed by impressions from the next day back the next minute, and so on. These echoes don't play out like a vision but instead reveal impressions of emotions and metaphors that provide cryptic clues and details of the past. If you witness a traumatic or turbulent event through an impression, the spell ends unless you succeed at a Will save with a DC of at least 30 and possibly as much as 50, depending on the severity of the event. The GM determines whether an event is traumatic and chooses the DC.

Heightened (8th) You gain impressions of events that occurred over the previous year for each minute you concentrate, instead of the previous day, though the details diminish, making it harder to distinguish impressions from all but the most major events.

Heightened (9th) You gain impressions of events that occurred over the previous century for each minute you concentrate, instead of the previous day, though the details diminish, making it almost impossible to distinguish impressions from all but the most major events.

Spellwrack (At Will).name: 法术折磨（随意） Spellwrack (At Will)
Spellwrack (At Will).description:
你使施加在目标身上的任何法术都将其能量以有害的激涌形式外泄。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 每当目标受到一个具有持续时间的法术影响时，目标受到 @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] 伤害。每次它因法术折磨受到持续力场伤害时，施加于它身上的法术剩余持续时间减少 1 轮。只有成功通过对抗你法术DC的 @Check[arcana] 奥秘检定，才能帮助目标从该持续伤害中恢复；1 分钟后，该诅咒和该持续伤害结束。

失败 同成功，但该诅咒和持续伤害不会自行结束。

大失败 同失败，但持续力场伤害变为 @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]]。

You cause any spells cast on the target to spill out their energy in harmful surges. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Whenever the target becomes affected by a spell with a duration, the target takes @Damage[2d12[persistent,force]] damage. Each time it takes persistent force damage from spellwrack, it reduces the remaining duration of spells affecting it by 1 round. Only a successful @Check[arcana] check against your spell DC can help the target recover from the persistent damage; the curse and the persistent damage end after 1 minute.

Failure As success, but the curse and persistent damage do not end on their own.

Critical Failure As failure, but the persistent force damage is @Damage[4d12[persistent,force]].

Truesight (Constant).name: 真知视界（恒定） Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description:
你能看见60尺内事物的真实样貌。GM对区域内任何幻觉、变形或变化效果进行一次秘密反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定对一个变化法术成功，你便能看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变化法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion, morph or polymorph effect in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（持续） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标无论何种语言都能理解所有词语，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话时，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能够理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

高阶化（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Read Omens (At Will).name: 解读预兆（随意） Read Omens (At Will)
Read Omens (At Will).description:
你窥视未来。选择一个你计划在1周内进行的特定目标或活动，或一个你预计可能在1周内发生的事件。你会获知一条神秘的线索或建议，能够帮助应对所选事件，通常会以谜语诗或预兆的形式出现。

You peek into the future. Choose a particular goal or activity you plan to engage in within 1 week, or an event you expect might happen within 1 week. You learn a cryptic clue or piece of advice that could help with the chosen event, often in the form of a rhyme or omen.

Geas.name: 魔咒使命 Geas
Geas.description:
你对一个自愿的目标施加一条魔法戒律，强迫其执行或不得执行某种特定行为。要求执行某种行为的geas通常是有条件的，例如：“总是向寻求住宿之处的陌生人提供款待。”无条件要求执行某种行为的geas并不要求目标只做这一件事，不过它必须将这项任务置于一切休闲消遣之上。最常见的禁止执行某种行为的geas，是规定不得违反某份契约。在这些情况下，副施法者通常负责确保契约措辞与该仪式的魔法正确契合。由于目标是自愿的，geas可以具有目标所同意的任意长的持续时间。如果目标无法履行geas，它会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}，并且每连续一天因受阻而无法遵循geas，恶心（状态）值便增加1，最高至恶心 4。当其再次遵循geas时，恶心（状态）立即结束；它不能以任何其他方式移除恶心（状态）。只有诸如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish}仪式之类的强大魔法，才能移除自愿目标身上的geas效果。

大成功 geas成功，且目标在直接维护该geas的技能检定上获得+1状态加值（由GM裁定）。

成功 geas成功。

失败 geas失败。

大失败 geas失败，且改为由你受到你原本试图施加给目标的geas影响。你被视为一个不自愿的目标，因此该geas可以被@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction}法术反制。

升阶（5环） 你可以将geas用于一个不自愿的生物；它可以尝试一次意志豁免来免除该效果。如果目标在此次意志豁免中失败，该geas最长持续1周。除了诸如wish仪式之类的强大魔法外，cleanse affliction法术也可以反制不自愿生物身上的geas。聪明的不自愿生物可以通过制造使自己无法遵从的情境来钻geas的空子，但在那种情况下，它会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}（如上所述）。

升阶（7环） 同5环，但geas在不自愿生物身上最长持续1年。

升阶（9环） 同5环，但geas在不自愿生物身上的持续时间为你所选择的时长（甚至无限）。

You enforce a magic rule on a willing target, forcing it to either perform or refrain from carrying out a certain act. A geas to perform an act is usually conditional, such as, "Always offer hospitality to strangers seeking a place to stay." An unconditional geas to perform a certain act doesn't require the target to perform that act exclusively, though it must prioritize the task above all leisurely pursuits. The most common geas to refrain from carrying out an act is a specification to avoid violating a contract. In those cases, the secondary caster usually takes charge of making sure the wording of the contract is attuned correctly with the ritual's magic. Because the target is willing, geas can have a duration that lasts for as long as the target agrees to. If the target is unable to fulfill the geas, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and the sickened condition increases by 1 for each consecutive day it is prevented from following the geas, to a maximum of sickened 4. The sickened condition ends immediately when it follows the geas again; it can't remove the sickened condition in any other way. Only powerful magic such as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish} ritual can remove the effects of geas from a willing target.

Critical Success The geas succeeds, and the target receives a +1 status bonus to skill checks that directly uphold the geas (at the GM's discretion).

Success The geas succeeds.

Failure The geas fails.

Critical Failure The geas fails, and you are instead affected by the geas you were attempting to place on the target. You are considered an unwilling target, so the geas can be counteracted with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction} spell.

Heightened (5th) You can use geas on an unwilling creature; it can attempt a Will save to negate the effect. If the target fails this Will save, the geas lasts up to 1 week. A cleanse affliction spell can counteract a geas on an unwilling creature, in addition to powerful magic such as a wish ritual. A clever unwilling creature can subvert the geas by contriving situations that prevent it from complying, but in that case it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} (as described above).

Heightened (7th) As 5th rank, but the geas lasts for up to 1 year on an unwilling creature.

Heightened (9th) As 5th rank, but the geas lasts for a duration you choose (even unlimited) on an unwilling creature.

Dispel Magic (At Will).name: 解除魔法（随意） Dispel Magic (At Will)
Dispel Magic (At Will).description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变成其类型对应的凡俗物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，用以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法存在与否之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略那些你完全知晓的魔法，例如你自己和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术环阶时，你才能侦测到该幻术魔法。不过，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

强化（3环）你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM决定。

强化（4环）如同3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。类似于模糊感官，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺见方的立方体内（若来源大于该范围，则为最近的那个立方体）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Hand of Fate.name: 命运之手 Hand of Fate

Broken Fate.name: 破碎命运 Broken Fate
Broken Fate.description:
链缚纺命女进行先攻掷骰时，自动视为掷出 1。

The chained norn automatically rolls a 1 when she rolls initiative.

Broken Triumvirate.name: 破碎三司命 Broken Triumvirate
Broken Triumvirate.description:
链缚纺命女的命运已与其他诺恩的命运割裂。她无法加入三人组，也不能主动对诺恩采取敌对动作。

The chained norn's fate has been severed from the rest of the norns. She can't join a triumvirate or willingly take a hostile action against a norn.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Cold Iro.name: 再生 20（被寒铁停用） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Cold Iron)

Broken Fates Aura.name: 破碎命运灵光 Broken Fates Aura
Broken Fates Aura.description:
60尺。灵光内除诺恩外的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:42] 豁免。豁免成功时，该生物会暂时免疫破碎命运灵光，持续24小时。失败时，该生物在24小时内无法从具有幸运（特征）的效果中受益。

60 feet. Creatures other than norns in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:42] save. On a successful save, the creature is temporarily immune to the broken fates aura for 24 hours. On a failure, the creature can't benefit from effects with the fortune trait for 24 hours.

Rewind Fate.name: 回溯命运 Rewind Fate
Rewind Fate.description:
触发 120尺内的一名生物将会在一次攻击或技能检定中成功

效果 该生物必须再次进行此次攻击或技能检定，掷两次并取较差的结果。

Trigger A creature within 120 feet would succeed on an attack or skill check

Effect The creature must attempt the attack or skill check again, rolling twice and taking the worse result.

Fated.name: 命定 Fated
Fated.description:
当一个生物受到来自诺恩的厄运效果，以及来自除诺恩外任意来源的幸运效果（或反之）影响时，诺恩的效果会自动反制另一个效果，然后照常生效，而不是让这两个效果彼此抵消。若幸运效果和厄运效果都来自诺恩，则两者如常互相抵消。由GM酌情决定，与命运或幸运相关的强大实体，例如德丝娜、玛格德或法拉斯玛，其效果可能不会被此能力抵消。

When a creature is subject to a misfortune effect from a norn and a fortune effect from any source other than a norn (or vice versa), the norn's effect automatically counteracts the other effect and then takes place normally, rather than the two effects canceling each other out. If both the fortune and misfortune effect are from a norn, then the two cancel each other out as normal. At the GM's discretion, powerful entities related to fate or luck, like Desna, Magdh, or Pharasma, can't have their effects negated by this ability.

Sever Fate.name: 切断命运 Sever Fate
Sever Fate.description:
当诺恩以一次打击造成虚空伤害时，她恢复 @Damage[10[healing]]{10 点生命值}。目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:39] 强韧豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2}）。

此后，诺恩造成的进一步虚空伤害会使流失状态值在豁免失败时增加 1（若大失败则增加 2），最大至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 4}。

When a norn deals void damage with a Strike, she regains @Damage[10[healing]]{10 Hit Points}. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:39] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure).

Further void damage dealt by the norn increases the drained condition value by 1 on a failed save (or by 2 on a critical failure), to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Chained Norn.publicNotes:
古老得难以想象，诺恩是强大的精灵女性，她们手中握有命运与天数的实体显现——金色丝线。她们守望着所有生命，若被召唤便会不情愿地出手干预——而若命运之线被较低等的存在扭曲和滥用，她们则会挟怒复仇。她们的身形极具威势，高达14英尺，重达800磅。

诺恩与第一世界的上古者之间的关系很复杂。许多诺恩侍奉“三身”玛格德，这位三位一体的上古者在一些诺恩看来，乃是最初的诺恩三位同体被束缚结合而成的单一实体，因为玛格德拥有三个身体：少女、母亲与主母。玛格德宣称自己正在注视命运之线，以防某场不祥预言中的天灾降临；除了协助她进行预言外，玛格德还要求侍奉她的诺恩遵循她那些隐晦难解的命令，帮助将未来从悬崖边缘稍稍推离。然而，诺恩本身也是强大的存在，自身便有能力赐予神术力量，因此许多诺恩都不愿侍奉这位神秘莫测的半神。这些诺恩觉得，其他上古者更加异质，也更难以交互，因为她们认为，尽管上古者掌握着强大力量，但即便是这些强大的存在，也不应被允许随心所欲地如此干涉命运。

尽管即便是最弱小的上古者，也能轻易毁灭一位不隶属于任何势力的诺恩，但当诺恩发出宣告与裁断时，他们往往还是会服从。而这些诺恩则谨慎地运用自己被视为中立的地位。她们很清楚，不可向上古者提出过多要求，免得这些反复无常的半神心生不耐。因此，不隶属于任何势力的诺恩与上古者之间的力量平衡，正如亿万年来一直如此，仍维持着脆弱的状态。诺恩明白，上古者终将失去对这一传统的尊重，开始彻底随心所欲地行事——尽管诺恩已竭尽所能约束他们那些最具破坏性的动作。

命运追随者

在凡人的宇宙中，一些凡人将诺恩作为神祇崇拜，另一些人，尤其是女巫与吟游诗人，则将她们敬仰为庇护者或缪斯。那些奉诺恩为神祇的人被称为“命运追随者”。诺恩既不阻止这种崇敬，也不会特意去支援此类信仰。崇敬诺恩的牧师可能崇拜某位特定的诺恩或某个诺恩三位同体，也可能将所有诺恩整体加以崇拜，但无论作何选择，他们获得的恩惠都相同。命运追随者的宗教象征是一把剪断金色丝线的剪刀，而他们所关注的领域则是天数、命运与衰老过程。

Ancient beyond imagining, norns are powerful fey women who hold in their hands the physical manifestation of fate and destiny in the form of golden thread. They watch over all life, intervening with reluctance when called upon—or with a vengeance when the strands of fate are twisted and abused by lesser beings. They cut imposing figures, standing 14 feet tall and weighing 800 pounds.

Norns' relationship with the Eldest of the First World is complex. Many among norns serve Magdh the Three, the triune Eldest who some norns believe to be the first norn triumvirate bound together into one entity, as Magdh has three bodies: a Maiden, a Mother, and a Matriarch. Magdh claims to be watching the threads of fate for some ominous prophesied cataclysm, and in addition to assisting in her divinations, Magdh expects the norns who serve her to follow her cryptic commands to help nudge the future away from the brink. However, norns are powerful beings in their own right, themselves capable of granting divine power, and many balk at serving the enigmatic demigod. These norns find the other Eldest even more alien and challenging to interact with, for they believe that while the Eldest wield great power, even these powerful beings should not be granted leave to meddle with fate as much as they desire.

While even the weakest of the Eldest could destroy an unaffiliated norn with ease, they tend to obey the proclamations and judgments of norns when they are spoken. These norns, for their part, use their perceived neutrality judiciously. They know better than to issue too many demands to the Eldest, lest the capricious demigods grow frustrated. And so the balance of power remains tenuous between unaffiliated norns and the Eldest, as it has for eons. Norns know that it's merely a matter of time before the Eldest lose their respect for this tradition and start acting entirely as they please, despite norns' best efforts to rein in their most disruptive actions.

Followers of Fate

In the mortal Universe, some mortals worship norns as deities, while others, especially witches and bards, admire them as patrons or muses. Those who uphold norns as deities are known as Followers of Fate. Norns neither discourage this veneration nor go out of their way to support such worship. Clerics who venerate norns might worship a specific norn or norn triumvirate, or all norns as a whole, but they gain the same benefits regardless of their choice. The religious symbol of Followers of Fate is a pair of shears cutting a golden thread, and their areas of concern are destiny, fate, and the aging process.
Chained Norn.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Cleansing Suite.name: 净化组件 Cleansing Suite

Deadbolts.name: 门闩 Deadbolts
Deadbolts.description:
触发 一个生物接近至净化组件东侧门扉10尺内

效果 房间的门猛然关上，并以门闩封死。该危害进行先攻掷骰。

Trigger A creature approaches within 10 feet of the cleansing suite's eastern doors

Effect The doors to the chamber slam shut and seal with deadbolts. The hazard rolls initiative.

Rune Against Evil.name: 驱邪符文 Rune Against Evil
Rune Against Evil.description:
该危害以圣洁能量充满整个房间，对具有邪秽特征的生物造成 @Damage[(6d6+20)[spirit]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:41|basic] 豁免）。

The hazard fills the chamber with holy energy that deals @Damage[(6d6+20)[spirit]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:41|basic] save) to creatures with the unholy trait.

Rune Against Magic.name: 破法符文 Rune Against Magic
Rune Against Magic.description:
该危害施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（9环，反制 [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}），以房间内每个生物身上的一个法术或效果为目标。

The hazard casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (9th rank, counteract [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}) that targets a spell or effect on each creature in the chamber.

Rune Against Scrying.name: 反预言符文 Rune Against Scrying
Rune Against Scrying.description:
该危害施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AnWCohzPgK4L9GVl]{侦测探知}。如果它在房间内侦测到探知效果，它会对每个受影响的生物施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.C2w3YfBKjIRS07DP]{隐匿心智}，并对该效果施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（9环，反制 [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}）。

The hazard casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AnWCohzPgK4L9GVl]{Detect Scrying}. If it detects a scrying effect in the chamber, it casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.C2w3YfBKjIRS07DP]{Hidden Mind} on each affected creature and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} on the effect (9th rank, counteract [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}).

Cleansing Suite.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:42]、@Check[nature|dc:42]、@Check[occultism|dc:42]或@Check[religion|dc:42]以抹除符文，或@Check[crafting|dc:46]或@Check[thievery|dc:46]以摧毁符文，或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（第9环，反制 DC 41）；每个符文都需要一次成功才能移除（总共三个符文）

@Check[arcana|dc:42], @Check[nature|dc:42], @Check[occultism|dc:42], or @Check[religion|dc:42] to erase the runes, or @Check[crafting|dc:46] or @Check[thievery|dc:46] to destroy the runes, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (9th rank, counteract DC 41); each rune requires a success to remove (three runes total)
Cleansing Suite.hazarddescription:
门内的门闩咔嗒作响，同时天花板上出现了三个发光的符文。

Deadbolts inside the doors clunk as three glowing runes appear on the ceiling.
Cleansing Suite.reset:
危害启动1分钟后，门闩会解锁，且危害会重置。

1 minute after the hazard activates, the deadbolts unlock and the hazard resets.
Cleansing Suite.routine:
（3 动作）净化组件启动其符文之一。该危害在每个回合中不能启动同一符文超过一次。停用一个符文会移除该危害的一个动作，并阻止该危害启动该符文。

(3 actions) The cleansing suite activates one of its runes. The hazard can't activate the same rune more than once per turn. Disabling a rune removes one of the hazard's actions and prevents the hazard from activating that rune.

Collapsing Bridge.name: 坍塌桥梁 Collapsing Bridge

Bridge Collapse.name: 桥梁坍塌 Bridge Collapse
Bridge Collapse.description:
触发 一个中型或更大的生物踏上桥梁的薄弱处

效果 桥梁在该生物所在的方格内坍塌，然后掷先攻。在桥上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{抓住边缘} 的DC为38。桥梁一旦开始坍塌，河流的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳} DC会提高至36，因为水流会因坠落的碎片而翻腾。一个在桥梁15尺内游泳并在其回合开始时仍处于游泳状态的生物会受到 @Damage[10d6[钝击]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A Medium or larger creature steps onto the bridge's weak point

Effect The bridge collapses in the creature's square, then rolls initiative. The DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge} on the bridge is 38. Once the bridge begins to collapse, the river's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swim} DC increases to 36 as the water churns with the falling debris. A creature that starts its turn swimming within 15 feet of the bridge takes @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic] save).

Collapsing Bridge.disable:
@Check[工程学识|dc:40] 以识别并加固薄弱点，@Check[制作|dc:43]（大师）以建造次级支撑结构，或 @Check[运动|dc:45]（传奇）以用找到的材料加固桥梁；需要三次成功才能阻止坍塌

@Check[engineering-lore|dc:40] to identify and reinforce weak points, @Check[crafting|dc:43] (master) to construct secondary supports, or @Check[athletics|dc:45] (legendary) to reinforce the bridge with found materials; three successes are required to halt the collapse
Collapsing Bridge.hazarddescription:
金属支架在桥上扭曲并被剪断，导致桥体的一段段结构坍塌。

Metal supports twist and shear off the bridge, causing stretches of the structure to collapse.
Collapsing Bridge.routine:
（1个动作）坍塌从桥梁受损的部分向外扩散。所有与坍塌部分相邻的方格也会坠入水中。

(1 action) The collapse radiates out from the damaged section of the bridge. All squares adjacent to a collapsed section also fall into the water.

Divine Warden of Arazni.name: 阿拉兹尼的神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Arazni
Divine Warden of Arazni.tokenName: 阿拉兹尼的神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Arazni

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神术专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神术能量光束。对目标的AC进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到2d4点精魂伤害（若大成功，则伤害翻倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Savor the Sting.name: 品味刺痛 Savor the Sting
Savor the Sting.description:
你对目标施加痛苦，并陶醉于他们的苦楚之中。这造成1d4点心灵伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]]伤害；目标必须进行一次意志豁免。只要目标正因该法术承受持续伤害，你对目标的攻击检定和技能检定获得+1状态加值。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标承受一半伤害，且不承受持续伤害。

失败 目标承受全部初始伤害和持续伤害。

大失败 目标承受双倍初始伤害和持续伤害。

升环（+1） 初始伤害增加1d4，持续伤害增加1d4。

You inflict pain upon the target and revel in their anguish. This deals 1d4 mental damage and @Damage[(@item.level)d4[persistent,mental]] damage; the target must attempt a Will save. As long as the target is taking persistent damage from this spell, you gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and skill checks against the target.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage and no persistent damage.

Failure The target takes full initial and persistent damage.

Critical Failure The target takes double initial and persistent damage.

Heightened (+1) The initial damage increases by 1d4 and the persistent damage increases by 1d4.

Rapier.name: 刺剑 Rapier
Rapier.description:
刺剑是一种细长的穿刺剑刃，配有护手篮。许多人都将其视为珍贵的决斗武器。

The rapier is a long and thin piercing blade with a basket hilt. It is prized among many as a dueling weapon.

Greater Striking Rapier.name: 高等强击刺剑 Greater Striking Rapier

Divine Destruction.name: 神圣毁灭 Divine Destruction
Divine Destruction.description:
当神圣守卫的生命值降至 0 HP 时，它会以神术能量爆发，对一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] 内造成 @Damage[16d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] 伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:37|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] 豁免。

大成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

成功 该生物受到全部伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并暂时受到其主神的诅咒。被诅咒的生物在 1 天内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}；这是一个诅咒效果，其反制 DC 使用该意志豁免 DC。

大失败 如失败，但被诅咒的生物改为处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。

When the divine warden is reduced to 0 HP, it erupts with divine energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], dealing @Damage[16d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:37|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

Critical Success The creature takes half damage.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes temporarily cursed by the patron deity. The cursed creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 day; this is a curse effect that uses the Will save DC as the counteract DC.

Critical Failure As failure, except the cursed creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

God-Bound.name: 神祇束缚 God-Bound
God-Bound.description:
神圣守卫在被创造时便与一位特定的守护神祇绑定。守卫不能对公开佩戴或展示其守护神祇象征的生物采取敌对动作，除非该生物先对守卫使用了敌对动作。守卫获得一个从其神祇领域列表中选择的初始领域法术。神圣守卫拥有 3 点聚能点。

The divine warden is bound to a specific patron deity upon its creation. The warden can't take hostile actions against a creature that openly wears or displays a symbol of its patron deity unless that creature uses a hostile action against the warden first. The warden gains an initial domain spell chosen from its deity's list of domains. The divine warden has 3 Focus Points.

Faithful Weapon.name: 信仰武器 Faithful Weapon
Faithful Weapon.description:
当神圣守卫持用其所侍奉神祇的偏好武器时，该武器获得一个高等强击符文的效果。

While the divine warden wields the favored weapon of its patron deity, that weapon gains the effect of a greater striking rune.

Instrument of Faith.name: 信仰道标 Instrument of Faith
Instrument of Faith.description:
神圣守卫是其神祇信仰的灯塔。神圣守卫所侍奉神祇的牧师，可以通过其在60尺内看见的一名神圣守卫来引导一次治疗术。该牧师决定该法术的任何目标或区域，仿佛其正站在神圣守卫的空间内。

The divine warden is a beacon for its deity's faith. A cleric of the divine warden's patron deity can channel a heal spell through a divine warden they can see within 60 feet. The cleric determines any targets or area for the spell as if they were standing in the divine warden's space.

Divine Warden of Arazni.prototypeToken: 阿拉兹尼的神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Arazni

Divine Warden of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Iomedae
Divine Warden of Iomedae.tokenName: 艾奥梅黛神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Iomedae

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Cleric Domain Spells.name: 牧师领域法术 Cleric Domain Spells

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神术能量光束。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 2d4 精魂伤害（若大成功，则伤害翻倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Weapon Surge.name: 激发武器 Weapon Surge
Weapon Surge.description:
你将武器高举，向其中注入神术能量。在你的下个回合开始前，以下次使用该武器进行的打击中，你的攻击检定获得+1状态加值，该武器额外造成1d6精魂伤害，且此次打击获得受祝特征。激发武器会在你完成此次打击或该武器脱离你的持有后结束。

升环（5环） 该攻击额外造成2d6精魂伤害。

升环（9环） 该攻击额外造成3d6精魂伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{法术效果：激发武器}

Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy. On your next Strike with that weapon before the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 status bonus to the attack roll and the weapon deals an additional 1d6 spirit damage, and the Strike gains the sanctified trait. Weapon surge ends once you complete this Strike or the weapon leaves your possession.

Heightened (5th) The attack deals 2d6 additional spirit damage.

Heightened (9th) The attack deals 3d6 additional spirit damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{Spell Effect: Weapon Surge}

Longsword.name: 长剑 Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为武装剑，可以是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑刃很重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Greater Striking Longsword.name: 高等强击长剑 Greater Striking Longsword

Divine Destruction.name: 神圣毁灭 Divine Destruction
Divine Destruction.description:
当神圣守卫的 HP 降至 0 时，它会以神术能量爆发，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]，造成 @Damage[16d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] 伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:37|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] 豁免。

大成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

成功 该生物受到全部伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并被其主神暂时施加诅咒。被诅咒的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续 1 天；这是一个诅咒效果，并以该意志豁免 DC 作为反制 DC。

大失败 如失败，但被诅咒的生物改为获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}。

When the divine warden is reduced to 0 HP, it erupts with divine energy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30], dealing @Damage[16d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:37|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save.

Critical Success The creature takes half damage.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes temporarily cursed by the patron deity. The cursed creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 day; this is a curse effect that uses the Will save DC as the counteract DC.

Critical Failure As failure, except the cursed creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

God-Bound.name: 神祇束缚 God-Bound
God-Bound.description:
神圣守卫在创造时会与一位特定的宗主神祇绑定。守卫不能对公开佩戴或展示其宗主神祇圣徽的生物采取敌对动作，除非该生物先对守卫使用了敌对动作。守卫获得一个从其神祇领域列表中选择的初始领域法术。神圣守卫拥有 3 点聚能点。

The divine warden is bound to a specific patron deity upon its creation. The warden can't take hostile actions against a creature that openly wears or displays a symbol of its patron deity unless that creature uses a hostile action against the warden first. The warden gains an initial domain spell chosen from its deity's list of domains. The divine warden has 3 Focus Points.

Faithful Weapon.name: 信仰武器 Faithful Weapon
Faithful Weapon.description:
当神圣守卫持用其守护神祇的偏好武器时，该武器获得高等强击符文的效果。

While the divine warden wields the favored weapon of its patron deity, that weapon gains the effect of a greater striking rune.

Instrument of Faith.name: 信仰道标 Instrument of Faith
Instrument of Faith.description:
神圣守卫是其神祇信仰的灯塔。神圣守卫所侍奉神祇的牧师可以通过其视线内 60 尺内的一个神圣守卫引导一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 法术。该牧师为该法术决定任何目标或区域，如同其站在神圣守卫的空间内一样。

The divine warden is a beacon for its deity's faith. A cleric of the divine warden's patron deity can channel a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} spell through a divine warden they can see within 60 feet. The cleric determines any targets or area for the spell as if they were standing in the divine warden's space.

Divine Warden of Iomedae.blurb:
变体神圣守卫
Variant divine warden
Divine Warden of Iomedae.prototypeToken: 艾奥梅黛神圣守卫 Divine Warden of Iomedae

Garrholdion.name: 信念灵卫 Garrholdion

Occult Innate Spells.name: 天赋异能秘法法术 Occult Innate Spells

Consecrate.name: 祝圣 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
区域 以你所信奉神祇的一座固定祭坛、神龛或圣物为中心，40尺半径爆发

次级施法者 2名，必须是你所信仰宗教的崇拜者

你将一处地点祝圣给你的神祇，吟诵赞歌并创造出一片神圣空间。处于该区域内时，你神祇的崇拜者在攻击检定、技能检定、豁免和察觉检定上获得+1状态加值，而对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的生物（例如对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛}而言是不死，或对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{撒恩蕾}而言是邪恶）在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。若你神祇的神术圣化允许你在神圣或邪恶之间进行选择，你也可以选择让这处祝圣地点成为神圣或邪恶。若该神祇的圣化必须 是神圣或邪恶，你必须让此地点与该圣化一致。你神祇的崇拜者在该区域内进行的打击，获得此地点的圣化特征（若有）。

大成功 祝圣成功，且其持续时间变为10年而非1年，或者覆盖半径加倍的区域。偶尔在你神祇的眷顾下，这还可能产生更惊人的效果，例如该区域被永久祝圣，或该效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣成功。

失败 祝圣失败。

大失败 祝圣惨烈失败并激怒了你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少1年内，进一步祝圣该地点的尝试都会失败。

升阶（7环） 该祝圣区域还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制你神祇崇拜者的传送。花费提高为200 gp × 法术环阶。

Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those rolls. If your deity's divine sanctification allows you to choose holy or unholy, you can choose to make the consecrated site holy or unholy as well. If the deity's sanctification must be holy or unholy, you must make the site match that sanctification. Strikes made by worshippers of your deity within the area gain the site's sanctification trait, if any.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell rank.

Truesight (Constant).name: 真知视界（恒定） Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description:
你能看见60尺内事物的真实样貌。对于区域内的任何幻觉、变身或变化效果，GM都会进行一次秘密反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制一个变化法术，你就能看见该生物的真实形态，但不会终止该变化法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion, morph or polymorph effect in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
和木制盾牌一样，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。尽管比木制盾牌更昂贵，但它们也耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Faction-Bound.name: 派系誓缚 Faction-Bound
Faction-Bound.description:
信念灵卫在被创造时会与一个派系绑定。它不能伤害其派系中已知的成员、其派系的象征，或与其派系相关的圣遗物。它在察觉检定上获得 +4 环境加值，以确认此类生物和物体的身份。信念灵卫还会与一个和其派系相关的地点绑定，例如堡垒、学院或秘密藏身处。它不能移动到距离其指定地点超过 120 尺的地方。最后，信念灵卫身体某处带有其派系的明显标记。这个标记无法被隐藏。

A garrholdion is bound to a faction at its creation. It can't harm a known member of its faction, a symbol of its faction, or relics associated with its faction. It gains a +4 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to verify the identity of such creatures and objects. A garrholdion is also bound to a location associated with its faction, such as a fortress, an academy, or a secret hideout. It can't move more than 120 feet from its designated location. Finally, a garrholdion bears an obvious mark of its faction somewhere on its body. This mark can't be hidden.

Quick Shield Block.name: 快速盾牌格挡 Quick Shield Block
Quick Shield Block.description:
信念灵卫每轮获得一个额外的反应动作（），且只能用于盾牌格挡。

The garrholdion gains an additional reaction each round that can be used only for Shield Block.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持用一面盾牌。

你调整盾牌的位置来保护自己。当你已举起盾牌时，你获得其列出的 AC 环境加值。你的盾牌会一直举起，直到你的下个回合开始。

Requirements You are wielding a shield.

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

Reactive Defense.name: 反应防御 Reactive Defense
Reactive Defense.description:
触发 一个处于信念灵卫触及范围内的生物攻击信念灵卫的盟友

效果 信念灵卫将其护盾置于攻击前方，使其盟友对抗此次触发攻击的 AC 获得 +2 环境加值。然后它对该触发生物进行一次近战打击。

Trigger A creature within reach attacks the garrholdion's ally

Effect The garrholdion positions its shield in front of the attack, granting its ally a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. It then makes a melee Strike against the triggering creature.

Belief Fortification.name: 信念壁垒 Belief Fortification
Belief Fortification.description:
30尺。处于此光环内时，信念灵卫阵营的成员对抗情绪效果的豁免获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.tnIjFwv55sDPZxlb]{效果：信念壁垒（印记）}

30 feet. Members of the garrholdion's faction gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against emotion effects while within the aura.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.tnIjFwv55sDPZxlb]{Effect: Belief Fortification (Mark)}

Seed of Doubt.name: 怀疑之种 Seed of Doubt
Seed of Doubt.description:
被信念灵卫的信念射线打击命中的生物会怀疑自己的动作，被迫迟疑。目标必须在一次 @Check[will|dc:39|options:inflicts:stunned] 意志豁免中成功，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}（若为大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}）。若大成功，目标会在24小时内暂时免疫怀疑之种。

A creature hit by the garrholdion's belief ray Strike doubts their actions, forcing them to hesitate. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:39|options:inflicts:stunned] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3} on a critical failure). On a critical success, the target becomes temporarily immune to seed of doubt for 24 hours.

Garrholdion.publicNotes:
信念是一股强大的力量。当意志坚定的人们聚集在共同的旗帜之下时，他们统一的信念便可能获得属于自己的生命。其结果便是信念灵卫，一种守护创造它的派系集会地点的精魂构装体。

信念灵卫通常会呈现为某个典型派系成员闪耀而理想化的版本，不过它也可能在若干特定个体的外貌之间变换，从不固定为其中任何一个。无论采取何种形态，信念灵卫身上总会带有其派系的标志。比如，火印帮的信念灵卫带有该派系的交叉长剑标记，而开拓者协会的信念灵卫则带有开放之路徽记。

Belief is a powerful force. When strong-willed individuals gather beneath a common banner, their unified conviction can take on a life of its own. The result is a garrholdion, a spirit construct that defends the meeting place of the faction that created it.

A garrholdion usually appears as a shimmering, idealized version of a typical faction member, though it might instead shift its appearance among that of specific individuals, never settling on just one. Whatever form it takes, a garrholdion is always marked by its faction's symbol. A Firebrands garrholdion, for example, bears that faction's crossed swords symbol, while a Pathfinder Society garrholdion is marked with the Glyph of the Open Road.

Grasping Gauntlet.name: 攫抓爪 Grasping Gauntlet

Seize Thief.name: 擒住盗贼 Seize Thief
Seize Thief.description:
触发 一个生物接触到被守护的区域

效果 一只戴着铁手套的手从防护中伸出，并尝试进行一次铁手套打击。该危害在其 [[/act grapple dc=37]]{擒获} 上的运动调整值为 +37（@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} [[/act escape dc=47]]{DC 47}）。

Trigger A creature touches the warded area

Effect A gauntleted hand reaches out from the ward and attempts a gauntlet Strike. The hazard has an Athletics modifier of +37 for its [[/act grapple dc=37]]{Grab} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} [[/act escape dc=47]]{DC 47}).

Grasping Gauntlet.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:45]、@Check[nature|dc:45]、@Check[occultism|dc:45]或 @Check[religion|dc:45] 以欺骗该危害的魔法使其自行失效，@Check[athletics|dc:41] 以将这只铁手套制服，@Check[thievery|dc:39] 以将一个物体滑入这只铁手套的掌握中，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}（第9环；反制 DC 41）

@Check[arcana|dc:45], @Check[nature|dc:45], @Check[occultism|dc:45], or @Check[religion|dc:45] to trick the hazard's magic into nullifying itself, @Check[athletics|dc:41] to wrestle the gauntlet into submission, @Check[thievery|dc:39] to slide an object into the gauntlet's grasp, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (9th rank; counteract DC 41)
Grasping Gauntlet.hazarddescription:
一只由魔法力场构成的铁手套会抓住那些试图从军械库中偷取装备的生物。

A gauntlet of magical force clutches creatures trying to steal gear from the armory.

Hardened Entry.name: 加固入口 Hardened Entry

Falling Portcullis.name: 闸门坠落 Falling Portcullis
Falling Portcullis.description:
触发 当闸门升起时，一个生物在其下方大步移动

效果 闸门猛然落下，将其尖锐的末端刺入地板上的格栅。直接位于闸门下方的生物受到 @Damage[(3d12+20)[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] 豁免）。该闸门由精金制成，硬度为 31，且拥有 120 HP（BT 60）。随后，该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger A creature Strides beneath the portcullis while it is raised

Effect The portcullis slams down, driving its sharpened ends through a grate in the floor. Creatures directly beneath the portcullis take @Damage[(3d12+20)[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). The portcullis is made of adamantine and has Hardness 31 and 120 HP (BT 60). The trap then rolls initiative.

Hardened Entry.disable:
@Check[athletics|dc:45] 以防止落闸落下，@Check[crafting|dc:48]（大师）以制造一种能够中和酸雾的化合物，或 @Check[thievery|dc:35]（专家）以卡住压力板

@Check[athletics|dc:45] to prevent the portcullis from dropping, @Check[crafting|dc:48] (master) to create a compound to neutralize the cloud of acid, or @Check[thievery|dc:35] (expert) to jam the pressure plate
Hardened Entry.hazarddescription:
一道铁栅门从天花板落下，伴随着沉重的砰然声落地。几秒后，一团酸雾从地板上的金属格栅中升起。

A portcullis drops from the ceiling, landing with a heavy thunk. Seconds later, a cloud of acid rises from a metal grate in the floor.
Hardened Entry.reset:
一旦被触发，这个陷阱必须通过升起铁闸门来手动重置。所有小瓶都被砸碎后，在更换这些小瓶之前，这个陷阱无法再次使用其例行动作。

Once triggered, the trap must be manually reset by raising the portcullis. Once all the vials are smashed, the trap can't use its routine again until the vials are replaced.
Hardened Entry.routine:
(1 action) 一团酸性蒸汽从铁闸门下方格栅中升起，形成一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]。任何进入该区域的生物，或在云雾内开始其回合的生物，都会受到 @Damage[(3d12+20)[acid]] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic] 豁免）。豁免大失败的生物还会受到 @Damage[1d12[persistent,acid]] 伤害。此危害在第一次之外每次使用此例行动作时，灵气的半径增加 5 尺。

(1 action) A cloud of acidic vapor rises from the grate beneath the portcullis in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5]. Any creature that enters the area or starts its turn inside the cloud takes @Damage[(3d12+20)[acid]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic] save). A creature that critically fails the save also takes @Damage[1d12[persistent,acid]] damage. Each time the hazard uses this routine beyond the first, increase the radius of the emanation by 5 feet.

Lady Siccale.name: 希卡尔夫人 Lady Siccale

Explorer's Clothing.name: 探索者服装 Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物旅行。虽然它不是护甲，并且使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然具有敏捷调整值上限，并且如果蚀刻了强效符文，仍可为 AC 提供物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).name: 服装（高级时尚精品） Clothing (High-Fashion Fine)
Clothing (High-Fashion Fine).description:
适合贵族或王室成员穿着的华丽服装由昂贵的织物、贵金属和精巧的图案制成。穿着高档时尚的华丽服装时，你对贵族或其他上流阶层人士进行“留下印象”相关检定时获得+1物品加值。

Fine clothing, suitable for a noble or royal, is made with expensive fabrics, precious metals, and intricate patterns. You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Make an Impression on nobility or other upper-class folk while wearing high-fashion fine clothing.

Cerulean Scourge.name: 蔚蓝灾祸 Cerulean Scourge
Cerulean Scourge.description:
启动 2 (操纵)

这种毒素因会让受害者的血管先发出明亮的蓝光，随后痛苦地爆裂而臭名昭著。

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[10d6[poison]] 伤害 (1 轮)

阶段 2 @Damage[12d6[poison]] 伤害 (1 轮)

阶段 3 @Damage[14d6[poison]] 伤害 (1 轮)

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This poison is infamous for making the victim's blood vessels glow with a bright blue light before painfully bursting.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[10d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[12d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[14d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Oil of Unlife (Major).name: 无生之油（高等） Oil of Unlife (Major)
Oil of Unlife (Major).description:
启动 1（操作）

这种稀薄的黑色液体会带来深入骨髓的寒意，同时迅速修复不死生物的肉体或灵体形态。当你将无生之油泼洒到一个不死生物身上，或泼洒到一个具有虚无治疗的活体生物身上时，这种油会迅速被其身体吸收，该生物恢复 @Damage[(8d8+30)[healing]]{8d8+30 生命值}。你可以将无生之油倒在虚体不死生物身上；在这种情况下，该生物会将这种油吸收到自身之中。

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This thin, black liquid imparts a bone-deep chill while rapidly repairing an undead creature's physical or spiritual form. When you dash oil of unlife onto an undead creature, or a living creature with void healing, the oil absorbs quickly into its body, and the creature regains @Damage[(8d8+30)[healing]]{8d8+30 Hit Points}. You can pour oil of unlife on an incorporeal undead; in this case, the creature absorbs the oil into itself.

Children of the Night.name: 夜之子嗣 Children of the Night
Children of the Night.description:
吸血鬼的存在会召来夜间生物，替主人效命。这些通常包括 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.6wPW2dvpt86Ou6bL]{鼠群}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.2mg30nJR6P3HJDSd]{蝙蝠群}和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.BN5Lb6IsQ9Wyu3rL]{狼}，但也可能包括其他生物。

只要这些生物位于100尺内，吸血鬼就可以向它们下达心灵感应命令，但它们无法传回讯息。

The vampire's presence brings forth creatures of the night to do the master's bidding. These typically include @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.6wPW2dvpt86Ou6bL]{Rat Swarms}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.2mg30nJR6P3HJDSd]{Bat Swarms}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.BN5Lb6IsQ9Wyu3rL]{Wolves}, but can include other creatures.

The vampire can give telepathic orders to these creatures as long as they are within 100 feet, but they can't communicate back.

Coffin Restoration.name: 棺柩修复 Coffin Restoration
Coffin Restoration.description:
与其他不死生物不同，吸血鬼在生命值降至 0 时不会被摧毁。相反，它会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}。如果它的身体在棺材中休息 1 小时，吸血鬼会恢复 1 点生命值，之后其快速治疗便会开始正常运作。

Unlike other undead, a vampire isn't destroyed at 0 HP. Instead, it falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. If its body rests in its coffin for 1 hour, the vampire gains 1 HP, after which its fast healing begins to function normally.

Mist Escape.name: 雾化脱逃 Mist Escape
Mist Escape.description:
触发 吸血鬼的生命值降至 0。

效果 吸血鬼使用化为迷雾。即使其生命值为 0，它仍可采取移动动作向其棺材移动。处于这种形态且生命值为 0 时，吸血鬼不受进一步伤害影响。

如果它到达其棺材，或经过 2 小时后（以先发生者为准），它会自动恢复为实体形态并失去意识。

Trigger The vampire is reduced to 0 HP.

Effect The vampire uses Turn to Mist. They can take move actions to move toward its coffin even though it's at 0 HP. While at 0 HP in this form, the vampire is unaffected by further damage.

They automatically returns to its corporeal form, unconscious, if they reaches their coffin or after 2 hours, whichever comes first.

Vampire Vulnerabilities.name: 吸血鬼弱点 Vampire Vulnerabilities
Vampire Vulnerabilities.description:
所有吸血鬼都具有以下弱点。

  • 强迫性禁忌 吸血鬼是具有奇异且不可知强迫性禁忌的生物。典型的吸血鬼不能自愿穿过流动的水，除非它们藏身于自己的棺材中被运送过去；也不能进入私人住宅，除非受到有权这么做之人的邀请。由你裁定，吸血鬼也可能有不同的强迫性禁忌——例如，海盗吸血鬼可能无法在未受邀请的情况下踏上坚实地面。吸血鬼仍然可以被强迫去做这些事，也可能像克服其憎斥一样克服其强迫性禁忌。
  • 憎斥 吸血鬼不能自愿接近到距离挥舞着的大蒜或具有神圣圣化选项之神祇的宗教圣徽 10 尺以内。要挥舞大蒜或宗教圣徽，生物必须以一个交互动作来这么做，并且其会保持被挥舞的状态 1 轮（类似于举盾）。如果吸血鬼非自愿地进入其憎斥之物 10 尺以内，它会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}状态，并远离其憎斥之物奔逃，直到它在 10 尺之外结束一个动作。暴露于其憎斥对象 1 轮后，吸血鬼可以用一个具有专注特征的单动作尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:25] 豁免。若成功，它会克服其憎斥 [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 轮}（若为大成功则为 1 小时）。
  • 木桩 一根刺穿吸血鬼心脏的木桩会使吸血鬼降至 0 HP，并阻止其治疗到高于 0 HP，即使在其棺材中也是如此。钉住一名吸血鬼需要 3 个动作，并且只有在吸血鬼处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}时才有效。如果木桩被移除，吸血鬼就能再次治疗到高于 0 HP；如果它在自己的棺材中，则 1 小时的休息期会在木桩被移除后开始。如果在木桩仍插着时砍下吸血鬼的头颅并以圣水涂抹，该吸血鬼就会被摧毁。
  • 阳光 若暴露在直射阳光下，吸血鬼会立即变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。每当吸血鬼在阳光下结束其回合时，迟缓值便增加 1；当它不再处于阳光下时，该状态结束。若吸血鬼以这种方式失去其所有动作，它就会被摧毁。由于它们对光的超自然厌恶，吸血鬼不会投下影子，也不会在镜中显现倒影

All vampires possess the following vulnerabilities.

  • Compulsions Vampires are creatures with strange and unknowable compulsions. A typical vampire can't voluntarily cross running water unless they're transported while they hide within their coffin, nor can they enter a private dwelling unless invited in by someone with the authority to do so. At your discretion, vampires might have different compulsions—a pirate vampire might not be able to set foot on solid ground without being invited, for example. The vampire can still be forced to do these things and might be able to overcome their compulsion just as they do their revulsion.
  • Revulsion A vampire can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of brandished garlic or a brandished religious symbol of a deity with a holy sanctification option. To brandish garlic or a religious symbol, a creature must Interact to do so, and it remains brandished for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the vampire involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of their revulsion, they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} condition, running from the object of their revulsion until they end an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of their revulsion, a vampire can attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} (or 1 hour on a critical success).
  • Stake A wooden stake driven through a vampire's heart drops the vampire to 0 HP and prevents them from healing above 0 HP, even in their coffin. Staking a vampire requires 3 actions and works only if the vampire is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. If the stake is removed, the vampire can heal above 0 HP again, and if they're in their coffin, the 1-hour rest period begins once the stake is removed. If the vampire's head is severed and anointed with holy water while the stake is in place, the vampire is destroyed.
  • Sunlight If exposed to direct sunlight, a vampire immediately becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. The slowed value increases by 1 each time the vampire ends their turn in sunlight, and the condition ends when they're no longer in sunlight. If the vampire loses all their actions in this way, they're destroyed. Due to their supernatural aversion to light, vampires don't cast shadows or show a reflection in mirrors

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
吸血鬼变形成其一种动物形态，或变回其正常形态。大多数吸血鬼可以变成蝙蝠，但有些可以变成不同的生物，例如老鼠或狼。

以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.NzXpEzcZAjuDTZjK]{Aerial Form} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} 法术中的选项作为指引。

  • 巨型蝙蝠 希卡尔夫人变成一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.xnpuGO8jEMba9wy5]{巨型蝙蝠}。她获得40尺回声定位、20尺陆地速度和30尺飞行速度，以及一次尖牙打击，其攻击加值与她最高的近战攻击相同。这些尖牙造成与该吸血鬼爪击相同数值的伤害，但造成的是穿刺伤害而非挥砍伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The vampire transforms into one of its animal forms or back into its normal form. Most vampires can turn into a bat, but some can turn into a different creature, such as a rat or a wolf.

Use the options in the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.NzXpEzcZAjuDTZjK]{Aerial Form} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} spells as guidelines.

  • Giant Bat Lady Siccale changes into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.xnpuGO8jEMba9wy5]{Giant Bat}. They gain echolocation 40 feet, a land Speed of 20 feet and a fly Speed of 30 feet, and a fangs Strike with the same attack bonus as their highest melee attack. These fangs deal the same amount of damage as the vampire's claws, but deal piercing damage rather than slashing damage.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Create Servitor.name: 创造仆从 Create Servitor
Create Servitor.description:
如果一个生物在被“饮血”将生命值降至 0 后死去，吸血鬼可以通过将自己的一部分血液给予该受害者，并将其埋入泥土中 3 个夜晚，把这名受害者转化为吸血鬼仆从。

吸血鬼仆从会被迫服从其创造者，但如果一名吸血鬼同时控制了过多的吸血鬼仆从（由 GM 决定），或者该仆从的等级高于创造它的吸血鬼，那么意志坚定的仆从可以通过成功对抗该吸血鬼意志 DC 的 @Check[will|defense:will] 豁免来摆脱控制。

If a creature dies after being reduced to 0 HP by Drink Blood, the vampire can turn this victim into a vampire servitor by donating some of their own blood to the victim and burying the victim in earth for 3 nights.

A vampiric servitor is compelled to obey its creator, but if a vampire controls too many vampiric servitors at once (as determined by the GM), or if the servitor is a higher level than the vampire that created it, strong-willed servitors can free themselves by succeeding at a @Check[will|defense:will] saving throw against the vampire's Will DC.

Dominate.name: 支配 Dominate
Dominate.description:
吸血鬼可以随意施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P]{支配}，作为一种神术先天法术。施放它需要凝视目标的眼睛，使该法术获得视觉（特征）特征（@Check[will|dc:38]）。其豁免DC使用该吸血鬼等级的高法术DC，而豁免成功的生物会在24小时内暂时免疫该吸血鬼的支配。

彻底摧毁该吸血鬼会终止支配效果，但仅仅将吸血鬼的HP降至0还不足以打破该法术。

The vampire can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P]{Dominate} at will as a divine innate spell. Casting it requires staring into the target's eyes, giving the spell the visual trait (@Check[will|dc:38]). The save DC uses the high spell DC of the vampire's level, and a creature that succeeds is temporarily immune to that vampire's Dominate for 24 hours.

Fully destroying the vampire ends the domination, but merely reducing the vampire to 0 HP is insufficient to break the spell.

Drink Blood.name: 饮血 Drink Blood
Drink Blood.description:
要求 吸血鬼触及内有一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}，或自愿的生物。

效果 吸血鬼将尖牙刺入该生物体内饮用其鲜血。若受害者处于被擒抱状态，则这需要进行一次对抗受害者强韧DC的 @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] 检定；若受害者处于其他任一状态，则自动成功。

受害者陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}，且吸血鬼恢复 @Damage[36[healing]] 生命值，任何超出的生命值都转为临时生命值。对已经处于流失状态的生物饮血不会为吸血鬼恢复任何生命值，但会使受害者的流失值增加 1；当其达到流失 5 时，受害者死亡。吸血鬼也可以饮用已被放入容器中的血液以维持生存，但这样做不会获得任何生命值。

受害者的流失状态每周降低 1。一场输血需要一次 @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] 检定，以及充足的血液或一名献血者，并会在 10 分钟后使流失减少 1。

Requirement A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or willing creature is within the vampire's reach.

Effect The vampire sinks its fangs into that creature to drink its blood. This requires an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim's Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and is automatic for any of the other conditions.

The victim is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and the vampire regains @Damage[36[healing]] HP, gaining any excess HP as temporary Hit Points. Drinking Blood from a creature that's already drained doesn't restore any HP to the vampire but increases the victim's drained value by 1, killing the victim when it reaches drained 5. A vampire can also consume blood that's been emptied into a vessel for sustenance, but it gains no HP from doing so.

A victim's drained condition decreases by 1 per week. A blood transfusion, which requires a @Check[medicine|dc:20|name:Blood Transfusion] check and sufficient blood or a blood donor, reduces the drain by 1 after 10 minutes.

Poison Weapon.name: 武器淬毒 Poison Weapon
Poison Weapon.description:
希卡尔夫人将毒素涂抹在一把匕首上。若她有一只空闲手，她可以在该动作中以一个交互动作抽出一种毒素。若她接下来用该武器进行的下一次攻击命中并造成伤害，则会施加该毒素的效果。若她的攻击检定大失败，则该毒素被浪费。

Lady Siccale applies poison to a dagger. If she has a free hand, she can Interact to draw a poison as part of the action. If her next attack with that weapon hits and deals damage, it applies the effect of the poison. If she critically fails the attack roll, the poison is wasted.

Turn to Mist.name: 化为迷雾 Turn to Mist
Turn to Mist.description:
吸血鬼变成一团气体云，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{气化形体} 法术所述，或变回其正常形态。吸血鬼处于气态形体时失去快速治疗。

吸血鬼可以无限期保持这种形态。

The vampire turns into a cloud of vapor, as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form} spell, or back to its normal form. The vampire loses fast healing while in gaseous form.

The vampire can remain in this form indefinitely.

Lady Siccale.blurb:
真吸血鬼刺客
True vampire assassin
Lady Siccale.hp: coffin restoration, fast healing 15, void healing

Moldering Steed.name: 腐朽战马 Moldering Steed

Willsense.name: 意志感知 Willsense
Willsense.description:
腐朽战马能感知列明射程内所有活着的生物，只要其感知为 +1 或更高。

The moldering steed senses all living creatures within the listed range that have a Wisdom of +1 or higher.

Gallop.name: 疾驰 Gallop
Gallop.description:
腐朽战马大步移动两次。在这些大步移动期间，它的速度获得 +10 尺的环境加值。

The moldering steed Strides twice. It has a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these Strides.

Hunt Will.name: 狩猎意志 Hunt Will
Hunt Will.description:
腐朽战马将120尺内意志调整值最高的活体生物指定为其猎物。该战马在对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}的察觉检定，以及对猎物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}的求生检定上获得+2环境加值。每轮中，该战马首次命中其指定猎物时，会额外造成1d8精准伤害。这些效果会持续，直到该战马再次使用狩猎意志为止。

The moldering steed designates the living creature with the highest Will modifier within 120 feet as its prey. The steed gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the prey and to Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} the prey. The first time the steed hits its designated prey in a round, it deals an additional 1d8 precision damage. These effects last until the steed uses Hunt Will again.

Siphon Will.name: 虹吸意志 Siphon Will
Siphon Will.description:
当腐朽战马以其颚咬打击对一个活着的生物造成伤害时，战马获得 20 点持续 1 分钟的临时生命值，且该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:38] 豁免，否则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}。此后战马造成的进一步伤害会使该生物在豁免失败时的迟钝值增加 1，最大至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.unwNPDLmReEQy700]{效果：虹吸意志}

When the moldering steed damages a living creature with its jaws Strike, the steed gains 20 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 minute, and the creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:38] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}. Further damage dealt by the steed increases the creature's stupefied value on a failed save by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.unwNPDLmReEQy700]{Effect: Siphon Will}

Undead Steed.name: 不死战马 Undead Steed
Undead Steed.description:
不死以及与它们结盟的生物可以指挥一匹腐朽战马，而无需尝试进行一次技能检定。

Undead and creatures allied with them can Command a moldering steed without needing to attempt a skill check.

Moldering Steed.publicNotes:
腐朽战马是一种即使死亡也无法摧折其坚定意志的马匹。它披挂着腐烂的血肉，拖曳着自己恶臭的内脏，在不死状态下仍不断挣扎反抗；它会寻找意志坚定的生物的精魂并将其吞噬，徒劳地试图修补自己破碎的灵魂。一旦嗅到气味，这种战马就会追逐猎物，直到吞噬该生物的精魂，或找到意志更坚定的猎物来追踪。

少数自然出现的腐朽战马，往往是在试图从洪水、火灾等绝境中挣脱时死去的。更常见的情况是，死灵法师制造腐朽战马，作为其不死军队的坐骑。与活体坐骑不同，腐朽战马不需要喂食或照料，而且它们通常会接受允许自己猎杀活体猎物的不死骑手。然而，由于这种战马有着永不满足的饥渴，活着的死灵法师必须小心，别让自己成为坐骑的下一餐。

A moldering steed is a horse whose unshakable will couldn't be broken, even by death. Draped in rotting flesh and trailing its own stinking entrails, the steed fights unrelentingly against its undead state, seeking out the spirits of strong-willed creatures to consume in a vain attempt to repair its fractured soul. Once it catches a scent, the steed pursues its prey until it consumes the creature's spirit or finds stronger-willed prey to track.

The few moldering steeds that arise naturally often died attempting to escape desperate situations, such as floods or fires. More often, necromancers create moldering steeds to serve as mounts for their undead armies. Unlike living mounts, moldering steeds don't need to be fed or cared for, and they'll often accept an undead rider who allows them to hunt down living prey. Due to the steed's insatiable hunger, however, living necromancers must take care not to become their steed's next meal.

Glory Arcely.name: 格洛瑞·阿瑟里 Glory Arcely
Glory Arcely.tokenName: 格洛瑞·阿瑟里 Glory Arcely

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Earthquake.name: 地震术 Earthquake
Earthquake.description:
你撼动地面，将生物掀入裂隙，并使建筑坍塌。GM可能会在某些区域添加额外效果。悬崖可能会坍塌，导致生物坠落；或者湖泊可能会因其表面下方裂隙张开而排干，留下一片流沙遍布的泥沼。

  • 撼动地面 地面变为困难地形，位于其上的生物在攻击检定、AC和技能检定上承受 -2 环境减值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{法术效果：地震术（撼动地面）}
  • 裂隙 每个站在地面上的生物都必须在其回合开始时进行一次反射豁免，以稳住身形并避免坠入其脚下张开的 40 尺深裂隙。裂隙是永久性的，其侧壁需要成功的 @Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb] 才能攀爬。
  • 坍塌 建筑和天花板可能会坍塌。GM为每个对象进行一次纯骰检定（坚固建筑为 @Check[flat|dc:16]，普通建筑和大多数天然构造为 @Check[flat|dc:14]，劣质建筑为 @Check[flat|dc:9]，并可由GM视情况调高或调低）。坍塌会对每个被波及的生物造成 11d6 点钝击伤害，并可进行一次基础反射豁免。除非生物重度成功，否则会倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏卧}；若重度失败，则还会坠入裂隙。

升阶（10环） 你制造一场巨大的地震，足以摧毁一处聚居地。射程增加至半英里，区域扩大为四分之一英里爆发。

You shake the ground, topple creatures into fissures, and collapse structures. The GM might add additional effects in certain areas. Cliffs might collapse, causing creatures to fall, or a lake might drain as fissures open up below its surface, leaving a morass of quicksand.

  • Shaking Ground The ground is difficult terrain, and creatures on it take a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, AC, and skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{Spell Effect: Earthquake (Shaking Ground)}
  • Fissures Each creature on the ground must attempt a Reflex save at the start of its turn to keep its footing and avoid falling into 40-foot-deep fissures that open beneath it. The fissures are permanent, and their sides require successful @Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb] to Climb.
  • Collapse Structures and ceilings might collapse. The GM rolls a flat check for each (@Check[flat|dc:16] for a sturdy structure, @Check[flat|dc:14] for an average structure and most natural formations, @Check[flat|dc:9] for a shoddy structure, all adjusted higher or lower as the GM sees fit). A collapse deals 11d6 bludgeoning damage to each creature caught in it with a basic Reflex save. A creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} unless it critically succeeds and falls into a fissure if it critically fails.

Heightened (10th) You create a massive earthquake that can devastate a settlement. The range increases to half a mile and the area to a quarter-mile burst.

Divine Decree.name: 神谕敕令 Divine Decree
Divine Decree.description:
你诵出一段来自你信仰的强力祷文，降下会伤害那些反对你理想者的诫命。你对区域内的敌人造成 7d10 精魂伤害；每个敌人都必须进行一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入衰弱 2，持续 1 分钟。如果你位于自己的家乡位面，而该生物不在其家乡位面上，则该生物被送回它的家乡位面。10 级或以下的生物还必须在一次意志豁免中成功，否则会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，持续 1 分钟；若其大失败，则会死亡（这是一个死亡效果）。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d10，而在大失败时必须进行第二次豁免的生物等级提高 2。

You utter a potent litany from your faith, a mandate that harms those who oppose your ideals. You deal 7d10 spirit damage to your enemies in the area; each enemy must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute. If you're on your home plane and the creature is not, the creature is sent back to its home plane. A creature of 10th level or lower must also succeed at a Will save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 minute; if it critically fails, it dies (this is a death effect).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10, and the level of creatures that must attempt a second save on a critical failure increases by 2.

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨位面传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你拥有一把用于目的地位面的位面钥匙，并将其作为法器

你和你的盟友穿越存在诸位面之间的屏障。目标移动到另一个位面，例如火元素位面、冥界或外裂隙。你必须知晓目的地位面确实存在，并使用一把由该位面的材料制成的魔法位面钥匙，作为此法术的法器。大多数著名位面的位面钥匙都属于非常见，正如法术跨位面传送一样；而较为晦涩的位面和半位面通常拥有稀有，甚至可能是独特的位面钥匙。

该法术的精确性极低，你会出现在由你选择的一名目标上次前往该位面时所在地点1d20×25英里之外的地方。如果对所有目标来说这都是第一次前往某个位面，你会出现在该位面上的随机位置。跨位面传送不提供返回旅行的手段，不过再次施放跨位面传送可以让你返回先前所在的位面，除非存在特殊情况。

Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Netherworld, or the Outer Rifts. You must know the destination plane exists and use a magic planar key created from material from that plane as a locus for the spell. While the planar keys for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell interplanar teleport, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare or possibly even unique planar keys.

The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20×25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Interplanar teleport doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting interplanar teleport again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
一颗强大的灼热阳光球体在区域内爆炸，对区域内所有生物造成 8d10 火焰伤害，此外还对不死生物额外造成 @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] 活力伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并永久陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}。

如果该球体与一片魔法黑暗区域重叠，阳炎爆会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

强化（+1） 火焰伤害增加 1d10，对不死生物造成的活力伤害增加 1d10。

A powerful globe of searing sunlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 fire damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} permanently.

If the globe overlaps with an area of magical darkness, sunburst attempts to counteract the darkness effect.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 1d10, and the vitality damage against undead increases by 1d10.

Blessed Boundary.name: 祝圣边界 Blessed Boundary
Blessed Boundary.description:
数以百计的神术之力显现出来，盘旋成一个巨大的防护球体。这些显现通常看起来像带刺的碎片，但往往会呈现出与施法者所信奉神祇相关的外观。该球体是中空的，这些显现在外缘形成一层 2 英寸厚的外壳。施放此法术时，你可以选择让爆发范围以 5 尺为增量缩小。该外壳提供掩蔽，并且可以与坚实地形相交而不影响地形。球体被创造出来时，与外壳相交的每个生物，或试图穿过外壳的生物，都会受到 7d8 点力场伤害。生物也会在其回合结束时受到该伤害，但前提是它在该回合中尚未因外壳受到过伤害。这些效果由生物的反射豁免决定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，被沿你选择的方向推至多 10 尺，并结束其移动。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被沿你选择的方向推至多 20 尺，并结束其移动。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

Manifestations of divine force appear in the hundreds, swirling in a massive, protective sphere. These typically look like spiky fragments, but often take on an appearance themed to the deity of the caster. The sphere is hollow, with the manifestations forming a shell 2 inches deep on the outer edge. You can choose to make the burst smaller, in 5-foot increments, when you cast it.
