The shell provides cover and can intersect solid terrain without affecting it. The shell deals 7d8 force damage to each creature who intersects with the shell when the sphere's created, or who attempts to move through the shell. The creature also takes the damage at the end of its turn, but only if it didn't already take damage from the shell that turn. The effects are determined by a creature's Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is pushed up to 10 feet in the direction of your choice, and ends its movement.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pushed up to 20 feet in the direction of your choice, and ends its movement.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Breath of Life.name: 生命之息 Breath of Life
Breath of Life.description:
触发 射程内的一名活着的生物将要死亡。

你的祝福在生物死亡的瞬间使其复苏。你阻止目标死亡，并为目标恢复 5d8 生命值。如果触发该法术效果的是死亡效果，或是不留下遗骸的效果，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术}，你不能使用生命之息。

升环（+2） 治疗量增加 1d8。

Trigger A living creature within range would die.

Your blessing revives a creature at the moment of its death. You prevent the target from dying and restore 5d8 Hit Points to the target. You can't use breath of life if the triggering effect was a death effect or an effect that leaves no remains, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}

Heightened (+2) The healing increases by 1d8.

Call Spirit.name: 唤魂术 Call Spirit
Call Spirit.description:
你撕开通往来世的帷幕，从其最终安息之处呼唤一个精魂。你必须直呼该精魂之名，且必须提供一个与该精魂有关联之物，例如一件所有物、一件衣物，或其尸体的一部分。不愿回应你呼唤的精魂可以尝试进行一次意志豁免以避免被召来；若大成功，一个捣蛋的精魂会冒充你原本想要呼唤的那个精魂。如果你生前没有见过该精魂，意志豁免的 DC 会降低 2。无论如何，显现出来的精魂都会呈现为你原本想呼唤之生物的缥缈形态。在持续时间内的每一分钟，你都可以向该精魂提出一个问题。它可以随心所欲地回答，甚至拒绝回答。如果该精魂不在来世（例如它是不死），则除大失败外的所有结果都使用失败效果。

大成功 该精魂尤其配合，即使它有充分理由欺瞒你，它在欺瞒检定上仍会承受 -2 环境减值。

成功 你呼唤来了该精魂。

失败 你未能呼唤来任何精魂。

大失败 一个或多个邪恶精魂出现并发动攻击。

You tear the veil to the afterlife and call a spirit from its final resting place. You must call the spirit by name, and you must provide a connection to the spirit, such as a possession, a garment, or a piece of its corpse. A spirit unwilling to heed your call can attempt a Will save to avoid it; on a critical success, a trickster spirit Impersonates the spirit you meant to call. The DC of the Will save is 2 lower if you haven't met the spirit in life. Either way, the spirit appears as a wispy form of the creature you meant to call. Each minute of the duration, you can ask the spirit a question. It can answer how it pleases or even refuse to answer. If the spirit isn't in the afterlife (such as if it's an undead), all results other than critical failures use the failure effect.

Critical Success The spirit is particularly cooperative, and even if it has strong reasons to deceive you, it takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its Deception checks.

Success You call the spirit.

Failure You fail to call a spirit.

Critical Failure One or more evil spirits appear and attack.

Resurrect.name: 复生术 Resurrect
Resurrect.description:
你试图呼唤目标的灵魂，并将其送回肉体。这要求目标的肉体必须在场且相对完整。目标必须是在过去一年内死亡。若 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛} 已判定目标命数已尽，或目标不愿返回，则此仪式自动失败，但你会在成功的宗教检定后得知此事，并且可以终止仪式而无需支付代价。

大成功 你使目标复生。其以完整生命值重返生命，并保有死亡时准备的相同法术与各类池中点数，同时仍承受旧身体上的任何长期衰弱。在复生过程中，目标会遇见其神祇的一位使者，对方激励了他们，使其在1周内的攻击检定、察觉、豁免和技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标也会因其死后世界中的经历而以某种方式被永久改变，例如性格略有转变、头发中添了一缕白发，或出现一个奇异的新胎记。

成功 如同大成功，但目标重返生命时仅有1点生命值，且没有准备任何法术，各类池中也没有点数，同时仍受旧身体上任何长期衰弱的影响。角色在墓园中的经历并未激励他们，反而使其暂时衰弱。目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续1周；在这一周过去之前，这些状态无法以任何方式被移除或减轻。

失败 你的尝试没有成功。

大失败 事情出了可怕的差错——一个邪恶精魂占据了这具肉体、肉体转变为一种特殊的不死生物，或某种更糟的命运降临到目标身上。

升阶（6环） 你可以复生最高12级的目标，且基础代价为125 gp。

升阶（7环） 即使只有身体的一小部分，你也可以施展 resurrect；在成功或大成功时，该仪式会创造一具新身体。目标必须是在过去十年内死亡。该仪式需要四名次要施法者，每一位的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为14级，且基础代价为200 gp。

升阶（8环） 如同7环，但目标最高可以为16级，且基础代价为300 gp。

升阶（9环） 即使没有身体，只要你知道目标的名字，并且曾在任何时候触碰过其身体的一部分，你也可以施展 resurrect。目标必须是在过去一个世纪内死亡，且其在成功时不会获得这些负面状态。该仪式需要八名次要施法者，每一位的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为18级，且基础代价为600 gp。

升阶（10环） 如同9环，但目标死亡至今经过了多久都无关紧要。该仪式需要16名次要施法者，每一位的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为20级，且该仪式的基础代价为1,000 gp。

You attempt to call forth the target's soul and return it to its body. This requires the target's body to be present and relatively intact. The target must have died within the past year. If @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} has decided that the target's time has come or the target doesn't wish to return, this ritual automatically fails, but you discover this after the successful Religion check and can end the ritual without paying the cost.

Critical Success You resurrect the target. They return to life with full Hit Points and the same spells prepared and points in their pools they had when they died, and still suffering from any long-term debilitations of the old body. The target meets an agent of their deity during the resurrection who inspires them, granting them a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 week. The target is also permanently changed in some way by their time in the afterlife, such as gaining a slight personality shift, a streak of white in the hair, or a strange new birthmark.

Success As critical success, except the target returns to life with 1 Hit Point and no spells prepared or points in any pools, and still is affected by any long-term debilitations of the old body. Instead of inspiring them, the character's time in the Boneyard has left them temporarily debilitated. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 week; these conditions can't be removed or reduced by any means until the week has passed.

Failure Your attempt is unsuccessful.

Critical Failure Something goes horribly wrong-an evil spirit possesses the body, the body transforms into a special kind of undead, or some worse fate befalls the target.

Heightened (6th) You can resurrect a target of up to 12th level, and the base cost is 125 gp.

Heightened (7th) You can use resurrect even with only a small portion of the body; the ritual creates a new body on a success or critical success. The target must have died within the past decade. The ritual requires four secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 14th level, and the base cost is 200 gp.

Heightened (8th) As 7th rank, but the target can be up to 16th level and the base cost is 300 gp.

Heightened (9th) You can use resurrect even without the body as long as you know the target's name and have touched a portion of its body at any time. The target must have died within the past century, and it doesn't gain the negative conditions on a success. The ritual requires eight secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 18th level, and the base cost is 600 gp.

Heightened (10th) As 9th rank, except it doesn't matter how long ago the target died. The ritual requires 16 secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 20th level, and the ritual's base cost is 1,000 gp.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标可以理解所有词语，不受语言限制，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每次目标开口说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并用该生物能够理解的语言交谈，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

强化（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣之怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你引导神性的狂怒对抗你的敌人。区域内的敌人受到4d10精魂伤害，具体效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；当其处于恶心状态时，还会同时处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

You channel the fury of divinity against your foes. You deal 4d10 spirit damage to enemies in the area, depending on their Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}; while it's sickened, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动自如 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。在此法术效果持续期间，目标忽略会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当其尝试对使其陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{攫抓}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}的效果进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}时，除非该效果为魔法且其环阶高于行动自如法术，否则自动成功。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{法术效果：行动自如}

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher rank than the unfettered movement spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Cleanse Affliction.name: 净化苦难 Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description:
温和的恢复性魔法会抵御毒素以及更为复杂的病患所造成的效果。选择目标身上的一种苦难，例如诅咒、疾病或毒素。如果它已进展到第一阶段之后，则将其阶段降低一级。此降低效果对某一特定苦难案例只能生效一次；当该案例被完全治愈时，该案例才会结束。虽然这种降低不能再次发生，但此法术的高环版本会在每次施放时尝试进行反制。

升环（3环） 若该苦难是疾病或毒素，则尝试反制该苦难。

升环（4环） 若该苦难是诅咒、疾病或毒素，则尝试反制该苦难。

Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies. Choose an affliction on the target, such as a curse, disease, or poison. If it has advanced past stage one, reduce the stage by one. This reduction can be applied only once to a given case of an affliction, with the case ending when it's completely cured. Although the reduction can't occur again, heightened versions of this spell attempt to counteract with each casting.

Heightened (3rd) Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a disease or poison.

Heightened (4th) Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a curse, disease, or poison.

Clear Mind (At Will).name: 澄明心智（随意） Clear Mind (At Will)
Clear Mind (At Will).description:
你将心灵污染从目标的意识中驱离。尝试反制一个由你选择、并使目标陷入以下状态之一的效果：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃离}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝}。如果你反制该效果失败，但若其反制等级低 2 级你本会成功，则改为将该效果压制直到你下个回合开始。该效果被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。这个法术无法反制或压制属于诅咒、疾病，或目标自然状态一部分的状态。

升阶（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{混乱}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{受控}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓} 加入状态列表。

升阶（6环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{厄运} 加入状态列表。

升阶（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑} 加入状态列表。

You drive mental contamination from the target's mind. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}. If you failed to counteract the effect but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. This spell can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of curses, diseases, or a natural state of the target.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Dispel Magic (At Will).name: 解除魔法（随意） Dispel Magic (At Will)
Dispel Magic (At Will).description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变为其所属类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Invisibility (At Will; Self Only).name: 隐形术（任意施放；仅限自身） Invisibility (At Will; Self Only)
Invisibility (At Will; Self Only).description:
幻象使光线绕过目标，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}状态。这使其对所有生物而言处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}状态，不过这些生物仍可尝试寻找该目标，使其改为对它们处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}状态。如果目标使用敌对动作，则该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但如果目标使用敌对动作，它不会结束。

Illusions bend light around the target, rendering it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Sure Footing.name: 坚实步伐 Sure Footing
Sure Footing.description:
你将目标的肢体从妨碍移动的病症中解放出来。尝试反制一个你选择的、对目标施加以下状态之一的效果：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。如果你未能反制该效果，但若其反制等级低 2 级你本会成功，则改为压制该效果直到你的下个回合开始。该效果被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

此法术不能反制或压制诅咒、疾病，或属于目标正常状态一部分的状态。

高环（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓}和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{受束缚}加入状态列表。

高环（6环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}加入状态列表。

高环（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑}加入状态列表。

You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语甜如蜜糖，你的面容仿佛笼罩在梦幻般的朦胧之中。它必须进行一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近威胁过它，或对它使用过敌对动作，则此次豁免获得 +4 环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与你的友谊，或你说服它去做的事，与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过普通手段说服目标继续把你当作朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你曾试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而非魅惑，除非它辨识出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好}。如果它原本就是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下一次进行每日准备时。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下一次进行每日准备时，且你的目标至多可以为 10 个生物。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导活力能量来治疗活体或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其 1d8 点生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的活力伤害，且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。你在施放此法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (专注) 该法术的射程为 30 尺。若你在治疗一个活体生物，使恢复的生命值增加 8 点。

3 (专注) 你在一个 @Template[emanation|distance:30] 中分散活力能量。这以爆发内所有活体和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害量增加 1d8，且双动作版本的额外治疗增加 8 点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Greatsword.name: 巨剑 Greatsword
Greatsword.description:
这把巨大的双手剑几乎与持用者一样高。它的下半截剑刃通常会稍微磨钝一些，以便在近身搏斗中握持，从而获得额外的杠杆力。

This immense two-handed sword is nearly as tall as its wielder. Its lower blade is often somewhat dulled to allow it to be gripped for extra leverage in close-quarter fights.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Unholy).name: 再生 20（被邪恶解除） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Unholy)

Aura of Righteousness.name: 正义灵光 Aura of Righteousness
Aura of Righteousness.description:
20尺。位于天使灵光中的盟友对抗邪恶生物时，AC获得+2状态加值，且对邪恶生物的伤害掷骰获得+2状态加值。灵光中的区域对邪恶生物而言属于困难地形。

20 feet. Allies in the angel's aura gain a +2 status bonus to AC against unholy creatures and a +2 status bonus to damage rolls against unholy creatures. The area in the aura is difficult terrain for unholy creatures.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
该天使呈现为任何小型或中型类人生物的外貌。这不会改变其速度或打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The angel takes on the appearance of any Small or Medium humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Holy Armaments.name: 圣洁武装 Holy Armaments
Holy Armaments.description:
当天使持用它时，任何武器都会获得一个圣洁属性符文的效果。

Any weapon gains the effect of a holy property rune while the angel wields it.

Glory Arcely.blurb:
男性天使守卫
Male angel guardians
Glory Arcely.prototypeToken: 格洛瑞·阿瑟里 Glory Arcely

Onturat.name: 昂图拉特 Onturat

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Metamorphosis.name: 变形术 Metamorphosis
Metamorphosis.description:
运用你对变化魔法的精通，你将形态隐藏于形态之中。你将自己变成你法术列表中任意一个你能以变化法术选择的形态，或任意一个你能准备的8环或以下的形态（包括你已知法术的任何8环或以下的高阶版本）。你获得40点临时生命值，而非该形态通常赋予的数值。

你可以维持该法术，以进入一个你在此次变形术期间尚未使用过的新形态。这会恢复你从该法术获得的临时生命值。

Harnessing your mastery of transformative magic, you hide forms within forms. You transform yourself into any form you could choose with a polymorph spell in your spell repertoire or that you could prepare of 8th-rank or lower (including any 8th-rank or lower heightened versions of spells you know). You gain 40 temporary Hit Points rather than the amount normally granted by the form.

You can Sustain the spell to enter a new form you haven't used during this metamorphosis. This replenishes your temporary Hit Points from this spell.

Desiccate.name: 枯萎术 Desiccate
Desiccate.description:
你从目标的身体中抽取水分，造成10d10虚空伤害。由水构成的生物（如水元素）和植物生物，其结果按其豁免结果恶化一级来结算。身体中不含显著水分的生物（如土元素）免疫于枯萎术。

强化（+1） 伤害增加1d10。

You pull the moisture from the targets' bodies, dealing 10d10 void damage. Creatures made of water (such as water elementals) and plant creatures use the outcome for one degree of success worse than the result of their saving throw. Creatures whose bodies contain no significant moisture (such as earth elementals) are immune to desiccate.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Punishing Winds.name: 惩戒之风 Punishing Winds
Punishing Winds.description:
区域（续）30英尺半径、100英尺高的圆柱体

狂暴的强风与强力下冲气流充满该区域，形成一道气旋。区域内所有飞行中的生物下降40英尺。对于飞行中的生物而言，整个区域都是高等困难地形；对于地面上的生物或正在攀爬的生物而言，则是困难地形。任何在该区域内以飞行状态结束其回合的生物都会下降20英尺。任何被该法术的风推向表面的生物，都会如同坠落一般受到钝击伤害。

圆柱体外侧垂直边缘上的方格会阻止生物离开。这些方格属于高等困难地形，而试图强行穿过的生物必须成功通过一次对抗你的法术DC的运动检定或特技检定，以进行飞行机动并穿过。检定失败的生物会结束其当前动作，但可以再次尝试。

Area (continued) 30-foot-radius, 100-foot-tall cylinder

Violent winds and a powerful downdraft fill the area, forming a cyclone. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground or Climbing. Any creature that ends its turn Flying within the area descends 20 feet. Any creature pushed into a surface by this spell's winds takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

The squares at the outside vertical edges of the cylinder prevent creatures from leaving. These squares are greater difficult terrain, and a creature attempting to push through must succeed at an Athletics check or Acrobatics check to Maneuver in Flight against your spell DC to get through. A creature that fails ends its current action but can try again.

Collective Memories.name: 集体记忆 Collective Memories
Collective Memories.description:
你接触到其他凡人关于某个主题的记忆、知识、传说、故事与学识。该主题必须是某个重要的人、地点或事物。如果该主题在场，你的主要技能检定的成功等级提高一级。如果你在尝试该仪式之前只掌握了关于该主题的模糊信息，你的主要技能检定的成功等级降低一级。如果你在几乎没有相关底线信息的情况下让主题在场，这些调整值会彼此抵消。

大成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你梳理这些大多连贯的记忆，并更侧重于其中更准确或更有用的信息，而非被错误记住的知识或夸大的故事。

成功 在仪式结束后的1小时内，你会获知对进一步探究有用的信息，但这些信息通常并不完整，或仍然充满谜团。由于凡人的记忆与故事本就如此，你很可能会得知多个彼此矛盾的版本。

失败 你没能学到任何有用的传说。

大失败 你可调用的庞杂知识彻底压垮了你的心智。你在1周内无法感知或回应当前发生的任何事情，除了进行呼吸和睡眠等维持生存所必需的行为。不过，当你恢复后，你可以将自己的一项技能重训为一项基于你所接触主题知识的学识，视同你已花费了1周进行重训。

You tap into other mortals' memories, knowledge, legends, tales, and lore about a subject. The subject must be an important person, place, or thing. If the subject is present, increase the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. If you have only vague information about the subject before attempting the ritual, decrease the degree of success of your primary skill check by one step. These modifiers cancel each other out if you have a subject present with little to no baseline information.

Critical Success For 1 hour after the ritual ends, you sort through memories that are mostly coherent, emphasizing more accurate or useful information over misremembered knowledge or exaggerated tales.

Success For 1 hour after the ritual ends, you learn useful information for further inquiry that remains generally incomplete or enigmatic. As is the nature of mortal memory and stories, you are likely to learn multiple contradictory versions.

Failure You fail to learn any useful legends.

Critical Failure Your mind becomes overwhelmed with the vast array of knowledge at your disposal. You can't sense or respond to anything in the present for 1 week except to perform necessities like breathing and sleeping. When you recover, however, you can retrain one of your skills into a Lore based on the knowledge of a subject you were accessing, as if you had spent 1 week retraining.

Execute.name: 执行 Execute
Execute.description:
你指向一个生物，唤起万物的终亡。目标受到70点虚空伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。若目标是不死生物或以其他方式具有虚无治疗，则该法术失去死亡和虚能（特征），并获得命能（特征），且目标受到70点活力伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加10点。

You point at a creature and invoke the demise of all things. The target takes 70 void damage with a basic Fortitude save. If the target is undead or otherwise has void healing, the spell loses the death and void traits and gains the vitality trait, and the target takes 70 vitality damage with a basic Fortitude save.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 10.

Truesight (Constant).name: 真知视界（恒定） Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description:
你能看见60尺内事物的真实模样。GM会对区域内任何幻觉、变形或变化效果进行一次秘密反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否能看穿它（例如，若该检定成功反制一个变化法术，你可以看见该生物的真实形态，但你不会终止该变化法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion, morph or polymorph effect in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

Translocate.name: 跨界传送 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你会立刻将自己以及你所穿戴和持握的任何物品，从当前位置传送到你视线内射程范围内一处未被占据的空间。若这会让另一名生物随你一同传送——即使你是将其装在异次元容器中携带——则该法术失效。

升环（5环） 射程增加至 1 英里。你不需要能够看见你的目的地，只要你过去曾到过那里，并且知道它相对于你的位置与距离即可。随后，你会暂时免疫 1 小时。

You instantly transport yourself and any items you're wearing and holding from your current space to an unoccupied space within range you can see. If this would bring another creature with you—even if you're carrying it in an extradimensional container—the spell is lost.

Heightened (5th) The range increases to 1 mile. You don't need to be able to see your destination, as long as you have been there in the past and know its relative location and distance from you. You are then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

Shard Storm.name: 碎片风暴 Shard Storm
Shard Storm.description:
10尺。

一团骨片云环绕着夺颅者。当一个生物移动进入该散发区域，或在那里开始其回合时，碎片风暴对该生物造成 @Damage[4d6[slashing],4d6[void]]{4d6 挥砍伤害和 4d6 虚空伤害}，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:42|basic] 豁免。

如果该生物拥有对虚空伤害的抗力或免疫，或拥有可保护其免受死亡效果影响的效果，或拥有可保护其免受 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{末日} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失} 状态影响的效果，则该生物必须先成功通过一次 @Check[will|dc:42] 豁免，否则所有此类益处都会被压制 1 分钟。

10 feet.

A cloud of bone shards surrounds the skulltaker. When a creature moves into the emanation or begins its turn there, shard storm deals @Damage[4d6[slashing],4d6[void]]{4d6 slashing damage and 4d6 void damage} to the creature, with a @Check[reflex|dc:42|basic] save.

If the creature has resistance or immunity to void damage, or an effect that protects it against death effects, or an effect that protects it against the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} condition, the creature must first succeed at a @Check[will|dc:42] save or have all such benefits suppressed for 1 minute.

Bonetaker.name: 夺骨者 Bonetaker
Bonetaker.description:
每当有生物在夺颅者60尺内死亡时，夺颅者便会将该生物的一部分骨骼抽入其碎片风暴中。该生物必须在一次 @Check[will|dc:40] 豁免中成功，否则会在 [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}后作为一名 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.FH58AcRBZIfrHKvv]{骷髅勇士} 复起。这些骷髅勇士由夺颅者控制。

Whenever a creature dies within 60 feet of a skulltaker, the skulltaker draws a portion of the creature's bones into its shard storm. The creature must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] save or rise as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.FH58AcRBZIfrHKvv]{Skeletal Champion} in [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. These skeletal champions are controlled by the skulltaker.

Splintered Ground.name: 粉碎地面 Splintered Ground
Splintered Ground.description:
夺颅者使碎裂的骨骼从一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] 内除加工石材表面以外的所有坚固表面中迸发而出。生物在骨骼中移动时，每移动5尺便会受到 @Damage[10[piercing],10[void]]{10点穿刺伤害和10点虚空伤害}。每轮中，生物第一次因这些碎裂骨骼受到穿刺伤害时，必须成功通过一次 @Check[reflex|dc:42] 反射豁免，否则其所有速度承受–10尺环境减值，持续10分钟；若大失败，则改为承受–15尺环境减值，持续24小时。骨骼会一直留在原处，直到夺颅者再次使用此动作，或骨骼被手动清除；每个5尺方格需要10分钟来清除。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.86uYNsVXzYWxqLTV]{效果：粉碎地面}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.hc7kR6quUE9ryRyj]{效果：粉碎地面（大失败）}

The skulltaker causes splintered bones to erupt from all solid surfaces in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:100], except for surfaces of worked stone. A creature moving through the bones takes @Damage[10[piercing],10[void]]{10 piercing damage and 10 void} damage for every 5 feet of movement. The first time each round a creature takes piercing damage from these splintered bones, it must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:42] save or take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to all Speeds for 10 minutes, or a –15-foot circumstance penalty for 24 hours on a critical failure. The bones remain in place until the skulltaker uses this action again or the bones are manually removed, which takes 10 minutes for each 5-foot square.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.86uYNsVXzYWxqLTV]{Effect: Splintered Ground}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.hc7kR6quUE9ryRyj]{Effect: Splintered Ground (Critical Failure)}

Void Drain.name: 虚能汲取 Void Drain
Void Drain.description:
当夺颅者以近战打击命中时，目标必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:42] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{末日 1}。

When a skulltaker hits with a melee Strike, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:42] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}.

Onturat.publicNotes:
被称为夺颅者的骨骸漩涡，仿佛一阵邪恶的狂风，从迷雾缭绕的山巅盘旋而下，穿过呼啸的山间隘口；它是那些注定殒命的攀登者与迷失的开路者在临终前所经历的狂乱与痛苦所显化出的可怕具现。在某些地方，夺颅者也被称为萨克斯拉。

Swirling down from misty peaks and through howling mountain passes like an evil wind, the vortex of bones known as a skulltaker is a terrible manifestation of the delirium and agony experienced by doomed climbers and lost trailblazers just before they met their end. In some places, a skulltaker is also known as a saxra.
Onturat.blurb:
变体颅骨猎手
Variant skulltaker

Breach.name: 跃浪击 Breach
Breach.description:
骨冢守卫跳跃，并在其移动过程中的任意一点进行一次打击。

The ossuary warden Leaps and makes a Strike at any point along its movement.

River Jump.name: 水中跳跃 River Jump
River Jump.description:
如果骨冢守卫在水中，它可以垂直@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跳跃}60尺并水平跳跃60尺，并将它已擒抱的任何生物一同带着移动。守卫不会因落入水中而受到坠落伤害。

If the ossuary warden is in water, it can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} vertically 60 feet and horizontally 60 feet, moving any creature it has Grabbed along with it. The warden doesn't take damage from falls into water.

Radiant Veranallia.name: 辐辉圣藤使 Radiant Veranallia

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Cataclysm.name: 天灾降临 Cataclysm
Cataclysm.description:
你呼唤足以终结世界的诸般天灾降临之难以想象的力量，从每一种天灾中撕下一小部分，并将它们合而为一，形成一次骇人至极的强力攻击。以下效果降临于区域内的所有生物。为判定天灾降临造成的伤害，将区域内生物的抗力视为降低10。每个生物进行一次基础反射豁免，该豁免同时适用于全部五种伤害。

  • 溶解血肉的酸雨造成 3d10 点强酸伤害。
  • 轰鸣的地震术撼动并重击地面上的生物，造成 3d10 点钝击伤害。
  • 一阵冰寒狂风造成 3d10 点寒冷伤害。
  • 惊人的闪电抽打区域，造成 3d10 点电击伤害。
  • 猛烈的狂风在天空中翻搅，对区域内飞行的生物造成 3d10 点钝击伤害。
  • 瞬间形成的海啸席卷区域内的生物，造成 3d10 点带有水（特征）的钝击伤害（对于在该区域内游泳的生物，此伤害加倍）。
  • 大规模野火在骤然爆发的炼狱中燃烧，造成 3d10 点火焰伤害。

You call upon the unimaginable power of world-ending cataclysms, ripping a small piece of each cataclysm and combining them together into one horrifically powerful attack. The following effects come down upon all creatures in the area. Treat the resistances of creatures in the area as if they were 10 lower for the purpose of determining the cataclysm's damage. Each creature attempts one basic Reflex save that applies to all five types of damage.

  • Flesh-dissolving acid rain deals 3d10 acid damage.
  • A roaring earthquake shakes and bludgeons creatures on the ground, dealing 3d10 bludgeoning damage.
  • A blast of freezing wind deals 3d10 cold damage.
  • Incredible lightning lashes the area, dealing 3d10 electricity damage.
  • Beating winds churn across the sky, dealing 3d10 bludgeoning damage to creatures flying in the area.
  • An instant tsunami sweeps over creatures in the area, dealing 3d10 bludgeoning damage with the water trait (doubled for creatures swimming in the area).
  • A massive wildfire burns in a sudden inferno, dealing 3d10 fire damage.

Remake.name: 重塑 Remake
Remake.description:
你凭空将一个物体完整地重新创造出来，即使该物体已经被摧毁。为此，你必须能够在脑海中描绘出该物体。此外，材料成分必须是该物品的残余，无论多么微小或不起眼（即使是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术} 后残留的一粒尘埃也足够）。如果你的想象依赖了过多猜测；如果该物体过于庞大，无法装入一个 5 尺立方体；如果该物体仍然存在而你只是没有察觉；或者如果该物体是神器、等级超过 20，或具有类似的强大魔法力量，则该法术失败。

该物品会以完美状态重新组装。即使你脑海中的形象是一个受损或风化的物体，新造出的也会是这种完美形态。如果该物体是魔法物品，此法术通常会恢复其恒定的魔法属性，但不会恢复任何临时属性，例如充能或一次性使用次数。具有充能或每日使用次数的物品在被重造时，其所有使用次数都视为已耗尽，但之后会照常恢复。

You fully re-create an object from nothing, even if the object was destroyed. To do so, you must be able to picture the object in your mind. Additionally, the material component must be a remnant of the item, no matter how small or insignificant (even a speck of dust that remains from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} is enough). The spell fails if your imagination relied on too much guesswork; if the object would be too large to fit in a 5-foot cube; if the object still exists and you were simply not aware of it; or if the object is an artifact, has a level over 20, or has similar vast magical power.

The item reassembles in perfect condition. Even if your mental image was of a damaged or weathered object, the new one is in this perfected form. If the object was magical, this spell typically restores its constant magical properties, but not any temporary ones, such as charges or one-time uses. An item with charges or uses per day has all of its uses expended when remade, but it replenishes them normally thereafter.

Revival.name: 复苏术 Revival
Revival.description:
一阵治疗能量的爆发抚慰活着的生物，并暂时唤醒那些刚刚死去的生物。所有活着的目标恢复 10d8+40 生命值。

此外，你可以让任意数量的死亡目标暂时复活，其效果和限制与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IkGYwHRLhkuoGReG]{Raise Dead} 相同。被复活的生物获得等同于你给予活着生物的生命值数量的临时生命值，但没有正常生命值。被复活的生物不能以其他方式恢复生命值或获得临时生命值，并且一旦 复苏术 的持续时间结束，它们就会失去所有临时生命值并死亡。

复苏术 无法复生被 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} 或死亡效果杀死的生物。它对不死无效。

A burst of healing energy soothes living creatures and temporarily rouses those recently slain. All living targets regain 10d8+40 Hit Points.

In addition, you return any number of dead targets to life temporarily, with the same effects and limitations as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IkGYwHRLhkuoGReG]{Raise Dead}. The raised creatures have a number of temporary Hit Points equal to the Hit Points you gave living creatures, but no normal Hit Points. The raised creatures can't regain Hit Points or gain temporary Hit Points in other ways, and once revival's duration ends, they lose all temporary Hit Points and die.

Revival can't resurrect creatures killed by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} or a death effect. It has no effect on undead.

Wrathful Storm.name: 狂怒风暴 Wrathful Storm
Wrathful Storm.description:
区域上方的空中形成一团巨大的风暴云，散播降雨与狂风。风会使物理远程攻击承受 –4 环境减值。区域内的空气对于飞行生物而言属于高等困难地形。当你施放此法术时，以及在后续轮次中每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以从以下风暴效果中选择一种。你不能连续两次选择相同的效果。

  • 暴风雪 猛烈的降雪对风暴中或风暴下方的每个生物造成 @Damage[4d8[cold]] 伤害，且没有豁免。云层中或云层下方的一切都会因暴雪而处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且任何地面都成为困难地形。
  • 冰雹 风暴中或风暴下方的每个生物受到 @Damage[4d10[bludgeoning]] 伤害，进行基础强韧豁免。
  • 闪电 选择至多 10 个位于风暴中或风暴下方的生物，使其被闪电击中。它们每个都受到 @Damage[7d6[electricity]] 伤害，进行基础反射豁免。
  • 龙卷风 云层中或云层下方会出现一道半径 30 尺、近似圆柱形的旋风。旋风中的每个生物都会被向上抛起 40 尺。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.SjxqjPDILhQWUcWf]{法术效果：狂怒风暴}

升阶（10环） 射程增加至 2,000 尺，且云层变为 1,000 尺爆发。

A massive storm cloud forms in the air above the area, spreading rain and gales. The wind imposes a –4 circumstance penalty to physical ranged attacks. The air in the area is greater difficult terrain for flying creatures. When you Cast this Spell and the first time each round you Sustain it on subsequent rounds, you can choose one of the following storm effects. You can't choose the same effect twice in a row.

  • Blizzard The driving snow deals @Damage[4d8[cold]] damage to each creature in or below the storm with no save. Everything in or beneath the cloud is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by driving snow and any ground is difficult terrain.
  • Hail Each creature in or below the storm takes @Damage[4d10[bludgeoning]] damage with a basic Fortitude save.
  • Lightning Choose up to 10 creatures in or below the storm to be struck by lightning. Each of them takes @Damage[7d6[electricity]] damage with a basic Reflex save.
  • Tornado A roughly cylindrical whirlwind appears in or below the cloud in a 30-foot radius. Each creature in the whirlwind is thrown 40 feet upward.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.SjxqjPDILhQWUcWf]{Spell Effect: Wrathful Storm}

Heightened (10th) The range increases to 2,000 feet and the cloud is a 1,000-foot burst.

Arctic Rift (At Will).name: 极地裂隙（随意） Arctic Rift (At Will)
Arctic Rift (At Will).description:
空气中裂开一道锯齿状的缝隙，在抽离热量的同时造成12d8点寒冷伤害。裂隙沿线上的每个生物都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并且直到你的下个回合开始前陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被一层冰所@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，并且只要其处于定身状态，就会迟缓 1。这层冰是一个物体，具有60生命值、硬度5、寒冷伤害免疫，以及火焰弱点10。它具有物体免疫；如果目标成功挣脱，则其被摧毁。

升环（+1） 伤害提高1d8，且冰层的生命值提高5。

A jagged crack opens in the air, dealing 12d8 cold damage as it draws away warmth. Each creature along the rift must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the start of your next turn.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by a layer of ice, and is slowed 1 as long as it's immobilized. The ice is an object with 60 Hit Points, Hardness 5, immunity to cold damage, and vulnerability 10 to fire. It has object immunities and is destroyed if the target Escapes.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8 and the ice's Hit Points increase by 5.

Regenerate.name: 再生术 Regenerate
Regenerate.description:
注入的生命能量赋予一名生物持续的治疗。目标暂时获得再生 15，使其在自己每个回合开始时恢复 15 点生命值。只要它拥有再生，目标就不会因受到生命值伤害而死亡，且其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死} 状态不能增加到足以杀死它的数值（这会使大多数生物的濒死状态停止在濒死 3），不过若其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{重伤} 值变为 4 或更高，它将保持 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，直到其伤势得到治疗。若目标受到强酸或火焰伤害，其再生将失效，直到其下个回合结束后才会恢复。

每次该生物因再生而恢复生命值时，它也会重新长出一个受损或被毁的器官（如果有的话）。在该法术的持续时间内，该生物还可以通过花费一个交互动作，将被切断的身体部位贴到其原本被切下的区域，从而将其重新接合。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.dXq7z633ve4E0nlX]{法术效果：再生术}

强化（9环） 再生提高至 20。

An infusion of vital energy grants a creature continuous healing. The target temporarily gains regeneration 15, which restores 15 Hit Points to it at the start of each of its turns. While it has regeneration, the target can't die from taking Hit Point damage and its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition can't increase to a value that would kill it (this stops most creatures' dying condition at dying 3), though if its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, it stays @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until its wounds are treated. If the target takes acid or fire damage, its regeneration deactivates until after the end of its next turn.

Each time the creature regains Hit Points from regeneration, it also regrows one damaged or ruined organ (if any). During the spell's duration, the creature can also reattach severed body parts by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area it was severed from.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.dXq7z633ve4E0nlX]{Spell Effect: Regenerate}

Heightened (9th) The regeneration increases to 20.

Sunburst (At Will).name: 阳炎爆（随意） Sunburst (At Will)
Sunburst (At Will).description:
一个强大的灼热阳光球体在区域内爆炸，对区域内所有生物造成 8d10 火焰伤害，此外还对不死生物额外造成 @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] 活力伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并永久陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}。

如果该球体与一片魔法黑暗区域重叠，阳炎爆 会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

升阶（+1） 火焰伤害增加 1d10，对不死生物造成的活力伤害增加 1d10。

A powerful globe of searing sunlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 fire damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} permanently.

If the globe overlaps with an area of magical darkness, sunburst attempts to counteract the darkness effect.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 1d10, and the vitality damage against undead increases by 1d10.

Awaken Animal.name: 唤醒动物 Awaken Animal
Awaken Animal.description:
你赋予目标智能，将其转化为一只野兽。如果它先前是动物伙伴或仆从，它将不再能作为其一。

大成功 若目标的智力、感知和魅力调整值原本更低，则它们各自提高至 +2，且它会因你唤醒了它而对你抱有帮助态度。

成功 若目标的智力、感知和魅力调整值原本更低，则提高至 +0，且它会因你唤醒了它而对你抱有友好态度。

失败 你未能唤醒目标。

大失败 你意外唤醒了目标，而它对你怀有纯粹的野兽般憎恨。若目标的智力、感知和魅力调整值原本更低，则它们提高至 -2。它会对你抱持敌对态度，并试图摧毁你。

生物创造仪式

生物等级所需法术环级花费
-1 or 0215 gp
1260 gp

33180 gp

65750 gp

1073,000 gp

161030,000 gp
171045,000 gp

You grant intelligence to the target, transforming it into a beast. If it was previously an animal companion or minion, it can no longer serve as one.

Critical Success The target's Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma modifiers each increase to +2 if they were lower, and it becomes helpful to you for awakening it.

Success The target's Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma modifiers increase to +0 if they were lower and it becomes friendly to you for awakening it.

Failure You fail to awaken the target.

Critical Failure You accidentally awaken the target with a pure bestial hatred toward you. The target's Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma modifiers increase to -2 if they were lower. It becomes hostile to you, attempting to destroy you.

Creatures Creation Rituals

171045,000 gp

Cursed Metamorphosis (At Will).name: 诅咒变形术（随意） Cursed Metamorphosis (At Will)
Cursed Metamorphosis (At Will).description:
你将目标生物变形成适合该区域的一只无害动物，效果取决于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标的身体长出这只无害动物的一些轻微特征。它的内脏在部分变形时翻搅，使其陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。当它从恶心状态中恢复时，这些特征会恢复正常。

失败 目标变形 1 分钟，但仍保有自己的心智。如果它在自己的回合中将所有动作都用于专注于原本的形态，则可以尝试一次@Check[will]意志豁免以立即结束该效果。

大失败 目标的身心都会变成所选的无害动物，持续时间为无限。

You transform the target creature into a harmless animal appropriate to the area, with effects based on its Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's body gains minor features of the harmless animal. Its insides churn as they partially transform, causing it to be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. When it recovers from the sickened condition, its features revert to normal.

Failure The target transforms for 1 minute but keeps its mind. If it spends all its actions on its turn concentrating on its original form, it can attempt a @Check[will] save to end the effect immediately.

Critical Failure The target is transformed into the chosen harmless animal, body and mind, for an unlimited duration.

Primal Call.name: 原初呼唤 Primal Call
Primal Call.description:
这如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vgy00hnqxN9VoeoF]{异界仆役} 运作，不过你制作一个妖精环，并从 100 英里内召来一只动物、野兽、精类、真菌或植物。

This functions as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vgy00hnqxN9VoeoF]{Planar Servitor} except you craft a faerie circle and call an animal, beast, fey, fungus, or plant from within 100 miles.

Tangling Creepers (At Will).name: 纠缠藤蔓（随意） Tangling Creepers (At Will)
Tangling Creepers (At Will).description:
浓密、抽动的藤蔓从每一处表面萌发，并填满区域内的所有水体。任何在地面上移动的生物，或在藤蔓中攀爬或游泳的生物，在该区域内时其各项速度都要承受 -10 尺的环境减值。每轮一次，你可以维持该法术，使一根藤蔓从这片纠缠藤蔓范围内的任意方格中猛然抽出。该藤蔓具有 15 尺触及。对目标进行一次近战法术攻击检定；若成功，藤蔓会将目标拉入纠缠藤蔓中，并使其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 1 轮，或直到该生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（对抗你的法术DC），以先发生者为准。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.5RiskDnSXaRI6F4n]{法术效果：纠缠藤蔓}

Dense, twitching creepers sprout from every surface and fill any bodies of water in the area. Any creature moving on the land, or Climbing or Swimming within the creepers, takes a -10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds while in the area. Once per round, you can Sustain the spell to make a vine lash out from any square within the expanse of creepers. This vine has a 15-foot reach. Make a melee spell attack roll against the target; on a success, the vine pulls the target into the creepers and makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round or until the creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (against your spell DC), whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.5RiskDnSXaRI6F4n]{Spell Effect: Tangling Creepers}

Nature's Pathway (At Will).name: 自然路径（随意） Nature's Pathway (At Will)
Nature's Pathway (At Will).description:
你步入一棵活树，其树干大到足以容纳你进入其中，并立刻传送术至 5 英里内任何一棵树干也足够大的树中。一旦你进入第一棵树，你会立刻知晓射程内其他足够大的树木的大致位置；如果你愿意，也可以从原本那棵树中退出。你不能携带异次元空间与自己同行；如果你试图这么做，该法术失败。

增强（6环） 你离开的那棵树最远可以在 50 英里外。

增强（8环） 你离开的那棵树最远可以在 500 英里外。

增强（9环） 你离开的那棵树可以位于同一颗行星上的任何地方。

You step into a living tree with a trunk big enough for you to fit inside it and instantly teleport to any tree within 5 miles that also has a sufficiently large trunk. Once you enter the first tree, you instantly know the rough locations of other sufficiently large trees within range and can exit from the original tree, if you prefer. You can't carry extradimensional spaces with you; if you attempt to do so, the spell fails.

Heightened (6th) The tree you exit can be up to 50 miles away.

Heightened (8th) The tree you exit can be up to 500 miles away.

Heightened (9th) The tree you exit can be anywhere on the same planet.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（持续） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标无论使用何种语言，都能理解所有词语，也能说出其他生物的语言。身处由不同生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并以该生物能理解的语言交谈，即使目标不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Blight.name: 枯萎术 Blight
Blight.description:
区域 以你为中心、半径1/2英里的圆形区域

你扭曲并抑制区域内的植物，使其逐渐枯萎。除了植物生命衰败所带来的其他危险外，这还会降低农场的作物产量。如果你在受植物生长影响的区域施放此仪式，枯萎术会尝试反制植物生长，而不是产生其通常的效果。

大成功 彻底破坏该区域的作物产量，或者在半径至多1英里的区域内使产量减半。

成功 使该区域的作物产量减半。

失败 该仪式没有效果。

大失败 该区域内的植物群会以意想不到的方式发生变化，由GM决定，但通常会尽可能与你的真实意愿相反（例如，在你更希望它们枯萎时，反而使作物更加繁茂）。

Area 1/2-mile-radius circle centered on you

You twist and stunt plants in the area, causing them to wither. In addition to other dangers from failing plant life, this decreases the crop yield for farms. If you cast this ritual in an area affected by plant growth, blight attempts to counteract plant growth instead of producing its usual effect.

Critical Success Completely spoil the crop yield in the area, or decrease the yield by half in an area with up to a 1-mile radius.

Success Decease the crop yield in the area by half.

Failure The ritual has no effect.

Critical Failure The flora in the area changes in an unexpected way, determined by the GM but generally as contradictory to your true desires as possible (for instance, enriching crops when you would prefer to blight them).

Plant Growth.name: 植物生长 Plant Growth
Plant Growth.description:
区域 以你为中心、半径1/2英里的圆形

你使区域内的植物更加健康且更为丰产。除了健康植物带来的其他益处之外，这还会根据你的成功程度提高农场的作物产量。如果你在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7yWXx3qC4eFNHhxD]{枯萎术} 的区域内施放此法术，植物生长会尝试反制该枯萎术，而不是产生其通常的效果。

大成功 区域内的作物产量翻倍，或者将区域扩大为半径1英里。

成功 将区域内的作物产量提高三分之一。

失败 该仪式没有效果。

大失败 区域内的植物群会以一种出乎意料的方式发生变化，由GM决定，但通常会尽可能与你真正的愿望相悖（例如，在你本想让作物更茂盛时却使其枯萎）。

Area 1/2-mile-radius circle centered on you

You cause the plants within the area to be healthier and more fruitful. In addition to other benefits of healthy plants, this increases the crop yield for farms, depending on your success. If you cast it in the area of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7yWXx3qC4eFNHhxD]{Blight}, plant growth attempts to counteract the blight instead of producing its usual effect.

Critical Success Double the crop yield in the area, or increase the area to a 1-mile radius.

Success Increase the crop yield in the area by one-third.

Failure The ritual has no effect.

Critical Failure The flora in the area changes in an unanticipated way, determined by the GM but generally as contradictory to your true desires as possible (for instance, blighting crops when you would prefer to enrich them).

Speak with Plants (Constant).name: 与植物交谈（恒定） Speak with Plants (Constant)
Speak with Plants (Constant).description:
你可以向植物和真菌提问并获得它们的回答，但该法术不会让它们变得比平时更友善或更聪明。大多数普通植物和真菌对周围世界都有一种独特的看法，因此它们无法识别有关生物的细节，也不知道其近旁范围之外的世界。狡诈的植物或真菌怪物很可能言简意赅且闪烁其词，而智力较低的则常常会说些无意义的话。

升阶（4环） 持续时间为8小时。

You can ask questions of and receive answers from plants and fungi, but the spell doesn't make them more friendly or intelligent than normal. Most normal plants and fungi have a distinctive view of the world around them, so they don't recognize details about creatures or know anything about the world beyond their immediate vicinity. Cunning plant or fungus monsters are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Heightened (4th) The duration is 8 hours.

Consecrate.name: 祝圣 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
区域 以一座不可移动的祭坛、神龛或你所信奉神祇的固定圣物为中心，40尺半径爆发

次级施法者 2名，且必须是你所信仰宗教的信徒

你将一处地点祝圣给你的神祇，吟唱赞歌并创造出一片神圣空间。处于该区域内时，你的神祇的信徒在攻击检定、技能检定、豁免和察觉检定上获得+1状态加值，而对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的生物（例如对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛}来说是不死，或对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{撒恩蕾}来说是邪恶）则在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。如果你的神祇的神术神圣化允许你在神圣或邪恶之间进行选择，你也可以选择让该祝圣地点成为神圣或邪恶。如果该神祇的神圣化必须 是神圣或邪恶，你必须让该地点与该神圣化一致。你的神祇的信徒在该区域内进行的打击若有的话，会获得该地点的神圣化特征。

大成功 祝圣成功，且其持续时间变为10年而非1年，或者覆盖半径加倍的区域。偶尔，在你的神祇眷顾下，这还可能产生更加惊人的效果，例如使该区域被永久祝圣，或让该效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣成功。

失败 祝圣失败。

大失败 祝圣惨烈失败并激怒你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少在1年内，任何进一步祝圣该地点的尝试都会失败。

增强（7环） 该祝圣区域还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制你的神祇的信徒进行的传送。花费提高为200 gp × 法术环阶。

Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those rolls. If your deity's divine sanctification allows you to choose holy or unholy, you can choose to make the consecrated site holy or unholy as well. If the deity's sanctification must be holy or unholy, you must make the site match that sanctification. Strikes made by worshippers of your deity within the area gain the site's sanctification trait, if any.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell rank.

Environmental Endurance (Constant).name: 环境耐受（恒定） Environmental Endurance (Constant)
Environmental Endurance (Constant).description:
你保护目标免受危险温度的侵害。选择严寒或酷热。目标受到你所选择温度的防护（但不包括极寒或极热）。

升阶（3环） 目标受到严寒和酷热的防护。

升阶（5环） 目标受到严寒、酷热、极寒和极热的防护。

You shield the target against dangerous temperatures. Choose severe cold or heat. The target is protected from the temperature you chose (but not extreme cold or heat).

Heightened (3rd) The target is protected from severe cold and severe heat.

Heightened (5th) The target is protected from severe cold, severe heat, extreme cold, and extreme heat.

Speak with Animals (Constant).name: 与动物交谈（恒定） Speak with Animals (Constant)
Speak with Animals (Constant).description:
你可以向动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。该法术不会让它们比平常更友善。狡猾的动物很可能言辞简短且闪烁其词，而不那么聪明的动物则常常会说些无意义的话。

You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. The spell doesn't make them more friendly than normal. Cunning animals are likely to be terse and evasive, while less intelligent ones often make inane comments.

Alter Weather.name: 改变天气 Alter Weather
Alter Weather.description:
频率 每天三次

效果 维拉纳莉亚会显著改变周围区域的天气模式，产生任一项成功施展 9环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{操控天气} 仪式的结果。

Frequency three times per day

Effect The veranallia dramatically alters weather patterns in the surrounding area, producing any of the results of a successful 9th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{Control Weather} ritual.

Rebirth.name: 重生 Rebirth
Rebirth.description:
频率 每天一次

效果 维拉纳莉亚花费 1 分钟将一个死亡不超过一年的生物包裹进茧中。24 小时后，该生物恢复生命，而茧会在一阵尘埃中爆裂。如果维拉纳莉亚愿意，重生可以改变该生物的族裔或传承，通常会变成一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.EcNSrvwIj22Jxkjz]{骷髅}。

Frequency once per day

Effect The veranallia spends a minute to encase a creature that has been dead for no more than a year in a cocoon. After 24 hours, the creature is restored to life, and the cocoon explodes in a shower of dust. If the veranallia chooses, Rebirth can change the creature's ancestry or heritage, typically into a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.45SK8rdbbxvEHfMn.JournalEntryPage.EcNSrvwIj22Jxkjz]{skeleton}.

Radiant Veranallia.blurb:
维拉娜莉亚木乃伊
Veranallia mummy

Seldeg Bhedlis.name: 塞尔德格·贝德利斯 Seldeg Bhedlis
Seldeg Bhedlis.tokenName: 塞尔德格·贝德利斯 Seldeg Bhedlis

Javelin.name: 标枪 Javelin
Javelin.description:
这支细长的长矛为投掷而精心平衡，但并非设计用于近战。

This thin spear is well balanced for throwing but is not designed for melee use.

Longsword.name: 长剑 Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为佩剑，可以是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑刃厚重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Sturdy Shield (Supreme).name: 坚固盾牌（至尊） Sturdy Shield (Supreme)
Sturdy Shield (Supreme).description:
凭借更优越的设计与精湛的工艺，这面钢盾比其非魔法同类拥有更高的硬度，因此更难被破坏和摧毁。

这面盾牌具有20点硬度、160点HP和80点BT。

With a superior design and excellent craftsmanship, this steel shield has higher Hardness than its non-magical counterparts, making it harder to break and destroy.

The shield has Hardness 20, HP 160, and BT 80.

Full Plate.name: 全身板甲 Full Plate
Full Plate.description:
板甲由相互咬合的甲片构成，几乎将全身包裹在一层钢铁外壳之中。它价格高昂且十分沉重，穿戴者往往需要他人协助才能正确穿上，但它所提供的防护是护甲所能给予的最佳防御之一。一套这种护甲包含一件内衬的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{绗缝甲} 和一对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Plate mail consists of interlocking plates that encase nearly the entire body in a carapace of steel. It is costly and heavy, and the wearer often requires help to don it correctly, but it provides some of the best defense armor can supply. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Iron Command.name: 严酷铁律 Iron Command
Iron Command.description:
触发 15尺内的一名敌人对塞尔德格造成伤害

效果 塞尔德格会让那个胆敢伤害他的无礼之徒认清自己的位置。他命令该敌人顺从地跪下。若其拒绝，就必须以痛苦与苦楚付出代价。触发生物必须从以下选项中选择一项：敌人跪下，以自由动作（）陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}；或者敌人拒绝并受到 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害。此外，直到他下个回合结束前，塞尔德格对触发生物的打击额外造成3点伤害。每次他使用此反应动作（）时，塞尔德格都可选择这额外伤害是精魂还是虚空。

Trigger An enemy within 15 feet damages Seldeg

Effect Seldeg puts an impertinent foe who dared harm him in their proper place. He commands the enemy to kneel in obedience. If they refuse, they must pay the price in pain and anguish. The triggering creature must choose one of the following options: the enemy kneels, dropping @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} as a free action, or the enemy refuses and takes @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage. In addition, Seldeg's Strikes against the triggering creature deal an additional 3 damage until the end of his next turn. Seldeg chooses whether the additional damage is spirit or void each time he uses this reaction.

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持用一面盾牌。

你调整盾牌的位置来保护自己。当你已举起盾牌时，你获得其所列出的 AC 环境加值。你的盾牌会保持举起，直到你的下个回合开始。

Requirements You are wielding a shield.

You position your shield to protect yourself. When you have Raised a Shield, you gain its listed circumstance bonus to AC. Your shield remains raised until the start of your next turn.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当一名墓骑士被摧毁时，其护甲会在 [[/gmr 1d10]] 天内重塑其身躯——如果这件护甲由一名活体宿主穿戴，则会更快。若身躯在此之前被摧毁，过程将重新开始。

只有彻底毁灭其护甲（例如使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术}）、将其运送至创生熔炉，或将其投入火山之心，才能永久摧毁一名墓骑士。

When a graveknight is destroyed, their armor rebuilds their body over the course of [[/gmr 1d10]] days—or more quickly if the armor is worn by a living host. If the body is destroyed before then, the process restarts.

A graveknight can only be permanently destroyed by obliterating their armor (such as with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}), transporting it to the Forge of Creation, or throwing it into the heart of a volcano.

Sacrilegious Aura.name: 亵渎灵光 Sacrilegious Aura
Sacrilegious Aura.description:
30尺。

当灵光内的一个生物使用活力法术或能力时，墓骑士会自动尝试反制它，其反制调整值为 [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}。

30 feet.

When a creature in the aura uses a vitality spell or ability, the graveknight automatically attempts to counteract it, with a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+31 #Counteract]]{+31}.

Devastating Blast.name: 毁灭爆震 Devastating Blast
Devastating Blast.description:
塞尔德格·贝尔迪斯释放出一道能量@Template[cone|distance:30]。区域内的生物受到 @Damage[11d12[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:39|basic|options:area-effect]。

塞尔德格每 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Devastating Blast]] 轮只能使用此能力一次。

Seldeg Bheldis unleashes a @Template[cone|distance:30] of energy. Creatures in the area take @Damage[11d12[fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:39|basic|options:area-effect].

Seldeg can use this ability once every [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Devastating Blast]] rounds.

Graveknight's Curse.name: 死墓骑士诅咒 Graveknight's Curse
Graveknight's Curse.description:
此诅咒会影响任何穿上墓骑士的护甲至少1小时的人。

豁免 @Check[will|dc:39] 豁免

潜伏期 1小时

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}，且无法脱下护甲（1天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2}、速度获得–10尺状态减值，且无法脱下护甲（1天）

阶段 3 死亡并转变为塞尔德格。

This curse affects anyone who wears a graveknight's armor for at least 1 hour

Saving Throw @Check[will|dc:39] save

Onset 1 hour

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} and can't remove armor (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 2}, –10-foot status penalty to Speeds, and can't remove armor (1 day)

Stage 3 dies and transforms into the Seldeg.

Phantom Mount.name: 魅影坐骑 Phantom Mount
Phantom Mount.description:
HP 155; AC 42, Fort +32, Ref +28, Will +29

塞尔德格召唤一匹超自然坐骑，如同 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPKJOhEihhcIm2uQ]{奇迹坐骑}（10环）。与奇迹坐骑不同，这匹战马的 AC 和各项豁免加值都比墓骑士低 4，且这匹战马拥有塞尔德格三分之一的生命值（向下取整）。

如果这匹战马被摧毁，塞尔德格必须等待 1 小时后才能再次使用此能力。

HP 155; AC 42, Fort +32, Ref +28, Will +29

Seldeg summons a supernatural mount, as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPKJOhEihhcIm2uQ]{Marvelous Mount} (rank 10). Unlike marvelous mount, the steed's AC and saving throw bonuses are all 4 lower than the graveknight's, and the steed has one-third the Seldeg's Hit Points (rounded down).

If the steed is destroyed, Seldeg must wait 1 hour before using this ability again.

Ruinous Weapons.name: 破灭武器 Ruinous Weapons
Ruinous Weapons.description:
塞尔德格使用的任何武器或徒手攻击都获得+1高等强击和高等火焰符文的效果。

Any weapon or unarmed attack Seldeg uses gains the effects of the +1 greater striking and greater flaming runes.

Swap Fates.name: 调换命运 Swap Fates
Swap Fates.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 塞尔德格调换 500 尺内两个生物的命运。两个生物传送术进入彼此的空间。然后每个生物进行一次 @Check[will|dc:39] 意志豁免。

大成功 目标在 24 小时内暂时免疫调换命运。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[3d6[mental]] 伤害。

失败 目标受到 @Damage[6d6[mental]] 伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

大失败 目标受到 @Damage[12d6[mental]] 伤害，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}。

Frequency once per round

Effect Seldeg switches the fates of two creatures within 500 feet. The two creatures teleport into each other's spaces. Each creature then attempts a @Check[will|dc:39] save.

Critical Success The target becomes temporarily immune to Swap Fates for 24 hours.

Success The target takes @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage.

Failure The target takes @Damage[6d6[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes @Damage[12d6[mental]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}.

Unyielding Block.name: 不屈格挡 Unyielding Block
Unyielding Block.description:
在塞尔德格的每个回合开始时，他获得两个额外的反应动作（）, 且只能用于进行盾牌格挡。

At the start of each of Seldeg's turns, he gains two additional reactions he can use only to perform a Shield Block.

Weapon Master.name: 武器大师 Weapon Master
Weapon Master.description:
塞尔德格可获得他所持用的任何武器的重击专精效果。

Seldeg has access to the critical specialization effects of any weapon he wields.

Arazni Lore.name: 阿拉兹尼学识 Arazni Lore

Seldeg Bhedlis.blurb:
向阿拉兹尼宣誓效忠的愤恨者墓骑士
Embittered Graveknight Sworn to Arazni
Seldeg Bhedlis.prototypeToken: 塞尔德格·贝德利斯 Seldeg Bhedlis

Splinter Officer.name: 碎灵军官 Splinter Officer

Chain Shirt.name: 链甲衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这种护甲有时也被称为锁子甲衫，是一件由与链甲相同的金属环制成的长衫。不过，它比链甲轻得多，而且只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chain mail. However, it is much lighter than chain mail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Splintersense.name: 魂片感知 Splintersense
Splintersense.description:
碎灵军官知晓所有共享同一名碎灵军官灵魂碎片的不死生物的方向与距离。这些不死生物始终被视为碎灵军官的盟友。

The splinter officer knows the direction and distance of all undead that share splinters of the same splinter officer's soul. These undead are always considered to be allies of the splinter officer.

Behind the Lines.name: 列阵之后 Behind the Lines
Behind the Lines.description:
触发 碎灵军官成为一次攻击的目标

需求 至少有一名军官的不死盟友与军官相邻

效果 该盟友挺身挡在前方，使军官在对抗此次触发攻击的 AC 上获得 +2 环境加值。

Trigger The splinter officer is targeted by an attack

Requirements At least one of the officer's undead allies is adjacent to the officer

Effect The ally interposes itself, granting the officer a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Raise Defenses.name: 提升防御 Raise Defenses
Raise Defenses.description:
碎灵军官以心灵命令其不死盟友强化它们的防御。在1轮内，每个与该军官共享其碎裂灵魂的不死生物获得AC+1环境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.szOyQaUgKZ09q4Ux]{效果：提升防御}

The splinter officer mentally commands its undead allies to strengthen their defenses. For 1 round, each undead that shares the officer's splintered soul gains a +1 circumstance bonus to AC.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.szOyQaUgKZ09q4Ux]{Effect: Raise Defenses}

Rally the Rabble.name: 集结乌合之众 Rally the Rabble
Rally the Rabble.description:
碎灵军官以心灵力量激励其麾下的不死生物。每个与该军官共享其碎裂灵魂的不死生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，持续 1 轮。获得加速的盟友只能将该额外动作用于大步移动或打击。该军官在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rally the Rabble]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用集结乌合之众。

The splinter officer mentally energizes the undead under its command. Each undead that shares the officer's splintered soul is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 round. Quickened allies can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike. The officer can't Rally the Rabble again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rally the Rabble]]{1d4 rounds}.

Synchronized Step.name: 步调一致 Synchronized Step
Synchronized Step.description:
碎灵军官以心灵命令与其共享分裂灵魂的不死生物重新调整位置。该军官进行一步移动，且每个与该军官共享分裂灵魂的不死生物都可以使用反应动作进行一步移动。

The splinter officer mentally commands the undead that share its splintered soul to reposition. The officer Steps, and each undead that shares the officer's splintered soul can use a reaction to Step.

Splinter Officer.publicNotes:
一支由无心智不死生物组成的军队有一个致命缺陷：它几乎需要其制造者时刻照看。然而，任何拥有足够智能、能够指挥这样一支军队的不死生物，都有背叛其创造者的风险。技艺高超的死灵法师致力于在这两个极端之间保持平衡，并由此创造出了碎灵军官。碎灵军官能够率领小规模的不死生物营队，同时又与其创造者有着独特的绑定——而且一旦他们决定失控，也很容易被处理掉。

第一名碎灵军官诞生于一名巫妖将自己的灵魂囚笼分裂为多个部分，并将每一块碎片植入一名独特的不死勇士体内之时；该巫妖对他们享有完全的控制权。最终，这名巫妖认为灵魂囚笼所承担的风险不值得换取那些好处，但分裂灵魂的技术实在太过有用，无法舍弃。如今，碎灵军官是通过在一个有智慧的生物死亡瞬间，将其灵魂从法拉斯玛的掌控中夺走而制造出来的。随后，这个新鲜的灵魂会被击碎，其中最大的一部分归于碎灵军官，而其余的灵魂碎片则被植入该军官所控制的无心智不死士兵体内。

An army of mindless undead possesses a fatal flaw: it requires near-constant babysitting from its maker. Yet, any undead with enough sentience to command such an army runs the risk of turning on its creator. Skilled necromancers have endeavored to strike a balance between these two extremes with the creation of splinter officers. Capable of leading small battalions of undead, splinter officers are at the same time uniquely bound to their creator—and easily disposed of should they ever decide to go rogue.

The first splinter officer was created when a lich separated his soul cage into multiple parts and implanted each shard into a unique undead champion, over which the lich enjoyed complete control. Ultimately, the lich decided the risk to his soul cage wasn't worth the benefits, but the technique of soul-splitting proved too useful to abandon. Today, splinter officers are created by plucking an intelligent creature's soul from Pharasma's clutches at the moment of the creature's death. The fresh soul is then shattered, with the splinter officer receiving the largest portion and the remaining splinters being implanted into the mindless undead soldiers the officer controls.

Twist of Fate.name: 扭转命运 Twist of Fate
Twist of Fate.tokenName: 扭转命运 Twist of Fate

Reorder Reality.name: 重组现实 Reorder Reality
Reorder Reality.description:
触发 一个除塞尔德格之外的生物进入由仪式法阵所包含的区域

效果 神术能量的弧光在两个法阵之间穿行。位于法阵内的每个生物受到 @Damage[(4d10+26)[spirit]] 伤害（进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] 豁免）。如果其中一个仪式法阵已被禁用，则该危害改为影响房间内的所有生物，但每个生物的豁免获得 +2 环境加值。该危害进行先攻掷骰。

Trigger A creature other than Seldeg enters the area contained by the ritual circles

Effect Arcs of divine energy travel between the two circles. Each creature within the circles takes @Damage[(4d10+26)[spirit]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:45|basic] save). If one of the ritual circles has been disabled, the hazard instead affects all creature in the room, but each creature gains a +2 circumstance bonus to their save. The hazard rolls initiative.

Twist of Fate.disable:
@Check[阿拉兹尼学识|dc:44] 或 @Check[艾奥梅黛学识|dc:44] 来追述一则历史故事，使该神祇锚定于当前现实；@Check[制作|dc:50]（传奇）来制造一个装置，从仪式法阵中虹吸能量；或 @Check[宗教|dc:46]（传奇）来释放不断升级的神术能量；需要六次成功（每个法阵三次成功）才能缴械该危害。

@Check[Arazni Lore|dc:44] or @Check[Iomedae Lore|dc:44] to recount a tale from history that grounds that deity in the current reality, @Check[crafting|dc:50] (legendary) to create a device to siphon energy from the ritual circle, or @Check[religion|dc:46] (legendary) to discharge the escalating divine energy; six successes (three successes per circle) are required to disarm the hazard.
Twist of Fate.hazarddescription:
塞尔德格的仪式即将结束，导致魔法能量在仪式法阵之间不规则地迸射。

Seldeg's ritual nears its conclusion, causing magical energy to arc erratically between the ritual circles.
Twist of Fate.reset:
当位于漂浮平台上时，塞尔德格·贝德利斯可以使用一个带有听觉特征的3动作行动，为仪式重新注入能量。这样做会移除一个用于停用该危害的成功，并立即触发该危害的“重组现实”反应动作。

While atop the floating platform, Seldeg Bhedlis can use a 3-action activity with the auditory trait to reenergize the ritual. Doing so removes one success to disable the hazard and immediately triggers the hazard's Reorder Reality reaction.
Twist of Fate.routine:
（1 个动作；神术）仪式汇聚的神术能量骤然高涨。十一扇彩绘玻璃窗中的一扇（每一扇都描绘了她的十一功业之一）转而显现阿拉兹尼的形象。任何能看见窗户变化的生物都必须尝试进行一次 @Check[will|dc:50] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并在 10 分钟内免疫此效果。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(3d12+20)[mental]] 伤害。

大失败 该生物受到 @Damage[(6d12+40)[mental]] 伤害。如果该生物下一次 d20 掷骰本应获得大成功，则改为获得大失败。这是一个厄运效果。如果 11 扇窗户全部转化，塞尔德格的仪式会提前完成。彩绘玻璃窗会粉碎，对房间内每个生物造成 @Damage[(8d10+52)[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:50] 豁免）。随后，该危害变为未激活状态。

(1 action; divine) The divine energy gathered by the ritual spikes. One of the eleven stained-glass windows (each depicting one of her Eleven Acts) transforms to feature Arazni instead. Any creature that can see the window change must attempt a @Check[will|dc:50] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and is immune to this effect for 10 minutes.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[(3d12+20)[mental]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[(6d12+40)[mental]] damage. If the creatures' next d20 roll is a critical success, they earn a critical failure instead. This is a misfortune effect. If all 11 windows transform, Seldeg's ritual finishes ahead of schedule. The stained-glass windows shatter, dealing @Damage[(8d10+52)[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:50] save) to each creature in the room. The hazard then becomes inactive.
Twist of Fate.stealthdetails:
（大师）注意到神术能量的积聚，并预判其释放。

(master) to notice the buildup of divine energy and anticipate its discharge.
Twist of Fate.prototypeToken: 扭转命运 Twist of Fate

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
尽管被称为胸甲，这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用以保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时还保护臀部和小腿。它在策略性地提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Trudge.name: 蹒跚 Trudge
Trudge.description:
亵渎丧尸无视痛苦，毫无心智地向前移动。它进行两次大步移动，在其移动期间无视任何困难地形。在其移动结束时，丧尸每进入一个它在蹒跚前行期间进入过的困难地形方格，便受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

The zombie desecrator moves mindlessly forward without fear of pain. It Strides twice, ignoring any difficult terrain during its movement. At the end of its movement, the zombie takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage for each square of difficult terrain it entered while Trudging.

Goblin Skeleton.name: 地精骷髅 Goblin Skeleton

Steel Shield.name: 钢盾 Steel Shield
Steel Shield.description:
与木盾一样，钢盾也有各种形状和尺寸。虽然比木盾更昂贵，但它们也耐用得多。

硬度HPBT
52010

Like wooden shields, steel shields come in a variety of shapes and sizes. Though more expensive than wooden shields, they are much more durable.

HardnessHPBT
52010

Chain Mail.name: 锁子甲 Chain Mail
Chain Mail.description:
一套锁子甲由数件护甲部件组成，这些部件由小金属环相互连接成防护网。它通常包括一件链甲衫、护腿、一对臂甲和一顶锁子头巾，共同保护身体的大部分部位。

A suit of chain mail consists of several pieces of armor composed of small metal rings linked together in a protective mesh. It typically includes a chain shirt, leggings, a pair of arms, and a coif, collectively protecting most of the body.

Goblin Skeleton.publicNotes:
这些骷髅保留了它们生前拥有的狡黠。

活化骷髅是不死中最常见的类型之一。

These skeletons retain the cunning they possessed in life.

Animated skeletons are among the most common types of undead.

Lacedon.name: 食尸水鬼 Lacedon

Corpse Scent (Imprecise) 1 mile.name: 尸体气味（不精确）1英里 Corpse Scent (Imprecise) 1 mile
Corpse Scent (Imprecise) 1 mile.description:
食尸水鬼最远能在1英里外嗅到水中的类人生物尸体。

The lacedon can smell humanoid corpses in the water from up to 1 mile away.

Consume Flesh.name: 啃食尸体 Consume Flesh
Consume Flesh.description:
需求 食尸水鬼邻接一具在过去1小时内死亡的生物的尸体。

效果 食尸水鬼吞食尸体的一大块，并恢复 @Damage[2d6[healing]] 生命值。它从任何给定尸体处恢复生命值都只能有一次。

Requirements The lacedon is adjacent to the corpse of a creature that died within the last hour.

Effect The lacedon devours a chunk of the corpse and regains @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points. It can regain Hit Points from any given corpse only once.

Ghoul Fever.name: 食尸鬼热 Ghoul Fever
Ghoul Fever.description:
豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

阶段 1 成为携带者，但无不良效果（1天）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且从所有治疗中恢复的生命值减半（1天）

阶段 3 同阶段2（1天）

阶段 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] 伤害，且无法从治疗中获得任何益处（1天）

阶段 5 同阶段4（1天）

阶段 6 死亡，并于次日午夜以一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{食尸鬼}的身份复起。

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:16]

Stage 1 carrier with no ill effect (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and regains half as many Hit Points from all healing (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @Damage[2d6[void]] damage and gains no benefit from healing (1 day)

Stage 5 as stage 4 (1 day)

Stage 6 dead, and rises as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.LHHgGSs0ELCR4CYK]{Ghoul} the next midnight.

Paralyzing Spew.name: 麻痹喷吐 Paralyzing Spew
Paralyzing Spew.description:
食尸水鬼朝20尺内的一个生物喷吐腐肉呕吐物，造成 @Damage[1d6[poison]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic]。一个非精灵生物若豁免失败，还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。它可以在其每个回合结束时再次尝试一次新的豁免以结束麻痹，并且每次进行此类豁免时，DC都会累计减少1。食尸水鬼在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Paralyzing Spew]]{1d4轮} 内无法再次使用“麻痹喷吐”。

The lacedon discharges a spray of carrion vomit at a creature within 20 feet, dealing @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic]. A non-elf creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. It can attempt a new save to end the paralysis at the end of each of its turns, and the DC cumulatively decreases by 1 on each such save. The lacedon can't use Paralyzing Spew again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Paralyzing Spew]]{1d4 rounds}.

Lacedon.publicNotes:
被各地水手与沿海居民所畏惧，被称为食尸水鬼的水栖食尸鬼据说源自一支古老船员的后裔；那些水手在海上迷失，被迫诉诸食人以求生存。它们的外貌堪称潜水者的噩梦，在其陆生同类凶残特征的基础上，又长出了棘刺、鳍，以及布满针尖般锋利牙齿的大嘴，宛如深海最幽暗处的掠食性鱼类。

食尸鬼既狡诈又奸猾，凡是安葬尸体之处都可能发现它们的踪迹；它们永远都在寻求满足自己对类人生物血肉的无尽渴求。

Feared by mariners and coastal dwellers everywhere, the aquatic ghouls known as lacedons are said to be the spawn of an ancient crew of sailors who became lost at sea and were forced to resort to cannibalism to survive. Their appearance is the stuff of a diver's nightmare, supplementing the vicious traits of their land-bound kin with spines, fins, and wide mouths bristling with needle-sharp teeth like piscine predators of the nethermost ocean depths.

Devious and cunning, ghouls can be found anywhere corpses are laid to rest, forever seeking to satisfy their boundless craving for humanoid flesh.

Orc Veteran.name: 兽人老兵 Orc Veteran

Breastplate.name: 胸甲 Breastplate
Breastplate.description:
虽然被称为胸甲，但这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用于保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时还包括髋部和小腿。它在策略性地提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更高的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Orc Veteran.publicNotes:
兽人老兵在数场血腥而混乱的冲突中幸存下来，走出战火时身负伤疤与经验，这使他们成为更加危险的对手。

许多兽人都是在暴力与冲突的烈火中锻造出来的，往往从他们出生的那一刻便是如此。由于他们的人生常常以残酷的方式过早终结，兽人乐于以强敌来检验自己的力量——无论是向自己社群中地位更高的成员发起挑战以争夺支配权，驯服强大的野兽，还是猎杀可怖的怪物。

兽人高大强壮，双臂修长，双腿肌肉虬结，许多个体身高超过7英尺。他们沉重的四肢、宽阔而近乎罗圈的站姿，再加上身体前倾驼背的习惯，构成了一种近乎矛盾的情形：兽人既能高高耸立于其他类人生物之上，同时又能与对方平视。这些特征，再加上他们容易留下伤疤的体质，会让他们显得相当令人生畏。

半兽人卓玛尔最常见于兽人与人类结合所生，他们往往比纯血兽人同族经受更加严酷的考验；但那些熬过这些考验的人，能够晋升到掌权的位置。“兽人能拥有自己守得住的一切”这句谚语，不仅适用于个体凭借自身能力把握自己的命运与地位，也很可能是兽人将自己的社群称为“堡地”的根源。

Orc veterans have survived several bloody and chaotic conflicts, coming out the other side with scars and experience that make them even more dangerous opponents.

Many orcs are forged in the fires of violence and conflict, often from the moment they're born. As they live lives that are frequently cut brutally short, orcs revel in testing their strength against worthy foes, whether by challenging a higher-ranking member of their community for dominance, taming a powerful beast, or slaying a fearsome monster.

Tall and powerful, with long arms and thickly muscled legs, many orcs top 7 feet in height. Their heavy limbs and broad, almost bow-legged stances combine with a tendency to slouch forward to create an almost contradictory set of circumstances where an orc can tower over other humanoids while simultaneously staring them in the eye. These features, alongside a tendency to scar easily, can make them seem quite intimidating.

The half-orc dromaars, most commonly born of unions between orcs and humans, are often tested even more harshly than their full orc kin, but those who endure these tests can rise to positions of authority.
