"An orc can have what an orc can hold" is a saying that not only applies to an individual's ability to secure their own destiny and position, but is also likely the root of orcs referring to their communities as holds.

Skeletal Soldier.name: 骷髅士兵 Skeletal Soldier

Chain Shirt.name: 链甲衫 Chain Shirt
Chain Shirt.description:
这件护甲有时也被称为锁子甲袍，是一件由与锁子甲相同金属环构成的长衫。不过，它比锁子甲轻得多，只保护穿戴者的躯干、上臂和大腿。

Sometimes called a hauberk, this is a long shirt constructed of the same metal rings as chainmail. However, it is much lighter than chainmail and protects only the torso, upper arms, and upper legs of its wearer.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些射弹是弓使用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Set Defense.name: 就位防御 Set Defense
Set Defense.description:
骷髅士兵架起它的长柄刀（或其他具有触及的武器），以防卫其周围的区域。它仅可为该武器获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.hFtNbo1LKYCoDy2O]{借机攻击}反应动作（）。此效果持续至该骷髅执行一个具有移动或攻击特征的动作，或被摧毁为止。

The skeletal soldier sets its glaive (or other reach weapon) to defend the area around it. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.hFtNbo1LKYCoDy2O]{Attack of Opportunity} reaction for that weapon only. This lasts until the skeleton takes an action with the move or attack trait or is destroyed.

Skeletal Soldier.publicNotes:
这些士兵在死后仍继续服从命令，依然挥舞着他们花了一生时间学习使用的装备。虽然它们常由人类或矮人的骨骼制成，但其他类型的类人生物也相当常见，例如熊地精、地精大兵和兽人。通常，这些士兵挥舞的是其族群中最常见的武器，而不是这里列出的那些。

在死者的队列中，没有什么像骷髅那样数量如此众多、种类如此繁多。虽然大多数几乎完全由骨头构成，但有些会保留少量肉体残片来帮助它们移动，例如翅膜。

These soldiers continue to follow orders in death, still wielding the armaments they spent a lifetime learning how to use. While frequently made from the bones of humans or dwarves, other types of humanoids are quite common, such as bugbears, hobgoblins, and orcs. Often, these soldiers wield the weapons most common among their people instead of those listed here.

Among the ranks of the dead, none are so numerous, nor so varied, as the skeleton. While most are almost entirely made from bone, some maintain a few scraps of flesh to aid them in movement, such as wing membranes.

Wolf Skeleton.name: 骷髅狼 Wolf Skeleton

Surge of Speed.name: 速度激涌 Surge of Speed
Surge of Speed.description:
骷髅狼大步移动三次，但直到其下个回合开始前，它都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 状态。

The wolf skeleton Strides three times, but it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of its next turn.

Wolf Skeleton.publicNotes:
没有了血肉的负担，骷髅狼以骇人的速度冲过战场。

在亡者的队列中，没有什么像骷髅那样数量如此众多、种类如此繁多。尽管大多数几乎完全由骨头构成，但有些仍保留少量血肉来帮助它们移动，例如翼膜。

Without the burden of flesh, skeletal wolves charge across the battlefield with terrifying speed.

Among the ranks of the dead, none are so numerous, nor so varied, as the skeleton. While most are almost entirely made from bone, some maintain a few scraps of flesh to aid them in movement, such as wing membranes.

Zombie Hulk.name: 丧尸巨兽 Zombie Hulk

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
丧尸永久处于迟缓 1，且不能使用反应动作。

A zombie is permanently slowed 1 and can't use reactions.

Corpse Throwing.name: 掷尸体 Corpse Throwing
Corpse Throwing.description:
丧尸巨兽可以将中型或更小的尸体掷向敌人。它们也可以为此掷出中型或更小的丧尸；这些丧尸会受到与它们击中的目标相同的伤害。被掷出的丧尸若幸存下来，则会倒下并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

A zombie hulk can throw Medium or smaller corpses at foes. They can also throw Medium or smaller zombies for this purpose, who take just as much damage as the target they hit. A zombie that survives being thrown falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Wide Swing.name: 大幅挥击 Wide Swing
Wide Swing.description:
丧尸巨兽对其触及内的不同目标各进行一次肉块 打击，共两次。

The zombie hulk makes two hunk of meat Strikes against different targets within its reach.

Zombie Hulk.publicNotes:
这些高耸的恐怖怪物自巨大的怪异尸体中崛起。

丧尸唯一的欲望就是吞食活人。它们毫无思想，永不停歇地蹒跚前行，是死亡的先驱；只有在被摧毁时，丧尸才会停下。

These towering horrors rise from monstrous, gigantic corpses.

A zombie's only desire is to consume the living. Unthinking and ever-shambling harbingers of death, zombies stop only when they're destroyed.

Quicksand.name: 流沙 Quicksand

Submerge.name: 潜没 Submerge
Submerge.description:
触发 一个巨型或更小的生物走入流沙

效果 触发该效果的生物陷入流沙，深至腰部。如果流沙尚未掷先攻，则为其掷先攻。

Trigger A Huge or smaller creature walks onto the quicksand

Effect The triggering creature sinks into the quicksand up to its waist. The quicksand rolls initiative if it hasn't already.

Quicksand.disable:
@Check[survival|dc:18|name:安全地扰动表面] (受训) 以扰动表面

@Check[survival|dc:18|name:Safely Disturb the Surface] (trained) to disturb the surface
Quicksand.hazarddescription:
一片15英尺宽的水与沙区域会试图淹没踏入其中的生物。

A 15-foot-wide patch of water and sand attempts to submerge creatures that step onto it.
Quicksand.reset:
该危害仍会将任何走进去的人淹没，但其表面要在24小时内逐渐恢复平静后，才会再次变得不可见。

The hazard still submerges anyone who walks in, but the surface doesn't become hidden again until it settles over the course of 24 hours.
Quicksand.routine:
（1动作）在其先攻时，流沙会将其中的每个生物向下拉。被埋到腰部的生物会被拉到脖子的位置，而被埋到脖子的生物会被拉到水下，必须屏住呼吸以避免窒息。在流沙中的生物可以尝试一次@Check[athletics|dc:20|traits:action:swim] 运动检定以游泳：如果它已被埋到脖子或更深，可以提升一级埋没程度；如果只被埋到腰部，可以移动5尺。大失败时，该生物会被拉低一级埋没程度。游出流沙的生物会挣脱此危害，并在紧邻流沙区域的一个空间内@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。其他生物可以协助该生物，通常使用绳索等工具，或通过自身一次@Check[athletics|dc:20|name:Aid Another Creature in Quicksand] 运动检定尝试将其拉出，效果与该生物自行尝试检定时相同。

(1 action) On its initiative, the quicksand pulls down each creature within it. A creature that was submerged up to its waist becomes submerged up to its neck, and a creature that was submerged up to its neck is pulled under and has to hold its breath to avoid suffocation. A creature in the quicksand can attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:20|traits:action:swim] check to Swim to either raise itself by one step if it's submerged to its neck or worse, or to move 5 feet if it's submerged only up to its waist. On a critical failure, the creature is pulled down one step. A creature that Swims out of the quicksand escapes the hazard and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in a space adjacent to the quicksand patch. Other creatures can Aid the creature, typically by using a rope or similar aid, or attempt to pull the creature out with their own @Check[athletics|dc:20|name:Aid Another Creature in Quicksand] check, with the same results as if the creature attempted the check.
Quicksand.stealthdetails:
（受训）（或若表面受到扰动，则为 -10 且无最小熟练度）

(trained) (or -10 and no minimum proficiency if the surface is disturbed)

Skeleton's Horn.name: 骷髅的角 Skeleton's Horn

Signal Horn.name: 信号号角 Signal Horn
Signal Horn.description:
一只由抛光骨头制成、镶嵌黑玛瑙的信号号角。

A signal horn made of polished bone with onyx inlays.

Skeleton's Horn.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.qjlVVZusUjf1Tekd]{事件17：被遗忘的桥}

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.qjlVVZusUjf1Tekd]{Event 17: Forgotten Bridge}

Ailing Ranger.name: 病弱游侠 Ailing Ranger
Ailing Ranger.tokenName: 切尔那萨多游侠 Chernasardo Ranger

Snare Kit (Specialist).name: 陷阱工具包（专家） Snare Kit (Specialist)
Snare Kit (Specialist).description:
这套工具包包含用于制作陷阱的工具和材料。陷阱工具包使你能够使用手艺（技能）来制作陷阱。专家陷阱工具包使你在该检定上获得+1物品加值。

This kit contains tools and materials for creating snares. A snare kit allows you to Craft snares using the Crafting skill. A specialist snare kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在一端用箭羽在飞行中保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Double Shot.name: 双发连射 Double Shot
Double Shot.description:
游侠进行两次短弓打击，以两个位于短弓第一射程增量内的不同生物为目标。两次打击都使用游侠当前的多重攻击减值，但每次打击都要承受 –2 减值。

The ranger makes two shortbow Strikes targeting two different creatures within the shortbow's first range increment. Both Strikes use the ranger's current multiple attack penalty, but each strike takes a –2 penalty.

Quick Draw.name: 即时备战 Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description:
游侠拔出一把武器，然后用那把武器进行打击。

The ranger draws a weapon, then Strikes with that weapon.

Sickened.name: 恶心 Sickened
Sickened.description:
你感到不适。恶心总是带有一个数值。你在所有检定和 DC 上承受等同于该数值的状态减值。处于恶心时，你不能主动摄入任何东西——包括灵药和药水。

你可以花费一个单动作进行干呕，尝试恢复，这让你立刻对使你陷入恶心的效果的 DC 进行一次 @Check[fortitude] 强韧豁免。成功时，你的恶心值减少 1（大成功时减少 2）。

You feel ill. Sickened always includes a value. You take a status penalty equal to this value on all your checks and DCs. You can't willingly ingest anything—including elixirs and potions—while sickened.

You can spend a single action retching in an attempt to recover, which lets you immediately attempt a @Check[fortitude] save against the DC of the effect that made you sickened. On a success, you reduce your sickened value by 1 (or by 2 on a critical success).

Slowed.name: 迟缓 Slowed
Slowed.description:
你的动作变少了。迟缓总是带有一个数值。当你重新获得动作时，按你的迟缓值减少你所恢复的动作数量。因为你是在回合开始时恢复动作，所以如果你在你的回合中变为迟缓，你不会立刻失去动作。

You have fewer actions. Slowed always includes a value. When you regain your actions, reduce the number of actions regained by your slowed value. Because you regain actions at the start of your turn, you don't immediately lose actions if you become slowed during your turn.

Ailing Ranger.prototypeToken: 切尔那萨多游侠 Chernasardo Ranger

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神术预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神术专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Crisis of Faith.name: 信仰危机 Crisis of Faith
Crisis of Faith.description:
你攻击目标的信仰，使该生物充满怀疑与心灵上的混乱，造成6d6点心灵伤害；若其能够施放神术法术，则改为造成6d8点心灵伤害。其效果由其意志豁免决定。

对许多神祇而言，若无重大缘由，对信奉与你同一神祇的追随者施放此法术属于禁忌。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全部伤害；若目标能够施放神术法术，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1轮，且在1轮内无法施放神术法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6（若目标是神术施法者，则改为增加2d8）。

You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells. The effects are determined by its Will save.

To many deities, casting this spell on a follower of your own deity without significant cause is anathema.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage; if the target can cast divine spells, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and can't cast divine spells for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 (or by 2d8 if the target is a divine spellcaster).

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.description:
你激发目标内在的英雄气概，使其获得攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免和技能检定的+1状态加值。

升阶（6环） 状态加值提升至+2。

升阶（9环） 状态加值提升至+3。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{法术效果：英雄气概}

You unlock the target's inner heroism, granting it a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Heightened (9th) The status bonus increases to +3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{Spell Effect: Heroism}

Holy Light.name: 圣光 Holy Light
Holy Light.description:
你射出一道炽烈的光线，其中夹杂着圣洁能量。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成 5d6 火焰伤害。若目标具有邪秽（特征）特征，你还会额外造成 5d6 精魂伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害。

成功 目标受到全部伤害。

如果光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，圣光会尝试反制该黑暗。若你需要判断光线是否穿过黑暗区域，在你自己与该法术的目标之间画一条线。

强化（+1） 火焰伤害增加 2d6，对邪秽生物造成的精魂伤害增加 2d6。

You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target has the unholy trait, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, holy light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against unholy creatures increases by 2d6.

Consecrate.name: 祝圣 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
区域 以你神祇的一座固定祭坛、神龛或圣物为中心，半径40尺的爆发

次级施法者 2名，必须是你所信仰宗教的崇拜者

你将一处场所祝圣给你的神祇，吟诵赞美之词并创造出一片神圣空间。在该区域内，你神祇的崇拜者在攻击检定、技能检定、豁免和察觉检定上获得+1状态加值，而违背你神祇禁忌的生物（例如对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛}而言是不死，或对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{撒恩蕾}而言是邪恶）在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。如果你神祇的神术圣化允许你选择神圣或邪恶，你也可以选择让该祝圣场所成为神圣或邪恶。如果该神祇的圣化必须为神圣或邪恶，你必须让该场所与该圣化一致。你神祇的崇拜者在该区域内进行的打击获得该场所的圣化特征（若有）。

大成功 祝圣成功，且其持续时间变为10年而非1年，或者覆盖半径加倍的区域。在神祇眷顾之下，偶尔还可能产生更加惊人的效果，例如该区域被永久祝圣，或效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣成功。

失败 祝圣失败。

大失败 祝圣惨烈失败并激怒你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少在1年内，进一步祝圣该场所的尝试都会失败。

升阶（7环） 该祝圣区域还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制你神祇崇拜者的传送。消耗提高为200 gp × 法术环阶。

Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those rolls. If your deity's divine sanctification allows you to choose holy or unholy, you can choose to make the consecrated site holy or unholy as well. If the deity's sanctification must be holy or unholy, you must make the site match that sanctification. Strikes made by worshippers of your deity within the area gain the site's sanctification trait, if any.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell rank.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你瓦解一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变为其对应类别的凡俗物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你会自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Enlarge.name: 变巨术 Enlarge
Enlarge.description:
在魔法力量的强化下，目标体型变为大型。其装备会随之变大，但如果被移除则会恢复为自然尺寸。该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。其触及增加 5 英尺（若其起始体型为超小型，则增加 10 英尺），并获得近战伤害的 +2 状态加值。此法术对大型或更大体型的生物无效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{法术效果：变巨术}

升环（4环） 该生物改为变为巨型。近战伤害的状态加值变为 +4，且该生物的触及增加 10 英尺（若该生物起始体型为超小型，则增加 15 英尺）。此法术对巨型或更大体型的生物无效果。

升环（6环） 选择此法术的 2 环或 4 环版本之一，并将其效果应用于至多 10 个自愿的生物。

Bolstered by magical power, the target grows to size Large. Its equipment grows with it but returns to natural size if removed. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}. Its reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if it started out Tiny), and it gains a +2 status bonus to melee damage. This spell has no effect on a Large or larger creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{Spell Effect: Enlarge}

Heightened (4th) The creature instead grows to size Huge. The status bonus to melee damage is +4 and the creature's reach increases by 10 feet (or 15 feet if the creature started out Tiny). The spell has no effect on a Huge or larger creature.

Heightened (6th) Choose either the 2nd-rank or 4th-rank version of this spell and apply its effects to up to 10 willing creatures.

See the Unseen.name: 见不可见 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光刺穿幻觉，找到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}生物和精魂。你能够看见隐形生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的特征会显得模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你还可以看见虚体生物，例如幽灵，在距某个物体表面10尺内从物体内部穿出的模糊形体，仿佛隔着这些物体看到一般。更细微的线索还会使你对幻觉进行识破的检定获得+2状态加值。

强化（5环） 此法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报术 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你为一片区域设下防护，以便在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。施放警报术时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大的实体生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，警报术会按你的选择发出心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出一个音量和声音都如手铃般的可听警报（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。无论哪种选项，都会自动将你唤醒，而铃声会让区域内的每个生物都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:15] 检定来醒来。知晓该警报的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须通过一次对抗该法术DC的隐秘检定，否则就会触发该法术。

升阶（3环） 你可以指定一个触发条件，以决定哪些类型的生物会触发警报术。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify a trigger for which types of creatures sound the alarm spell.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你自己和盟友的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果位阶低于你的侦测魔法法术位阶时，你才能侦测到该幻术魔法。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形术药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

升阶（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的位阶或等级，由GM决定。

升阶（4环） 如3环，但你还会锁定最高位阶魔法的来源。与模糊感官类似，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺立方体内（若其大于该范围，则为最近的一个5尺立方体）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放一道神术能量光束。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 2d4 精魂伤害（若大成功，则伤害加倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次检定。如果目标使用了该加值，则法术结束。无论如何，目标随后都会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导活力能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其 1d8 点生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的活力伤害，且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。施放该法术时你花费的动作数量决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (专注) 该法术的射程为 30 尺。如果你在治疗一个活体生物，恢复的生命值增加 8 点。

3 (专注) 你将活力能量分散在一个 @Template[emanation|distance:30] 中。这会以爆发内所有活体生物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害量增加 1d8，且双动作版本的额外治疗增加 8 点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你以命能强化攻击。目标数量等于你施放该法术时所花费的动作数。每个目标的徒手打击和武器打击额外造成 1d4 点活力伤害。（这种伤害通常只会伤害不死生物。）如果你具有圣洁特征，你可以将该特征添加到此法术以及受该法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环） 伤害增加为 2d4 点伤害。

升阶（5环） 伤害增加为 3d4 点伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

You empower attacks with vital energy. The number of targets is equal to the number of actions you spent casting this spell. Each target's unarmed and weapon Strikes deal an extra 1d4 vitality damage. (This damage typically damages only undead). If you have the holy trait, you can add that trait to this spell and to the Strikes affected by the spell.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) The damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Infuse Vitality}

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
你创造出一个光球，在你选择的颜色下，于20英尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的20英尺内提供昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿生物所处的同一空间内创造这团光，你可以将其附着在该生物身上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮在其附近。你可以维持该法术，将这团光移动至多60英尺；你可以将其附着到一个生物身上或将其从生物身上分离，作为此次移动的一部分。

你可以解除该法术。如果你在已经有四个光亮术处于生效状态时再施放此法术，你必须选择一个现有法术使其结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环） 该光球在60英尺半径内发出明亮光照（并在接下来的60英尺内提供昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起盾牌”动作，使你获得对 AC 的 +1 环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但使用它不需要手。

当该法术生效时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）。该护盾具有 5 点硬度。你可以使用该法术的反应动作（）来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也可以。你在使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

高环阶（+2） 护盾的硬度提高 5 点。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，下一次你进行攻击检定时，掷两次并采用较好的结果。该次攻击无视对此次攻击检定的处境减值，以及因目标处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。随后，你会在10分钟内暂时免疫料敌机先。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：料敌机先}

The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}. You are then temporarily immune to sure strike for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Weapon Surge.name: 激发武器 Weapon Surge
Weapon Surge.description:
你将武器高举，向其中注入神术能量。在你下个回合开始前，用该武器进行的下一次打击时，你获得攻击检定+1状态加值，且该武器额外造成 1d6 精魂伤害，并且此次打击获得受祝特征。激发武器会在你完成此次打击后，或该武器脱离你的持有时结束。

增强（5环） 该攻击额外造成 2d6 精魂伤害。

增强（9环） 该攻击额外造成 3d6 精魂伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{法术效果：激发武器}

Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy. On your next Strike with that weapon before the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 status bonus to the attack roll and the weapon deals an additional 1d6 spirit damage, and the Strike gains the sanctified trait. Weapon surge ends once you complete this Strike or the weapon leaves your possession.

Heightened (5th) The attack deals 2d6 additional spirit damage.

Heightened (9th) The attack deals 3d6 additional spirit damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{Spell Effect: Weapon Surge}

Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛圣徽 Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这块木头或白银上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。圣徽可以佩戴在身上，以链子或别针固定，也可以手持。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Healing Hands.name: 治疗之手 Healing Hands
Healing Hands.description:
当牧师施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 时，他们改为掷 d10，而不是 d8。

When the priest casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, they roll d10s instead of d8s.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果另一个生物的反应动作会打断牧师的施法动作，牧师会尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:15]。如果牧师成功了，其动作不会被打断。

If another creature's reaction would disrupt the priest's spellcasting action, the priest attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If the priest succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

Iomedae Lore.name: 艾奥梅黛学识 Iomedae Lore

Divine Prepared Spells.name: 神术预备法术 Divine Prepared Spells

Divine Focus Spells.name: 神术专注法术 Divine Focus Spells

Crisis of Faith.name: 信仰危机 Crisis of Faith
Crisis of Faith.description:
你冲击目标的信仰，以疑虑和心灵上的混乱折磨该生物，造成6d6点心灵伤害；若其能够施放神术法术，则改为造成6d8点心灵伤害。其效果由其意志豁免决定。

对许多神祇而言，若无重大理由便对自己所信奉神祇的追随者施放此法术，是一种禁忌。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标受到一半伤害。

失败 目标受到全额伤害；若目标能够施放神术法术，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1轮。

大失败 目标受到双倍伤害，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} 1轮，并且在1轮内无法施放神术法术。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6（若目标为神术施法者，则改为增加2d8）。

You assault the target's faith, riddling the creature with doubt and mental turmoil that deal 6d6 mental damage, or 6d8 mental damage if it can cast divine spells. The effects are determined by its Will save.

To many deities, casting this spell on a follower of your own deity without significant cause is anathema.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage; if the target can cast divine spells, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round, and can't cast divine spells for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6 (or by 2d8 if the target is a divine spellcaster).

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.description:
你解锁目标内在的英雄气概，使其攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免和技能检定获得+1状态加值。

强化（6环） 状态加值提高至+2。

强化（9环） 状态加值提高至+3。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{法术效果：英雄气概}

You unlock the target's inner heroism, granting it a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +2.

Heightened (9th) The status bonus increases to +3.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{Spell Effect: Heroism}

Holy Light.name: 圣光 Holy Light
Holy Light.description:
你射出一道炽烈的光线，其中带有圣洁能量。进行一次远程法术攻击。该光线造成 5d6 火焰伤害。如果目标具有邪秽特征，则你额外造成 5d6 精魂伤害。

大成功 目标受到双倍伤害。

成功 目标受到全部伤害。

如果这道光线穿过一片魔法黑暗区域，或以受魔法黑暗影响的生物为目标，圣光会尝试反制该黑暗。如果你需要判定这道光线是否穿过黑暗区域，在你自己与该法术的目标之间画一条线。

升阶（+1） 火焰伤害增加 2d6，对邪秽生物造成的精魂伤害增加 2d6。

You shine a blazing ray of light tinged with holy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 fire damage. If the target has the unholy trait, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

If the light passes through an area of magical darkness or targets a creature affected by magical darkness, holy light attempts to counteract the darkness. If you need to determine whether the light passes through an area of darkness, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against unholy creatures increases by 2d6.

Consecrate.name: 祝圣 Consecrate
Consecrate.description:
区域 以你神祇的一座固定祭坛、神龛或圣物为中心、半径40尺的爆发

次级施法者 2名，必须是你所信仰宗教的信徒

你将一处场所祝圣给你的神祇，吟诵赞歌并创造出一片圣域。当位于该区域内时，你神祇的信徒在攻击检定、技能检定、豁免和察觉检定上获得+1状态加值，而对你的神祇而言属于禁忌的生物（例如对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛}来说是不死，或对于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{撒恩蕾}来说是某些对象）则在这些检定上承受-1状态减值。如果你神祇的神术圣化允许你选择神圣或邪恶，你也可以选择让该祝圣场所成为神圣或邪恶。如果该神祇的圣化必须为神圣或邪恶，你就必须让该场所与该圣化一致。你神祇的信徒在该区域内进行的打击会获得该场所的圣化特征（若有）。

大成功 祝圣成功，并且其持续时间改为10年而非1年，或者覆盖半径加倍的区域。偶尔，在你神祇的眷顾下，这还可能产生更加惊人的效果，例如该区域被永久祝圣，或该效果覆盖整座大教堂。

成功 祝圣成功。

失败 祝圣失败。

大失败 祝圣惨烈失败并激怒了你的神祇，祂会降下不悦的征兆。至少1年内，任何进一步祝圣该场所的尝试都会失败。

升阶（7环） 该祝圣区域还会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal}法术的效果，但该效果不会尝试反制你神祇信徒的传送。花费提高为200 gp × 法术环阶。

Area 40-foot-radius burst around an immobile altar, shrine, or fixture of your deity

Secondary Casters 2, must be worshippers of your religion

You consecrate a site to your deity, chanting praises and creating a sacred space. While within the area, worshippers of your deity gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, skill checks, saving throws, and Perception checks, and creatures anathema to your deity (such as undead for @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}) take a -1 status penalty to those rolls. If your deity's divine sanctification allows you to choose holy or unholy, you can choose to make the consecrated site holy or unholy as well. If the deity's sanctification must be holy or unholy, you must make the site match that sanctification. Strikes made by worshippers of your deity within the area gain the site's sanctification trait, if any.

Critical Success The consecration succeeds, and it either lasts for 10 years instead of 1 or covers an area with twice the radius. Occasionally, with your deity's favor, this might produce an even more amazing effect, such as a permanently consecrated area or the effect covering an entire cathedral.

Success The consecration succeeds.

Failure The consecration fails.

Critical Failure The consecration fails spectacularly and angers your deity, who sends a sign of displeasure. For at least 1 year, further attempts to consecrate the site fail.

Heightened (7th) The consecrated area also gains the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]{Planar Seal} spell, but the effect doesn't attempt to counteract teleportation by worshippers of your deity. The cost increases to 200 gp × the spell rank.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你瓦解一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。如果你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品会在10分钟内变为其类型的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。如果目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Enlarge.name: 变巨术 Enlarge
Enlarge.description:
在魔法力量的加持下，目标体型变为大型。其装备也会随之变大，但若被移除则会恢复为原本大小。该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。其触及增加 5 尺（若其起初为超小型，则增加 10 尺），并获得近战伤害的 +2 状态加值。此法术对大型或更大的生物无效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{法术效果：变巨术}

升阶（4环） 该生物的体型改为变为巨型。其近战伤害的状态加值变为 +4，且该生物的触及增加 10 尺（若该生物起初为超小型，则增加 15 尺）。此法术对巨型或更大的生物无效果。

升阶（6环） 选择此法术的 2 环或 4 环版本之一，并将其效果应用于至多 10 个自愿的生物。

Bolstered by magical power, the target grows to size Large. Its equipment grows with it but returns to natural size if removed. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}. Its reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if it started out Tiny), and it gains a +2 status bonus to melee damage. This spell has no effect on a Large or larger creature.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.sPCWrhUHqlbGhYSD]{Spell Effect: Enlarge}

Heightened (4th) The creature instead grows to size Huge. The status bonus to melee damage is +4 and the creature's reach increases by 10 feet (or 15 feet if the creature started out Tiny). The spell has no effect on a Huge or larger creature.

Heightened (6th) Choose either the 2nd-rank or 4th-rank version of this spell and apply its effects to up to 10 willing creatures.

See the Unseen.name: 见不可见 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光能穿透幻觉，找到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物和精魂。你可以看见隐形的生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的特征仍然模糊，使其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你还可以看见虚体生物，比如幽灵，在距物体表面10尺内从物体内部穿过物体时，显现为透过这些物体所见的模糊形状。更细微的线索还会使你进行识破幻觉的检定时获得+2状态加值。

高阶化（5环） 此法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Alarm.name: 警报术 Alarm
Alarm.description:
你为一个区域设下防护，以便在生物未经你许可进入时提醒你。施放警报术时，选择一个口令。每当一个小型或更大的实体生物在未说出口令的情况下进入该法术的区域时，警报术会按你的选择发出一种心灵警报（此时该法术获得心灵（特征））或发出一个声音和音量如手铃般的可听警报（此时该法术获得听觉（特征））。无论哪种选项都会自动将你唤醒，而铃声会让区域内的每个生物都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:15] 检定以醒来。察觉到警报的生物在移动进入该区域时，必须成功通过一次对抗该法术DC的隐秘检定，否则就会触发该法术。

强化（3环） 你可以指定一个触发条件，以决定哪些类型的生物会触发警报术。

You ward an area to alert you when creatures enter without your permission. When you cast alarm, select a password. Whenever a Small or larger corporeal creature enters the spell's area without speaking the password, alarm sends your choice of a mental alert (in which case the spell gains the mental trait) or an audible alarm with the sound and volume of a hand bell (in which case the spell gains the auditory trait). Either option automatically awakens you, and the bell allows each creature in the area to attempt a @Check[perception|dc:15] check to wake up. A creature aware of the alarm must succeed at a Stealth check against the spell's DC or trigger the spell when moving into the area.

Heightened (3rd) You can specify a trigger for which types of creatures sound the alarm spell.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略那些你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，带有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

增强（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

增强（4环） 如同3环，但你还会定位到最高环阶魔法的来源。和模糊感官一样，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺立方体范围内（若其大于此范围，则为距离最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你释放出一道神术能量光束。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 2d4 精魂伤害（若大成功，则伤害加倍）。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d4。

You unleash a beam of divine energy. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 2d4 spirit damage (double damage on a critical hit).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你祈求超自然实体的指引，使目标在持续时间结束前进行的一次攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免或技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择将该加值用于哪一次掷骰。如果目标使用了该加值，此法术结束。无论如何，目标随后都会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{Spell Effect: Guidance}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{Effect: Guidance Immunity}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导活力能量来治疗活着的生物或伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其 1d8 生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的活力伤害，且它进行一次基础强韧豁免。施放此法术时你花费的动作数决定其目标、射程、区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (专注) 该法术的射程为 30 尺。如果你在治疗一个活体生物，恢复的生命值增加 8。

3 (专注) 你在一个 @Template[emanation|distance:30] 中分散活力能量。这会以爆发内所有活着和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害提高 1d8，且双动作版本的额外治疗提高 8。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你以命能强化攻击。目标数量等于你施放该法术时所花费的动作数。每个目标的徒手和武器打击额外造成 1d4 点活力伤害。（这种伤害通常只会伤害不死生物。）如果你具有圣洁特征，你可以将该特征添加到此法术以及受此法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环） 伤害提高为 2d4 点伤害。

升阶（5环） 伤害提高为 3d4 点伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

You empower attacks with vital energy. The number of targets is equal to the number of actions you spent casting this spell. Each target's unarmed and weapon Strikes deal an extra 1d4 vitality damage. (This damage typically damages only undead). If you have the holy trait, you can add that trait to this spell and to the Strikes affected by the spell.

Heightened (3rd) The damage increases to 2d4 damage.

Heightened (5th) The damage increases to 3d4 damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{Spell Effect: Infuse Vitality}

Light.name: 光亮术 Light
Light.description:
你创造出一个光球，发出以20尺半径的明亮光照（接下来的20尺为昏暗光照），颜色由你选择。若你在某个自愿生物所在的同一空间内创造这团光亮，你可以将其附着在该生物身上，使其在该生物移动时漂浮于其附近。你可以通过维持该法术来将这团光亮移动至多60尺；作为此次移动的一部分，你可以将其附着到某个生物身上或使其脱离。

你可以解消该法术。若你在已经有四个光亮术处于生效状态时再施放此法术，你必须选择其中一个现有法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

强化（4环） 该光球发出以60尺半径的光照（接下来的60尺为昏暗光照）。

You create an orb of light that sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius (and dim light for the next 20 feet) in a color you choose. If you create the light in the same space as a willing creature, you can attach the light to the creature, causing it to float near that creature as it moves. You can Sustain the spell to move the light up to 60 feet; you can attach or detach it from a creature as part of this movement.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you Cast the Spell while you already have four light spells active, you must choose one of the existing spells to end.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{Spell Effect: Light}

Heightened (4th) The orb sheds light in a 60-foot radius (and dim light for the next 60 feet).

Shield.name: 护盾术 Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一道魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起盾牌”动作，使你获得AC +1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但使用它不需要手。

当该法术生效期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）。该护盾具有5点硬度。你可以使用该法术的反应动作（）来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也是如此。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，且你在10分钟内无法再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该护盾的硬度提高5点。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，下一次你进行攻击检定时，掷两次并取较好的结果。该攻击无视攻击检定的境遇减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏} 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。随后，你会暂时免疫料敌机先 10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{法术效果：料敌机先}

The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll it twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}. You are then temporarily immune to sure strike for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Weapon Surge.name: 激发武器 Weapon Surge
Weapon Surge.description:
你将武器高举过顶，以神术能量将其充盈。在你下个回合开始前，用那把武器进行的下一次打击中，你的攻击检定获得+1状态加值，该武器额外造成1d6点精魂伤害，且此次打击获得受祝特征。激发武器会在你完成此次打击或该武器脱离你的持有后结束。

升环（5环） 该攻击额外造成2d6点精魂伤害。

升环（9环） 该攻击额外造成3d6点精魂伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{法术效果：激发武器}

Holding your weapon aloft, you fill it with divine energy. On your next Strike with that weapon before the start of your next turn, you gain a +1 status bonus to the attack roll and the weapon deals an additional 1d6 spirit damage, and the Strike gains the sanctified trait. Weapon surge ends once you complete this Strike or the weapon leaves your possession.

Heightened (5th) The attack deals 2d6 additional spirit damage.

Heightened (9th) The attack deals 3d6 additional spirit damage.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.qlz0sJIvqc0FdUdr]{Spell Effect: Weapon Surge}

Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛圣徽 Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这块木质或白银制成的物品上饰有代表某位神祇的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的宗教象征来施展某些能力并施放部分法术。宗教象征可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以持握。

This piece of wood or silver is emblazoned with an image representing a deity. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Healing Hands.name: 治疗之手 Healing Hands
Healing Hands.description:
当牧师施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{治疗术} 时，他们掷的是 d10 而不是 d8。

When the priest casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, they roll d10s instead of d8s.

Steady Spellcasting.name: 稳定施法 Steady Spellcasting
Steady Spellcasting.description:
如果另一名生物的反应动作会打断牧师的施法动作，牧师进行一次@Check[flat|dc:15]。如果牧师成功，他们的动作不会被打断。

If another creature's reaction would disrupt the priest's spellcasting action, the priest attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15]. If the priest succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

Iomedae Lore.name: 艾奥梅黛学识 Iomedae Lore

Weight of Guilt.name: 罪孽之重 Weight of Guilt
Weight of Guilt.tokenName: 罪孽之重 Weight of Guilt

Mental Bind.name: 心灵束缚 Mental Bind
Mental Bind.description:
触发 一个生物进入该区域

效果 30尺内的每个生物都会被沉重的灵体锁链缠绕，这些锁链由其自身的罪孽与悔恨铸成。每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:25] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物的所有速度在1轮内承受-10尺状态减值。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}，直到其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱}（DC 25）。

大失败 如失败，且该生物被罪恶感压垮，陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}，持续1天。

Trigger A creature enters the area

Effect Each creature within 30 feet becomes wrapped in heavy spectral chains forged from its own sins and regrets. Each must attempt a @Check[will|dc:25] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes a -10-foot status penalty to its Speeds for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} (DC 25).

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is overwhelmed with guilt, becoming @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 day.

Weight of Guilt.disable:
@Check[religion|dc:26|name:扰乱作祟] (专家) 以通过祈祷扰乱作祟，或 @Check[deception|dc:27|name:公开反抗你的悔恨] (专家) 以公开反抗你的悔恨并驱逐作祟。未曾犯下罪孽，或已为其过错作出补偿的生物，免疫于此作祟的效果。

@Check[religion|dc:26|name:Disrupt the haunt] (expert) to disrupt the haunt through prayer or @Check[deception|dc:27|name:Openly defy your regrets] (expert) to openly defy your regrets and banish the haunt. Creatures who haven't committed sins or already made amends for their transgressions are immune to the effects of this haunt.
Weight of Guilt.hazarddescription:
受死者的愧疚与悔恨影响，生物被沉重的锁链缠绕，这些锁链体现了它们自身的罪孽。

Influenced by the guilt and regrets of the dead, creatures are wrapped in weighted chains that embody their own sins.
Weight of Guilt.stealthdetails:
（专家）感知到一股充满悲伤的压迫性气息

(expert) to sense an oppressive aura of sorrow
Weight of Guilt.prototypeToken: 罪孽之重 Weight of Guilt

Confiscated Crate.name: 没收的板条箱 Confiscated Crate
Confiscated Crate.tokenName: 没收的板条箱 Confiscated Crate

Molthuni Crystals.name: 摩尔苏恩水晶 Molthuni Crystals

Confiscated Crate.prototypeToken: 没收的板条箱 Confiscated Crate

Lastwall Soup.name: 终墙浓汤 Lastwall Soup
Lastwall Soup.description:
启动 1 分钟（交互）

绯红复国团用能够迷惑不死感官的草药制作这种浓郁丰盛的汤。一碗终墙浓汤的营养相当于一顿完整的正餐。

此外，在喝下一碗终墙浓汤后的 1 小时内，你获得针对不死的隐秘检定和 DC 的 +2 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.6A8jsLR7upLGuRiv]{效果：终墙浓汤}

Activate 1 minute (Interact)

Crimson Reclaimers make this rich, hearty soup using herbs that baffle the senses of the undead. A bowl of Lastwall soup is as nourishing as a full meal.

In addition, for 1 hour after consuming a bowl of Lastwall soup, you gain a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks and DCs against undead.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.6A8jsLR7upLGuRiv]{Effect: Lastwall Soup}

Worm Vial.name: 蠕虫小瓶 Worm Vial
Worm Vial.description:
启动 2（操作）

打开这个小瓶会释放出其中的毁灭性内容物：一条重构而成的超巨型洞穴蠕虫。该蠕虫有两种功能；当你启动该物品时，选择其中一种使用。

掘穴 该蠕虫掘穴移动最多80尺，在身后留下隧道。它可以在坚硬岩石中掘穴，但若如此，它掘穴移动的距离改为40尺而非80尺。

吞食 该蠕虫尝试吞下一个生物，在体内将其碾碎，然后再把该生物吐出来。目标必须位于15尺内，并尝试进行一次@Check[reflex|dc:30]豁免。若其失败，则受到@Damage[(3d6+9)[bludgeoning]]伤害（若大失败则伤害加倍）。随后，该蠕虫将该生物吐到30尺内地面上的任意空空间中，使该生物承受一次20尺坠落的伤害。

制作需求 提供一具洞穴蠕虫的尸体。

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Opening this vial unleashes its destructive contents: a reconstituted Gargantuan cave worm. The worm has two functions; choose which one to use when you Activate the item.

Burrow The worm Burrows up to 80 feet, leaving a tunnel behind it. It can burrow through solid stone, but if it does so it burrows 40 feet instead of 80 feet.

Eat The worm attempts to swallow a creature, crush it in its insides, then spit the creature out. The target must be within 15 feet, and it attempts a @Check[reflex|dc:30] save. If it fails, it takes @Damage[(3d6+9)[bludgeoning]] (doubled on a critical failure). The worm then spits the creature out to any empty space on the ground within 30 feet, causing the creature to take damage from a 20-foot fall.

Craft Requirements Supply the corpse of a cave worm.

Rare Herbs.name: 稀有草药 Rare Herbs
Rare Herbs.description:
阿尔西斯的原料库存中包含一批仅见于南锐木森林的稀有草药。

Althis's stock of ingredients include a collection of rare herbs found only in the Southern Fangwood.

Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs.name: 前往地下墓穴的指引 Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs
Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs.description:
这张纸条上写着进入奥泽姆要塞地下墓穴的指示。入口显然位于艾奥梅黛之憩。

This slip of paper includes instructions for entering Fort Ozem's catacombs. The entrance is apparently located in Iomedae's Rest.

Shevarna's Cabinet.name: 谢瓦娜的柜橱 Shevarna's Cabinet
Shevarna's Cabinet.tokenName: 谢瓦娜的柜子 Shevarna's Cabinet

Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).name: 治疗者工具包（扩展） Healer's Toolkit (Expanded)
Healer's Toolkit (Expanded).description:
这套由绷带、草药和缝合工具组成的工具包，是进行医疗检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{实施急救}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口} 时所必需的。扩充医师工具包会为此类检定提供 +1 物品加值。如果你穿戴着你的治疗者工具包，你可以在使用其工具的动作中，作为该动作的一部分取出并收回这些工具。

This kit of bandages, herbs, and suturing tools is necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}. Expanded healer's toolkits provide a +1 item bonus to such checks. If you wear your healer's toolkit, you can draw and replace its tools as part of the action that uses them.

Healer's Gloves (Greater).name: 治疗者手套（高等） Healer's Gloves (Greater)
Healer's Gloves (Greater).description:
这双洁白的手套即使用来缝合伤口或治疗其他病症，也从不显露血迹。它们为你的医疗检定提供 +2 物品加值。

启动—Healer's Touch A (操作)

频率 每天一次

效果 你可以抚慰一名自愿、活着且邻近的生物的伤口，为该生物恢复 @Damage[(4d6+15)[vitality,healing]|shortLabel:true] 点生命值。这是一个治疗活力效果。你不能用此次治疗伤害不死。

These clean, white gloves never show signs of blood, even when used to stitch up wounds or treat other ailments. They give you a +2 item bonus to Medicine checks.

Activate—Healer's Touch A (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You can soothe the wounds of a willing, living, adjacent creature, restoring @Damage[(4d6+15)[vitality,healing]|shortLabel:true] Hit Points to that creature. This is a healing vitality effect. You can't harm undead with this healing.

Antidote (Greater).name: 解毒剂（高等） Antidote (Greater)
Antidote (Greater).description:
启动 A (操作)

解毒剂会保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在 6 小时内对抗毒素的强韧豁免获得 +4 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +4 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Healing Potion (Moderate).name: 治疗药水（中等） Healing Potion (Moderate)
Healing Potion (Moderate).description:
启动 A（操作）

治疗药水是一小瓶红宝石般鲜红的液体，饮用者的伤口迅速愈合时，会感到一阵刺痛般的酥麻感。当你饮用治疗药水时，你恢复 @Damage[(3d8+10)[healing]] 点生命值。

Activate A (manipulate)

A healing potion is a vial of a ruby-red liquid that imparts a tingling sensation as the drinker's wounds heal rapidly. When you drink a healing potion, you regain @Damage[(3d8+10)[healing]] Hit Points.

Blightburn Resin.name: 荒燃树脂 Blightburn Resin
Blightburn Resin.description:
这种黏稠而硬化的树液采自感染了真菌枯萎病并暴露于明火的树木。

启动 A (操作)

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

潜伏期 1分钟

最长持续时间 6轮

阶段 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害 (1轮)

阶段 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] 伤害 (1轮)

阶段 3 @Damage[9d6[poison]] 伤害 (1轮)

This tacky, hardened sap is harvested from trees infected by fungal blights and exposed to open flames.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[9d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Giant Scorpion Venom.name: 巨蝎毒液 Giant Scorpion Venom
Giant Scorpion Venom.description:
蝎毒会带来剧烈痛苦，其效果也会造成一定程度的衰弱。

启动 2 (操作)

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

最长持续时间 6 轮

阶段 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 2 @Damage[2d8[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}（1 轮）

阶段 3 @Damage[2d10[poison]] 伤害，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}（1 轮）

Scorpion venom is excruciating and its effects are somewhat debilitating.

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d10[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Spider Root.name: 蛛根毒 Spider Root
Spider Root.description:
将某种蔓生藤本植物纤细如丝的根捣碎制成的糊剂，蛛根毒会使受害者变得笨拙而不灵巧。

启动 A (操作)

豁免 @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

潜伏期 1 分钟

最大持续时间 6 分钟

阶段 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}（1 分钟）

阶段 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}（1 分钟）

阶段 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] 伤害，且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}（1 分钟）

A paste made by mashing the fine, threadlike roots of a certain creeper vine, spider root renders a victim clumsy and maladroit.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:28]

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 minute)

Stage 2 @Damage[4d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 minute)

Stage 3 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} (1 minute)

Shevarna's Cabinet.prototypeToken: 谢瓦娜的柜橱 Shevarna's Cabinet

Solid Gold Statuette of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛的纯金小雕像 Solid Gold Statuette of Iomedae

Alchemist's Fire (Greater).name: 炽火胶（高等） Alchemist's Fire (Greater)
Alchemist's Fire (Greater).description:
启动 A 打击

炽火胶是多种挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时会点燃。炽火胶造成 3d8 点火焰伤害、3 点持续性火焰伤害，以及 3 点火焰溅射伤害。你获得攻击检定的 +2 物品加值。

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 3d8 fire damage, 3 persistent fire damage, and 3 fire splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Madcap Top.name: 狂想高帽 Madcap Top
Madcap Top.description:
这个陀螺有 20 个分区，涂成一团混乱冲突的色彩。旋转时，陀螺会很快停在某一面上，并根据朝上的那一面产生一种奇异的魔法效果。

启动—旋转陀螺 2（专注、操作）

效果 选择 60 尺内的一名生物作为目标，并在下表中掷 1d20 以决定陀螺的效果。除非另有说明，由陀螺施放的法术所需作出的任何决定都由你作出，但该法术必须以你所选的生物为目标；如果该法术具有区域但没有目标，则你所选的生物必须位于该法术区域的中心。若该法术的射程小于 60 尺，则将其射程增加至 60 尺。

任何需要的法术DC均为 DC 27，任何需要的法术攻击检定加值均为 +17。如果陀螺对你施放法术，你不能对此获得豁免或其他防御。

陀螺在 [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 小时} 内不能再次启动。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.gxRIzr6dPF0Zke9t]{狂想高帽效果}

d20狂想高帽效果
1你像陀螺一样旋转。你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} 1 轮，然后陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} 1 轮。
2@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} 影响目标。
3@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PjhUmyKnq6K5uDby]{Shrink} 对你生效 1 天。
4一个 3 环的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise} 让你看起来像目标。
5一尊由巧克力或糖果制成的目标雕像出现在你相邻的格子中。
6重力反转，将你和目标送到空中 30 尺处并处于定身状态。你们都会在自己下个回合开始时坠落。
7@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} 影响目标，而且陀螺会大声背诵它刺探到的内容。
8@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]{Laughing Fit} 影响目标。
9一股喷泉从陀螺中喷发，喷出葡萄酒，持续 10 分钟。
10@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate} 影响你，但你是穿过地狱进行传送术的。
11@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 影响你。
12四具会唱歌的骷髅出现，为你和你的盟友献唱 1 分钟，使攻击检定、察觉检定、豁免与技能检定获得 +1 状态加值。
13陀螺朝你弹出 1 枚铜币。
14@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} 影响目标。
15你与目标互换位置；这是一个传送效果。
16@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{Banishment} 影响目标；若目标位于其母位面上，则改为麻痹。
17彩虹染料爆炸并覆盖你，持续 24 小时。
18陀螺创造一个以目标为中心的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Toxic Cloud}。
19你 60 尺内一件随机的无人持用物品长出动物的腿并跟随你，在陀螺的启动恢复前都会保持如此。
20再转一次，而且目标也会旋转，仿佛它启动了这个陀螺一样。

This top has 20 divisions, painted in a chaotic mess of clashing colors. When spun, the top quickly settles on a side and generates a strange magical effect based on the side that lands face-up.

Activate—Spin the Top 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect Choose a creature within 60 feet to target and roll a d20 on the table below to determine the top's effect. You make any decisions for a spell cast by the top unless otherwise indicated, except that it must target the creature you chose, or the creature you chose must be the center of the spell's area, if it has an area but no targets. If the spell's range is less than 60 feet, increase the range to 60 feet.

Any spell DC required is DC 27, and any spell attack roll required is +17. If the top casts a spell on you, you don't get a saving throw or other defense against it.

The top can't be activated again for [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.gxRIzr6dPF0Zke9t]{Madcap Top Effect}

d20Madcap Top Effect
1You spin just like the top. You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 round and then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.
2@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3]{Slow} affects the target.
3@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PjhUmyKnq6K5uDby]{Shrink} affects you for 1 day.
4A 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise} makes you look like the target.
5A statue of the target, made of chocolate or candy, appears adjacent to you.
6Gravity reverses, sending you and the target 30 feet in the air, immobilized. You both fall at the start of your next turn.
7@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC]{Mind Reading} affects the target, and the top loudly recites what it discovers.
8@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]{Laughing Fit} affects the target.
9A fountain erupts from the top, spraying wine for 10 minutes.
10@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate} affects you, but you teleport through Hell.
11@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} affects you.
12Four singing skeletons appear to serenade you and your allies for 1 minute, granting a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception checks, saving throws, and skill checks.
13The top flings 1 cp at you.
14@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} affects the target.
15You and the target change places; this is a teleportation effect.
16@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.bay4AfSu2iIozNNW]{Banishment} affects the target, or paralyze if the target's on its home plane.
17Rainbow dye explodes and covers you for 24 hours.
18The top creates a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.MlpbeZ61Euhl0d60]{Toxic Cloud} centered on the target.
19A random unattended object within 60 feet of you sprouts animal legs and follows you, reverting when the top's activation recharges.
20Spin again, and the target also spins as though it had activated the top.

Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem.name: 奥泽姆圣杯素描 Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem
Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem.description:
这张折叠的素描使你在进行鉴定奥泽姆圣杯的检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

This folded sketch grants a +1 item bonus checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{identify} the Chalice of Ozem.

Traveling Pack.name: 旅行套装 Traveling Pack

Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap.name: 热门悬疑小说《寒流突袭》 Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap
Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap.description:
这是畅销悬疑小说《寒流突袭》的副本。

This is a copy of the popular mystery novel Cold Snap.

Traveling Pack.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.oBJZQqKpVfUPDQXA]{A10. 游侠兵营}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.oBJZQqKpVfUPDQXA]{A10. Ranger Barracks}

Under the Pillow.name: 枕头底下 Under the Pillow
Under the Pillow.tokenName: 枕头底下 Under the Pillow

Cloak of Illusions.name: 幻象斗篷 Cloak of Illusions
Cloak of Illusions.description:
这件斗篷飘逸流动，覆盖并遮蔽穿戴者的身体。该斗篷允许你将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{幻影} 作为一个天生异能戏法来施放。尽管它天然呈暗灰色，但在灌注后，斗篷会从周围环境中汲取颜色与纹样，使你在隐秘检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

启动—拉起兜帽 2 (操作)

频率 每天一次

效果 你将兜帽拉起，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 的效果，持续时间为该法术的正常持续时间，或直到你将兜帽放下为止，以先发生者为准。

This cloak flows, covering and concealing the wearer's body. The cloak allows you to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.0zU8CPejjQFnhZFI]{Figment} as an occult innate cantrip. Although naturally a dull gray, while invested the cloak picks up colors and patterns from its surroundings, granting a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

Activate—Draw Hood 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw the hood up and gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}, with the spell's normal duration or until you pull the hood back down, whichever comes first.

Under the Pillow.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.oBJZQqKpVfUPDQXA]{A10. 游侠兵营}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.oBJZQqKpVfUPDQXA]{A10. Ranger Barracks}
Under the Pillow.prototypeToken: 枕头下面 Under the Pillow

Vine-Covered Bust.name: 藤蔓覆盖的半身像 Vine-Covered Bust
Vine-Covered Bust.tokenName: 藤蔓覆盖的盾牌 Vine-Covered Shield

Marble Bust of a Molthunian General Lord.name: 莫尔图恩将军领主的大理石半身像 Marble Bust of a Molthunian General Lord

Vine-Covered Bust.prototypeToken: 藤蔓覆盖的盾牌 Vine-Covered Shield

Vine-Covered Shield.name: 藤蔓覆盖的盾牌 Vine-Covered Shield
Vine-Covered Shield.tokenName: 藤蔓覆盖的盾牌 Vine-Covered Shield

Spellguard Shield.name: 护法盾 Spellguard Shield
Spellguard Shield.description:
这面钢盾上刻有秘法符文，用以防御魔法。你举起这面钢盾（硬度 6、HP 24、BT 12）期间，你在对抗以你为目标的法术时进行的豁免获得其环境加值（以及 AC 也获得该加值）；如果你拥有该动作，你还可以对以你为目标的法术使用盾牌格挡。

This shield bears eldritch glyphs to guard against magic. While you have this steel shield (Hardness 6, HP 24, BT 12) raised, you gain its circumstance bonus to saving throws against spells that target you (as well as to AC), and you can Shield Block spells that target you if you have that action.

Vine-Covered Shield.prototypeToken: 藤蔓覆盖的盾牌 Vine-Covered Shield

Longsword.name: 长剑 Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为武装剑，可能是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑身较重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Composite Shortbow.name: 复合短弓 Composite Shortbow
Composite Shortbow.description:
这把短弓由角、木材和筋腱层压结合制成，以增强其拉力和射弹的威力。它紧凑的体型和强大的威力使其成为乘骑弓箭手的最爱。任何能力只要明确限定于短弓，除非另有说明，也同样适用于复合短弓。

This shortbow is made from horn, wood, and sinew laminated together to increase the power of its pull and the force of its projectile. Its compact size and power make it a favorite of mounted archers. Any time an ability is specifically restricted to a shortbow, it also applies to composite shortbows unless otherwise stated.

Dagger.name: 匕首 Dagger
Dagger.description:
这种小型带刃武器单手持用，用于在近战中刺击生物。它也可以投掷。

This small, bladed weapon is held in one hand and used to stab a creature in close combat. It can also be thrown.

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在一端用箭羽来稳定飞行，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Holy Water.name: 圣水 Holy Water
Holy Water.description:
启动 A 打击

这个小瓶中装有由一位仁慈神祇祝圣过的水。你通过将一瓶圣水作为一次打击投掷出去来启动它。它是一件简易投掷武器，射程增量为20英尺。

圣水造成1d6点精魂伤害和1点精魂溅射伤害。圣水只能伤害具有邪秽特征的生物。

Activate A Strike

This vial contains water blessed by a benevolent deity. You activate a vial of holy water by throwing it as a Strike. It's a simple thrown weapon with a range increment of 20 feet.

Holy water deals 1d6 spirit damage and 1 spirit splash damage. Holy water can damage only creatures with the unholy trait.

Worktables.name: 工作台 Worktables

Traveler's Any-Tool.name: 旅者万能工具 Traveler's Any-Tool
Traveler's Any-Tool.description:
在激活之前，这件物品看起来像是一根两端包钢的白蜡木短棍。

启动—轻敲 2（专注，操纵）

效果 你想象一件特定的简易工具，万用工具便会变形成它。（通常，你可以从《玩家核心》中装备部分列出的工具中选择。）这会将木制部分变形成任意柄杆，并将金属端帽变形成铲头、锤头或类似部件，从而能够构成大多数基础工具，但无法构成更复杂的东西。你可以用一个交互动作将该物品变回短棍形态。

Before it's activated, this item appears to be an ash rod capped with steel on either end.

Activate—Tap 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You imagine a specific simple tool, and the any-tool transforms into it. (Usually, you can choose from a tool listed in the gear from Player Core). This transforms the wooden portion into any haft and the metal caps into spades, hammer heads, or the like, allowing for most basic tools but nothing more complex. You can return the item to its rod form with an Interact action.

Repair Toolkit (Superb).name: 修理工具包（精良） Repair Toolkit (Superb)
Repair Toolkit (Superb).description:
修理工具包让你能够在旅行途中进行简单修理。它包含一个便携铁砧、钳子、木工工具、一块磨刀石，以及用于保养皮革和木材的油料。你可以使用修理工具包，通过手艺（技能）来修理物品。卓越修理工具包会为此次检定提供 +1 物品加值。你可以作为使用它的动作的一部分，取出并收回一套穿戴中的修理工具包。

A repair kit allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. It contains a portable anvil, tongs, woodworking tools, a whetstone, and oils for conditioning leather and wood. You can use a repair kit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. A superb repair kit gives you a +1 item bonus to the check. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Worktables.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{A16. 休息与维修站}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{A16. R&R (Rest & Repair) Station}

Alyzo Shardhelm.name: 艾里佐·夏德海姆 Alyzo Shardhelm
Alyzo Shardhelm.tokenName: 艾里佐·夏德海姆 Alyzo Shardhelm

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民的[[/act shove]]运动检定、攻击检定和伤害掷骰都获得 +1 环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Alyzo Shardhelm.publicNotes:
流浪四重奏成员艾里佐·夏德海姆（爱慕虚荣的男性人类创作歌手 1）、克雷希安·帕特塔普（冷漠的男性半身人主唱 1），以及姐弟克莱布（淘气的女性地精班卓琴手 1）和碧奇（冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1），在刷爪一家带着“不死正在入侵终焉之墙”的可怕警告抵达的那个夜晚，也一同在尤娅之望避难。此后六年间，聒噪四重奏的招牌旋律——将艾里佐带着滑稽怨气的歌词、克雷希安讥讽的演绎，以及克莱布和碧奇狂热的即兴发挥结合在一起——一直鼓舞着幸存者们的精神。尽管表演者们小心避免演奏得过于频繁，以免音乐将他们的位置暴露给地表上的不死，但每当聒噪四重奏首次演出他们的新歌时，其他幸存者都很享受那种所有人都能感受到的紧张释放。

The traveling quartet Alyzo Shardhelm (vain male human singer-songwriter 1), Crasian Pattertap (uncaring male halfling vocalist 1), and siblings Kleb (mischievous female goblin banjoist 1) and Bicky (impulsive female goblin percussionist 1) took shelter in Yua’s Hope the same night the Brushpaws arrived with their dire warning that undead were invading Lastwall. In the six years since, the Querulous Quartet’s signature melodies— which combine Alyzo’s humorously petulant lyrics, Crasian’s sardonic delivery, and Kleb and Bicky’s feverish improvising—have buoyed the survivors’ spirits. While the performers are careful not to play too often, lest the music betray their location to the undead aboveground, the other survivors enjoy the release of tension everyone feels when the Querulous Quartet premieres their newest song.
Alyzo Shardhelm.blurb:
虚荣的男性人类创作歌手
vain male human singer-songwriter
Alyzo Shardhelm.prototypeToken: 艾里佐·夏德海姆 Alyzo Shardhelm

Bicky.name: 碧奇 Bicky

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Bicky.publicNotes:
巡回演出的四人乐团——艾里佐·夏德海姆（虚荣的男性人类创作歌手 1）、克雷希安·帕特塔普（冷漠的男性半身人主唱 1），以及手足二人克莱布（爱恶作剧的女性地精班卓琴手 1）和碧奇（冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1）——在刷爪一家带着“不死正在入侵终焉之墙”的可怕警告抵达的那个夜晚，也同样在尤娅之望避难。在此后的六年里，聒噪四重奏的标志性旋律——将艾里佐那种滑稽又带着怨气的歌词、克雷希安讥诮的演绎，以及克莱布和碧奇狂热的即兴发挥结合在一起——一直鼓舞着幸存者们的精神。虽然表演者们小心地不让自己演出得过于频繁，以免音乐暴露他们的位置给地表上的不死，但每当聒噪四重奏首演他们的最新歌曲时，其他幸存者都很享受那种所有人都能感受到的紧张释放。

The traveling quartet Alyzo Shardhelm (vain male human singer-songwriter 1), Crasian Pattertap (uncaring male halfling vocalist 1), and siblings Kleb (mischievous female goblin banjoist 1) and Bicky (impulsive female goblin percussionist 1) took shelter in Yua’s Hope the same night the Brushpaws arrived with their dire warning that undead were invading Lastwall. In the six years since, the Querulous Quartet’s signature melodies— which combine Alyzo’s humorously petulant lyrics, Crasian’s sardonic delivery, and Kleb and Bicky’s feverish improvising—have buoyed the survivors’ spirits. While the performers are careful not to play too often, lest the music betray their location to the undead aboveground, the other survivors enjoy the release of tension everyone feels when the Querulous Quartet premieres their newest song.
Bicky.blurb:
冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1
impulsive female goblin percussionist 1

Constan Russi.name: 康斯坦·鲁西 Constan Russi

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，都会获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行当相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Constan Russi.publicNotes:
康斯坦·鲁西是一位虔诚的艾奥梅黛信徒，过去六年来一直向这些悲惨的幸存者布道，传递希望。他是个严肃而沉思的人，但也会向任何需要建议的人提供善意而睿智的忠告。幸存者们之所以能够继续活下去，全靠康斯坦用魔法变出的稀粥；而他在第一章开头的死亡打破了原有的平衡，迫使众人鼓起勇气面对死坟末土的危险。除了一名PC之外，所有人都不知道，康斯坦曾是前任猩红守护者纳勒斯·清泉爵士的副手；纳勒斯曾发誓要守护一件藏在尤娅之望的远古圣物。

A devout Iomedaean, Constan Russi has spent the last six years delivering sermons of hope to the forlorn survivors. He is a serious, contemplative man, but he offers kind wisdom to anyone in need of advice. The survivors owe their continued existence to Constan’s magically conjured gruel, and his death at the start of Chapter 1 destabilizes the status quo, forcing the group to brave the dangers of the Gravelands. Unbeknownst to all but a single PC, Constan was second to former Crimson Keeper Sir Nalleth Clearwater, who swore to defend an ancient relic hidden in Yua’s Hope.
Constan Russi.blurb:
艾奥梅黛的虔诚男性人类牧师
dedicated male human cleric of Iomedae

Crasian Pattertap.name: 克雷希安·帕特塔普 Crasian Pattertap
Crasian Pattertap.tokenName: 克雷希安·帕特塔普 Crasian Pattertap

Crasian Pattertap.publicNotes:
巡回演出的四人组合——艾里佐·夏德海姆（爱慕虚荣的男性人类创作歌手 1）、克雷希安·帕特塔普（冷漠的男性半身人主唱 1），以及兄妹二人克莱布（淘气的女性地精班卓琴手 1）和碧奇（冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1）——在刷爪一家带着“不死正在入侵终焉之墙”的可怕警告抵达的同一晚，也来到尤娅之望避难。此后六年间，聒噪四重奏的标志性旋律——将艾里佐那带着滑稽怨气的歌词、克雷希安讥诮的演绎，以及克莱布和碧奇狂热的即兴发挥结合在一起——一直鼓舞着幸存者们的精神。尽管这些表演者小心地不让自己演奏得过于频繁，以免音乐将他们的位置暴露给地上的不死，其他幸存者仍然享受着每当聒噪四重奏首演他们最新歌曲时，所有人所感受到的那种紧张释放。

The traveling quartet Alyzo Shardhelm (vain male human singer-songwriter 1), Crasian Pattertap (uncaring male halfling vocalist 1), and siblings Kleb (mischievous female goblin banjoist 1) and Bicky (impulsive female goblin percussionist 1) took shelter in Yua’s Hope the same night the Brushpaws arrived with their dire warning that undead were invading Lastwall. In the six years since, the Querulous Quartet’s signature melodies— which combine Alyzo’s humorously petulant lyrics, Crasian’s sardonic delivery, and Kleb and Bicky’s feverish improvising—have buoyed the survivors’ spirits. While the performers are careful not to play too often, lest the music betray their location to the undead aboveground, the other survivors enjoy the release of tension everyone feels when the Querulous Quartet premieres their newest song.

冷漠的男性半身人歌手
