Hurdauw Pulsoma.name: 赫朵·普索玛 Hurdauw Pulsoma

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Hurdauw Pulsoma.publicNotes:
尤娅之望的希望之息旅店前主厨赫朵·普索玛发现，她那个一无是处、还不忠的丈夫，竟打算在塔巴丰大军来袭的当晚和另一个男人私奔。没过多久，赫朵意识到自己怀孕了。六年过去，赫朵仍在艰难接受这样一个事实：她儿子吉斯托洛的父亲很可能已经死了。尽管她为人善良又勤奋，她那种紧张不安的情绪却常常会感染其他幸存者。所幸，康斯坦·鲁西一直都愿意耐心倾听赫朵的心事，而所有人都知道她爱上了那位牧师——除了康斯坦本人。

The former chef at the Hope’s Breath Inn in Yua’s Hope, Hurdauw Pulsoma, discovered her no-good, cheat of a husband had plans to run off with another man the same night Tar-Baphon’s forces attacked. Not long after, Hurdauw realized she was pregnant. Six years on, Hurdauw still grapples with the fact that the father of her son Jystolo is likely dead. Though she is a kind and hard-working individual, her nervous energy often rubs off on the other survivors. Thankfully, Constan Russi has always offered Hurdauw an understanding ear, and everyone knows she’s fallen for the priest—everyone except Constan, that is.
Hurdauw Pulsoma.blurb:
焦虑的人类女性厨师
anxious female human chef

Jono Brushpaw.name: 乔诺·刷爪 Jono Brushpaw

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Jono Brushpaw.publicNotes:
狐妖乔诺·刷爪和他的人生伴侣伊卢瓦自幼年起就在终焉之墙四处游历。当塔巴丰的军队抵达终焉之墙的海岸时，刷爪一家、他们那群淘气的孩子，以及雷茨诺夫，尽可能警告了许多聚居地，其中也包括尤娅之望。由于他们的勇敢，这些狐妖获准进入地穴中居住，而这一家人自那以后就一直在那里避难。后来，当人们意识到幸存者的补给很快就会耗尽时，刷爪一家决定尽可能多地维持狐狸形态，以减少食物消耗。如今，他们主要通过用爪子在泥土里划出图画，或挥动尾巴做出粗略的手语来交流。雷茨纳芙和雷茨诺夫进入地穴时10岁，最近正经历一段难以管束的青春期。

The kitsune Jono Brushpaw and his life partner Yiluva have ranged Lastwall since they were kits. When Tar-Baphon’s forces arrived on Lastwall’s shores, the Brushpaws and their rapscallion children and Retsnov warned as many settlements as they could, including Yua’s Hope. For their bravery, the kitsune were offered a place within the crypts, and the family has sheltered there ever since. When it became clear the survivors’ supplies would soon run out, the Brushpaws elected to spend as much time as possible in their fox forms, so as to consume less food. They now communicate primarily by pawing pictures in the dirt or waving their tails in a crude approximation of sign language. Retsnav and Retsnov were 10 years old when they entered the crypts and have recently been going through an unruly phase of adolescence.
Jono Brushpaw.blurb:
冷漠的男性狐妖游侠 1
aloof male kitsune ranger 1

Kleb.name: 克莱布 Kleb

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行当相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Kleb.publicNotes:
旅行乐团成员艾里佐·夏德海姆（爱慕虚荣的男性人类创作歌手 1）、克雷希安·帕特塔普（冷漠的男性半身人主唱 1），以及兄妹克莱布（淘气的女性地精班卓琴手 1）和碧奇（冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1），在刷爪一家带着“不死正在入侵终焉之墙”的可怕警告抵达的同一晚，也在尤娅之望避难。此后的六年间，聒噪四重奏的招牌旋律——将艾里佐幽默而带点怨怼的歌词、克雷希安讥诮的演绎，以及克莱布和碧奇狂热的即兴发挥结合在一起——振奋了幸存者们的精神。表演者们会小心避免演出得过于频繁，以免音乐将他们的位置暴露给地表上的不死，但每当聒噪四重奏首演他们的新歌时，其他幸存者都很享受那种让所有人都得以释放紧张情绪的时刻。

The traveling quartet Alyzo Shardhelm (vain male human singer-songwriter 1), Crasian Pattertap (uncaring male halfling vocalist 1), and siblings Kleb (mischievous female goblin banjoist 1) and Bicky (impulsive female goblin percussionist 1) took shelter in Yua’s Hope the same night the Brushpaws arrived with their dire warning that undead were invading Lastwall. In the six years since, the Querulous Quartet’s signature melodies— which combine Alyzo’s humorously petulant lyrics, Crasian’s sardonic delivery, and Kleb and Bicky’s feverish improvising—have buoyed the survivors’ spirits. While the performers are careful not to play too often, lest the music betray their location to the undead aboveground, the other survivors enjoy the release of tension everyone feels when the Querulous Quartet premieres their newest song.
Kleb.blurb:
顽皮的女性地精班卓琴手 1
mischievous female goblin banjoist 1

Marko Blightender.name: 马尔科·祛疫者 Marko Blightender
Marko Blightender.tokenName: 马尔科·祛疫者 Marko Blightender

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰时的运动检定获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Marko Blightender.publicNotes:
马尔科·祛疫者的两位母亲都是奥泽姆骑士团的成员；当塔巴丰的大军围攻终焉之墙时，她们正在外执行任务。所有人都认为她们凶多吉少，尽管马尔科仍怀着希望，相信总有一天他的母亲们会回来。马尔科躲进地穴时只有八岁，如今却像穿过鹅卵石路缝隙疯长的野草一般长个不停。他蔑视权威，总是很快提醒其他幸存者：他们不是他的父母。然而，马尔科的好斗很大程度上源于他的担忧——他正在越长越大，而他每吃一口，就意味着其他幸存者能分到的食物更少。

Both of Marko Blightender’s mothers were Knights of Ozem who were in the field when Tar-Baphon’s forces laid siege to Lastwall. Everyone assumes the worst for them, although Marko holds out hope that someday his mothers will return. Marko was only eight when he took shelter in the crypts and is now growing like a weed through the cracks of a cobblestone road. Defiant of authority, he’s quick to remind the other survivors that they aren’t his parents. Much of Marko’s belligerence, however, stems from his concerns that he’s growing larger, and every bite he takes means less food for his fellow survivors.
Marko Blightender.blurb:
阴郁的人类男性青少年
brooding male human teenager 0
Marko Blightender.prototypeToken: 马尔科·祛疫者 Marko Blightender

Power of the Mob.name: 暴民之力 Power of the Mob

当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰时的运动检定获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的学识） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Retsnav Brushpaw.publicNotes:
狐妖乔诺·刷爪和他的人生伴侣伊卢瓦自幼时起就在终焉之墙各地游历。当塔巴丰的军队抵达终焉之墙的海岸时，刷爪一家、他们那几个淘气捣蛋的孩子，以及雷茨诺夫，尽可能向更多聚居地发出了警告，其中包括尤娅之望。由于他们的英勇，这些狐妖获准进入地穴中安身，此后这一家人便一直在那里避难。当幸存者们的补给显然很快就会耗尽时，刷爪一家决定尽可能多地保持狐狸形态，以减少食物消耗。如今，他们主要通过用爪子在泥土上拨画图案，或摇动尾巴，以粗陋模仿手语的方式来交流。雷茨纳芙和雷茨诺夫进入地穴时10岁，最近正经历一段躁动不安的青春期。

The kitsune Jono Brushpaw and his life partner Yiluva have ranged Lastwall since they were kits. When Tar-Baphon’s forces arrived on Lastwall’s shores, the Brushpaws and their rapscallion children and Retsnov warned as many settlements as they could, including Yua’s Hope. For their bravery, the kitsune were offered a place within the crypts, and the family has sheltered there ever since. When it became clear the survivors’ supplies would soon run out, the Brushpaws elected to spend as much time as possible in their fox forms, so as to consume less food. They now communicate primarily by pawing pictures in the dirt or waving their tails in a crude approximation of sign language. Retsnav and Retsnov were 10 years old when they entered the crypts and have recently been going through an unruly phase of adolescence.
Retsnav Brushpaw.blurb:
害羞的狐妖女性游牧民
shy female kitsune nomad
Retsnav Brushpaw.prototypeToken: 雷茨纳芙·刷爪一家 Retsnav Brushpaw

When it became clear the survivors’ supplies would soon run out, the Brushpaws elected to spend as much time as possible in their fox forms, so as to consume less food. Rokvel Hardbrow.name: 罗克维尔·硬眉 Rokvel Hardbrow
Rokvel Hardbrow.tokenName: 罗克维尔·硬眉 Rokvel Hardbrow

当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，获得+1环境加值。

Rokvel Hardbrow.publicNotes:
在默语暴君到来之前，罗克维尔·硬眉是尤娅之望的常驻铁匠，专门为十字军骑士制作胸甲。在所有幸存者中，罗克维尔对地下生活最不在意，但多年不见天日、除了自我反思之外几乎无事可做的岁月，让罗克维尔意识到自己是一名女性。“Rokvel”在矮人语中是一个中性名字，所以她决定继续使用它。她喜欢逻辑谜题，但对那些不愿意（或不能）做好自己分内之事的人几乎没有耐心。

Before the arrival of the Whispering Tyrant, Rokvel Hardbrow was Yua’s Hope’s resident blacksmith, specializing in the crafting of breastplates for crusading knights. Of all the survivors, Rokvel is the least concerned with living underground, but lightless years with little to do but self-reflect resulted in Rokvel realizing she was a woman. “Rokvel” is a gender- neutral name in Dwarven, so she decided to keep it. She enjoys logic puzzles but has little patience for those who don’t (or can’t) carry their own weight.
Rokvel Hardbrow.blurb:
沉思的女性矮人铁匠
contemplative female dwarf blacksmith
Rokvel Hardbrow.prototypeToken: 罗克维尔·硬眉 Rokvel Hardbrow

Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽 Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这个白银圣徽上饰有代表女神艾奥梅黛的图像。一些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以持握。

This silver symbol is emblazoned with an image representing the goddess Iomedae. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Skeleton Key.name: 骷髅钥匙 Skeleton Key
Skeleton Key.description:
这把阴森可怖的钥匙前端顶着一颗咧嘴而笑的头骨。尝试开锁时，这把钥匙可以代替盗贼工具包使用，并为盗贼检定提供 +1 物品加值。

如果骷髅钥匙因该检定大失败而损坏，则它会像普通盗贼工具包一样运作，并失去其增益，直到被修复。

启动—松动锁具 F (操作)

频率 每天一次

触发 你尝试开锁，但尚未掷骰

效果 这把钥匙对你正试图撬开的锁施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock}。

A grinning skull tops the bow of this macabre key. This key can be used in place of thieves' toolkit when attempting to Pick a Lock, and it grants a +1 item bonus to the Thievery check.

If the skeleton key becomes broken due to a critical failure on the check, it works as normal thieves' toolkit and loses its benefits until repaired.

Activate—Loosen Lock F (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Trigger You attempt to Pick a Lock but haven't rolled yet

Effect The key casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock} on the lock you're trying to pick.

Wayfinder.name: 寻路仪 Wayfinder
Wayfinder.description:
许可 开拓者协会成员

这枚小巧的罗盘重新利用了古代科技，从被称为灵子石的神秘魔法物品中汲取奇异力量。它既是开拓者协会特工的身份徽记，也是各类冒险者之间的身份象征。一枚寻路仪可作为罗盘使用。

寻路仪中央的凹槽可以容纳一枚灵子石。将一枚灵子石放入该凹槽后，你会获得如同该灵子石环绕你头部时的全部好处，但它也能让这枚石头更不容易被注意到或被偷走。你会同时对寻路仪及其中的灵子石进行注入，它们在你的注入上限中仅计为一件物品。镶嵌在寻路仪中的已注入灵子石还会赋予其共鸣力量。

如果你在同一时间身上携带超过一枚装有已注入灵子石的寻路仪，它们共鸣产生的破坏性干扰会使你无法从其中任何一枚获得好处。你仍然可以从额外环绕你头部的灵子石中受益，只是不能是装在寻路仪里的。

启动——光亮术 A （专注）

效果 该寻路仪成为一个1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮术} 法术的目标。

Access member of the Pathfinder Society

This compact compass repurposes ancient technology to draw fantastic powers from the mysterious magical items called aeon stones. It serves as a badge of office for agents of the Pathfinder Society and as a status symbol among adventurers of any stripe. A wayfinder functions as a compass.

An indentation in the middle of the wayfinder can hold a single aeon stone. Placing an aeon stone in this indentation provides you all the benefits of having the aeon stone orbiting your head, but it protects the stone from being noticed or stolen as easily. You invest a wayfinder and the aeon stone within it simultaneously, and they count as only one item toward your investiture limit. An invested aeon stone slotted in a wayfinder also grants its resonant power.

If you have more than one wayfinder with an invested aeon stone on your person at a given time, destructive interference from their resonance prevents you from gaining benefits from any of them. You can still benefit from additional aeon stones orbiting your head, just not in wayfinders.

Activate—Light A (concentrate)

Effect The wayfinder is targeted by a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} spell.

Diplomat's Badge.name: 外交官徽章 Diplomat's Badge
Diplomat's Badge.description:
当这枚黄铜徽章被显眼地展示出来时，会让生物觉得你更易于亲近。你获得外交检定的 +1 物品加值。

启动—外交官风范 A （专注）

频率 每天一次

效果 尝试进行一次 DC 20 的检定，以回忆知识，了解关于某种人类民族、非人族裔，或其他某类生物的信息。（由 GM 决定你有哪些选项。）如果你成功，则在当天剩余时间内，这枚徽章的加值提升为 +2，适用于你对该群体生物进行的外交检定。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.pAMyEbJzWBoYoGhs]{Effect: Diplomat's Badge}

When displayed prominently, this brass badge makes creatures find you more agreeable. You gain a +1 item bonus to Diplomacy checks.

Activate—Diplomat's Bearing A (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect Attempt a DC 20 check to Recall Knowledge about people of a human ethnicity, a non-human ancestry, or some other type of creature. (The GM determines what your options are.) If you succeed, the badge's bonus increases to +2 for Diplomacy checks with creatures of that group for the rest of the day.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.pAMyEbJzWBoYoGhs]{Effect: Diplomat's Badge}

Fort Ozem Command Guide.name: 奥泽姆要塞指挥手册 Fort Ozem Command Guide
Fort Ozem Command Guide.description:
这本皮面装订的书是用密码写成的。

This leather-bound book is written in code.

Commander's Desk.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.speHG2AX4JoOgIzt]{A17. 指挥官寝室}
