Commander's Trunk.name: 指挥官的箱子 Commander's Trunk
Commander's Trunk.tokenName: 指挥官的大箱子 Commander's Trunk

Small Pouch of Gems.name: 小袋宝石 Small Pouch of Gems

Explorer's Clothing.name: 探索者服装 Explorer's Clothing
Explorer's Clothing.description:
不穿护甲的冒险者会穿着耐用的衣物旅行。虽然这不是护甲，并且使用你的无甲防御熟练度，但它仍然具有敏捷上限，并且如果刻有强效符文，仍然可以给予 AC 一个物品加值。

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Bedroll.name: 铺盖卷 Bedroll
Bedroll.description:
一张卷起的床铺。

A rolled up bed.

Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》 Acts of Iomedae
Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教文本，描述了凡人艾奥梅黛在升格为神祇之前所完成的十一项功业。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Commander's Trunk.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.speHG2AX4JoOgIzt]{A17. 指挥官寝室}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.speHG2AX4JoOgIzt]{A17. Commander's Quarters}
Commander's Trunk.prototypeToken: 指挥官的行李箱 Commander's Trunk

Fashionable Priest's Trunk.name: 时髦牧师的衣箱 Fashionable Priest's Trunk
Fashionable Priest's Trunk.tokenName: 时髦牧师的箱子 Fashionable Priest's Trunk

Cloister Robe (Lesser).name: 修院长袍（次等） Cloister Robe (Lesser)
Cloister Robe (Lesser).description:
最为虔诚、深居简出的牧师会穿着隐修长袍。长袍上饰有象征特定神祇的装饰，而长袍的颜色与制作的繁复程度也与该神祇的理念相符。这件长袍可作为该神祇的宗教圣徽，无需持用也能提供这一益处。

这件长袍是+1 强韧探索者服装，并使你获得宗教检定的 +1 物品加值。若穿戴者并不信奉与这件长袍绑定的神祇，则长袍不会给予其任何益处。此外，当你施放一个来自该神祇某个领域的领域法术时，直到你下个回合结束前，你获得对神术法术伤害的抗力。该抗力等于长袍等级的一半。

制作需求 你是一名信奉与这件长袍绑定之神祇的牧师。

The most devoted, cloistered clerics wear a cloister robe. Decorations symbolic of a specific deity adorn the robe, and the robe's colors and the complexity of its construction fit the deity's outlook. The robe serves as a religious symbol of that deity, and it doesn't need to be wielded to provide that benefit.

The robe is +1 resilient explorer's clothing and grants a +1 item bonus to Religion checks. The robe doesn't grant any benefits to a wearer who doesn't worship the deity tied to the robe. In addition, when you cast a domain spell from one of the deity's domains, you gain resistance to damage from divine spells until the end of your next turn. This resistance is equal to half the robe's level.

Craft Requirements You are a cleric who worships the deity tied to the robe.

Fashionable Priest's Trunk.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{A18. 圣洁军营}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{A18. Holy Barracks}
Fashionable Priest's Trunk.prototypeToken: 时髦牧师的箱子 Fashionable Priest's Trunk

Iomedae's Table.name: 艾奥梅黛的桌子 Iomedae's Table
Iomedae's Table.tokenName: 艾奥梅黛的桌子 Iomedae's Table

False Heart's Edge.name: 伪心之刃 False Heart's Edge
False Heart's Edge.description:
长剑，也称为武装剑，可以是单刃剑或双刃剑。它们的剑刃沉重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

这把长剑被打造得与心之刃——艾奥梅黛的长剑——相似，并被附魔得看起来像一件6级魔法物品。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

This longsword was crafted to resemble Heart's Edge, Iomedae's longsword, and has been enchanted to appear as a level 6 magic item.

False Chalice of Ozem.name: 伪造的奥泽姆圣杯 False Chalice of Ozem
False Chalice of Ozem.description:
这个奥泽姆圣杯的仿制品被施加了魔法，使其显现为一件6级魔法物品。

This recreation of the Chalice of Ozem has been enchanted to appear as a level 6 magic item.

Iomedae's Table.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{A20. 艾奥梅黛之憩}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{A20. Iomedae's Rest}
Iomedae's Table.prototypeToken: 艾奥梅黛之桌 Iomedae's Table

Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus.name: 伊尔加尔·涅玛斯的石棺 Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus
Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus.tokenName: 伊尔加尔·涅玛斯的石棺 Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus
Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.gR50iXYjU5EVzEDh]{B7. 涅玛萨斯之傲}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.gR50iXYjU5EVzEDh]{B7. Nirmathas's Pride}
Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus.prototypeToken: 伊尔加尔·涅玛斯的石棺 Irgal Nirmath's Sarcophagus

Mirmicettes' Treasure.name: 觅宝精的宝藏 Mirmicettes' Treasure
Mirmicettes' Treasure.tokenName: 觅宝精的宝藏 Mirmicettes' Treasure

Thurible of Revelation (Moderate).name: 启示香炉（中等） Thurible of Revelation (Moderate)
Thurible of Revelation (Moderate).description:
这个黄铜香炉悬挂在一段链条上。大多数启示香炉都饰有盘旋的天界语文字，不过有些则由铁制成，并带有炼狱语或冥界语文字。

启动—焚香 2（操纵）

消耗 价值至少 5 gp 的香

效果 你点燃香炉中的香，它会燃烧 1 小时。在这段时间内，只要你持握着香炉，你便获得宗教检定的 +2 物品加值，且当你对宗教性质的文书进行解译文书时，任何你掷出的严重失败都会改为失败。

每天一次，当你启动香炉时，你可以增强其启示。在此次启动期间，你可以用一个交互动作将香炉举到眼前，通过烟雾窥视，从而获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{见不可见} 的效果，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lO95TwgihBdTilAB]{效果：启示香炉}

This brass censer dangles on a length of chain. Most thuribles of revelation are adorned with swirling Empyrean text, though some are iron and feature Diabolic or Chthonian text.

Activate—Burn Incense 2 (manipulate)

Cost incense worth at least 5 gp

Effect You light the incense inside the censer, and it burns for 1 hour. During that time, as long you are holding the thurible, you gain a +2 item bonus to Religion checks, and any critical failure you roll when you Decipher Writing of a religious nature is a failure instead.

Once per day, when you activate the thurible, you can increase its revelations. During that activation, you can hold the thurible up to your eyes with an Interact action to gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} for 1 round by peering through the smoke.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lO95TwgihBdTilAB]{Effect: Thurible of Revelation}

Assorted Grave Goods.name: 各式各样的陪葬品 Assorted Grave Goods

Mirmicettes' Treasure.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{B6. 积水墓室}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{B6. Watery Grave}
Mirmicettes' Treasure.prototypeToken: 觅宝精的宝藏 Mirmicettes' Treasure

Chalice of Ozem.name: 奥泽姆圣杯 Chalice of Ozem
Chalice of Ozem.description:
这只镶嵌红宝石的晨银圣杯不会被其所盛装的任何物质损坏，无论其腐蚀性有多强。此外，置于奥泽姆圣杯中的液体绝不会洒出，除非其携带者选择这么做（以一个具有专注特征的单动作）。

启动—艾奥梅黛的祝福 2 （专注，操作）

频率 每小时一次

效果 你持握圣杯并呼唤艾奥梅黛之名。圣杯施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JOdOpbPDl7nqvJUm]{解除结界}，其反制检定具有 [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} 调整值。

毁坏 若奥泽姆圣杯中盛满艾奥梅黛之血，且阿拉兹尼从中饮用，它便会粉碎。

This ruby-studded dawnsilver chalice can't be harmed by any substance it holds, no matter how caustic. Furthermore, liquid placed within the Chalice of Ozem never spills unless its carrier chooses to do so (using a single action with the concentrate trait).

Activate—Iomedae's Blessing 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You hold the chalice and call out Iomedae's name. The chalice casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JOdOpbPDl7nqvJUm]{Dispelling Globe} with a [[/r 1d20+19 #Counteract]]{+19} modifier to its counteract check.

Destruction If the Chalice of Ozem is filled with Iomedae's blood and Arazni drinks from it, it shatters.

Wand of Shatter (Rank 4).name: 粉碎术魔杖（4环） Wand of Shatter (Rank 4)
Wand of Shatter (Rank 4).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1xbFBQDRs0hT5xZ9]{粉碎术}

这根短杖约有一英尺长，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中储存的法术有关。

启动 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加过载

效果 你以标示的环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次以所列环阶施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入一名 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1xbFBQDRs0hT5xZ9]{Shatter}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Iron Medallion.name: 铁质徽章 Iron Medallion
Iron Medallion.description:
启动 F（专注）

触发 你尝试对一个恐惧效果进行意志豁免，但尚未掷骰

这枚小型徽章被制成护盾形状。当你启动它时，你获得对该触发豁免以及其他对抗恐惧的豁免的 +2 状态加值，持续 1 分钟。对于该触发豁免，如果你的掷骰结果为失败，则改为成功。如果结果为大失败，则改为失败。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xV9rME2l1f10mnF9]{效果：铁制徽章}

Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger You attempt a Will save against a fear effect but haven't rolled yet

This small medallion is shaped like a shield. When you activate it, you gain a +2 status bonus to the triggering save and other saves against fear for 1 minute. On the triggering save, if the outcome of your roll is a failure, you get a success instead. If the outcome is a critical failure, you get a failure instead.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xV9rME2l1f10mnF9]{Effect: Iron Medallion}

Medals, Jewelry, and Other Grave Goods.name: 勋章、珠宝及其他随葬品 Medals, Jewelry, and Other Grave Goods

Thurible of Revelation (Moderate).name: 启示香炉（中阶） Thurible of Revelation (Moderate)
Thurible of Revelation (Moderate).description:
这个黄铜香炉悬挂在一段链条上。大多数启示香炉都饰有旋绕的天界语文字，不过也有一些是铁制的，并刻有炼狱语或冥界语文字。

启动—焚香 2 (manipulate)

消耗 至少价值 5 gp 的香

效果 你点燃香炉内的香，它会燃烧 1 小时。在此期间，只要你正持握着该香炉，你获得宗教检定 +2 物品加值，并且当你解译具有宗教性质的文书时，任何你掷出的“大失败”都改为失败。

每天一次，当你启动该香炉时，你可以增强它的启示。在此次启动期间，你可以用一个交互动作将香炉举到眼前，透过烟雾窥视，以获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{见不可见} 的效果，持续 1 轮。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lO95TwgihBdTilAB]{效果：启示香炉}

This brass censer dangles on a length of chain. Most thuribles of revelation are adorned with swirling Empyrean text, though some are iron and feature Diabolic or Chthonian text.

Activate—Burn Incense 2 (manipulate)

Cost incense worth at least 5 gp

Effect You light the incense inside the censer, and it burns for 1 hour. During that time, as long you are holding the thurible, you gain a +2 item bonus to Religion checks, and any critical failure you roll when you Decipher Writing of a religious nature is a failure instead.

Once per day, when you activate the thurible, you can increase its revelations. During that activation, you can hold the thurible up to your eyes with an Interact action to gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} for 1 round by peering through the smoke.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lO95TwgihBdTilAB]{Effect: Thurible of Revelation}

Training Room.name: 训练室 Training Room

Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》 Acts of Iomedae
Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教典籍，描述了凡人艾奥梅黛在升格为神明之前所完成的十一项功绩。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Knight's Training Journal.name: 骑士的训练日志 Knight's Training Journal
Knight's Training Journal.description:
一位骑士勤勉训练方案的记录。他曾如此努力地磨炼自己的技艺，只为成为终焉之墙的救世者之一。

而你却剥夺了他们的那个未来。

你这怪物。

A knight's record of their diligent training regimen. They worked so hard to hone their skills, to become one of Lastwall's saviors.

You have denied them that future.

You monster.

Longsword.name: 长剑 Longsword
Longsword.description:
长剑，也被称为武装剑，既可以是单刃剑，也可以是双刃剑。它们的剑身厚重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

Shortsword.name: 短剑 Shortsword
Shortsword.description:
这些刀刃有各种各样的形状和样式，但通常长 2 英尺。

These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Scimitar.name: 弯刀 Scimitar
Scimitar.description:
这把单手弯刃的一侧开锋。

This one-handed curved blade is sharp on one side.

Greatsword.name: 巨剑 Greatsword
Greatsword.description:
这把巨大的双手剑几乎和其持用者一样高。它的下半段剑刃通常会略微磨钝，以便在近身搏斗中握持，从而获得额外的杠杆力。

This immense two-handed sword is nearly as tall as its wielder. Its lower blade is often somewhat dulled to allow it to be gripped for extra leverage in close-quarter fights.

Training Room.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.p5zkTjxPjgJDtHL2]{A19. 艾奥梅黛之刃}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.p5zkTjxPjgJDtHL2]{A19. Iomedae's Blades}

Well-Read Priest's Trunk.name: 博学牧师的箱子 Well-Read Priest's Trunk
Well-Read Priest's Trunk.tokenName: 博闻祭司的箱子 Well-Read Priest's Trunk

Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》插图本 Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae
Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教文本，描述了凡人艾奥梅黛在升格为神祇之前所完成的十一项功业。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Well-Read Priest's Trunk.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{A18. 圣洁军营}

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{A18. Holy Barracks}
Well-Read Priest's Trunk.prototypeToken: 博闻祭司的箱子 Well-Read Priest's Trunk

Banshee.name: 报丧女妖 Banshee

Hears Heartbeats.name: 听见心跳 Hears Heartbeats
Hears Heartbeats.description:
报丧女妖可以在其60尺内听见心跳，作为一种模糊感官。

The banshee can hear heartbeats within 60 feet of it as an imprecise sense.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光失能 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
处于阳光下的报丧女妖陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

A banshee in sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Spectral Ripple.name: 幽影涟漪 Spectral Ripple
Spectral Ripple.description:
当一只报丧女妖大步移动至少10尺时，直到其下一回合开始前，它都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

When a banshee Strides at least 10 feet, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} until the start of their next turn.

Terrifying Touch.name: 恐怖之触 Terrifying Touch
Terrifying Touch.description:
被报丧女妖的接触伤害且尚未处于恐慌状态的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:38] 意志豁免（如果此次攻击是大成功命中，则为 @Check[will|dc:43]）。如果该生物豁免失败，则其陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}；若大失败，该生物还会因恐惧而蜷缩，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}。如果该生物受到法术或魔法物品对恐惧的防护，报丧女妖的接触会先尝试反制该防护效果，其效果如同一个 9环的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{解除魔法}法术。

A creature damaged by the banshee's touch that isn't already frightened must attempt a @Check[will|dc:38] save (@Check[will|dc:43] if the attack was a critical hit). If the creature fails its save, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}; on a critical failure, the creature also cowers with fear and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}. If the creature is protected against fear by a spell or magic item, the banshee's touch first attempts to counteract the protection effect, with the effect of a 9th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} spell.

Vengeful Spite.name: 复仇怨恨 Vengeful Spite
Vengeful Spite.description:
触发 一名敌人对报丧女妖造成重击，或报丧女妖对抗敌人造成伤害的效果的豁免大失败

效果 报丧女妖向折磨自己的敌人猛烈反击，造成 @Damage[(4d10+14)[mental]] 伤害，进行一次 @Check[will|dc:38|basic] 豁免，并根据同一次意志豁免的结果施加恐怖之触的效果。

Trigger A foe critically hits the banshee, or the banshee critically fails their save against a foe's damaging effect

Effect The banshee lashes back at their tormentor, dealing @Damage[(4d10+14)[mental]] damage with a @Check[will|dc:38|basic] save and applying the effects of terrifying touch based on the results of the same Will save.

Wail.name: 哀嚎 Wail
Wail.description:
报丧女妖释放出令人灵魂冻结的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FEsuyf203wTNE2et]{受诅者哀嚎}（@Check[fortitude|dc:38|traits:void|options:damaging-effect,item:type:spell]，@Damage[8d10[void]]）。此次哀嚎能克服5环及以下的沉默和类似效果。报丧女妖也可以改为以一个三动作行动使用哀嚎，以克服最高至8环的此类效果。

报丧女妖的哀嚎会共鸣持续1轮，在此期间，任何进入该区域的生物都必须尝试对抗该效果的豁免。同一个生物不会受到同一次哀嚎影响超过一次。报丧女妖在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Wail]] 轮内无法再次哀嚎。

The banshee unleashes a soul-chilling @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FEsuyf203wTNE2et]{Wails of the Damned} (@Check[fortitude|dc:38|traits:void|options:damaging-effect,item:type:spell], @Damage[8d10[void]]). This Wail overcomes silence and similar effects of 5th rank or lower. The banshee can instead use Wail as a three-action activity to overcome such effects of up to 8th rank.

The banshee's Wail resonates for 1 round, and any creature that comes within the area during that time must attempt a save against the effect. A creature can't be affected more than once by the same Wail. The banshee can't Wail again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Wail]] rounds.

Banshee.publicNotes:
报丧女妖是那些被背叛束缚于世间、而那场背叛定义了其生命最后时光之人的狂怒而痛苦的灵魂。有些报丧女妖源自被信任的朋友与盟友所杀之人，或是在临终之际遭至爱背叛之人。另一些则诞生于那些死前不久犯下背信之举、从而在灵魂上留下污痕之人。无论其起源如何，报丧女妖都憎恨生者。这种对生命的憎恨，往往是她们生前人格的一种可怖倒转。有人推测，一个人生前越是善良（而遭受的背叛越是令人撕心裂肺），其化为的报丧女妖就越是残忍。

报丧女妖很少远离自己的殒命之地，通常作祟于茂密森林与林冠遮蔽的沼泽，在那里，几乎没有多少光照能够洒落地面。许多报丧女妖生前是精灵，在精灵国度奇奥尼中便能发现她们的踪迹，尤其是在恶魔毁木者的邪恶领地——扭曲棘林。类似地，在阿维斯坦北部的冰封荒原中，也潜伏着大量报丧女妖；她们源于一场残酷而广泛、距今已有数百年之久的背叛。

Banshees are the furious, tormented souls of those bound to the world by a betrayal that defined the final hours of their lives. Some banshees arise from those who were slain by trusted friends and allies, or whose loved ones betrayed them on their deathbeds. Others spawn from those whose treacherous deeds shortly before their deaths left a stain upon their souls. Regardless of their origin, banshees despise the living. This hatred of life is all too often a horrific inversion of their personalities in life. Some speculate that the more kind-hearted the person (and the more wrenching the betrayal), the crueler the banshee.

Banshees rarely stray far from where they perished and typically haunt thick forests and canopied swamps where little light graces the ground. Many banshees are elves and can be found in the elven nation of Kyonin, specifically in Tanglebriar, the sinister domain of the demon Treerazer. Similarly, a large number of banshees can be found lurking in the frozen wastes in northern Avistan, created from a cruel and widespread betrayal that is centuries old.

Lesser Death.name: 次级死神 Lesser Death

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Truesight (Constant).name: 真知视界（恒定） Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description:
你能看见60尺内事物的真实样貌。GM对区域内任何幻觉、拟态或变化效果进行一次秘密反制检定，但仅用于判定你是否能看穿它（例如，如果该检定成功反制一个变化法术，你就能看见该生物的真实形态，但不会终止该变化法术）。

You see things within 60 feet as they actually are. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion, morph or polymorph effect in the area, but only for the purpose of determining whether you see through it (for instance, if the check succeeds against a polymorph spell, you can see the creature's true form, but you don't end the polymorph spell).

See the Unseen (Constant).name: 见不可见（恒定） See the Unseen (Constant)
See the Unseen (Constant).description:
你的目光能穿透幻觉，发现@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}的生物与精魂。你可以看见隐形生物，仿佛它们并未隐形，尽管它们的特征会显得模糊，使它们处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态且难以辨认。你还可以看见虚体生物，例如幽灵，在距离某个物体表面10尺以内时，透过该物体所见的、穿过其中的模糊形体。更细微的线索还会使你进行识破幻觉的检定时获得+2状态加值。

高阶化（5环） 该法术的持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：见不可见}

Your gaze pierces through illusions and finds @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and spirits. You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You can also see incorporeal creatures, like ghosts, phased through an object from within 10 feet of an object's surface as blurry shapes seen through those objects. Subtler clues also grant you a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Heightened (5th) This spell has a duration of 8 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{Spell Effect: See the Unseen}

Scythe.name: 长柄镰刀 Scythe
Scythe.description:
这种武器源自一种用于割倒高大谷物与禾本科作物的农具，具有一根带有突出握柄的长木柄，末端装有一片呈直角安装的弯曲刀刃。

Derived from a farming tool used to mow down long grains and cereals, this weapon has a long wooden shaft with protruding handles, capped with a curved blade set at a right angle.

Spell Effect: See the Unseen.name: 法术效果：见不可见 Spell Effect: See the Unseen
Spell Effect: See the Unseen.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{见不可见} 赋予

你可以看见隐形的生物，如同它们并未隐形一般，尽管它们的特征仍然模糊，使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态且难以辨认。你在进行识破幻觉的检定时，还会获得 +2 状态加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen}

You can see invisible creatures as though they weren't invisible, although their features are blurred, making them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} and difficult to identify. You also gain a +2 status bonus to checks you make to disbelieve illusions.

Death's Grace.name: 死亡之恩泽 Death's Grace
Death's Grace.description:
次级死神可以选择它是否因对不死有不同影响的效果而被视为不死。即使它不被视为不死，次级死神仍然永远不会被视为活着的生物。

The lesser death can choose whether or not it counts as undead for effects that affect undead differently. Even if it does not count as undead, the lesser death still never counts as a living creature.

Status Sight.name: 状态视觉 Status Sight
Status Sight.description:
次级死神会自动知晓其所能看见的所有生物的生命值、状态、苦难和情绪。

The Lesser Death automatically knows the Hit Points, conditions, afflictions, and emotions of all creatures it can see.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Aura of Misfortune.name: 厄运灵光 Aura of Misfortune
Aura of Misfortune.description:
20尺。

灵气内的活体生物在所有 d20 掷骰时必须掷两次，并使用较低的结果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.QoneHsjZKtGHWlam]{效果：厄运灵气}

20 feet.

Living creatures in the aura must roll twice on all d20 rolls and use the lower result.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.QoneHsjZKtGHWlam]{Effect: Aura of Misfortune}

Lurking Death.name: 潜伏之死 Lurking Death
Lurking Death.description:
触发 60尺内的一个生物进行一次远程攻击，或使用一个具有专注、操作或移动特征的动作

效果 次级死神传送术至与触发生物相邻的一个方格，并对其进行一次近战打击。若此次打击命中，次级死神打断该触发动作。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet makes a ranged attack or uses an action that has the concentrate, manipulate, or move trait

Effect The lesser death teleports to a square adjacent to the triggering creature and makes a melee Strike against it. If the Strike hits, the lesser death disrupts the triggering action.

Void Healing.name: 虚无治疗 Void Healing
Void Healing.description:
次级死神可以选择是否承受活力伤害。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

A lesser death can choose whether or not it takes vitality damage.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.NegativeHealing]

Infuse Weapon.name: 灌注武器 Infuse Weapon
Infuse Weapon.description:
任何长柄镰都获得灵巧特征、无法被缴械，并且在次级死神持握它时变为+2 高等强击 锐锋长柄镰。

Any scythe gains the agile trait, can't be disarmed, and becomes a +2 greater striking keen scythe while the lesser death wields it.

Lesser Death.publicNotes:
无人确切知晓次级死神究竟是什么，尽管有人声称它们是死神的化身。可与那位诡异的猎手不同，次级死神偶尔会成群结队地狩猎。更多时候，它们会从受诅咒的魔法物品中显现。还有些时候，它们只是死亡的执行者，以与死神相同的方式进行猎杀——悄无声息，毫无怜悯，也绝不留情。极少数情况下，多个次级死神会协同清剿大规模族群，它们的镰刀扫过人群，令整座城市都失去生机，并引发关于多个死神出现的谣言——但愿那只是谣言。

死神是死亡冷酷无情的化身。它如坟墓般沉默，如时代本身般无可避免；这位传奇存在会追猎并终结那些逃避死亡太久的生物。有时，死神毫无预警地降临；有时，它则是来完成其他生物未能完成的工作。死神不侍奉任何神祇、邪魔或执象者。它既遭灵魂引路使憎恶，也令天界生物畏惧，但几乎没有谁——即便真的有——胆敢挡在它面前。它如同某种永恒的瘟疫，会杀死那些试图将多元宇宙从它的存在中治愈的人。它孑然独立，只听从自己的意志；一旦死神逼近猎物，无论凡人还是不朽者的哀求与说理，都如对聋者低语。它自身的理由对凡人之耳始终沉默，对凡人之心更是不可解读；但无论缘由为何，结果都不屈而终绝。

尽管有些传说认为，每个人临死前都会见到死神现身，但真相要可怕得多。此类守望实际上属于灵魂引路使的职责范围——他们是一支不朽族类，肩负着在来世中保护凡人灵魂并引导其前行的责任。死神对保护灵魂或引导灵魂几乎毫无兴趣。相反，它受驱于源自阿巴顿永夜国度中的邪恶意志；启示录天启骑士便统治着那里。事实上，死神与死亡天启骑士卡戎在外形与形貌上有许多相似之处，但从无任何记载显示这两个强大实体曾联手行动。相反，死神更像是阿巴顿本身的一种显现，因此有人相信它是那位神秘“第一骑士”的化身。死神降临某个世界时，并非作为慈悲的天使而来，而是作为无情收割生命的猎者而来。那些倒在死神之下的人，与其说是命中注定该死，不如说是被选中、被追猎、被谋杀。

围绕死神最骇人的传说，或许在于它是否真是一个单独实体；因为有人相信，浩瀚众界中存在不止一位死神。这些低语讲述着一个至少由九个此类生物组成的密会，它们潜行于现实之间，作为真正熵灭的难解仆从，持续清剿生者。依照某些死亡教团的教义，死神的最终目标是终结整个生死循环，并成为空无宇宙中沉默的主宰。

No one is quite sure what lesser deaths are, though some claim that they are avatars of the Grim Reaper. Unlike that strange hunter, however, lesser deaths hunt in packs on rare occasions. More often than not, they manifest from cursed magic items. Other times, they are just the enactors of death, hunting in the same way the Grim Reaper does—silently, with no remorse or quarter. Rarely, multiple lesser deaths work together to cull a large population, their scythes cutting through crowds and leaving entire cities devoid of life, inspiring (hopefully) false rumors of multiple Grim Reapers.

The Grim Reaper is the unflinching personification of death. Silent as the grave and as inevitable as time itself, this legendary being hunts down and finishes creatures that have evaded death for far too long. Sometimes the Grim Reaper comes without warning, while at others it comes to finish the work that other creatures could not. The Grim Reaper serves no god, fiend, or aeon. It is both despised and feared by psychopomps and celestials, but few-if any-dare to stand in its way. Like some eternal plague, it kills those who try to cure the multiverse of its presence. It stands alone and holds only its own council, and the pleading and reasoning of mortals and immortals alike fall on deaf ears once the Grim Reaper closes on its quarry. Its own reasoning is silent to mortal ears and inscrutable to the mortal mind, but no matter the reason, the result is unyielding and final.

While some legends hold that the Grim Reaper appears before everyone as they die, the truth is quite a bit more disturbing. Such vigils in fact lie within the providence of the psychopomps, a race of immortals charged with the protection and guidance of mortal souls through the afterlife. The Grim Reaper has little interest in protecting souls or guiding them. It is instead compelled by sinister agendas arising within the nighted realm of Abaddon, where the Horsemen of the Apocalypse rule. Indeed there are many similarities in shape and form between the Grim Reaper and Charon, the Horseman of Death, but no recorded instance exists of these two powerful entities working together. Instead, the Grim Reaper serves as something of a manifestation of Abaddon itself, and in this regard is believed by some to be an incarnation of the mysterious First Horseman. When the Grim Reaper comes to a world, it does so not as an angel of mercy, but as a relentless harvester of life. Those who fall to the Grim Reaper were not destined to die as much as they were selected, hunted, and murdered.

Perhaps the most frightening legends surrounding the Grim Reaper concern its nature as a singular entity, for some believe that more than one grim reaper exists in the Great Beyond. These whispers tell of a cabal of at least nine of these creatures that stalk reality, culling the living as inexplicable servants of true entropy. According to the teaching of some death cults, the final goal of the Grim Reaper is to end the entire cycle of life and death and serve as a silent lord of an empty universe.
Lesser Death.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Wyrmwraith.name: 缚灵龙 Wyrmwraith

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Create Undead.name: 制造不死生物 Create Undead
Create Undead.description:
你将目标转化为一个等级最高不超过表 7-1 所允许的不死生物。这个仪式有许多版本，每个版本都对应一种特定类型的不死生物（例如所有丧尸共用一种仪式，骷髅一种，食尸鬼一种，等等），而创造稀有不死生物的仪式本身也同样稀有。某些不死生物的形态，例如巫妖，会通过其自身独特的方法形成，无法通过任何版本的创造不死生物来制造。

表 7-1：生物创造仪式

生物等级 所需法术环级 花费
-1 或 0 2 15 gp
1 2 60 gp
2 3 105 gp
3 3 180 gp
4 4 300 gp
5 4 480 gp
6 5 750 gp
7 5 1,080 gp
8 6 1,500 gp
9 6 2,100 gp
10 7 3,000 gp
11 7 4,200 gp
12 8 6,000 gp
13 8 9,000 gp
14 9 13,500 gp
15 9 19,500 gp
16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

大成功 目标变为对应类型的不死生物。如果它的等级至少比你低 4 级，你可以让它成为仆从。这会赋予它仆从（特征），意味着当你命令它时，它可以使用 2 个动作，而命令它是一个具有听觉和专注（特征）的单动作。你最多只能控制四个仆从。如果它具有智能且未成为仆从，那么在你将其唤醒时，这个不死生物会对你有所帮助，尽管它依然是一个可怖而邪恶的生物。如果它没有智能且未成为仆从，你可以给它一个简单命令。它会一心一意地追求那个目标，忽略你之后的任何命令。

成功 如同大成功，但未成为你仆从的有智能不死生物只会对你友善，而未成为你仆从的无智能不死生物除非你攻击它，否则会放过你不管。它会在当地四处劫掠，而不是遵从你的命令。

失败 你未能创造出该不死生物。

大失败 你创造出了这个不死生物，但它的灵魂因你的污秽死灵法术而备受折磨，心中对你只剩下憎恨。它会试图毁灭你。

You transform the target into an undead creature with a level up to that allowed in Table 7-1. There are many versions of this ritual, each specific to a particular type of undead (one ritual for all zombies, one for skeletons, one for ghouls, and so on), and the rituals that create rare undead are also rare. Some forms of undead, such as liches, form using their own unique methods and can't be created with a version of create undead.

Table 7-1: Creatures Creation Rituals

Creature Level Spell Rank Required Cost
-1 or 0 2 15 gp
1 2 60 gp
2 3 105 gp
3 3 180 gp
4 4 300 gp
5 4 480 gp
6 5 750 gp
7 5 1,080 gp
8 6 1,500 gp
9 6 2,100 gp
10 7 3,000 gp
11 7 4,200 gp
12 8 6,000 gp
13 8 9,000 gp
14 9 13,500 gp
15 9 19,500 gp
16 10 30,000 gp
17 10 45,000 gp

Critical Success The target becomes an undead creature of the appropriate type. If it's at least 4 levels lower than you, you can make it a minion. This gives it the minion trait, meaning it can use 2 actions when you command it, and commanding it is a single action that has the auditory and concentrate traits. You can have a maximum of four minions under your control. If it's intelligent and doesn't become a minion, the undead is helpful to you for awakening it, though it's still a horrid and evil creature. If it's unintelligent and doesn't become a minion, you can give it one simple command. It pursues that goal single-mindedly, ignoring any of your subsequent commands.

Success As critical success, except an intelligent undead that doesn't become your minion is only friendly to you, and an unintelligent undead that doesn't become your minion leaves you alone unless you attack it. It marauds the local area rather than following your command.

Failure You fail to create the undead.

Critical Failure You create the undead, but its soul, tortured by your foul necromancy, is full of nothing but hatred for you. It attempts to destroy you.

Finger of Death.name: 死亡之指 Finger of Death
Finger of Death.description:
你将手指指向目标，并说出一句致死之言。你对目标造成 70 点虚空伤害。如果来自死亡之指的伤害将目标的生命值降至 0，目标会立即死亡。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 10 点。

You point your finger toward the target and speak a word of slaying. You deal 70 void damage to the target. If the damage from finger of death reduces the target to 0 Hit Points, the target dies instantly.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 10.

Vampiric Exsanguination.name: 吸血鬼放血术 Vampiric Exsanguination
Vampiric Exsanguination.description:
你伸开双臂，汲取其他生物的鲜血与生命力。你对区域内的活体生物造成 12d6 虚空伤害。你获得等同于单个生物因该法术受到伤害一半的临时生命值；以受到伤害最多的那个生物为准来计算这些临时生命值。1 分钟后，你失去所有剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You draw in the blood and life force of other creatures through your outstretched arms. You deal 12d6 void damage to living creatures in the area. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage a single creature takes from this spell; calculate these temporary Hit Points using the creature that took the most damage. You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣之怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你将神性的狂怒倾泻向敌人。区域内的敌人根据其强韧豁免，受到 4d10 精魂伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；当其处于恶心状态时，还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d10。

You channel the fury of divinity against your foes. You deal 4d10 spirit damage to enemies in the area, depending on their Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}; while it's sickened, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Bind Undead (At Will).name: 束缚不死生物（随意） Bind Undead (At Will)
Bind Undead (At Will).description:
你念出一句力量之语，夺取了目标的控制权。它获得仆从特征。若你或一名盟友对目标使用任何敌对动作，该法术结束。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rVkUzqS4rpZp9LS3]{法术效果：束缚不死生物}

With a word of power, you seize control of the target. It gains the minion trait. If you or an ally uses any hostile actions against the target, the spell ends.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.rVkUzqS4rpZp9LS3]{Spell Effect: Bind Undead}

Darkness.name: 黑暗 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你制造出一团黑暗帷幕，阻止光线穿透该区域或在其中发出。光线不会进入该区域，而任何非魔法光源，例如火把或提灯，在该区域内时都不会发出任何光亮，即使其照明半径本会延伸到黑暗之外也是如此。这也会压制你的黑暗法术同阶或更低阶的魔法光。光线无法穿过，因此区域内的生物无法看见外面。从外部看去，它像是一个纯粹黑暗的球体。

强化（4环） 即使拥有黑暗视觉（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）的生物，也只能勉强看穿这片黑暗。它们将透过这片黑暗看见的目标视为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。

You create a shroud of darkness that prevents light from penetrating or emanating within the area. Light does not enter the area and any non-magical light sources, such as a torch or lantern, do not emanate any light while inside the area, even if their light radius would extend beyond the darkness. This also suppresses magical light of your darkness spell's rank or lower. Light can't pass through, so creatures in the area can't see outside. From outside, it appears as a globe of pure darkness.

Heightened (4th) Even creatures with darkvision (but not greater darkvision) can barely see through the darkness. They treat targets seen through the darkness as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Charm (Undead Only).name: 魅惑（仅限不死） Charm (Undead Only)
Charm (Undead Only).description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜糖般甜美，而你的容貌仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的朦胧之中。它必须进行一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近曾威胁它，或对它使用过敌对动作，则此次豁免获得 +4 环境加值。

你可以 Dismiss 该法术。如果你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。当法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与你之间的友谊，或你说服它采取的行动，与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过普通手段说服目标继续把你当作朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你曾试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西而非魅惑，除非它识别出该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好}。如果它原本已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为乐于助人，且它不能对你使用敌对动作。

升环（4环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备时。

升环（8环） 持续时间持续至你下一次进行每日准备时，且你的目标至多可以是 10 个生物。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Lifesense 120 feet.name: 生命感知 120 尺 Lifesense 120 feet

Positive Energy Transfer.name: 正能量转移 Positive Energy Transfer
Positive Energy Transfer.description:
触发 缚灵龙成功通过一次豁免以抵抗活力伤害，但仍然受到伤害

效果 缚灵龙将该效果造成的全部活力伤害转移给120尺内一个由其控制的，或对其处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友善}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于助人}状态的单个不死生物。

Trigger The wyrmwraith succeeds at a saving throw to resist vitality damage but still takes damage

Effect The wyrmwraith transfers all vitality damage from the effect to a single undead creature of their choice within 120 feet that they control or that's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful} to them.

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: 阳光失能 Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description:
处于阳光下的缚灵龙陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

A wyrmwraith in sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Breath Weapon.name: 吐息武器 Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description:
缚灵龙释放出一股虚空能量的爆发，对 @Template[cone|distance:60] 内的所有生物造成 @Damage[18d6[void]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect] 豁免）。

它们在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮}内无法再次使用吐息武器。

The wyrmwraith unleashes a burst of void energy that deals @Damage[18d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect] save).

They can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Divine Dispelling.name: 神圣解除 Divine Dispelling
Divine Dispelling.description:
缚灵龙的爪击会撕裂神术魔法。每当缚灵龙以幽魂之爪打击命中一个生物时，缚灵龙都可以尝试进行一次 @Check[religion] 宗教检定，以反制该生物身上一个持续中的神术法术效果。

A wyrmwraith's claws rend divine magic. Whenever a wyrmwraith hits a creature with a spectral claws Strike, the wyrmwraith can attempt a @Check[religion] check to counteract an ongoing divine spell effect on the creature.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description:
缚灵龙以任意顺序进行两次爪击打击和一次颚咬打击。

The wyrmwraith makes two claw Strikes and one jaws Strike in any order.

Drain Life.name: 汲命 Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
当缚灵龙以幽魂之颚或幽魂之爪进行打击并对一个活着的生物造成伤害时，缚灵龙获得 [[/r 18 #Temporary Hit Points]]{18 临时生命值}，且该生物必须成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:38] 豁免，否则变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2}。此后，缚灵龙以其幽魂之颚或幽魂之爪打击所造成的进一步伤害，会在豁免失败时使流失状态的数值再增加 2，最高至流失 4。

When a wyrmwraith deals damage to a living creature with a spectral jaws or spectral claw Strike, the wyrmwraith gains [[/r 18 #Temporary Hit Points]]{18 temporary Hit Points}, and the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:38] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}. Further damage dealt by the wyrmwraith's spectral jaws or spectral claws Strikes increases the value of the drained condition by 2 on a failed save, to a maximum of drained 4.

Ectoplasmic Form.name: 灵质形态 Ectoplasmic Form
Ectoplasmic Form.description:
缚灵龙可以穿过灵质帷幕，暂时获得由灵质构成的实体形态。缚灵龙失去虚体（特征），持续[[/gmr 1d4 #Duration Physical Form]]{1d4轮}，不过它们可以在此之前以自由动作（）返回其虚体形态。该能力结束后，缚灵龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ectoplasmatic Form]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用此能力。处于其灵质形态时，缚灵龙的 AC 提升至 43，并获得 100 点临时生命值。它们失去对精准伤害的免疫以及所有抗力。它们的近战打击造成挥砍和穿刺伤害，而非虚空伤害。

A wyrmwraith can push through the ectoplasmic veil to temporarily assume a physical form made of ectoplasm. The wyrmwraith loses the incorporeal trait for [[/gmr 1d4 #Duration Physical Form]]{1d4 rounds}, though they can return to their incorporeal form as a free action before then. Once this ability ends, the wyrmwraith can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ectoplasmatic Form]]{1d4 rounds}. While in their ectoplasmic form, the wyrmwraith's AC increases to 43 and they gain 100 temporary Hit Points. They lose their immunity to precision damage and all of their resistances. Their melee Strikes deal slashing and piercing damage, respectively, instead of void damage.

Phase Lurch.name: 灵界蹒跚 Phase Lurch
Phase Lurch.description:
需求 缚灵龙处于其灵质形态

效果 如同“大步移动”动作，但缚灵龙可以穿过墙壁或物质障碍，仿佛其为虚体。它们的移动必须始于并终于任何实体障碍之外，且穿过坚实物质属于困难地形。

Requirements The wyrmwraith is in their ectoplasmic form

Effect As the Stride action, but the wyrmwraith can pass through walls or material obstacles as though they were incorporeal. They must begin and end their movement outside of any physical obstacles, and passing through solid material is difficult terrain.

Wyrmwraith.publicNotes:
尽管它们拒绝接受死亡，缚灵龙仍然厌恶自己新的不死状态。事实上，由于它们完全没有收集宝藏的动机，缚灵龙反而执着于对一切活物（尤其是龙）的仇恨，以及对自身的憎恶。缚灵龙仅凭自身的存在便会使土地枯萎，这种影响会缓慢蔓延，直到它们的巢穴变成一片毫无生机、被其他不死生物萦绕的荒原。

缚灵龙由那些拒绝接受死亡，或对来世怀有非理性恐惧的龙之灵魂化生而成。

Though they refused to accept death, wyrmwraiths nonetheless despise their new undead condition. Indeed, lacking in all motivation to collect treasure, a wyrmwraith instead fixates on their hatred of all living things (especially dragons) and their own self-loathing. A wyrmwraith blights the land with their very presence, spreading slowly until their lair becomes a lifeless wasteland haunted by other undead.

Wyrmwraiths rise from the souls of dragons who refuse to accept death or have an irrational fear of the afterlife.

Resilient (Major).name: 坚韧（高阶） Resilient (Major)
Resilient (Major).description:
强韧符文为护甲注入额外的防护魔法。这使穿戴者的豁免获得 +3 物品加值。

你可以使用升级物品和符文的正常流程，升级一套护甲上已经蚀刻的强韧符文。

Resilient runes imbue armor with additional protective magic. This grants the wearer a +3 item bonus to saving throws.

You can upgrade the resilient rune already etched on a suit of armor using the normal process for upgrading items and runes.

Striking (Major).name: 强效（特级） Striking (Major)
Striking (Major).description:
强击符文将毁灭性的魔法储存在武器中，使该武器造成的武器伤害骰由一个增加为两个。例如，一把+1 强击匕首造成的伤害将是 2d4，而不是 1d4。

你可以将武器上已经蚀刻的强击符文升级为更强的版本，将现有符文的数值提高到新符文的数值。你必须拥有更强符文的配方才能这样做，而升级的价格是两种符文价格之间的差额。

该武器造成四个武器伤害骰。

A striking rune stores destructive magic in the weapon, increasing the weapon damage dice it deals to two instead of one. For instance, a +1 striking dagger would deal 2d4 damage instead of 1d4 damage.

You can upgrade the striking rune already etched on a weapon to a stronger version, increasing the values of the existing rune to those of the new rune. You must have the formula of the stronger rune to do so, and the Price of the upgrade is the difference between the two runes' Prices.

The weapon deals four weapon damage dice.

Winged (Greater).name: 飞翼（高阶） Winged (Greater)
Winged (Greater).description:
这枚符文是护甲正面的一道旋动雕纹。一对大型的透明虚幻之翼从护甲背后浮现出来。

启动—飞向天空 2 （专注，操作）

效果 你描摹胸甲正面的符文，护甲上虚幻的双翼变得凝实，使你获得25尺的飞行速度或你的陆地速度，取两者中较低者。

一经启动，双翼会无限期地保持凝实状态。若你愿意，可以结束该启动，而且你不必等待1小时后才能再次启动这枚符文。效果结束后，双翼会恢复为虚幻形态。

This rune is a swirling glyph on the front of the armor. A large pair of transparent, ephemeral wings floats out from the back of the armor.

Activate—Take to the Skies 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect You trace the rune on the front of the breastplate and the armor's ephemeral wings grow tangible, granting you a fly Speed of 25 feet or your land Speed, whichever is slower.

Once activated, the wings remain tangible indefinitely. You can Dismiss the activation if you choose, and you don't have to wait an hour to activate the rune again. Once the effect ends, the wings return to their ephemeral form.

Cold Iron Kitchenware.name: 寒铁厨具 Cold Iron Kitchenware
Cold Iron Kitchenware.description:
由寒铁制成的武器对恶魔和妖精同样致命。寒铁看起来与普通铁无异，但它采自特别纯净的矿源，并且在塑形时几乎不用或完全不用加热。这个过程极其困难，尤其是对于高品冷铁物品而言。

寒铁物品

寒铁物品硬度HPBT
薄型物品
低品52010
标准品72814
高品104020
物品
低品93618
标准品114422
高品145628
建筑结构
低品187236
标准品228844
高品2811256

Weapons made from cold iron are deadly to demons and fey alike. Cold iron looks like normal iron but is mined from particularly pure sources and shaped with little or no heat. This process is extremely difficult, especially for high-grade cold iron items.

Cold Iron Items

Cold Iron ItemsHardnessHPBT
Thin Items
Low-grade52010
Standard-grade72814
High-grade104020
Items
Low-grade93618
Standard-grade114422
High-grade145628
Structure
Low-grade187236
Standard-grade228844
High-grade2811256

Knights' Remains.name: 骑士的遗骸 Knights' Remains

Indestructible Shield.name: 不破坚盾 Indestructible Shield
Indestructible Shield.description:
不破坚盾是一面高阶强效加固精金盾（硬度 17，HP 136），几乎能够承受任何伤害。它只能被 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术} 法术所损坏（如同以豁免失败的生物为目标那样掷伤害），或被与毁灭相关的神器所损坏。

制作需求 原材料必须至少包含价值 4,400 gp 的精金。

An indestructible shield is a high-grade greater reinforcing adamantine shield (Hardness 17, HP 136) that can withstand just about any damage. It can be damaged only by a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate} spell (roll damage as if against a creature that failed its save) or by an artifact tied to destruction.

Craft Requirements The raw materials must include at least 4,400 gp of adamantine.

Shadow (Major).name: 阴影（强效） Shadow (Major)
Shadow (Major).description:
刻有此符文的护甲会呈现出朦胧的黑色外观。穿着该护甲时，你获得隐秘检定 +3 物品加值。

Armor etched with this rune takes on a hazy black appearance. You gain a +3 item bonus to Stealth checks while wearing the armor.

Full Plate.name: 全身板甲 Full Plate
Full Plate.description:
板甲由相互咬合的甲片构成，几乎将全身包裹在一层钢铁外壳之中。它价格高昂且十分沉重，穿戴者往往需要他人协助才能正确穿上，但它所提供的防护是护甲所能提供的最佳防御之一。一套这种护甲附带一件内穿的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{绗缝甲} 和一双 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{臂铠}。

Plate mail consists of interlocking plates that encase nearly the entire body in a carapace of steel. It is costly and heavy, and the wearer often requires help to don it correctly, but it provides some of the best defense armor can supply. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zBYEU9E7034ENCmh]{Padded Armor} and a pair of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Ix2vicchE79d6Cl3]{gauntlets}.

Knights' Remains.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.wq0bRi8OufxHoXzX]{A1. 瞭望塔一层}

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.wq0bRi8OufxHoXzX]{A1. Watchtower Ground Floor}

Portcullis Reagents.name: 闸门试剂 Portcullis Reagents

Acid Flask (Major).name: 强效强酸瓶 Acid Flask (Major)
Acid Flask (Major).description:
启动 A 打击

这个装满腐蚀性强酸的烧瓶造成1点强酸伤害、4d6持续性强酸伤害，以及4点强酸溅射伤害。你获得攻击检定的+3物品加值。

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 4d6 persistent acid damage, and 4 acid splash damage. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Portcullis Reagents.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.bBuObwJcQNMBJY1H]{A4. 加固入口}

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.bBuObwJcQNMBJY1H]{A4. Hardened Entry}

Quartermaster's Cabinet.name: 军需官的柜子 Quartermaster's Cabinet
Quartermaster's Cabinet.tokenName: 军需官的橱柜 Quartermaster's Cabinet

Antidote (Major).name: 解毒剂（强效） Antidote (Major)
Antidote (Major).description:
启动 A (操作)

解毒剂能保护你免受毒素侵害。饮用解毒剂后，你在对抗毒素的强韧豁免中获得 +4 物品加值，持续 6 小时；并且当你饮用解毒剂时，你可以立即尝试对一个正在影响你的 14 级或以下毒素进行一次豁免。若你成功，该毒素被中和。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{效果：解毒剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

An antidote protects you against toxins. Upon drinking an antidote, you gain a +4 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against poisons for 6 hours, and when you drink the antidote, you can immediately attempt a saving throw against one poison of 14th level or lower affecting you. If you succeed, the poison is neutralized.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.TjBxxlTvb6tJP1jS]{Effect: Antidote}

Antiplague (Major).name: 抗疫剂（强效） Antiplague (Major)
Antiplague (Major).description:
启动 A（操纵）

抗疫剂可以强化身体对抗疾病的防御。饮用抗疫剂后，你在24小时内对抗疾病的强韧豁免检定获得+4物品加值；这也适用于你对疾病进展进行的每日豁免。

当你饮用抗疫剂时，你可以立即针对一个影响你的14级或以下疾病进行一次豁免检定。如果你成功，则你从该疾病中痊愈。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{效果：抗疫剂}

Activate A (manipulate)

Antiplague can fortify the body's defenses against diseases. Upon drinking an antiplague, you gain a +4 item bonus to Fortitude saving throws against diseases for 24 hours; this applies to your daily save against a disease's progression.

When you drink the antiplague, you can immediately attempt a saving throw against one disease of 14th level or lower affecting you. If you succeed, you are cured of the disease.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.mVgLCbZgafIylRzh]{Effect: Antiplague}

Elixir of Life (Major).name: 真实生命灵药（高等） Elixir of Life (Major)
Elixir of Life (Major).description:
启动 A（操作）

真实生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程和免疫系统。饮用这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +3 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：真实生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +3 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Cold Iron Arrows.name: 寒铁箭 Cold Iron Arrows
Cold Iron Arrows.description:
这些弹丸是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Adamantine Arrows.name: 精金箭 Adamantine Arrows
Adamantine Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行中通过一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Adamantine Bolts.name: 精金弩矢 Adamantine Bolts
Adamantine Bolts.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭的杆身由木材制成。它在飞行时由一端的羽翎保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Cold Iron Bolts.name: 冷铁弩矢 Cold Iron Bolts
Cold Iron Bolts.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Silver Arrows.name: 银箭 Silver Arrows
Silver Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭的杆身由木材制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Silver Bolts.name: 银弩矢 Silver Bolts
Silver Bolts.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时通过一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Quartermaster's Cabinet.prototypeToken: 军需官的柜子 Quartermaster's Cabinet

Resilient (Major).name: 强韧（高等） Resilient (Major)
Resilient (Major).description:
坚韧符文为护甲注入额外的防护魔法。这使穿戴者的豁免获得 +3 物品加值。

你可以使用升级物品和符文的正常流程，升级已经蚀刻在一套护甲上的坚韧符文。

Resilient runes imbue armor with additional protective magic. This grants the wearer a +3 item bonus to saving throws.

You can upgrade the resilient rune already etched on a suit of armor using the normal process for upgrading items and runes.

Whistle of Calling.name: 召唤哨子 Whistle of Calling
Whistle of Calling.description:
一个召唤哨子看起来像一只普通的黄铜哨子。它的外观会根据与之调谐的生物种类略有变化，刻有小型的蹄子、羽毛纹样、爪击或其他合适的图案。

启动 10分钟（交互）

效果 你在伙伴或另一只愿意成为你坐骑的友方生物面前，以不同音调吹响这只哨子。10分钟结束时，这只哨子会与该生物调谐。哨子在任何时候只能与一个生物调谐，但你可以用另一次10分钟启动使它与新的生物调谐。

启动 2 交互

频率 每天一次

效果 你吹响哨子，与其调谐的生物会立刻从最远1英里外传送术到你30尺内一个未被占据的空间中。如果该调谐生物已经死亡、位于另一个位面，或超出射程，则这只哨子没有效果。

A whistle of calling appears to be a simple brass whistle. It changes slightly in appearance depending on the type of creature to which it's attuned, depicting small carvings of hooves, feather patterns, claws, or other appropriate motifs.

Activate 10 minutes (Interact)

Effect You blow the whistle at different tones in the presence of a companion or another allied creature willing to be your mount. At the end of the 10 minutes, the whistle is attuned to that creature. The whistle can be attuned to only one creature at any time, but you can attune it to a new one with another 10-minute activation.

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You blow the whistle and the creature to which it is attuned teleports instantly from as far as 1 mile away to an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you. The whistle has no effect if the attuned creature is dead, on another plane, or outside the range.

+3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding.name: +3 上等韧性全身甲坐骑护甲 +3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding
+3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding.description:
这套全身板甲坐骑护甲是为一匹大型马匹定制的，并蚀刻有+3 强效和高等强韧符文。

This set of full-plate barding is sized for a Large horse and has been etched with +3 potency and major resilient runes.

Ghost Arrows.name: 幽灵箭 Ghost Arrows
Ghost Arrows.description:
弹药 任意

幽灵弹药摸起来冰凉。这种弹药具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽灵接触}属性符文的好处，并且可以穿过任何障碍物，除非该障碍物能够阻挡虚体生物或效果。尽管这种弹药能够穿透屏障并无视所有掩蔽，但目标仍然会因隐蔽或隐藏而获得纯骰检定。你仍然不能在不猜测的情况下将未察觉的生物作为目标。

弹药发射后，会消散成雾。然而，在深夜时分，[[/r 1d4 #days]]{1d4天}之后，它会重新出现在上一次取出它的箭袋或其他容器中。

Ammunition any

Ghost ammunition is cool to the touch. This ammunition has the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune and can fly through any obstacle except those that can block incorporeal creatures or effects. Though the ammunition penetrates barriers and ignores all cover, the target still benefits from the flat check from being concealed or hidden. You still can't target an undetected creature without guessing.

After it is launched, the ammunition vanishes into mist. However, in the dead of the night [[/r 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days} later, it reappears in the last quiver or other container it was taken from.

Wyrmwraith's Nest.name: 缚灵龙之巢 Wyrmwraith's Nest

Belt adorned with a Gem-studded Chatelai.name: 饰有镶嵌宝石腰链的腰带 Belt adorned with a Gem-studded Chatelaine

Maestro's Instrument (Greater).name: 大师乐师之器（高等） Maestro's Instrument (Greater)
Maestro's Instrument (Greater).description:
大师的乐器可以被制作成任何种类的手持乐器。大师的乐器在你用该乐器演奏音乐时，为你的表演检定提供 +3 物品加值。

启动—魅惑表演 2 (操纵)

频率 每天一次

效果 你演奏该乐器，使其施放一个 DC 为 38 的 8 环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm} 法术。

制作需求 你必须提供一次适当环阶的魅惑施法。

A maestro's instrument can be crafted in the form of any variety of handheld musical instruments. A maestro's instrument grants you a +3 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—Charming Performance 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You play the instrument, causing it to cast a 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm} spell with DC 38.

Craft Requirements You must supply a casting of charm of the appropriate rank.

Skeleton Key (Greater).name: 骷髅钥匙（高等） Skeleton Key (Greater)
Skeleton Key (Greater).description:
这把阴森的钥匙弓部顶端饰有一颗咧嘴而笑的头骨。尝试开锁时，这把钥匙可以代替盗贼工具包使用，并为盗贼检定提供+2物品加值。

若骷髅钥匙因该检定的大失败而损坏，则其作为普通盗贼工具包正常运作，并失去其增益，直到被修复为止。

启动—松动锁具 F (操作)

频率 每小时一次

触发 你尝试开锁，但尚未掷骰

效果 这把钥匙会对你正尝试开启的锁施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock}。

A grinning skull tops the bow of this macabre key. This key can be used in place of thieves' toolkit when attempting to Pick a Lock, and it grants a +2 item bonus to the Thievery check.

If the skeleton key becomes broken due to a critical failure on the check, it works as normal thieves' toolkit and loses its benefits until repaired.

Activate—Loosen Lock F (manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You attempt to Pick a Lock but haven't rolled yet

Effect The key casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6Ot4N22t5tPD51BO]{Knock} on the lock you're trying to pick.

Ghost Dust.name: 幽灵尘 Ghost Dust
Ghost Dust.description:
启用 A（专注）

需求 你受训于隐秘

这个小瓶中装满了由干燥灵浆制成的灰绿色粉末。当你启用这些粉末时，它会对你施放一个4环的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术}法术。然后你可以大步移动或调整步伐。如果你拥有对应的速度，也可以改为掘穴、攀爬、飞行或游泳。

Activate A (concentrate)

Requirements You are trained in Stealth

This small vial is filled with a grayish-green dust rendered from dried ectoplasm. When you activate the dust, it casts a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell on you. You may then Stride or Step. You can instead Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim if you have the corresponding Speed.

Endless Grimoire (True).name: 无尽魔典（真） Endless Grimoire (True)
Endless Grimoire (True).description:
打开时，这本魔典拥有无限页数，而且奇怪的是，这些页似乎几乎迫不及待地想要抄录法术。与大多数魔典不同，它所能容纳的法术数量没有限制。魔典对收录你的法术的渴望，使你在通过将法术抄录进魔典来如此做时，进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Q5iIYCFdqJFM31GW]{习得法术}的检定获得+3物品加值。如果你在每日准备期间使用这本魔典，并且能够准备相应环阶的法术，魔典的自然本质会渗入你的思维，使你能够额外准备一个7环法术。

When opened, this grimoire has unlimited pages that, oddly, seem almost eager to transcribe spells. Unlike most grimoires, it has no limits to its number of spells. The grimoire's eagerness to contain your spells grants you a +3 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Q5iIYCFdqJFM31GW]{Learn a Spell} if you do so by transcribing the spell into the grimoire. If you use the grimoire during your daily preparations and are capable of preparing spells of the appropriate rank, the grimoire's nature leaks into your mind, allowing you to prepare an additional 7th-rank spell.

Wyrmwraith's Nest.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.NLbVqED1bDle0ynV]{A2. 瞭望塔屋顶}

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.NLbVqED1bDle0ynV]{A2. Watchtower Roof}

Tallusian.name: 塔砾兽 Tallusian

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（恒定） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标无论何种语言都能理解所有话语，并且也能说其他生物的语言。当处于由多种生物组成的混合群体中时，每当目标说话时，它都可以选择一个生物，并使用该生物能够理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为8小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Shape Stone.name: 塑石术 Shape Stone
Shape Stone.description:
你将这块石头塑造成你所选择的一个粗略形状。塑形过程过于粗糙，无法制造复杂部件、精细细节、活动部件或类似之物。任何在你重塑石头时站在其上的生物，都必须各自进行一次反射豁免或特技检定。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物在石头上倒地 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物从石头上摔下（如果适用）并倒地。

You shape the stone into a rough shape of your choice. The shaping process is too crude to produce intricate parts, fine details, moving pieces, or the like. Any creatures standing atop the stone when you reshape it must each attempt a Reflex save or Acrobatics check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} atop the stone.

Critical Failure The creature falls off the stone (if applicable) and lands Prone.

Humanoid Form (At Will).name: 类人形态（随意） Humanoid Form (At Will)
Humanoid Form (At Will).description:
你将自己的外貌变为一个小型或中型类人生物，例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类或兽人。处于此形态时，除了你原本拥有的其他特征外，你还获得类人生物特征，以及与该生物种类相关的任何特征（例如地精或人类）。如果此次变形使你的体型缩小，你的触及也会相应缩短（通常为5尺）。此次变形不会以任何方式改变你的属性数据，你也不会获得所假定的类人形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴并使用你的装备，而这些装备会改变尺寸（如有必要）以适应你的新形态。如果物品离开你的身体，它们会恢复为原本的尺寸。

类人形态使你在伪装成所选族裔的一般成员时，获得欺瞒检定+4状态加值，即使你未受训，你也可以加上你的等级，但你不能让自己看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要冒充某个个体，你仍然需要制作伪装，不过GM在决定你的欺瞒检定DC时，不会将族裔差异计入考量。你可以解消这个法术。

强化（3环） 如果你所假定的形态具有黑暗视觉或微光视觉，你便获得该能力。

强化（5环） 你可以呈现为大型类人生物的外貌。如果这使你的体型增大，你会获得变巨术的效果。

You transform your appearance to that of a Small or Medium humanoid, such as a dwarf, elf, goblin, halfling, human, or orc. You gain the humanoid trait in addition to your other traits while in this form, as well as any trait related to the creature's kind (such as goblin or human). If this transformation reduces your size, it reduces your reach accordingly (typically to 5 feet). This transformation doesn't change your statistics in any way, and you don't gain any special abilities of the humanoid form you assume. You can still wear and use your gear, which changes size (if necessary) to match your new form. If items leave your person, they return to their usual size.

Humanoid form grants you a +4 status bonus to Deception checks to pass as a generic member of the chosen ancestry, and you add your level even if you're untrained, but you can't make yourself look like a specific person. If you want to Impersonate an individual, you still need to create a disguise, though the GM won't factor in the difference in ancestry when determining the DC of your Deception check. You can Dismiss this spell.

Heightened (3rd) You gain darkvision or low-light vision if the form you assume has that ability.

Heightened (5th) You can take on the appearance of a Large humanoid. If this increases your size, you gain the effects of the enlarge spell.

Pummeling Rubble.name: 碎石猛击 Pummeling Rubble
Pummeling Rubble.description:
一阵沉重的岩石在你前方的空中飞射而出。石砾对区域内的每个生物造成 2d4 点钝击伤害。每个生物都必须进行一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并被推离你 5 尺。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并被推离你 10 尺。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d4。

A spray of heavy rocks flies through the air in front of you. The rubble deals 2d4 bludgeoning damage to each creature in the area. Each creature must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pushed 5 feet away from you.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage by 2d4.

Crumbling Ground.name: 碎地 Crumbling Ground
Crumbling Ground.description:
塔砾兽用尾巴拍击地面，制造出恰到好处的振动频率，在30尺内的一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]中撼动地面。该区域变为困难地形，持续24小时。区域内的任何生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|dc:22] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到其下个回合开始。

失败 该生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。

大失败 如失败，此外该生物还会受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害。

The tallusian slaps their tail against the earth, creating a vibration at the precise frequency needed to shake the ground in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] within 30 feet. The area becomes difficult terrain for 24 hours. Any creature in the area must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:22] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of its next turn.

Failure The creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure As failure, plus the creature takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage.

Rubble.name: 石砾 Rubble
Rubble.description:
直到它下一次行动之前，这只塔砾兽看起来就像一堆普通的碎石砾。它在冒充一堆石砾时，欺瞒检定和 DC 的结果自动为 31（在废墟中为 34）。

Until the next time it acts, the tallusian appears to be a normal pile of broken rubble. It has an automatic result of 31 (34 in ruins) on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a pile of rubble.

Tail Spin.name: 甩尾 Tail Spin
Tail Spin.description:
塔砾兽原地旋转，横扫尾巴以击倒敌人。每个相邻的敌人受到 @Damage[(2d6+6)[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] 豁免）。此外，若豁免失败，目标会被击倒并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。之后，塔砾兽获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}，持续 1 轮。

The tallusian spins in place, sweeping their tail to knock down their foes. Each adjacent foe takes @Damage[(2d6+6)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save). Also on a failed save, the target is knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Afterward, the tallusian becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Tallusian.publicNotes:
许多天界生物会被当下之事所吸引，而塔砾兽在意的却是过往。出于保护已覆灭文明遗迹的驱使，塔砾兽常与树精及其他自然生物并肩行动，在击退那些试图将废弃建筑据为己有的邪恶影响力的同时，帮助修复遗迹周围的土地。尽管很少有谁比塔砾兽自身更了解它们所守护的古代文明，但它们很少区分圣洁场所与曾被用于邪恶用途的地点。对塔砾兽而言，任何建筑，不论其历史如何，都可以被重新利用，变成新的事物。

在外形上，塔砾兽像是放大版的小熊猫，只不过它们有六条腿、锐利的蓝色眼睛，以及沿着背部和蓬松尾巴生长的锋利石刺。休息时，塔砾兽看起来几乎与它们所守护的建筑毫无分别，会伪装成一堆石砾，直到它们移动。它们还拥有采取类人形态的能力，通常会变成一个精力充沛的孩子。伪装成孩童的塔砾兽有时会带领冒险者前往那些原本已从地图上消失的文明遗址，希望英雄们能帮助保护这些废墟，直到它们得以修复。

While many celestials are drawn to what is, tallusians care about what was. Compelled to protect the remnants of fallen civilizations, tallusians often work alongside dryads and other creatures of nature, helping restore the land around their ruins while fighting off evil influences seeking to claim the abandoned structures for themselves. Though few know more about the ancient civilizations they protect than the tallusians themselves, they rarely make distinctions between holy sites and those used for nefarious purposes. To a tallusian, any building, regardless of its history, can be repurposed into something new.

Physically, tallusians resemble oversized red pandas, except they have six legs, piercing blue eyes, and quills of sharpened stone growing along their backs and from their bushy tails. At rest, tallusians appear virtually indistinguishable from the buildings they protect, masquerading as heaps of rubble until they move. They also possess the ability to adopt a humanoid form, often that of an energetic child. Tallusians disguised as children have been known to lead adventurers to civilizations that have otherwise fallen off the map, in hopes the heroes will help protect the ruins until they can be restored.

Dybbuk.name: 夺尸魔 Dybbuk

Occult Innate Spells.name: 异能天生奥术法术 Occult Innate Spells

Dominate.name: 支配 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你夺取目标的控制权，强迫其服从你的命令。如果你下达明显会导致其自我毁灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令为止。该效果取决于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}，因为它奋力抵抗你的命令。

失败 你控制目标。它获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{被控制（状态）} 状态，但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试进行一次意志豁免。若成功，则该法术结束。

大失败 如同失败，但只有当你对其下达违背其本性的全新命令时，例如杀死它的盟友，目标才会获得一次新的豁免。

升阶（10环） 持续时间为无限。

You take command of the target, forcing it to obey your orders. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled} condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if you give it a new order that is against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Never Mind.name: 绝念术 Never Mind
Never Mind.description:
你极大地削弱了目标的心智能力。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。这个诅咒的效果只能通过以诅咒为目标的效果移除。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续1轮。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 4}，且持续时间为无限。

大失败 目标的智力被永久削弱到低于动物的水平，并将其魅力、智力和感知调整值视为 –5。它失去所有需要心智能力的职业能力，包括所有施法能力。如果目标是PC，它会变为由GM控制的NPC。

You drastically reduce the target's mental faculties. The target must attempt a Will save. The effects of this curse can be removed only through effects that target curses.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} with an unlimited duration.

Critical Failure The target's intellect is permanently reduced below that of an animal, and it treats its Charisma, Intelligence, and Wisdom modifiers as –5. It loses all class abilities that require mental faculties, including all spellcasting. If the target is a PC, they become an NPC under the GM's control.

Rewrite Memory.name: 重写记忆 Rewrite Memory
Rewrite Memory.description:
你通过抹除一段记忆、增强一段记忆的清晰度、改变一段记忆，或添加一段虚假记忆来篡改目标的记忆。目标可以尝试进行一次意志豁免来抵抗该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响，并意识到你曾试图篡改其记忆。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而非rewrite memory，除非它辨识出了该法术。

失败 在该法术持续时间的前 5 分钟内，你每轮都可以通过维持法术来修改一次记忆。你这样做时，可以构想最多 6 秒的记忆内容进行修改，总计最多可达连续 5 分钟的记忆。

只要该法术仍然生效，你所篡改的任何记忆都会保持改变。如果在这 5 分钟结束前目标移出射程，你便不能再进一步修改任何记忆。

强化（6环） 你可以对一个自愿目标施放该法术，以压制与某个特定主题有关的全部记忆，该主题需用不超过 50 个词进行描述。该效果为永久，并会用模糊不清的迷 haze 补上这些缺失。

You alter the target's memories by erasing a memory, enhancing a memory's clarity, altering a memory, or adding a false memory. The target can attempt a Will save to resist the spell.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and realizes you tried to alter its memory.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of rewrite memory, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure During the first 5 minutes of the spell's duration, you can Sustain the spell to modify a memory once each round. When you do, you imagine up to 6 seconds of memory to modify, to a maximum of 5 continuous minutes of memory.

Any memories you've altered remain changed as long as the spell is active. If the target moves out of range before the 5 minutes is up, you can't alter any further memories.

Heightened (6th) You can Cast the Spell on a willing target to suppress all memory of a particular topic, detailed in 50 words or fewer. The effect is permanent, and it patches these omissions with an indistinct haze.

Chilling Darkness.name: 寒意黑暗 Chilling Darkness
Chilling Darkness.description:
你射出一道彻骨寒冷、夹杂着邪恶能量的黑暗射线。进行一次远程法术攻击。该射线造成 5d6 点寒冷伤害。若目标具有圣洁特征，你额外造成 5d6 点精魂伤害。

如果射线穿过一片魔法光亮术区域，或以受魔法光亮术影响的生物为目标，阴冷黑暗会尝试反制该光亮术。若你需要判定射线是否穿过一片光亮术区域，请在你自己与该法术的目标之间画一条线。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害。

成功 目标承受全部伤害。

强化（+1） 寒冷伤害增加 2d6，且对圣洁生物造成的精魂伤害增加 2d6。

You shoot an utterly cold ray of darkness tinged with unholy energy. Make a ranged spell attack. The ray deals 5d6 cold damage. If the target has the holy trait, you deal an extra 5d6 spirit damage.

If the ray passes through an area of magical light or targets a creature affected by magical light, chilling darkness attempts to counteract the light. If you need to determine whether the ray passes through an area of light, draw a line between yourself and the spell's target.

Critical Success The target takes double damage.

Success The target takes full damage.

Heightened (+1) The cold damage increases by 2d6, and the spirit damage against holy creatures increases by 2d6.

Telekinetic Maneuver (At Will).name: 念动操控（随意） Telekinetic Maneuver (At Will)
Telekinetic Maneuver (At Will).description:
随着一阵念动力的爆发，你移动一个敌人或其携带的某件物品。你可以尝试对目标进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{缴械}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{重新定位}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，并以法术攻击检定替代运动检定。

With a rush of telekinetic power, you move a foe or something they carry. You can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the target using a spell attack roll instead of an Athletics check.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你向目标植入恐惧；它必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑}，持续1轮。

升阶（3环） 你的目标最多可以是五个生物。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Fear (At Will).name: 恐惧术（随意） Fear (At Will)
Fear (At Will).description:
你在目标心中种下恐惧；它必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}。

失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}。

大失败 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃离}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（3环） 你的目标最多可以是五个生物。

You plant fear in the target; it must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to five creatures.

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动力投射物 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你将一个松散、无人持用且位于射程内、负载为1或以下的物体掷向目标。对目标进行一次法术攻击检定。若你命中，则造成2d6点钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害——具体由你掷出的物体决定。被掷出的物品的任何特定特征或魔法属性都不会影响此次攻击或其伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成正常伤害。

升环（+1） 伤害增加1d6。

You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target. If you hit, you deal 2d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage—as appropriate for the object you hurled. No specific traits or magic properties of the hurled item affect the attack or the damage.

Critical Success You deal double damage.

Success You deal full damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Malevolent Possession.name: 恶意附身 Malevolent Possession
Malevolent Possession.description:
夺尸魔试图附身于一个邻近的实体生物。这与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession}法术具有相同的效果（@Check[will|dc:34]），且持续时间为无限，但由于夺尸魔没有实体躯体，因此它们不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识}，并且在效果结束时也不会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}；不过，如果这具身体失去意识或被杀死，它们会受到@Damage[5d6[spirit]]伤害。

如果夺尸魔以“恶意附身”控制了目标，那么当夺尸魔离开时，目标对于被附身期间的记忆只剩下混乱而不连贯的片段。

The dybbuk attempts to possess an adjacent corporeal creature. This has the same effect as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession} spell (@Check[will|dc:34]) with an unlimited duration, except since the dybbuk doesn't have a physical body, they aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, and aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} when the effect ends, though they take @Damage[5d6[spirit]] damage if the body is knocked unconscious or killed.

If the dybbuk took control of the target with Malevolent Possession, when the dybbuk departs, the target has only incoherent memories of the interval it was possessed.

Dybbuk.publicNotes:
被称为夺尸魔的离体精魂，源自那些在来世中不得安息的灵魂，往往是因为他们生前犯下了某种重大罪行。据说，这些精魂会通过附身受害者来依附于生者世界，以逃避来世中等待着他们的惩罚。凡人唯有困住、震慑或摧毁这类精魂，才有望将它们驱逐回去。

夺尸魔通常是男性的精魂，它们会藏身于被附身的受害者体内。它们附身的目标通常是即将迎来新婚之夜的年轻女性，这常被视为婚配不合的凶兆，尤其是在包办婚姻中。男性和非二元性别的受害者也确实存在，只是数量较少，而且往往也发生在一段不幸婚姻开始前夕。没有人确切知道夺尸魔为何会被这类情形吸引，不过这或许是因为夺尸魔那犯禁的灵魂，试图将混乱带入社会中最受严格规束的层面。

被夺尸魔附身的受害者可能会变得喧闹粗鄙，拒绝进食或饮水，做出亵渎之举，或以其他方式在受害者家中兴风作浪。附身结束后，被附身者不会记得这些事件。

某些经过特殊训练的祭司阶层能够通过驱魔将夺尸魔从受害者体内驱逐出去。通常，这会采用一种结合烟雾、吹奏公羊角号以及诵念圣洁诗句的方法。然而，驱魔极其困难且危险；由于这些恶意精魂的力量异常强大，施行驱魔的祭司必须具备渊博的知识与高超的技能。

The discorporated spirits called dybbuks arise from souls denied respite in the afterlife, often because they committed some great transgression in life. These spirits are said to cling to life through possessing victims to escape the punishment awaiting them in the afterlife. Only by trapping, cowing, or destroying such spirits can a mortal hope to drive them back.

Dybbuks, who are most often the spirits of men, hide within possessed victims. Their targets of possession are usually young women on the eve of their wedding nights, which can be seen as an omen of an ill-fitting match, particularly in arranged marriages. Male and nonbinary victims do exist as well, though in lesser quantities, and also often on the eve of a troubled marriage. No one knows for sure why dybbuks are drawn to such situations, though it may be because the transgressive soul of a dybbuk seeks to bring chaos to the most strictly regimented aspects of society.

A victim possessed by a dybbuk might be loud and crude, refuse to eat or drink, perform profane acts, or otherwise stir up trouble in the victim's household. The possessed victim has no memory of these events after their possession ends.

Certain classes of specially trained priests can expel dybbuks from their victims through exorcism. Typically, this uses a methodology combining smoke, the blowing of a horn from a ram, and the recitation of holy verses. Exorcisms are, however, extremely difficult and dangerous, and require great knowledge and skill on the part of the priest due to the power of these malevolent spirits.

Ash-Filled Bronze Bowl.tokenName: 盛满灰烬的青铜碗 Ash-Filled Bronze Bowl

Ornate Bronze Bowl.name: 华丽青铜碗 Ornate Bronze Bowl

Ash-Filled Bronze Bowl.hazarddescription:
