@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.u1RqjdJzCmN1s2lo]{A14. Commander's Quarters}
Ash-Filled Bronze Bowl.prototypeToken: 盛满灰烬的青铜碗 Ash-Filled Bronze Bowl

Battlefield Bound.name: 战场束缚 Battlefield Bound
Battlefield Bound.description:
若没有战争的召唤，终焉卫士只能游荡到离其未能守住之地很短的一段距离，通常为120英尺。有些终焉卫士则不是被束缚于某个特定地点，而是被束缚于一个省、王国或国家。

Without a call to war, a last guard can stray only a short distance from the location they failed to defend, typically 120 feet. Some last guards are instead bound to a province, kingdom, or nation, rather than a specific location.

Lifesense 60 feet.name: 生命感知 60 尺 Lifesense 60 feet

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description:
当一名终焉卫士被摧毁时，它会在 [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4天} 后于其所绑定的位置内重塑形体，并完全恢复。只有当终焉卫士成功保卫其所绑定的位置免受大规模攻击，或响应战争的召唤时，它才能被永久摧毁并前往来世。

When a last guard is destroyed, they re-form after [[/br 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the location they're bound to, fully healed. A last guard can be permanently destroyed and move on to the afterlife only if they successfully defend the location they're bound to from large-scale attack, or fulfill a call to war.

Frightful Battle Cry.name: 惊惧战吼 Frightful Battle Cry
Frightful Battle Cry.description:
终焉卫士齐声发出撼动灵魂的咆哮。@Template[cone|distance:60]内的所有生物受到 @Damage[7d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[will|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect]）。任何豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 4}）。

如果该部队占据 8 个或更少的方格，此区域缩小为 @Template[cone|distance:30]。

The last guards unleash a soul-shaking bellow in unison. All creatures in a @Template[cone|distance:60] take @Damage[7d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect]). Any creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} on a critical failure).

If the troop occupies 8 or fewer squares, this area decreases to a @Template[cone|distance:30].

Ghostly Blades.name: 鬼灵战刃 Ghostly Blades
Ghostly Blades.description:
1 到 3

频率 每轮一次

效果 终焉卫士以它们的幽影弯刃对 @Template[emanation|distance:5] 内的每个敌人发动一次协同攻击（@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]）。伤害取决于所用的动作数。

1 @Damage[(1d8+2)[slashing],1d8[void]]{1d8+2 挥砍伤害和 1d8 虚空伤害}

2 @Damage[(2d8+14)[slashing],2d8[void]]{2d8+14 挥砍伤害和 2d8 虚空伤害}

3 @Damage[(3d8+14)[slashing],3d8[void]]{3d8+14 挥砍伤害和 3d8 虚空伤害}

1 to 3

Frequency once per round

Effect The last guards engage in a coordinated attack with their spectral curve blades against each enemy in a @Template[emanation|distance:5] (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]). The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(1d8+2)[slashing],1d8[void]]{1d8+2 slashing and 1d8 void damage}

2 @Damage[(2d8+14)[slashing],2d8[void]]{2d8+14 slashing and 2d8 void damage}

3 @Damage[(3d8+14)[slashing],3d8[void]]{3d8+14 slashing and 3d8 void damage}

Spectral Charge.name: 幽灵冲锋 Spectral Charge
Spectral Charge.description:
终焉卫士发起冲锋，蜂拥穿过敌人。该部队飞行，最多可达其速度的两倍，对其移动穿过空间中的每个生物造成 @Damage[4d8[void]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]）。任何豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2}）。该部队在单次使用幽灵冲锋时，对每个生物至多只能影响一次。

The last guards charge, swarming through their foes. The troop Flies up to double its Speed, dealing @Damage[4d8[void]] damage to each creature whose space it moves through (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic]). Any creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure). The troop can affect each creature only once in a single use of Spectral Charge.

Troop Movement.name: 部队移动 Troop Movement
Troop Movement.description:
每当该部队大步移动时，他们会先以自由动作（）整队，收拢成一个20尺×20尺的区域（减去任何缺失的方格），然后再移动至多等同于其速度的距离。这与一个超巨型生物的移动方式完全相同。

Whenever the troop Strides, they first Form Up as a free action to condense into a 20-foot-by-20-foot area (minus any missing squares), then move up to their Speed. This works just like a Gargantuan creature moving.

Oceanius Arcely.name: 欧申尼乌斯·阿尔塞利 Oceanius Arcely
Oceanius Arcely.tokenName: 欧申尼乌斯·阿塞利 Oceanius Arcely

Divine Innate Spells.name: 神术内在法术 Divine Innate Spells

Earthquake.name: 地震术 Earthquake
Earthquake.description:
你震动大地，将生物掀入裂缝，并使建筑坍塌。GM 可能会在特定区域添加额外效果。悬崖可能会坍塌，导致生物坠落；或者湖泊可能会因其表面下方裂缝张开而排空，留下一片流沙泥沼。

  • 震动地面 地面变为困难地形，站在其上的生物在攻击检定、AC 和技能检定上承受 -2 环境减值。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{法术效果：地震术（震动地面）}
  • 裂缝 每个站在地面上的生物都必须在其回合开始时尝试一次反射豁免，以稳住身形并避免坠入其下方张开的 40 尺深裂缝中。裂缝是永久性的，其侧壁需要成功的 @Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb] 才能攀爬。
  • 坍塌 建筑和天花板可能会坍塌。GM 为每个建筑或天花板进行一次纯骰检定（坚固建筑为 @Check[flat|dc:16]，普通建筑和大多数天然构造为 @Check[flat|dc:14]，劣质建筑为 @Check[flat|dc:9]，GM 认为合适时可统一上调或下调）。坍塌会对其中受困的每个生物造成 11d6 钝击伤害，并允许进行一次基础反射豁免。生物会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{伏倒}，除非其重度成功；若其重度失败，则还会坠入裂缝。

升阶（10环） 你制造一场巨大的地震，足以摧毁一处聚居地。射程增加至半英里，区域增加至四分之一英里爆发。

You shake the ground, topple creatures into fissures, and collapse structures. The GM might add additional effects in certain areas. Cliffs might collapse, causing creatures to fall, or a lake might drain as fissures open up below its surface, leaving a morass of quicksand.

  • Shaking Ground The ground is difficult terrain, and creatures on it take a -2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, AC, and skill checks. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{Spell Effect: Earthquake (Shaking Ground)}
  • Fissures Each creature on the ground must attempt a Reflex save at the start of its turn to keep its footing and avoid falling into 40-foot-deep fissures that open beneath it. The fissures are permanent, and their sides require successful @Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb] to Climb.
  • Collapse Structures and ceilings might collapse. The GM rolls a flat check for each (@Check[flat|dc:16] for a sturdy structure, @Check[flat|dc:14] for an average structure and most natural formations, @Check[flat|dc:9] for a shoddy structure, all adjusted higher or lower as the GM sees fit). A collapse deals 11d6 bludgeoning damage to each creature caught in it with a basic Reflex save. A creature falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} unless it critically succeeds and falls into a fissure if it critically fails.

Heightened (10th) You create a massive earthquake that can devastate a settlement. The range increases to half a mile and the area to a quarter-mile burst.

Divine Decree.name: 神谕敕令 Divine Decree
Divine Decree.description:
你吟诵出一段来自你信仰的强力祷言，降下会伤害那些违逆你理念者的诫命。你对区域内的敌人造成 7d10 精魂伤害；每个敌人都必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}，持续 1 分钟。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入衰弱 2，持续 1 分钟。如果你位于自己的本源位面，而该生物不在其本源位面上，则该生物会被送回其本源位面。10 级或以下的生物还必须在一次意志豁免中成功，否则会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹} 1 分钟；如果其大失败，则会死亡（这是一种死亡效果）。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d10，且在大失败时必须尝试第二次豁免的生物等级上限提高 2。

You utter a potent litany from your faith, a mandate that harms those who oppose your ideals. You deal 7d10 spirit damage to your enemies in the area; each enemy must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is enfeebled 2 for 1 minute. If you're on your home plane and the creature is not, the creature is sent back to its home plane. A creature of 10th level or lower must also succeed at a Will save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 minute; if it critically fails, it dies (this is a death effect).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10, and the level of creatures that must attempt a second save on a critical failure increases by 2.

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨位面传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你拥有一把通往目的位面的位面钥匙，并将其作为法器使用

你与盟友穿越存在诸位面之间的屏障。目标移动到另一个位面，例如火焰位面、冥界或外裂隙。你必须知晓目的位面确实存在，并使用一把以该位面的材料制成的魔法位面钥匙，作为此法术的法器。大多数著名位面的位面钥匙都属于非常见，就像法术跨位面传送一样；而较为隐秘的位面和半位面则常常拥有稀有，甚至可能是独特的位面钥匙。

该法术极其不精确，你会出现在由其中一个目标（由你选择）上次前往该位面时所在最后地点偏离1d20×25英里的位置。如果对所有目标而言，这都是第一次前往某个位面，你会出现在该位面的随机地点。跨位面传送不提供返回旅行的手段，不过再次施放跨位面传送可以让你回到先前所在的位面，除非存在特殊情况。

Requirements You have a planar key for the destination plane, used as a locus

You and your allies traverse the barriers between planes of existence. The targets move to another plane, such as the Plane of Fire, the Netherworld, or the Outer Rifts. You must know the destination plane exists and use a magic planar key created from material from that plane as a locus for the spell. While the planar keys for most prominent planes are uncommon, just like the spell interplanar teleport, more obscure planes and demiplanes often have rare or possibly even unique planar keys.

The spell is highly imprecise, and you appear 1d20×25 miles from the last place one of the targets (of your choice) was located the last time that target traveled to the plane. If it's the first time traveling to a particular plane for all targets, you appear at a random location on the plane. Interplanar teleport doesn't provide a means of return travel, though casting interplanar teleport again allows you to return to your previous plane unless there are extenuating circumstances.

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
一团炽烈阳光形成的强大光球在区域内爆炸，对区域内所有生物造成 8d10 火焰伤害，且对不死生物额外造成 @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] 活力伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且永久陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}。

如果该光球与一片魔法黑暗区域重叠，阳炎爆会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

强化（+1） 火焰伤害增加 1d10，且对不死生物造成的活力伤害增加 1d10。

A powerful globe of searing sunlight explodes in the area, dealing 8d10 fire damage to all creatures in the area, plus an additional @Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]] damage to undead creatures. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} permanently.

If the globe overlaps with an area of magical darkness, sunburst attempts to counteract the darkness effect.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 1d10, and the vitality damage against undead increases by 1d10.

Blessed Boundary.name: 祝圣边界 Blessed Boundary
Blessed Boundary.description:
数百个神术力量的显现出现，盘旋成一个巨大的保护球体。这些显现通常看起来像带刺的碎片，但也常常呈现出与施法者神祇相关的外观。球体内部中空，这些显现在外缘形成一层 2 英寸厚的壳层。施放法术时，你可以选择使这个爆发区域变小，每次以 5 尺为单位递减。该壳层提供掩蔽，并且可以穿过坚固地形而不对其造成影响。当球体被创造出来时，每个与壳层相交的生物，或试图穿过壳层的生物，都会受到 7d8 点力场伤害。生物也会在其回合结束时受到该伤害，但仅限于其在该回合中尚未因壳层受到过伤害。其效果由生物的反射豁免决定。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，被朝你选择的方向推离至多 10 尺，并结束其移动。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，被朝你选择的方向推离至多 20 尺，并结束其移动。

升环（+1） 伤害增加 1d8。

Manifestations of divine force appear in the hundreds, swirling in a massive, protective sphere. These typically look like spiky fragments, but often take on an appearance themed to the deity of the caster. The sphere is hollow, with the manifestations forming a shell 2 inches deep on the outer edge. You can choose to make the burst smaller, in 5-foot increments, when you cast it. The shell provides cover and can intersect solid terrain without affecting it. The shell deals 7d8 force damage to each creature who intersects with the shell when the sphere's created, or who attempts to move through the shell. The creature also takes the damage at the end of its turn, but only if it didn't already take damage from the shell that turn. The effects are determined by a creature's Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is pushed up to 10 feet in the direction of your choice, and ends its movement.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is pushed up to 20 feet in the direction of your choice, and ends its movement.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Breath of Life.name: 生命之息 Breath of Life
Breath of Life.description:
触发 射程内的一名活着的生物将要死亡。

你的祝福在生物死亡的瞬间将其复苏。你阻止目标死亡，并为目标恢复 5d8 点生命值。如果触发此法术的效果是死亡效果，或是不留下遗骸的效果，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{解离术}，你不能使用生命之息。

升环（+2） 治疗量增加 1d8。

Trigger A living creature within range would die.

Your blessing revives a creature at the moment of its death. You prevent the target from dying and restore 5d8 Hit Points to the target. You can't use breath of life if the triggering effect was a death effect or an effect that leaves no remains, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]{Disintegrate}

Heightened (+2) The healing increases by 1d8.

Call Spirit.name: 唤魂术 Call Spirit
Call Spirit.description:
你撕开通往来世的帷幕，从其最终安息之处召来一个精魂。你必须指名召唤该精魂，并且必须提供与该精魂有关联的事物，例如一件所有物、一件衣物，或其尸体的一部分。一个不愿理会你召唤的精魂可以尝试进行一次意志豁免来避免被召来；若大成功，则一个恶作剧的精魂会冒充你原本想要召唤的那个精魂。若你生前未曾见过该精魂，此意志豁免的 DC 降低 2。无论如何，显现出来的精魂都会呈现为你原本想要召唤的那个生物的飘渺形态。在持续时间内的每一分钟，你都可以向该精魂提出一个问题。它可以随心所欲地回答，甚至拒绝回答。若该精魂不在来世中（例如它是不死），则除大失败外的所有结果都改为使用失败效果。

大成功 该精魂特别配合，即使它有强烈理由要欺瞒你，它进行欺瞒检定时仍要承受 -2 环境减值。

成功 你召来了该精魂。

失败 你未能召来精魂。

大失败 一个或多个邪恶精魂显现并发动攻击。

You tear the veil to the afterlife and call a spirit from its final resting place. You must call the spirit by name, and you must provide a connection to the spirit, such as a possession, a garment, or a piece of its corpse. A spirit unwilling to heed your call can attempt a Will save to avoid it; on a critical success, a trickster spirit Impersonates the spirit you meant to call. The DC of the Will save is 2 lower if you haven't met the spirit in life. Either way, the spirit appears as a wispy form of the creature you meant to call. Each minute of the duration, you can ask the spirit a question. It can answer how it pleases or even refuse to answer. If the spirit isn't in the afterlife (such as if it's an undead), all results other than critical failures use the failure effect.

Critical Success The spirit is particularly cooperative, and even if it has strong reasons to deceive you, it takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its Deception checks.

Success You call the spirit.

Failure You fail to call a spirit.

Critical Failure One or more evil spirits appear and attack.

Resurrect.name: 复生术 Resurrect
Resurrect.description:
你试图呼唤目标的灵魂并将其送回身体。这要求目标的身体在场且相对完整。目标必须是在过去一年内死亡的。如果 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{法拉斯玛} 已决定目标命数已尽，或目标不愿返回，则该仪式会自动失败，但你会在成功通过宗教检定后发现这一点，并且可以在不支付代价的情况下结束仪式。

大成功 你以复生术复活目标。其带着全部生命值复生，并保有死亡时准备好的相同法术以及各项池中原有的点数，同时仍承受旧身体上的任何长期衰弱。在复活过程中，目标会遇见其所信奉神祇的一名使者，对方会激励他们，使其在1周内的攻击检定、察觉、豁免和技能检定获得+1状态加值。目标也会因其在死后世界中的经历而以某种方式永久改变，例如性格略有转变、头发中出现一缕白发，或长出一个奇怪的新胎记。

成功 如同大成功，但目标复生时仅有1点生命值，且没有准备任何法术，也没有任何池中的点数，同时仍受旧身体上任何长期衰弱的影响。角色在墓园中的经历并未激励他们，而是使其暂时虚弱。目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续1周；在这一周结束前，这些状态无法以任何方式被移除或减少。

失败 你的尝试没有成功。

大失败 某些可怕的事情出了严重差错——一个邪恶精魂占据了这具身体，身体转变为某种特殊的不死生物，或是目标遭遇了更糟的命运。

强化（6环） 你可以复活最高12级的目标，且基础花费为125 gp。

强化（7环） 即使只有身体的一小部分，你也可以施展 复生术；若成功或大成功，该仪式会创造一具新的身体。目标必须是在过去10年内死亡的。该仪式需要四名次级施法者，且每人的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为14级，基础花费为200 gp。

强化（8环） 如同7环，但目标最高可以为16级，且基础花费为300 gp。

强化（9环） 即使没有身体，只要你知道目标的名字，并且曾在任何时候触碰过其身体的一部分，你也可以施展 复生术。目标必须是在过去100年内死亡的，且在成功时不会获得这些负面状态。该仪式需要八名次级施法者，且每人的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为18级，基础花费为600 gp。

强化（10环） 如同9环，但不再考虑目标是在多久之前死亡的。该仪式需要16名次级施法者，且每人的等级都必须至少为目标等级的一半。目标最高可以为20级，且该仪式的基础花费为1,000 gp。

You attempt to call forth the target's soul and return it to its body. This requires the target's body to be present and relatively intact. The target must have died within the past year. If @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.deities.Item.QZD0u1jxwz0kj8uI]{Pharasma} has decided that the target's time has come or the target doesn't wish to return, this ritual automatically fails, but you discover this after the successful Religion check and can end the ritual without paying the cost.

Critical Success You resurrect the target. They return to life with full Hit Points and the same spells prepared and points in their pools they had when they died, and still suffering from any long-term debilitations of the old body. The target meets an agent of their deity during the resurrection who inspires them, granting them a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks for 1 week. The target is also permanently changed in some way by their time in the afterlife, such as gaining a slight personality shift, a streak of white in the hair, or a strange new birthmark.

Success As critical success, except the target returns to life with 1 Hit Point and no spells prepared or points in any pools, and still is affected by any long-term debilitations of the old body. Instead of inspiring them, the character's time in the Boneyard has left them temporarily debilitated. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 week; these conditions can't be removed or reduced by any means until the week has passed.

Failure Your attempt is unsuccessful.

Critical Failure Something goes horribly wrong-an evil spirit possesses the body, the body transforms into a special kind of undead, or some worse fate befalls the target.

Heightened (6th) You can resurrect a target of up to 12th level, and the base cost is 125 gp.

Heightened (7th) You can use resurrect even with only a small portion of the body; the ritual creates a new body on a success or critical success. The target must have died within the past decade. The ritual requires four secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 14th level, and the base cost is 200 gp.

Heightened (8th) As 7th rank, but the target can be up to 16th level and the base cost is 300 gp.

Heightened (9th) You can use resurrect even without the body as long as you know the target's name and have touched a portion of its body at any time. The target must have died within the past century, and it doesn't gain the negative conditions on a success. The ritual requires eight secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 18th level, and the base cost is 600 gp.

Heightened (10th) As 9th rank, except it doesn't matter how long ago the target died. The ritual requires 16 secondary casters, each of whom must be at least half the target's level. The target can be up to 20th level, and the ritual's base cost is 1,000 gp.

Truespeech (Constant).name: 真言通晓（持续） Truespeech (Constant)
Truespeech (Constant).description:
目标无论使用何种语言都能理解所有词语，也能说出其他生物的语言。处于由不同生物组成的群体中时，每当目标说话，它都可以选择一个生物，并以该生物能理解的语言说话，即使目标并不知道那是什么语言。

升阶（7环） 持续时间为 8 小时。

The target can understand all words regardless of language and also speak the languages of other creatures. When in a mixed group of creatures, each time the target speaks, it can choose a creature and speak in a language that creature understands, even if the target doesn't know what language that is.

Heightened (7th) The duration is 8 hours.

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣之怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你引导神性的狂怒对抗你的敌人。你对区域内的敌人造成 4d10 点精魂伤害，具体取决于他们的强韧豁免结果。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；当其处于恶心状态时，它也会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1d10 点。

You channel the fury of divinity against your foes. You deal 4d10 spirit damage to enemies in the area, depending on their Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}; while it's sickened, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d10.

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动自如 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你排斥会妨碍生物或减缓其移动的效果。处于此法术效果影响下时，目标无视会使其速度获得环境减值的效果。当其尝试对使其处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} 状态的效果进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} 时，他们自动成功，除非该效果是魔法的，且其环阶高于 行动自如 法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{法术效果：行动自如}

You repel effects that would hinder a creature or slow its movement. While under this spell's effect, the target ignores effects that would give them a circumstance penalty to Speed. When they attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} an effect that has them @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, they automatically succeed unless the effect is magical and of a higher rank than the unfettered movement spell.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Cleanse Affliction.name: 净化苦难 Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description:
温和的恢复性魔法会压制毒素以及更复杂病症的效果。选择目标身上的一种苦难，例如诅咒、疾病或毒素。若其已进展超过第一阶段，则将其阶段降低一级。对此种苦难的同一病例，此降低只能生效一次；当该病例被完全治愈时，该病例即告结束。虽然这种降低不能再次发生，但此法术的高环版本会在每次施放时尝试反制。

升环（3环） 若该苦难是疾病或毒素，则尝试反制该苦难。

升环（4环） 若该苦难是诅咒、疾病或毒素，则尝试反制该苦难。

Gentle restorative magic pushes back the effects of toxins and more complex maladies. Choose an affliction on the target, such as a curse, disease, or poison. If it has advanced past stage one, reduce the stage by one. This reduction can be applied only once to a given case of an affliction, with the case ending when it's completely cured. Although the reduction can't occur again, heightened versions of this spell attempt to counteract with each casting.

Heightened (3rd) Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a disease or poison.

Heightened (4th) Attempt to counteract the affliction if it is a curse, disease, or poison.

Clear Mind (At Will).name: 澄明心智（随意） Clear Mind (At Will)
Clear Mind (At Will).description:
你将心灵污染从目标的思绪中驱逐。尝试反制一个你选择的、使目标陷入以下状态之一的效果：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}。如果你反制该效果失败，但若其反制等级低 2 级你本会成功，则改为压制该效果直到你下个回合开始。该效果被压制时，其持续时间不会流逝。此法术不能反制或压制作为诅咒、疾病或目标自然状态一部分的状态。

高阶化（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}加入状态列表。

高阶化（6环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}加入状态列表。

高阶化（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned}加入状态列表。

You drive mental contamination from the target's mind. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}. If you failed to counteract the effect but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. This spell can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of curses, diseases, or a natural state of the target.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description:
你瓦解一个法术或效果背后的魔法。对目标尝试一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在10分钟内会变为其类型对应的普通物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Dispel Magic (At Will).name: 解除魔法（随意） Dispel Magic (At Will)
Dispel Magic (At Will).description:
你解开一个法术或效果背后的魔法。尝试对目标进行一次反制检定。若你成功反制一个魔法物品，该物品在 10 分钟内会变为其同类型的凡俗物品。这不会改变该物品的非魔法属性。若目标是一件神器或类似物品，你会自动失败。

You unravel the magic behind a spell or effect. Attempt a counteract check against the target. If you successfully counteract a magic item, the item becomes a mundane item of its type for 10 minutes. This doesn't change the item's non-magical properties. If the target is an artifact or similar item, you automatically fail.

Invisibility (At Will; Self Only).name: 隐形术（随意；仅限自身） Invisibility (At Will; Self Only)
Invisibility (At Will; Self Only).description:
幻象扭曲目标周围的光线，使其成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形}。这使其对所有生物而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉} 状态，不过这些生物仍可尝试找出目标，从而使其改为对它们处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿} 状态。如果目标使用了敌对动作，则该法术会在该敌对动作完成后结束。

升环（4环） 该法术持续1分钟，但如果目标使用敌对动作，它不会结束。

Illusions bend light around the target, rendering it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. This makes it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} to all creatures, though the creatures can attempt to find the target, making it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them instead. If the target uses a hostile action, the spell ends after that hostile action is completed.

Heightened (4th) The spell lasts 1 minute, but it doesn't end if the target uses a hostile action.

Sure Footing.name: 坚实步伐 Sure Footing
Sure Footing.description:
你将目标的肢体从妨碍移动的病症中解放出来。尝试反制你所选择的一个对目标施加以下状态之一的效果：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}。如果你未能反制该效果，但如果其反制等级低 2 级你本可以成功，则改为压制该效果，直到你下个回合开始。该效果被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

该法术无法反制或压制诅咒、疾病，或属于目标正常状态一部分的状态。

升环（4环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}加入状态列表。

升环（6环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}加入状态列表。

升环（8环） 将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑}加入状态列表。

You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Charm.name: 魅惑 Charm
Charm.description:
对目标而言，你的话语如蜜糖般甜美，而你的面容仿佛沐浴在梦幻般的朦胧之中。它必须进行一次意志豁免；如果你或你的盟友最近曾威胁过它，或对它使用过敌对动作，则此次豁免获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。若你对目标使用敌对动作，该法术便会结束。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己曾被魅惑，除非它与你的友谊，或你说服它采取的行动，与它的预期相冲突；这意味着你有可能通过非魔法手段说服目标继续把你当作朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你曾试图魅惑它。

成功 目标不受影响，但会认为你的法术只是某种无害的效果，而非魅惑，除非它辨识出了该法术。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly}。如果它原本已是Friendly，则变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}。它不能对你使用敌对动作。

大失败 目标对你的态度变为Helpful，并且不能对你使用敌对动作。

升阶（4环） 持续时间延长至你下一次进行每日准备时。

升阶（8环） 持续时间延长至你下一次进行每日准备时，且你最多可以将10个生物作为目标。

To the target, your words are honey and your visage seems bathed in a dreamy haze. It must attempt a Will save, with a +4 circumstance bonus if you or your allies recently threatened it or used hostile actions against it.

You can Dismiss the spell. If you use hostile actions against the target, the spell ends. When the spell ends, the target doesn't necessarily realize it was charmed unless its friendship with you or the actions you convinced it to take clash with its expectations, meaning you could potentially convince the target to continue being your friend via mundane means.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and aware you tried to charm it.

Success The target is unaffected but thinks your spell was something harmless instead of charm, unless it identifies the spell.

Failure The target's attitude becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{Friendly} toward you. If it was Friendly, it becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful}. It can't use hostile actions against you.

Critical Failure The target's attitude becomes Helpful toward you, and it can't use hostile actions against you.

Heightened (4th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations.

Heightened (8th) The duration lasts until the next time you make your daily preparations, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导活力能量来治疗活物或伤害不死生物。若目标是自愿的活体生物，你恢复其1d8生命值。若目标是不死生物，你对其造成等量的活力伤害，且它必须进行一次基础强韧豁免。施放此法术时你所花费的动作数决定其目标、射程、区域及其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 (专注) 该法术的射程为30尺。若你正在治疗活体生物，恢复的生命值增加8点。

3 (专注) 你将活力能量分散为一个@Template[emanation|distance:30]。这会以爆发内所有活体生物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗量或伤害量增加1d8，且2动作版本的额外治疗增加8点。

You channel vital energy to heal the living or damage the undead. If the target is a willing living creature, you restore 1d8 Hit Points. If the target is undead, you deal that amount of vitality damage to it, and it gets a basic Fortitude save. The number of actions you spend when Casting this Spell determines its targets, range, area, and other parameters.

1 The spell has a range of touch.

2 (concentrate) The spell has a range of 30 feet. If you're healing a living creature, increase the Hit Points restored by 8.

3 (concentrate) You disperse vital energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30]. This targets all living and undead creatures in the burst.

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing or damage increases by 1d8, and the extra healing for the 2-action version increases by 8.

Greatsword.name: 巨剑 Greatsword
Greatsword.description:
这把巨大的双手剑几乎和其持用者一样高。它的下半段剑刃通常会稍微磨钝一些，以便在近身战斗中握持，从而获得额外的杠杆力。

This immense two-handed sword is nearly as tall as its wielder. Its lower blade is often somewhat dulled to allow it to be gripped for extra leverage in close-quarter fights.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时，所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Unholy).name: 再生 20（被邪恶停用） Regeneration 20 (Deactivated by Unholy)

Aura of Righteousness.name: 正义灵光 Aura of Righteousness
Aura of Righteousness.description:
20尺。位于该天使灵光中的盟友，对邪恶生物的AC获得+2状态加值，且对邪恶生物的伤害掷骰获得+2状态加值。灵光中的区域对邪恶生物而言属于困难地形。

20 feet. Allies in the angel's aura gain a +2 status bonus to AC against unholy creatures and a +2 status bonus to damage rolls against unholy creatures. The area in the aura is difficult terrain for unholy creatures.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
该天使呈现为任何小型或中型类人生物的外貌。这不会改变其速度或打击。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

The angel takes on the appearance of any Small or Medium humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Holy Armaments.name: 圣洁武装 Holy Armaments
Holy Armaments.description:
当天使持用任意武器时，该武器获得圣洁属性符文的效果。

Any weapon gains the effect of a holy property rune while the angel wields it.

Oceanius Arcely.blurb:
男性天使守卫
Male angel guardians
Oceanius Arcely.prototypeToken: 欧申尼乌斯·阿尔切利 Oceanius Arcely

Antechamber Hat.name: 前厅帽 Antechamber Hat

Spacious Hat (Type IV).name: 宽敞帽（IV型） Spacious Hat (Type IV)
Spacious Hat (Type IV).description:
尽管它看起来只是一顶帽带上插着一根象鸟羽毛的帽子，这个宽敞袋会通向一处比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。帽子内部所容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互，将物品存入其中或取出，就像使用普通袋子一样。虽然这顶帽子能容纳大量物品，但物体仍必须能够通过袋口，才能被存放进去。

如果这顶帽子超载或损坏，它就会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远遗失。若将它翻到里面朝外，里面的物品会毫发无损地掉出来，但必须将帽子恢复原状后才能再次使用。被放入帽中的活体生物有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，之后便会开始窒息，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 挣脱。帽中物品在被先取出之前不会提供任何好处。帽中的物品无法被只能侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 150 负载

Though it appears to be a hat with an elephant bird feather tucked into its band, this spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the hat doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the hat can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the hat is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the hat must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the hat has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the hat provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the hat can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 150 Bulk

Hat Note.name: 帽注 Hat Note
Hat Note.description:
“视情况用于支付我的复活费用或葬礼费用。”

"To pay for my resurrection or funeral, as appropriate."

Pouch full of Diamonds.name: 一袋钻石 Pouch full of Diamonds

Antechamber Hat.hazarddescription:

Clarethe's Gifts.name: 克拉雷瑟的赋礼 Clarethe's Gifts
Clarethe's Gifts.tokenName: 克拉雷瑟的赋礼 Clarethe's Gifts

Antimagic Oil.name: 反魔油 Antimagic Oil
Antimagic Oil.description:
启动 A（操纵）

这种油含有能够排斥几乎所有类型魔法的能量。当你将这种油涂抹在护甲上时，穿戴该护甲的生物在1分钟内免疫所有法术、魔法物品的效果（包括穿戴者自己的以及他人的），以及具有魔法特征的效果。

这种油既不会影响护甲的魔法，也不会影响攻击穿戴者的武器上的根本符文。来自20级或更高等级来源的魔法效果，例如神祇，仍然会对该护甲的穿戴者生效。

Activate A (manipulate)

This oil contains energy that repels nearly all types of magic. When you apply this oil to armor, the creature wearing the armor becomes immune to all spells, effects of magic items (the wearer's and those of others), and effects with the magical trait for 1 minute.

The oil affects neither the magic of the armor nor the fundamental runes of weapons attacking the wearer. Magical effects from a source of 20th level or higher, such as a deity, still function on the armor's wearer.

Marvelous Medicines (Greater).name: 奇妙药剂（强效） Marvelous Medicines (Greater)
Marvelous Medicines (Greater).description:
这个治疗者工具包内含看似取之不尽的绷带、草药和品质无可挑剔的治疗物品，使你获得医疗检定的+3物品加值。

如果你在使用奇妙药剂进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{治疗毒素} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{治疗疾病} 时，在你掷骰检定之前，这些药剂会尝试反制你正在治疗的毒素或疾病，反制环阶为8，反制调整值为 [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}。这是一项治疗效果。

这些药剂不能再次用于为该患者治疗同一种苦难

This healer's toolkit contains a seemingly endless supply of bandages, herbs, and healing items of impeccable quality, granting you a +3 item bonus to Medicine checks.

If you use the marvelous medicines when you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, before you roll your check, the medicines attempt to counteract the poison or disease you're treating, with a counteract rank of 8 and a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}. This is a healing effect.

The medicines can't be used to treat the same affliction for that patient again

Obsidian Goggles (Major).name: 黑曜石护目镜（高阶） Obsidian Goggles (Major)
Obsidian Goggles (Major).description:
这副护目镜光滑的黑色镜片不知为何让一切看起来更加明亮。佩戴这副护目镜时，你在涉及视觉的察觉检定上获得+3物品加值。

启动——黑暗视觉 1 (操作)

频率 每天任意次数

效果 你调整护目镜后，获得高等黑暗视觉，直到你以一个交互动作将其停用，或者该物品不再由你注入，以先发生者为准。

The sleek, black lenses of these goggles somehow make everything seem more brightly lit. While wearing the goggles, you gain a +3 item bonus to Perception checks involving sight.

Activate—Darkvision 1 (manipulate)

Frequency any number of times per day

Effect Adjusting your goggles, you gain greater darkvision until you deactivate it as an Interact action or the item is no longer invested by you, whichever comes first.

Potion of Undetectability.name: 隐匿药水 Potion of Undetectability
Potion of Undetectability.description:
启动 A（操纵）

饮下这种暗淡的黑色液体后，你将无法被侦测效果所察觉。

这会赋予与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.C2w3YfBKjIRS07DP]{隐匿心智} 相同的效果，但不包含对心灵效果的加值。你还会获得一个4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{隐形术} 的效果，它可以防护8环及以下的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{见不可见} 法术，并且对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{真知视界} 的DC为36。

这瓶药水的效果持续10分钟。

Activate A (manipulate)

Drinking this dull-black liquid makes you undetectable to detection effects.

This grants the same effects as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.C2w3YfBKjIRS07DP]{Hidden Mind} but without the bonus against mental effects. You also gain the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} spell, which protects against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]{See the Unseen} spells of 8th rank and lower and has a DC of 36 against @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}.

The potion's effects last for 10 minutes.

Scroll of Revival (Rank 10).name: 复苏卷轴（10环） Scroll of Revival (Rank 10)
Scroll of Revival (Rank 10).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HpIJTVqgXorH9X0L]{复苏术}

从卷轴施放法术需要用一只手持握卷轴，并使用该法术通常所需动作数的施法（行动）来启用它。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。因为是由你来施法，所以使用你的法术攻击调整和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你根源相应的特征（奥术、神术、惑控或原始）。

任何实体材料消耗都会在卷轴被制造时提供，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供它们。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HpIJTVqgXorH9X0L]{Revival}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Elixir of Life (True).name: 真实生命灵药（高等） Elixir of Life (True)
Elixir of Life (True).description:
启动 A（操作）

生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程和免疫系统。饮下这瓶灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[(10d6+27)[healing]] 点生命值，并在 10 分钟内，对抗疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +4 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(10d6+27)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +4 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Wand of Execute (Rank 9).name: 处死一指魔杖（9环） Wand of Execute (Rank 9)
Wand of Execute (Rank 9).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]{处决}

这根短杖约有一英尺长，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中所含的法术有关。

启动 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加过载

效果 你以所标明的环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次该法术所列环阶的施放。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从大全集或大全集浏览器拖入一名 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]{Execute}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Wand of Moment of Renewal (Rank 8).name: 再起时刻魔杖（8环） Wand of Moment of Renewal (Rank 8)
Wand of Moment of Renewal (Rank 8).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{复新刻}

这根短杖长约一英尺，内含一个法术。其外观通常与其中储存的法术相关。

Activate 施放法术

频率 每日一次，外加过载

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次以所列环阶施放该法术。

注意：要创建特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Burning Sun Fireworks.name: 焚阳烟火 Burning Sun Fireworks
Burning Sun Fireworks.tokenName: 焚阳烟火 Burning Sun Fireworks

Blue Burning Sun Firework.name: 蓝色燃烧太阳烟花 Blue Burning Sun Firework
Blue Burning Sun Firework.description:
这件焰火的运作方式如同一瓶高等寒霜瓶，射程为100尺。

启动 1 打击

这只瓶中的明亮蓝色液态试剂在暴露于空气中时会迅速吸收热量。寒霜瓶造成4d6点寒冷伤害和4点寒冷溅射伤害。命中时，目标的速度在其下个回合结束前承受-15尺的状态减值。你获得攻击检定的+3物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{效果：寒霜瓶}

This firework operates as a Major Frost Vial with a range of 100 feet.

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 4d6 cold damage and 4 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a -15-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Green Burning Sun Firework.name: 绿燃日焰烟火 Green Burning Sun Firework
Green Burning Sun Firework.description:
这个烟花的运作方式如同一颗射程为100尺的高等爆破石。

启动 1 打击

当这颗卵石击中一个生物或坚硬表面时，它会伴随着震耳欲聋的巨响爆炸。爆破石造成4d4点音波伤害和4点音波溅射伤害，且位于石头爆炸空间10尺内的每个生物都必须以所列DC成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:36|name:Major Blasting Stone|showDC:all] 豁免，否则便会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 状态，直到其下个回合结束。你获得攻击检定的+3物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Blasting Stone with a range of 100 feet.

Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals 4d4 sonic damage and 4 sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:36|name:Major Blasting Stone|showDC:all] saving throw with the listed DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Red Burning Sun Firework.name: 赤红燃阳烟花 Red Burning Sun Firework
Red Burning Sun Firework.description:
这件烟花的运作方式如同一瓶射程为100尺的上等炽火胶。

启动 A 打击

炽火胶是挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时会点燃。炽火胶造成4d8点火焰伤害、4点持续性火焰伤害，以及4点火焰溅射伤害。你获得攻击检定的+3物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Alchemist's Fire with a range of 100 feet.

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 4d8 fire damage, 4 persistent fire damage, and 4 fire splash damage. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Yellow Burning Sun Firework.name: 黄灼烈阳烟火 Yellow Burning Sun Firework
Yellow Burning Sun Firework.description:
这枚烟火的运作方式如同一枚高等瓶装闪电，射程为100尺。

启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电内装填了不稳定的试剂，在暴露于空气时会产生一阵电流爆炸。瓶装闪电造成 4d6 点电击伤害和 4 点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你下个回合开始。你获得攻击检定 +3 物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Bottled Lightning with a range of 100 feet.

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 4d6 electricity damage and 4 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Burning Sun Fireworks.prototypeToken: 炽阳烟火 Burning Sun Fireworks

Elite Ecorche.name: 精英剥皮尸 Elite Ecorche

Flaying Flurry.name: 急速剥皮 Flaying Flurry
Flaying Flurry.description:
剥皮尸尝试对同一目标进行两次爪击打击。若两次都命中并造成伤害，它会尝试将目标的皮肤从其身上扯下。它尝试进行一次对抗敌人强韧DC的 @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] 检定。

大成功 剥皮尸将目标的皮肤完全从其身体上扯下。该生物受到 @Damage[4d8[bleed]]，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 4} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}。该流血伤害无法自然结束；只有当该生物恢复至少 75 HP，或通过再生恢复至少 10 HP 时，才会结束。

成功 目标受到 @Damage[2d8[bleed]]，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

The ecorche attempts two claw Strikes against the same target. If both hit and deal damage, it attempts to pull the skin off its target. It attempts an @Check[athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the enemy's Fortitude DC.

Critical Success The ecorche fully pulls the target's skin off its body. The creature takes @Damage[4d8[bleed]], and it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}. The bleed damage can't end naturally, only ending if the creature regains at least 75 HP or regains at least 10 HP from regeneration.

Success The target takes @Damage[2d8[bleed]] and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Muscular Leap.name: 肌肉跳跃 Muscular Leap
Muscular Leap.description:
剥皮尸会过度压榨其腿部肌肉，以进行一次巨大的跳跃。它失去 @Damage[20[untyped]] HP，并向任意方向跳跃至多 120 英尺。如果它的下一个动作是一次打击或急速剥皮，则它直到该动作结束后才会坠落。

The ecorche over-stresses its leg muscles for a massive jump. It loses @Damage[20[untyped]] HP and Leaps up to 120 feet in any direction. If its next action is a Strike or Flaying Flurry, it doesn't fall until after that action.

Tear Skin.name: 撕皮 Tear Skin
Tear Skin.description:
需求 剥皮尸正穿着皮肤

效果 剥皮尸摧毁它当前穿着的皮肤。剥皮尸恢复其真实外貌和体型，且任何120尺内目睹此景者都必须成功通过一次@Check[will|dc:37]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（若大失败则为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 4}）。无论其豁免结果如何，这些生物在24小时内都会暂时免疫。

Requirements The ecorche is wearing skin

Effect The ecorche destroys the skin it's currently wearing. The ecorche reverts to its true appearance and size, and anyone within 120 feet who witnesses this must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:37] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4} on a critical failure). Regardless of the results of their saving throws, the creatures are temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Wear Skin.name: 穿皮 Wear Skin
Wear Skin.description:
需求 剥皮尸正持有一张从一个小型、中型或大型生物身上偷来的皮肤，且它当前没有穿戴皮肤

效果 剥皮尸将这张皮肤穿在身上作为伪装。它会变为该生物的体型、外貌和声音。穿戴皮肤视为为通过欺瞒进行的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 用途创建伪装。剥皮尸的变形会自动战胜用于判断它是否属于其所变成的族裔或生物类别成员的察觉 DC，且剥皮尸的欺瞒 DC 获得 +4 状态加值，以防止他人识破其伪装。

穿戴皮肤会使剥皮尸获得 AC 的 +2 物品加值和 75 点临时生命值。如果剥皮尸从单一来源受到超过 @Damage[50[slashing]] 的挥砍伤害，这张皮肤就会损坏。损坏后，这张皮肤不再提供上述任何好处（任何剩余的临时生命值都会立即失去），但仍可用于撕皮。

Requirements The ecorche is holding the stolen skin of a Small, Medium, or Large creature and isn't already wearing a skin

Effect The ecorche wears the skin as a disguise. It assumes the creature's size, appearance, and voice. Wearing Skin counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. The ecorche's transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine whether it's a member of the ancestry or creature type into which it transformed, and the ecorche gains a +4 status bonus to its Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through its disguise.

Wearing a skin gives the ecorche a +2 item bonus to AC and 75 temporary Hit Points. If the ecorche takes more than @Damage[50[slashing]] damage from a single source, the skin becomes broken. When broken, the skin no longer provides any of these benefits (any remaining temporary HP are immediately lost) but can still be used for Tear Skin.

Elite Ecorche.publicNotes:
当一名死灵法师需要一个多变的代理人为其担任保镖并乔装行事、听命办事时，他们就会制造一具剥皮尸——一种无皮的怪物，体内灌满腐臭的炼金药剂，外覆搏动的肌肉与肌腱移植物，并被赋予了锋锐如刀的爪击。剥皮尸用它的爪击剥去受害者的皮肤，数秒之内便能将其整张剥下。随后，它还能骇人地将自己挤入偷来的皮肤中，冒充死者；它会借此秘密执行命令，或寻找更多受害者来扩充自己的收藏。如果它的欺瞒被识破，它就会撕碎自己的伪装，以可怖的无皮形态破肤而出。

When a necromancer has need of a versatile agent to serve as a bodyguard and do their bidding in disguise, they build an ecorche-a skinless monstrosity filled with putrid alchemical agents, covered in pulsing muscle and sinew grafts, and imbued with razor-sharp claws. The ecorche uses its claws to flay its victims, stripping off skin in seconds. It can then horrifyingly squeeze itself into the stolen skin and impersonate the deceased, which it does to covertly carry out orders or find more victims to expand its collection. If its deception is uncovered, it shreds its disguise, bursting forth in terrible skinless form.

Elixir of Life (Major).name: 真实生命灵药（强效） Elixir of Life (Major)
Elixir of Life (Major).description:
启动 A（操作）

真实生命灵药会加速活体生物的自然治疗过程与免疫系统。饮用此灵药后，你恢复 @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +3 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{效果：真实生命灵药}

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +3 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Wand of Create Food (Rank 8).name: 造粮术魔杖（8环） Wand of Create Food (Rank 8)
Wand of Create Food (Rank 8).description:
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{造粮术}

这根短杖约有一英尺长，并容纳一个单一法术。其外观通常与其中的法术相关。

启动 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加过载

效果 你以所示环阶施放该法术。

制作需求 提供一次所列环阶的该法术施放。

注意：要制作特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mt6ZzkVX8Q4xigFq]{Create Food}

This baton is about a foot long and contains a single spell. The appearance typically relates to the spell within.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of the spell at the listed rank.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Heart Bloodstone of Arazni.name: 阿拉兹尼的心血石 Heart Bloodstone of Arazni
Heart Bloodstone of Arazni.description:
阿拉兹尼的心血石象征着庇护。持握心血石时，你能感觉到罐中有一颗心脏轻柔跳动的节律。

启动—举起罐子 1 (manipulate) 你将罐子高高举起，一圈深红色能量的灵光环绕着你的身体。你获得 AC +2 环境加值，直到你的下一回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.DKCoW3A6Tz799Uq9]{Effect: Raise Jar}

启动—坚韧宣告 2 (专注)

频率 每天一次

需求 你信奉阿拉兹尼，或受她眷顾

效果 你高声清晰地宣告自己的坚韧（例如“我不会倒在敌人手中！”）。你获得等同于你等级的虚空伤害抗力，直到你的下一回合开始时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.w4EdnGI8i4UIkzWp]{Effect: Proclaim Resilience}

摧毁 若一名阿拉兹尼的信徒在持握血石并咒骂她名讳时被杀，心血石就会化为尘土。罐子 10 尺内的任何会呼吸的生物都会吸入这令人窒息的尘埃，受到 @Damage[4d6[void]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] 豁免）。失败时，该生物还会受到 @Damage[4[persistent,void]] 伤害（大失败时则受到 @Damage[8[persistent,void]] 伤害）。

The Heart Bloodstone of Arazni represents protection. While holding the Heart Bloodstone, you can feel the gentle rhythm of a beating heart within the jar.

Activate—Raise Jar 1 (manipulate) You hold the jar aloft, and a nimbus of crimson energy surrounds your body. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.DKCoW3A6Tz799Uq9]{Effect: Raise Jar}

Activate—Proclaim Resilience 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Requirements You worship Arazni or are favored by her

Effect You make a loud and clear proclamation of your resilience (such as "I will not fall to the hands of my enemies!"). You gain resistance to void damage equal to your level until the beginning of your next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.w4EdnGI8i4UIkzWp]{Effect: Proclaim Resilience}

Destruction The Heart Bloodstone turns to dust if a worshipper of Arazni is slain while holding the Bloodstone and cursing her name. Any breathing creature within 10 feet of the jar inhales the choking dust, taking @Damage[4d6[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] save). On a failure, the creature also takes @Damage[4[persistent,void]] damage (@Damage[8[persistent,void]] damage on a critical failure).

Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone.name: 心血石的照明 Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone
Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone.description:
这页彩饰手稿由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作，描绘了阿拉兹尼的心血石。

如果作为一套出售，这四页对收藏家而言价值 5000 gp。

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni.

If sold as a set, the four pages would be worth 5000 gp to a collector.

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Lung Bloodstone of Arazni.

Orc Commander.name: 兽人指挥官 Orc Commander

Hide Armor.name: 生皮护甲 Hide Armor
Hide Armor.description:
这种护甲由毛皮、坚韧的皮革，有时还会用定型的煮制皮革混合制成。它凭借多层皮革提供防护，但其笨重会拖慢穿戴者的行动并降低机动性。

A mix of furs, sturdy hide, and sometimes molded boiled leather, this armor provides protection due to its layers of leather, though its bulkiness slows the wearer down and decreases mobility.

Battle Cry.name: 战吼 Battle Cry
Battle Cry.description:
兽人指挥官发出震天怒吼，给予自己以及所有位于 @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60尺} 内的兽人盟友攻击检定和伤害掷骰 +1 状态加值，持续至兽人指挥官下个回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Yqq4AkZ9lrm4CcID]{效果：战吼}

Bellowing mightily, the orc commander gives themself and all orc allies within @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60 feet} a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls until the start of the orc commander's next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Yqq4AkZ9lrm4CcID]{Effect: Battle Cry}

Orc Commander.publicNotes:
当兽人进行劫掠时，最强者会被选为领袖，并由其兄弟姐妹及其他直系亲属支持。若领导权出现争议，候选者会通过展示体能上的强悍或发表激昂的演说来争夺控制权。

许多兽人是在暴力与冲突的烈火中锻造而成的，往往从他们出生的那一刻起便是如此。由于他们的人生常常被残酷地过早截断，兽人乐于通过与值得一战的对手较量来检验自己的力量，无论是向自己社群中地位更高的成员发起挑战以争夺支配权、驯服一头强大的野兽，还是杀死一只可怕的怪物。

兽人高大而强壮，手臂修长，双腿肌肉粗壮，许多兽人的身高超过7英尺。他们沉重的四肢、宽阔且几乎呈罗圈状的站姿，再加上习惯性地向前佝偻，使他们形成了一种近乎矛盾的体态：兽人既能高高耸立于其他类人生物之上，同时又能与他们平视。这些特征，再加上他们容易留下伤疤的体质，会让他们显得颇具威慑力。

半兽人卓玛尔最常见于兽人与人类结合所生，他们往往比纯血兽人亲族经受更严酷的考验，但那些挺过这些考验的人也能晋升到权威地位。“兽人能拥有其所能守住的一切”这句谚语，不仅适用于个体掌握自身命运与地位的能力，也很可能是兽人将自己的社群称为“据地”的根源。

When orcs raid, the strongest is chosen as the leader, backed up by their siblings and other immediate family. If leadership is contested, candidates vie for control with displays of physical prowess or stirring speeches.

Many orcs are forged in the fires of violence and conflict, often from the moment they're born. As they live lives that are frequently cut brutally short, orcs revel in testing their strength against worthy foes, whether by challenging a higher-ranking member of their community for dominance, taming a powerful beast, or slaying a fearsome monster.

Tall and powerful, with long arms and thickly muscled legs, many orcs top 7 feet in height. Their heavy limbs and broad, almost bow-legged stances combine with a tendency to slouch forward to create an almost contradictory set of circumstances where an orc can tower over other humanoids while simultaneously staring them in the eye. These features, alongside a tendency to scar easily, can make them seem quite intimidating.

The half-orc dromaars, most commonly born of unions between orcs and humans, are often tested even more harshly than their full orc kin, but those who endure these tests can rise to positions of authority. "An orc can have what an orc can hold" is a saying that not only applies to an individual's ability to secure their own destiny and position, but is also likely the root of orcs referring to their communities as holds.

Orc Scrapper.name: 兽人拾荒者 Orc Scrapper

Orc Knuckle Dagger.name: 兽人指节匕首 Orc Knuckle Dagger

Breastplate (Shoddy).name: 胸甲（劣质） Breastplate (Shoddy)
Breastplate (Shoddy).description:
虽然被称作胸甲，但这种护甲由数块板甲或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{半身板甲} 组成，用于保护躯干、胸部、颈部，有时也保护髋部和小腿。它在策略性地提供部分板甲防护的同时，也允许更大的灵活性和速度。

Though referred to as a breastplate, this type of armor consists of several pieces of plate or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.pRoikbRo5HFW6YUB]{Half Plate} armor that protect the torso, chest, neck, and sometimes the hips and lower legs. It strategically grants some of the protection of plate while allowing greater flexibility and speed.

Orc Scrapper.publicNotes:
作为最常见的兽人战斗单位，兽人散兵是凶猛的战士，他们依靠的是毫不松懈的力量，而非战斗经验，来证明自己的勇武，并试图提升自己在部族中的地位。

许多兽人都是在暴力与冲突的烈火中锻造出来的，往往从出生那一刻起便是如此。由于他们的人生常常会被残酷地过早截断，兽人乐于以值得一战的对手来检验自己的力量——无论是挑战自己社群中地位更高的成员以争夺支配权、驯服强大的野兽，还是猎杀可怕的怪物。

兽人高大强壮，手臂修长，双腿肌肉结实，许多兽人的身高都超过7英尺。他们沉重的四肢、宽阔且几乎有些罗圈的站姿，再加上倾向于向前佝偻的体态，结合起来形成了一种近乎矛盾的情形：兽人可以高高耸立于其他类人生物之上，同时又能与他们平视。这些特征，再加上他们容易留下疤痕的体质，会让他们显得相当吓人。

半兽人卓玛尔最常见于兽人与人类的结合所生，他们往往会比纯血兽人亲族受到更严酷的考验；但那些熬过这些考验的人，便能晋升至掌权的位置。“兽人能拥有他所能守住的一切”这句谚语，不仅适用于个体凭自身能力掌握自己的命运与地位，也很可能正是兽人将自己的社群称为“hold”的根源。

Acting as the most common orc combat unit, orc scrappers are ferocious fighters who rely on unrelenting strength, rather than combat experience, to prove their mettle and attempt to rise in the hold's standing.

Many orcs are forged in the fires of violence and conflict, often from the moment they're born. As they live lives that are frequently cut brutally short, orcs revel in testing their strength against worthy foes, whether by challenging a higher-ranking member of their community for dominance, taming a powerful beast, or slaying a fearsome monster.

Tall and powerful, with long arms and thickly muscled legs, many orcs top 7 feet in height. Their heavy limbs and broad, almost bow-legged stances combine with a tendency to slouch forward to create an almost contradictory set of circumstances where an orc can tower over other humanoids while simultaneously staring them in the eye. These features, alongside a tendency to scar easily, can make them seem quite intimidating.

The half-orc dromaars, most commonly born of unions between orcs and humans, are often tested even more harshly than their full orc kin, but those who endure these tests can rise to positions of authority. "An orc can have what an orc can hold" is a saying that not only applies to an individual's ability to secure their own destiny and position, but is also likely the root of orcs referring to their communities as holds.
