Ravener's Hoard.tokenName: 掠劫亡龙的宝藏 Ravener's Hoard

Bands of Force (Major).name: 力场束带（强效） Bands of Force (Major)
Bands of Force (Major).description:
这些厚重的金属环带装饰着透明宝石，会在你的身体表面铺展开一层坚不可屈的力场。该力场为你提供 AC 和豁免的 +3 物品加值，并作为护甲给予你 +5 的最高敏捷调整值。你可以像对待轻甲那样将护符系附在这些环带上。

启动—反弹力场 R（力场，操作）

触发 一个生物以近战打击对你造成严重失手

效果 你使用这些环带的运动调整值 [[/r d20+33]]{+33} 来推撞该生物。

Decorated with clear gemstones, these thick metal bands spread an inflexible layer of force over your body. The force grants you a +3 item bonus to AC and saving throws, and a maximum Dexterity modifier of +5 as armor. You can affix talismans to the bands as though they were light armor.

Activate—Return Force R (force, manipulate)

Trigger A creature critically misses you with a melee Strike

Effect You Shove the creature using the bands' Athletics modifier of [[/r d20+33]]{+33}.

Messenger's Ring (Greater).name: 信使戒指（高等） Messenger's Ring (Greater)
Messenger's Ring (Greater).description:
这枚白银图章戒指会变化成与你所效忠的领主或组织的徽记一致的样式（如果你不效忠于任何他人，则会变成你自己的面容）。它给予你外交检定 +3 物品加值，并让你能够随意将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLzFcIaSXs7YTIqJ]{Message} 作为奥术先天法术施放。

启动——派遣信使 1 分钟（专注）

频率 每天一次

效果 戒指会依照你的指定施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger}。该动物是一个从戒指中跃出的魔法生物，其外观契合戒指所代表的领主或组织的标志图像或纹章。

启动——短讯 3 命令

频率 每小时一次

效果 戒指会依照你的指定施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{Sending}。

This silver signet ring changes to match the insignia of a lord or organization you serve (or your own face, if you serve no one else). It grants you a +3 item bonus to Diplomacy checks and lets you cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLzFcIaSXs7YTIqJ]{Message} as an arcane innate spell at will.

Activate—Dispatch Messenger 1 minute (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The ring casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger} to your specification. The animal is a magical creature that springs from the ring, and its appearance suits the iconography or heraldry of the lord or organization represented by the ring.

Activate—Sending 3 command

Frequency once per hour

Effect The ring casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7]{Sending} to your specifications.

Wand of Smoldering Fireballs (9th-Rank S.name: 闷燃火球术魔杖（9环法术） Wand of Smoldering Fireballs (9th-Rank Spell)
Wand of Smoldering Fireballs (9th-Rank S.description:
这根发黑、严重烧焦的木棒散发着淡淡的硝石气味。

启动 施放法术

频率 每天一次，外加过载

效果 你以9环施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sxQZ6yqTn0czJxVd]{Fireball}。每个豁免失败的生物受到 @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]] 伤害。

制作需求 提供一次9环fireball的施放。

This blackened, heavily burned stick smells faintly of saltpeter.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sxQZ6yqTn0czJxVd]{Fireball} at 9th-rank. Each creature that fails its save takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,fire]] damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of fireball at 9th-rank.

Crystal Ball (Obsidian).name: 水晶球（黑曜石） Crystal Ball (Obsidian)
Crystal Ball (Obsidian).description:
这颗经抛光的水晶球能增强探知魔法。由水晶球施放、具有探知特征的法术所接收到的任何视觉信息都会显现在球体之内，而任何听觉信息都会从球体表面传出。当你持握这颗球体并以其他方式施放具有探知特征的法术时，你也可以用同样的方式传递你所接收到的任何信息，让其他人也能看到或听到目标。

启动—千里眼 1分钟（专注，操作）

频率 每小时一次

效果 水晶球会依照你的指定施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}。

启动—探知 10分钟（专注，操作）

频率 每天两次

效果 水晶球会依照你的指定施放一个 @Check[will|dc:41|name:Scrying] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying} 法术，并且你透过它观看的任何事物都能获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} 的益处。

This polished crystal sphere enhances scrying magic. Any visual information received through a spell with the scrying trait that was cast by the crystal ball appears within the sphere, and any auditory information sounds out from the surface of the sphere. When you cast a spell with the scrying trait by any other means while holding the sphere, you can relay any information you receive in the same way, allowing others to see or hear the target.

Activate—Clairvoyance 1 minute (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect The crystal ball casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance} to your specifications.

Activate—Scrying 10 minutes (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency twice per day

Effect The crystal ball casts a @Check[will|dc:41|name:Scrying] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying} spell to your specifications, with the benefits of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight} for anything you watch through it.

Aeon Stone (Amplifying).name: 永世灵石（增幅） Aeon Stone (Amplifying)
Aeon Stone (Amplifying).description:
千百年来，这些神秘、切工精巧的宝石一直被秘法修行者与狂热信徒所囤藏，希望能发掘它们的秘密。尽管这些石头形态与功能千差万别，但据说它们全都是异界实体在太古时代用来构筑宇宙的水晶工具碎片。

当你灌注这些经过精密塑形的水晶之一时，这块石头会环绕你的头部运转，而非佩戴在身体上。你可以用一个交互动作收起一枚万世石，而一枚正在环绕的石头也可以被他人对你成功施展缴械动作后从空中夺走。被收起或移除的石头仍保持灌注，但其效果会被压制，直到你再次让它环绕在头部为止。

万世石有多种不同类型，各自具有不同的外观与魔法效果。每一枚万世石在嵌入一种称为寻路仪的特殊魔法物品后，还会获得一种共鸣力量。

扩能万世石必须先启动才能提供增益。其共鸣力量会使你在奥秘、自然、神秘或宗教检定中获得+2物品加值——具体对应你上一次用这枚万世石强化的法术所属的根源。

启动—扩能 1 （专注，法术塑形）

效果 若你的下一个动作是施放法术，则该法术在用于反制与被反制时，其环阶视为提高1阶（最高不超过10环）。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kdcVvwVVsttZgX1Y]{Effect: Aeon Stone Resonance (Amplifying)}

Over millennia, these mysterious, intricately cut gemstones have been hoarded by mystics and fanatics hoping to discover their secrets. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to construct the universe in primeval times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful Disarm action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are suppressed until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into a special magical item called a wayfinder.

An Amplifying aeon stone must be activated to provide a benefit. The resonant power grants you a +2 item bonus to Arcana, Nature, Occultism, or Religion checks-whichever corresponds to the tradition of the last spell you enhanced with this aeon stone.

Activate—Amplify 1 (concentrate, spellshape)

Effect If your next action is to Cast a Spell, that spell's rank is 1 higher (maximum 10th rank) for the purposes of counteracting and being counteracted.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.kdcVvwVVsttZgX1Y]{Effect: Aeon Stone Resonance (Amplifying)}

Ravener's Hoard.prototypeToken: 掠劫亡龙的藏宝堆 Ravener's Hoard

Ravener.name: 掠劫亡龙 Ravener

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术先天法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Wall of Fire (At Will).name: 火墙（随意） Wall of Fire (At Will)
Wall of Fire (At Will).description:
你升起一道炽烈的火墙，灼烧穿过它的生物。你可以创造一面厚 5 尺、最长 60 尺且高 10 尺的直线火墙，或者一个厚 5 尺、半径 10 尺且高度相同的环形火墙。无论哪种形式，火墙都垂直竖立；如果你愿意，火墙也可以更短或更矮。火墙两侧的所有事物，对另一侧的生物而言都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。任何穿过火墙的生物，或在其回合开始时占据火墙区域的生物，都会受到 4d6 点火焰伤害。

强化（+1） 火焰伤害增加 1d6。

You raise a blazing wall that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of flame in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of flame with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage.

Heightened (+1) The fire damage increases by 1d6.

Suggestion (At Will).name: 建议（随意） Suggestion (At Will)
Suggestion (At Will).description:
你甜言蜜语般的话语让生物难以抗拒。你向目标提出一项行动建议，这项建议的措辞必须让目标觉得这是合乎逻辑的做法，且不能具有自我毁灭性，也不能明显违背目标的自身利益。目标必须进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且知道你曾试图控制它。

成功 目标不受影响，并认为你只是在正常地和它说话，而不是对它施放法术。

失败 目标立刻遵从你的建议。该法术的持续时间为1分钟，或直到目标完成一项有限的建议，或该建议变得具有自我毁灭性，或产生其他明显的负面效果为止。

大失败 如失败，但基础持续时间为1小时。

升阶（8环） 你至多可以以10个生物为目标。

Your honeyed words are difficult for creatures to resist. You suggest a course of action to the target, which must be phrased in such a way as to seem like a logical course of action to the target and can't be self-destructive or obviously against the target's self-interest. The target must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and knows you tried to control it.

Success The target is unaffected and thinks you were talking to them normally, not casting a spell on them.

Failure The target immediately follows your suggestion. The spell has a duration of 1 minute, or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes self-destructive or has other obvious negative effects.

Critical Failure As failure, but the base duration is 1 hour.

Heightened (8th) You can target up to 10 creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除魔法存在或不存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。

只有当幻术魔法的效果等级低于你的侦测魔法法术环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如隐形药水）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

强化（3环） 你会得知该法术在射程内侦测到的最高等级效果所属的魔法学派。如果有多个效果同样强，GM决定你得知的是哪一个。

强化（4环） 如3环，但你还会确定最高等级魔法的来源。和模糊感官一样，你不会得知其精确位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个5尺立方体内（若其大于此范围，则确定最近的那一部分）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies.

You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower level than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an invisibility potion) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the school of magic for the highest-level effect within range that the spell detects. If multiple effects are equally strong, the GM determines which you learn.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd level, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-level magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Read Aura.name: 读取灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，敞开心智以感知魔法灵光。施法完成时，你会知道该物品是否具有魔法；如果有，你还会得知其魔法学派。

如果该物体是幻象，只有当该效果的等级低于你读取灵光法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到这一点。

升阶（3环） 你至多可以将 10 个物体作为目标。

升阶（6环） 你可以将任意数量的物体作为目标。

You focus on the target object, opening your mind to perceive magical auras. When the casting is complete, you know whether that item is magical, and if it is, you learn the school of magic.

If the object is illusory, you detect this only if the effect's level is lower than the rank of your read aura spell.

Heightened (3rd) You can target up to 10 objects.

Heightened (6th) You can target any number of objects.

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾视觉 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description:
烟雾不会妨碍上古红色掠劫亡龙的视觉；它会忽略烟雾造成的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态。

Smoke doesn't impair an ancient red ravener's vision; it ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Soulsense.name: 灵魂感知 Soulsense
Soulsense.description:
掠劫亡龙能感知列出射程内活着和不死生物的灵魂本质。那些物质身体与其灵魂合而为一的生物，例如天界生物和邪魔，在这种感官下会显得更加明亮。

A ravener senses the spiritual essence of living and undead creatures within the listed range. Creatures whose material bodies are one unit with their souls, like celestials and fiends, appear brighter to this sense.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法时所有豁免获得+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only).name: 借机攻击（仅限颚咬） Attack of Opportunity (Jaws Only)

Cowering Fear.name: 畏缩恐惧 Cowering Fear
Cowering Fear.description:
90尺。@Check[will|dc:42]

掠劫亡龙的骇人灵气还会使生物因恐惧而畏缩不前。只要生物因掠劫亡龙的骇人灵气而处于至少 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2} 或更高的状态，它也会因这种恐惧而陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

90 feet. @Check[will|dc:42]

A ravener's frightful presence causes creatures to cower in fear as well. As long as a creature is at least @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} or more as a result of the ravener's frightful presence, it is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} from the fear.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

Discorporate.name: 解体消散 Discorporate
Discorporate.description:
触发 掠劫亡龙的灵魂护幕承受了超额伤害，但其灵魂护幕仍至少有 51 点生命值

效果 掠劫亡龙深深汲取其灵魂护幕的力量，将自己的身体解离为灵魂能量以便逃脱。其灵魂护幕承受 50 点伤害，且其物理躯体消失，并在 [[/r 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 小时} 后于其使用 Discorporate 位置 1 英里内的随机地点重新出现。

Trigger The ravener takes excess damage to their soul ward but still has at least 51 Hit Points in their soul ward

Effect The ravener draws deeply into their soul ward, discorporating their body into soul energy in order to escape. They take 50 damage to their soul ward and their physical body vanishes, reappearing [[/r 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours} later in a random location within 1 mile from the location where they used Discorporate.

Dragon Heat.name: 龙之热度 Dragon Heat
Dragon Heat.description:
10尺。@Damage[4d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic] 豁免）

10 feet. @Damage[4d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:41|basic] save)

Redirect Fire.name: 引导火焰 Redirect Fire
Redirect Fire.description:
触发 100尺内的一个生物施放了一个火焰法术，或者一个火焰法术以其他方式从100尺内的源头生效

效果 掠劫亡龙作出所有用于决定该法术的目标、目的地和其他效果的选择，如同它是施法者一般。

Trigger A creature within 100 feet casts a fire spell, or a fire spell otherwise comes into effect from a source within 100 feet

Effect The ravener makes all the choices to determine the targets, destination, and other effects of the spell, as though they were the caster.

Soul Ward.name: 灵魂守护 Soul Ward
Soul Ward.description:
200 HP

一层无形的死灵能量力场保护着掠劫亡龙，使其免于被彻底摧毁。灵魂护罩的最大生命值为 150；若掠劫亡龙的等级为 21 或更高，则为 200。每当掠劫亡龙本应被减少至低于 1 点生命值时，所有超过将其减少至 1 点生命值所需数值的伤害，都会改为由其灵魂护罩承受。如果这些伤害使灵魂护罩的生命值降至低于 0 点，则掠劫亡龙被摧毁。灵魂护罩的生命值只能通过掠劫亡龙的特定能力恢复，例如 Consume Soul、ravenous breath 或 vicious criticals。若掠劫亡龙超过一周未能成功使用 Consume Soul 啃食一只濒死生物，它就会开始饥饿，其灵魂护罩每天失去 @Damage[1d4[healing]] 点生命值，直到其进食为止。如果掠劫亡龙的灵魂护罩失去全部生命值，而掠劫亡龙仍有超过 1 HP，它就会变成一具掠劫亡龙空壳。

200 HP

An intangible field of necromantic energy protects a ravener from total destruction. A soul ward has 150 maximum Hit Points, or 200 if the ravener is level 21 or higher. Whenever a ravener would be reduced below 1 Hit Point, all damage in excess of what would reduce them to 1 Hit Point is instead dealt to their soul ward. If this damage reduces the soul ward to fewer than 0 Hit Points, the ravener is destroyed. A soul ward's Hit Points can be restored only via specific ravener abilities such as Consume Soul, ravenous breath, or vicious criticals. A ravener who goes more than a week without successfully using Consume Soul to feed on a dying creature starves, and their soul ward loses @Damage[1d4[healing]] Hit Points each day until they feed. If the ravener's soul ward loses all its Hit Points while the ravener still has more than 1 HP, they become a ravener husk.

Consume Soul.name: 吞噬灵魂 Consume Soul
Consume Soul.description:
DC 44

触发 30尺内的一只活着的生物死亡，且其位于掠劫亡龙范围内

效果 掠劫亡龙用其巨口将该生物的灵魂从身体中撕出并一口吞下。垂死的生物必须以与掠劫亡龙吐息武器相同的DC进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:44] 豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 掠劫亡龙撕下该生物灵魂的一小块。若受害者恢复生命，除了返生的其他任何副作用外，还会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1}。掠劫亡龙的灵魂护罩获得等同于该生物等级一半的生命值。

失败 同成功，但该生物的灵魂遭到蹂躏。该生物处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 3}，且掠劫亡龙的灵魂护罩获得等同于该生物等级的生命值。

大失败 同失败，但掠劫亡龙吞噬了整个灵魂。只要掠劫亡龙仍然存在，受害者就无法恢复生命，除非通过奇迹术或祈愿术等10环效果；且掠劫亡龙的灵魂护罩获得等同于该生物等级两倍的生命值。

DC 44

Trigger A living creature within 30 feet of the ravener dies

Effect The ravener tears the creature's soul from its body with their maw and gulps it down. The dying creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save with the same DC as the ravener's Breath Weapon.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The ravener tears off a small chunk of the creature's soul. If the victim is restored to life, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} in addition to any other side effects of returning to life. The ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to half the creature's level.

Failure As success, but the creature's soul is ravaged. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} and the ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to the creature's level.

Critical Failure As failure, but the ravener devours the entire soul. The victim can't be restored to life as long as the ravener exists except via a 10th-rank effect such as miracle or wish, and the ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to twice the creature's level.

Manipulate Flames.name: 操控火焰 Manipulate Flames
Manipulate Flames.description:
掠劫亡龙试图夺取100尺内一团魔法火焰或一个火焰法术的控制权。若其反制检定成功（反制等级10，反制调整值+34），原施法者将失去对该法术或魔法火焰的控制，控制权转移给掠劫亡龙，且此动作视为掠劫亡龙已用该动作维持该法术（若适用）。掠劫亡龙也可以选择结束该法术，而非取得其控制权。

The ravener attempts to take control of a magical fire or a fire spell within 100 feet. If it succeeds at a counteract check (counteract rank 10, counteract modifier +34), the original caster loses control of the spell or magical fire, control is transferred to the ravener, and this action counts as the ravener having Sustained the Spell with the action (if applicable). The ravener can choose to end the spell instead of taking control, if they choose.

Ravenous Breath Weapon.name: 贪婪吐息武器 Ravenous Breath Weapon
Ravenous Breath Weapon.description:
掠劫亡龙喷吐出一阵烈焰冲击，造成 @Damage[20d6[fire],4d6[persistent,void]|options:area-damage]{20d6 火焰伤害外加 4d6 持续虚空伤害}（进行 @Check[reflex|dc:44|basic|options:area-effect] 反射豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1}（若大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 2}）。如果某个生物因掠劫亡龙的贪噬吐息武器而陷入流失，掠劫亡龙的灵魂护罩获得 @Damage[5[healing]] 生命值。

掠劫亡龙在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 轮} 内不能再次使用吐息武器。

The ravener breathes a blast of flame that deals @Damage[20d6[fire],4d6[persistent,void]|options:area-damage]{20d6 fire damage plus 4d6 persistent void damage} (@Check[reflex|dc:44|basic|options:area-effect] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure). If a creature is drained by the ravener's Ravenous Breath Weapon, the ravener's soul ward gains @Damage[5[healing]] HP.

The ravener can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Vicious Criticals.name: 凶恶重击 Vicious Criticals
Vicious Criticals.description:
掠劫亡龙的攻击检定在掷出 19 或 20 时视为大成功，只要该次攻击检定本来是成功。此外，每当掠劫亡龙以其一次打击造成大成功时，目标都必须在一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:42] 豁免中成功，否则获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 1} 状态。若目标的流失值已大于 0，则其流失值改为增加 1，最大至流失 4。每当掠劫亡龙以这种方式对一个生物施加流失时，其灵魂结界获得 5 点生命值。

The ravener treats an attack roll as a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20, as long as the attack roll was a success. Additionally, whenever the ravener makes a critical hit with one of their Strikes, the target must succeed on a @Check[fortitude|dc:42] save or gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} condition. If the target already has a drained value of greater than 0, their drained value instead increases by 1, to a maximum of drained 4. Whenever the ravener applies drain to a creature in this way, their soul ward gains 5 Hit Points.

Ravener.publicNotes:
此处展示的掠劫亡龙曾经是一条上古红龙。

The ravener presented here was once an ancient red dragon.
Ravener.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Ritual Supplies.name: 仪式用品 Ritual Supplies
Ritual Supplies.hazarddescription:
@UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.nmF2uPd4l1HrC9S4]{D5. 命运仪式之厅}

@UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.nmF2uPd4l1HrC9S4]{D5. The Fated Ritual Room}

Mounted.name: 乘骑 Mounted
Mounted.description:
未处于乘骑状态时，复生骑兵处于迟缓 1。

When not mounted, the raised cavalry is slowed 1.

Shuffle Forces.name: 蹒跚大军 Shuffle Forces
Shuffle Forces.description:
复生骑兵由骷髅、丧尸以及其他被仓促束缚于共同目标之下的不死生物组成。骑兵对物理伤害具有 20 抗力，因为它会把最弱的成员挪到前线。当骑兵被削减至 12 格或更少时，它对物理的抗力降至 10。一旦骑兵达到 2 段阈值，它便失去对物理伤害的抗力。

The raised cavalry consists of skeletons, zombies, and other undead hastily bound to a shared cause. The cavalry has resistance 20 to physical damage, as it shuffles its weakest members to the front lines. When the cavalry is reduced to 12 squares or fewer, its resistance to physical drops to 10. Once the cavalry reaches the 2-segment threshold, it loses its resistance to physical damage.

Claws and Jaws.name: 爪牙齐施 Claws and Jaws
Claws and Jaws.description:
频率 每轮一次；

效果 骑兵成员从他们的坐骑上一跃而下，并攻击10尺内的每个敌人（@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] 豁免）。

伤害取决于动作数量。

1 [[/r 2d12+14[穿刺和挥砍]]] 外加 [[/r 1d12[虚空]]]

2 [[/r 3d12+14[穿刺和挥砍]]] 外加 [[/r 1d12[虚空]]]

3 [[/r 4d12+14[穿刺和挥砍]]] 外加 [[/r 1d12[虚空]]]

Frequency once per round;

Effect Members of the cavalry leap from their mounts and attack each enemy within 10 feet (@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] save).

The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 [[/r 2d12+14[piercing and slashing]]] plus [[/r 1d12[void]]]

2 [[/r 3d12+14[piercing and slashing]]] plus [[/r 1d12[void]]]

3 [[/r 4d12+14[piercing and slashing]]] plus [[/r 1d12[void]]]

Hail of Arrows.name: 箭雨 Hail of Arrows
Hail of Arrows.description:
复生骑兵的成员拔出或装填其短弓，然后以齐射形式发动一次远程攻击。此次齐射是在 60 尺内一个 10 尺爆发区域，造成 [[/r 7d8[piercing]]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] 豁免）。当骑兵被减少至 2 个区段时，该区域减小为 5 尺爆发。

Members of the raised cavalry draw or reload their shortbows, then launch a ranged attack in the form of a volley. This volley is a 10-foot burst within 60 feet that deals [[/r 7d8[piercing]]] damage (@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] save). When the cavalry is reduced to 2 segments, this area decreases to a 5-foot burst.

Action.name: 动作 Action
Action.description:
复生骑兵以其速度获得+10尺环境加值进行两次大步移动。在此次移动期间，骑兵可以穿过中型或更小生物的空间。它对每个其所穿过空间的生物造成 [[/r 3d12+14[钝击]]] 伤害（@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会被击倒至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。骑兵在单次使用践踏冲锋时，对同一生物至多只能影响一次。

The raised cavalry Strides twice with a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed. During this movement, the cavalry can move through the spaces of Medium or smaller creatures. It deals [[/r 3d12+14[bludgeoning]]] damage to each creature whose space it moves through (@Check[type:reflex|dc:41|traits:damaging-effect|basic:true] save). A creature that fails its save is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{prone}. The cavalry can affect the same creature only once in a single use of Trampling Charge.

Amus Dermstrum.name: 阿缪斯·德姆斯特鲁姆 Amus Dermstrum
Amus Dermstrum.tokenName: 阿缪斯·德姆斯特鲁姆 Amus Dermstrum
Amus Dermstrum.blurb:
有抱负的男性人类炼金术士
ambitious male human alchemist
Amus Dermstrum.prototypeToken: 阿穆斯·德姆斯特鲁姆 Amus Dermstrum

Duimar Vant.name: 杜马尔·万特 Duimar Vant
Duimar Vant.blurb:
严厉的非二元性别人类游荡者
stern nonbinary human rogue

Glorine Velski.name: 葛萝琳·维尔斯基 Glorine Velski
Glorine Velski.tokenName: 葛萝琳·维尔斯基 Glorine Velski
Glorine Velski.blurb:
有抱负的男性人类炼金术师
ambitious male human alchemist
Glorine Velski.prototypeToken: 葛萝琳·维尔斯基 Glorine Velski

Jystolo Pulsoma.name: 吉斯托洛 脉速仪 Jystolo Pulsoma
Jystolo Pulsoma.tokenName: 吉斯托洛 脉冲体 Jystolo Pulsoma

Power of the Mob.name: 乌合之众的力量 Power of the Mob
Power of the Mob.description:
当三个或更多平民彼此相邻时，每个平民在进行[[/act shove]]、攻击检定和伤害掷骰的运动检定时，获得+1环境加值。

When three or more commoners are adjacent to each other, each commoner gets a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to [[/act shove]], attack rolls, and damage rolls.

Lore (any one related to their trade).name: 学识（任意一项与其行业相关的） Lore (any one related to their trade)

Jystolo Pulsoma.publicNotes:
尤娅之望希望之息旅店的前任主厨赫朵·普索玛发现，她那个一无是处、还会骗人的丈夫，竟打算在塔巴丰大军袭击的当晚跟另一个男人私奔。没过多久，赫朵便意识到自己怀孕了。六年过去，赫朵仍在努力接受这样一个事实：她儿子吉斯托洛的父亲很可能已经死了。虽然她为人善良又勤奋，但她那紧张不安的情绪常常会感染其他幸存者。所幸，康斯坦·鲁西总是愿意耐心倾听赫朵的心声，而所有人都知道她爱上了这位牧师——除了康斯坦本人。

The former chef at the Hope’s Breath Inn in Yua’s Hope, Hurdauw Pulsoma, discovered her no-good, cheat of a husband had plans to run off with another man the same night Tar-Baphon’s forces attacked. Not long after, Hurdauw realized she was pregnant. Six years on, Hurdauw still grapples with the fact that the father of her son Jystolo is likely dead. Though she is a kind and hard-working individual, her nervous energy often rubs off on the other survivors. Thankfully, Constan Russi has always offered Hurdauw an understanding ear, and everyone knows she’s fallen for the priest—everyone except Constan, that is.
Jystolo Pulsoma.blurb:
好奇的人类男性少年
curious male human youngster
Jystolo Pulsoma.prototypeToken: 吉斯托洛 脉冲魔像 Jystolo Pulsoma

Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》 Acts of Iomedae
Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教文献，描述了凡人艾奥梅黛在升格为神之前所完成的十一项功绩。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Constan Russi's Chest.name: 康斯坦·鲁西的箱子 Constan Russi's Chest
Constan Russi's Chest.description:
这个红木箱制作精良，配有一把普通的锁。仅箱子本身价值 20 gp，若包含钥匙则价值 30 gp。

This redwood chest is finely made and fitted with an average lock. The chest alone is worth 20 gp, or 30 gp if the keys are included.

Silver Key.name: 白银钥匙 Silver Key
Silver Key.description:
一把镶嵌着红色紫水晶的白银钥匙。是一对相配钥匙中的一把，由康斯坦·鲁西和他的副手分别持有。

A silver key inlaid with a red amethyst. Part of a matching pair held by Constan Russi and his second.

Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.name: 艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽 Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae
Silver Religious Symbol of Iomedae.description:
这个白银圣徽上饰有代表女神艾奥梅黛的图像。某些神术施法者，例如牧师，可以使用其神祇的圣徽来施展某些能力并施放一些法术。圣徽可以用链子或别针佩戴在身上，也可以持握。

This silver symbol is emblazoned with an image representing the goddess Iomedae. Some divine spellcasters, such as clerics, can use a religious symbol of their deity to use certain abilities and cast some spells. A religious symbol can be worn on the body on a chain or pin, or can be held.

Map to Vellumis.name: 前往维鲁米斯的地图 Map to Vellumis
Map to Vellumis.description:
这个镶有白银盖子的卷轴匣价值 2 gp。它里面装着一张尤娅之望周边区域的地图。地图上标出了几个主要地点，其中包括城市维鲁米斯。

This silver-capped scroll case is worth 2 gp. It contains a map of the area surrounding Yua's Hope. Several major locations are marked on the map, including the city of Vellumis.

Omelia's Scouting Reports.name: 奥梅莉亚的侦察报告 Omelia's Scouting Reports

Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs.name: 前往地下墓穴的说明 Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs
Instructions for Reaching the Catacombs.description:
这张纸条上写有进入奥泽姆要塞地下墓穴的说明。入口显然位于艾奥梅黛之憩。

This slip of paper includes instructions for entering Fort Ozem's catacombs. The entrance is apparently located in Iomedae's Rest.

Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap.name: 热门推理小说《寒流突袭》 Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap
Popular Mystery Novel Cold Snap.description:
这是广受欢迎的悬疑小说《寒流突袭》的一个副本。

This is a copy of the popular mystery novel Cold Snap.

Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem.name: 奥泽姆圣杯素描 Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem
Sketch of the Chalice of Ozem.description:
这张折叠的素描使你对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{识别}奥泽姆圣杯所进行的检定获得 +1 物品加值。

This folded sketch grants a +1 item bonus checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{identify} the Chalice of Ozem.

Sticky.name: 黏附 Sticky
Sticky.description:
这种柏油般的物质无害，但极其黏稠。踏入柏油中的生物在1分钟内，或直到其使用一个交互动作将该物质刮除干净前，其速度获得10尺环境减值。

The tar-like substance is harmless but extremely sticky. A creature that steps into the tar takes a 10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speed for 1 minute or until it uses an Interact action to scrape the substance clean.

False Chalice of Ozem.name: 伪造的奥泽姆圣杯 False Chalice of Ozem
False Chalice of Ozem.description:
这个奥泽姆圣杯的复制品被施加了附魔，使其显现为一件6级魔法物品。

This recreation of the Chalice of Ozem has been enchanted to appear as a level 6 magic item.

False Heart's Edge.name: 伪造的心之刃 False Heart's Edge
False Heart's Edge.description:
长剑，也被称为武装剑，可以是单刃或双刃剑。它们的剑刃厚重，长度在3到4英尺之间。

这把长剑被打造得与心之刃——艾奥梅黛的长剑——相仿，并被施加了附魔，使其看起来像是一件6级魔法物品。

Longswords, also known as arming swords, can be one-edged or two-edged swords. Their blades are heavy and they're between 3 and 4 feet in length.

This longsword was crafted to resemble Heart's Edge, Iomedae's longsword, and has been enchanted to appear as a level 6 magic item.

Fort Ozem Command Guide.name: 奥泽姆要塞指挥手册 Fort Ozem Command Guide
Fort Ozem Command Guide.description:
这本皮面装帧的书是用密码写成的。

This leather-bound book is written in code.

Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae.name: 《艾奥梅黛行传》发光抄本 Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae
Illuminated Copy of Acts of Iomedae.description:
一部宗教文本，描述了凡人时期的艾奥梅黛在升格为神之前所完成的十一项事迹。

A religious text describing the eleven acts undertaken by the mortal Iomedae before her ascension to divinity.

Knight's Training Journal.name: 骑士的训练日志 Knight's Training Journal
Knight's Training Journal.description:
一名骑士记录下自己勤勉的训练计划。他们如此努力地磨炼自己的技能，只为成为终焉之墙的救赎者之一。

你却剥夺了他们的那个未来。

你这个怪物。

A knight's record of their diligent training regimen. They worked so hard to hone their skills, to become one of Lastwall's saviors.

You have denied them that future.

You monster.

+3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding.name: +3 上等韧性全身甲坐骑护甲 +3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding
+3 Major Resilient Full-Plate Barding.description:
这套全身板甲坐骑护甲是为一匹大型马匹量身打造的，并蚀刻有+3 强效和高等坚韧符文。

This set of full-plate barding is sized for a Large horse and has been etched with +3 potency and major resilient runes.

Cold Iron Kitchenware.name: 寒铁厨具 Cold Iron Kitchenware
Cold Iron Kitchenware.description:
由寒铁制成的武器对恶魔和妖精同样致命。寒铁看起来像普通的铁，但它开采自特别纯净的矿源，并在极少或完全不加热的情况下塑形。这个过程极其困难，尤其是对于高品冷铁物品而言。

寒铁物品

寒铁物品硬度HPBT
薄型物品
低品52010
标准品72814
高品104020
物品
低品93618
标准品114422
高品145628
建筑结构
低品187236
标准品228844
高品2811256

Weapons made from cold iron are deadly to demons and fey alike. Cold iron looks like normal iron but is mined from particularly pure sources and shaped with little or no heat. This process is extremely difficult, especially for high-grade cold iron items.

Cold Iron Items

Cold Iron ItemsHardnessHPBT

High-grade104020
Items

Standard-grade114422
High-grade145628
Structure
Low-grade187236
Standard-grade228844
High-grade2811256

Ghost Arrows.name: 幽灵箭 Ghost Arrows
Ghost Arrows.description:
弹药 任意

幽灵弹药摸起来冰凉。这种弹药具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽灵之触}属性符文的好处，并且可以穿过任何障碍物，除了那些能够阻挡虚体生物或效果的障碍。尽管这种弹药能够穿透屏障并无视所有掩蔽，目标仍然会因隐蔽或隐藏而获得纯骰检定的收益。你仍然不能在不猜测的情况下将未察觉的生物作为目标。

在被发射后，这些弹药会消散成雾。不过，在深夜时分的 [[/r 1d4 #days]]{1d4 天} 后，它会重新出现在它最后一次被取出的箭袋或其他容器中。

Ammunition any

Ghost ammunition is cool to the touch. This ammunition has the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune and can fly through any obstacle except those that can block incorporeal creatures or effects. Though the ammunition penetrates barriers and ignores all cover, the target still benefits from the flat check from being concealed or hidden. You still can't target an undetected creature without guessing.

After it is launched, the ammunition vanishes into mist. However, in the dead of the night [[/r 1d4 #days]]{1d4 days} later, it reappears in the last quiver or other container it was taken from.

Adamantine Arrows.name: 精金箭 Adamantine Arrows
Adamantine Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木材制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Adamantine Bolts.name: 精金弩矢 Adamantine Bolts
Adamantine Bolts.description:
这些抛射物是弓所使用的弹药。箭的箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则带有一个金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Cold Iron Arrows.name: 寒铁箭 Cold Iron Arrows
Cold Iron Arrows.description:
这些抛射物是弓使用的弹药。箭的杆身由木头制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Cold Iron Bolts.name: 冷铁弩矢 Cold Iron Bolts
Cold Iron Bolts.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木材制成。它在飞行中由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Silver Arrows.name: 银箭 Silver Arrows
Silver Arrows.description:
这些投射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在飞行时由一端的箭羽保持稳定，另一端则装有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Silver Bolts.name: 白银弩矢 Silver Bolts
Silver Bolts.description:
这些抛射物是弓所用的弹药。箭杆由木头制成。它在一端靠箭羽在飞行中保持稳定，另一端则带有金属箭头。

These projectiles are the ammunition for bows. The shaft of an arrow is made of wood. It is stabilized in flight by fletching at one end and bears a metal head on the other.

Transcript of Iomedae's Fourth Act.name: 艾奥梅黛第四幕的记录 Transcript of Iomedae's Fourth Act

Hat Note.name: 帽注 Hat Note
Hat Note.description:
“视情况而定，用来支付我的复活费用或葬礼费用。”

"To pay for my resurrection or funeral, as appropriate."

Spacious Hat (Type IV).name: 宽敞帽（IV型） Spacious Hat (Type IV)
Spacious Hat (Type IV).description:
尽管它看起来只是一顶帽带上别着一根象鸟羽毛的帽子，但这个宽敞袋通向一个比其外部尺寸更大的魔法空间。帽子内部所容纳的负载不会改变宽敞袋本身的负载。

你可以对宽敞袋执行交互，将物品存入其中或将其取出，就像使用普通袋子一样。尽管这顶帽子能够容纳大量物质，但物体若要被存放进去，仍然必须能够通过袋口的开口。

如果这顶帽子超载或损坏，它就会破裂并被毁坏，导致里面的物品永远遗失。如果把它翻到里面朝外，里面的物品会毫发无伤地倾泻出来，但必须先把帽子翻正后才能再次使用。被放入帽中的活体生物在开始窒息前有足够维持 10 分钟的空气，并且它可以尝试以 DC 13 挣脱。帽子里的物品在被先取出之前不会提供任何益处。帽中的物品无法被仅侦测同一位面事物的魔法探测到。

容量 150 负载

Though it appears to be a hat with an elephant bird feather tucked into its band, this spacious pouch opens into a magical space larger than its outside dimensions. The Bulk held inside the hat doesn't change the Bulk of the spacious pouch itself.

You can Interact with the spacious pouch to stow items in it or remove them just like a mundane sack. Though the hat can hold a great amount of material, an object still needs to be able to fit through the opening of the sack to be stored inside.

If the hat is overloaded or broken, it ruptures and is ruined, causing the items inside to be lost forever. If it's turned inside out, the items inside spill out unharmed, but the hat must be put right before it can be used again. A living creature placed inside the hat has enough air for 10 minutes before it begins to suffocate, and it can attempt to Escape against a DC of 13. An item inside the hat provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. An item in the hat can't be detected by magic that detects only things on the same plane.

Capacity 150 Bulk

Arazni's Freedom.name: 阿拉兹尼的自由 Arazni's Freedom
Arazni's Freedom.description:
这把+3高等强击圣洁转变刺剑由女神阿拉兹尼凝固的鲜血制成。

This +3 major striking holy shifting rapier was made from the solidified blood of the goddess Arazni.

Fall From Grace.name: 恩陨 Fall From Grace
Fall From Grace.description:
克拉瑞希·艾奥梅达，猩红收复者的盾牌。

The shield of Clarethe Iomedar, Crimson Reclaimer.

Red Burning Sun Firework.name: 赤焰灼日烟花 Red Burning Sun Firework
Red Burning Sun Firework.description:
这件烟花的运作方式如同一瓶射程为100尺的上等炽火胶。

启动 A 打击

炽火胶是挥发性液体的混合物，暴露在空气中时便会点燃。炽火胶造成 4d8 火焰伤害、4 持续性火焰伤害，以及 4 火焰溅射伤害。你获得攻击检定的 +3 物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Alchemist's Fire with a range of 100 feet.

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 4d8 fire damage, 4 persistent fire damage, and 4 fire splash damage. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Yellow Burning Sun Firework.name: 黄焰烈日烟火 Yellow Burning Sun Firework
Yellow Burning Sun Firework.description:
该烟花视为一瓶高等瓶装闪电，其射程为100尺。

启动 A 打击

瓶装闪电中装填了不稳定的试剂，在暴露于空气时会产生一阵电爆。瓶装闪电造成4d6点电击伤害和4点电击溅射伤害。命中时，目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}，直到你的下个回合开始。你获得攻击检定+3物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Bottled Lightning with a range of 100 feet.

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 4d6 electricity damage and 4 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Blue Burning Sun Firework.name: 蓝色燃烧太阳烟花 Blue Burning Sun Firework
Blue Burning Sun Firework.description:
这件烟火的运作方式如同一瓶高等寒霜瓶，射程为100尺。

启动 1 打击

这只小瓶中的亮蓝色液态试剂在接触空气时会迅速吸收热量。寒霜瓶造成4d6点寒冷伤害和4点寒冷溅射伤害。若命中，目标的速度在其下个回合结束前承受-15尺状态减值。你获得攻击检定的+3物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{效果：寒霜瓶}

This firework operates as a Major Frost Vial with a range of 100 feet.

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 4d6 cold damage and 4 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a -15-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Green Burning Sun Firework.name: 翠绿灼日烟花 Green Burning Sun Firework
Green Burning Sun Firework.description:
这件烟火视为一颗射程为100尺的高等爆破石。

启动 1 打击

当这颗卵石击中一个生物或坚硬表面时，它会伴随着震耳欲聋的巨响爆炸。爆破石造成4d4点音波伤害和4点音波溅射伤害，且位于石头爆炸空间10尺内的每个生物都必须以列出的DC成功通过一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:36|name:Major Blasting Stone|showDC:all] 豁免，否则将陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} ，直到其下个回合结束。你获得攻击检定+3物品加值。

This firework operates as a Major Blasting Stone with a range of 100 feet.

Activate 1 Strike

When this pebble hits a creature or a hard surface, it explodes with a deafening bang. A blasting stone deals 4d4 sonic damage and 4 sonic splash damage, and each creature within 10 feet of the space in which the stone exploded must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:36|name:Major Blasting Stone|showDC:all] saving throw with the listed DC or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone.name: 心血石的照明 Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone
Illumination of the Heart Bloodstone.description:
这张插图页由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作，描绘了阿拉兹尼的心血石。

如果成套出售，这四页对收藏家而言价值 5000 gp。

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni.

If sold as a set, the four pages would be worth 5000 gp to a collector.

Illumination of the Lung Bloodstone.name: 肺血石的照明 Illumination of the Lung Bloodstone
Illumination of the Lung Bloodstone.description:
这张泥金装饰书页由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作，描绘了阿拉兹尼的肺血石。

若作为一套出售，这四张书页对收藏家而言价值 5000 gp。

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Lung Bloodstone of Arazni.

If sold as a set, the four pages would be worth 5000 gp to a collector.

Illumination of the Spleen Bloodstone.name: 脾血石的照明效果 Illumination of the Spleen Bloodstone
Illumination of the Spleen Bloodstone.description:
这张彩饰书页由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作，描绘了阿拉兹尼的脾血石。

如果作为一套出售，这四张书页对收藏家而言价值 5000 gp。

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Spleen Bloodstone of Arazni.

If sold as a set, the four pages would be worth 5000 gp to a collector.

Illumination of the Liver Bloodstone.name: 肝脏血石的照明 Illumination of the Liver Bloodstone
Illumination of the Liver Bloodstone.description:
这张饰彩图页由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作，描绘了阿拉兹尼的肝血石。

若作为一套出售，这四页对收藏家而言价值 5000 gp。

This illuminated page, commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich, depicts the Liver Bloodstone of Arazni.

If sold as a set, the four pages would be worth 5000 gp to a collector.

Lotus Petal.name: 莲花花瓣 Lotus Petal
Lotus Petal.description:
一份赐予获得阿拉兹尼青睐的英雄的赋礼。若他们在极度危急之时捏碎花瓣，便能召唤阿拉兹尼来到自己身边。

A gift granted to a hero that has gained Arazni's favour. If they crush the petal in a time of great need, they can call Arazni to their side.

Burning Sun Fireworks.name: 燃阳烟火 Burning Sun Fireworks
Burning Sun Fireworks.description:
燃日氏族为期一周的庆典每晚都会举行烟花表演。若将这些烟花作为武器发射，则每一种烟花都视为一种射程为100英尺的炼金炸弹。英雄们可以像平常一样辨认这些烟花，但如果随机抓取一个，则掷1d4来确定其效果。舞台上的这堆烟花目前包含每种类型的烟花各10个。

The Burning Sun Hold's week-long celebration features nightly fireworks displays. If fired as a weapon, each of the fireworks functions as an alchemical bomb with a range of 100 feet. The heroes can identify the fireworks as normal, but if one is grabbed at random, roll 1d4 to determine its function. The pile of fireworks on the stage currently contains 10 of each type of firework.

3.1: What Lies Beneath.name: 3.1：潜藏地下之物 3.1: What Lies Beneath

Chapter 1: What Lies Beneath.name: 第一章：潜藏地下之物 Chapter 1: What Lies Beneath
Chapter 1: What Lies Beneath.text:
数个世纪的不死生涯并未善待@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{塞尔德格·贝德利斯}（男性墓骑士间谍大师 20）。塞尔德格曾是一位英勇的欧泽姆骑士，却在一次考虑欠周的前往盖布的任务中堕落。在那里，他被转化为一名墓骑士，并被指派同时担任阿罗登昔日先驱阿拉兹尼的护卫与看守。随着阿拉兹尼近来逃离盖布并随后封神，塞尔德格已失去了幽灵王的欢心。这名走投无路的墓骑士再一次转向了一个考虑不周的计划。

塞尔德格意图对神性本身犯下一桩暴行。在反复思索阿拉兹尼、艾奥梅黛以及他自己三者命运交织的方式后，他认定拯救自己的唯一办法就是救赎阿拉兹尼。为了实施这一计划，塞尔德格将目标锁定在收集若干强大神器上，其中包括@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}与@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}。这些血石是盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖时，用来保存她器官的卡诺卜罐。而圣杯则是艾奥梅黛在三重悲恸之战中使用过的器物——也正是在那场冲突中，默语暴君杀死了阿拉兹尼。塞尔德格计划利用这些神器为一场仪式提供力量，以交换艾奥梅黛与阿拉兹尼的命运。当艾奥梅黛陨落时，阿拉兹尼将取而代之升起。塞尔德格相信，如此一来，他自己的灵魂也将得到救赎。

塞尔德格的计划已经开始结出成果。在成功突袭欧泽姆堡后，塞尔德格如今已拥有了奥泽姆圣杯。尽管他对血石 的搜寻被证明更加困难，塞尔德格最近还是抓获了阿迪特·卡拉金（一名好探究的女性人类学者 12）；她是一位痴迷于研究血石在警戒城陷落期间消失术后下落的研究者。塞尔德格从阿迪特那里得知了绯红守护者——一个曾致力于守护血石的组织。如今这名墓骑士已经知晓四枚血石的位置，并且已派出其爪牙去回收这些神器。

虽然终焉之墙骑士团尚未察觉塞尔德格的计划，但前欧泽姆骑士团领地附近愈发频繁的不死生物活动已经引起了他们的注意。他们联系了英雄们——这些人各自都是终焉之墙骑士团或其盟友中的高级成员——前去调查此事。一场原本寻常的侦察任务，很快便揭露了塞尔德格意图颠覆神圣秩序的阴谋。

高等级英雄

除非你将《血与信仰》用作一场持续战役的一部分，否则你的团队将必须为这场冒险创建新的PC。即便对于经验丰富的玩家来说，从零开始创建一名18级角色也可能是一项挑战。在游戏开始之前，你不妨鼓励玩家们想一想自己在战斗中的典型回合会是什么样子，这样他们在第一次掷先攻时就不会被过多选项压得不知所措。若你想给玩家一个机会，让他们先带着新角色进行一次“试运行”，可以考虑在他们前往科拉克要塞的途中加入一场风险较低的战斗遭遇。也许来自@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.NLbVqED1bDle0ynV]{A2区域} 的缚灵龙会在队伍接近要塞时发现他们，并攻击他们一两个回合，然后再返回自己的巢穴。

Centuries of undeath have not been kind to @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{Seldeg Bhedlis} (male graveknight spymaster 20). Once a valiant Knight of Ozem, Seldeg was corrupted during an ill-advised mission to Geb. There, he was transformed into a graveknight and assigned to serve the double role of bodyguard and captor to Arazni, former herald of Aroden. With Arazni’s recent escape from Geb and subsequent apotheosis, Seldeg has fallen from the Ghost King’s good graces. Once again, the desperate graveknight turns to an ill-conceived plan.

Seldeg intends to commit an atrocity against divinity itself. After ruminating on the ways in which the stories of Arazni, Iomedae, and his own intertwine, he’s determined that the only way to save himself is to redeem Arazni. To enact this plan, Seldeg has set his sights on collecting a number of powerful artifacts, including the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni} and the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem}. The Bloodstones are the canopic jars in which Geb preserved Arazni’s organs when he transformed her into a lich. The Chalice was used by Iomedae during the Battle of Three Sorrows, the same conflict during which the Whispering Tyrant slew Arazni. Seldeg plans to use these artifacts to power a ritual to swap Iomedae and Arazni’s fates. As Iomedae falls, Arazni will rise in her place. In doing so, Seldeg believes his own soul will be redeemed.

Seldeg’s plans have already begun to bear fruit. After a successful raid on Fort Ozem, Seldeg now has the Chalice of Ozem. Though his search for the Bloodstones has proven more difficult, Seldeg recently captured Addit Kalakin (inquisitive female human scholar 12), a researcher obsessed with the fate of the Bloodstones after their disappearance during the fall of Vigil. From Addit, Seldeg learned of the Crimson Keepers, an organization once dedicated to safeguarding the Bloodstones. The graveknight now knows the locations the four Bloodstones and has already sent his minions to recover the artifacts.

While the Knights of Lastwall aren’t yet aware of Seldeg’s plans, heightened undead activity near former Knights of Ozem holdings have caught their attention. They contact the heroes, each a high-ranking member of the Knights of Lastwall or one of their allies, to investigate the matter. What begins as a routine scouting mission quickly uncovers Seldeg’s plot to overturn the divine order.

High-Level Heroes

Unless you’re using “Of Blood and Faith” as part of an ongoing campaign, your group will have to create new PCs for this adventure. Creating an 18th-level character from scratch can be a challenge even for experienced players. Before play begins, you might encourage the players to think about what their typical turn in combat will look like, so that they won’t be overwhelmed with options the first time initiative is rolled. If you’d like to give your players a chance to take their new characters out for a “test run,” consider introducing a low-stakes combat encounter during their journey to Corlach Keep. Perhaps the wyrmwraith from @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.NLbVqED1bDle0ynV]{area A2} spots the party as they approach the keep and attacks them for a round or two before returning to its roost.

Corlach Keep.name: 科拉克要塞 Corlach Keep
Corlach Keep.text:
场景

@UUID[Scene.KldQ0IJhaAZf8VRz]{A - 科拉克塔楼}, @UUID[Scene.tph5wOKV7L5tMjTj]{A.B - 科拉克要塞}, @UUID[Scene.XkRCzSgTsoAjl7CA]{A - 科拉克地下墓穴}

为提供更多细节，科拉克要塞的每一层楼都分别设置了专属场景。A1至A2区域位于科拉克塔楼场景，A3至A15区域位于科拉克要塞场景，A16至A20区域位于科拉克地下墓穴场景。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{科拉克要塞周边}, @UUID[Playlist.LymEGDJjeSm0wapR]{松流河（层）}

当队伍接近要塞时，播放这些音频。如果玩家更靠近水边，则应使用松流河层播放列表。

在松流河与四征溪的交汇处，科拉克要塞如同一座石头岛屿般自水中耸立而起。一座桥梁将要塞与岸边相连，但这座结构只有在旱季才会显露出来。一年中的其余时间里，这座桥都隐没在数英尺深的水下。这座桥曾是工程奇迹，既可为防御而降下，也可让船只停靠在要塞大门前，但控制这一移动的机械装置已损坏到如今桥梁完全无法运作的地步。要塞内一座15英尺宽的大门通向桥面，也是要塞唯一位于地面的入口。四征溪两岸各矗立着瞭望塔，但和水下的桥一样，这些建筑也已在时代流逝中饱受损毁。

科拉克要塞分两个阶段建成。最初的建筑包括A4–A14区域，以带有黑色斑点的深灰色石材建造。小教堂扩建部分（由质地均一的浅灰色石材建成）修建于AR 3852年。表面上，这一扩建是为了容纳一座献给艾奥梅黛的小教堂和一个额外的厕所；但其真正目的，是掩藏要塞下方的一系列密室。这些密室原本是为了作为@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}的避难所而建。然而，在所有血石都能被运送到要塞之前，塔巴丰的军队便已入侵终焉之墙。如今，四件神器中仅有一件——脾血石——保存在这些密室中（位于@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.DuPSudciZPeXHwxt]{A20区域}）。

除非另有说明，要塞的天花板高度均为20英尺。有窗户的区域，其光照等级比室外条件低一级。没有窗户的区域则是一片黑暗。

当PC接近科拉克要塞时，朗读或转述以下内容。

科拉克要塞自松流河与四征溪的交汇处拔地而起；四征溪是一条较小的水道，自北方汇入松流河。要塞唯一可见的入口，是建在北侧外墙上的一道大门。门扉仅比水面高出几英寸。河流两岸各矗立着一座瞭望塔的残骸，不过西北侧那座几乎只剩下一堆石砾。东南侧的塔楼则大体仍然完好，尽管其上同样可见岁月侵蚀的痕迹。

Scenes

@UUID[Scene.KldQ0IJhaAZf8VRz]{A - Corlach Tower}, @UUID[Scene.tph5wOKV7L5tMjTj]{A.B - Corlach Keep}, @UUID[Scene.XkRCzSgTsoAjl7CA]{A - Corlach Catacombs}

In order to provide additional detail, each floor of Corlach Keep has been given its own dedicated scene. Areas A1 through A2 are located in the Corlach Tower scene, areas A3 to A15 on the Corlach Keep scene, and areas A16 to A20 on the Corlach Catacombs scene.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{Corlach Keep Surroundings}, @UUID[Playlist.LymEGDJjeSm0wapR]{Pineflow River (Layer)}

Play these as the party approaches the keep. The Pineflow River layer playlist should be used if the players are nearer the water.

At the confluence of the Pineflow River and Fourmarch Creek, Corlach Keep rises from the water like an island of stone. A bridge connects the keep to the shore, but this structure is visible only during the dry season. The rest of the year, the bridge is hidden beneath several feet of water. Once a marvel of engineering, the bridge could be lowered for defense or to allow boats to dock at the keep’s gates, but the mechanisms to control this movement have degraded to the point that the bridge is now inoperable. A 15-foot-wide gate opens onto the bridge from the keep and serves as the keep’s only ground-level entrance. Watchtowers rise on either of Fourmarch Creek’s shores, but like the underwater bridge, these structures have suffered from the passage of time.

Corlach Keep was built in two phases. The original structure encompasses areas A4–A14 and is constructed from a dark gray stone with black speckling. A chapel extension (made of a uniformly light gray stone) was built in 3852 AR. Ostensibly constructed to house a chapel to Iomedae and an additional latrine, the extension’s actual purpose was to conceal a series of chambers beneath the keep. These chambers were intended to serve as a sanctuary for the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni}. However, Tar-Baphon’s forces invaded Lastwall before all the Bloodstones could be transported to the keep. Today only one of the four artifacts, the Spleen Bloodstone, is contained within the chambers (in @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.DuPSudciZPeXHwxt]{area A20}).

Unless otherwise stated, the keep’s ceilings are 20 feet high. Areas with windows are one light level lower than the outside conditions. Areas without windows are dark.

Read or paraphrase the following as the PCs approach Corlach Keep.

Corlach Keep rises from the conflux of the Pineflow River and Fourmarch Creek, a smaller waterway that feeds the river from the north. The only visible entrance to the keep is a gate built into the northern face. The gate opens mere inches above the water’s surface. On either side of the river stand the remains of two watchtowers, though the northwestern tower is little more than a pile of rubble. The southeastern tower remains mostly intact, although it too shows signs of age.

A1. Watchtower Ground Floor.name: A1. 瞭望塔一层 A1. Watchtower Ground Floor
A1. Watchtower Ground Floor.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.xfydfIJsuUUEFiWK]{Watchtower (Layer)}

报丧女妖哀嚎不止，而屋顶上的缚灵龙则发出咆哮。将其作为声音层添加到 @UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{Corlach Keep Surroundings} 之上。

这座塔楼的底层铺满了骨骸、锈蚀的盔甲和丢弃的武器。空间中央，楼梯盘旋着绕过一根中心立柱向上延伸。木制椽梁布满塔楼上部，在建筑内部投下如蛛网般交错的阴影。

驻守科拉克要塞的奥泽姆骑士团在这座位于河流南岸的瞭望塔中，对抗默语暴君麾下军队时进行了最后的抵抗。这些守卫者的遗骸如今覆盖了塔楼底层，使该区域成为困难地形。塔楼的木制屋顶高出地面 60 尺，可通过塔中央的楼梯到达。木制椽梁从离地 40 尺处开始，使塔内上方 20 尺对于飞行生物而言成为困难地形。椽梁还为这些空间中的生物提供标准掩蔽。单根椽梁大约宽 6 英寸，在其上穿行时需要进行一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:balance] 检定以保持平衡。

@UUID[Actor.XKOQ3ll9TGNso0uB]{2 Banshees}

低阶 18

明知战斗早已无望，却仍下令士兵坚守作战的绝望，使要塞的两名前指挥官化作了报丧女妖。当英雄们进入瞭望塔时，这两只报丧女妖潜伏在离地 45 尺高的椽梁之间（隐秘 DC 35）。战斗中，她们会避免近身缠斗，利用哀嚎扰乱施法者、远程战斗者和其他脆弱目标。她们会追击撤退的角色，但若离开塔楼会使自己暴露在阳光下，她们便拒绝离开。

@UUID[Actor.ktnqoIojSPOEqqeA]{宝藏}：翻找骨骸可以发现一套+3 高等韧性全身甲、一面不破坚盾和一枚上等暗影符文石。

场景地区

瞭望塔两层之间的楼梯与一个传送地区相连。进入楼梯最后一个格子（GM 可见，为蓝色方格）的棋子会被传送到另一处。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.xfydfIJsuUUEFiWK]{Watchtower (Layer)}

The Banshees wail while the Wyrmwraith on the roof roars. Add this as a sound layer over @UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{Corlach Keep Surroundings}.

The ground floor of this tower is carpeted with bones, rusty armor, and discarded weapons. In the center of the space, stairs wind around a central pillar. Wooden rafters fill the tower’s upper reaches, casting a web of shadows across the structure’s interior.

The Knights of Ozem stationed at Corlach Keep made their last stand against the Whispering Tyrant’s forces in this watchtower on the river’s southern shore. The remains of these defenders now blanket the tower’s ground floor, making the area difficult terrain. The tower’s wooden roof rises 60 feet above the ground and can be reached via the stairs in the middle of the tower. The wooden rafters begin 40 feet above the ground, making the upper 20 feet of the tower’s interior difficult terrain for flying creatures. The rafters also grant standard cover to creatures in those spaces. Individual rafters are roughly 6 inches wide and require a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:20|traits:action:balance] check to Balance while crossing them.

@UUID[Actor.XKOQ3ll9TGNso0uB]{2 Banshees}

Low 18

The despair of ordering their soldiers to stand and fight while knowing the battle was already lost caused two of the keep’s former commanders to rise as banshees. As the heroes enter the watchtower, the banshees lurk amid the rafters 45 feet above the ground (Stealth DC 35). During combat, they avoid closing to melee, using Wail to confound spellcasters, ranged combatants, and other vulnerable targets. They pursue characters who retreat but refuse to leave the tower if doing so would expose them to sunlight.

@UUID[Actor.ktnqoIojSPOEqqeA]{Treasure}: Sifting through the bones uncovers a set of +3 greater resilient full plate, an indestructible shield, and a major shadow runestone.

Scene Regions

The stairs between the two floors of the watchtower are linked with a teleportation region. Tokens entering the last space of the staircase (visible to the GM as a blue square) are teleported to the other.

A2. Watchtower Roof.name: A2. 瞭望塔屋顶 A2. Watchtower Roof
A2. Watchtower Roof.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.xfydfIJsuUUEFiWK]{瞭望塔屋顶（层）}

屋顶上的缚灵龙会周期性地咆哮。将此作为一个声音层添加到 @UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{科拉克要塞周边环境} 之上。

瞭望塔的屋顶视野开阔，能够将周围数英里的乡野风光尽收眼底。建筑每一侧各有一个哨兵平台，从塔身侧面突出。东北侧的平台上散落着大量残骸。

瞭望塔的屋顶由厚实的硬木制成，尽管已有些腐朽并因年代久远而磨损，却依然稳固。东北平台上散落残骸的区域为困难地形。

  • @UUID[Actor.NldgVUIHB3asozHm]{缚灵龙}
  • @UUID[Actor.WoICHri7raCYv1wU]{次级死神}

遭遇

低阶 18

塔顶栖息着一对不同寻常的不死生物：一只次级死神和一只缚灵龙。这条龙在多年前科拉克要塞遭受攻击期间死去。次级死神在不久后抵达，想要收割龙的灵魂，但这生物对生命执念太深，最终化作缚灵龙，使它的任务受挫。如今，次级死神守望着缚灵龙，在白昼时分如同守护者一般保护它，等待这条龙迎来最终的死亡。

次级死神和缚灵龙很少离开高塔附近，但会攻击任何踏上建筑屋顶的生物。战斗中，缚灵龙会使用其命能转移能力，将活力伤害转移给次级死神；随后，次级死神凭借其特殊的虚无治疗能力无害地吸收这些伤害。

@UUID[Actor.K0W44nZMkdtcCBLa]{宝藏}： 缚灵龙偶尔会掳走落单的旅人，并将尸体带回自己的巢穴。英雄们可以在东北平台的残骸中找到其中一些旅人的遗骸。其中一具尸体系着一条腰带，上面饰有一条镶嵌宝石的腰链，价值 1,000 gp。挂在这条腰链上的有一只小手铃，其功能分别等同于一件高等乐师乐器、一把高等骷髅钥匙、一瓶幽灵尘，以及一本微型化的真正无尽魔典，可舒适地置于读者掌心。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.xfydfIJsuUUEFiWK]{Watchtower (Layer)}

The Wyrmwraith on the roof periodically roars. Add this as a sound layer over @UUID[Playlist.kxEap7trVTUOzooY]{Corlach Keep Surroundings}.

The watchtower’s roof offers an unobstructed view of the countryside for miles around. Sentry platforms, one on each side of the structure, jut over the sides of the tower. Debris litters the platform to the northeast.

The roof of the watchtower is made of thick hardwood and, though somewhat rotted and worn with age, remains sturdy. The littered area on the northeast platform is difficult terrain.

  • @UUID[Actor.NldgVUIHB3asozHm]{Wyrmwraith}
  • @UUID[Actor.WoICHri7raCYv1wU]{Lesser Death}

Encounter

Low 18

The tower’s roof is home to an unusual pair of undead creatures: a lesser death and a wyrmwraith. The dragon died years ago during the attack on Corlach Keep. The lesser death arrived shortly thereafter to reap the dragon’s soul, but was stymied when the creature clung too tightly to life and arose as a wyrmwraith. Now, the lesser death watches over the wyrmwraith, protecting it like a guardian during the daylight hours as it awaits the dragon’s final death.

The lesser death and wyrmwraith rarely leave the vicinity of the tower but attack any creature that steps foot on the structure’s roof. In combat, the wyrmwraith uses its Vitality Transfer ability to transfer vitality damage to the lesser death; the lesser death then harmlessly absorbs the damage thanks to its special void healing ability.

@UUID[Actor.K0W44nZMkdtcCBLa]{Treasure}: The wyrmwraith occasionally snatches the odd traveler and returns to its nest with the corpse. The heroes can find the remains of some of these travelers among the debris on the northeast platform. One of the corpses wears a belt adorned with a gem-studded chatelaine worth 1,000 gp. Attached to the chatelaine is a tiny handbell that functions as a greater maestro’s instrument, a greater skeleton key, a vial of ghost dust, and a miniaturized true endless grimoire that fits comfortably in the reader’s palm.

A3. Flooded Bridge.name: A3. 淹没桥梁 A3. Flooded Bridge
A3. Flooded Bridge.text:
即使已经破败不堪，这座桥显然仍是工程学上的奇迹。

连接科拉克要塞与岸边的桥梁原本设计为可按需升降，但多年的废弃不用让桥卡死在原位。如今，这座铁制结构沉在水面下数英尺，只有在特别干燥的天气使河流水位下降时才会露出更多部分。一年中的其余时间里，只有护栏露出水面。这座桥完全占满了所在空间，阻止生物从桥下方一侧游到另一侧。当桥被淹没时，生物无需@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{游泳}也能穿过它，但桥面属于更高等级的困难地形。只要桥仍然完好，这段河流的游泳DC就是 @Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:swim]。

  • @UUID[Actor.fF04YIUUzwQlK1TW]{骨冢守卫}
  • @UUID[Actor.AypBlM89idHzzukP]{坍塌桥梁}

遭遇

中等 18

数个世纪前，一条巨大的河蛇曾游弋于松流河的这片水域。此后，弥漫死坟末土的邪恶能量让这只生物的骸骨活动了起来。这条骸骨巨蛇会从水中跃出，攻击试图过桥或以其他方式接近要塞大门的活物。它会专注于擒抱移动最慢的生物，试图将该生物与其盟友分开。

危害：这座桥已有多年无人维护，如今已濒临坍塌。当一只中型或更大的生物到达该区域（地图上以白色场景区域标出）时，桥便开始坍塌。

场景区域

坍塌桥梁危害的位置，以及@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.bBuObwJcQNMBJY1H]{A4区域}中的危害位置，都已用白色场景区域标出，且仅对GM可见。当玩家进入这些区域时，游戏将会暂停。

桥上的更高等级困难地形也已通过场景区域实现，因此尝试在水中移动的棋子的移动消耗将自动计算。

宏

@UUID[Macro.JQ5Vzn2i85W20Fol]{A03 - 淹没桥梁}

你可以使用这个宏在桥梁四种不同的坍塌状态之间切换，使视觉表现与您的叙述保持同步。

Even in its deteriorated state, this bridge is clearly a marvel of engineering.

The bridge that separates Corlach Keep from the shoreline was designed to be raised and lowered as needed, but years of disuse have stuck the bridge in place. The iron structure now rests several feet beneath the water’s surface, except when particularly dry weather lowers the river’s waterline. The rest of the year, only its guardrails are visible. The bridge fills its space entirely, preventing creatures from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.c8TGiZ48ygoSPofx]{Swimming} beneath the bridge from one side to the other. While the bridge is submerged, a creature can cross it without Swimming, but the bridge is greater difficult terrain. So long as the bridge remains intact, the river’s Swim DC is @Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:swim].

  • @UUID[Actor.fF04YIUUzwQlK1TW]{Ossuary Warden}
  • @UUID[Actor.AypBlM89idHzzukP]{Collapsing Bridge}

Encounter

Moderate 18

Centuries ago, an enormous river serpent plied this stretch of the Pineflow River. The unholy energy that suffuses the Gravelands has since animated the creature’s bones. The skeletal serpent leaps from the water to attack living creatures that attempt to cross the bridge or otherwise approach the keep’s gate. It focuses on Grabbing the slowest-moving creature, attempting to separate that creature from its allies.

Hazard: The bridge hasn’t been maintained in years and is now on the brink of collapse. When a Medium or larger creature reaches the area (marked with a white Scene Region on the map), the bridge begins to collapse.

Scene Regions

The location of the Collapsing Bridge hazard, as well as the hazard in @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.bBuObwJcQNMBJY1H]{area A4}, have been marked with white scene regions which are visible only to the GM. These areas will pause the game when a player enters them.

The greater difficult terrain on the bridge has also been implemented using a scene region, so movement costs will be automatically calculated for tokens that attempt to move through the water.

Macro

@UUID[Macro.JQ5Vzn2i85W20Fol]{A03 - Flooded Bridge}

You can use this macro to cycle through the bridge at four different states of collapse, to sync the visuals to your narration.

A4. Hardened Entry.name: A4. 加固入口 A4. Hardened Entry
A4. Hardened Entry.text:
宏

@UUID[Macro.cqjCTAA29xvuKY24]

切换闸门的存在状态，以阻止移动。

通往科拉克要塞的大门歪斜地挂在门框上，每一阵强风吹过都会摇晃倾斜。 一座桥直接连接到这处门槛，使人若不真正进入要塞内部，便没有可落脚的坚实地面。

科拉克要塞的入口经过加固以抵御入侵者，形成了针对地面进攻的天然瓶颈。要塞的大门高达10英尺，并且可以同时开启，以便货车运送物资。即使桥已经完全坍塌，从河边攀爬到入口也只是个相对简单的专长（@Check[type:athletics|dc:25|traits:action:climb]）。

@UUID[Actor.e2xLxGriCpIUzLPc]{加固入口}

琐碎 18

尽管多年无人使用，这处入口的防御仍然有效。若被触发，位于要塞门槛内侧不远处的一块压力板（在地图上以白色方块标示）会使一道闸门从天花板落下，将入侵者与桥隔开。随后，闸门带刺的尖端会压碎隐藏在地板格栅下方的炼金试剂瓶，让入口充满酸性云雾。

@UUID[Actor.HF2uP83SWtBhMBEK]{宝藏}：可以将格栅撑开，以获得引发酸性云雾的炼金试剂。最初，格栅下方总共储藏了10瓶高等强酸瓶，但每当加固入口释放一团酸雾时，就会消耗其中1瓶。

Macro

@UUID[Macro.cqjCTAA29xvuKY24]

Toggles the presence of the portcullus, preventing movement.

The gates to Corlach Keep hang lopsided in their frame, swaying crookedly with every gust of wind. A bridge connects directly to this threshold, leaving no solid ground on which to step without entering the keep proper.

The entrance to Corlach’s Keep was hardened against invaders, forming a natural pinch point for land-based attacks. The keep’s gates stood 10 feet tall and could be opened simultaneously to allow wagon deliveries. Even if the bridge has collapsed entirely, climbing from the river to the entrance is a relatively simple feat (@Check[type:athletics|dc:25|traits:action:climb]).

@UUID[Actor.e2xLxGriCpIUzLPc]{Hardened Entry}

Trivial 18

This entrance’s defenses remain active despite years of disuse. If depressed, a pressure plate just beyond the keep’s threshold causes (marked with a white square on the map) a portcullis to drop from the ceiling, separating the intruder from the bridge. The spiked points of the portcullis then crush vials of alchemical reagents concealed beneath a grate in the floor, filling the entry with an acidic cloud.

@UUID[Actor.HF2uP83SWtBhMBEK]{Treasure}: The grate can be propped open to grant access to the alchemical reagents that caused the acidic cloud. Initially, a total of 10 major acid flasks were stored beneath the grate, but one of the flasks is consumed each time the hardened entry releases a cloud of acid.

A5. Courtyard.name: A5. 庭院 A5. Courtyard
A5. Courtyard.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.sMPY5z9bSlXgZPMo]{庭院（图层）}

在附近的马厩里，腐朽战马们发出一阵阵哐啷与嘶鸣，想要挣脱而出。

尽管这处内部庭院露天敞开，但城堡高耸的围墙将外面河流的声音隔绝了不少。碎石小径蜿蜒通向主建筑和南边的一座附属建筑。小径之外是一片片园林绿地，曾经修剪得井井有条，如今却已杂草丛生。

自从终焉之墙陷落后，这座城堡的庭院就再也无人打理。沿着碎石小径移动没有问题，但靠墙那些杂草蔓生的绿地区域属于困难地形。

场景地区

靠近墙边的一些杂草丛生区域，已通过场景地区应用了其困难地形效果。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.sMPY5z9bSlXgZPMo]{Courtyard (Layer)}

Inside the nearby stables, the moldering steeds clatter and clamor to escape.

Though this inner courtyard is open to the sky, the keep’s high walls muffle the sounds of the river outside. Gravel pathways wind to the main building and an outbuilding to the south. Just beyond the paths lie stretches of landscaping, once well kept but now choked with weeds.

The keep’s courtyard hasn’t been tended since Lastwall fell. Moving along the gravel paths presents no problem, but the patches of overgrown landscaping along the walls are difficult terrain.

Scene Regions

Some of the overgrown areas near the walls have had their difficult terrain applied with a scene region.

A6. Stables.name: A6. 马厩 A6. Stables
A6. Stables.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.sMPY5z9bSlXgZPMo]{庭院（层）}

从马厩内部传来腐朽战马们为了挣脱而发出的哐啷与嘶鸣声。

庭院南端有一座石砌附属建筑。黑色霉菌在这座建筑的木制双开门上留下条条痕迹，而门已被人仓促地从外侧闩住。

当塔巴丰的军队向科拉克要塞进军时，攻击来得太过迅猛，骑士们猝不及防，只得将坐骑遗弃在后。随着要塞陷落，这些马在试图逃离马厩时死去，并在绝望中化作腐朽战马。任何靠近马厩的人都能听见马蹄徒劳地敲击着建筑墙壁，发出哐啷声。

马厩内部铺满了黑色霉菌，在马厩门上也能见到其痕迹。这种霉菌依靠不死生物的血肉繁殖，并会在长时间接触虚空能量后变得食肉。靠近马厩大门会释放出一阵这种霉菌的食肉孢子。

  • @UUID[Actor.hXEFhS8iL5d6MqdD]{4 腐朽战马}
  • @UUID[Actor.ii2idpmr4mWpeW7K]{食肉霉菌}

遭遇

中等 1

打开马厩大门会使里面的战马陷入狂乱。它们会冲入庭院，并以运动进行先攻检定。

@UUID[Actor.1uM4a7WFFean2ZXb]{宝藏}：马厩内各个隔间的木墙都已经碎裂成片。一名欧泽姆骑士曾将一袋补给藏在西侧隔间残存的部分中，但还没来得及取回便已身亡。袋中有一件发霉的斗篷，上面像胸针一样别着一块符文石。这块符文石蚀刻着一枚上等韧性符文。袋中还装有一只召唤哨子和一筒装有20支幽灵箭的箭袋。东墙边一个破旧的铁制马具箱里装着一套适合大型马匹使用的+3 上等韧性全身甲坐骑护甲。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.sMPY5z9bSlXgZPMo]{Courtyard (Layer)}

From inside the stables, the moldering steeds clatter and clamor to escape.

A stone outbuilding takes up the south end of the yard. Black mold streaks the structure’s wooden double doors, which have been barred hastily from the outside.

When Tar-Baphon’s forces marched on Corlach Keep, the swiftness of the attack caught the knights unaware, and they were forced to leave their mounts behind. As the keep fell, the horses died trying to escape the stable, and in their desperation arose as moldering steeds. Anyone who approaches the stable can hear the horses’ hooves clattering in vain against the structure’s walls.

The interior of the stables is carpeted with black mold, traces of which can be seen on the stable doors. The mold thrives on undead flesh and becomes carnivorous after prolonged contact with void energy. Approaching the stable’s doors releases a burst of the mold’s carnivorous spores.

  • @UUID[Actor.hXEFhS8iL5d6MqdD]{4 Moldering Steeds}
  • @UUID[Actor.ii2idpmr4mWpeW7K]{Carnivorous Mold}

Encounter

Moderate 1

Opening the stable doors causes the steeds inside to frenzy. They surge into the courtyard, using Athletics for initiative.

@UUID[Actor.1uM4a7WFFean2ZXb]{Treasure}: The wooden walls of the stable’s individual stalls have been reduced to splinters. A Knight of Ozem stashed a bag of supplies in what remains of the western stall but died before retrieving it. The bag contains a moldy cloak with a runestone pinned to it like a brooch. The runestone is etched with a major resilient rune. The bag also holds a whistle of calling and a quiver with 20 ghost arrows. A battered iron tack box against the east wall contains a set of +3 major resilient full-plate barding sized for a Large horse.

A7. Grand Hall.name: A7. 大厅 A7. Grand Hall
A7. Grand Hall.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.dR0DNv2CNAvCuCPv]{科拉克要塞内部}

当玩家们探索科拉克要塞内部的废墟时。

声音在这间几乎空荡荡的大厅中回荡。墙上的挂毯已经破烂不堪，而一张曾经气派非凡、如今却只剩碎木片的餐桌占据了空间中央。北侧弧形墙面上有一扇巨大的彩绘玻璃窗，竟然奇迹般地完好无损。窗上描绘着一位手持剑与盾的威严骑士。

当奥泽姆骑士团仍占据科拉克要塞时，这间大厅曾作为用餐与其他集会的场所。房间的天花板高出地面60英尺，是整座要塞中最高的地方。大门通往区域 @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.xAVBr5wYDj2oX6Do]{A5}、@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.zJ73gd5YWFrm3IuR]{A8}、@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.fVMrmYhmoxOKl7Pa]{A10}，以及通往起居区的走廊（区域 @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.qQVuCc3q9mLPLuNt]{A11}–@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.u1RqjdJzCmN1s2lo]{A14}）。

@UUID[Actor.mGTK0uSZiQY0vsCf]{奥泽姆誓缚信念灵卫}

中等 18

如果有不隶属于奥泽姆骑士团的生物进入那间大厅，施放在彩绘玻璃窗中那名骑士身上的传讯术便会轰然响起：“访客必须始终有人陪同。立刻离开，并在成为奥泽姆骑士团的宾客后再返回。”除非违规进入的生物立即离开大厅，否则一名受奥泽姆骑士团束缚的信念灵卫会在窗前自地板中升起。角色可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:deception|dc:37|traits:action:lie] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{撒谎}，从而说服这名信念灵卫他们与骑士团有关联。或者，生物可以尝试一次 @Check[type:society|dc:38|traits:action:recall-knowledge] 检定来回忆起骑士团曾宣读过的一则誓言，随后再进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:38] 或 @Check[type:performance|dc:38] 检定来背诵它。信念灵卫会攻击那些无法使其相信自己与骑士团有关联的生物，但不会追赶逃离大厅的生物。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.dR0DNv2CNAvCuCPv]{Corlach Keep Interior}

As the players explore throughout the interior ruins of Corlach Keep.

Sound echoes throughout this nearly empty hall. Tapestries hang in tatters on the walls, while a once-grand dining table, now reduced to splinters, fills the center of the space. A vast stained-glass window, miraculously intact, occupies a curved wall to the north. The window depicts an imposing knight with sword and shield.

When the Knights of Ozem still held Corlach Keep, this grand hall served as a space for meals and other gatherings. The room’s ceilings rise 60 feet above the floor, making it the tallest point in the keep. Doors lead to areas @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.xAVBr5wYDj2oX6Do]{A5}, @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.zJ73gd5YWFrm3IuR]{A8}, @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.fVMrmYhmoxOKl7Pa]{A10}, and the hallway to the living quarters (areas @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.qQVuCc3q9mLPLuNt]{A11}–@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.u1RqjdJzCmN1s2lo]{A14}).

@UUID[Actor.mGTK0uSZiQY0vsCf]{Ozem-Bound Garrholdion}

Moderate 18

If a creature not affiliated with the Knights of Ozem enters that hall, an embed message spell cast on the knight in the stained-glass window booms out: “Guests must be accompanied at all times. Leave now and return as a guest of the Knights of Ozem.” Unless the offending creature leaves the hall immediately, a garrholdion bound to the Knights of Ozem rises from the floor before the window. A character can convince the garrholdion that they’re associated with the Knights by succeeding at a @Check[type:deception|dc:37|traits:action:lie] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}. Alternatively, a creature can attempt a @Check[type:society|dc:38|traits:action:recall-knowledge] check to recall an oath once spoken by the Knights, followed by a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:38] or @Check[type:performance|dc:38] check to recite it. The garrholdion attacks creatures that fail to assure it they’re affiliated with the knights, but it doesn’t pursue creatures that flee the hall.

A8. Kitchen.name: A8. 厨房 A8. Kitchen
A8. Kitchen.text:
这间厨房的状况仍相对完好，至少与要塞的其他区域相比是如此。

@UUID[Actor.zPAwS24uoFs1KABU]{宝藏}：整个空间的架子和橱柜里堆放着许多上菜用的碗、长颈水壶及其他餐具。大多数物品都是用寒铁制成的，这是奥泽姆骑士团的一项传统，他们曾尽可能多地用这种材料打造各种物品。这些餐具合计相当于 12 负载的高品冷铁物品。

This kitchen remains in relatively sound condition, at least compared to the rest of the keep.

@UUID[Actor.zPAwS24uoFs1KABU]{Treasure}: Stacked on shelves and in cabinets throughout the space are numerous serving bowls, ewers, and other tableware. Most items are made from cold iron, a tradition from when the Knights of Ozem crafted as many items as they could from the material. The tableware totals 12 Bulk worth of high-grade cold iron items.

A9. Quartermaster’s Office.name: A9. 军需官办公室 A9. Quartermaster’s Office
A9. Quartermaster’s Office.text:
一张书桌和几只档案柜塞满了这间狭窄的空间。档案柜中存放着科拉克要塞后勤需求的记录。从谷物运输到奢侈品采购请求，一切都有记载。这些记录为科拉克要塞的日常生活提供了独特的一瞥。查阅这些记录时，生物在对奥泽姆骑士团或科拉克要塞进行回忆知识的技能检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

其中一个档案柜装有精良锁具，而它的钥匙早已湮没于时光之中。生物可以通过一次成功的 @Check[type:athletics|dc:32|traits:action:force-open] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开} 这个柜子，或者通过 6 次成功的 @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock,secret] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}。

@UUID[Actor.HRuz7S0AZGdoaKDV]{宝藏}: 上锁的柜子里装有 4 瓶高等解毒剂、4 瓶抗疫剂和 4 瓶高等生命灵药，此外还有以下每种各 10 件：精金箭、精金弩矢、冷铁箭、冷铁弩矢、银箭和银弩矢。

A desk and several filing cabinets fill this cramped space. The filing cabinets contain the records of Corlach Keep’s logistical needs. Everything from shipments of grain to requests for luxury goods are noted. The records offer a unique glimpse into the day-to-day life of Corlach Keep. When consulting these records, a creature gains a +1 item bonus to skill checks made to Recall Knowledge about the Knights of Ozem or Corlach Keep.

One of the cabinets is fitted with a superior lock, the key to which is lost to time. A creature can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} the cabinet with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:32|traits:action:force-open], or can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock} with six successful @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock,secret] checks.

@UUID[Actor.HRuz7S0AZGdoaKDV]{Treasure}: The locked cabinet contains 4 major antidotes, 4 antiplagues, and 4 major elixirs of life, as well as 10 each of the following: adamantine arrows, adamantine bolts, cold iron arrows, cold iron bolts, silver arrows, and silver bolts.

A10. Armory.name: A10. 军械库 A10. Armory
A10. Armory.text:
这个房间的门装有精良锁。门上的五金件随着时间推移已经锈蚀，使得以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开} 打开这扇门的运动检定降为 @Check[type:athletics|dc:34|traits:action:force-open]。或者，PC可以通过 6 次成功的 @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock,secret] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}。

这个房间的墙边排列着摆放武器和护甲的架子，但上面曾经存放的东西如今已空无一物。

@UUID[Actor.dTAKNKC1ALBnWRHK]{攫抓爪}

琐碎 18

奥泽姆骑士团在占据这座要塞期间，为这间军械库施加了防盗防护。如果有生物触碰其中一个架子，一只巨大的铁手套便会显现来束缚这个意图行窃者。铁手套会将生物固定在原地，直到该生物挣脱，或持续 1 小时；届时，这个陷阱会重置。

@UUID[Actor.XtnnvLBfLbAdzZ2N]{宝藏}：武器架和护甲架空空如也，但角色若成功进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:40|traits:action:search,secret] 检定，以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索} 房间，便会在地板上一块伪装地砖下方发现一个秘密夹层。夹层中装有刻蚀着上等韧性符文、高等强击符文和强效飞翼符文的符文石。

The door to this room is secured with a superior lock. The door’s hardware has rusted over time, reducing the Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} the door to @Check[type:athletics|dc:34|traits:action:force-open] Alternatively, a PC can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock} with six successful @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock,secret] checks.

Racks for weapons and armor line the walls of this room, though they are empty of anything they once held.

@UUID[Actor.dTAKNKC1ALBnWRHK]{Grasping Gauntlet}

Trivial 18

While they occupied the keep, the Knights of Ozem warded this armory against theft. If a creature touches one of the racks, an enormous gauntlet manifests to restrain the would-be thief. The gauntlet holds a creature in place until the creature escapes or for 1 hour, at which point the trap resets.

@UUID[Actor.XtnnvLBfLbAdzZ2N]{Treasure}: The weapon and armor racks are bare, but a character who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:40|traits:action:search,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the room discovers a secret compartment beneath a false tile in the floor. The compartment contains runestones etched with a major resilient rune, a major striking rune, and a greater winged rune.

A11. Cistern.name: A11. 蓄水池 A11. Cistern
A11. Cistern.text:
虽然科拉克要塞位于松流河畔，因此饮用水相当充足，但储水仍然是一个后勤难题。这个房间的大部分空间都用来放置经过处理以防止铁锈渗入所储存水中的金属水箱。

While Corlach Keep’s location on the Pineflow River made drinking water plentiful, water storage remained a logistical puzzle. The bulk of this room is dedicated to metal tanks treated to prevent rust from leeching into the water stored within.

A12. Barracks.name: A12. 兵营 A12. Barracks
A12. Barracks.text:
这间房间的墙边排列着带有固定脚柜的床铺。整齐的军式铺床表明，曾住在这里的士兵原本打算很快返回，但覆盖在每一处表面上的灰尘却诉说着另一段故事。

驻守科拉克要塞期间轮换至此的低阶奥泽姆骑士团成员就睡在这间营房里。搜索脚柜的角色会发现这些骑士留下的纪念物。特别是，其中一个脚柜里有一叠用丝带系着的信件。这些通信属于一位名叫内尔的骑士学者，详细记录了她在艾奥梅黛升神之前，为研究与她相关事宜而提出的请求。成功进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:36|traits:action:recall-knowledge] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}的角色，会认出随附的一份文件是此前失落的《艾奥梅黛第四功业》誊录本之一。第四功业是她在迈向升神之路上完成的十一项奇迹之一。誊录本中还提到了阿拉兹尼（文中称其为“奥罗登的使者”），她谈到：当一切尽失时，对自由的渴望会成为力量的来源。

@UUID[Actor.Z2wmxaiyyh38FsHU]{宝藏}：艾奥梅黛《第四功业》的誊录本对收藏家而言价值 2,500 gp。

Bunks with attached footlockers line the walls of this room. Neat military tucks suggest the soldiers who lived here planned to return shortly, but the layer of dust that covers every surface tells a different tale.

Lower-ranking Knights of Ozem slept in these barracks as they rotated through Corlach Keep. A character who searches the footlockers finds mementos these knights left behind. In particular, one footlocker contains a stack of letters tied with a ribbon. This correspondence belonged to a knight-scholar named Nel and details her requests for research regarding Iomedae prior to her ascension. A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:religion|dc:36|traits:action:recall-knowledge] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} identifies an accompanying document as a previously lost transcript of Iomedae’s Fourth Act, one of the eleven miracles she performed on her way to ascension. The transcript also contains a reference to Arazni (called the “herald of Aroden” in the text), who speaks of the yearning for freedom being a source of strength when all else is lost.

@UUID[Actor.Z2wmxaiyyh38FsHU]{Treasure}: The transcript of Iomedae’s Fourth Act is worth 2,500 gp to a collector.

A13. Individual Lodging.name: A13. 单人住宿 A13. Individual Lodging
A13. Individual Lodging.text:
这些房间曾供永久驻扎在科拉克要塞的高阶骑士居住。陈设简陋但够用：一张简单的床和一个放着洗脸盆的床头柜。这些房间里没有任何值得注意的东西。

These rooms housed the higher-ranking knights permanently stationed at Corlach Keep. The furnishings are sparse but sufficient: a simple bed and a nightstand with a washing basin. There is nothing of interest in these rooms.

A14. Commander's Quarters.name: A14. 指挥官寝室 A14. Commander's Quarters
A14. Commander's Quarters.text:
这个房间里的陈设与@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.dEkNQ8gMxLZVx6un]{区域 A13}中的相似，只有一点不同：西北角摆着一张橡木桌。桌上放着一只装满灰烬的华丽青铜碗。

在要塞陷落前的最后时刻，骑士指挥官艾根德·特尔斯顿预见战斗已无胜算，便烧毁了所有她担心会被用来对付奥泽姆骑士团的记录。青铜碗中的灰烬，就是这些作战计划仅存的残余。

@UUID[Actor.Hk584V7zbFph8Mzr]{宝藏}：虽然这些作战计划已无法复原，但这只青铜碗价值 8,500 gp。

The furnishings in this room are similar to those in @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.dEkNQ8gMxLZVx6un]{area A13}, except for an oak table that occupies the northwest corner. An ornate bronze bowl filled with ashes rests atop the table.

During the keep’s final moments, Knight-Commander Aigend Telston predicted the battle was lost and burned any records she feared might be used against the Knights of Ozem. The ashes in the bronze bowl are all that remain of these battle plans.

@UUID[Actor.Hk584V7zbFph8Mzr]{Treasure}: While the battle plans are beyond recovery, the bronze bowl is worth 8,500 gp.

A15. Chapel of Iomedae.name: A15. 艾奥梅黛小教堂 A15. Chapel of Iomedae
A15. Chapel of Iomedae.text:
播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.SKxfBGY1h0pr0kH4]{礼拜堂中的战斗}

当玩家进入礼拜堂并与夺心魔交战时。

宏

@UUID[Macro.Wj1zHxMqgiPQmXiC]{A15 - 艾奥梅黛守卫激活}

显示守卫的棋子，并隐藏场景中的雕像贴图。

一尊15英尺高的艾奥梅黛雕像矗立在这座礼拜堂中央，祂以奥罗登传令官的形象如立柱般升起。长椅围绕雕像排成半圆，但大多已经破损或倾倒。高处，礼拜堂的穹顶天花板已经部分坍塌。

  • @UUID[Actor.IrssIkWkW6fsbHJL]{4 只夺心魔}
  • @UUID[Actor.U6kC8ohP723gydUI]{神圣守卫}

遭遇

中等 18

这间双层挑高房间的穹顶距地面40英尺高。当角色抵达时，4只夺心魔藏身于靠近穹顶的阴影中。夺颅者昂图拉特（@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.tbZHlDtuxAQaUAiR]{A19区域}）将这些夺心魔布置在此地，以便在他探索这座房间下方区域时守住自己的退路。除非角色发现通往骨堂的入口（@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.aQIKTgKkVzYpwyG7]{A16区域}），否则这些夺心魔会一直潜伏不动，等到神圣守卫启动后（见下文）才发动攻击。

神圣守卫：这尊艾奥梅黛雕像是一名神圣守卫，一种被制造并圣化、用以守卫血石圣所入口的构装体。若角色从高处观察雕像的底座，就会注意到底座上有一道金属格栅（从地面高度无法看到），巧妙地嵌在守卫双足下方的底座中。底座上刻着一句话：“剑之光明，对抗死亡之黑暗。”念出这句魔法口令会使守卫轰然启动，从底座上迈步而出，从而允许进入格栅。否则，只要有生物触碰格栅，或试图以其他方式绕过它，守卫就会立刻发动攻击。

发展：一旦神圣守卫离开底座，格栅就能轻易从其固定位置被掀起。这样做会显露出一段螺旋向下通往下方地下墓穴的铁制楼梯（区域 @UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.aQIKTgKkVzYpwyG7]{A16}–@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.DuPSudciZPeXHwxt]{A20}）。

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.SKxfBGY1h0pr0kH4]{Battle in the Chapel}

As the players enter the Chapel and engage the Dybbuks.

Macro

@UUID[Macro.Wj1zHxMqgiPQmXiC]{A15 - Iomadae Warden Activation}

Reveals the Warden's token and hides the statue tile on the scene.

A 15-foot-tall statue of Iomedae as Aroden’s herald rises like a pillar in the center of this chapel. Benches form a semicircle around the statue, though most are broken or overturned. High above, the chapel’s domed ceiling has partially collapsed.

  • @UUID[Actor.IrssIkWkW6fsbHJL]{4 Dybbuks}
  • @UUID[Actor.U6kC8ohP723gydUI]{Divine Warden}

Encounter

Moderate 18

The dome of this double-tall room rises 40 feet above the floor. As the characters arrive, four dybbuks hide among the shadows near the dome. The skulltaker Onturat (@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.tbZHlDtuxAQaUAiR]{area A19}) stationed the dybbuks here to guard his retreat as he explored the areas beneath this chamber. The dybbuks remain hidden unless the characters discover the entrance to the ossuary (@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.aQIKTgKkVzYpwyG7]{area A16}), holding off their attack until the divine warden animates (see below).

Divine Warden: The statue of Iomedae is a divine warden, a construct created and sanctified to guard the entrance to the Bloodstone Sanctum. A character who views the statue’s plinth from above notices a metal grate (hidden from ground level) cleverly built into the plinth beneath the warden’s feet. Etched into the plinth are the words “Light of the sword against the darkness of death.” Uttering this magical passphrase causes the warden to grind to life and step from the plinth, allowing access to the grate. Otherwise, the warden attacks as soon as a creature touches or otherwise attempts to bypass the grate.

Development: Once the divine warden moves from the plinth, the grate can be lifted easily from its setting.
