As “Gravelands Survivors” includes a fair bit of overland travel, characters skilled in navigation or foraging (such as rangers) will be particularly useful. “Ashes for Ozem” focuses on infiltration and gives classes such as bard, investigator, or rogue a chance to shine, although the adventure isn’t appropriate for characters who must follow edicts of good, such as certain clerics or champions. “Of Blood and Faith,” on the other hand, is a perfect fit for such heroic, good-hearted characters.

Faiths

Faith plays an important role in Claws of the Tyrant, so which god a character reveres (if any) is more significant than it might be in other adventures. Theoretically, characters of any faith could have found themselves in the crypt where “Gravelands Survivors” begins, but because that adventure assumes the PCs volunteer for the important task of shepherding the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstone of Arazni} and their fellow survivors to safety, gods whose edicts and anathemas would be opposed to that mission might prove troublesome.

In “Ashes for Ozem,” the PCs are evil—or at least morally ambiguous enough to accept a mission from Seldeg Bhedlis! As a consequence, characters in that adventure might revere gods associated with undeath, such as Urgathoa, or demon lords like Kabriri or Zura. An interesting choice for an undead character might be Arazni: because Arazni harbors some sympathy for those unwillingly transformed into undead, she isn’t overly concerned about her worshippers’ morality and might be willing to grant her blessings to one of the PCs.

“Of Blood and Faith” assumes the PCs are either members of the Knights of Lastwall or their close allies, making it unlikely that any of the characters would be a follower of a god opposed to that organization’s ideals. That said, worship of a particularly deity isn’t mandatory among the Knights of Lastwall, and the Knights welcome people of all beliefs, provided they are willing to champion the cause of good. Arazni is an obvious choice, as is Iomedae, although followers of the latter goddess might complicate negotiations with Arazni when the PCs meet her face-to-face during the adventure. Indeed, followers of any god generally regarded as “good” but whose edicts are opposed to those of Arazni could make winning her favor more difficult. On the other hand, certain groups might find the roleplaying opportunities created by these opposing viewpoints to be worth the trouble they cause!

Skills

All three adventures in Claws of the Tyrant benefit from parties with a balanced skill set, but depending on the adventure you plan to play, some skills might be more useful than others. At least one of the characters in “Gravelands Survivors” should be trained in Survival, for example. As “Ashes for Ozem” is an adventure focused on infiltration, skills like Deception, Stealth, and Thievery are particularly useful. Parties attempting to disrupt Seldeg Bhedlis’s ritual in “Of Blood and Faith” might struggle unless at least one of them has legendary proficiency with Crafting or Religion. Knowledge skills, particularly Arcana, Religion, and Lore skills like Arazni Lore, Iomedae Lore, or Undead Lore, are handy in all three of the adventures.

Archetypes

Multiclass archetypes, most common archetypes, and any uncommon or rare archetypes allowed by the GM should work fine in any of the adventures in Claws of the Tyrant. Of course, since the PCs in “Gravelands Survivors” begin play at 1st level, they won’t be able to choose an archetype until they advance to level 2 halfway through that adventure. “Ashes for Ozem” encourages players to take on the role of evil characters, giving them the opportunity to try out archetypes like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5Cm2TYHzoO2DbQNM]{reanimator} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.M6cWLywN0aWnX5Gl]{undead master}, as well archetypes that allow you to play an undead character, such as the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.52nzskpmUt9AjUf8]{ghost}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.EHJRMCBRL4YeBN6l]{ghoul}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IUmN2WC55LxPNSBB]{mummy}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.I5hzE0XT2BsjatS3]{vampire} dedication archetypes.

The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.TUIQBw9miDowhezw]{exorcist}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.63L2iSAxkHyq6qEt]{hallowed necromancer}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yWawboNWFoJMVl0g]{soul warden}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pPA2YF6Dal0PClWA]{undead slayer} archetypes are good choices for characters in “Of Blood and Faith.” Players interested in creating a character who is a member of the Knights of Lastwall might instead choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.H86VNC6cNWhBI8Ed]{knight reclaimant}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1YFrl8I6ZGo7BIM9]{knight vigilant}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.bWYnjNa2RknMoibg]{Lastwall sentry}.

Gear

As “Gravelands Survivors” is an adventure for 1st-level characters, PCs in that adventure have the typical amount of wealth (15 gold pieces) with which to purchase their starting equipment. If you’re playing one of the anthology’s other two adventures, the players will need to purchase magical gear for their characters.

If you are creating brand-new characters for “Ashes for Ozem,” you can either allow the players to spend a lump sum of 720 gp (with no item being of 6th level or higher), or you can allow them to pick their items. With the latter method, each player selects a number of common treasures as detailed on page 61 of Pathfinder GM Core. The characters might also have access to uncommon or rare items, at the GM’s discretion.

When making characters for “Of Blood and Faith,” players have a lump sum of 45,000 gp with which to outfit their characters, with no item being 17th-level or higher. Alternatively, you can allow the players to pick items as described in GM Core. As this adventure assumes that the PCs are accomplished heroes used to battling the undead, you might choose to give them access to any of the uncommon and rare magic items from Book of the Dead or Knights of Lastwall.

The Story So Far.name: 迄今为止的故事 The Story So Far
The Story So Far.text:
阿拉兹尼的故事始于六千多年前，那时她仍是凡人。她与阿兹兰特英雄阿罗登并肩作战——当时阿罗登自己也尚未晋升为神祇——共同对抗威胁古代阿卡迪亚国家绍帕特尔的邪恶势力。阿拉兹尼于AR前1491年死后，她的灵魂接受审判并被送往涅槃天，最终成为了一名天使。两千多年后，当阿罗登与阿拉兹尼重逢时，这位新神邀请她成为自己的使者。

数个世纪过去了，在这期间，阿拉兹尼成为了奥泽姆骑士团的主保圣人；这是一个致力于击败默语暴君塔巴丰的军事团体。AR 3818年，在闪耀远征的鼎盛时期，骑士团召唤阿拉兹尼率领他们作战。然而，骑士们担心暴君可能会侵入这位使者的心智，因此他们将阿拉兹尼束缚于自己的意志之下，而非请求她自行决定加入战斗。后来，塔巴丰杀死了阿拉兹尼，并将这位使者的尸体抛入集结骑士的队列之中。

默语暴君终于在AR 3827年被击败后，奥泽姆骑士团将阿拉兹尼安葬在终焉之墙的首都维吉尔。然而她只在那里停留了短短三年，随后一支由@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{塞尔德格·贝德利斯}率领的骑士队伍策马前往盖布，试图从内部颠覆这个国家。作为报复，幽灵王腐化了这些误入歧途的骑士，将他们转化为被称为墓骑士的不死生物，并命令他们从维吉尔盗走阿拉兹尼的尸体。墓骑士们成功完成了任务，而在一年零一天之后，阿拉兹尼以巫妖之身再度现世。

由于对奥泽姆骑士团的怀疑之种早已植入心中，阿拉兹尼愈发憎恨她昔日的盟友。作为盖布的共治者，巫妖阿拉兹尼成为了一位残酷而精于算计的暴君，同时也不断寻求摆脱自己不死存在的耻辱。然而，幽灵王对阿拉兹尼的控制牢不可破，而她的贴身护卫——放荡理事会，由数百年前正是从维吉尔盗走她尸体的那些墓骑士组成——每次她试图逃离时，都会将她追猎回来。

终于，在AR 4719年，阿拉兹尼成功躲过追捕者足够长的时间，前往终焉之墙；当时塔巴丰正试图逃脱他自己的囚禁。阿拉兹尼与一群凡人英雄并肩行动，操纵默语暴君用一种被称为辐辉之火的强大魔法摧毁了她的身体。阿拉兹尼在爆炸中被焚灭，但这场毁灭也让她的灵魂摆脱了盖布的控制。不久之后，阿拉兹尼晋升为神。

当阿拉兹尼逃脱并随后升神的消息传开后，塞尔德格·贝德利斯在盖布的境遇一落千丈。即便遭遇失败，这名墓骑士依旧傲慢自大；他逃往终焉之墙，并开始谋划一项救赎自己受污灵魂的计划。在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖的仪式中，盖布取出了阿拉兹尼的内脏，并将它们放入四个被称为@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}的卡诺卜罐中。当塞尔德格的手下抓住了正在调查这些神器下落的艾奥梅黛的学者阿迪特·卡拉金后，这名墓骑士得知，艾奥梅黛教会内部一个秘密派系——绯红守护者——已经将这些血石收归保管。然而，在守护者们来得及妥善保护这些圣遗物之前，塔巴丰便逃出了监牢，摧毁了终焉之墙这个国家，以及守护者和他们关于血石所在之处的知识。

血石是阿拉兹尼凡人遗骸仅存之物，而塞尔德格相信自己能够利用它们的力量，抹去这位女神的历史。塞尔德格打算将血石与奥泽姆圣杯结合起来；后者是一件与另一位女神艾奥梅黛相关的神器。借此，他意图改写过去，使阿拉兹尼与艾奥梅黛的故事完全逆转。曾经是阿拉兹尼陨落，而艾奥梅黛取而代之得以升扬；若塞尔德格的仪式成功，那么陨落的将会是艾奥梅黛，从而在宇宙秩序中留下一个空缺，让阿拉兹尼——而塞尔德格将立于她身侧——去填补。

Arazni’s story begins over 6,000 years ago, when she was still a mortal. Working alongside the Azlanti hero Aroden, who himself had not yet ascended to divinity, Arazni battled the evils that imperiled the ancient Arcadian nation of Xopatl. Upon her death in –1491 AR, Arazni’s soul was judged and sent to Nirvana, where she eventually became an angel. When Aroden reunited with Arazni over two millennia later, the new god invited her to become his herald.

Centuries passed, and in the intervening years Arazni came to serve as the patron saint of the Knights of Ozem, a military order dedicated to defeating the Whispering Tyrant, Tar-Baphon. In 3818 AR, at the height of the Shining Crusade, the Knights summoned Arazni to lead them in battle. Fearful that the Tyrant might claw his way into the herald’s mind, however, the Knights bound Arazni to their will, rather than request she join the battle of her own accord. Later, Tar-Baphon slew Arazni, flinging the herald’s body among the ranks of the assembled knights.

After the Whispering Tyrant was finally defeated in 3827 AR, the Knights of Ozem laid Arazni to rest in Lastwall’s capital of Vigil. She remained there only three short years, however, before a contingent of knights led by @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{Seldeg Bhedlis} rode off to Geb in an attempt to topple that nation from within. In retaliation, the Ghost King corrupted the errant knights, transforming them into undead creatures known as graveknights, and ordered them to steal Arazni’s body from Vigil. The graveknights succeeded in their mission, and a year and a day later, Arazni arose as a lich.

With the seed of doubt about the Knights of Ozem already planted in her mind, Arazni grew to detest her former allies. As co-ruler of Geb, Arazni the lich became a cruel and calculating tyrant, even as she sought to escape the indignity of her undead existence. The Ghost King’s hold on Arazni proved unbreakable, however, and her bodyguards—the Council Libertine, made up of the very graveknights who had stolen her corpse from Vigil centuries before—hunted her down each time she tried to flee.

Finally, in 4719 AR, Arazni managed to evade her captors long enough to travel to Lastwall, where Tar-Baphon sought to escape his own imprisonment. Working alongside a group of mortal heroes, Arazni manipulated the Whispering Tyrant into destroying her body with a powerful magic known as the Radiant Fire. Arazni was incinerated in the blast, but the devastation freed her soul from Geb’s control. Not long afterward, Arazni ascended to the status of a god.

When news of Arazni’s escape and subsequent ascension spread, Seldeg Bhedlis’s fortunes in Geb fell. Arrogant even in failure, the graveknight fled to Lastwall and began devising a plan to redeem his blighted soul. During the ritual that had transformed Arazni into a lich, Geb removed Arazni’s visceral organs and placed them inside four canopic jars known as the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni}. When Seldeg’s agents captured Addit Kalakin, an Iomedaean scholar researching the artifacts’ whereabouts, the graveknight learned that a secretive faction within the church of Iomedae, the Crimson Keepers, had taken the Bloodstones into their custody. Before the Keepers could secure the relics, however, Tar-Baphon escaped his prison and destroyed the nation of Lastwall, along with the Keepers and their knowledge of the Bloodstones’ locations.

The Bloodstones are all that’s left of Arazni’s mortal remains, and Seldeg believes he can harness their power to erase the goddess’s history. By combining the Bloodstones with the Chalice of Ozem, an artifact tied to another goddess, Iomedae, Seldeg intends to alter the past so that the stories of Arazni and Iomedae reverse. Whereas once Arazni fell and Iomedae was uplifted in her place, if Seldeg’s ritual succeeds, Iomedae will fall instead, leaving a void in the cosmic order for Arazni—with Seldeg at her side—to fill.

1. Gravelands Survivors.name: 1. 死坟末土幸存者 1. Gravelands Survivors
1. Gravelands Survivors.text:
求生之战

数个世纪前，终焉之墙这个国家建立时，其职责之一便是确保远古死灵法师塔巴丰永远无法逃出绞首塔——那座囚禁并埋葬了他的堡垒高塔。然而，当这名暴君囚牢的伟大封印破碎时，塔巴丰摧毁了终焉之墙，将其转变为如今被称为死坟末土的地区。不过，即使到了现在，尽管成群的不死在乡野间游荡，这片国度中依然还有生命存续。《死坟末土幸存者》讲述了一群难民奋力将一件拥有神术力量的圣物——阿拉兹尼的肺血石——运送到安全之地，并为自己寻找新家园的故事。

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z]

一群从塔巴丰入侵中幸存下来的人，6年来一直栖身于尤娅之望镇下方的一座地穴中，直到悲剧降临。面对饥饿而死的风险，这些幸存者必须放弃他们的避难所，去探索终焉之墙的残存之地，收集资源，并为自己以及与他们一同埋藏于此的古老遗物寻找新的庇护所。

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO]

幸存者们引起了一名食尸鬼猎手的注意，此人被派往尤娅之望，调查关于镇子下方藏有一件强大遗物的传闻。当众人前往港口城市维鲁米斯寻求安全时，他们必须克服死坟末土的重重危险，并直面追猎者。

《死坟末土幸存者》是为四名角色设计的。

玩家角色在这场冒险开始时为1级。

玩家角色应在第二章开始时达到2级。

玩家角色应在冒险结束时达到3级。

The Fight to Survive

When the nation of Lastwall was founded centuries ago, one of its mandates was to ensure the ancient necromancer Tar-Baphon would never escape Gallowspire, the fortress tower where he had been entombed. But when the Great Seal of the tyrant's prison shattered, Tar-Baphon devastated Lastwall, transforming it into the region known today as the Gravelands. Even now, however, life within the realm persists, despite the hordes of undead that roam the countryside. “Gravelands Survivors” follows a group of refugees as they struggle to transport an artifact of divine power, the Lung Bloodstone of Arazni , to safety and find a new home for themselves.

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z]

A group of survivors of Tar-Baphon's invasion have been sheltering in a crypt beneath the town of Yua's Hope for 6 years when tragedy strikes. At risk of starvation, these survivors must abandon their sanctuary to explore what's left of Lastwall, gather resources, and find a new haven for both themselves and the ancient relic entombed along with them.

@UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO]

The survivors attract the attention of a ghoul hunter sent to Yua's Hope to investigate rumors of a powerful relic hidden beneath the town. As the group heads to the safety of the port city of Vellumis, they must overcome the dangers of the Gravelands and face down their pursuer.

“Gravelands Survivors” is designed for four characters.

The PCs begin this adventure at 1st level.

The PCs should reach 2nd level by the start of Chapter 2.

The PCs should reach 3rd level by the end of the adventure.

2. Ashes for Ozem.name: 2. 献给奥泽姆的余烬 2. Ashes for Ozem
2. Ashes for Ozem.text:
为恶而战

在“献给奥泽姆的余烬”中，PC们是一群由墓骑士@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{塞尔德格·贝德利斯}召集起来的默语魔道邪教徒，他们要夺回一件强大的神器——奥泽姆圣杯，它隐藏在奥泽姆要塞下方的地下墓穴中。尽管塞尔德格并未充分透露自己想要圣杯的动机，但他给予PC们进入一座异次元图书馆的许可，以便为他们的突袭制订计划，并警告他们，这座要塞并不像表面看上去那样已被废弃。

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW]

角色们被墓骑士塞尔德格·贝德利斯召唤至凋疫林——这是一片位于南锐木森林核心地带、已遭腐化的小树林。塞尔德格将队伍召集起来，执行一项唯一的任务：潜入奥泽姆要塞，取回藏在其地窖中的一件强大神器，并且所到之处只留下灰烬。虽然塞尔德格在任务开始前给了PC们一个研究这座要塞的机会，但他警告他们，时间已经不多了。失败不是一种选项。

“献给奥泽姆的余烬”是为四名角色设计的。

PC们在这场冒险开始时为7级。

PC们应在冒险结束时达到8级。

In the Service of Evil

In “Ashes for Ozem,” the PCs are a group of Whispering Way cultists assembled by the graveknight @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{Seldeg Bhedlis} to recover a powerful artifact, the Chalice of Ozem , which lies hidden in the catacombs beneath Fort Ozem. While Seldeg is less than forthcoming about his motivations for wanting the chalice, he gives the PCs access to an extradimensional library to plan for their assault and warns them that the fort isn't abandoned as it appears.

@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW]

The characters are summoned to the Blighted Bower, a corrupted grove in the heart of the Southern Fangwood, by the graveknight Seldeg Bhedlis. Seldeg has assembled the party for a singular mission: to infiltrate Fort Ozem, recover a powerful artifact hidden in its vaults, and leave nothing but ashes in their wake. While Seldeg gives the PCs an opportunity to research the fort before the mission begins, he warns them that time is running short. Failure is not an option.

“Ashes for Ozem” is designed for four characters.

The PCs begin this adventure at 7th level.

The PCs should reach 8th level by the end of the adventure.

3. Of Blood and Faith.name: 3. 血与信仰 3. Of Blood and Faith
3. Of Blood and Faith.text:
多面的阿拉兹尼

《血与信仰》建立在女神阿拉兹尼的历史之上——那是一段关于悲剧、求生与复仇的复杂故事。在这场冒险开始时，阿拉兹尼所渴望的无非是掌握自身的自主权，即便这会让她不受欢迎。本冒险中登场的角色与组织都与她有着不同的关系，因此各自都通过不同的视角来看待她的行动。@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{塞尔德格·贝德利斯}，本次冒险的反派，将她视为需要拯救的受害者，同时也是他可用来确保自身救赎的工具。终焉之墙骑士团及其盟友对她的看法则更加多样。有些人将阿拉兹尼视为应当畏惧或蔑视的复仇神祇，而另一些人则采取更为克制的态度，在双方利益一致时谨慎地与这位女神结盟。至于绯红复国团，阿拉兹尼则是力量的源泉，是一位与其他任何神明一样值得他们奉献忠诚的神圣庇护者。

这些看法没有一种是完全错误的。每段故事都代表着与阿拉兹尼及其在戈拉里昂复杂历史之间的一种不同关系。有关这段历史的更多信息可见于其他《探路者》书籍。阿拉兹尼晋升为神的故事讲述于《暴君之握冒险路径》。终焉之墙骑士团、绯红复国团，以及本书中描述的许多NPC的历史，则详载于预言破灭之年：终焉之墙骑士。

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7]{第1章：潜藏地下之物}

PC们得知，死坟末土各地的不死生物一直在探索那些于塔尔-巴丰入侵期间被遗弃的地点。这些不死生物在寻找什么仍不明朗，但终焉之墙骑士团召唤英雄们前往它们下一个最可能的目标——科拉克要塞。不幸的是，塞尔德格·贝德利斯已经派遣爪牙前往要塞，去找回阿拉兹尼的脾血石，塞尔德格相信它就藏在要塞下方。英雄们突破了要塞的防御，击败塞尔德格的爪牙，随后带着这件失落已久的神器返回维卢米斯。

@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU]{第2章：立下绯红誓言}

当终焉之墙骑士团正在争论该如何处置这枚新近发现的血石时，英雄们亲自会见了阿拉兹尼，并获得了一个赢得她青睐的机会。随后，他们被派去抢在塞尔德格的爪牙之前找回另外两枚血石。其中一件神器位于多托特牧场下方，那里有一名与塞尔德格结盟的巫妖正在集结一支不死军队。另一件则位于费林堡——这座废弃的要塞目前被一群来自燃日氏族的兽人占据。

@UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f]{第3章：阿拉兹尼的清算}

PC们抵达锤石堡，准备阻止塞尔德格·贝德利斯的邪恶仪式。在与塞尔德格正面对决之前，英雄们必须先处理他的仆从，其中包括一只噬法龙、一名不死阿扎塔，以及一位堕落的诺恩。若PC们没能阻止塞尔德格，这名墓骑士的仪式将威胁到把现实本身撕裂。

《血与信仰》是为四名角色设计的。

PC们在这场冒险开始时为18级。

PC们应在第2章开始时达到19级。

PC们应在第3章开始时达到20级。

The Multi-Faceted Arazni

“Of Blood and Faith” builds on the history of the goddess Arazni, a complex tale of tragedy, survival, and vengeance. At the start of the adventure, Arazni desires nothing more than her own agency, even if it makes her unpopular. The characters and the organizations presented in this adventure have differing relationships with her, leading each to view her actions through a different lens. @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{Seldeg Bhedlis}, the adventure’s villain, sees her as a victim in need of salvation, as well as a tool he can use to secure his own redemption. The Knights of Lastwall and their allies are more varied in their views. Some see Arazni as a vengeful deity to be feared or scorned, while others take a more measured approach, cautiously allying themselves with the goddess when their interests align. In the case of the Crimson Reclaimers, Arazni is a source of strength, a divine patron as worthy of their devotion as any other god.

None of these views is entirely wrong. Each story represents a different relationship to Arazni and her complicated history on Golarion. More information about this history can be found in other Pathfinder books. The story of Arazni’s ascension to godhood was told in the Tyrant’s Grasp Adventure Path. The histories of the Knights of Lastwall, the Crimson Reclaimers, and many of the NPCs described in this book are detailed in Pathfinder Lost Omens Knights of Lastwall.

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7]{Chapter 1: What Lies Beneath}

The PCs learn that undead across the Gravelands have been exploring sites abandoned during Tar-Baphon’s invasion. What the undead seek remains unclear, but the Knights of Lastwall call upon the heroes to travel to their next likely target, Corlach Keep. Unfortunately, Seldeg Bhedlis has already sent his minions to the keep to recover the Spleen Bloodstone of Arazni, which Seldeg believes is hidden beneath the keep. The heroes overcome the keep’s defenses and defeat Seldeg’s minions, then return to Vellumis with the long-lost artifact.

@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU]{Chapter 2: To Swear the Crimson Oath}

As the Knights of Lastwall debate about what to do with the newly discovered Bloodstone the heroes meet with Arazni herself and are presented with an opportunity to earn her favor. They’re then sent to recover the other two Bloodstones before Seldeg’s minions reach them. One of the artifacts lies beneath Dortrot Ranch, where a lich allied with Seldeg musters an army of undead. The other is at Castle Firrine, an abandoned stronghold currently occupied by a group of orcs from the Burning Sun Hold.

@UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f]{Chapter 3: The Reckoning of Arazni}

The PCs arrive at Hammer Rock to put a stop to Seldeg Bhedlis’s foul ritual. Before confronting Seldeg, the heroes must deal with his servitors, including a ravener, an undead azata, and a corrupted norn. Should the PCs fail to stop Seldeg, the graveknight’s ritual threatens to tear apart reality itself.

“Of Blood and Faith” is designed for four characters.

The PCs begin this adventure at 18th level.

The PCs should reach 19th level by the start of Chapter 2.

The PCs should reach 20th level at the start of Chapter 3.

Adventure Audio.name: 冒险音频 Adventure Audio
Adventure Audio.text:
使用音频

@UUID[Playlist.SSm1hgabpShAkxJC.PlaylistSound.m2ZSwxw2mX8MhOD9]

在本冒险的日志中，你会看到像这样的一些区块，其中包含关于特定内容的建议，这些内容可能适用于当前场景。这些区块通常还会建议播放合适的音频，你可以直接在日志中点击链接的音轨来播放（例如上方列出的官方原声带中的 Track 01）。试试看吧！

本模组包含 75 个为你的团期精心整理的播放列表，使用的是 Michael Ghelfi Studios 的音轨（更多信息见 @UUID[JournalEntry.c0T6xkMGlYsFv4KI]{制作人员名单}）。其中还包括《暴君之爪》@UUID[JournalEntry.dS75aFRvpgKqVfQr.JournalEntryPage.OhWtKUP0lLSwI2Q2]{官方原声带}的全部内容。

战斗音乐：由于《暴君之爪》由三个彼此独立但又相互关联的冒险组成，因此为每个冒险分别提供了通用战斗音乐播放列表。许多个别的“Boss Encounter”战斗播放列表还包含单独的循环音轨，以便 GM 在战斗持续时间较长、音效开始显得有些单调时切换音乐。

音量平衡：本冒险附带的播放列表在进行音量平衡时，默认所有听众都将 Foundry VTT 的音量控制保持在默认的 50%，并据此仔细调整了各个环境音的音量。

“Layer”播放列表

本模组中的许多播放列表标题里都包含 (Layer)。这是为了提示 GM：这些播放列表应当在之前的播放列表之外额外播放，以便将该声音叠加到现有的音景之上。

例如，在《死坟末土幸存者》第一章中探索摩德沙的地穴时，预期 GM 会让 @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙的地穴} 播放列表持续运行，同时在玩家进入这些播放列表所对应的区域时，点击播放或停止诸如 @UUID[Playlist.mmYDWXjWbwNWfnJg]{未知墓志铭 (Layer)} 或 @UUID[Playlist.Jco0ZqsRqplGtheR]{葬礼挽歌 (Layer)} 之类的播放列表。

标题中不包含 (Layer) 的播放列表一次只应播放一个，但为了实现平滑的淡入淡出过渡，GM 可以也应该先点击下一个播放列表的播放，再立刻停止上一个播放列表。

Using Audio

@UUID[Playlist.SSm1hgabpShAkxJC.PlaylistSound.m2ZSwxw2mX8MhOD9]

Throughout the adventure's journals, you will find blocks like this one, which contain advice on specific content that might be applicable to the present scene. These will often suggest appropriate audio to play, which you can do straight from the journal by clicking the linked track (such as Track 01 from the official soundtrack, listed just above). Try it out!

This module includes 75 playlists carefully curated for use during your game sessions, using audio tracks from Michael Ghelfi Studios (see the @UUID[JournalEntry.c0T6xkMGlYsFv4KI]{Credits} for more information). This includes the entirety of the Claws of the Tyrant @UUID[JournalEntry.dS75aFRvpgKqVfQr.JournalEntryPage.OhWtKUP0lLSwI2Q2]{official soundtrack}.

Combat Music: As Claws of the Tyrant comprises three distinct but related adventures, general combat music playlists have been provided for each adventure separately. Many individual "Boss Encounter" combat playlists include separate looped tracks to allow the GM to swap music in cases where the combat runs long and the sound gets a little stale.

Volume Balancing: The playlists included in this adventure have had their volume balanced under the assumption that all listeners will have their Foundry VTT volume controls set to the default 50% and the volumes for each ambience have been carefully balanced accordingly.

"Layer" Playlists

Many of the playlists in this module include (Layer) in their title. This is intended to indicate to the GM that they are meant to be played in addition to a previous playlist in order to layer that sound atop an existing soundscape.

For example, in the first chapter of Gravelands Survivors, while exploring the Crypts of Mordesha, it is expected that the GM will leave the @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha} playlist running while clicking play or stop on playlists such as @UUID[Playlist.mmYDWXjWbwNWfnJg]{Unknown Epitaph (Layer)} or @UUID[Playlist.Jco0ZqsRqplGtheR]{A Funeral Dirge (Layer)} as the players enter the areas those playlists cover.

Playlists that DO NOT have a (Layer) in their title are only intended to be played one at a time, but for a smooth cross-fade transition GMs can and should click play on the next playlist before immediately clicking stop on the previous.

Official Soundtrack.name: 官方原声带 Official Soundtrack
Official Soundtrack.text:
官方原声带

本模组自豪地收录了《暴君之爪》官方原声带，由来自 Michael Ghelfi Studios 的 Miguel Abuel 作曲（更多信息请参见 @UUID[JournalEntry.c0T6xkMGlYsFv4KI]{鸣谢}）。

你可以在右侧边栏的“播放列表”标签下找到这些播放列表。此外，这些曲目通常也会在日志文本中的橙色标注框内链接，就像这个一样。

曲目列表

以下是每首曲目的官方描述，可帮助你判断在冒险中何时最适合使用它们。许多曲目都非常多变，可以用在多种不同场合！

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.ILoWSn0nqUsbMia6]

（主主题 / Boss 战）

一首强烈而史诗般的战斗主题，适用于全部三个冒险中的重大 Boss 战。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.Fs26095IIScX5dJu]

（室内氛围）

一首紧张却平和的曲目，适用于全部三个冒险中静止与休息的时刻。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.wMuCHHWi3fNHQues]

（战斗）

一首冷酷、黑暗的战斗主题，适用于与疫病丧尸的遭遇——尤其是塔莉·吉尔达女爵复生成疫病丧尸时。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.QtOPyqmkk8d8amDJ]

（地城氛围）

一首荒凉、哀伤的主题，适用于尤娅之望的废墟城镇，也可在全部三个冒险中用作地城主题。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.0KC1uDKrxS5e0X9E]

（室外氛围）

一首平静、沉思的曲目，适用于前往维鲁米斯的旅程，强调日渐匮乏的补给与脆弱的希望。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.GOaO3RPUjtf3oKRv]

（战斗）

一首快节奏、毫不留情的主题，适用于对抗砾地亡灵以及食尸鬼猎手奥梅莉娅的 Boss 战。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.qjxhlUnI1r9DePl5]

（Boss 战）

一首富有节奏感、走向高潮的主题，适用于奥泽姆的要塞战斗——也可作为本冒险的终曲。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.AN0qQnsVBzm2zi4M]

（战斗）

适用于全部冒险中与切尔纳萨多游侠或塞尔德格·贝德利斯部队交锋的战斗音乐。

[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.KQmX3HhRggFgBC71]

（地城氛围）

一首萦绕不散的主题，适用于奥泽姆要塞的废墟，也能灵活用于其他衰败的据点，例如费林堡。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.GQlID1R0VONT1Myt]

（室外氛围）

一首阴郁而富有节奏感的曲目，适用于侦察与谋划——也很适合异次元的剥皮苍蝇，或其他冒险中不祥的旅行场景。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.yIJqBIJFMr8qNURL]

（地城氛围）

一首适合潜行、充满悬念的主题，用于渗透奥泽姆要塞。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.9iXsWYNan3n35Cwn]

（战斗）

一首高风险的战斗主题，适用于对抗阿尔塞拉·黛伊、艾奥梅黛牧师、奥泽姆的毁灭，或其他冒险中的类似场景。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.KmENKBurs5q5mngk]

（战斗）

最终冒险的主主题，适用于对抗报丧女妖、次级死神以及凶险任务的战斗。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.XVGmraN8c79ALIM9]

（氛围）

一首诡异而庄严的主题，体现了阿拉兹妮的神器——她力量与复仇并存的双重性。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.nWlXWeC4sOO1yAso]

（氛围）

一首复杂而游荡的主题，映照阿拉兹妮的悲剧历史，非常适合高等级旅行。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.w0WJzdHbbCA8Tzkh]

（战斗）

一首不屈的战斗主题，适用于多托特牧场（对抗布鲁姆斯加斯）和费林堡（对抗希卡尔夫人）。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.wTtmq2zAjPi7bz9j]

（城市氛围）

一首繁忙而充满活力的主题，适用于港口城市维鲁米斯。

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.2c8HQRV78vb6eLDa]

（Boss 战）

对抗塞尔德格·贝德利斯最终仪式的终幕高潮战斗主题。

Official Soundtrack

This module proudly includes the official Claws of the Tyrant soundtrack, composed by Miguel Abuel from Michael Ghelfi Studios (see the @UUID[JournalEntry.c0T6xkMGlYsFv4KI]{Credits} for more information).

You can find the playlists in the right-hand sidebar, under the Playlists tab. In addition, the tracks are generally linked within the journal text in the orange callout boxes such as this one.

Track List

Below are the official descriptions of each track, which might help you to decide when it is most appropriate to use them in the adventure. Many of the tracks are very versatile and can be deployed in several possible ways!

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.ILoWSn0nqUsbMia6]

(Main Theme / Boss Battle)

An intense, epic battle theme for major boss fights across all three adventures.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.Fs26095IIScX5dJu]

(Indoor Ambience)

A tense yet peaceful track for moments of stillness and rest for all three adventures

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.wMuCHHWi3fNHQues]

(Battle)

A harsh, dark battle theme for encounters with plague zombies—especially Dame Talie Gildar’s resurrection as a plague zombie.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.QtOPyqmkk8d8amDJ]

(Dungeon Ambience)

A desolate, mournful theme for the ruined town of Yua’s Hope that can be used in all three adventures as a dungeon theme.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.0KC1uDKrxS5e0X9E]

(Outdoor Ambience)

A calm, contemplative track for journeys toward Vellumis, emphasizing dwindling supplies and fragile hope.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.GOaO3RPUjtf3oKRv]

(Battle)

A fast-paced, relentless theme for Graveland undead and the Ghoul Hunter Omelia boss fight.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.qjxhlUnI1r9DePl5]

(Boss Battle)

A rhythmic, climactic theme for fortress battles in Ozem—also serves as the adventure’s finale.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.AN0qQnsVBzm2zi4M]

(Battle)

Battle music for clashes with Chernasado Rangers or Seldeg Bhedlis’ forces across all adventures.

[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.KQmX3HhRggFgBC71]

(Dungeon Ambience)

A haunting theme for Fort Ozem’s ruins, adaptable to other decaying strongholds like Castle Firrine.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.GQlID1R0VONT1Myt]

(Outdoor Ambience)

A somber, rhythmic track for scouting and planning—also fits the extradimensional Flayed Flies or ominous general travel in other adventures.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.yIJqBIJFMr8qNURL]

(Dungeon Ambience)

A stealthy, suspenseful theme for infiltrating Fort Ozem.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.9iXsWYNan3n35Cwn]

(Battle)

A high-stakes battle theme for fights against Arsiella Dei, Priests of Iomedae, Ozem’s destruction or other adventures.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.KmENKBurs5q5mngk]

(Battle)

The main theme for the final adventure, suited for battles against banshees, Lesser Deaths, and dire missions.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.XVGmraN8c79ALIM9]

(Ambience)

An eerie, reverent theme embodying Arazni’s artifacts—her duality of strength and vengeance.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.nWlXWeC4sOO1yAso]

(Ambience)

A complex, wandering theme reflecting Arazni’s tragic history, ideal for high-level travels.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.w0WJzdHbbCA8Tzkh]

(Battle)

A defiant battle theme for Dortrot Ranch (vs. Brumesgarth) and Castle Firrine (vs. Lady Siccale).

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.wTtmq2zAjPi7bz9j]

(City Ambience)

A bustling, lively theme for the port city of Vellumis.

@UUID[Playlist.cb6Hc3kT3cp1Aq8X.PlaylistSound.2c8HQRV78vb6eLDa]

(Boss Battle)

The final climactic battle theme against Seldeg Bheldis’ last ritual.

2: Ashes for Ozem.name: 2：献给奥泽姆的余烬 2: Ashes for Ozem

Ashes for Ozem.name: 献给奥泽姆的余烬 Ashes for Ozem
Ashes for Ozem.text:
终焉之墙骑士团自其作为奥泽姆骑士团的时代起，就一直是塔尔-巴风的眼中钉。闪耀远征期间，骑士们将塔尔-巴风囚禁在暴君自己的堡垒高塔——绞首塔——之中，这场囚禁持续了将近300年。尽管塔尔-巴风最终还是克服了骑士团妄图困住他的愚蠢尝试，但“奥泽姆”这个名字对默语暴君而言仍然充满苦涩，对他最新的副官——墓骑士塞尔德格·贝德利斯——也是如此。

身为前欧泽姆骑士的塞尔德格·贝德利斯，相信自己已经找到了将“奥泽姆”之名从历史中彻底抹去的方法。他计划派遣一支默语魔道特工小队潜入欧泽姆堡，并从内部将其摧毁。然而，塞尔德格资助这次行动的动机，并不只是单纯的复仇。最近，塞尔德格发现一件强大神器——奥泽姆圣杯——被藏在欧泽姆堡下方的地下墓穴中。就连默语暴君也并不知晓，塞尔德格想将这只圣杯据为己有，因为他打算用这件神器为一场仪式提供力量，而这场仪式若能成功，将会改写历史。

自从背弃了对幽灵王盖布的职责之后，塞尔德格·贝德利斯便一直致力于赢得其新主人塔尔-巴风的信任，同时始终隐藏着自己最终的目标——“拯救”女神阿拉兹尼。为了实施这一计划，塞尔德格设计出了一种仪式，要将阿拉兹尼的命运与另一位女神艾奥梅黛的命运互换。改写诸神的历史需要戈拉里昂前所未见的魔法，因此塞尔德格开始着手收集多件神器来为其仪式供能，其中包括阿拉兹尼的血石和奥泽姆圣杯。最近，塞尔德格抓获了一名研究者，她一直对警戒城毁灭之后血石的下落感兴趣，而他从她那里得知了这些神器的位置。与此同时，塞尔德格的间谍透露，奥泽姆圣杯藏于欧泽姆堡下方；这座看似被废弃的堡垒长期以来一直盛传是神秘的涅玛萨斯自由斗士——切尔那萨多游侠——的据点。尽管塞尔德格认为，消灭驻扎在堡中的游侠只是这次任务令人愉快的附带效果（也是为其行动打掩护的方便说辞），但这名墓骑士想要摧毁欧泽姆堡其实只有一个真正目的：取回奥泽姆圣杯，以便在他让阿拉兹尼重返昔日荣光的追求中使用它。

塞尔德格关于欧泽姆堡的情报是正确的——切尔那萨多游侠确实将欧泽姆堡当作藏身处使用。游侠们在艾奥梅黛教会的祝福下看守着这座堡垒；教会在其中维护着一处圣所，以纪念他们的女神曾短暂以凡人之身居于此地的那段时光。堡垒的大门也向终焉之墙骑士团敞开，骑士团成员会在执行任务途中将这处要塞主楼作为中途据点。这三个团体全都听命于切尔纳萨多守望者@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{阿尔塞拉·黛伊}，她将自己在欧泽姆堡的服役视为对其父亲伊尔加尔·涅玛斯的致敬——后者正是游侠团的创始人，也是涅玛萨斯得名所纪念之人。

阿尔塞拉虽然自认已做好面对一切的准备，但塞尔德格派来夺取奥泽姆圣杯的默语魔道特工们决心证明她错了。若运气站在他们这边，那么今夜结束时，欧泽姆堡留下的就只会有灰烬。

The Knights of Lastwall have been a thorn in Tar-Baphon's side since their days as the Knights of Ozem. During the Shining Crusade, the knights imprisoned Tar-Baphon inside the tyrant's own fortress-tower of Gallowspire, a captivity that lasted nearly 300 years. While Tar-Baphon eventually overcame the Knights' foolish attempt to contain him, the name Ozem remains a bitter one for the Whispering Tyrant, as well as for his newest lieutenant, the graveknight Seldeg Bhedlis.

Seldeg Bhedlis, a former Knight of Ozem, believes he has found a way to erase the name Ozem from history forever. He plans to send a team of Whispering Way agents to infiltrate Fort Ozem and destroy it from the inside out. Seldeg's motivations for sponsoring such a mission are more complicated than mere revenge, however. Recently, Seldeg discovered that a powerful artifact, the Chalice of Ozem , was hidden in the catacombs beneath Fort Ozem. Unknown even to the Whispering Tyrant, Seldeg wants the chalice for himself, as he plans to use the artifact to power a ritual that, if successful, will change history.

Since abandoning his duties to the Ghost King Geb, Seldeg Bhedlis has worked to gain the trust of his new master, Tar-Baphon, all the while hiding his ultimate goal of “saving” the goddess Arazni. To enact this plan, Seldeg has developed a ritual that will swap Arazni's fate with that of another goddess, Iomedae. Rewriting the history of gods requires magic the likes of which Golarion has never seen, and so Seldeg has set about gathering a number of artifacts to fuel his ritual, including the Bloodstones of Arazni and the Chalice of Ozem. Recently, Seldeg captured a researcher interested in the fate of the Bloodstones after the destruction of Vigil, and from her he learned the location of those artifacts. Meanwhile, Seldeg's spies have revealed that the Chalice of Ozem lies hidden beneath Fort Ozem, a seemingly abandoned fort long rumored to be a stronghold of the secretive Nirmathi freedom fighters, the Chernasardo Rangers. Though Seldeg considers wiping out the rangers stationed at the fort a pleasant side effect of his mission (as well a convenient cover story for his actions), the graveknight's desire to destroy Fort Ozem has only one real purpose: to retrieve the Chalice of Ozem so that he might use it in his quest to restore Arazni to her former glory.

Seldeg's intelligence about Fort Ozem is correct—the Chernasardo Rangers are indeed using Fort Ozem as a hideout. The rangers oversee the fort with the blessing of the church of Iomedae, who maintain a shrine inside in honor of the time their goddess lived there briefly as a mortal. The fort's gates are also open to the Knights of Lastwall, whose members use the stronghold as a waypoint during their missions. All three groups operate under the command of Chernasardo warden @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{Arsiella Dei}, who considers her service at Fort Ozem an honor to her father, Irgal Nirmath, the founder of the Rangers and the man for whom Nirmathas is named.

While Arsiella believes she is ready for anything, the Whispering Way agents Seldeg sends to recover the Chalice of Ozem are determined to prove her wrong. With any luck, by the end of the night only the ashes of Fort Ozem will remain.

A Summons.name: 召唤 A Summons
A Summons.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.uphQZBxUEv39IOy5]{与塞尔德格会面}

当冒险开始时。

冒险开始于角色们响应塞尔德格·贝德利斯的召唤。这个墓骑士要求PC们前往凋疫林与他会面。那是一片在数个世纪前被黑枯病腐化的小树林；黑枯病是一种困扰南锐木森林的超自然疫病。尽管这片树林靠近欧泽姆堡，但魔法将凋疫林隐藏起来，使其避开切尔那萨多游侠及其盟友的窥探。塞尔德格如何联系到角色们由玩家决定，而你可以鼓励每位玩家描述他们前往凋疫林的旅程，以帮助所有人更熟悉他们的角色。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.Dpnze1b471S4SV5n]{凋疫林（层）}

当队伍抵达凋疫林时，将此音轨叠加到 @UUID[Playlist.uphQZBxUEv39IOy5]{与塞尔德格会面} 播放列表上。

当所有角色都到齐后，朗读或转述以下内容。

凋疫林是一片树木组成的小树林，扭曲的枝干彼此交织，遮蔽了天空。林中的自然光已被一种昏暗的绿光取代，这光芒源自刻在树干上的奇异符印。这样的光线恰好足以照亮一名独自站在林地中央之人的面庞。他是个年近老境的人类男子，肤色苍白，披着一件与林中阴影融为一体的黑色斗篷。

“来吧，”那人说道，他沙哑粗粝的嗓音划破了原本寂静的树林。“是时候摧毁那些可悲的奥泽姆骑士团最后残余之一，并对他们珍爱的神明施以一次私人的打击了。我的消息来源告诉我，艾奥梅黛的追随者把一件强大遗物藏在欧泽姆堡的废墟中。那是自闪耀远征时期起，这些骑士便一直维持着的要塞。你们将进入堡垒，追踪这件遗物，并把它带给我。沿途找到的任何东西都归你们所有，但离开时务必要毁掉那个地方——以及任何愚蠢到胆敢反抗你们的人。塔尔-巴风已经厌倦了这些麻烦的凡人。他们只配被碾成尘土。”

假如角色们愿意接受塞尔德格的任务，这名墓骑士会回答他们可能提出的任何问题。

关于欧泽姆堡，目前已知些什么？

“那不过是奥泽姆骑士团在对抗默语暴君的远征中建造的众多据点之一。如今他们的骑士团已成废墟，我听说那座堡垒也变得相当碍眼：庭院杂草丛生，墙体坍塌，遍布蛛网与灰尘。它几乎荒废得过了头——最近的报告表明，那座堡垒依然在为骑士团及其盟友充当中转点。任务开始前，我会留给你们一个办法，让你们进一步了解那个地点。我强烈建议你们使用它。”

但奥泽姆骑士团不是已经不复存在了吗！我们还应当注意哪些其他危险？

对此，塞尔德格冷笑一声。“和许多活人一样，那些可悲的圣战士拒绝承认自己已经败北。他们把自己改名为终焉之墙骑士团，而且新的盟友日复一日地汇聚到他们的旗帜之下。一群自称切尔那萨多游侠的所谓自由斗士曾在堡垒附近被发现。那些游侠箭比脑子多，但我怀疑他们可能潜伏在堡垒周围，代替那些骑士保护那件遗物。我几乎都要替他们感到遗憾了。”

我们要找的这件遗物是什么？

“我召集你们是看重你们的本事，不是你们的好奇心，不过我还是可以告诉你们这一点：那件遗物是一只嵌有红宝石的银圣杯，那些红宝石被雕成滴落血珠的形状。这只圣杯对艾奥梅黛的追随者而言十分珍贵，因此很可能会有她的走狗把守。务必小心。若他们或那些切尔那萨多游侠确实在堡垒里，一旦觉得遗物受到威胁，他们就会把它转移到新的地点。你们不会想空手回来见我的。”

这项任务我们有多长时间？

尽管塞尔德格并没有特别急迫地想要取回奥泽姆圣杯，但他担心如果欧泽姆堡的守卫怀疑默语魔道已经发现了它的位置，他们会带着圣杯撤离。“12小时后，我们会在这里再次见面。若你们没有到达，我就会视这次任务为失败。”他用冰冷的目光盯住角色们。“不建议失败。”

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}

玩家们可能会问他们的角色是否知道关于欧泽姆堡或塞尔德格要求他们取回的@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{圣杯 }的事情。你可以根据他们感兴趣的主题，为角色们进行秘密的回忆知识检定。任一检定失败都不会获得信息，而大成功则会获得额外信息。

尝试进行 @Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 或 @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:21|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 检定，以回忆关于欧泽姆堡知识的PC，可能会知道更多这座堡垒的历史。

  • 大成功：在闪耀远征期间，欧泽姆堡曾短暂由艾奥梅黛亲自指挥，当时她尚未升格为神祇。这座堡垒的整体设计遵循一种“剑与剑柄”的布局，前部区域被设计成用来消磨入侵者。PC在为穿行这座堡垒而进行的检定中获得+1环境加值。

  • 成功：欧泽姆堡是南锐木森林中的一座堡垒，距离凋疫林仅有1小时路程。奥泽姆骑士团曾将这座堡垒用作对抗默语暴君战争中的集结点。尽管这座堡垒看起来已被遗弃，但有传言称切尔那萨多游侠及其盟友如今把这里当作藏身处。

  • 大失败：奥泽姆骑士团早在数世纪前就放弃了欧泽姆堡。自那以后，它的场地便被黑枯病吞噬。

尝试进行 @Check[type:iomedae-lore|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 或 @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 来回忆关于奥泽姆圣杯知识的PC，可能会知道更多这只圣杯的历史。

  • 大成功：在三重悲恸之战中，艾奥梅黛与默语暴君麾下军官之一埃鲁姆-赫尔交战时，曾持有奥泽姆圣杯。自艾奥梅黛升神以来，这只圣杯本身也已成为一件遗物。PC在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{鉴定} 这只圣杯的检定时获得+1环境加值（包括辨认 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{A20区域} 中的赝品）。

  • 成功：塞尔德格对这件遗物的描述与奥泽姆圣杯相符，人们原以为它在三重悲恸之战中遗失了。据传，这只圣杯不会被它所盛装的任何物质损坏，而放入其中的液体永远不会洒出。

  • 大失败：PC把塞尔德格所寻找的遗物认成了绯红之杯，一件能够让不死生物重返生者行列的圣物。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.uphQZBxUEv39IOy5]{Meeting with Seldeg}

As the adventure begins.

The adventure begins as the characters respond to a summons by Seldeg Bhedlis. The graveknight has asked the PCs to meet him in the Blighted Bower, a grove corrupted centuries ago by the Darkblight, a supernatural infection that plagues the Southern Fangwood. Despite the grove's proximity to Fort Ozem, magic conceals the Bower from the prying eyes of the Chernasardo Rangers and their allies. How Seldeg contacted the characters is up to the players, and you might encourage each player to describe their journey to the Blighted Bower to help familiarize everyone with their characters.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.Dpnze1b471S4SV5n]{The Blighted Bower (Layer)}

As the party arrives at the blighted bower, add this over the @UUID[Playlist.uphQZBxUEv39IOy5]{Meeting with Seldeg} playlist.

Once all the characters are assembled, read or paraphrase the following.

The Blighted Bower is a grove of trees whose crooked branches interweave to block the sky. Natural light within the bower has been replaced by a dim, greenish glow emanating from strange sigils carved into the trunks of the trees. This light is just bright enough to illuminate the face of a figure standing alone at the center of the grove. He is a human man in his late-middle years, with wan skin and a black cloak that blends with the bower's shadows.

“Come,” the figure says, his gravelly voice slicing through the otherwise silent grove. “The time has come to destroy one of the last remnants of the pathetic Knights of Ozem and strike a personal blow against their precious god. My sources tell me Iomedae's followers have hidden an artifact of great power in the ruins of Fort Ozem, a stronghold the knights have maintained since the days of the Shining Crusade. You will enter the fort, track down this relic, and bring it to me. Anything you find along the way is yours to keep, but be sure to destroy the place—and anyone foolish enough to oppose you—on your way out. Tar-Baphon tires of these troublesome mortals. They deserve nothing more than to be ground into dust.”

Assuming the characters are open to Seldeg's mission, the graveknight answers any questions they might have.

What is known about Fort Ozem?

“It is just one of the many strongholds the Knights of Ozem built during their crusade against the Whispering Tyrant. With their order now in ruins, I hear the fort has become quite the eyesore: overgrown grounds, crumbling walls, spiderwebs, and dust. It's almost too abandoned—recent reports suggest that the fort continues to serve as a waypoint for the knights and their allies. I will leave you with a way to learn more about the location before your mission begins. I strongly suggest you use it.”

But the Knights of Ozem are gone! What other dangers we should be aware of?

At this, Seldeg sneers. “Like so many of the living, those pathetic crusaders refuse to accept that they've been beaten. They've renamed themselves the Knights of Lastwall, and new allies flock to their banner by the day. A group of so-called freedom fighters calling themselves the Chernasardo Rangers have been spotted near the fort. The rangers have more arrows than sense, but I suspect they might be lurking about the fort to protect the artifact on behalf of the knights. I almost feel sorry for them.”

What is this artifact we're looking for?

“I assembled you for your skills, not your curiosity, but I will say this: the artifact is a silver chalice embedded with rubies shaped like drops of blood. The chalice is precious to the followers of Iomedae, and as such is likely to be guarded by her lackeys. Take care. If they or these Chernasardo Rangers are indeed inside the fort, they will deliver the artifact to a new location if they feel it's under threat. You don't wish to return to me empty-handed.”

How long do we have for this mission?

While Seldeg is under no particular time pressure to retrieve the Chalice of Ozem , he worries that Fort Ozem's defenders will retreat with the chalice if they suspect the Whispering Way has discovered its location. “We will meet here again in 12 hours. Should you not arrive, I will consider the mission to be a failure.” He fixes the characters with an icy stare. “Failure is not recommended.”

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recalling Knowledge}

The players might ask what their characters know about Fort Ozem or the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{chalice }Seldeg has asked them to retrieve. You can make secret checks to Recall Knowledge for the characters, depending on their subject of interest. A failure on either check grants no information, and a critical success grants additional information.

A PC who attempts a @Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] or @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:21|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] check to Recall Knowledge about Fort Ozem might know more about the fort's history.

  • Critical Success: During the Shining Crusade, Fort Ozem was briefly commanded by Iomedae herself, who at that time had not yet ascended to godhood. The general design of the fort follows a “sword-and-hilt” layout, with the forward portion designed to wear down intruders. The PCs gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks made to navigate the fort.

  • Success: Fort Ozem is a fortress in the Southern Fangwood, just an hour away from the Blighted Bower. The Knights of Ozem once used the fort as a staging point in the war against the Whispering Tyrant. Though the fort appears abandoned, it's rumored the Chernasardo Rangers and their allies now use the location as a hideout.

  • Critical Failure: The Knights of Ozem abandoned Fort Ozem centuries ago. Its grounds have since been consumed by the Darkblight.

A PC who attempts a @Check[type:iomedae-lore|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] or @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] to Recall Knowledge about the Chalice of Ozem might know more about the chalice's history.

  • Critical Success: Iomedae held the Chalice of Ozem during her battle against Erum-Hel, one of the Whispering Tyrant's officers, during the Battle of Three Sorrows. Since Iomedae's ascension, the chalice has become an artifact in its own right. The PCs gain a +1 circumstance bonus checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{identify} the chalice (including discerning the forgery in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20} ).

  • Success: Seldeg's description of the artifact matches that of the Chalice of Ozem , which was thought the have been lost during the Battle of Three Sorrows. According to rumors, the chalice can't be harmed by any substance it holds, and liquid placed within the chalice will never spill.

  • Critical Failure: The PC identifies the artifact Seldeg seeks as the Crimson Cup, a relic capable of a returning an undead creature to the ranks of the living.

The Flayed Files.name: 剥皮文库 The Flayed Files
The Flayed Files.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.z3XEPr6G6QF9Cye5]{剥皮文库（Layer）}

当队伍通过塞尔德格的传送门进入剥皮文库时。

正如塞尔德格所承诺的那样，这名墓骑士掌握着一种资源，角色们可以借此进一步了解奥泽姆堡。这座半是监狱、半是图书馆的剥皮文库，是一处异次元空间，塞尔德格将那些要么失败、要么反对过他之人的灵魂储存在此。文库中那些“书本”的书页上，书写着这些不幸灵魂最后的忏悔。数个世纪以来，剥皮文库一直是这名墓骑士极其宝贵的资源，但在这座图书馆中停留太久会很危险，因为它的魔法会将隐秘的真相蚀刻进逗留者的血肉之中，造成持久的创伤。

塞尔德格将手按在凋疫林边缘一棵刻符伤痕之树上，打开了通往剥皮文库的传送门。角色们一旦进入文库，便可以按自己的选择使用图书馆中的资源，不过塞尔德格警告他们，在这处异次元空间内时间流逝如常。他们不该拖延，以免没有足够时间完成任务。（塞尔德格故意没有提及，若来访者逗留过久，文库会对他们造成有害影响。）

使用图书馆

剥皮文库的设计是配合研究子系统使用的。使用该子系统所需的全部规则都在此呈现。

在剥皮文库中，时间以轮计，每轮耗时1小时。在每一轮中，角色使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究} 探索活动来获得研究点。随着时间流逝、队伍获得RP，他们会得到更多信息，但也必须应对图书馆试图将他们变成其馆藏一部分的努力。

每进行3轮研究后，剥皮文库都会试图将每名角色生命中的一段真相蚀刻进他们的血肉之中（若角色没有血肉，则蚀刻进其等效物中）。每名角色受到 [[/r 4d6[slashing]]] 挥砍伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|basic:true] 豁免。在失败时，该角色还会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{drained 1}（若为大失败则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{drained 2}）。之后每次豁免失败都会使 drained 值增加1，最多提升至 drained 4。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{研究}

  • 专注
  • 探索

你翻阅剥皮文库，以了解当前主题的更多信息。选择你要查阅的图书馆区域，并尝试一次技能检定。可用技能和检定DC取决于你的选择。

  • 大成功：你获得2 RP。

    成功：你获得1 RP。

    大失败：你得出错误发现，并失去1 RP。

剥皮文库

研究 7

  • 独特
  • 异次元

剥皮文库是一条位于两面高得不可思议的墙壁之间的环形通道，墙面上排列着书架，摆满了以塞尔德格·贝德利斯的敌人（有些情况下还有他昔日盟友）的血肉装订而成的书籍。这条道路没有起点，也没有终点；无论朝哪个方向行走，最终都会通向图书馆的新区域。

耳听八方 这一部分收藏的是由塞尔德格昔日间谍与线人之躯制成的书。这些书中都记载着作者相信为真的传闻。由于其中一些传闻彼此矛盾，因此要由读者来判断究竟谁的耳目最为敏锐；最大RP 10

研究检定 @Check[type:perception|dc:18|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} 判断书籍作者是否可靠，@Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 以将书中的信息与已知事实相互核对。

死不屈服 这一部分的书中封存着塞尔德格昔日敌手的灵魂。即便死后，这些灵魂也不愿向敌人吐露自己的秘密；最大RP 10

研究检定 @Check[type:arcana|dc:20], @Check[type:religion|dc:20], @Check[type:society|dc:20], 或适当的 Lore，以找到一本与某个特定主题相关的书；@Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:force-open] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} 强行打开一本书，因为其作者的灵魂正试图将它紧紧合上；@Check[type:intimidation|dc:23|traits:action:coerce] 以向书本逼问答案。

叛逆典籍 这些书是由背叛了切尔那萨多游侠、艾奥梅黛教会或终焉之墙骑士团之人制成的。虽然这些书中包含有关塔尔-巴丰敌人的重要信息，但这些叛徒的灵魂仍在继续隐瞒真相，不断改变书页上的文字；最大RP 15

研究检定 @Check[type:perception|dc:25] 以在文字变化前瞥见隐藏的真相，@Check[type:occultism|dc:28] 以凭意志让文字保持静止。

5 研究点：PC确认，切尔那萨多游侠任由奥泽姆堡荒废，以掩盖其真正用途。尽管外表如此，他们仍将这座堡垒作为行动基地。他们与艾奥梅黛教会和终焉之墙骑士团共同掌控这座堡垒。

10 研究点：PC了解了奥泽姆堡的大致布局，包括其采用“剑与剑柄”的设计。堡垒前方那座破败建筑只是一个空壳，目的是阻挠入侵者。角色们还得知了堡垒外墙中隐藏入口的位置，以及 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{A15区域} 中暗门的位置。

15 研究点：PC发现，艾奥梅黛教会保存着艾奥梅黛曾在堡垒中使用过的空间，并将其维护为一间纪念她的陈列室。这个房间中有一处通往堡垒下方地下墓穴的入口。

20 研究点：PC得知，塞尔德格正在寻找的神器——奥泽姆圣杯——被藏在奥泽姆堡下方的地下墓穴中。他们发现了一张地图，上面标示了地下墓穴的大致布局，并显示了圣杯的确切位置（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{B9区域}）。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.z3XEPr6G6QF9Cye5]{The Flayed Files (Layer)}

As the party enters the Flayed Files through Seldeg's portal.

As Seldeg promised, the graveknight has a resource the characters can use to learn more about Fort Ozem. Part prison and part library, the Flayed Files is an extradimensional space where Seldeg stores the souls of those who've either failed or opposed him. The pages of the “books” contained in the Files are inked with the final confessions of these unfortunate souls. While the Flayed Files has proven an invaluable resource for the graveknight over the centuries, staying too long in the library is dangerous, as its magic etches hidden truths into the flesh of those who linger there, creating lasting wounds.

Touching his hand to one of the sigil-scarred trees at the edge of the Blighted Bower, Seldeg opens a portal to the Flayed Files. Once the characters enter the Files, they can use the library's resources as they choose, although Seldeg warns them that time passes normally within the extradimensional space. They shouldn't dawdle, lest they run out of time to complete their mission. (Seldeg knowingly omits the harmful effects the Files can have on visitors who overstay their welcome.)

Using the Library

The Flayed Files is designed to be used with the Research subsystem. All rules needed to use the subsystem are presented here.

Time in the Flayed Files passes in rounds, each of which takes 1 hour. During each round, characters use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} exploration activity to gain Research Points. As time passes and the party gains RP, they gain more information but must also deal with the library's efforts to make them a part of its collection.

After every 3 rounds of research, the Flayed Files attempt to etch a truth from each character's life into their flesh (or flesh equivalent if the character doesn't have flesh). Each character takes [[/r 4d6[slashing]]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:25|basic:true] save. On a failed save, the character is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{drained 2} on a critical failure). Further failed saves increase the drained value by 1, to a maximum of drained 4.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research}

  • Concentrate
  • Exploration

You peruse the Flayed Files to learn more about the topic at hand. Choose your section of the library and attempt a skill check. The skills to use and the DC for the check depend on the choice you made.

  • Critical Success: You gain 2 RP.

    Success: You gain 1 RP.

    Critical Failure: You make a false discovery and lose 1 RP.

The Flayed Files

Research 7

  • Unique
  • Extradimensional

The Flayed Files is a circular path between two impossibly tall walls, each lined with shelves filled with books bound in the flesh of Seldeg Bhedlis’s enemies (and in some cases, his former allies). The path has no beginning or end; walking in any direction always leads to a new section of the library.

Ears To the Ground This section contains books made from the bodies of Seldeg’s former spies and informants. The books all hold rumors the author believed to be true. As some of these rumors contradict the others, it is up to the reader to decide whose ears were most discerning; Maximum RP 10

Research Checks @Check[type:perception|dc:18|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} to determine if the book’s author is reliable, @Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] to check the book’s information against known facts.

Defiant in Death The books in this section contain the souls of Seldeg’s former foes. Even in death, these souls are loath to give up their secrets to the enemy; Maximum RP 10

Research Checks @Check[type:arcana|dc:20], @Check[type:religion|dc:20], @Check[type:society|dc:20], or appropriate Lore to locate a book about a certain topic; @Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:force-open] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open} a book as the soul of its author attempts to hold it shut; @Check[type:intimidation|dc:23|traits:action:coerce] to demand answers from the book.

Traitorous Tomes These books are made from those who betrayed the Chernasardo Rangers, the church of Iomedae, or the Knights of Lastwall. While the books contain important information about the enemies of Tar-Baphon, the souls of these traitors continue to conceal the truth, constantly shifting the words written on their pages; Maximum RP 15

Research Checks @Check[type:perception|dc:25] to catch sight of hidden truths before the words transform, @Check[type:occultism|dc:28] to will the words to remain still.

5 Research Points: The PCs confirm that the Chernasardo Rangers have allowed Fort Ozem to go to ruin to conceal its true purpose. They use the fort as a base of operations despite its current appearance. They share control of the fort with the church of Iomedae and the Knights of Lastwall.

10 Research Points: The PCs learn the rough layout of Fort Ozem, including that it follows a “sword-and-hilt” design. The rundown building at the front of the fort is a shell designed to frustrate intruders. The characters also learn the location of the hidden entrances in the fort's outer wall, as well as the secret door in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{area A15}.

15 Research Points: The PCs discover that the church of Iomedae maintains the space Iomedae used during her time at the fort as a showroom in her honor. This room contains an entrance to the catacombs beneath the fort.

20 Research Points: The PCs learn that the artifact Seldeg seeks, the Chalice of Ozem , is hidden in the catacombs beneath Fort Ozem. They discover a map that details a rough layout of the catacombs and showing the exact location of the chalice (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9}).

Scouting Fort Ozem.name: 侦查奥泽姆要塞 Scouting Fort Ozem
Scouting Fort Ozem.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{渗透奥泽姆要塞}

这段背景音轨旨在整个渗透过程中持续播放。

此外，在本冒险的渗透章节中，GM可以使用 @UUID[Playlist.G67sFbDNO1JnE24f]{Fort Ozem Alarm Soundboard} 来为巡逻队经过或警钟响起等情况播放单独的音效，以配合警报阶段的推进。

角色们在 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ygfM0y0AXFgsbkK2]{Flayed Files} 完成研究后，只需沿着图书馆那条不断环绕的通道行走，便可回到带他们来到此处的传送门。穿过传送门后，他们再次发现自己置身于凋疫林的边缘——但这一次，塞尔德格·贝德利斯已不见踪影。没有墓骑士继续为他们引路，PC们唯一的选择就是前往奥泽姆要塞，完成他们的任务。

奥泽姆要塞距离凋疫林有1小时步程。凭借角色们现已掌握的信息，找到通往要塞的路应当并不困难。当角色们接近奥泽姆要塞时，继续进行以下事件。

事件1：例行巡逻

当PC们穿过南锐木森林前往奥泽姆要塞时，他们偶然遇到两名正在要塞周边地区执行例行巡逻的切尔那萨多游侠。这个遭遇给了队伍一个机会，可以在不惊动整个奥泽姆要塞的情况下解决掉两名要塞守卫。或者，一名或多名角色也可以尾随这些游侠返回要塞，从而了解更多有关要塞防御的信息。

尾随游侠

  • 探索

你尾随一名切尔那萨多游侠，跟着他们穿行于南锐木森林。尝试一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:28|traits:action:seek] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，或进行一次 @Check[type:survival|dc:27|traits:action:track] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{追踪}。这个行动耗时1小时。

  • 大成功： 如同成功，但你接近游侠到足以听见他们在开门前说出一句暗号（“奥德拉·桑·雷赫克”）。
  • 成功： 你一路尾随游侠来到奥泽姆要塞，并看着他们通过要塞外墙上的一处秘密入口进入要塞（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.RWVPnZrndbSJHEtK]{Fort Ozem}）。
  • 失败： 你跟丢了游侠，浪费了1小时，并且没有获得任何有用的信息。
  • 大失败： 游侠注意到有人在尾随他们，于是为你和你的伙伴设下埋伏。在此次遭遇中，游侠的先攻获得+1环境加值。

场景

@UUID[Scene.x6S5T9Yvn3chGUyI]

你可以使用附带的场景作为此次遭遇的战斗地图。

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2名切尔那萨多游侠}

中等 7

如果角色们与这些游侠交战（无论是有意为之，还是因为他们当中有人在“尾随游侠”行动中大失败），游侠会战斗到其中一人被杀，此时另一人会撤退回奥泽姆要塞。

后续发展： 如果游侠向要塞发出了警报，PC们立即获得2警觉点数。如果PC们杀死了这些游侠，或以其他方式阻止他们返回奥泽姆要塞，则将这些游侠从要塞守卫总数中移除。不过，要塞中的其他守卫最终还是会注意到这些游侠未按时结束巡逻返回，因此PC们获得1 AP。有关警觉点数的详情，见 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.0FbHi7lZDOLQ4LBx]{渗透奥泽姆要塞}。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort}

This background track is intended to play throughout the infiltration.

Additionally, throughout the infiltration section of this adventure, the GM can use the @UUID[Playlist.G67sFbDNO1JnE24f]{Fort Ozem Alarm Soundboard} to play individual sounds for things like passing patrols or alarm bells as alarm stages advance.

Once the characters finish their research in the @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ygfM0y0AXFgsbkK2]{Flayed Files}, they merely need to walk along the library's ever-circling pathway to return to the portal that brought them there. Stepping through, they once again find themselves on the edges of the Blighted Bower—only this time, Seldeg Bhedlis is nowhere to be found. Without the graveknight to guide them further, the PCs' only choice is to make their way to Fort Ozem to complete their mission.

Fort Ozem is an hour's walk from the Blighted Bower. With the information the characters now have, finding their way to the fort should be a simple task. As the characters approach Fort Ozem, proceed to the following event.

Event 1: Routine Patrol

As the PCs make their way through the Southern Fangwood to Fort Ozem, they stumble upon a pair of Chernasardo Rangers on a routine patrol of the area around the fort. This encounter gives the party an opportunity to dispose of two of the fort's defenders without alerting Fort Ozem as a whole. Alternatively, one of more of the characters can shadow the rangers back to the fort and learn more about the fort's defenses.

Follow a Ranger

  • Exploration

You follow a member of the Chernasardo Rangers as they make their way through the Southern Fangwood. Attempt a @Check[type:stealth|dc:28|traits:action:seek] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} or a @Check[type:survival|dc:27|traits:action:track] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}. This activity takes 1 hour.

  • Critical Success: As success, except you draw close enough to the rangers to hear them speak a code phrase (“Odra San Rehc”) before opening the door.
  • Success: You follow the rangers to Fort Ozem and watch them enter the fort through a secret entrance in the fort's outer wall (see @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.RWVPnZrndbSJHEtK]{Fort Ozem}).
  • Failure: You lose track of the rangers, wasting 1 hour and gaining no useful information.
  • Critical Failure: The rangers notice someone is following them and set an ambush for you and your companions. During the encounter, the rangers gain a +1 circumstance bonus to initiative.

Scene

@UUID[Scene.x6S5T9Yvn3chGUyI]

You can use the included scene as a battlemap for this encounter.

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2 Chernasardo Rangers}

Moderate 7

If the characters engage in combat with the rangers (either intentionally or because one of them critically failed the Follow a Ranger activity), the rangers fight until one of them is killed, at which point the other retreats to Fort Ozem.

Development: If the rangers to alert the fort, the PCs immediately gain 2 Awareness Points. If the PCs kill the rangers or otherwise prevent them from returning to Fort Ozem, remove the rangers from the fort's total number of defenders. However, the fort's other defenders eventually notice that the rangers are late returning from their patrol, and the PCs gain 1 AP. See @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.0FbHi7lZDOLQ4LBx]{Infiltrating Fort Ozem} for details about Awareness Points.

Fort Ozem.name: 奥泽姆要塞 Fort Ozem
Fort Ozem.text:
场景

@UUID[Scene.XasLoepXduwBdrtx], @UUID[Scene.TARLpf3k41kjqNvP]{B - 奥泽姆地下墓穴}

在以下各节中，A1到A20房间位于奥泽姆要塞场景上，B1到B9房间位于奥泽姆地下墓穴场景上。

奥泽姆要塞由奥泽姆骑士团在闪耀远征期间建造，是南锐木森林中的一处隐秘堡垒。它的大门矗立在承托堡垒的山丘顶部，最高的建筑仅仅从树梢上方微微露出。堡垒下方的一系列隧道作为地下墓穴，安葬着奥泽姆骑士团与切尔那萨多游侠双方备受尊崇的逝者。

尽管这座堡垒从未打算作为长期防御阵地使用，但它的设计使得即便只有一小群守卫者也能将其牢牢守住。它采用剑与剑柄式布局，在堡垒入口附近设置了一座以装饰性为主但防御极强的建筑，而更关键的区域则位于堡垒后部的一座要塞中。

为了进一步阻止不受欢迎的来访者，游侠们及其盟友任由堡垒场地年久失修，同时在各处布设陷阱。

奥泽姆要塞的守卫者

一旦玩家角色进入奥泽姆要塞的城墙之内，他们就必须应对来自三个不同团体的成员。切尔那萨多游侠将这座堡垒作为他们在南锐木森林中的行动基地。与此同时，艾奥梅黛牧师照料着一座圣龛，以纪念这位女神曾以凡人之身居住于此的那段时光。最后，终焉之墙骑士团的复国骑士在穿越南锐木森林时，会将这座堡垒作为安全屋使用。所有人都听命于@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{阿尔塞拉·黛伊}，这位负责监管堡垒的切尔纳萨多守望者。

在角色的任务开始时，堡垒内共有16名守卫者活动：9名@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{切尔那萨多游侠}、3名@UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{艾奥梅黛牧师}、3名@UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{复国骑士}，以及堡垒指挥官@UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{阿尔塞拉·黛伊}。在渗透过程中，没必要追踪这些守卫者的精确位置。本冒险的区域描述会注明哪些地点常有特定守卫者出没，你可以自由调动守卫者的位置，以便在整个冒险过程中为PC提供障碍或机会。

Scenes

@UUID[Scene.XasLoepXduwBdrtx], @UUID[Scene.TARLpf3k41kjqNvP]{B - Ozem Catacombs}

In the following sections, rooms A1 through A20 are located on the Fort Ozem scene, and rooms B1 through B9 are on the Ozem Catacombs scene.

Constructed by the Knights of Ozem during the Shining Crusade, Fort Ozem is a hidden stronghold within the Southern Fangwood. Its gates stand at the top of the hill on which the fort rests, its tallest structures just barely peeking above the trees. A series of tunnels below the fort serve as catacombs for the honored dead of both the Knights of Ozem and the Chernasardo Rangers.

While never intended to serve as a long-term defensive position, the fort is designed so that it can be secured by even a small group of defenders. It uses a sword-and-hilt layout, which places a largely ornamental but heavily fortified structure near the fort's entrance, with more vital areas located in a stronghold at the rear of the fort.

To further discourage unwelcome visitors, the rangers and their allies have allowed the fort's grounds to fall into disrepair, while sowing traps throughout.

Fort Ozem's Defenders

Once the player characters are inside Fort Ozem's walls, they must contend with members of three different groups. The Chernasardo Rangers use the fort as their base of operations in the Southern Fangwood. Meanwhile, the priests of Iomedae tend a shrine that honors the time the goddess spent as a mortal living in the fort. Finally, knights reclaimant from the Knights of Lastwall use the fort as a safe house when passing through the Southern Fangwood. All are under the command of @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{Arsiella Dei}, the Chernasardo warden who oversees the fort.

As the characters' mission begins, 16 total defenders operate within the fort: 9 @UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{Chernasardo Rangers}, 3 @UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{priests of Iomedae}, 3 @UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{knights reclaimant}, and fort commander @UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{Arsiella Dei}. During the infiltration, it isn't necessary to keep track of the exact position of these defenders. The adventure's area descriptions note locations frequented by particular defenders, and you should feel free to move defenders around as works best to provide obstacles or opportunities for the PCs throughout the adventure.

Infiltrating Fort Ozem.name: 渗透奥泽姆要塞 Infiltrating Fort Ozem
Infiltrating Fort Ozem.text:
《献给奥泽姆的余烬》从本质上说，是一场劫案。PC们必须潜入奥泽姆堡，找到奥泽姆圣杯，并带着这件圣物逃离，同时一路留下破坏。虽然在堡垒内发生战斗的可能性很高，但要让玩家明白，正面强攻奥泽姆堡并不是角色们的最佳选择。若塞尔德格·贝德利斯提供的情报无误，堡垒守军的人数远多于角色，而过早暴露自己则有可能让圣杯从他们手中溜走。相反，PC们应避免直接对抗，只在必要时迅速且安静地解决敌人，直到确保圣杯到手。虽然PC们有数小时来为任务做准备，但真正对堡垒的潜入是在遭遇模式下进行，而非探索模式。

警觉点数

由阿尔塞拉·黛伊指挥的切尔那萨多游侠，将奥泽姆堡废墟作为其在南锐木森林中的行动基地。他们与来自艾奥梅黛教会的祭司共同使用这处地点，后者在此维护着一座供奉这位女神的圣所，同时这里也有终焉之墙骑士团驻扎。随着PC们潜入奥泽姆堡，他们的行动可能会惊动阿尔塞拉或她麾下的人。

奥泽姆堡守军的警觉程度以警觉点数（AP）衡量。随着PC们获得AP，他们将面对的来自堡垒守军的危险也会增加。堡内许多区域的发展段落都描述了角色可能获得AP的方式。此外，角色每次在奥泽姆堡内进行战斗时，都会获得2 AP。若角色设法迅速且安静地结束战斗（并谨慎处理他们留下的任何痕迹），则他们可能只获得1 AP。类似地，特别嘈杂或拖延过久的战斗可能会让角色获得3 AP或更多。由GM酌情决定，若角色连续数小时未获得AP，他们的AP总数可能会下降；然而，一旦队伍的AP达到4，在至少12小时内就不能降到该阈值以下（这已经超出了塞尔德格·贝德利斯给角色的任务时限）。

角色当前的警觉点数总数会产生如下效果。

4警觉点数：@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{钟楼}中的切尔那萨多游侠敲响一口小钟四次。奥泽姆堡的守军继续其正常行动，但开始两人一组移动。艾奥梅黛之焰（位于@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{区域 A8}）继续发出白光。

8警觉点数：@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{区域 A14}中的大钟被敲响，随后是三口小钟。钟声示意堡垒守军加强巡逻，并触发@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.kTXK04mqPVrSPjdO]{事件2：巡游守军}。艾奥梅黛之焰发出黄光。

12警觉点数：所有守军都转移到堡垒的要塞主楼区域。艾奥梅黛之焰发出蓝光。

16警觉点数：大钟敲响两次，随后是两口小钟。堡垒守军开始逐个房间搜查，并触发@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.vcg2APIK9ywlilqn]{事件3：什么人？}。艾奥梅黛之焰发出红光。

21警觉点数：所有钟连续鸣响六次。阿尔塞拉·黛伊进入地下墓穴，并从@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9}取走奥泽姆圣杯。一旦确保圣杯到手，她就会通过@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{区域 A15}中的秘密出口，或@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{区域 B8}中的隐藏隧道撤离堡垒。PC们还有最后一次机会，可在@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.xJfAkln5ClgqIJdL]{事件4：迅速撤离}中阻止她。

与此同时，堡垒其余守军会通过正门（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{区域 A1}）放弃此地撤离。艾奥梅黛之焰发出红光。

"Ashes for Ozem" is, at its core, a heist. The PCs must infiltrate Fort Ozem, locate the Chalice of Ozem, and escape with the artifact, leaving destruction in their wake. While combat within the fort is likely, make it clear to the players that a full-frontal assault of Fort Ozem is not the characters' best option. If Seldeg's information is correct, the fort's defenders outnumber the characters by a healthy margin, and revealing themselves too early risks the chalice slipping from their grasp. Instead, the PCs should avoid direct confrontation, disposing enemies quickly and quietly when necessary until the chalice is secured. While the PCs have several hours to prepare for their mission, the actual infiltration of the fort takes place in encounter, rather than exploration, mode.

Awareness

The Chernasardo Rangers, under the command of Arsiella Dei, use the ruins of Fort Ozem as a base of operations in the Southern Fangwood. They share the site with priests from the church of Iomedae, who maintain a shrine to the goddess at the location, as well as with the Knights of Lastwall. As the PCs infiltrate Fort Ozem, their activities might alert Arsiella or those under her command.

The awareness of Fort Ozem's defenders is measured in Awareness Points (AP). As the PCs gain AP, the dangers they face from the fort's defenders increases. The Development sections of many areas inside the fort describe ways the characters might gain AP. In addition, each time the characters engage in combat within Fort Ozem, they gain 2 AP. If the characters make efforts to finish the combat quickly and quietly (and if they discretely dispose any evidence they leave behind), they might instead gain only 1 AP. Similarly, particularly loud or extended combats might earn the characters 3 AP or more. At the GM's discretion, the characters' total AP might decrease if they go several hours without gaining AP; however, once the party's AP reaches 4, it can't decrease below that threshold for at least 12 hours (beyond the time frame Seldeg Bhedlis has given the characters for their mission).

The characters' total number of Awareness Points has the following effects.

4 Awareness Points: The Chernasardo Ranger in the @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{Bell Room} rings a small bell four times. Fort Ozem's defenders continue their normal behavior but begin moving in pairs. Iomedae's Flame (in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{area A8}) continues to glow white.

8 Awareness Points: The large bell in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{area A14} is sounded, followed by three smaller bells. The bells signal the fort's defenders to increase patrols, triggering @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.kTXK04mqPVrSPjdO]{Event 2: Wandering Defenders}. Iomedae's Flame glows yellow.

12 Awareness Points: All defenders relocate to the stronghold portion of the fort. Iomedae's Flame glows blue.

16 Awareness Points: The large bell rings twice, followed by two smaller bells. The fort's defenders initiate a room-to-room search, triggering @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.vcg2APIK9ywlilqn]{Event 3: Who Goes There?}. Iomedae's Flame glows red.

21 Awareness Points: All bells chime six times in a row. Arsiella Dei enters the catacombs and retrieves the Chalice of Ozem from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9}. Once the chalice is secured, she evacuates the fort through the secret exit in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{area A15} or the hidden tunnels in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{area B8}. The PCs have one last chance to stop her in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.xJfAkln5ClgqIJdL]{Event 4: A Quick Retreat}.

Meanwhile, the remainder of the fort's defenders abandon the site through the front gates (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{area A1}). Iomedae's Flame glows red.

Event 2: Wandering Defenders.name: 事件2：巡游守军 Event 2: Wandering Defenders
Event 2: Wandering Defenders.text:
当角色获得8点AP时，奥泽姆要塞的守军会加强巡逻。PC触发此事件后不久，两名切尔那萨多游侠会接近队伍所在的位置。此时，守军并未预料到要塞内部会有入侵者，因此如果角色足够谨慎，仍然可以避免被发现。此次遭遇可以发生在任何你认为基于角色在此次冒险中迄今为止的行动最合理的位置。

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2名切尔那萨多游侠}

中等威胁 7

每名角色都可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:28] 隐藏自己，从而避开游侠。要塞的守军人数很少，因此试图使用欺瞒来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充} 他们中的一员，通常会自动失败，不过如果PC使用魔法来增强他们的尝试，你也可以允许他们进行一次检定。

发展：如果角色与这些游侠交战，游侠会立刻发出警报，可能将其他守军也引入这场遭遇。与奥泽姆要塞内的任何战斗遭遇一样，这场战斗至少会使角色获得1点AP，具体取决于他们能多快制服这些游侠。

When the characters gain 8 AP, the defenders at Fort Ozem increase their patrols. Shortly after the PCs trigger this event, two Chernasardo Rangers approach the party's location. At this point, the defenders don't expect to find intruders inside the fort, and the characters can still avoid notice if they are wary. This encounter can take place anywhere you think would make most sense based on the characters' actions thus far in the adventure.

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2 Chernasardo Rangers}

Moderate 7

Each character can avoid the rangers by succeeding at a @Check[type:stealth|dc:28] to Hide. The fort's defenders are few enough that attempts to use Deception to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} one of their number most likely fail automatically, although you might allow the PCs to attempt a check, particularly if they use magic to enhance their efforts.

Development: If the characters engage in combat with the rangers, the rangers immediately raise an alarm, possibly drawing other defenders into the encounter. As normal with any combat encounter within Fort Ozem, the fight causes the characters to gain at least 1 AP, depending on how swiftly they can subdue the rangers.

Event 3: Who Goes There?.name: 事件3：什么人？ Event 3: Who Goes There?
Event 3: Who Goes There?.text:
当队伍达到 16 AP 时，@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{阿尔塞拉·黛伊}下令对整个要塞进行逐室搜索。不久之后，角色被一对切尔那萨多游侠和一名艾奥梅黛牧师发现。除非角色正在使用魔法或其他方法隐藏自己的行踪，否则与守军发生战斗不可避免。

  • @UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{艾奥梅黛牧师}
  • @UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2 名切尔那萨多游侠}

遭遇

严重 7

后续发展：当与这名牧师和游侠的战斗开始时，他们会立刻发出警报，可能会将其他守军也引入这场遭遇。与奥泽姆要塞内的任何战斗遭遇一样，这场战斗会使角色至少获得 1 AP，具体取决于他们能多快制服守军。

When the party reaches 16 AP, @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.dDBz0CgUhtLwfqNt]{Arsiella Dei} orders a room-to-room search of the entire fort. Shortly thereafter, the characters are spotted by a pair of Chernasardo Rangers lead by a priest of Iomedae. Unless the characters are using magic or some other method to conceal their presence, combat with the defenders is inevitable.

  • @UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{Priest of Iomedae}
  • @UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{2 Chernasardo Rangers}

Encounter

Severe 7

Development: As combat with the priest and rangers begins, they immediately raise an alarm, possibly drawing other defenders into the encounter. As normal with any combat encounter within Fort Ozem, the fight causes the characters to gain at least 1 AP, depending on how swiftly they can subdue the defenders.

Event 4: A Quick Retreat.name: 事件4：迅速撤离 Event 4: A Quick Retreat
Event 4: A Quick Retreat.text:
当队伍获得 21 点或更多 AP 时，阿尔塞拉·黛伊判断要塞已被一股压倒性的力量攻破，致使@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}陷入危险。钟楼（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{区域 A14}）中的钟声会敲响六次，发出要塞全面撤离的信号。任何剩余的守军都会通过要塞正门（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{区域 A1}）或地下墓穴中的隐秘隧道（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{区域 B8}）撤退。撤离大约需要 20 分钟，在此期间，阿尔塞拉会从 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9} 取回圣杯并放弃这座要塞。

@UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊}

中等 7

角色们还有最后一次机会在阿尔塞拉带着奥泽姆圣杯撤退前阻止她。这个遭遇应当发生在你认为结合队伍当前位置最合理的地方。比如，如果角色们尚未发现地下墓穴，他们可能会在阿尔塞拉通过 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{区域 A15} 的秘密出口离开要塞主楼区域时遭遇她。根据角色们在此次冒险中迄今为止的行动，要塞中的其他守军中可能有一名或数名会陪同阿尔塞拉。然而，请记住，额外守军的存在会提高与阿尔塞拉最终遭遇的难度。

后续发展：如果 PC 们在 20 分钟结束前没有遭遇阿尔塞拉并夺回圣杯，阿尔塞拉就会逃脱并逃入南锐木森林。PC 们的任务失败，必须两手空空地返回塞尔德格·贝德利斯处。

When the party gains 21 AP or more, Arsiella Dei determines that the fort has been breached by an overwhelming force, putting the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem} in danger. The bells in the Bell Room (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{area A14}) ring six times, signaling a full-scale evacuation of the fort. Any remaining defenders retreat either through the fort's front gate (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{area A1}) or the hidden tunnels in the catacombs (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{area B8}). The evacuation takes roughly 20 minutes, during which time Arsiella retrieves the chalice from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9} and abandons the fort.

@UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{Commander Arsiella Dei}

Moderate 7

The characters have one last chance to stop Arsiella before she retreats with the Chalice of Ozem . This encounter should take place wherever you think would make sense based on the party's current location. For example, if the characters have yet to discover the catacombs, they might encounter Arsiella as she leaves the stronghold section of the fort through the secret exit in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{area A15}. Depending on the characters' actions thus far in the adventure, one or more of the fort's other defenders might accompany Arsiella. However, keep in mind that the presence of additional defenders raises the difficulty of the final encounter with Arsiella.

Development: If the PCs haven't encountered Arsiella and recovered the chalice at the end of 20 minutes, Arsiella escapes and flees into the Southern Fangwood. The PCs fail their mission and must return to Seldeg Bhedlis empty-handed.

Breaching the Walls.name: 突破城墙 Breaching the Walls
Breaching the Walls.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.uupTMYfqkkIWiyiN]{Exterior Grounds (Layer)}

将此作为环境音层，在 @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort} 的播放列表上方播放。

此外，在本冒险的潜入章节中，GM 可以使用 @UUID[Playlist.G67sFbDNO1JnE24f]{奥泽姆要塞警报音效板} 来播放单独的音效，例如巡逻队经过或随着警报阶段推进而响起的警钟。

进入奥泽姆要塞最明显的入口，是穿过其外墙上的大门（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{区域 A1}）。要塞原本的大门早已腐朽殆尽，来访者只需穿过遗留下来的空隙便可进入要塞主楼。然而，PC 们很可能会想避免正面接近，转而通过翻越（或穿过）要塞外墙来进入要塞。

城墙：奥泽姆要塞的城墙厚 3 尺、高 20 尺，由切割石块砌成（硬度 14，56 HP，BT 28）。藤蔓与苔藓已蔓生覆盖墙面，但在要塞南侧的“腰部”附近植被尤其茂密（见第 48 页“危害”）。坍圮石墙上的藤蔓与其他可抓握处，使得攀爬城墙相对容易（@Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:climb]）。

不可思议之门：要塞东西两侧的墙体上各有一处秘密入口，贯穿城墙。PC 们可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}，从而找到这些入口。（如果 PC 们成功从事件 1 一路跟踪游侠到达要塞，他们可能已经知道这些门的存在。）每处入口都是一扇木门，看不到锁、门把手或其他开启机关。门上覆满藤蔓，但如果角色们清理掉这些植被，就会发现门面上刻着“奥德拉·桑·雷赫克”几个字。

这些门被魔法封住。大声说出奥德拉·桑·雷赫克（“切尔那萨多”的倒拼）会使门开启 1 分钟，之后门会再次关闭。成功进行一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:27|traits:action:force-open] 后，可以对门执行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开}。封住每扇门的魔法也可以被反制（4环；反制 DC 24）。

@UUID[Actor.uib2MwpRqkXslP0p]{蛇鬃藤}

危害 7

要塞“腰部”附近的藤蔓尤其浓密。此外，切尔那萨多游侠们还在该区域种植了一种名为蛇鬃藤的致命藤蔓。秘密入口所在的格子（见上文“不可思议之门”）没有蛇鬃藤。

发展：每有 1 名 PC 在攀爬奥泽姆要塞周围城墙的检定中失败，队伍便获得 1 AP。如果角色触发蛇鬃藤危害或强行打开不可思议之门，他们也会获得 1 AP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.uupTMYfqkkIWiyiN]{Exterior Grounds (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort}.

Additionally, throughout the infiltration section of this adventure, the GM can use the @UUID[Playlist.G67sFbDNO1JnE24f]{Fort Ozem Alarm Soundboard} to play individual sounds for things like passing patrols or alarm bells as alarm stages advance.

The most obvious entrance to Fort Ozem is through the structure's gates in its outer wall (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.HFl1oD4UAFEqZqJ8]{area A1}). The fort's original gates rotted away long ago, and visitors can enter the stronghold simply by walking through the space left behind. However, it's likely the PCs will want to avoid a direct approach and enter the fort by going over (or through) the fort's outer walls.

Walls: Fort Ozem's walls are 3 feet thick, 20 feet high, and are constructed from blocks of cut stone (Hardness 14, 56 HP, BT 28). Vines and moss have overgrown the walls, but the vegetation is particularly thick around the fort's southern “waist” (see Hazards, page 48). The vines and other handholds in the crumbling stone make scaling the walls relatively simple (@Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:climb]).

Impossible Doors: Two secret entrances, located on the western and eastern sides of the fort, pierce the fort's walls. The PCs can locate the entrances by succeeding at a @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}. (If the PCs successfully shadowed the rangers from Event 1 to the fort, they might be aware of the doors already.) Each entrance consists of a wooden door with no visible lock, knob, or other opening mechanism. The doors are covered with vines, but if the characters clear away the vegetation, they discover the words “Odra San Rehc” carved into the door's surface.

The doors are sealed by magic. Speaking aloud the words Odra San Rehc (“Chernasardo” backwards) causes the door to open for 1 minute, at which point the door closes again. A door can be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Forced Open} with a successful @Check[type:athletics|dc:27|traits:action:force-open]. The magic that seals each door can also be counteracted (4th rank; counteract DC 24).

@UUID[Actor.uib2MwpRqkXslP0p]{Snake's Mane}

Hazard 7

The vines near the fort's waist are particularly thick. In addition, the Chernasardo Rangers have planted a deadly vine called snake's mane in that area. The spaces containing secret entrances (see Impossible Doors above) are clear of snake's mane.

Development: For each PC who fails a check to Climb the walls surrounding Fort Ozem, the party gains 1 AP. The characters also gain 1 AP if they trigger the snake's mane hazard or Force Open the impossible doors.

A1. Healing Hedges.name: A1. 治愈树篱 A1. Healing Hedges
A1. Healing Hedges.text:
奥泽姆要塞正门前的空地被一圈过度生长的树篱围绕，形成了一道坚实的屏障，只有一条狭窄的小径通往要塞入口。

要塞的守卫者认为通往正门的小径是静心沉思之所，但对不死生物和其他入侵者来说，这条进路就没那么友好了。

法术侵染地形：这条小径是一片法术侵染地形（《开拓者：魔法秘闻》221），每当有生物踏上其上时，便会施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.x5rGOmhDRDVQPrnW]{生命力场}。一旦被激活，该效果会覆盖树篱之间以及通往废墟城堡南门的整条小径（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.TTLmC9LA3agT4d7t]{A3区域}）。该效果持续1分钟。在效果结束前，任何活着的生物若在该区域内开始其回合，便恢复[[/r 1d8[healing]]]生命值；任何不死生物若在该区域内开始其回合，则受到[[/r 1d8[vitality]]]伤害。该效果会在1小时后重置，因此通过正门离开奥泽姆要塞的PC可能会第二次遭遇这片法术侵染地形。

  • @UUID[Actor.Uns3D5g4MTwraYmE]{3 切尔那萨多捕蝇草}
  • @UUID[Actor.uib2MwpRqkXslP0p]{蛇鬃藤}

危害

中等 7

不死PC可以劈开树篱来避开法术侵染地形，而树篱属于高等困难地形。然而，切尔那萨多游侠已在这片区域布下了专门用来阻碍入侵者的陷阱。他们在树篱各处设置了三个陷阱，并亲切地称其为“切尔那萨多捕蝇草”。此外，在树篱与奥泽姆要塞围墙相接的区域，还生长着一丛丛蛇鬃藤。

发展：PC每触发一个危害便获得1 AP，不包括法术侵染地形；若他们触发了所有危害，最多可获得5 AP。

The grounds before Fort Ozem's front gates are surrounded by a wall of overgrown hedges, creating a solid barrier with only a single narrow path leading to the fort's entrance.

The fort's defenders consider the path to the front gates a place of quiet contemplation, but undead and other intruders find the approach less welcoming.
