Spell-Touched Terrain: The path is an area of spell-touched terrain ( Pathfinder Secrets of Magic 221) that casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.x5rGOmhDRDVQPrnW]{field of life} whenever a creature steps onto it. Once activated, the effect encompasses the entire path between the hedges and the southern doors of the ruined keep (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.TTLmC9LA3agT4d7t]{area A3}). The effect lasts for 1 minute. Until the effect ends, any living creature that starts its turn in the area regains [[/r 1d8[healing]]] Hit Points, and any undead creature that starts its turn in the area takes [[/r 1d8[vitality]]] damage. The effect resets after 1 hour, so PCs who exit Fort Ozem through the front gates might encounter the spell-touched terrain a second time.

  • @UUID[Actor.Uns3D5g4MTwraYmE]{3 Chernasardo Chompers}
  • @UUID[Actor.uib2MwpRqkXslP0p]{Snake's Mane}

Hazards

Moderate 7

Undead PCs can avoid the spell-touched terrain by hacking through the hedges, which are greater difficult terrain. However, the Chernasardo Rangers have seeded the area with traps designed to frustrate intruders. They've set three snares, affectionately dubbed “Chernasardo chompers,” throughout the hedges. In addition, stands of snake's mane grow in the areas where the hedges meet Fort Ozem's walls.

Development: The PCs gain 1 AP for each hazard they trigger, not including the spell-touched terrain, to a maximum of 5 AP if they trigger all hazards.

A2. Sculpture Garden.name: A2. 雕像庭院 A2. Sculpture Garden
A2. Sculpture Garden.text:
开满粉色小花的藤蔓铺满了这处狭长庭院的地面。藤蔓在各处缠结成隐约像是常见物品的形状，包括一辆独轮手推车、一个雨水桶，以及一个看起来像是大炮的东西。

角色若成功进行一次 @Check[type:nature|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，便能辨认出这些独特的藤蔓形状是藤塑精的造物。藤塑精是热爱自然的精类，能将无生命物体和活体生物都转变成由开花藤蔓构成的雕塑。阿尔塞拉·黛伊将这块土地交给藤塑精，并承诺会提供新的、有趣的物品供它们改造。作为交换，这些精类同意不攻击游侠及其盟友。

@UUID[Actor.OZRvOYnkvEVlTx90]{2 藤塑精}

中等 7

目前庭院里有两只藤塑精，分别位于小径两侧。如果PC恰好携带了一件4体积或以上的物品（例如塔盾），藤塑精会提出让他们安全通过庭院，条件是交出该物品。否则，藤塑精会保持静止不动（使用它们的“藤蔓纠缠”能力），直到有角色离开小径或接近废墟城堡的入口（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.TTLmC9LA3agT4d7t]{区域 A3}）。随后它们便会发动攻击，并以隐秘进行先攻。

宝藏：如果PC击败藤塑精，花园中的藤蔓会尽数枯萎死亡，露出下面的物品。在花园的 @UUID[Actor.ffDx2BbrGlFbiC3J]{西侧}，这些物品中包括一面护法盾。在小径的 @UUID[Actor.2hHN0ggD0etTbiVV]{东侧}，则有一尊摩尔苏恩某位将军领主的大理石半身像（价值400 gp）。

Vines blooming with tiny pink flowers carpet the grounds of this narrow courtyard. Here and there, the vines tangle into shapes that vaguely resemble common objects, including a wheelbarrow, a rain barrel, and what appears to be a cannon.

A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:nature|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} identifies the distinctive vine shapes as the creations of stelemoras, nature-loving fey who transform inanimate objects and living creatures alike into sculptures made from flowering vines. Arsiella Dei gave the stelemoras this plot of land with the promise of new and interesting objects to transform. In return, the fey agreed not to attack the rangers or their allies.

@UUID[Actor.OZRvOYnkvEVlTx90]{2 Stelemoras}

Moderate 7

There are currently two stelemoras in the courtyard, one on either side of the path. If the PCs happen to carry an object of 4 Bulk or more (such as a tower shield), the stelemoras offer safe passage through the courtyard in return for the object. Otherwise, the stelemoras remain motionless (using their Tangle of Vines ability) until a character either leaves the path or approaches the entrance to the ruined keep (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.TTLmC9LA3agT4d7t]{area A3}). They then attack, using Stealth for initiative.

Treasure: If PCs defeat the stelemoras, the vines throughout the garden wither and die, revealing the objects beneath them. On the @UUID[Actor.ffDx2BbrGlFbiC3J]{west side} of the garden, the items include a spellguard shield. Along the @UUID[Actor.2hHN0ggD0etTbiVV]{east side} of the path lies a marble bust of one of Molthune's general lords (worth 400 gp).

A3. Entry Hall.name: A3. 门厅 A3. Entry Hall
A3. Entry Hall.text:
这间空荡荡的大厅天花板上布满了蛛网般的裂缝，尤其是在大厅中部变窄之处附近。尽管 PCs 可能会担心发生坍塌，但这座大厅在结构上依然稳固，正如一名在 @Check[type:crafting|dc:22] 中成功的 PC 所能判定的那样。

A spiderweb of cracks covers the ceiling of this empty hall, particularly near where the hall narrows in the middle. Though the PCs might be concerned about a collapse, the hall remains structurally sound, as a PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:crafting|dc:22] can determine.

A4. The Path of Doors.name: A4. 重重门扉 A4. The Path of Doors
A4. The Path of Doors.text:
三对一模一样的门阻挡了队伍穿过这四个彼此相连房间的去路。先前一名入侵者的骷髅遗骸 лежит在最后一对门前。

  • @UUID[Actor.BhA4ZUuIGtWm4dlD]{带电入口}
  • @UUID[Actor.dgQ9VMuC63T5LW5h]{罪孽之重}
  • @UUID[Actor.i70NptUtfWO4s8uP]{盗贼哀歌}

危害

中等 7

沿着房间逆时针移动时，第一对门（区域 A4a）的东门设有一个带电入口陷阱。第二对门（区域 A4b）的两扇门都很安全，但北门通向一条充满罪孽之重作祟的通道。最后两扇门（区域 A4c）都上了优质锁（@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock]，需要五次成功）。此外，最西侧的门还设有一个盗贼哀歌陷阱。A4d 区域没有特别之处。

发展：PC 每触发一个危害获得 1 AP；如果他们触发了全部三个危害，最多获得 3 AP。

@UUID[Actor.o0IMq2LGe7wSxAZ0]{宝藏}：若一名角色在骷髅周围区域进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}，并且成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret] 检定，就会发现附近有一套被烧焦的盗贼工具包残骸。那名盗贼的一个口袋里装着一顶狂想高帽，以及一张折叠起来的奥泽姆圣杯素描。该素描使 PC 在为辨认圣杯所作的检定中获得 +1 物品加值（包括在 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{区域 A20} 中识破赝品）。

Three pairs of identical doors block the party's way through these four interconnected chambers. The skeletal remains of a previous intruder lie before the final pair of doors.

  • @UUID[Actor.BhA4ZUuIGtWm4dlD]{Electrified Entrance}
  • @UUID[Actor.dgQ9VMuC63T5LW5h]{Weight of Guilt}
  • @UUID[Actor.i70NptUtfWO4s8uP]{Thieves' Lament}

Hazards

Moderate 7

Moving counterclockwise through the chambers, the eastern door of the first pair of doors (area A4a) is warded with an electrified entrance trap. Both doors of the second pair (area A4b) are safe, but the northern door leads to a passage filled with a weight of guilt haunt. The final two doors (area A4c) are both secured with a good lock (@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock], five successes). Furthermore, the far western door is warded with a thieves' lament trap. Area A4d is unremarkable.

Development: The PCs gain 1 AP for each hazard they trigger, to a maximum of 3 AP if they trigger all three hazards.

@UUID[Actor.o0IMq2LGe7wSxAZ0]{Treasure}: A character who @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} the area around the skeleton and succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret] check discovers the charred remains of a thieves' toolkit nearby. One of the thief's pockets contains a madcap top, as well as a folded sketch of the Chalice of Ozem. The sketch grants the PCs a +1 item bonus checks made to identify the chalice (including discerning the forgery in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20}).

A5. Heart of Stone.name: A5. 石之心 A5. Heart of Stone
A5. Heart of Stone.text:
与建筑物的其他部分形成鲜明对比的是，这间房间看起来状况良好。这个区域里没有石砾，甚至连灰尘都没有，仿佛地板最近刚被清扫过。

这间房间里栖居着一群3只塔砾兽，它们已将此处纳入自己的保护之下。

@UUID[Actor.Q0ASK7LvvRXfJe7v]{3 塔砾兽}

低级 7

正如她对藤塑精所做的那样（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.rIE0V0KN83oQllTb]{区域 A2}），阿尔西艾拉鼓励这些天界生物保护这座要塞，作为抵御入侵者的额外防线。它们将PC视为自己家园的威胁，并会一见面就发动攻击。

In stark contrast to the rest of the building, this chamber appears to be in good condition. The area is devoid of rubble or even dust, as if the floors were recently swept clean.

The chamber is home to a group of three tallusians who have taken the room under their protection.

@UUID[Actor.Q0ASK7LvvRXfJe7v]{3 Tallusians}

Low 7

As she did with the stelemoras (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.rIE0V0KN83oQllTb]{area A2}), Arsiella encouraged the celestials to protect the keep as an extra line of defense against intruders. They see the PCs as a threat to their home and attack on sight.

A6. Ruined Storeroom.name: A6. 废弃储藏室 A6. Ruined Storeroom
A6. Ruined Storeroom.text:
一次天花板坍塌砸毁了曾经摆满这处空间的架子，将木料、碎玻璃和其他残骸散落得到处都是。架子上的内容物泄漏到了地板上，使石质地面覆上了一层翡翠色、如焦油般的物质。

堆满破碎架子和石砾的区域属于困难地形。这种如焦油般的物质无害，但极其黏稠。踏入焦油的生物会受到@UUID[Item.x9JbpQXWsLUYKgLj]{Sticky}效果，速度受到10尺环境减值，持续1分钟，或直到其使用一个交互动作将这种物质刮除干净。将破碎架子当作临时桥梁使用的生物，则能相当轻松地避开焦油。

@UUID[Actor.dbSfyQPJw3SNT6r5]{宝藏}：搜索石砾的角色可以尝试一次@Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret]检定。若成功，他们会发现三瓶高等炼金火，尽管经历了天花板坍塌，却奇迹般地完好无损。

A ceiling collapse has smashed the shelves that once filled this space, scattering wood, broken glass, and other debris throughout the room. The contents of the shelves have leaked onto the floor, covering the stone with an emerald-colored, tar-like substance.

The areas filled with broken shelves and rubble are difficult terrain. The tar-like substance is harmless but extremely sticky. A creature that steps into the tar suffers the @UUID[Item.x9JbpQXWsLUYKgLj]{Sticky} effect, taking a 10-foot circumstance penalty to its Speed for 1 minute or until it uses an Interact action to scrape the substance clean. Creatures who use the broken shelves as an impromptu bridge can avoid the tar easily enough.

@UUID[Actor.dbSfyQPJw3SNT6r5]{Treasure}: A character that @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} the rubble can attempt a @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret] check. On a success, they discover three vials of greater alchemist's fire, miraculously intact despite the ceiling's collapse.

A7. Inner Courtyard.name: A7. 内部庭院 A7. Inner Courtyard
A7. Inner Courtyard.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.EgtEfqx4DKO4WiOr]{庭院喷泉（层）}

将此作为环境音层，在 @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{渗透要塞} 的播放列表上播放。

一处庭院填满了构成奥泽姆要塞的两座建筑之间的空间。该区域以一座喷泉为中心，喷泉上矗立着一尊大理石女性雕像，身披板甲，手持长剑与护盾。喷泉正南方直接设置了一处射箭场。

受过宗教训练的角色会立刻认出，喷泉上的雕像是艾奥梅黛的形象。清水从这位女神脚边的喷口中涌出，这也进一步表明，这座要塞并不像从外面看上去那样荒废。

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{3名切尔那萨多游侠}

严峻 7

如果PC获得的AP少于12点，那么他们抵达时，这里有两名切尔那萨多游侠正在朝箭靶射击。第三名游侠则在北侧建筑周边巡逻。通常情况下，这名游侠大约每5分钟巡逻一圈；但如果他听到战斗声响，就会立刻赶去调查，并在1d4轮后抵达。如果PC已获得12点或更多AP，则其中一名游侠会警戒地站在通往 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{区域A8} 的门前，而另外两名则绕着建筑巡逻。

@UUID[Actor.UoRvcGx2ZaeUzUgB]{宝藏}：前来奥泽姆要塞的访客有时会将钱币投入喷泉中，以此向艾奥梅黛致敬。如果PC花费10分钟收集，他们总共可以拾得价值250 gp的金币和白银币。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.EgtEfqx4DKO4WiOr]{Courtyard Fountain (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort}.

A courtyard fills the space between the two buildings that make up Fort Ozem. The area is centered around a fountain, from which rises a marble statue of a woman clad in plate armor and wielding a sword and shield. An archery range has been set up directly to the fountain's south.

Characters trained in Religion immediately recognize the fountain's statue as a representation of Iomedae. Fresh water pours from spouts at the goddess's feet, another indication the fort isn't as abandoned as it appears from the outside.

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{3 Chernasardo Rangers}

Severe 7

If the PCs have gained less than 12 AP, when they arrive, two Chernasardo Rangers are here shooting at the archery targets. A third ranger walks the perimeter of the northern building. Under normal circumstances, this ranger completes a circuit every 5 minutes or so, but if he hears sounds of combat, he rushes to investigate, arriving in 1d4 rounds. If the PCs have gained 12 AP or more, one of the rangers stands alert in front of the door to @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{area A8}, while the other two circle the building.

@UUID[Actor.UoRvcGx2ZaeUzUgB]{Treasure}: Visitors to Fort Ozem sometimes toss coins into the fountain to honor Iomedae. If the PCs spend 10 minutes to gather them, they can collect a total of 250 gp worth of gold and silver coins.

A8. Entrance Hall.name: A8. 前厅 A8. Entrance Hall
A8. Entrance Hall.text:
播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.KWX5CUprI4Z3rWvG]{前厅（层）}

将此作为环境音层，叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{渗透堡垒} 的播放列表上播放。

四根立柱支撑着这间前室的天花板。立柱之间的地板上有一幅马赛克，描绘着一把色调柔和的米色与灰色长剑。剑身向外辐射出明黄色的阳炎爆图案。剑柄处，地板上一个碗状凹陷中有一团无须燃料也能燃烧的火焰。南、西、东三面墙上都设有门。

@UUID[Actor.3wLksd7BQeyxygyR]{艾奥梅黛之焰}

琐碎 7

马赛克中央的碗中盛着一种名为艾奥梅黛之焰的魔法火焰。火焰持续燃烧，不产生热量，但会在10尺半径内散发明亮光照。火焰的颜色和魔法效果会随着堡垒的警戒状态而变化，这一状态由 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{区域 A14} 中的钟声传达给火焰。火焰无法从碗中移除，但这个危害仍可正常对抗。

发展：如果角色成功停用艾奥梅黛之焰，堡垒的一名守卫会在 [[/gmroll 1d10]] 分钟后发现这次破坏。PC一旦其破坏行为被发现，立即获得12 AP。

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.KWX5CUprI4Z3rWvG]{Entrance Hall (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort}.

Four pillars support the ceiling of this antechamber. A mosaic on the floor between the pillars depicts a longsword in muted shades of beige and gray. A sunburst pattern in bright yellows radiates from the blade. At the sword's hilt, a bowl-like depression in the floor contains a flame burning without fuel. Doors are set into the southern, western, and eastern walls.

@UUID[Actor.3wLksd7BQeyxygyR]{Iomedae's Flame}

Trivial 7

The bowl in the center of the mosaic contains a magical fire called Iomedae's Flame . The flame burns continually, producing no heat but shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius. The flame's color and magical effects shift in response to the fort's alert status, as communicated to the flame by the bells in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ldPPp429T5KBdbrT]{area A14}. The flame can't be removed from the bowl, but the hazard can be counteracted normally.

Development: If the characters successfully disable Iomedae's Flame , one of the fort's defenders discovers the sabotage [[/gmroll 1d10]] minutes later. The PCs gain 12 AP as soon as their sabotage is discovered.

A9. Storage Room.name: A9. 储藏室 A9. Storage Room
A9. Storage Room.text:
这间狭窄的房间里塞满了好几层深的木箱。每个箱子上都贴着一张纸条，标有特定的数字。

标记每个箱子的数字表示该箱子的内容，并以《艾奥梅黛行传》的11幕作为密钥。角色可以尝试进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:decipher-writing,secret] 或 @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:action:decipher-writing,secret] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{解译文书}。如果他们有一本《艾奥梅黛行传》，则此次检定获得+2环境加值。持有一本已解码的《奥泽姆要塞指挥手册》的角色（例如 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.speHG2AX4JoOgIzt]{A17区域} 中的那本）会自动获得大成功。每次尝试耗时10分钟。

  • 大成功：角色完全解读出标签上的数字。大多数数字对应的都是没有特别价值的普通物品，但其中有两个箱子被标记为“充公”和“特殊”。
  • 成功：PC解读出“充公”标签。若第二次成功，则PC解读出“特殊”标签。
  • 失败：PC未能解读出任何标签。

宝藏：标有 @UUID[Actor.0X3TuJL4BzswT804]{Confiscated} 的箱子里装着各种摩尔苏恩物品，其中包括一套价值200 gp的水晶。标有 @UUID[Actor.wRTIyjfh5gMPTYVV]{Special} 的箱子里装着一尊艾奥梅黛的纯金小雕像，价值600 gp。若不先解读编码系统，要找到任意一个箱子都需要1小时的工作。

后续发展：如果PC打开了任何箱子，他们获得2 AP，除非其中一人成功通过一次 @Check[type:crafting|dc:23] 或 @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] 检定来掩饰他们的行动。

This narrow room is packed with wooden crates several layers deep. Each crate has been tagged with a slip of paper marked with a specific numeral.

The numbers marking each crate indicate that crate's contents, using the 11 Acts of Iomedae as a key. The characters can attempt a @Check[type:religion|dc:25|traits:action:decipher-writing,secret] or @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:action:decipher-writing,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher the Writing}. If they have a copy of the Acts of Iomedae , they gain a +2 circumstance bonus to this check. Characters with a decoded copy of the Fort Ozem Command Guide (like the one in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.speHG2AX4JoOgIzt]{area A17}) automatically earn a critical success. Each attempt takes 10 minutes.

  • Critical Success: The character fully deciphers the numbers on the labels. Most numbers refer to common items of no particular value, but two crates are designated as Confiscated and Special.
  • Success: The PC deciphers the Confiscated label. On a second success, the PC deciphers the Special label.
  • Failure: The PC fails to decipher any labels.

Treasure: The crate labeled @UUID[Actor.0X3TuJL4BzswT804]{Confiscated} holds various Molthuni items, including a set of crystals worth 200 gp. The box labeled @UUID[Actor.wRTIyjfh5gMPTYVV]{Special} contains a solid gold statuette of Iomedae worth 600 gp. Finding either crate without deciphering the coding system requires an hour of work.

Development: If the PCs open any of the crates, they gain 2 AP, unless one of them succeeds at a @Check[type:crafting|dc:23] or @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] check to conceal their work.

A10. Ranger Barracks.name: A10. 游侠兵营 A10. Ranger Barracks
A10. Ranger Barracks.text:
这间公共寝室显然更注重实用而非舒适。单人床不过是些简易行军床，几乎没有什么个人物品能将它们区分开来。北、西、东三面墙上的门都通向房间外。

如果PC获得的AP为12点或更少，东边的门会微微敞开。门铰链会发出很大的吱呀声（从而惊动@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{区域 A11}里的游侠），除非角色在开门前先让铰链静音。大约每隔一小时，区域A11的一名游侠就会穿过这里，前往厨房（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{区域 A13}）去拿点零食。

宝藏：在@UUID[Actor.HLGj20vspetzOXzq]{西南侧行军床}的枕头下方整齐叠放着一件幻象斗篷。@UUID[Actor.Zm6DxWsgdEo3iIG0]{东北侧行军床}下方有一包旅行补给，其中包括一本广受欢迎的悬疑小说《寒流突袭》。

后续发展：如果PC拿走斗篷或旅行包中的任意一件，他们获得1点AP。

This communal sleeping room appears to be designed for utility over comfort. The one-person beds are little more than cots, with few personal touches to distinguish them. Doors in the north, west, and east walls lead out of the room.

If the PCs have earned 12 AP or less, the door to the east is slightly ajar. The door's hinges squeak loudly (alerting the rangers in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{area A11}) unless the characters silence the hinges before opening the door. Every hour or so, one of the rangers from area A11 passes through this area on the way to the kitchen (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{area A13}) to grab a snack.

Treasure: Folded neatly beneath the pillow of the @UUID[Actor.HLGj20vspetzOXzq]{southwestern cot} is a cloak of illusions. Beneath the @UUID[Actor.Zm6DxWsgdEo3iIG0]{northeastern cot} is a pack of traveling supplies, including a copy of the popular mystery novel Cold Snap.

Development: The PCs gain 1 AP if they take either the cloak or the traveling pack.

A11. Game Room.name: A11. 游戏室 A11. Game Room
A11. Game Room.text:
这间房间中央摆着一张四把椅子围着的桌子。桌面上堆满了成摞的钱币和一手手扑克牌。其中一把椅子的椅背上搭着一件斗篷。

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{3名切尔那萨多游侠}

重度 7

如果PC获得的AP少于12点，3名切尔那萨多游侠会坐在桌边玩魔像牌，这是一种类似五张抽牌扑克的纸牌游戏。大约每隔一小时，其中一名游侠就会前往堡垒的厨房（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{区域A13}）找点零食。如果PC拥有12点或更多AP，那么这3名游侠就会改为在要塞主楼内巡逻，把他们的钱币、纸牌和斗篷留在这里。

@UUID[Actor.rKbIB52LyNA3eIGK]{宝藏}：桌上总共有价值200 gp的钱币，但PC必须成功通过一次@Check[type:thievery|dc:20]检定，才能在不让钱堆体型发生明显变化的情况下拿走超过20 gp。如果游侠发现有钱币丢失，PC获得1点AP。斗篷口袋里有一张纸条，上面写着前往堡垒地下墓穴的说明，并指出地下墓穴的入口位于艾奥梅黛之憩（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{区域A20}）。

A table surrounded by four chairs occupies the center of this chamber. Stacks of coins and hands of playing cards clutter the table's surface. A cloak has been draped over the back of one of the chairs.

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{3 Chernasardo Rangers}

Severe 7

If the PCs have gained less than 12 AP, three Chernasardo Rangers sit at the table playing golem, a card game similar to five-card draw poker. Every hour or so, one of the rangers heads to the fort's kitchen (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{area A13}) in search of a snack. If the PCs have 12 AP or more, the three rangers are patrolling the stronghold instead, having left their coins, cards, and cloak behind.

@UUID[Actor.rKbIB52LyNA3eIGK]{Treasure}: There is a total of 200 gp worth of coins on the table, but the PCs must succeed at a @Check[type:thievery|dc:20] check to remove more than 20 gp without making a noticeable change in the size of the piles. If the rangers notice any missing coins, the PCs gain 1 AP. Inside the cloak's pocket is a slip of paper with instructions for visiting the fort's catacombs, which identify the catacombs' entrance as Iomedae's Rest (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20}).

A12. Dining Hall.name: A12. 餐厅 A12. Dining Hall
A12. Dining Hall.text:
这间形状古怪的大厅里摆满了风格不一的桌椅。有些家具装饰华丽，看起来就像是会出现在摩尔苏恩庄园里的陈设；而另一些则是朴素的手工雕刻家具。食物的香气从房间东侧分支的一扇门后飘来。

这间食堂人来人往，整天都有各式守卫进进出出。大约每隔一小时，就会有一名来自@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{区域 A11}的切尔那萨多游侠经过这里，前往厨房（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{区域 A13}）拿些点心。阿尔西斯是一名艾奥梅黛牧师，自诩为厨师；他每半小时会进入房间两次，在厨房工作间隙进来休息。

发展：除非PC们设法掩盖自己的踪迹，否则若他们在此处留下暴力行为的证据，就会获得1 AP。

This oddly shaped hall is filled with mismatched tables and chairs. Some of the furniture is richly appointed and would look very much at home in a Molthuni estate, while others are simple, hand-carved pieces. The smell of food wafts from a door in the eastern arm of the room.

This mess hall is highly trafficked, with various defenders coming and going throughout the day. Every hour or so, one of the Chernasardo Rangers from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{area A11} passes through on the way to the kitchen (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{area A13}) to grab a snack. Althis, a priest of Iomedae who fancies himself a chef, enters the room twice an hour as he takes a break from his work in the kitchen.

Development: Unless they make efforts to cover their tracks, PCs who leave evidence of violence here gain 1 AP.

A13. Kitchen.name: A13. 厨房 A13. Kitchen
A13. Kitchen.text:
木制与石面桌子上摆放着各式锅、平底锅和其他烹饪器具。东南侧桌子上方的架子上放着装满香料与捣碎草药的罐子。东墙边的炉火上，一只铁锅正咕嘟作响。

@UUID[Actor.l18aEdatMCeY2jkZ]{阿尔西斯}

琐碎 7

阿尔西斯是一名艾奥梅黛牧师，同时也担任奥泽姆要塞的非正式厨师；人们常能在厨房里见到他，身穿一件沾满新旧食物污渍的白色法衣。除非要塞处于戒备状态，否则他总专心于完善自己的炖汤（见下文），经常背对着厨房门，从南墙的架子上取用食材。

@UUID[Actor.3qXH4rerw7cdpWSB]{宝藏}: 炉火上炖着的是一锅终墙浓汤。阿尔西斯储备的食材中包括一批只生长于南锐木森林的稀有草药。这些草药可以卖给草药师或厨师，价值 50 gp。那些罐子之间有一只瓶子，里面装着浑浊液体，底部似乎还漂着一条蠕虫：一瓶蠕虫小瓶。

后续发展：阿尔西斯会定期品尝这锅汤，来自 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{区域 A11} 的游侠们也是如此。若在汤中加入起效迅速的毒素，或许就能在无需战斗的情况下解决那些守卫者。若角色扰动了这锅汤或其他任何烹饪用品，PC 将获得 1 AP，除非他们成功通过一次 @Check[type:cooking-lore|dc:25] 或 @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] 检定来掩饰自己的行为。

Wood and stone-topped tables support a variety of pots, pans, and other cooking utensils. A rack above the southeast table holds jars filled with spices and crushed herbs. An iron kettle simmers above a cooking fire on the eastern wall.

@UUID[Actor.l18aEdatMCeY2jkZ]{Althis}

Trivial 7

Althis, a priest of Iomedae who serves as Fort Ozem's unofficial cook, is often found in the kitchen wearing a white cassock covered in food stains both old and new. Unless the fort is on alert, he is preoccupied with perfecting his stew (see below), often turning his back on the kitchen's door to gather ingredients from the rack on the southern wall.

@UUID[Actor.3qXH4rerw7cdpWSB]{Treasure}: The stew simmering above the cooking fire is a batch of Lastwall soup. Althis's stock of ingredients include a collection of rare herbs found only in the Southern Fangwood. These herbs can be sold to an herbalist or chef for 50 gp. Among the jars is a bottle filled with murky liquid and what appears to be a worm floating at the bottom: a worm vial.

Development: Althis regularly samples the stew, as do the rangers from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.LY2TiaiIM4saIl5N]{area A11}. Fast-acting poisons added to the stew might neutralize those defenders without the need for combat. If the characters disturb the stew or any of the other cooking supplies, the PCs gain 1 AP unless they succeed at a @Check[type:cooking-lore|dc:25] or @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] check to conceal their actions.

A14. Bell Room.name: A14. 钟楼 A14. Bell Room
A14. Bell Room.text:
这间房间中央的天花板上悬挂着一口雨桶大小的铁钟。房间四角各悬挂着一口较小的同类钟。北侧两口钟之间靠墙放着一个木箱，东墙边立着一个武器架。

阿尔塞拉·黛伊将这间原本的军械库改作要塞的警报系统室。钉在箱盖上的一张便笺（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.I9vtuKQwZsvvx14h.JournalEntryPage.fxiKPrzresJLVda1]{展示材料#2}）说明了要塞主楼的警报系统。若按说明敲响这些钟，要塞守军就会相应改变其行为。

宏

@UUID[Macro.4rSFcjnyoy7AWUBs]{奥泽姆要塞警觉点数}

此宏可用于播放不同的钟声，并相应调整 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{A8区域} 中艾奥梅黛之焰的照明。关于警觉点数以及何时触发这些变化的说明，见 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.0FbHi7lZDOLQ4LBx]{渗透奥泽姆要塞}！

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{切尔那萨多游侠}

琐碎 7

这里始终驻守着一名切尔那萨多游侠。若PC的AP少于12，这名游侠会百无聊赖地一边独自吹口哨，一边等待敲钟信号。一名PC若成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:18]，便会在打开房门前听到口哨声。一旦PC获得12 AP，就会有一名 @UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{复国骑士}陪同这名游侠，且两者都会高度戒备。

宝藏： @UUID[Actor.DQc2BWGvRFVZaO71]{武器架}上放着一把长剑、一把带20支箭的+1 复合短弓，以及一把+2 强击匕首。@UUID[Actor.b8TxvbOdgaMAhcIl]{箱子}上着一把优质锁（需 @Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，累计成功五次），里面装有8瓶圣水。

后续发展：阿尔塞拉已命令要塞守军时刻看守这些钟。若PC击败此房间内的守军，他们获得4 AP。若他们拿走武器架或箱子中的物品，还会额外获得2 AP。PC第一次敲钟发出“解除警报”信号时，若其AP未达到16或更高，则将其警觉点数总数减半。

An iron bell the size of a rain barrel hangs suspended from the ceiling in the center of this room. Four smaller versions of the bell hang in each of the room's corners. A wooden chest rests against the wall between the two northern bells, while a weapon rack stands against the eastern wall.

Arsiella Dei repurposed this room, which was once an armory, to house the fort's warning system. A note nailed to the trunk's lid (see @UUID[JournalEntry.I9vtuKQwZsvvx14h.JournalEntryPage.fxiKPrzresJLVda1]{Handout #2}) explains the stronghold's warning system. If the bells are rung as instructed, the fort's defenders change their behavior accordingly.

Macro

@UUID[Macro.4rSFcjnyoy7AWUBs]{Fort Ozem Awareness}

This macro can be used to play the different bell sounds, and adjust the lighting of Iomedae's Flame in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.BbwaLKw8N8WSVhEH]{area A8} accordingly. See @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.0FbHi7lZDOLQ4LBx]{Infiltrating Fort Ozem} for an explanation of Awareness Points and when to trigger these changes!

@UUID[Actor.0mllbU5aBEcVUj3E]{Chernasardo Ranger}

Trivial 7

A Chernasardo Ranger is always stationed here. If the PCs have fewer than 12 AP, the ranger is bored and whistles to themself while waiting for a signal to ring the bells. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:18] hears the whistling before opening the door to the room. Once the PCs gain 12 AP, a @UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{knight reclaimant} accompanies the ranger, and both are on high alert.

Treasure: The @UUID[Actor.DQc2BWGvRFVZaO71]{weapons rack} holds a longsword, a +1 composite shortbow with 20 arrows, and a +2 striking dagger. The @UUID[Actor.b8TxvbOdgaMAhcIl]{chest} is secured with a good lock (@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock}, five successes) and contains 8 vials of holy water.

Development: Arsiella has ordered the fort's defenders to attend the bells at all times. If the PCs defeat the defenders in this room, they gain 4 AP. They gain an additional 2 AP if they take the items from the weapon rack or the chest. The first time the PCs ring the bells to give the “all clear” signal, reduce their total AP by half, provided they don't have 16 AP or more.

A15. Medic Station.name: A15. 医疗站 A15. Medic Station
A15. Medic Station.text:
北侧墙边放着两副担架，南侧则摆着一张书桌和一个柜子。

这间房间用作在岗位上受伤的要塞守军的分诊中心。（生病或因其他原因需要持续照料的守军，则安置在@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{A16区域}的南半部。）书桌上铺满了常驻治疗者谢瓦娜——一位人类艾奥梅黛牧师——写下的笔记。大多数笔记记载的都是要塞守军的一些小病小痛，但其中有一条指出，厨房里（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{A13区域}）的食物放置时间过长，增加了食源性疾病发生的可能。

秘密门：若角色@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}这间房间，并在一次@Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret]中成功，便会注意到书桌与柜子之间的墙壁与周围石材并不一致。按下附近的一块地砖后，这段墙壁会向一侧滑开。这扇门只能从这一侧操作，而从外侧发现它则需要通过一次@Check[type:perception|dc:28|traits:action:search,secret]。谢瓦娜和阿尔塞拉·黛伊都知道这道秘密门的存在，而阿尔塞拉可能会利用这条路线，带着奥泽姆圣杯逃离奥泽姆要塞。

@UUID[Actor.mXNXQHNJpYyYCMzl]{谢瓦娜}

琐碎 7

大多数时候都能在这间房里找到谢瓦娜，她会检查补给并做记录。她每小时会去一次@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{A16区域}，查看在那里睡着的患病游侠。

@UUID[Actor.P1ydAwv3CAKqPowQ]{宝藏}：谢瓦娜书桌旁的柜子上了把好锁（需进行@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock]以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，累计五次成功）。里面装有一套扩充医师工具包、一双高等医者手套、一瓶高等解毒剂，以及三瓶中级治疗药水。在柜子深处，放着三个印有骷髅与交叉骨头标记的小瓶，里面分别装着三种毒药：荒燃树脂、巨蝎毒液和蛛根毒。

后续发展：如果角色翻动了谢瓦娜的笔记，或拿走她的任何补给，他们获得2 AP，除非他们在一次@Check[type:medicine|dc:25]或@Check[type:stealth|dc:25]检定中成功，以掩饰自己的行为。

Two stretchers sit along the northern wall, while a desk and cabinet stand to the south.

This room serves as a triage center for fort defenders wounded in the line of duty. (Defenders who fall ill or are otherwise in need of ongoing care are housed in the southern half of @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{area A16}.) The desk is covered in notes written by the resident healer Shevarna, a human priest of Iomedae. Most of the notes detail the minor ailments of the fort's defenders, but one suggests that food is being left out too long in the kitchen (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{area A13}), increasing the chance of food-born illness.

Secret Door: A character who @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} the room and succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:23|traits:action:search,secret] notices that the wall between the desk and cabinet doesn't match the surrounding stone. Pressing a nearby flagstone causes that section of wall to slide to one side. The door operates only from this side and requires a @Check[type:perception|dc:28|traits:action:search,secret] to notice from the outside. Both Shevarna and Arsiella Dei are aware of this secret door, and Arsiella might use the route to escape Fort Ozem with the Chalice of Ozem .

@UUID[Actor.mXNXQHNJpYyYCMzl]{Shevarna}

Trivial 7

Shevarna can be found in this room at most times, checking on supplies and making notes. Once an hour, she visits @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.ho7QqHGfXmLE32vC]{area A16} to check on the ailing ranger sleeping there.

@UUID[Actor.P1ydAwv3CAKqPowQ]{Treasure}: The cabinet beside Shevarna's desk is secured with a good lock (@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock}, five successes). It contains an expanded healer's toolkit, a pair of greater healer's gloves , a vial of greater antidote, and three moderate healing potions . At the back of the cabinet, in vials stamped with a skull and crossbones symbol, are three poisons: blightburn resin, giant scorpion venom , and spider root.

Development: If the characters disturb Shevarna's notes or take any of her supplies, they gain 2 AP unless they succeed at a @Check[type:medicine|dc:25] or @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] check to conceal their actions.

A16. R&R (Rest & Repair) Station.name: A16. R&R（休息与修理）站 A16. R&R (Rest & Repair) Station
A16. R&R (Rest & Repair) Station.text:
该区域的北半部分（区域 A16a）用作修理站。相对两侧墙边的工作台上放着工具和各种损坏的物品，包括炊具、一把木铲和一只鞋。一扇未上锁的门将修理站与南侧的医务室（区域 A16b）隔开。

@UUID[Actor.Zqn61ISL2LoH87AI]{患病的游侠}

微不足道 7

一名切尔那萨多游侠睡在医务室的一张简易床上。除非堡垒的警钟响起，或是 PCs 制造出异常大的噪音，否则这名游侠会在角色探索该区域时一直沉睡。若被唤醒，这名游侠处于恶心 2 和迟缓 1。

发展：大约每小时一次，谢瓦娜（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{区域 A15}）会前来医务室查看这名患病的游侠。如果她察觉任何异状，PCs 获得 2 AP。

@UUID[Actor.VWyyX0WLr9h824XB]{宝藏}：工作台上的工具中有一套卓越修理工具包和一件旅者万能工具。

The north half of this area (area A16a) serves as a repair station. Worktables on opposite walls hold tools and various broken items, including cookware, a wooden shovel, and a shoe. An unlocked door separates the repair station from an infirmary to the south (area A16b).

@UUID[Actor.Zqn61ISL2LoH87AI]{Ailing Ranger}

Trivial 7

A Chernasardo Ranger sleeps on one of the cots in the infirmary. Unless the fort's alarm bells ring or the PCs make an unusual amount of noise, the ranger remains sleeping as the characters explore the area. If roused, the ranger is sickened 2 and slowed 1.

Development: Every hour or so, Shevarna (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{area A15}) visits the infirmary to check on the ailing ranger. If she notices anything amiss, the PCs gain 2 AP.

@UUID[Actor.VWyyX0WLr9h824XB]{Treasure}: Among the tools on the worktables is a superb repair kit and a traveler's any-tool.

A17. Commander's Quarters.name: A17. 指挥官寝室 A17. Commander's Quarters
A17. Commander's Quarters.text:
这间房间装饰简朴，东北角放着一张床，西墙边推着一张卷顶书桌。与床相对的角落里有一只箱子。北侧和南侧的墙上各有一道门。

这间房间作为要塞指挥官的私人寝室使用。目前属于阿尔塞拉·黛伊。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.nrloUPTIGDPCY56k]{奥泽姆堡指挥官}

当玩家与阿尔塞拉·黛伊交战时，播放这份战斗播放列表。

@UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊}

中等 7

如果PC获得了3点或更少的AP，他们会在这里、她的寝室中遭遇阿尔塞拉·黛伊。否则，她会在要塞内巡逻，搜寻入侵者。如果受到攻击，阿尔塞拉首先会设法呼叫增援；增援可能来自 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{A18区} 的艾奥梅黛牧师、@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{A15区} 的谢瓦娜，或 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.p5zkTjxPjgJDtHL2]{A19区} 的复国骑士。随着增援抵达，与阿尔塞拉的战斗会迅速升级为一次极限遭遇。如果她发现自己得不到增援，阿尔塞拉就会撤退，试图前往地下墓穴，并带着@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}逃离要塞。不过，她会小心不把入侵者引向这件圣物；与其暴露其位置，她宁愿为保卫它而死。

@UUID[Actor.WUg8Cu0z9vFdY8Nc]{书桌}：卷顶书桌的桌盖上着一把普通锁（进行一次 @Check[type:thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，需要三次成功）。里面放着阿尔塞拉记录要塞日常运作的笔记。文书中的信息对于这种规模的设施而言很常见，包括补给申请、人员记录以及周边地区的侦察报告。若一名PC @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}书桌，并成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:23]，便会发现书桌内部设有一个暗格。暗格中有一本皮面装订的书，标题为奥泽姆要塞指挥手册。

这本手册是用密码写成的，但可以通过一次 @Check[type:society|dc:28|traits:action:decipher-writing] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{解译文书}。若成功译出，书中记载了要塞下方地下墓穴的描述，包括其入口位于艾奥梅黛之憩（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{A20区}），以及通过地下墓穴中的马赛克离开的秘密出口（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{B8区}）。在书页空白处，阿尔塞拉还加了一条注记：地下墓穴入口处的石柱（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{B1区}）需要加固，以免它们坍塌，并连带毁掉要塞的大部分区域。手册一经解译，PC便可利用它来帮助他们破译 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.vQAxiHpuv0kftMr9]{A9区} 中的编号系统。

@UUID[Actor.tVhVFIXoh4RekKa3]{箱子}：角落里的箱子没有上锁，里面装着阿尔塞拉的寝具和衣物、她个人收藏的一本《艾奥梅黛行传》，以及一个装满宝石的小袋，总价值300 gp。

后续发展：如果角色扰动了这个房间里的任何东西，阿尔塞拉就会察觉到有人闯入，PC获得4点AP；除非他们成功通过一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:31] 来掩饰自己的行为。

This chamber is sparsely decorated, with a bed in the northeast corner and a roll-top desk pushed against the western wall. A trunk rests in the corner opposite the bed. Doors stand in the walls to the north and south.

This room is used as the private quarters of the fort's commanding officer. It currently belongs to Arsiella Dei.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.nrloUPTIGDPCY56k]{Commander of Fort Ozem}

As the players engage with Arsiella Dei, play this combat playlist.

@UUID[Actor.tMqtId1TKVUXe4tN]{Commander Arsiella Dei}

Moderate 7

If the PCs have gained 3 AP or fewer, they encounter Arsiella Dei here in her quarters. Otherwise, she patrols the fort on the lookout for intruders. If attacked, Arsiella's first concern is calling for reinforcements, which might arrive in the form of the priest of Iomedae in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.GPfcRkX5jNY2pJ30]{area A18}, Shevarna in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{area A15}, or the knight reclaimant in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.p5zkTjxPjgJDtHL2]{area A19}. As reinforcements arrive, the combat with Arsiella quickly escalates to an extreme encounter. If she finds herself without reinforcements, Arsiella retreats instead, hoping to make her way to the catacombs and escape the fort with the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem} . However, she takes care not to lead intruders to the artifact, preferring to die in its defense rather than reveal its location.

@UUID[Actor.WUg8Cu0z9vFdY8Nc]{Desk}: The top of the roll-top desk is secured with an average lock (@Check[type:thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock}, three successes) . Inside are Arsiella's notes detailing the day-to-day operations of the fort. The information contained within the papers is typical for a facility of this size and includes supply requests, personnel records, and scouting reports of the surrounding area. A PC who @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} the desk and succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:23] discovers a hidden compartment built into the desk's interior. The compartment contains a leather-bound book titled Fort Ozem Command Guide.

The guide is written in code but can be deciphered with a @Check[type:society|dc:28|traits:action:decipher-writing] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher Writing}. If decoded, the book contains a description of the catacombs beneath the fort, including the location of their entrance in Iomedae's Rest (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20}) and the secret exit via the mosaic in the catacombs (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{area B8}). In the book's margins, Arsiella has added a note that the pillars in the catacomb's entrance (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{area B1}) need to be shored up, lest they collapse and bring much of the fort with them. Once it is decoded, the PCs can use the command guide to help them decipher the numbering system in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.vQAxiHpuv0kftMr9]{area A9}.

@UUID[Actor.tVhVFIXoh4RekKa3]{Trunk}: The trunk in the corner is unlocked and contains Arsiella's bedding and clothes, her personal copy of the Acts of Iomedae, and a small pouch filled with gems worth a total of 300 gp.

Development: If the characters disturb anything in this room, Arsiella notices the intrusion and the PCs gain 4 AP, unless they succeed at a @Check[type:stealth|dc:31] to conceal their actions.

A18. Holy Barracks.name: A18. 圣洁军营 A18. Holy Barracks
A18. Holy Barracks.text:
几道白色亚麻简朴帘幕将这处空间分隔成三个区域，每个区域中都有一张床和一只箱子。通往南侧和东侧的门都可以离开这个房间。

这个房间是永久驻留于奥泽姆要塞的艾奥梅黛牧师的起居室，其中包括阿尔西斯（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{A13}）和谢瓦娜（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{A15}）。

@UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{艾奥梅黛牧师}

微不足道 7

偶尔能在这里发现阿尔西斯和谢瓦娜正在睡觉，但通常房间里只有一名艾奥梅黛牧师，在最北边那张床的床脚处静静祈祷。当PC第一次进入时，这名牧师藏在分隔房间的帘幕后方，因此角色可以通过一次成功的 @Check[type:stealth|dc:25|traits:action:sneak] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 溜过他身边。

宝藏：三只箱子都由一个普通锁锁住（进行 @Check[type:thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，需要三次成功）。箱子里装着法衣和其他个人物品。其中一个箱子还装有一本带彩饰插图的《艾奥梅黛行传》抄本（价值 60 gp），另一个则装着一件次级修道院长袍。

后续发展：如果角色打开这些箱子或以其他方式扰乱房间，除非他们成功通过一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] 来掩饰自己的动作，否则他们获得 2 AP。

Simple curtains of white linen divide this space into three sections, each holding a single bed and a trunk. Doors to the south and east lead out of the room.

This room serves as the living quarters for the priests of Iomedae in permanent residence at Fort Ozem, including Althis (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{A13}) and Shevarna (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.M2A9g9Q3WzByLcRQ]{A15}).

@UUID[Actor.uhTMcy0blrxpP6aZ]{Priest of Iomedae}

Trivial 7

Occasionally, Althis and Shevarna can be found sleeping here, but usually the room contains only a single priest of Iomedae, who prays quietly at the foot of the northernmost bed. When the PCs first enter, the priest is hidden behind the curtains that divide the room, allowing the characters to slip past him with a successful @Check[type:stealth|dc:25|traits:action:sneak] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}.

Treasure: Each of the three trunks is secured with an average lock (@Check[type:thievery|dc:25|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock}, three successes). The trunks contain cassocks and other personal effects. @UUID[Actor.yz7Wd9WpvPUKlLsU]{One} of the trunks also holds an illuminated copy of the Acts of Iomedae (worth 60 gp), while @UUID[Actor.iN5TORwyxtlMZTkY]{another} contains a lesser cloister robe.

Development: If the characters open the trunks or otherwise disturb the room, they gain 2 AP unless they succeed at a @Check[type:stealth|dc:25] to conceal their actions.

A19. Iomedae's Blades.name: A19. 艾奥梅黛之刃 A19. Iomedae's Blades
A19. Iomedae's Blades.text:
与堡垒的其他区域不同，这条通道的墙壁镶着木质护墙板，上面布满了许多剑砍留下的痕迹。沿墙的架子上摆放着真剑和练习用剑。靠近走道交汇处的地方有一张小长凳和一张桌子。

@UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{复国骑士}

低于 7

总会有一名复国骑士在走道中练习剑术套路。每一套套路都要花费10分钟才能完成。完成后，这名骑士会走到长凳旁，记录自己的进展，并为下一轮练习挑选一把武器。成功通过 @Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 或 @Check[type:society|dc:21|traits:action:warfare-lore,secret] 检定的角色，能够充分辨认当前的剑术套路，从而知道这名骑士何时会转过身去，让角色们有机会潜行经过这名骑士。

@UUID[Actor.HBurbNk6dVBE5vjt]{宝藏}：架子上放着几把样式各异的剑刃，不过这些武器都不是魔法武器。一册破旧的《艾奥梅黛行传》放在桌上，与骑士的训练日志摆在一起。

后续发展：如果PC们拿走这本日志（或数量相当可观的剑），他们获得1 AP。

Unlike the rest of the fort, the walls of this passage are lined with wood paneling bearing the scars of numerous sword cuts. Stands along the wall hold both real and practice swords. Near the walkway's intersection is a small bench and table.

@UUID[Actor.jSE16N2ASzN3qlN1]{Knight Reclaimant}

Low 7

One knight reclaimant is always in the walkway practicing sword forms. Each form takes 10 minutes to complete. Once finished, the knight moves to the bench to make notes on their progress and select a weapon for their next exercise. A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:society|dc:23|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] or @Check[type:society|dc:21|traits:action:warfare-lore,secret] check recognizes the current sword form well enough to know when the knight's back will be turned, allowing the characters an opportunity to Sneak past the knight.

@UUID[Actor.HBurbNk6dVBE5vjt]{Treasure}: The stands hold several blades of various design, although none of the weapons are magical. A battered copy of the Acts of Iomedae rests on the table alongside the knight's practice journal.

Development: If the PCs take the journal (or a significant number of the swords), they gain 1 AP.

A20. Iomedae's Rest.name: A20. 艾奥梅黛之憩 A20. Iomedae's Rest
A20. Iomedae's Rest.text:
这间房间中央摆着一张铺着洁白无瑕床单的床。角落里，一套白银板甲立在西墙边的一张长桌旁。桌上放着一只华丽的圣杯和一把闪闪发亮的长剑。一段天鹅绒绳索拦住了房间入口。绳索上垂着一块牌子，上面写着“如艾奥梅黛离开时那般。”

艾奥梅黛在凡人时期短暂统领奥泽姆要塞时，曾亲自将这间房用作卧室。如今，艾奥梅黛牧师们维持着这里的一切，力求保持他们认为艾奥梅黛居住于此时的原样。

镶嵌画：床下的地面嵌着一幅镶嵌画，描绘的是一把长剑，其护手形似阳炎爆，剑首则塑造成一双手的形状。查看床下的角色会自动发现这幅镶嵌画；否则，想注意到它则需要成功进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:24|traits:action:search] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}。

成功通过一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:18] 的角色会认出，镶嵌画中的图像是艾奥梅黛的佩剑——心之刃。这把剑看起来与放在桌上的那把一模一样（见下文宝藏）。成功进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:25|traits:action:search] 以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}镶嵌画的角色，会注意到镶嵌画边缘与地板之间有一道细缝。如果PC利用这处着力点抬起镶嵌画，他们就会发现一段向下通往要塞下方地下墓穴的阶梯（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{区域 B1}）。

@UUID[Actor.by9MfJT0ZoJI3kBW]{宝藏}：桌上的长剑与镶嵌画中描绘的那把相似。圣杯为白银制成，并镶有切割成血滴形状的红宝石。表面看来，这只圣杯与塞尔德格·贝德利斯派PC前来取得的那件神器描述完全一致。尽管PC可能以为自己已经完成了任务，但这把剑和这只圣杯其实都是高档赝品。这两件物品分别都附有一个3环的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PRrZ7anETWPm90YY]{易容魔法}法术，使其显现出6级魔法物品的灵光。施法者若使用3环或更高环级的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{读取灵光}，则可通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:23|traits:secret] 检定来识破该幻象。

虽然要找到愿意购买这些仿制品的收藏家可能有些困难，但对感兴趣的买家而言，这把剑和这只圣杯各值 200 gp。

后续发展：要塞守军只是偶尔才会进入这间房，因此只要PC此前一直足够低调，扰动这间房里的任何物品都不会自动让他们获得AP。不过，如果PC已经获得了8点或更多AP，最终就会有人来检查这间房。请注意，虽然下到地下墓穴中的PC可以在身后关上镶嵌画暗门，但他们无法把床恢复到原本的位置——而这处异常必定会被要塞守军注意到。一旦守军发现这间房被动过，PC的AP会立刻上升到21，从而触发要塞撤离。

A bed fitted with immaculate white sheets occupies the center of this room. In the corner, a set of silver plate mail stands beside a long table along the western wall. Atop the table rests an ornate chalice and a gleaming longsword. A length of velvet rope blocks the entrance to the room. Dangling from the rope is a sign that reads “As Iomedae left it.”

Iomedae herself used this chamber as her bedroom when she briefly commanded Fort Ozem during her mortal life. Today, the priests of Iomedae maintain the space in what they believe to be the exact condition it was in when Iomedae occupied it.

Mosaic: Set into the floor beneath the bed is a mosaic depicting a longsword with quillons resembling a sunburst and a pommel shaped like a pair of hands. Characters who look beneath the bed automatically discover the mosaic; otherwise, noticing the mosaic requires a successful @Check[type:perception|dc:24|traits:action:search] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}.

Characters who succeed at a @Check[type:religion|dc:18] recognize the mosaic's image as Iomedae's sword, Heart's Edge. The sword looks identical to the one that rests on the table (see Treasure below). A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:25|traits:action:search] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the mosaic notices a slight gap between the edge of the mosaic and floor. If the PCs use this handhold to lift the mosaic, they reveal a set of steps that descend to the catacombs beneath the fort (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{area B1}).

@UUID[Actor.by9MfJT0ZoJI3kBW]{Treasure}: The longsword on the table resembles the one depicted in the mosaic. The chalice is silver and studded with rubies cut to resemble drops of blood. To all appearances, the chalice matches the description of the artifact Seldeg Bhedlis sent the PCs here to claim. While the PCs might believe they've accomplished their mission, both the sword and chalice are high-class forgeries. The items are each enchanted with a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PRrZ7anETWPm90YY]{disguise magic} spell that causes them to appear to have the aura of a 6th-level magic item. A caster using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{detect magic} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{read aura} of 3rd rank or higher can disbelieve the illusion by succeeding at a @Check[type:religion|dc:23|traits:secret] check.

While finding a collector to purchase the replicas might prove difficult, the sword and chalice are worth 200 gp each to an interested buyer.

Development: The fort's defenders only occasionally enter this room, so disturbing any of the items in this room doesn't automatically gain the PCs AP, provided they've kept a low profile to this point. However, if the PCs have gained 8 AP or more, someone eventually comes to check on the room. Note that while PCs who descend into the catacombs can shut the mosaic door behind them, they won't be able to return the bed to its original position—an anomaly the fort's defenders are sure to notice. Once the defenders notice that this room has been disturbed, the PCs' AP immediately increases to 21, triggering an evacuation of the fort.

The Ruined Keep.name: 废墟城堡 The Ruined Keep
The Ruined Keep.text:
奥泽姆要塞前方附近那座建筑的屋顶几乎与环绕它的城墙一样高，但它曾经令人印象深刻的外墙如今已成废墟。大片石料已经崩塌脱落，让藤蔓和其他绿色植物侵入了留下的裂缝之中。

奥泽姆要塞前方的废墟城堡具有以下通用特征。如果一名PC尝试此处未详细说明的高难度任务，则将其难度设为DC 23。

天花板：城堡的天花板高15英尺。部分屋顶已经坍塌，落入下方的城堡内部。

门：城堡的外门由加固木材制成（硬度15，60 HP，BT 30）。内门已被白蚁蛀蚀而变得脆弱（硬度5，20 HP，BT 10）。所有门都没有上锁。

照明：城堡内部没有光源，但在白天，光线会通过屋顶的缝隙照射进来，为整座建筑提供昏暗光照。到了夜晚，城堡内部则充满黑暗。

屋顶：时代的侵蚀削弱了这座废墟城堡的屋顶。第一次有生物在屋顶上结束其回合时，该生物必须尝试一次@Check[type:acrobatics|dc:23]。若检定失败，其脚下的屋顶会塌陷，使其坠落15英尺到下方房间中，除非其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{抓住边缘}。如果角色以这种方式坠落，PC们获得1 AP。若一名PC透过坍塌屋顶的一处缺口向下窥视，便能进一步了解下方的房间。

墙壁：城堡的墙壁由正在崩解的砖石构成，比较容易攀爬（@Check[type:athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb]）。

The roof of the building near the front of Fort Ozem rises almost as high as the walls that surround it, but its once-impressive facade lies in ruins. Large sections of the stone have crumbled away, allowing vines and other greenery to invade the cracks left behind.

The ruined keep at the front of Fort Ozem has the following general features. If a PC attempts a challenging task not detailed here, assign it a difficulty of DC 23.

Ceilings: The keep's ceilings are 15 feet high. Sections of the roof have collapsed into the keep below.

Doors: The keep's exterior doors are made from reinforced wood (Hardness 15, 60 HP, BT 30). Interior doors have been weakened by termites (Hardness 5, 20 HP, BT 10). None of the doors are locked.

Lighting: There are no light sources inside the keep, but during the day light streams in through gaps in the roof, providing dim light throughout the structure. At night, the interior of the keep is filled with darkness.

Roof: Time has weakened the roof of the ruined keep. The first time a creature ends its turn on the roof, that creature must attempt a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:23]. On a failed check, the roof beneath them gives way, dropping them 15 feet into the room below, unless they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.3yoajuKjwHZ9ApUY]{Grab an Edge}. The PCs gain 1 AP if a character falls in this way. A PC who peers through a section of the collapsed roof can learn more about the room beneath it.

Walls: The keep's walls are made of crumbling masonry and are relatively easy to climb (@Check[type:athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb]).

The Stronghold.name: 要塞主楼 The Stronghold
The Stronghold.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.dR0DNv2CNAvCuCPv]{Interior (Layer)}

当玩家进入要塞时，添加这一层。只要玩家在内部，就让它持续播放；它应与 @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort} 一同播放。

与南边那座破败的建筑不同，这栋建筑显然维护良好，尽管其石墙上爬满了蔓藤。

主导奥泽姆要塞北半部的要塞主楼具有以下通用特征。若某位PC尝试此处未详细说明的高难度任务，则将其难度设为 DC 24。

天花板：要塞主楼的天花板高15英尺。

门：要塞主楼的外门由加固木材制成（硬度 15，60 HP，BT 30）。内部的门为木制（硬度 10，40 HP，BT 20）。所有门都装有优质锁（@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，需要五次成功）。要塞的守卫各自携带其所负责区域的钥匙，而阿尔希艾拉携带所有门的钥匙。

照明：施有恒明术的发光宝石排列在内部墙壁上，为整个要塞主楼提供明亮光照。破坏这些宝石时，PC每破坏一颗宝石获得 1 AP。

墙壁：主楼的墙壁是凿成的石墙（@Check[type:athletics|dc:30|traits:action:climb] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{攀爬}）。内部墙壁为砖石结构（@Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:climb]）。

窗户：有外墙的房间设有狭窄窗户，设计用来引入新鲜空气和光线。这些窗户离地10英尺，约1英尺宽、4英尺高。中型或更小的生物可以通过成功的 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:25|traits:action:squeeze] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{挤入} 穿过窗户。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.dR0DNv2CNAvCuCPv]{Interior (Layer)}

As the players enter the fort, add this layer. Leave it running whenever the players are inside, it should be played in addition to @UUID[Playlist.9SKnTt7mfZDSr8Jz]{Infiltrating The Fort}.

Unlike the rundown structure to the south, this building is clearly well maintained, despite the creeping vines that cover its stone walls.

The stronghold that dominates the northern half of Fort Ozem has the following general features. If a PC attempts a challenging task not detailed here, assign it a difficulty of DC 24.

Ceilings: The stronghold's ceilings are 15 feet high.

Doors: The stronghold's exterior door is made of reinforced wood (Hardness 15, 60 HP, BT 30). The interior doors are wood (Hardness 10, 40 HP, BT 20). All doors are fitted with good locks (@Check[type:thievery|dc:30|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick the Lock}, five successes). The fort's defenders each carry a key to their associated area, and Arsiella carries keys to all the doors.

Lighting: Gemstones glowing with everlight spells line the interior walls, providing bright light throughout the stronghold. Tampering with the gemstones gains the PCs 1 AP per gemstone.

Walls: The keep's walls are hewn stone (@Check[type:athletics|dc:30|traits:action:climb] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}). Interior walls are masonry (@Check[type:athletics|dc:20|traits:action:climb]).

Windows: Chambers with exterior walls feature narrow windows designed to let in fresh air and light. These windows are 10 feet off the ground and approximately 1 foot wide and 4 feet tall. A Medium or smaller creature can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze} through a window with a successful @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:25|traits:action:squeeze].

The Catacombs.name: 地下墓穴 The Catacombs
The Catacombs.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.2kJ6x52GEwXyaiRQ.PlaylistSound.zG6OfOfHNMFBCMBx]{崩塌堡垒循环}

当队伍下降进入地下墓穴时。

奥泽姆要塞下方的地下墓穴比这座要塞本身还要古老，但后来被终焉之墙骑士团改作安置他们受尊崇死者的场所。当阿尔塞拉·黛伊成为奥泽姆要塞的指挥官后，她将父亲伊尔加尔·涅玛斯的遗骸迁到了最深处的一个区域（@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.gR50iXYjU5EVzEDh]{区域 B7}），直到今天仍常来探望他。她也利用自己在地下墓穴中的时间照看奥泽姆圣杯——这件托付由她保管的神器。圣杯位于 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9}。

地下墓穴具有以下通用特征。若某位 PC 尝试此处未描述的高难度任务，则将其难度设为 DC 24。

天花板：地下墓穴各处的天花板高 8 尺。

门：各区域之间由无门的石制拱门相隔。

照明：镶嵌在地下墓穴墙壁上的宝石闪耀着 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ynm8JIU3sc3qUMpa]{恒明术} 的光辉，但其魔法已被削弱，以维持恰当的肃穆氛围。这些宝石令整个地下墓穴处于昏暗光照中。

墙壁：墙壁由严丝合缝的石块砌成，其间遍布嵌入式壁龛，用于安放骸骨遗存。

宝藏：奥泽姆要塞的守卫者并不知道，最近有三只觅宝精在地下墓穴中定居。这些顽皮的精类正把区域各处的随葬品替换成赝品，并将真正的宝藏收集到它们位于 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{区域 B6} 的巢穴中。要辨认出一件赝品物品，需要成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:25|traits:secret] 或 @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:secret] 检定（若一只觅宝精位于该复制品 40 尺内，则 DC 提高至 35）。如果 PC 们将一件觅宝精复制品带入新的区域，这些精类很快就会现身与队伍对峙。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.2kJ6x52GEwXyaiRQ.PlaylistSound.zG6OfOfHNMFBCMBx]{Crumbling Strongholds Loop}

As the party descends into the catacombs.

The catacombs beneath Fort Ozem predate the fort, but they were repurposed by the Knights of Lastwall as a place to keep their honored dead. When Arsiella Dei became Fort Ozem's commander, she moved the remains of her father, Irgal Nirmath, to one of the deepest sections (@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.gR50iXYjU5EVzEDh]{area B7}) and to this date visits him often. She also uses her time in the catacombs to keep an eye on the Chalice of Ozem , the artifact entrusted to her care. The chalice is in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9}.

The catacombs have the following general features. If a PC attempts a challenging task not described here, assign it a difficulty of DC 24.

Ceilings: The ceilings throughout the catacombs are 8 feet high.

Doors: Doorless stone archways separate one area from the next.

Lighting: Gemstones glowing with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ynm8JIU3sc3qUMpa]{everlight} spells line the walls of the catacombs, but their magic has been muted to maintain an appropriately somber atmosphere. The gemstones shed dim light throughout the catacombs.

Walls: The walls are made of fitted stone and inset with niches for skeletal remains throughout.

Treasure: Unknown to the fort's defenders, three mirmicettes recently took up residence in the catacombs. The mischievous fey are in the process of replacing grave goods throughout the area with forgeries, gathering the real treasures in their lair in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{area B6}. Detecting a counterfeit item requires a successful a @Check[type:perception|dc:25|traits:secret] or @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:secret] check (increase the DC to 35 if a mirmicette is within 40 feet of the copy). If the PCs transport one of the mirmicette copies into a new area, the fey confront the party soon afterwards.

B1-B3. Catacombs Crossroads.name: B1-B3. 地下墓穴十字路口 B1-B3. Catacombs Crossroads
B1-B3. Catacombs Crossroads.text:
从地上部分堡垒延伸下来的楼梯盘旋而下，通往一间黑暗的房间，通道向四面八方延伸。五根看起来早已风光不再的石柱支撑着这间房间低矮的天花板。墙边排列着壁龛，里面塞满了骸骨遗骸。

B1区域连接着地下墓穴的各个部分，包括东边两间较小的墓室（B2和B3区域）。

石柱：这间房间里的石柱不仅支撑着房间的天花板，也支撑着奥泽姆要塞的要塞主楼部分。每根石柱具有硬度 12、40 HP（BT 20）以及通常的物体免疫。若PC将其中三根石柱降到其损坏阈值以下，这间房间的天花板便会坍塌。上方要塞主楼的一部分（从@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{A20区域}开始，并自那里向外扩散）也会在不久后随之坍塌，并将地下墓穴的大部分一并埋葬。虽然这次坍塌不会彻底摧毁奥泽姆要塞，但造成的伤害足以迫使切尔那萨多游侠放弃此地，从而实现塞尔德格·贝德利斯想让堡垒沦为废墟的请求。

  • @UUID[Actor.8iE8vnaoAnw9R5gY]
  • @UUID[Actor.PS2LIr9y45A4aWUq]
  • @UUID[Actor.WAfrSBSUNJNB8xpE]

宝藏

这三个区域中的墓葬壁龛里堆满了骸骨遗骸和各种随葬品。PC可以在每个区域花费10分钟来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}这些壁龛。在B1区域，他们会发现一枚价值60 gp的艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽。B2区域的壁龛内有一把骷髅钥匙，以及一件由觅宝精伪造的金手镯复制品（表面上价值100 gp）。在B3区域，壁龛内有一枚外交官徽章、一件寻路仪和一条价值200 gp的红宝石项链，以及一件由觅宝精伪造的红宝石手镯复制品（表面上价值150 gp）。这些复制品对应的真品可以在@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{B6区域}找到。

The stairs from the aboveground portion of the fort spiral down into a dark chamber with passages extending out in all directions. Five stone pillars that look as if they've seen better days support the chamber's low ceiling. Niches filled with skeletal remains line the walls.

Area B1 connects the various sections of the catacombs, including two smaller burial chambers to the east (areas B2 and B3).

Pillars: The pillars in this chamber provide support not only for the chamber's ceiling but also for the stronghold portion of Fort Ozem. Each pillar has Hardness 12, 40 HP (BT 20), and typical object immunities. If the PCs reduce three of the pillars below their broken threshold, the ceiling of this chamber collapses. A section of the stronghold above (starting at @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20} and radiating outward from there) follows shortly thereafter, taking most of the catacombs with it. While this collapse doesn't destroy Fort Ozem entirely, the damage is sufficient to force the Chernasardo Rangers to abandon the location, fulfilling Seldeg Bhedlis's request to leave the fort in ruins.

  • @UUID[Actor.8iE8vnaoAnw9R5gY]
  • @UUID[Actor.PS2LIr9y45A4aWUq]
  • @UUID[Actor.WAfrSBSUNJNB8xpE]

Treasure

The burial niches in these three areas are stacked with skeletal remains and various grave goods. The PCs can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the niches with 10 minutes of work per area. In area B1, they discover a silver religious symbol of Iomedae worth 60 gp. The niches in area B2 contain a skeleton key, as well as a false mirmicette copy of a golden bracelet (apparently worth 100 gp). In area B3, the niches contain a diplomat's badge , a wayfinder, and a ruby necklace worth 200 gp, as well as a false mirmicette copy of a ruby bracelet (apparently worth 150 gp). The real versions of the copied items are found in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{area B6}.

B4. Sacrificial Sanctum.name: B4. 牺牲圣所 B4. Sacrificial Sanctum
B4. Sacrificial Sanctum.text:
一尊威严骑士的大理石雕像占据了厅室中央，骑士身着胸甲，佩带长剑与盾牌。雕像所立的基座周围环绕着十余块墓碑，每一块墓碑都像是从地面升起，仿佛地面是泥土而非石头。

成功通过一次 @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 检定的角色会认出，这尊雕像描绘的是指挥闪耀远征军部队的塔尔丹将军阿尼桑特。雕像周围的墓碑刻着一些曾在阿尼桑特麾下效力的英雄之名，不过这些墓碑仅具象征意义，其下并未埋葬任何尸体。雕像基座上的一块铭牌写道：“谨以此纪念那些以牺牲成就我等胜利之人。”

A marble statue of an imposing knight with a breastplate, sword, and shield takes up the center of the chamber. Around the plinth on which the statue stands are a dozen or more gravestones, each marker rising from the floor as if the ground were dirt instead of stone.

A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:society|dc:25|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] check recognizes the statue as the Taldan general Arnisant, who commanded the forces of the Shining Crusade. The gravestones around the statue bear the names of some of the heroes who served under Arnisant, although the markers are purely symbolic and no bodies are interred beneath them. A plaque on the statue's plinth reads: “In honor of those whose sacrifice made our victory possible.”

B5. Tomb of the Nameless.name: B5. 无名者之墓 B5. Tomb of the Nameless
B5. Tomb of the Nameless.text:
完美无瑕的黑色花岗岩砖覆盖了这间原本空荡房间的墙壁、地板和天花板。在这片宽阔空间的另一端，可以看到西墙上凿刻着文字，但从房间入口处无法辨认其内容。

奥泽姆骑士团将这间房间留作纪念，在对抗塔-巴丰的圣战中死去却未被识别的人们。西墙上的文字写道：“献给那些为了击败默语魔道而牺牲自己名字之人。说出他们的名字（且不要说出其他任何名字），你便能找到自己。”

@UUID[Actor.FGtLODbx0kwumWA2]{无名者之名}

低阶 7

第一个走进房间的角色会触发一个作祟。

Tiles of flawless black granite cover the walls, floor, and ceiling of this otherwise empty room. Across the expanse, words can be seen chiseled into the western wall, but they are illegible from the chamber's entrance.

The Knights of Ozem set aside this chamber to honor those who died unrecognized in the crusade against Tar-Baphon. The words on the western wall read: “For those who sacrificed their names to defeat the Whispering Way. Speak their names (and no others) to find yourself.”

@UUID[Actor.FGtLODbx0kwumWA2]{Names of the Nameless}

Low 7

The first character to step into the room triggers a haunt.

B6. Watery Grave.name: B6. 积水墓室 B6. Watery Grave
B6. Watery Grave.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.lViMDyiI80uMpYxh]{积水墓室（层）}

将此作为环境音层，叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.2kJ6x52GEwXyaiRQ]{进入地下墓穴} 的播放列表之上播放。

这间墓室中的空气凉爽而潮湿。地面上覆盖着一滩滩黑水，在房间西端附近汇聚，那里有一尊跪在基座上的骑士雕像。骑士在身前举起一面插满箭矢的盾牌。

破损墙体：PC若在一次 @Check[type:crafting|dc:23]、@Check[type:survival|dc:23] 或适当的学识检定中成功，便能辨认出水源来自墓室东墙的一道裂缝。该墙体拥有硬度 10、40 HP（BT 20），以及典型的物体免疫。如果墙体的生命值降至低于其损坏阈值，细流就会变成足以威胁淹没要塞的激流。水会开始以每 10 分钟 1 英尺的速度涌入地下墓穴。1 小时后，地下墓穴将被完全淹没。此后不久，要塞地基所受的损害将变得无法修复，整座奥泽姆要塞都会向内坍塌。

@UUID[Actor.OlBw2JqWcb3aBfKf]{3只觅宝精}

中等 7

入侵奥泽姆要塞地下墓穴的三只觅宝精正在这个房间里收拢它们偷来的随葬品。除非PC先前在地下墓穴的其他地方遭遇过这些觅宝精，否则他们会发现这些妖精正在这里整理它们的宝藏。觅宝精熟悉地下墓穴的大致布局，并愿意分享它们所知道的信息，除非PC试图夺走它们的宝藏，或明显携带着任何觅宝精曾复制过的物品。在这种情况下，觅宝精会发动攻击。如果角色持有@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}（来自 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9}），觅宝精也会发动攻击。

@UUID[Actor.J8fbOks8YlS6L9pY]{宝藏}：觅宝精的宝藏包括一只价值 100 gp 的金手镯（其复制品可在 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{区域 B1} 找到）和一只价值 150 gp 的红宝石手镯（其复制品位于 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{区域 B3}），以及一个中阶启示香炉（其复制品在 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9}）。其余宝藏则是一些零散的随葬品，总价值 150 gp。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.lViMDyiI80uMpYxh]{Watery Grave (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.2kJ6x52GEwXyaiRQ]{Entering the Catacombs}.

The air in this chamber is cool and damp with moisture. Puddles of dark water cover the floor, pooling near the room's western end, where the statue of a knight kneels atop a plinth. The knight raises a shield studded with arrows before him.

Failing Wall: A PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:crafting|dc:23], @Check[type:survival|dc:23], or appropriate Lore check can identify the source of the water as a crack in the east wall of the chamber. The wall has Hardness 10, 40 HP (BT 20), and typical object immunities. If the wall is reduced to below its Broken Threshold, the trickle of water turns into a torrent that threatens to flood the fort. Water begins to spill into the catacombs at the rate of 1 foot every 10 minutes. After 1 hour, the catacombs flood completely. Shortly thereafter, the damage to the fort's foundation becomes irreparable and the entirety of Fort Ozem collapses in on itself.

@UUID[Actor.OlBw2JqWcb3aBfKf]{3 Mirmicettes}

Moderate 7

The three mirmicettes that have invaded Fort Ozem's catacombs gather the grave goods they have stolen in this room. Unless the PCs encounter the mirmicettes elsewhere in the catacombs, they find the fey here sorting through their treasure. The mirmicettes are familiar with the rough layout of the catacombs and are willing to share what they know, unless the PCs try to take their treasure or visibly carry anything the mirmicettes have copied. In this case, the mirmicettes attack. The mirmicettes also attack if the characters possess the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem} (from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9}).

@UUID[Actor.J8fbOks8YlS6L9pY]{Treasure}: The mirmicettes' treasure includes a gold bracelet worth 100 gp (a copy of which can be found in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{area B1}) and a ruby bracelet worth 150 gp (its copy is in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{area B3}), as well as a moderate thurible of revelation (with a copy in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9}). The rest of the treasures are minor grave goods worth a total of 150 gp.

B7. Nirmathas's Pride.name: B7. 涅玛萨斯之傲 B7. Nirmathas's Pride
B7. Nirmathas's Pride.text:
一具华丽的石棺占据了这间地穴的中央，棺盖上交叉放着一对金箭。石棺脚端立着一座基座，上面镶着一块抛光青铜铭牌。两具木制棺材分别安放在两侧的棺架上，每一具都比石棺小，但同样华丽。房间南半部的地面上竖立着许多墓碑。

这间房间安放着切尔那萨多游侠中一些著名人物的遗骸，其中包括要塞指挥官阿尔谢拉·黛伊的父亲伊尔加尔·涅玛斯，他的石棺就位于房间中央。石棺脚端的铭牌上刻着伊尔加尔的名字，以及“为了尼尔玛萨斯！”这句话。石棺两侧的棺材属于这座要塞的两位前任指挥官，而南面的墓碑则列出了已知殉职、但遗骸从未被找回的游侠姓名。和@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.QLJR7OAaYedPerna]{区域 B4}中的墓碑一样，这些墓碑也纯粹只是象征，其下并没有埋葬任何尸体。

@UUID[Actor.ZUkMXxPyOJ9sPRvN]{萤火灵}

中等 7

整个房间都沐浴在柔和的光辉之中，因为这里受到一只萤火灵的守护；阿尔谢拉·黛伊特意邀请它进入要塞，专门看守她父亲的遗骸。这只萤火灵会立刻攻击任何穿过房间门槛、显然属于不死的存在。否则，它会要求知晓队伍来访的目的。除非角色们说服萤火灵，让它相信他们是来向要塞中陨落的领袖致敬的，否则萤火灵会认定他们是盗墓贼并发动攻击。类似地，如果PC触发撤离，阿尔谢拉会在带着@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}逃走时警告萤火灵，说要塞已经遭到入侵。

@UUID[Actor.3ibMskqTTQDRQRXv]{宝藏}：伊尔加尔·涅玛斯石棺上的金箭每支价值50 gp。

An ornate sarcophagus occupies the center of this crypt, a pair of golden arrows lying crossed atop its lid. A plinth bearing a plaque of polished bronze stands at the foot of the sarcophagus. Two wooden coffins, each smaller than the sarcophagus but no less ornate, rest atop biers on either side. Numerous gravestones rise from the floor in the southern half of the chamber.

This room holds the remains of notable Chernasardo Rangers, including Fort Commander Arsiella Dei's father, Irgal Nirmath, whose sarcophagus sits in the center of the room. The plaque at the foot of the sarcophagus bears Irgal's name, along with the words “For Nirmathas.” The coffins on either side of the sarcophagus are those of two of the fort's previous commanders, while the grave markers to the south list the names of rangers known to have died in the line of duty, but whose remains were never recovered. Like the gravestones in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.QLJR7OAaYedPerna]{area B4}, these markers are purely symbolic and have no bodies buried beneath them.

@UUID[Actor.ZUkMXxPyOJ9sPRvN]{Engerra}

Moderate 7

The entire room is alight with a soft radiance, as it is protected by an engerra Arsiella Dei invited into the fort specifically to guard her father's remains. The engerra immediately attacks any obvious undead that cross the chamber's threshold. Otherwise, it demands to know the purpose of the party's visit. Unless the characters convince the engerra they're here to pay respect to the fort's fallen leaders, the engerra assumes they're tomb robbers and attacks. Similarly, if the PCs trigger an evacuation, Arsiella warns the engerra that the fort has been invaded as she escapes with the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem}.

@UUID[Actor.3ibMskqTTQDRQRXv]{Treasure}: The golden arrows atop Irgal Nirmath's sarcophagus are worth 50 gp each.

B8. Contemplation Corner.name: B8. 冥想角 B8. Contemplation Corner
B8. Contemplation Corner.text:
这间高挑顶的厅室墙边摆放着铺有华丽装饰软垫的石制长凳。长凳排列成面向嵌入地板的一幅巨大马赛克镶嵌画。马赛克描绘的是一把带有灿烂阳炎爆形护手的长剑。系在石座上的天鹅绒绳索将马赛克与房间其余部分隔开。

马赛克镶嵌画：成功通过 @Check[type:religion|dc:18|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 检定的角色会认出这幅马赛克是艾奥梅黛的佩剑心之刃。这把剑看起来与 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{区域 A20} 中马赛克所描绘的那把一模一样。围绕马赛克的绳索很容易就能从石座上解开（或者直接跳过去）。成功通过 @Check[type:perception|dc:27|traits:action:search] 来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索} 这幅马赛克的角色，会注意到图案的一部分有轻微磨损痕迹。掀开马赛克的这一部分后，会露出一条逃生隧道；它延伸将近一英里，最终通往南锐木森林中的另一处地点。

发展：在堡垒的守卫者中，只有阿尔塞拉·黛伊知晓这条逃生路线。如果角色获得 21 点或更多 AP，阿尔塞拉·黛伊会从 @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{区域 B9} 取回@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}，并可能利用这些隧道带着这件圣物逃走。

Stone benches topped with rich, decorative padding line the walls of this high-ceilinged chamber. The benches are arranged to face a vast mosaic set into the floor. The mosaic depicts a longsword with brilliant sunburst quillons. Velvet ropes attached to stone pedestals separate the mosaic from the rest of the room.

Mosaic: Characters who succeed at a @Check[type:religion|dc:18|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] check recognize the mosaic as Iomedae's sword, Heart's Edge . The sword looks identical to the one depicted in the mosaic in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.1DsEgAChuZNAnvAN]{area A20}. The ropes that circle the mosaic can be detached from their pedestals (or simply hopped over) easily enough. A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:27|traits:action:search] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the mosaic notices a slight wear pattern on one part of the design. Lifting this section of the mosaic reveals an escape tunnel that stretches nearly a mile before emerging in another location of the Southern Fangwood.

Development: Of the fort's defenders, only Arsiella Dei is aware of the escape route. If the characters gain 21 AP or more, Arsiella Dei retrieves the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem} from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.d5cj1nyqVWsiM8aK]{area B9} and might use the tunnels to escape with the artifact.

B9. Remembrances.name: B9. 追忆室 B9. Remembrances
B9. Remembrances.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.mOUJNMZscnVEuN3t]{追忆室}

一份安静、没有音乐的播放列表，适合玩家找到并取得奥泽姆圣杯时那庄严的时刻。

从地板直达天花板的架子沿着这间形状古怪的房间一路排列。大约三分之一的架子是空的，另有三分之一堆放着成堆的骸骨。剩下的架子上则摆放着各式小雕像、奖章以及其他小饰物。

@UUID[Actor.jkFsoUKTAJ9lJDtM]{宝藏}：只要快速搜索一下，角色们就能在房间中央的架子上找到他们此行的目标——奥泽姆圣杯。其余宝藏中包括一枚铁质徽章、一根4环的粉碎术魔杖，以及价值300 gp的军功章、珠宝和其他陪葬品。这里还有一个中级启示香炉的觅宝精复制品。真正的香炉可以在@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{区域 B6}中觅宝精的宝藏堆里找到。

发展：一旦PC们取得奥泽姆圣杯，他们的任务就完成了，可以自由离开奥泽姆要塞。

如果PC们还没有击败来自@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{区域 B6}的觅宝精，这些精灵会因圣杯被移走而感到不安，主要是因为它们还没弄清楚该如何复制它。愤怒的精灵会在角色离开房间时与队伍对 confront。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.mOUJNMZscnVEuN3t]{Remembrances}

A quiet, musicless playlist for the solemn moment as the players locate and claim the Chalice of Ozem.

Floor-to-ceiling shelves have been arranged throughout the length of this oddly shaped chamber. About of the third of the shelves are empty, while another third holds stacks of skeletal remains. The remaining shelves contain an assortment of statuettes, medals, and other small trinkets.

@UUID[Actor.jkFsoUKTAJ9lJDtM]{Treasure}: With a quick search, the characters can find the objective of their mission, the Chalice of Ozem, on the shelf in the center of the room. Among the remaining treasure is an iron medallion, a 4th-rank wand of shatter, and 300 gp worth of military medals, jewelry, and other grave goods. There's also a mirmicette copy of a moderate thurible of revelation. The real thurible can be found among the mirmicettes' treasure hoard in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{area B6}.

Development: Once the PCs claim the Chalice of Ozem , their mission is complete, and they are free to leave Fort Ozem.

If the PCs haven't defeated the mirmicettes from @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{area B6}, the fey become distressed by the removal of the chalice , in large part because they've yet to figure out how to copy it. The angry fey confront the party as the characters leave the room.

Concluding the Adventure.name: 冒险结局 Concluding the Adventure
Concluding the Adventure.text:
音频音效板：

@UUID[Playlist.3uS9kIYkiWDRiBvJ]{结局：与塞尔德格会面}

音效板播放列表 @UUID[Playlist.lwa92Gmapb88mxSw]{结局音效板} 中，为每一种摧毁要塞的方法都准备了一个对应的单独音效选项。

一旦PC们取得了奥泽姆圣杯，就只剩下一件事要做：摧毁奥泽姆要塞。至于他们如何着手摧毁这座要塞，则由他们自行决定，而这也应当成为这场冒险结尾时的一次凯旋巡礼。可行的策略包括以下几种。

水淹要塞：如果角色们发现了要塞地基上的裂缝（位于@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{区域 B6}），他们就可以利用这一建筑缺陷来淹没要塞。不过，这一策略需要花费时间；如果PC们必须仓促撤退，他们可能无法亲眼见证自己杰作的结果。

让要塞主楼坍塌：摧毁@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{区域 B1}中的承重柱，会导致要塞的主楼部分坍塌。这个策略在执行安排上颇为棘手，因为它迫使角色们要么撤退到要塞的上层区域，要么另寻路径离开地下墓穴。如果角色们采取这一策略，在要塞主楼坍塌之前，给他们充足的时间去找到@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{区域 B8}中的隐藏隧道；或者描述当PC们逃离时，要塞守军陷入混乱、四周建筑结构在他们身旁崩落的景象。

蛮力强攻：如果PC们拥有炼金炸弹、破坏性法术，或具有类似效果的魔法物品，他们就可以用几次精确布置的爆炸，直接把要塞夷为平地。PC们在整个奥泽姆要塞中可能发现的若干物品——例如@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.QluEEqXAhIq73RNS]{区域 A6}里储藏的炽火胶，或@UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{区域 A13}中的蠕虫小瓶——都可以用来削弱要塞的墙体。PC们既可以单独使用这些物品，也可以将其与自身的装备和能力配合使用，以摧毁要塞。

如果阿尔塞拉·黛伊成功带着奥泽姆圣杯撤离了要塞，或者PC们只是单纯没有足够时间完成任务，他们就应当回去向塞尔德格·贝德利斯汇报自己的失败。

最终会面

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.3uS9kIYkiWDRiBvJ]{结局：与塞尔德格会面}

当玩家们返回凋疫林与塞尔德格会面时。

无论PC们是否完成任务，塞尔德格·贝德利斯都希望在凋疫林与他们见面，听取战后报告。如果角色们成功取回了奥泽姆圣杯，这名墓骑士会感谢他们的努力并收下圣杯，他的双眼因期待而闪闪发亮。他承诺会将他们的成功告知塔巴丰，并暗示这支队伍在不久的将来可能会被召去执行类似的破坏任务。

如果PC们没能取回圣杯，塞尔德格会大发雷霆，但他将这次失败更多归咎于奥泽姆要塞那些行善守军的诡计，而非角色们的无能。他向PC们保证，自己不会在默语暴君面前说他们的坏话，前提是他们同意陪他前往恐惧之岛进行一次“更彻底的任务复盘”。至于这份不祥提议究竟意味着什么，则留待你自行决定。

Audio Soundboard:

@UUID[Playlist.3uS9kIYkiWDRiBvJ]{Conclusion: Meeting with Seldeg}

The soundboard playlist @UUID[Playlist.lwa92Gmapb88mxSw]{Conclusion Soundboard} contains a single sound option for each method of destroying the fort.

Once the PCs acquire the Chalice of Ozem , there's only one thing left to do: destroy Fort Ozem. How they go about destroying the fort is up to them and should be a victory lap at the end of the adventure. Possible strategies include the following.

Flood The Fort: If the characters discover the crack in the fort's foundation (in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.Ccrm0irTCQjnVYjH]{area B6}), they can exploit this architectural flaw to flood the fort. This strategy takes time, however, and if the PCs need to make a hasty retreat, they might not be around to witness the result of their handiwork.

Collapse the Stronghold: Destroying the support pillars in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.U3y7f3tBBucMeWjL]{area B1} causes the stronghold portion of the fort to collapse. This strategy is tricky logistically, as it forces the characters to either retreat to the upper portion of the fort or find another way out of the catacombs. If the characters pursue this strategy, give them ample time to find the hidden tunnels in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.58bb7QLV2SPNOWR8]{area B8} before the stronghold collapses, or describe the confusion of the fort's defenders as the PCs make their escape, the fort's architecture raining down around them.

Brute Force: If PCs have alchemical bombs, destructive spells, or magical items with similar effects, they can simply knock the fort to the ground with a few well-placed explosions. Several of the items of the PCs might discover throughout Fort Ozem, such as the stash of alchemist's fire in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.QluEEqXAhIq73RNS]{area A6} or the worm vial in @UUID[JournalEntry.kuWZJTVkxDcE2TJW.JournalEntryPage.9pVmxAvAL7MKaIpH]{area A13}, could be used to weaken the fort's walls. The PCs can deploy these items on their own or in tandem with their personal items and abilities to destroy the fort.

If Arsiella Dei successfully evacuates the fort with the Chalice of Ozem , or if the PCs simply run out of time to complete their mission, they should report back to Seldeg Bhedlis to report their failure.

Final Meeting

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.3uS9kIYkiWDRiBvJ]{Conclusion: Meeting with Seldeg}

As the players return to the Blighted Bower to meet with Seldeg.

Regardless of whether the PCs complete their mission, Seldeg Bhedlis expects to meet them at the Blighted Bower for an after-action report. If the characters successfully retrieved the Chalice of Ozem, the graveknight thanks them for their work and claims the chalice, his eyes gleaming with anticipation. He promises to share news of their success with Tar-Baphon and hints the party might be called upon for similar missions of destruction in the very near future.

If the PCs fail to retrieve the chalice , Seldeg rages but blames their failure more on the trickery of Fort Ozem's do-gooding defenders than the characters' incompetence. He promises the PCs he won't speak poorly of them to the Whispering Tyrant, provided they agree to accompany him to the Isle of Terror for a “more thorough debriefing.” What this ominous offer entails has been left for you to decide.

Playing Evil Characters.name: 扮演邪恶角色 Playing Evil Characters
Playing Evil Characters.text:
《献给奥泽姆的余烬》是一则短篇冒险，玩家将在其中扮演默语魔道的特工，受塔巴丰的新任副手 @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{塞尔德格·贝德利斯}（男性20级墓骑士间谍大师）召集，执行一项渗透任务。由于默语魔道的核心信条是“不死才是最真实的存在形式”，这为玩家创造死灵法师或具有智能的不死角色提供了绝佳机会。至少，从道德层面来说，这些角色为塞尔德格效力的动机应当是值得怀疑的。考虑到这一点，在开始本次冒险前，请先考虑以下几点。

合作：为塞尔德格·贝德利斯效力，就等于推动邪恶的事业。在这次冒险中，玩家将扮演那些动机邪恶或反派化的角色，即便他们的目标未必与塞尔德格或彼此完全一致。唯一的要求是这些角色彼此合作，并始终专注于任务本身。他们可以不择手段地完成任务，但不应试图互相拆台或背叛。在为本次冒险创建角色时，玩家应共同努力，打造一支能够合作、且尽量减少队内冲突的队伍。

安全机制：虽然《献给奥泽姆的余烬》的目标是潜入奥泽姆要塞并取回一件强大的神器，但作为默语魔道的特工，角色在完成任务前可能会犯下种种骇人恶行，包括杀害无辜者。在冒险开始前，请与你的玩家讨论他们可以预期会遇到什么，以及他们的界限在哪里。你或许会希望使用诸如界线与幕帘或X卡片之类的安全机制，以帮助确保游戏过程既负责又能让所有人共同享受。虽然本冒险将塞尔德格描绘成一个无可救药的邪恶人物，对要塞守军毫无怜悯，但他仍不鼓励PC们沉溺于毫无节制的施虐——他暗示说，等任务完成之后，有的是时间这么做。

“Ashes for Ozem” is a short adventure in which players take the roles of Whispering Way agents assembled for an infiltration mission by Tar-Baphon’s new lieutenant, @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.kf77LSKjRa2ILrvP]{Seldeg Bhedlis} (male graveknight spymaster 20). As the core belief of the Whispering Way is that undeath is the truest form of existence, this an excellent opportunity for players to create characters who are either necromancers or intelligent undead. At the very least, the characters’ motivations for working with Seldeg should be questionable, morally speaking. With that in mind, consider the following points before beginning the adventure.

Cooperation: To work for Seldeg Bhedlis is to advance the cause of evil. In this adventure, players assume the roles of characters whose motivations are wicked or villainous, even if their goals don’t align directly with those of Seldeg or each other. The only requirement is that the characters cooperate with each other and remain committed to their mission. They can go to whatever lengths they need to accomplish their task, but they shouldn’t attempt to undermine or betray each other. While creating characters for this adventure, the players should work together to create a party that can cooperate without much inter-party strife.

Safety Tools: While the goal of “Ashes for Ozem” is to infiltrate Fort Ozem and retrieve an artifact of great power, as agents of the Whispering Way the characters might perform any number of heinous acts before completing their mission, including the killing of innocents. Before the adventure begins, talk with your players about what they can expect and what their boundaries are. You might wish to include the use of safety tools like lines and veils or the X-Card to help ensure responsible and mutually enjoyable play. While this adventure presents Seldeg as an irredeemably evil figure with no love for the fort’s defenders, he discourages the PCs from engaging in wanton sadism—there will be plenty of time for that, he suggests, once the mission is complete.

1.1: Rising to the Challenge.name: 1.1：迎接挑战 1.1: Rising to the Challenge

Chapter 1: Rising to the Challenge.name: 第一章：迎接挑战 Chapter 1: Rising to the Challenge
Chapter 1: Rising to the Challenge.text:
尤娅之望镇曾经是一处宁静而繁荣的定居点，建立在闪耀远征时期的一处遗迹之上。那处遗迹是一座名为摩德沙的古代聚居地，建在塔尔多大亲王赐予奥泽姆骑士团的土地上，好让十字军战士得以守望绞首塔与默语暴君。3942 AR，默语魔道在摩德沙的地窖中开启了一道通往虚空的传送门，意图利用传送门释放出的能量拉起一支不死军队；此后，摩德沙被废弃。在未能封印传送门后，十字军将摩德沙夷为平地，希望时光最终能关闭传送门并治愈这片土地。将近一千年后，一群来自开拓者协会的探索者重新发现了这处地窖，并一劳永逸地封印了传送门。不久之后，奥泽姆骑士团重新建立了这处聚居地，如今名为尤娅之望，而在接下来的三年里，这座小镇欣欣向荣。它的前景从未如此光明。

随后，塔-巴丰逃离了绞首塔，并以辐辉之火吞没了终焉之墙。

当斥候得知有不死生物开始从恩卡坦湖对岸蹒跚上岸时，终焉之墙的平民纷纷仓皇寻找庇护之所，而奥泽姆骑士团则试图让这个国家免于落入默语暴君之手，却最终失败了。这些难民中的大多数都被不死生物发现了，往往是在各自的地下室中蜷缩躲藏时，随后被重新唤起，成了塔-巴丰亵渎大军中的尸兵。
