PC及其幸存的同伴们，是少数逃过这一命运的人。当尤娅之望的领袖下令避难时，一小群人逃进了摩德沙的地窖中——正是开拓者协会在七年前探索过的那些墓窖。这一决定后来证明极为走运，因为数个世纪以来作为通往虚空的传送门宿主，这些地窖早已浸染了死灵能量，从而将幸存者的生命力掩蔽起来，不被默语暴君的爪牙察觉。

尽管PC们在暴君最初的入侵中活了下来，但此后的日子并不好过。事实上，人们甚至可以把他们过去六年的生活形容为一场毫无希望的悲剧，或是一场无法醒来的梦魇。幸存者们的食物储备在进入地窖仅仅几周后就耗尽了，迫使他们只能依靠由队伍领袖康斯坦·鲁西（虔诚的男性人类艾奥梅黛牧师 3） conjured出的稀粥和清水维生。更糟的是，他们试图逃离地窖的努力也毫无结果，因为他们早期几次前往地表的尝试证实了自己最大的恐惧：尤娅之望镇已经沦陷，曾经自豪的镇民如今都被嗜血的不死生物所取代。

现在，时间来到了 4725 AR。五年多来，PC们与其他幸存者一直蜷缩在摩德沙的地窖中，勉强维系着生命，却也渐渐开始羡慕死者。随着冒险开始，不死之祸再次降临到这些幸存者头上，迫使PC们要么孤注一掷，试图逃离尤娅之望，要么就把自己永远献给默语暴君。

The town of Yua's Hope was once a quiet and prosperous settlement built upon a ruin from the time of the Shining Crusade. That ruin, an ancient settlement called Mordesha, was constructed on land granted to the Knights of Ozem by the Grand Prince of Taldor so that the crusaders could keep vigil over Gallowspire and the Whispering Tyrant. Mordesha was abandoned in 3942 AR after a portal to the Void was opened within its crypts by the Whispering Way, who intended to use the energies released by the portal to raise an army of undeath. After failing to seal the portal, the crusaders razed Mordesha, hoping time would eventually close the portal and heal the land. Nearly a thousand years later, a group of explorers from the Pathfinder Society rediscovered the crypt and sealed the portal once and for all. Not long afterward, the Knights of Ozem reestablished the settlement, now called Yua's Hope, and the town thrived over the next three years. Its prospects had never looked brighter.

Then Tar-Baphon escaped Gallowspire and engulfed Lastwall in Radiant Fire.

When scouts got wind that undead had begun shambling onto shore from across Lake Encarthan, the civilians of Lastwall scrambled for shelter even as the Knights of Ozem tried and failed to keep the nation free from the Whispering Tyrant's grasp. Most of these refugees were discovered by the undead, often while hunkering down in their own basements, and were subsequently reanimated as corpse soldiers in Tar-Baphon's unholy army.

The PCs and their fellow survivors are among the few who escaped this fate. When the leaders of Yua's Hope gave the order to take shelter, a small group fled into the crypts of Mordesha, the very vaults the Pathfinder Society had plumbed seven years before. This decision proved fortuitous, as centuries of hosting a portal to the Void had imbued the crypts with necrotic energy, concealing the survivors' life force from the Whispering Tyrant's minions.

While the PCs survived the Tyrant's initial invasion, their existences since then have not been easy. In fact, one might describe their last six years as a hopeless tragedy or nightmare from which they've been unable to awaken. The survivors' food supplies ran out mere weeks after entering the crypts, forcing them to subsist entirely on gruel and water conjured by the group's leader, Constan Russi (dedicated male human cleric of Iomedae 3). What's more, their attempts to escape the crypts proved fruitless, as their early forays aboveground confirmed their greatest fear: the town of Yua's Hope had been overrun, its once-proud citizens replaced with slavering undead.

Now, the year is 4725 AR. For over half a decade, the PCs and their fellow survivors have huddled in the crypts of Mordesha, clinging to life but slowly growing to envy the dead. As the adventure begins, undeath comes for the survivors again, forcing the PCs to either make a last-ditch attempt to escape Yua's Hope or surrender themselves to the Whispering Tyrant for all eternity.

What Came Before.name: 前情回顾 What Came Before
What Came Before.text:
“死坟末土幸存者”是一则生存恐怖故事，因此，它的感染力很大程度上依赖于角色之间的互动——包括PC以及陪伴他们的NPC幸存者。虽然其中当然也有许多战斗需要应对（或避免），但也务必留出时间进行角色扮演，因为这些场景能让玩家有机会探索幸存者彼此之间的关系。

作为1级角色，PC在职业能力、专长或魔法物品方面都不会有太多能够定义自身特色的内容。因此，在为“死坟末土幸存者”创建角色时，可以试着向每位玩家提出以下一个或多个问题：

  • 你是在尤阿的希望镇出生并长大的吗？还是说，你只是个在错误的时间出现在错误地点的访客？
  • 亡灵来到尤阿的希望镇的那个夜晚，你多大年纪？是什么情况让你得以躲进墓穴避难？你是否被迫留下了什么人？
  • 你是否携带着某件特别的纪念物，用来提醒自己亡灵到来之前的生活？
  • 你与@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Abq1qUuIdHXMx6UJ]{其他幸存者}之间是什么关系？你最喜欢他们中的哪一位？最不喜欢哪一位？
  • 等这一切都结束后，你最期待去做什么？还是说，你早已放弃了再次见到阳光的希望？

冒险开始

每位PC都应该对自己在躲进莫黛莎的墓穴群避难之前，在尤阿的希望做些什么有一个大致想法。自那以后已经过去了六年，因此有些PC可能当时还只是青少年，后来在躲藏中长大成人；也可能当时只是平民，在塔巴丰的大军入侵时还不具备如今的技能。无论如何，PC在墓穴中的生活很可能始终笼罩在害怕被发现的忧虑之下，并因失去了如今所缺乏的那些生活享受而充满悲伤。

除了PC之外，一共有15名NPC也躲进了墓穴。被迫六年间清醒时刻几乎都待在一起之后，这些幸存者早已对彼此熟悉得不能再熟悉。在冒险开始之前，花些时间介绍这群角色，因为如果玩家并不关心同伴幸存者的命运，那么“死坟末土幸存者”中的恐怖元素就可能失去一部分冲击力。（请记住，虽然PC彼此熟悉，也熟悉其他幸存者，但玩家并不熟悉！）每位NPC的描述都可以在下方的“认识幸存者”部分找到。

随着冒险开始，幸存者们正在为他们的领袖塔莉娅·吉尔达女爵准备葬礼。她于前一天夜里在睡梦中去世。虽然塔莉娅女爵的死亡很平静（而且也不算完全出人意料，因为在进入墓穴之前她就已经年逾70），但幸存者们一直将这位前欧泽姆骑士视为力量的支柱，她的离世动摇了这个小小群体的意志。围绕为塔莉娅葬礼所做准备而展开的事件始于@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.LUrawCr6IwG4hg95]{这里}。虽然这些遭遇都不是完成本冒险所必需的，但运行它们是向玩家介绍这些NPC的一个简单方法。

然而，在开始之前，你必须做的最重要一件事，是指定一名PC担任康斯坦·鲁西的副手。出于对这名被选中PC安全的担忧，康斯坦从未详细解释过这一身份究竟意味着什么，只说自己是某个重要秘密的守护者，而一旦他身亡，这份重担就必须由该PC来承担。作为一名虔诚的艾奥梅黛的信徒，康斯坦会选择与继承者联系最深的那名PC作为自己的副手——如果有多名PC与艾奥梅黛的联系程度相近，就为每名PC秘密进行一次纯骰检定，并将这项责任交给胜者。一旦你决定了谁会成为康斯坦的副手，就将以下信息告知该PC。

  • 康斯坦·鲁西原本是纳勒斯·清泉爵士（虔诚的男性半身人、艾奥梅黛圣骑士 6）的副手；这位骑士受托保守终焉之墙这个国家的一项国家机密。
  • 无论这个秘密究竟是什么，它都被保存在一只藏在康斯坦住处中的@UUID[Item.QcHntn56sAxo4tNM]{红木箱}里。康斯坦将那只箱子的@UUID[Item.XJekph6UYrRempHa]{钥匙}挂在脖子上佩戴。作为康斯坦的副手，这名PC也被托付保管了一把这把钥匙的复制品，但康斯坦指示该PC，只有在自己死后才能打开箱子。
  • 自幸存者们躲进莫黛莎的墓穴以来，这名PC一直都替康斯坦保守着这个秘密。

“Gravelands Survivors” is a survival-horror story, and as such, it relies on the interactions of its characters—the PCs and the NPC survivors who accompany them­—for much of its impact. While there are certainly many combats to engage in (or avoid), be sure to allow time for roleplaying opportunities as well, as these scenes will give the players a chance to explore the survivors' relationships with one another.

As 1st-level characters, the PCs won't have much in terms of class abilities, feats, or magic items to define themselves. Instead, when making characters for “Gravelands Survivors,” try asking each of the players one or more of the following questions:

  • Were you born and raised in the town of Yua's Hope? Or were you simply a visitor caught in the wrong place at the wrong time?
  • How old were you the night the undead came to Yua's Hope? What circumstances allowed you to take refuge in the crypt? Were you forced to leave anyone behind?
  • Do you carry a special keepsake to remind you of your life before the undead arrived?
  • What is your relationship with the @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Abq1qUuIdHXMx6UJ]{other survivors}? Which one of them do you like the most? The least?
  • What do you look forward to doing once all this is over? Or have you already given up hope of ever seeing the sun again?

Getting Started

Each PC should have an idea of what they were doing in Yua’s Hope before they sought shelter in the crypts of Mordesha. Six years have passed since then, so some PCs might have been adolescents who came of age in hiding, or were civilians who lacked their current skills when Tar-Baphon’s forces invaded. Whatever the case, the PCs’ lives within the crypts have likely been fraught with worry about discovery and filled with woe for the luxuries they now lack.

Along with the PCs, a total of 15 NPCs took shelter in the crypts. After six years forced to spend every waking moment together, the survivors have gotten to know each other all too well. Before the adventure begins, take time to introduce this cast of characters, as the horror elements of “Gravelands Survivors” might lose their some of their impact if the players don’t care about the fate of their fellow survivors. (Keep in mind that while the PCs are familiar with each other and their fellow survivors, the players aren’t!) A description of each NPC can be found in the Meeting the Survivors section below.

As the adventure begins, the survivors prepare for the funeral of their leader, Dame Talia Gildar, who died in her sleep the previous evening. While Dame Talia’s death was peaceful (and not entirely unexpected, as she was well into her 70s before entering the crypts), the survivors relied on the former Knight of Ozem to be a bastion of strength, and her passing shakes the tiny community’s resolve. The events surrounding the preparations for Talia’s funeral begin @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.LUrawCr6IwG4hg95]{here}. While none of those encounters are required to complete the adventure, running them is an easy way to introduce the NPCs to the players.

The most important thing you must do before getting started, however, is to assign one of the PCs the role of Constan Russi’s second. Fearing for the chosen PC’s safety, Constan has never explained much about what this role entails, only that he’s the guardian of an important secret, a burden the PC must bear should he perish. As a faithful Iomedaean, Constan chooses for his second whichever PC has the strongest affiliation with the Inheritor—if multiple PCs have similar connections with Iomedae, roll a secret flat check for each PC and give the responsibility to the winner. Once you’ve determined who Constan’s second will be, share the following information with the PC.

  • Constan Russi was originally second to Sir Nalleth Clearwater (devout male halfling cavalier of Iomedae 6), a knight entrusted with a state secret of the nation of Lastwall.
  • Whatever this secret might be, it is kept within a @UUID[Item.QcHntn56sAxo4tNM]{redwood chest} hidden in Constan’s quarters. Constan wears a @UUID[Item.XJekph6UYrRempHa]{key} to the chest around his neck. As Constan’s second, the PC is entrusted with a copy of this key, but Constan has instructed the PC to open the chest only upon his death.
  • The PC has kept Constan’s secret the entire time the survivors have been in the crypts of Mordesha.

Meeting the Survivors.name: 认识幸存者 Meeting the Survivors
Meeting the Survivors.text:
PC们是这样一群人中的成员：当塔尔-巴丰的不死军队逼近尤阿之望镇时，他们逃入了摩黛莎的地穴。过去六年里，这15个人一直和PC们一起生活在地穴中。这个临时掩体并不大，而PC们也有足够多的时间去了解每一位与他们一同避难的人，因此请在冒险开始前花些时间向玩家介绍这些角色。

FVTT转换说明

本冒险没有为其他幸存者提供独特的属性栏，因为他们不太可能参与战斗。不过，我们仍然提供了简单精简的角色卡，可用于追踪用途以及在场景中放置指示物。按照@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{Yua's Hope}页面中的建议，我们以平民的属性栏为基础制作了这些角色卡。虽然我们做了一些小调整，例如应用体型和族裔特征，但我们并未通过为他们每个人创建自定义数据和能力来擅自增补冒险文本。

如果你想在你版本的暴君之爪中扩展这些角色的戏份，你可能会想亲自为每个NPC创建自定义属性栏。在这种情况下，你可以点击角色卡顶部的齿轮图标来启用角色卡的完整功能。在随后打开的角色卡配置窗口中，你可以在下拉菜单中选择“NPC Sheet”而不是“Simple NPC Sheet”，以查看完整属性栏。

矮人铁匠：在默语暴君到来之前，@UUID[Actor.lQDZMl0NsgDrVJTQ]{罗克维尔·硬眉}（沉思的女性矮人铁匠 1）是尤阿之望镇上的驻镇铁匠，专门为远征骑士打造胸甲。在所有幸存者中，罗克维尔对地下生活最不在意，但多年不见天日、除了自我反思之外几乎无事可做的岁月，让罗克维尔意识到自己是一名女性。“Rokvel”在矮人语中是个中性名字，因此她决定继续使用。她喜欢逻辑谜题，但对那些不愿意（或不能）尽自己本分的人几乎没有耐心。

改过自新的劫掠者：@UUID[Actor.JlyRbGndpRfsi0X8]{加拉格·日痕}（冷淡的男性兽人劳工 1）原本正跟随一支贝尔克岑劫掠者队伍进入最后之墙，这时默语暴君的大军来了。作为他要塞里资历最浅的战士，加拉格从未见识过真正的战斗，直到现在仍为自己当初面对不死生物时选择逃跑、而非与同袍一同战死感到羞愧。加拉格以冷淡和火爆脾气闻名（而持续不断的饥饿更让这一点雪上加霜）。自从进入地穴后，他一直很难与要塞外来的人合作。不过，每当有重活需要搬运时，幸存者们都逐渐依赖加拉格的力量，而这也让他深感自豪。

狐族斥候：狐族@UUID[Actor.rmI7BwRqjfUZLXRw]{乔诺·刷爪}（冷傲的男性狐族游侠 1）和他的人生伴侣@UUID[Actor.lsvWg5bSZ9bu9LyF]{伊露瓦}（凶悍的非二元性别狐族游侠 1）自幼便在最后之墙四处巡游。塔尔-巴丰的大军登陆最后之墙海岸时，刷爪一家和他们那两个调皮捣蛋的孩子@UUID[Actor.R46rzJznra6HN4EO]{雷茨纳芙}（害羞的女性狐族游牧者 0）与@UUID[Actor.RgiN9LkgZTtWgX54]{雷茨诺夫}（闹腾的男性狐族游牧者 0）尽可能向更多聚居地发出警告，其中也包括尤阿之望。由于他们的英勇行为，狐族一家获准进入地穴避难，自此之后便一直栖身于此。当幸存者们的物资眼看就要耗尽时，刷爪一家决定尽可能长时间维持狐狸形态，以减少食物消耗。如今他们主要通过用爪子在泥土里划图，或摇动尾巴做出粗略的手语来交流。雷茨纳芙和雷茨诺夫进入地穴时才10岁，而最近正经历一段难以管束的青春叛逆期。

守护者的副手：作为一名虔诚的艾奥梅黛信徒，@UUID[Actor.nMhsgkKwjs8wRIi6]{康斯坦·鲁西}在过去六年中一直向那些失意的幸存者布道，传递希望。他是个严肃而沉思的人，但总会向任何需要建议的人给予温和而睿智的指引。幸存者们之所以能够继续活下去，全靠康斯坦用魔法变出的稀粥；而他在第一章开头的死亡打破了原本脆弱的平衡，迫使众人不得不鼓起勇气，直面死坟末土的危险。除了某一位PC之外，没人知道康斯坦曾是前赤红守护者纳勒斯·清泉爵士的副手，而这位爵士曾发誓要守护藏在尤阿之望中的一件远古圣物。

孤儿：@UUID[Actor.Jixsv2JnSnmXOWf0]{马尔科·祛疫者}（阴郁的男性人类少年 0）的两位母亲都是奥泽姆骑士团成员，在塔尔-巴丰的军队围攻最后之墙时，她们正在外执行任务。大家都默认她们凶多吉少，尽管马尔科仍抱着希望，相信总有一天母亲们会回来。马尔科躲进地穴时只有8岁，如今却像石板路缝里疯长的野草一样迅速长高。他公然反抗权威，总是很快提醒其他幸存者：他们不是他的父母。不过，马尔科的许多敌意其实源于他的担忧——他正在不断长大，而他每多吃一口，就意味着其他幸存者能分到的食物更少一分。

退休领袖：在塔尔-巴丰用辐辉之火摧毁维吉尔之前，德高望重的塔莉娅·吉尔达女爵（虔诚的女性人类战略军官 5）曾被劝说退休，安享晚年；但她最终选择负责协调经过尤阿之望的补给线。当不死生物向她的城镇进军时，她没有重新拿起长剑，而是同意陪同幸存者们进入地穴，因为她相信自己冷静的头脑能够帮助那些恐慌的平民避免陷入混乱。塔莉娅女爵成了其他幸存者心中力量与决心的象征，但她最近的离世重创了所有人的士气。冒险开始时，幸存者们正准备为塔莉娅女爵举行葬礼。

表演者：巡回四人乐团@UUID[Actor.7uTAgYLqChpe4QGY]{艾里佐·夏德海姆}（虚荣的男性人类唱作人 1）、@UUID[Actor.uwYiQw8dVCUukPIT]{克雷希安·帕特塔普}（冷漠的男性半身人歌手 1），以及兄妹@UUID[Actor.DbmRY4vAzfw2tBW5]{克莱布}（顽皮的女性地精班卓琴手 1）和@UUID[Actor.WdqZls4he2bhWu9P]{比奇}（冲动的女性地精打击乐手 1），是在刷爪一家带着“不死生物正在入侵最后之墙”的可怕警告抵达的同一晚，进入尤阿之望避难的。六年过去，聒噪四重奏的招牌旋律——融合了艾里佐那滑稽又怨气冲冲的歌词、克雷希安尖酸刻薄的演绎，以及克莱布和比奇狂热的即兴发挥——一直鼓舞着幸存者们的精神。虽然表演者们小心地不过于频繁演出，以免音乐暴露他们在地表之下的位置、被上方的不死生物发现，但每当聒噪四重奏首演新歌时，其他幸存者都十分享受那种所有人都能感受到的紧张释放。

倒霉的厨师：尤阿之望希望之息旅店的前主厨@UUID[Actor.kmpUn4E5cr1YXzrl]{赫朵·普索玛}（焦虑的女性人类厨师 1），在塔尔-巴丰的大军袭击的那个晚上，发现自己那个一无是处、对婚姻不忠的丈夫竟打算和另一个男人私奔。没过多久，赫朵便发现自己怀孕了。六年后的今天，赫朵依然难以接受这样一个事实：她儿子@UUID[Actor.eEqwPTB9gB5NfHXA]{吉斯托洛}（好奇的男性人类幼童 -1）的父亲很可能已经死了。虽然她是个善良又勤奋的人，但她身上的紧张情绪常常会感染其他幸存者。值得庆幸的是，康斯坦·鲁西总是愿意耐心倾听赫朵的心声，而所有人都知道她爱上了这位牧师——除了康斯坦本人。

The PCs are among a group of people who fled into the crypts of Mordesha as Tar-Baphon's undead forces approached the town of Yua's Hope. For the past six years, these 15 people have lived in the crypts alongside the PCs. The makeshift bunker isn't large, and the PCs have had ample time to get to know everyone they've sheltered with, so take the time to introduce these characters to the players before the adventure begins.

FVTT Conversion Note

The adventure does not provide unique stat blocks for the other survivors, as it's unlikely that they will be involved in combat. However, we have still provided simple, streamlined actor sheets that can be used for tracking purposes and token placement on scenes. We used the Commoner stat block as the basis for these, as recommended in the @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{Yua's Hope} page. Though we have made small tweaks, such as applying the size and ancestry traits, we have not editoralised the adventure text by creating custom statistics and features for each of them.

If you would like to expand the roles of these characters in your version of Claws of the Tyrant, you might want to create custom stat blocks for each NPC yourself. In that case, you can enable the sheet's full functionality by clicking on the cog wheel icon at the top of the actor sheet. In the sheet configuration window that opens, you can choose 'NPC Sheet' instead of 'Simple NPC Sheet' in the drop-down menu to view the full stat block.

The Dwarf Smith: Before the arrival of the Whispering Tyrant, @UUID[Actor.lQDZMl0NsgDrVJTQ]{Rokvel Hardbrow} (contemplative female dwarf blacksmith 1) was Yua's Hope's resident blacksmith, specializing in the crafting of breastplates for crusading knights. Of all the survivors, Rokvel is the least concerned with living underground, but lightless years with little to do but self-reflect resulted in Rokvel realizing she was a woman. “Rokvel” is a gender-neutral name in Dwarven, so she decided to keep it. She enjoys logic puzzles but has little patience for those who don't (or can't) carry their own weight.

The Reformed Raider: @UUID[Actor.JlyRbGndpRfsi0X8]{Garaag Sunbrand} (standoffish male orc laborer 1) was accompanying a group of Belkzen raiders into Lastwall when the Whispering Tyrant's forces arrived. The freshest warrior in his hold, Garaag has never seen true battle and still feels shame for fleeing the undead rather than dying alongside his fellow warriors. Garaag is known for his standoffishness and short temper (a trait made worse by constant hunger). Since entering the crypts, he has struggled to cooperate with people from outside his hold. However, the survivors have come to rely on Garaag's strength whenever heavy lifting needs doing, which brings him great pride.

The Fox Scouts: The kitsune @UUID[Actor.rmI7BwRqjfUZLXRw]{Jono Brushpaw} (aloof male kitsune ranger 1) and his life partner @UUID[Actor.lsvWg5bSZ9bu9LyF]{Yiluva} (fierce nonbinary kitsune ranger 1) have ranged Lastwall since they were kits. When Tar-Baphon's forces arrived on Lastwall's shores, the Brushpaws and their rapscallion children @UUID[Actor.R46rzJznra6HN4EO]{Retsnav} (shy female kitsune nomad 0) and @UUID[Actor.RgiN9LkgZTtWgX54]{Retsnov} (rambunctious male kitsune n omad 0) warned as many settlements as they could, including Yua's Hope. For their bravery, the kitsune were offered a place within the crypts, and the family has sheltered there ever since. When it became clear the survivors' supplies would soon run out, the Brushpaws elected to spend as much time as possible in their fox forms, so as to consume less food. They now communicate primarily by pawing pictures in the dirt or waving their tails in a crude approximation of sign language. Retsnav and Retsnov were 10 years old when they entered the crypts and have recently been going through an unruly phase of adolescence.

The Keeper's Second: A devout Iomedaean, @UUID[Actor.nMhsgkKwjs8wRIi6]{Constan Russi} has spent the last six years delivering sermons of hope to the forlorn survivors. He is a serious, contemplative man, but he offers kind wisdom to anyone in need of advice. The survivors owe their continued existence to Constan's magically conjured gruel, and his death at the start of Chapter 1 destabilizes the status quo, forcing the group to brave the dangers of the Gravelands. Unbeknownst to all but a single PC, Constan was second to former Crimson Keeper Sir Nalleth Clearwater, who swore to defend an ancient relic hidden in Yua's Hope.

The Orphan: Both of @UUID[Actor.Jixsv2JnSnmXOWf0]{Marko Blightender}'s (brooding male human teenager 0) mothers were Knights of Ozem who were in the field when Tar-Baphon's forces laid siege to Lastwall. Everyone assumes the worst for them, although Marko holds out hope that someday his mothers will return. Marko was only eight when he took shelter in the crypts and is now growing like a weed through the cracks of a cobblestone road. Defiant of authority, he's quick to remind the other survivors that they aren't his parents. Much of Marko's belligerence, however, stems from his concerns that he's growing larger, and every bite he takes means less food for his fellow survivors.

The Retired Leader: Before Tar-Baphon destroyed Vigil with Radiant Fire, the venerable Dame Talia Gildar (devoted female human strategic officer 5) was urged to retire and enjoy her golden years; she settled for coordinating the supply lines that ran through Yua's Hope. When the undead marched on her town, rather than picking up a sword, she agreed to accompany the survivors into the crypts, believing her cool head would help keep the frightened civilians from panicking. Dame Talia became a symbol of strength and determination for the other survivors, but her recent passing has shaken everyone's morale. The adventure begins as the survivors prepare for Dame Talia's funeral.

The Performers: The traveling quartet @UUID[Actor.7uTAgYLqChpe4QGY]{Alyzo Shardhelm} (vain male human singer-songwriter 1), @UUID[Actor.uwYiQw8dVCUukPIT]{Crasian Pattertap} (uncaring male halfling vocalist 1), and siblings @UUID[Actor.DbmRY4vAzfw2tBW5]{Kleb} (mischievous female goblin banjoist 1) and @UUID[Actor.WdqZls4he2bhWu9P]{Bicky} (impulsive female goblin percussionist 1) took shelter in Yua's Hope the same night the Brushpaws arrived with their dire warning that undead were invading Lastwall. In the six years since, the Querulous Quartet's signature melodies—which combine Alyzo's humorously petulant lyrics, Crasian's sardonic delivery, and Kleb and Bicky's feverish improvising—have buoyed the survivors' spirits. While the performers are careful not to play too often, lest the music betray their location to the undead aboveground, the other survivors enjoy the release of tension everyone feels when the Querulous Quartet premieres their newest song.

The Unlucky Chef: The former chef at the Hope's Breath Inn in Yua's Hope, @UUID[Actor.kmpUn4E5cr1YXzrl]{Hurdauw Pulsoma} (anxious female human chef 1), discovered her no-good, cheat of a husband had plans to run off with another man the same night Tar-Baphon's forces attacked. Not long after, Hurdauw realized she was pregnant. Six years on, Hurdauw still grapples with the fact that the father of her son @UUID[Actor.eEqwPTB9gB5NfHXA]{Jystolo} (curious male human youngster -1) is likely dead. Though she is a kind and hard-working individual, her nervous energy often rubs off on the other survivors. Thankfully, Constan Russi has always offered Hurdauw an understanding ear, and everyone knows she's fallen for the priest—everyone except Constan, that is.

Logistics of Survival.name: 生存物资 Logistics of Survival
Logistics of Survival.text:
在运行“死坟末土幸存者”时，务必要记住，PC们和他们的幸存者同伴在过去六年里一直都不得不靠极其有限的补给勉强维生。虽然这些地穴起初储备了充足的食物与水，但在不死入侵后的几周内，这些口粮就耗尽了。自那以后，幸存者们便被迫依靠康斯坦·鲁西的魔法来维持生存。除了偶尔在地表探查时抓到的老鼠或顺手采来的几把浆果之外，幸存者们能吃的东西，就只有康斯坦每天施放造粮术 conjured出的稀粥。即便如此，饥饿依然始终是个挥之不去的问题，而成年人也常常轮流挨饿，尤其是在马尔科、吉斯托洛和刷爪一家较年幼的成员渐渐长大之后。对这些走投无路的幸存者来说，吃上一顿饱饭这种事不过是遥远的回忆。

其他奢侈品也同样稀缺。幸存者们除了当初躲进地穴时随身带来的物品之外，几乎一无所有。在罗克维尔·硬眉的指导下，他们学会了修理或改造损坏的物品，确保没有任何东西被浪费。即便看似毫无价值的东西，比如一块碎布或一枚弯掉的铁钉，对幸存者而言也有用处。地穴里的绝大多数物品都是大家公用的，不过个人或许也会保留少数珍爱的私人物品——通常是一些来自不死入侵之前那段时光的纪念品——仍然算作自己所有。

地穴内的照明由三颗附加了@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ynm8JIU3sc3qUMpa]{恒明术}的宝石提供。其中一颗放在靠近地穴入口的一处公共集会空间。另两颗则按需要在幸存者之间传递使用。（当然，所有幸存者都很熟悉这些地穴，即使在完全黑暗中，也能还算顺利地在其中行动。）当幸存者们在冒险后期被迫离开地穴时，PC们可以自由带走这些@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.mRz8Jmk4Q06SsZpC]{恒明宝石}，不过如果有些幸存者选择不与他们一同旅行，他们也可能会想留下一颗或更多颗给那些人。

When running “Gravelands Survivors,” it's important to remember that the PCs and their fellow survivors have had to make do with extremely limited supplies for the past six years. Although originally the crypts were well stocked with food and water, these rations ran out a few weeks after the undead invaded. Since then, the survivors have been forced to rely on Constan Russi's magic to sustain them. Aside from the occasional rat or handful of berries snatched during an aboveground foray, the survivors have had nothing to eat beyond the gruel conjured by Constan's daily castings of create food . Even so, starvation remains a constant concern, and the adults often take turns fasting, especially now that Marko, Jystolo, and the younger Brushpaws are growing older. For these desperate survivors, the notion of eating to one's fill is nothing but a distant memory.

Other luxuries are similarly scarce. The survivors own nothing other than the items they brought with them when they took shelter in the crypts. Under the tutelage of Rokvel Hardbrow, they've learned to repair or repurpose broken items so that nothing goes to waste. Even seemingly worthless items like a scrap of cloth or bent iron nail hold value to the survivors. Most everything in the crypts is shared communally, although individuals might have a few cherished possessions—usually keepsakes from their time before the undead invasion—that they still call their own.

Light within the crypts is provided by three gemstones enchanted with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ynm8JIU3sc3qUMpa]{everlight} spells. One of these gems is kept in a communal meeting space near the crypt's entrance. The other two are passed from survivor to survivor as needed. (Of course, all the survivors are familiar with the crypts and can negotiate them reasonably well, even in total darkness.) When the survivors are forced to leave the crypts later in the adventure, the PCs are free to take the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.mRz8Jmk4Q06SsZpC]{everlight gems} with them, although they might want to leave one or more for survivors who choose not to travel with them.

Preparing for Farewell.name: 准备告别 Preparing for Farewell
Preparing for Farewell.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙的地穴}

当玩家初次接触这些地穴及其当前处境时，播放此播放列表。

这场冒险开始于塔莉娅·吉尔德女爵去世后的第二天早晨。她曾是一位欧泽姆骑士，在幸存者被困于地穴中的这段时间里，始终担任他们的领袖与精神支柱。塔莉娅的离世深深震撼了幸存者们，但在消息逐渐被接受后，整个群体团结起来，为她筹备葬礼。尽管地穴中的气氛十分沉重（甚至比平时更甚），幸存者们仍决心向这位在过去六年中始终不懈地引领他们度过苦难的女性致以敬意。

以下遭遇旨在向玩家介绍那些他们的角色在地穴中结识的NPC。你可以先向玩家简要说明这些NPC的情况（如 @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Abq1qUuIdHXMx6UJ]{认识幸存者} 中所述），以便他们决定想要帮助谁。或者，康斯坦·鲁西也可能根据各个PC的个人长处分配不同任务。无论哪种情况，这些遭遇都可以按你选择的任意顺序进行，而且没有任何一个是完成后续冒险所必需的。请留意PC与各个NPC之间的关系，因为这可能会影响他们在冒险后续中与这些人的互动，尤其是在 @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.TiYaqCUySXFeZwB0]{事件7：维持和平} 期间。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha}

Play this playlist as the players are introduced to the crypts and their current situation.

The adventure begins the morning after the death of Dame Talia Gilder, a former Knight of Ozem who has served as the survivors’ leader and spiritual mainstay for the entirety of their time within the crypts. Talia’s passing shakes the survivors to their core, but once the news sets in, the community comes together to prepare her funeral. While the mood in the crypts is somber (even more than usual), the survivors are determined to pay their respects to the woman who unfailingly guided them through the hardships of the past six years.

The following encounters are designed to introduce the players to the NPCs their characters have gotten to know while in the crypts. Feel free to give the players a brief rundown of the NPCs (as described in @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Abq1qUuIdHXMx6UJ]{Meeting the Survivors}) so they can decide who they want to help. Alternatively, Constan Russi might assign the PCs various tasks based on their individual strengths. In either case, the encounters can be played in whatever order you choose, and none are required to complete the rest of the adventure. Take note of how the PCs relate to the various NPCs, as this might influence their interactions with these individuals later in the adventure, especially during @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.TiYaqCUySXFeZwB0]{Event 7: Keeping the Peace}.

Event 1: Unknown Epitaph.name: 事件1：未知墓志铭 Event 1: Unknown Epitaph
Event 1: Unknown Epitaph.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.mmYDWXjWbwNWfnJg]{未知墓志铭（层）}

将该播放列表作为环境音层叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙地穴} 播放列表之上。

PC们发现前铁匠罗克维尔·硬眉正在一座地下墓室中工作，当天傍晚稍晚些时候，塔莉娅女爵将安葬于此。罗克维尔为塔莉娅遗骸选定的石棺从未被使用过，因此缺少铭文，而这名矮人如今正苦于不知该如何开头。她还被刷爪一家分散了注意力；他们表面上是来帮忙的，但对此类事务几乎毫无经验。更糟的是，年幼的刷爪家成员并不完全理解塔莉娅离世的沉重意义，而他们的父母也难以管住这些吵闹好动的狐妖孩子。

PC们可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:15] 或适当的学识检定，帮助罗克维尔撰写塔莉娅女爵的墓志铭。PC也可以提出亲自雕刻铭文，但罗克维尔熟悉所有幸存者的技能，除非对方受过制作训练，否则她拒绝让任何人尝试。要将铭文完成到符合罗克维尔标准的程度，需要一次成功的 @Check[type:crafting|dc:17] 检定。或者，PC们也可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:performance|dc:13] 或 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:15] 检定来逗刷爪家的孩子们开心，好让罗克维尔有时间工作。

奖励：若PC们帮助罗克维尔完成塔莉娅女爵的墓志铭，则每人获得 10 XP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.mmYDWXjWbwNWfnJg]{Unknown Epitaph (Layer)}

Play playlist as a layer of ambience over the @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha} playlist.

The PCs find former blacksmith Rokvel Hardbrow working in the sepulchre where Dame Talia will be laid to rest later that evening. The sarcophagus Rokvel has selected for Talia's remains has never been used and thus lacks an inscription, and now the dwarf struggles with how to begin. She is distracted by the Brushpaws, who are ostensibly here to help but have little experience with such things. To make matters worse, the younger Brushpaws don't quite comprehend the gravity of Talia's passing, and their parents struggle to contain the rambunctious kitsune children.

The PCs can help Rokvel compose Dame Talia's epitaph by succeeding at a @Check[type:religion|dc:15] or appropriate Lore check. A PC can offer to carve the inscription themselves, but Rokvel is familiar with all the survivors' skills and refuses to let anyone make the attempt unless they are trained in Crafting. Finishing the inscription to Rokvel's standards requires a successful @Check[type:crafting|dc:17] check. Alternatively, the PCs can entertain the Brushpaw children, giving Rokvel time to work, by succeeding at a @Check[type:performance|dc:13] or @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:15] check.

Reward: Award the PCs 10 XP each for helping Rokvel complete Dame Talia's epitaph.

Event 2: Work Continues.name: 事件2：工作继续 Event 2: Work Continues
Event 2: Work Continues.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.XuFG3rMFNblDAMrC]{工作继续（层）}

将该播放列表作为环境音层叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙地穴} 播放列表之上。

当其余幸存者为塔莉娅女爵的葬礼做准备时，加拉格·日痕与马尔科·祛疫者正在一同加固地穴尽头一面摇摇欲坠的墙壁；这是塔莉娅生前列为高度优先的项目。加拉格和马尔科都因无法更直接地帮上忙而感到沮丧，但加拉格明白，自己的技能在这里最能发挥作用。另一方面，马尔科则闷闷不乐地坐在一具合上的石棺顶上，一边朝墙壁丢小石子，一边看着加拉格干活。

值得称道的是，加拉格对马尔科依然保持耐心，但若有PC成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{察言观色}，就会意识到，加拉格因为这男孩的懒散而冲他发火只是时间问题。（如果局势继续恶化，两人甚至可能会动起手来。）PC可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:15] 或 @Check[type:crafting|dc:15] 检定来加快工程进度。或者，一名角色可以尝试进行一次 @Check[type:intimidation|dc:15|traits:action:coerce] 检定，逼得马尔科羞愧起来去干活；也可以进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:17|traits:action:request] 检定，尽管马尔科没怎么出力，仍让加拉格保持冷静。

奖励：若PC帮助加拉格与马尔科加固墙壁，则每人获得 10 XP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.XuFG3rMFNblDAMrC]{Work Continues (Layer)}

Play playlist as a layer of ambience over the @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha} playlist.

While the rest of the survivors get ready for Dame Talia's funeral, Garaag Sunbrand and Marko Blightender work together to shore up a crumbling wall at the far end of the crypts, a project Talia made a high priority before her passing. Both Garaag and Marko are upset they can't help more directly, but Garaag recognizes his skills are put to best use here. Marko, on the other hand, sulks atop a closed sarcophagus, tossing pebbles at the wall while Garaag works.

To his credit, Garaag remains patient with Marko, but a PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} recognizes it's only a matter of time before Garaag snaps at the boy for his laziness. (The two might even come to blows if the situation is allowed to escalate.) The PCs can hurry the project along by succeeding at a @Check[type:athletics|dc:15] or @Check[type:crafting|dc:15] check. Alternatively, a character can attempt a @Check[type:intimidation|dc:15|traits:action:coerce] check to shame Marko into getting to work or a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:17|traits:action:request] check to keep Garaag calm despite Marko's lack of effort.

Reward: Award the PCs 10 XP each for helping Garaag and Marko shore up the wall.

Event 3: Preparing the Body.name: 事件3：整理遗体 Event 3: Preparing the Body
Event 3: Preparing the Body.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.YsoQfMglSn59qIzQ]{整理遗体（层）}

将该播放列表作为环境音层叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙的地穴} 播放列表之上播放。

在那处曾作为塔莉娅女爵私人居所的地穴中，康斯坦·鲁西正在为塔莉娅整理遗体，准备葬礼，而赫朵·普索玛则在整理她的随身遗物。两人大多默默无言地工作，不过若有角色成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{察言观色}，就会注意到悲痛欲绝的赫朵时常向康斯坦寻求安慰，让这位牧师在工作时分了心。与此同时，吉斯托洛正一点点靠近塔莉娅的遗体——尽管他是在地穴中长大的，这个小男孩却并不熟悉死亡，并怀疑塔莉娅女爵可能只是睡着了。

PC们可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:15] 检定，为塔莉娅女爵祈祷或以其他方式整理她的遗体，从而帮助康斯坦。由GM酌情决定，也可以用其他技能替代宗教；例如，受训于制作或战争学识的角色，可以通过擦亮塔莉娅的胸甲和长剑来帮忙。或者，成功通过一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:13] 或 @Check[type:performance|dc:13] 检定的角色，可以安慰赫朵或分散吉斯托洛的注意力，让康斯坦得以安静地完成工作。

奖励：帮助康斯坦整理塔莉娅女爵遗体的每位PC获得 10 XP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.YsoQfMglSn59qIzQ]{Preparing the Body (Layer)}

Play playlist as a layer of ambience over the @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha} playlist.

In the crypt that served as Dame Talia's personal quarters, Constan Russi prepares Talia's body for the funeral, while Hurdauw Pulsoma sorts through her personal effects. The two work mostly in silence, although a character who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:sense-motive,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} notices that the grief-stricken Hurdauw often turns to Constan for comfort, distracting the cleric from his work. Meanwhile, Jystolo inches ever closer to Talia's remains—despite having grown up in the crypts, the young boy is unfamiliar with death and suspects Dame Talia might be only sleeping.

The PCs can help Constan by succeeding at a @Check[type:religion|dc:15] check to say a prayer over Dame Talia or otherwise prepare her remains. At the GM's discretion, a different skill might be used in place of Religion; a character trained in Crafting or Warfare Lore, for example, could help by polishing Talia's breastplate and sword. Alternatively, a character who succeeds at a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:13] or @Check[type:performance|dc:13] check can comfort Hurdauw or distract Jystolo, allowing Constan to finish his work in peace.

Reward: Award the PCs 10 XP each for helping Constan prepare Dame Talia's body.

Event 4: A Funeral Dirge.name: 事件4：葬礼挽歌 Event 4: A Funeral Dirge
Event 4: A Funeral Dirge.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.Jco0ZqsRqplGtheR]{葬礼挽歌（层）}

将该播放列表作为环境音层，叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{摩德沙地穴} 播放列表之上播放。

聒噪四重奏那种不按常理出牌的风格，几乎不给挽歌留下余地。尽管塔莉娅女爵的死让乐师们悲伤不已，他们却苦于想不出一首适合她葬礼的歌曲。艾里佐独自坐在角落里，用一根木炭条记下几句歌词的片段，然后又立刻划掉。与此同时，地精兄妹碧奇和克莱布在谱写曲调时制造出可怕的喧闹声。而在同伴们忙碌时，克雷希安徒劳地试图打个盹。

要说服这些乐师齐心协力完成他们的歌曲，需要三次成功的 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:13] 或 @Check[type:intimidation|dc:13] 检定（分别对应艾里佐、碧奇和克莱布，以及克雷希安）。PC也可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:performance|dc:15] 检定，自己想出一首歌。或者，PC也可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:religion|dc:17] 检定，引用一段合适的经文来激励这些乐师。

奖励：若PC帮助聒噪四重奏谱写出塔莉娅女爵的葬礼挽歌，则每人获得 10 XP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.Jco0ZqsRqplGtheR]{A Funeral Dirge (Layer)}

Play playlist as a layer of ambience over the @UUID[Playlist.8AsIAaw8mJDDRGKk]{Crypts of Mordesha} playlist.

The Querulous Quartet's offbeat style leaves little room for elegies. Though Dame Talia's death saddens the musicians, they struggle to come up with a song appropriate for her funeral. Alyzo sits by himself in one corner, jotting down (and summarily crossing out) snatches of lyrics with a stick of charcoal. Meanwhile, the goblin siblings Bicky and Kleb make a terrible racket as they compose the tune. As his fellow band members work, Crasian attempts in vain to take a nap.

Convincing the musicians to work together and finish their song requires three successful @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:13] or @Check[type:intimidation|dc:13] checks (one each for Alyzo, Bicky and Kleb, and Crasian). A PC can come up with their own song by succeeding at a @Check[type:performance|dc:15] check. Alternatively, a PC can inspire the musicians by quoting an appropriate passage of scripture with a successful @Check[type:religion|dc:17] check.

Reward: Award the PCs 10 XP each for helping the Querulous Quartet compose Dame Talia's funeral dirge.

Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts.name: 事件5：墓穴中的灾难 Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts
Event 5: Catastrophe in the Crypts.text:
场景

@UUID[Scene.tIZ5fHhY7FA930WS]

这场遭遇发生在地下墓窖中，也是该处唯一的一场战斗遭遇。

播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.Pq0jJIUxTcan6QHm]

当你接近康斯坦悼词的结尾时，播放这个列表，以引出塔莉娅的苏醒和随后的战斗。

宏

@UUID[Macro.lUm8OEdLo3zC6HAr]

显示丧尸化的塔莉娅女爵的棋子，并隐藏代表她尸体的图块。

幸存者们用这一天剩余的时间完成葬礼的最后准备。那天夜里，他们聚集在地下墓窖的一处偏厅中，向塔莉娅女爵道别。她身着十字军铠甲与最后壁垒的华服，这位坚毅的女子看起来已为踏上通往来世的最后一场征途做好了万全准备。康斯坦·鲁西身穿白红相间的艾奥梅黛教士长袍，站在幸存者们面前。他翻开一本破旧的《艾奥梅黛行传》，找到相关段落，开始了悼词。

“朋友们。共同的幸存者们。家人们。”康斯坦·鲁西说道，在墓室昏暗的光线中微微眯起双眼。“今夜，我们在此颂扬塔莉娅·吉尔达女爵——欧泽姆骑士、最后壁垒的十字军——的一生与遗泽。在她的指引下，自从不死生物第一次来到我们的海岸后，这个会众熬过了许多个漫长的夜晚。也许既不舒适，也不安宁，但我们能够坚持下来，正是因为塔莉娅女爵的力量与智慧。如今，亡墓女士已到召唤塔莉娅前往浩瀚众界的时候了，在那里，她将加入艾奥梅黛的光辉大军，对抗邪恶势力。

“我想我代表我们所有人，为这位已故女爵的人格作证。塔莉娅是一位 honorable 的十字军，也是一位睿智的骑士。她是关怀备至的朋友，是能给予安慰的知己。对某些人来说，她更如同母亲一般。”

人群低声附和，康斯坦继续讲道：“每当我回想与塔莉娅共度的时光，我便会想到艾奥梅黛第四幕，以及塔莉娅女爵的勇气是如何在诸多方面都映照出继承者的风范。正如第四幕提醒我们的那样，在恩卡山腾第二战役中，艾奥梅黛曾面对一大群不死怨灵。那是深夜时分，她和她的同伴们正直面死亡冰冷的攫握。但艾奥梅黛没有绝望，而是将她的利刃举向无日的天空，呼唤了阿罗登的先驱阿拉兹妮。‘夜晚寒冷而黑暗，’艾奥梅黛宣告道，‘但天堂的太阳比最凄 bleak 的黑夜燃烧得更加明亮。’正如她所宣告的那样，骑士们坚持了下来，而当援军在黎明破晓时抵达时，没有一个人丧命。”

一阵寒意顺着在场者的脊背爬下，与康斯坦话语中充满希望的语调形成奇异的反差。若康斯坦察觉到了这种感觉，他似乎也并未放在心上。“我们如今的处境与那些骑士十分相似，在等待救援的这六个漫长年头后，我们疲惫而恐惧。但就像继承者一样，塔莉娅女爵总在那里激励着我们。她也许已经离去，但她的话语永远不会被遗忘。正因如此，塔莉娅从不会真正离开我们，只要我们汲取——”

“看，妈妈！”年幼的吉斯托洛突然叫道。他拽着母亲的袖子，指向康斯坦·鲁西身后的棺材。“塔莉娅没有死！”

惊恐的尖叫声充满了墓室，塔莉娅女爵的尸体在棺中踉跄着站了起来。还没等任何人反应过来，那具尸体便猛扑向康斯坦·鲁西，一口撕开了牧师的喉咙。

@UUID[Actor.aWiTcxAySoYjUP6T]{疫病丧尸（2）}

中等 1

塔莉娅·吉尔达女爵作为一只疫病丧尸自死者中复起，只用一口便杀死了康斯坦·鲁西。康斯坦死去四轮后，他也会作为一只疫病丧尸复起。二者会不分对象地攻击幸存者，不过会优先攻击那些在近战中与它们交战的PC。虽然PC们可能会犹豫，不愿攻击昔日的朋友，但要向玩家强调，这些丧尸充满憎恨的眼中已没有他们曾经熟悉之人的任何痕迹。同样，也要让玩家明白，康斯坦·鲁西所受的伤势当场致命，这位牧师已经完全没有被救活的希望了。

危害：当塔莉娅女爵攻击康斯坦·鲁西时，其他NPC会一齐冲向墓室出口。秩序混乱的幸存者们会让房间变为困难地形，不过PC可以采取一个具有听觉和语言（特征）的动作，并尝试一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:15] 或 @Check[type:intimidation|dc:15] 检定来掌控局面。若成功，幸存者会在该轮结束时清空房间。若PC未采取任何行动帮助他们组织撤离，其他幸存者会在第四轮结束时撤出房间。

不死尸体：疫病丧尸被击败后，PC可以检查它们的尸体，以弄清究竟发生了什么。角色若通过一次 @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|traits:action:recall-knowledge] 或 @Check[type:religion|dc:20|traits:action:recall-knowledge] 回忆知识，便能辨认出塔莉娅女爵和康斯坦·鲁西都显现出感染尸腐病的迹象，不过两人的疾病扩散速度都远比正常情况更快。PC并不知道，曾经充盈于地下墓窖中的虚空能量仍残留在塔莉娅女爵的墓室里，而这正是塔莉娅与康斯坦迅速转化的根源。如果有任何PC在战斗中感染了尸腐病，他们可能会担心自己也会变成丧尸。虽然从长期来看这的确值得担忧，但除非该PC逗留在塔莉娅女爵的墓室中，否则病程并不会比正常情况进展得更快。

  • @UUID[Actor.RlI5yIlobFWOyU2K]{塔莉娅女爵的棺材}
  • @UUID[Actor.07fZPltmaEEFdFvR]{塔莉娅女爵的遗骸}
  • @UUID[Actor.DpMRaHZ2kzfvHlnM]{康斯坦·鲁西的遗骸}

宝藏与后续发展：塔莉娅女爵和康斯坦·鲁西都穿着探索者服装，并佩戴着艾奥梅黛的银质圣徽。塔莉娅女爵还穿着她的胸甲，而她的长剑和盾牌依然放在她敞开的棺材里。康斯坦携带着他的那本《艾奥梅黛行传》，以及一把镶嵌红紫水晶的银钥匙。康斯坦的副手立刻认出了这把钥匙，因为他们自己也携带着一把相似的。该钥匙可以打开藏在康斯坦房间中的箱子（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.8sGvoOyehQxYBv4u]{事件6：牧师的房间}）。如果PC将这些物品据为己有，幸存者们也不会有任何怨言，尤其是在冒险后期全体成员离开地下墓窖之后。

奖励：如果至少有一名角色在与丧尸作战期间掌控局面并疏散了惊慌的人群，则给予每名角色10 XP。

Scene

@UUID[Scene.tIZ5fHhY7FA930WS]

This encounter takes place in the crypts and is the only combat encounter located there.

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.Pq0jJIUxTcan6QHm]

When you approach the end of Constan's Eulogy, play this playlist to lead into Talia's rising and the subsequent combat.

Macro

@UUID[Macro.lUm8OEdLo3zC6HAr]

Reveal the token for the zombified Dame Talia and hides the tile representing her body.

The survivors spend the remainder of the day finishing their preparations for the funeral. That night, they gather in a wing of the crypts to say goodbye to Dame Talia Gilder. Clad in crusader armor and Lastwall finery, the stalwart woman looks fully prepared for one last quest into the afterlife. Constan Russi stands before the survivors in his white and crimson Iomedaean cassock. Opening a battered copy of the Acts of Iomedae to a relevant passage, he begins his requiem.

“Friends. Fellow survivors. Family,” Constan Russi says, his eyes squinting in the sepulchre's dim light. “Tonight we celebrate the life and legacy of Dame Talia Gildar, Knight of Ozem and crusader of Lastwall. Under her guidance, this congregation has survived many long nights since the undead first arrived on our shores. Perhaps neither comfortably nor peacefully, but we endure because of the strength and wisdom of Dame Talia. Now the time has come for the Lady of Graves to beckon Talia to the Great Beyond, where she will join Iomedae's glorious host against the forces of evil.

“I know I speak for all of us when I attest to the late Dame's character. Talia was an honorable crusader and a wise knight. A caring friend and a comforting confidant. To some, she was as a mother.”

Voices murmur in agreement as Constan continues his sermon. “When I reflect upon my time with Talia, I think of the Fourth Act of Iomedae, and how Dame Talia's bravery mirrored that of the Inheritor in so many ways. As the Fourth Act reminds us, at the Second Battle of Encarthan, Iomedae faced a horde of undead wraiths. It was the dead of night, and she and her company were staring down the icy grasp of death. But rather than despair, Iomedae lifted her blade toward the sunless sky and evoked Lord Aroden's herald, Arazni. ‘The night is cold and dark,' Iomedae proclaimed, ‘but Heaven's sun burns brighter than the bleakest night.' As she declared, so the knights endured, and when reinforcements arrived at the break of dawn, not a soul had perished.”

A chill runs down the spines of those in attendance, in strange contrast to the hopeful tone of Constan's words. If Constan notices the feeling, he seems to pay it no mind. “We find ourselves much like those knights, tired and fearful after awaiting rescue these six long years. But like the Inheritor, Dame Talia was always there to inspire us. She may be gone, but her words will never be forgotten. In this way, Talia will never truly leave us, not so long as we draw—”

“Look, Mama!” young Jystolo chirps. Tugging at his mother's sleeve, he points to the casket behind Constan Russi. “Talia's not dead!”

Shocked screams fill the sepulchre as the corpse of Dame Talia staggers to its feet inside its casket. Before anyone can act, the body lunges at Constan Russi, ripping out the priest's throat with its jaws.

@UUID[Actor.aWiTcxAySoYjUP6T]{Plague Zombies (2)}

Moderate 1

Dame Talia Gildar has risen from the dead as a plague zombie, killing Constan Russi with a single bite. Four rounds after Constan dies, he also rises as a plague zombie. The two lash out at the survivors indiscriminately, although they focus their attacks on any PCs who engage the zombies in melee. While the PCs might be hesitant to attack their former friends, stress to the players that no sign of the people they once knew remains in the zombies' hate-filled eyes. Similarly, make it clear to the players that the wound Constan Russi suffered was instantly fatal, and that the priest is beyond any hope of saving.

Hazard: When Dame Talia attacks Constan Russi, the other NPCs bolt as one to the sepulchre's exit. The disorderly survivors make the room difficult terrain, although a PC can take charge of the situation by using an action with the auditory and linguistic traits and attempting a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:15] or @Check[type:intimidation|dc:15] check. On a success, the survivors clear out of the room at the end of the round. If the PCs do not take any actions to help them organize, the other survivors clear out of the room at the end of the fourth round.

The Unliving Corpses: Once the plague zombies are defeated, the PCs can examine their bodies to figure out what happened. A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:medicine|dc:20|traits:action:recall-knowledge] or @Check[type:religion|dc:20|traits:action:recall-knowledge] to Recall Knowledge identifies that Dame Talia and Constan Russi show signs of zombie rot infection, although in both cases the disease appears to have spread far more quickly than normal. Unbeknownst to the PCs, the void energy that once suffused the crypts still lingers in Dame Talia's sepulchre and is the source of both Talia's and Constan's rapid transformation. If any of the PCs contracted zombie rot in the battle, they might be worried about becoming a zombie themselves. While this is certainly a concern in the long term, unless the PC lingers in Dame Talia's sepulchre, the disease progresses no more quickly than normal.

  • @UUID[Actor.RlI5yIlobFWOyU2K]{Dame Talia's Casket}
  • @UUID[Actor.07fZPltmaEEFdFvR]{Dame Talia's Remains}
  • @UUID[Actor.DpMRaHZ2kzfvHlnM]{Constan Russi's Remains}

Treasure and Development: Both Dame Talia and Constan Russi wear explorer's clothing and a silver religious symbol of Iomedae. Dame Talia also wears her breastplate, and her longsword and shield still lie within her open casket. Constan carries his copy of the Acts of Iomedae, as well as a silver key inlaid with red amethyst. Constan's second immediately recognizes this key, as they carry a similar one themselves. The key opens the chest hidden in Constan's quarters (see @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.8sGvoOyehQxYBv4u]{Event 6: The Priest's Quarters}). None of the survivors begrudge the PCs if they take any of these items for themselves, especially once the group abandons the crypts later in the adventure.

Reward: Award each character 10 XP if at least one of them takes charge of the situation and clears out the panicked crowd during the battle with the zombies.

Event 6: The Priest's Quarters.name: 事件6：牧师的房间 Event 6: The Priest's Quarters
Event 6: The Priest's Quarters.text:
地穴群尽头的一间骨堂中存放着康斯坦·鲁西的个人物品，包括一张小床和铺盖卷、一套替换衣物，以及一个外表朴素的箱子。

搜索房间：这个外表朴素的箱子没有上锁，也与PC们的钥匙不匹配；其中装着的几件纪念品对康斯坦有个人意义，但对角色而言毫无价值。若PC们花费10分钟@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}这间房间，他们会发现第二个箱子，它藏在一堆骨头后方的壁龛里。若某位PC成功通过一次@Check[type:perception|dc:20|traits:action:search]，则能在1分钟内找到这个箱子。

@UUID[Actor.pjk27lp8Jj71YsWI]{康斯坦·鲁西的箱子}：与另一个箱子不同，这只箱子用红木精工制成，并镶有白银。用任意一把钥匙打开箱子后，便会露出其中的内容：一封信和一个卡诺卜罐，罐盖被雕刻成一个奇异怪物的头骨模样。

当PC们查看这封信时，向玩家提供@UUID[JournalEntry.I9vtuKQwZsvvx14h.JournalEntryPage.Y3kDORo6aq8MrxxR]{展示材料#1}。这个卡诺卜罐会让任何触碰到它的人脊背发凉。这个罐子就是肺血石，四件传奇@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}之一。

宝藏：这个红木箱子制作精良，配有一把普通的锁。箱子本身价值20 gp，若连同钥匙一起则价值30 gp。单独来看，箱子的钥匙每把价值2 gp。

奖励：每位PC因发现阿拉兹尼的肺血石而获得30 XP。

An ossuary at the far end of the crypts contains the personal effects of Constan Russi, including a cot and bedroll, a change of clothes, and a plain-looking chest.

Searching the Chamber: The plain-looking chest isn't locked and doesn't match the PCs' keys; the few keepsakes it contains were of personal significance to Constan but are of no value to the characters. If the PCs @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the chamber for 10 minutes, they discover a second chest hidden in a niche behind a stack of bones. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:20|traits:action:search] finds the chest in 1 minute instead.

@UUID[Actor.pjk27lp8Jj71YsWI]{Constan Russi's Chest}: Unlike the other chest, this one is finely crafted of redwood and bound with silver. Using either of the keys to unlock the chest reveals its contents: a letter and a canopic jar, its lid carved to resemble the skull of a strange monster.

When the PCs examine the letter, provide the players with @UUID[JournalEntry.I9vtuKQwZsvvx14h.JournalEntryPage.Y3kDORo6aq8MrxxR]{Handout #1}. The canopic jar sends a shiver down the spine of anyone who touches it. The jar is the Lung Bloodstone , one of the four legendary @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni}.

Treasure: The redwood chest is finely made and fitted with an average lock. The chest alone is worth 20 gp, or 30 gp if the keys are included. Individually, the chest's keys are worth 2 gp each.

Reward: Award each PC 30 XP for discovering the Lung Bloodstone of Arazni .

Event 7: Keeping the Peace.name: 事件7：维持和平 Event 7: Keeping the Peace
Event 7: Keeping the Peace.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.9xTNIqEvgVZHmZ9n]{维持和平}

剩余幸存者间不满的声音。

在通往墓穴外部台阶底部的一间宽敞前厅，过去六年来一直被幸存者们用作公共集会场所。尽管这里摆满了破损剥落的告示牌和被遗忘十字军战士的半身像，这片空间相较之下仍算整洁，尽管年久失修。平时，这里总挤满了在彼此陪伴中寻求慰藉的人；而现在，空气中回荡着如刀剑相击般的声音，幸存者们正争论接下来该怎么办。

此刻声音最大的是赫朵·普索玛。随着康斯坦·鲁西的死，她终于意识到自己永远失去了向那个男人倾诉爱意的机会。在其他幸存者试图安慰她数分钟后，克雷希安终于对这个啜泣不止的女人失去了耐心。“我们现在有更大的问题，”这名半身人厉声说道，“比如，我们接下来吃什么？”这番爆发让其他幸存者喊得更凶了，一时间，局势仿佛就要升级成暴力冲突。本节使用影响社交遭遇规则（《GM 核心》第187页）来体现PC们试图重新恢复和平并巩固自己作为团队领导者地位的努力。

PC们必须在塔莉娅女爵和康斯坦·鲁西死后，证明自己值得带领这些幸存者。每轮中，每名PC都可以尝试对一名NPC进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.6Oe9dg3Lu10slyeC]{Influence}，或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JLPY5hl4qiJ1zLi1]{Discover}有关他们的某些信息。（PC们很可能已经知道自己所刺探到的大部分信息，但这一行动代表PC们在不断加剧的恐慌中急中生智，并灵活运用这些知识。）在其他幸存者决定是否把信任交给PC们之前，PC们有10分钟（每轮1分钟）的时间。在遭遇期间，任何被PC成功影响的NPC都会变得配合，这表示该NPC开始试探性地信任PC们的领导。若PC继续以正面方式影响一名配合的NPC，他们还可能获得该NPC的幸存者馈赠。虽然未能影响任何人并不会阻止PC们推进剧情，但如果他们选择与其他幸存者同行，那么幸存者馈赠会在之后的冒险中帮助他们（见@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.3Q9d79ZzgmN9bfm2]{自救}中的“在死坟末土求生”）。

奖励：在遭遇期间，每有一名NPC变为配合，就给予PC们10 XP。为计算XP之目的，成组的NPC（例如刷爪一家或碧奇和克莱布）算作一名NPC。

后续发展：在遭遇结束时，PC们应与其余幸存者讨论，既然康斯坦和塔莉娅女爵都已死去，现在该怎么办。所有人都认为必须放弃墓穴，而他们求生的最佳机会是前往最近的已知聚居地——60多英里外的城市维鲁米斯。不过，许多幸存者对旅程该如何进行有不同看法。有些人（尤其是加拉格和刷爪一家）认为他们最好的机会是分头行动，而另一些人则认为集体同行更明智。如果PC们赢得了某名NPC的配合，那名幸存者就会赞同队伍的建议——无论PC们主张幸存者抱团同行，还是分成几个小组。若PC们没有赢得某位幸存者的配合，那名幸存者便会决定与其他幸存者分道扬镳，独自闯一闯。这两种结果都会在冒险余下的部分带来后果。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.9xTNIqEvgVZHmZ9n]{Keeping the Peace}

The sounds of discontent among the remaining survivors.

A sizable antechamber at the base of the steps leading out of the crypts has served as a communal meeting space for the survivors for the past six years. Though filled with crumbling placards and the busts of forgotten crusaders, the space is relatively clean, despite its disrepair. Normally filled with people seeking solace in each other's company, the air now rings with voices like clashing blades as the survivors argue about what to do next.

The loudest of the voices is currently that of Hurdauw Pulsoma, who, with Constan Russi's death, now realizes she has forever lost her chance to admit her love for the man. After several minutes during which the other survivors attempt to console her, Crasian loses patience with the sobbing woman. “We have bigger problems now,” the halfling snaps. “Namely, what are we going to eat?” The outburst causes the other survivors to begin shouting even louder, and for a moment it seems the situation will escalate to violence. This section uses the influence social encounter rules ( Pathfinder GM Core 187) to reflect the PCs' attempt to reestablish peace and cement their role as leaders of the group.

The PCs must prove they're worthy of leading the survivors in the wake of Dame Talia and Constan Russi's deaths. Every round, each PC can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.6Oe9dg3Lu10slyeC]{Influence} one NPC or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JLPY5hl4qiJ1zLi1]{Discover} something about them. (The PCs likely already know most of the information they're Discovering, but the activity represents the PCs thinking on their feet and applying that knowledge amid the growing panic.) The PCs have 10 minutes (1 minute per round) before the other survivors decide whether to place their faith in the PCs. During the encounter, any NPCs the PCs successfully influence become cooperative, which represents that NPC tentatively trusting the PCs' leadership. If the PCs continue to positively influence a cooperative NPC, they might earn that NPC's survivor boon. While failing to influence anyone doesn't prevent the PCs from progressing in the story, survivor boons can help them later in the adventure if they choose to travel with the other survivors (see Surviving in the Gravelands in @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.3Q9d79ZzgmN9bfm2]{Rescuing Ourselves}).

Reward: Award the PCs 10 XP for each NPC who becomes cooperative during the encounter. For the purposes of awarding XP, groups of NPCs (such as the Brushpaws or Bicky and Kleb) count as one NPC.

Development: At the end of the encounter, the PCs should discuss with the rest of the survivors what to do now that Constan and Dame Talia are dead. Everyone believes the crypts must be abandoned and that their best chance for survival is to head to the nearest known settlement, the city of Vellumis, which lies over 60 miles away. However, many survivors have differing opinions about how the journey should be made. Some (notably Garaag and the Brushpaws) believe their best chance is to separate, while others see the wisdom of traveling in a group. If the PCs earned an NPC's cooperation, that survivor goes along with the party's suggestions, whether the PCs push for the survivors to stick together or split into groups. If the PCs didn't earn a survivor's cooperation, that survivor decides to part ways with the other survivors and make a go of it alone. Both outcomes have consequences during the rest of the adventure.

Priestly Affairs.name: 牧师遗志 Priestly Affairs
Priestly Affairs.text:
被康斯坦·鲁西选作自己第二继承人的角色，很可能还记得多年前康斯坦让他们许下的承诺，并且现在会想要去搜索与队伍目前持有的那对钥匙相配的锁。不过首先，PC们也可能会选择安抚他们幸存下来的同伴。随着康斯坦的死亡，恐惧迅速在幸存者之间蔓延，因为他们所有人都已开始依赖康斯坦用魔法提供的食物与水来维持求生。接下来的两个事件可以按任意顺序进行，但这里的呈现假定队伍会先调查康斯坦的住处，这样PC们就能在确立自己作为幸存者新领袖的地位之前，先将阿拉兹尼的肺血石纳入手中。

The character Constan Russi selected as his second likely remembers what Constan made them promise years ago and will want to search for the lock matching the twin keys now in the party's possession. But first, the PCs might choose to console their fellow survivors. With Constan's death, dread spreads quickly among the survivors, as all of them have come to rely on Constan's magical supply of food and water for survival. While the next two events can be played in either order, they're presented assuming the party investigates Constan's quarters first, so that the PCs can have the Lung Bloodstone of Arazni in their possession before asserting themselves as the new leaders of the survivors.

Rescuing Ourselves.name: 自救 Rescuing Ourselves
Rescuing Ourselves.text:
PC们和其他幸存者没花多久就收拾好自己的东西，在墓穴入口处集合。墓穴的大门从内侧用一根沉重的木梁闩住，对幸存者而言，这扇门一直是安全的象征，是抵御外面那些不死威胁的壁垒。它通向@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.SBRSwz1gqFWFiB0r]{万旋大教堂}的地下室——这是一座献给法拉斯玛的神殿，在尤娅的希望建立时，修建于莫德莎的墓穴之上。除了偶尔几次冒险前往地表搜集急需的补给之外，这扇门几乎从不打开。对许多幸存者来说，这是他们六年来第一次离开墓穴。

在死坟末土求生

若没有魔法来源的食物与水，PC们就必须靠觅食来维持自己前往维鲁米斯旅途中的生存。如果PC们说服其他幸存者与他们同行，这些NPC同样需要食物与水，但也可能为队伍带来幸存者馈赠。无论PC们如何行动，他们在前往维鲁米斯的旅途中都将不得不做出一些艰难的抉择。

食物与水

PC们开始前往维鲁米斯的旅程时没有任何食物或水，必须通过觅食求生。在旅途的大部分时间里，要@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{维生}都需要进行一次@Check[type:survival|dc:17|traits:action:subsist]。请记住，如果PC们与其他幸存者同行，除了他们自己之外，还有更多张嘴要喂。虽然在前往维鲁米斯的路上不太可能有人因缺乏食物或水而死去，但被迫挨饿受渴的NPC可能会怀疑自己跟随PC们的决定，甚至干脆离开队伍。同样，缺乏充足食物与水的PC也可能在抵达目的地之前就承受饥饿的早期影响（GM 核心 43）。

士气

死坟末土中的许多遭遇都会削弱PC同伴幸存者们的意志。确保所有人齐心协力，在前往维鲁米斯的旅途中活下来，这个责任落在PC们身上。特别忠诚的NPC甚至可能为队伍带来幸存者馈赠——一种能帮助PC们在死坟末土中生存下去的独特奖励！

根据“维持和平”遭遇的结果，与PC们同行的NPC在死坟末土中的冒险开始时会处于“配合”或“忠诚”两种状态之一。配合的NPC会陪同PC们前往维鲁米斯，但对PC们的领导能力心存疑虑。忠诚的NPC则会将全部信任寄托于PC们，并给予他们一项幸存者馈赠。若一名忠诚的NPC一再被迫挨饿、被置于危险之中，或受到其他不当对待，他可能会降为仅仅配合，并收回自己的幸存者馈赠。同样，若一名配合的NPC受到苛待，也可能决定离开队伍、独自上路。PC们应努力确保尽可能多的NPC保持忠诚，因为这样会大大提高所有人活着抵达维鲁米斯的几率。

幸存者馈赠

狐狸觅食术（Brushpaws）：Brushpaws会狩猎并采集，帮助为队伍其余成员提供食物。每名PC都获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{觅食者}技能专长的好处，即使他们未受训于求生亦然。此外，拥有Brushpaws幸存者馈赠的PC若使用求生进行维生的时间少于8小时，也不会承受通常的-5减值。

忍饥耐饿（Garaag）：贝尔克岑的兽人以自己在资源匮乏时也能忍耐为傲。如果Garaag陪同PC们前往维鲁米斯，那么必要时他可以在整个旅程中禁食，而且仅仅因为缺少食物并不足以让他离开队伍。

厨师匠心（Hurdauw）：Hurdauw负责为队伍烹饪，确保所有餐食都营养充足、足以饱腹。只要他们在过去24小时内吃过Hurdauw做的一餐，幸存者对抗疾病的强韧豁免便可以掷两次并取较佳结果。这是一个幸运效果。

行军之歌（聒噪四重奏）：在疾行时，幸存者使用PC们之中最高的体质调整值，而非最低的体质调整值，来决定他们能疾行多久。要获得这项馈赠，聒噪四重奏的四名成员必须全部与队伍同行，且全都必须保持忠诚。

年轻耐力（Marko）：Marko坚持前进的意愿极具感染力。PC们即使在疲乏时也可以使用探索活动，不过在进行这些活动期间尝试的技能检定会承受-1环境减值。

东拼西凑（Rokvel）：Rokvel会让PC们始终装备齐全，以便带队前往维鲁米斯。每天两次，Rokvel可以东拼西凑出一件常见的0级或1级、且不具有魔法（特征）的物品。Rokvel东拼西凑出来的物品具有粗制特征。东拼西凑某件物品需要Rokvel花费若干小时，其数量等于她制作该物品本应需要的天数。

It doesn't take long for the PCs and the other survivors to pack their things and assemble at the entrance to the crypts. Barred from the inside with a heavy wooden beam, the door to the crypts has served as a symbol of security for the survivors, a bulwark against the undead threats that lie beyond. It opens into the basement of the @UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.SBRSwz1gqFWFiB0r]{All-Spiral Cathedral}, a temple to Pharasma erected over the crypts of Mordesha when Yua's Hope was founded. Apart from a few risky forays to the surface to gather much-needed supplies, the door is rarely opened. For many of the survivors, this is the first time they've left the crypts in six years.

Surviving in the Gravelands

Without a magical source of food and water, the PCs must forage to sustain themselves on the journey to Vellumis. If the PCs convince other survivors to travel with them, those NPCs also require food and water but might grant the party a survivor boon. However the PCs proceed, they're going to need to make some tough decisions on their journey to Vellumis.

Food and Water

The PCs begin the journey to Vellumis with no food or water and must forage to survive. Throughout most of the journey, to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist} requires a @Check[type:survival|dc:17|traits:action:subsist]. Keep in mind that if the PCs travel with other survivors, they have additional mouths to feed beyond their own. While it's unlikely anyone will die from a lack of food or water on the way to Vellumis, an NPC forced to go without might doubt their decision to follow the PCs or even abandon the party altogether. Similarly, a PC who lacks sufficient food and water might suffer the early effects of starvation (Pathfinder GM Core 43) before reaching their destination.

Morale

Many encounters in the Gravelands will weaken the resolve of the PCs' fellow survivors. It's up to the PCs to ensure everyone works together to survive the journey to Vellumis. Particularly loyal NPCs might even grant the party a survivor boon, a unique reward that helps the PCs survive the Gravelands!

Based on the results of the Keeping the Peace encounter, NPCs who travel with the PCs begin their adventure in the Gravelands as either cooperative or loyal. A cooperative NPC accompanies the PCs to Vellumis but has their doubts about the PCs' ability to lead. Loyal NPCs place their full faith in the PCs and grant them a survivor boon. A loyal NPC repeatedly forced to go without food, who is put in danger, or who is otherwise mistreated might become merely cooperative and withdraw their survivor boon. Similarly, a cooperative NPC who is mistreated might decide to abandon the group and strike out on their own. The PCs should work to ensure that as many NPCs as possible remain loyal, as doing so greatly increases the odds that everyone makes it to Vellumis alive.

Survivor Boons

Fox Forage (Brushpaws): The Brushpaws hunt and forage to help feed the rest of the group. Each PC gains the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.8qebBeOJsyRIchcu]{Forager} skill feat even if they aren't trained in Survival. In addition, PCs with the Brushpaws' survivor boon don't take the usual -5 penalty if they spend less than 8 hours using Survival to Subsist.

Hunger Crusher (Garaag): The orcs of Belkzen take pride in their ability to go without when resources are scarce. If Garaag accompanies the PCs to Vellumis, he can fast for the entire journey, if necessary, and a lack of food alone isn't enough to convince him to abandon the group.

A Chef's Touch (Hurdauw): Hurdauw takes charge of cooking for the group, ensuring all meals are nourishing and filling. Provided they've eaten one of Hurdauw's meals in the last 24 hours, the survivors can roll Fortitude saving throws against disease twice and use the best result. This is a fortune effect.

Marching Song (Querulous Quartet): When Hustling, the survivors use the highest Constitution modifier among the PCs to determine how long they can Hustle, instead of the lowest Constitution modifier. To receive this boon, all four members of the Querulous Quartet must accompany the group, and all must be loyal.

Youthful Endurance (Marko): Marko's willingness to press on is infectious. The PCs can use exploration activities even while fatigued, although they take a -1 circumstance penalty to skill checks they attempt while performing those activities.

Cobble Together (Rokvel): Rokvel keeps the PCs equipped to lead the march to Vellumis. Twice per day, Rokvel can cobble together a common level 0 or 1st-level item that doesn't have the magical trait. Items Rokvel cobbles together have the shoddy trait. Cobbling something together takes Rokvel a number of hours equal to the days she would need to Craft that item.

Yua's Hope.name: 尤娅之望 Yua's Hope
Yua's Hope.text:
PC们应该很快就会意识到，他们最糟糕的担忧被证实了——尤娅之望依然荒废着。虽然幸存者中不太可能有人知道终墙已死，死坟末土已在其原址升起，但每个人都能感觉到这片土地有些不对劲。环境中毫无生机；没有鸟鸣，大地干裂，仅存的几棵光秃树木也诡异地一动不动，仿佛完全不受微风影响。这幅凄凉的景象令其他幸存者心神不宁，任何与PC们的关系连“配合”都达不到的人，都会很快脱离大部队。

场景

@UUID[Scene.zTxptupBjF11v7Sh]{尤娅之望}

本冒险包含一张对整个尤娅之望的精细完整大地图，呈现其在本冒险中的全貌，让你的玩家无需在多个场景之间切换即可进行探索。

音频播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{尤娅之望}

当队伍进入尤娅之望荒凉而废弃的遗迹时。

搜刮尤娅之望

尤娅之望这座城镇，早已沦为它昔日繁荣聚落的尸骸，多年来被弃置腐朽。虽然塔-巴丰入侵期间遗留下来的任何食物早就腐坏殆尽，PC们或许仍想在镇上搜刮其他补给。（如果PC们自己没想到要探索尤娅之望，他们的一位幸存者同伴会提出这个建议。）由于PC们很可能熟悉尤娅之望的大致布局——无论是来自他们进入墓穴之前的生活经历，还是来自这些年来幸存者少数几次前往地表的探索——因此在角色探索时，你完全可以把城镇地图分享给玩家。

PC们也应当清楚，不死生物仍然占据着尤娅之望。（同样地，如果PC们似乎忘了这一点，一位NPC会提醒他们。）当幸存者探索这座城镇时，PC们必须在搜集补给的需求与引来仍困扰尤娅之望的不死生物注意的危险之间作出权衡。要向玩家明确说明，在角色开始前往维勒密斯的旅程之前，任何一次高风险遭遇都可能耗尽他们的资源，而且也不能保证能找到一个安全地点恢复。玩家现在作出的那些看似微小的决定，其后果将在整个冒险过程中不断累积，直到幸存者抵达维勒密斯的安全之地。

本节使用胜利点数规则（GM 核心 184）的一个变体，以反映角色在探索尤娅之望时避开游荡于镇中的不死生物的能力。当他们第一次离开墓穴外出时，PC们拥有10点规避点数（EP）。角色并不是要累积EP，而是必须尽量避免失去它们。随着PC们探索尤娅之望，他们每次从一个地点移动到另一个地点时都有可能失去EP，并在不同EP门槛触发愈发危险的不死生物遭遇。PC们也可能因为在一个地方停留过久，或在探索时鲁莽行事而自动失去EP。

PC们可以通过进行下文详述的规避不死生物行动来避免失去EP。并不是每个角色都必须进行此行动，但凡进行此行动者，其检定都要承受等同于队伍中未参与该行动角色数量（无论是PC还是NPC）的环境减值，最高为-4环境减值。（由于“灌丛爪”是经验丰富的侦察兵，只要这些狐人随队，他们不计入该减值。）如果没有任何角色进行该行动，则队伍自动失去2点EP。每当一次EP损失导致幸存者达到一个规避门槛时，幸存者就会遭遇一群不死生物。

当队伍探索尤娅之望时，以及之后前往维勒密斯的旅途中，任何陪同PC们的NPC都会让角色们来主导局面。他们不会参与战斗，并且在需要作出艰难决定时通常都会听从PC们。如果你发现自己需要某位NPC的游戏数据，将其视为平民即可。

规避不死生物

  • 探索
  • 移动

当你探索尤娅之望的废墟时，你会在城镇中游荡的不死生物之间周旋，从一个地点移动到另一个地点。尝试一次 @Check[type:stealth|dc:10|traits:action:sneak,secret] 检定，以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 绕过不死生物；或者尝试一次 @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:13] 或 @Check[type:athletics|dc:13]，快速移动到让不死生物失去你的方位。或者，你也可以尝试一次 @Check[type:society|dc:15|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，并规划出通往目的地的最高效路线。

  • 大成功：你获得1点EP。
  • 成功：你不会获得或失去EP。
  • 失败：你失去1点EP。
  • 大失败：你失去2点EP。

规避门槛：

  • 11+ EP：PC们保持在视线之外。只要队伍的EP总值维持在此水平，PC们进行规避不死生物的检定就获得+1环境加值。
  • 10-6 EP：PC们发现一只落单的 @UUID[Actor.Xo4IGzw28hivgMmM]{丧尸} 或 @UUID[Actor.trchDxbDR2TiPMxT]{骷髅} 正蹒跚游荡，但他们可以通过保持安静并持续移动来避开它。如果PC们决定与该生物交战，他们的先攻获得+2环境加值。
  • 5-3 EP：队伍发现一群四只蹒跚丧尸。除非PC们持续移动，否则这些丧尸最终会追上他们并发动攻击。
  • 2-1 EP：六只蹒跚丧尸攻击PC们。这些丧尸分成每组两只，从不同方向扑向队伍，切断明显的逃脱路线。
  • 0 EP：一群 @UUID[Actor.cbduxhlI7JbONLXF]{蹒跚尸群} 在一条小巷中将幸存者逼入绝境，或在PC们搜索某栋建筑时将其团团包围。该尸群的先攻获得+2环境加值。如果PC们在这次攻击中存活下来，将队伍的EP重置为5，但在PC们至少重新获得1点EP之前，之后任何规避不死生物失败都视为大失败。

It shouldn't take long for the PCs to realize that their worst fears are confirmed—Yua's Hope remains abandoned. While it's unlikely any of the survivors know that Lastwall is dead and the Gravelands have risen in its place, everyone can sense that something is off about the land. The environment is devoid of life; no birds chirp, the ground is dry and cracked, and the few leafless trees that remain stand eerily still, as if untouched by the breeze. The forlorn scene unsettles the other survivors, and anyone who isn't at least cooperative with the PCs quickly splits off from the rest of the group.

Scene

@UUID[Scene.zTxptupBjF11v7Sh]{Yua's Hope}

This adventure includes a meticulously detailed full-scale map of the entirety of Yua's Hope as it appears within this adventure, allowing your players to explore it without the need to swap between multiple scenes.

Audio Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{Yua's Hope}

As the party emerges into the desolate and abandoned remains of Yua's hope.

Scavenging Yua's Hope

The town of Yua's Hope is a corpse of the prosperous settlement it once was, left to rot over many years. While any food left behind during Tar-Baphon's invasion spoiled long ago, the PCs might want to scavenge the town for other supplies. (If the PCs don't think to explore Yua's Hope themselves, one of their fellow survivors suggests doing so.) As the PCs are likely familiar with the general layout of Yua's Hope—either from their time before entering the crypts or from the survivors' few forays aboveground over these long years—feel free to share the map of the town with the players as their characters explore.

The PCs should also be aware that undead still occupy Yua's Hope. (Again, if the PCs seem to have forgotten this fact, one of the NPCs reminds them.) As the survivors explore the town, the PCs must weigh their need to gather supplies against the dangers of drawing attention from the undead that still plague Yua's Hope. Be clear to the players that a risky encounter before the characters begin their journey to Vellumis might drain their resources, and that finding a safe place to recover isn't guaranteed. The repercussions of seemingly small decisions the players make now will compound throughout the course of the adventure, until the survivors reach the safety of Vellumis.

This section uses a variant of the Victory Point rules (Pathfinder GM Core 184) to reflect the characters' ability to explore Yua's Hope while avoiding the undead that roam the town. When they first venture forth from the crypts, the PCs have 10 Evasion Points (EP). Rather than accumulating EP, the characters must try to avoid losing them. As the PCs explore Yua's Hope, they risk losing EP each time they move from one location to another, triggering progressively more dangerous encounters with the undead at various EP thresholds. The PCs can also lose EP automatically by lingering in one place too long or acting recklessly as they explore.

The PCs can avoid losing EP by taking the Evade the Undead activity, which is detailed below. Not every character needs to take this activity, but those who do take a circumstance penalty to their check equal to the number of characters in the group (either PCs or NPCs) who don't participate, to a maximum circumstance penalty of -4. (Being expert scouts, the Brushpaws don't count toward this penalty, assuming the kitsune accompany the group.) If no characters take the activity, the group automatically loses 2 EP. Each time a loss of EP causes the survivors to reach an Evasion Threshold, the survivors encounter a group of undead.

As the group explores Yua's Hope, and later as they make the journey to Vellumis, any NPCs who accompany the PCs allow the characters to take the lead. They remain out of combat and generally defer to the PCs when difficult decisions need to be made. If you find that you need game statistics for a certain NPC, treat that individual as a commoner.

Evade the Undead

  • Exploration
  • Move

While exploring the ruins of Yua's Hope, you move from one location to another while evading the undead that roam the town. Attempt a @Check[type:stealth|dc:10|traits:action:sneak,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} past the undead or a @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:13] or @Check[type:athletics|dc:13] to move so quickly that the undead lose track of your position. Alternatively, you can attempt a @Check[type:society|dc:15|traits:action:recall-knowledge,secret] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} and plot the most efficient route to your destination.

  • Critical Success: You gain 1 EP.
  • Success: You don't gain or lose EP.
  • Failure: You lose 1 EP.
  • Critical failure: You lose 2 EP.

Evasion Thresholds:

  • 11+ EP: The PCs remain out of sight. While the group's EP total remains at this level, PCs gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks made to Evade the Undead.
  • 10-6 EP: The PCs spot a lone @UUID[Actor.Xo4IGzw28hivgMmM]{zombie} or @UUID[Actor.trchDxbDR2TiPMxT]{skeleton} shambling about, but they can avoid it by keeping quiet and staying on the move. If the PCs decide to engage the creature, they gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative.
  • 5-3 EP: The party spots a group of four zombie shamblers. Unless the PCs keep moving, the zombies eventually catch up to them and attack.
  • 2-1 EP: Six zombie shamblers attack the PCs. The zombies descend on the party in groups of two, each pair from a different direction, cutting off obvious escape routes.
  • 0 EP: A @UUID[Actor.cbduxhlI7JbONLXF]{shambler troop} corners the survivors in an alleyway or surrounds a building as the PCs search it. The troop gains a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative. If the PCs survive the attack, reset the group's EP to 5, but any subsequent failure to Evade the Undead is treated as a critical failure until the PCs regain at least 1 EP.

A1. All-Spiral Cathedral.name: A1. 万旋大教堂 A1. All-Spiral Cathedral
A1. All-Spiral Cathedral.text:
这座哥特式大教堂由深色石材砌成，其造型被塑造成墓碑的模样。每一块石头上都刻着一段献给奥泽姆骑士团所崇敬神祇之一的简短祝福，不过其中大多数都是向法拉斯玛祈求庇护，以抵御邪恶与不死之力的祷文。

尽管在建造尤娅之望期间，法拉斯玛教会为这座大教堂捐赠了石材，但这座建筑被用作一处多信仰崇拜中心，供奉着艾奥梅黛、俄拉斯提尔、撒恩蕾以及阿维斯坦各地受崇拜的十余位其他神祇的圣坛。如今，这些祭坛已被砸毁，宗教圣像也被亵渎性的污言秽语所玷污。

@UUID[Actor.HBRz8BVLVN9u9Odp]{尸火}

中等 1

生物：就在大教堂外，躺着一名祭司和几名追随者的遗骸；他们都是在保卫大教堂、抵抗不死生物时死去的。虽然这些骸骨本身无害，但那名祭司的遗骸已被一只尸火占据。若PC调查这些遗骸，尸火便会驱动其宿主活动起来并发动攻击。

@UUID[Actor.WSlcLBO91rfc6IE6]{宝藏}: 若一名PC @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}这名祭司及其追随者的遗骸，便会在骨堆中发现一把+1硬头锤、一枚哭泣天使坠饰和一小瓶圣水。

The dark stones of this gothic cathedral are shaped to resemble tombstones. Each is carved with a short blessing to one of the deities revered by the Knights of Ozem, though most are prayers to Pharasma for protection against the forces of evil and undeath.

Although the church of Pharasma donated the stone for this cathedral during Yua's Hope's construction, the structure was used as a multi-faith center of worship, housing shrines to Iomedae, Erastil, Sarenrae, and a dozen other deities worshipped across Avistan. Now, the altars are smashed and the religious icons defaced with profanities.

@UUID[Actor.HBRz8BVLVN9u9Odp]{Corpselight}

Moderate 1

Creatures: Just outside the cathedral lie the remains of a priest and a handful of his followers, all of whom died defending the cathedral from the undead. While the bones themselves are harmless, the priest's remains have been inhabited by a corpselight. If the PCs investigate the remains, the corpselight animates its host and attacks.

@UUID[Actor.WSlcLBO91rfc6IE6]{Treasure}: A PC who @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Searches} the remains of the priest and his followers discovers a +1 mace, a crying angel pendant, and a vial of holy water amongst the bones.

A2. Cast-Iron Creations.name: A2. 铸铁工坊 A2. Cast-Iron Creations
A2. Cast-Iron Creations.text:
这座建筑傲然对抗着时代的侵蚀，尽管这栋建筑显然已经风光不再。大片蔓生的地衣覆盖了建筑的大部分区域，在砖墙上形成了奇异的图案，仿佛一张张怒视的骷髅面孔。

曾经作为她的骄傲与喜悦，罗克维尔·硬眉井然有序的铁匠铺如今已成废墟。

@UUID[Actor.pscEdXaMlTkePiDs]{宝藏}: 散落在这间毁坏铁匠铺各处的，有两套铁匠工匠工具包、一个抓钩、一把战锤、一面钢盾，以及一套未完成的全身板甲，其可作为适用于中型生物的半身板甲使用。找到每件物品都需要分别进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:search,secret] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}。如果罗克维尔陪同 PCs，他们在寻找这些物品的检定上获得 +1 环境加值。如果罗克维尔选择抛下幸存者，她早已搜刮过这间店铺，只留下了一套铁匠工具包。

This building stands defiant against the ravages of time, although the structure has certainly seen better days. A creeping lichen covers most of the building, forming strange patterns that resemble scowling skulls across the brick.

Once her pride and joy, Rokvel Hardbrow's orderly blacksmithing shop is now in ruins.

@UUID[Actor.pscEdXaMlTkePiDs]{Treasure}: Scattered throughout the ruined shop are two sets of blacksmithing artisan's toolkits, a grappling hook, a warhammer, a steel shield, and an incomplete suit of full plate that functions as half plate sized for a Medium creature. Finding each item requires a separate @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:search,secret] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search}. If Rokvel accompanies the PCs, they gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to find the items. If Rokvel chose to abandon the survivors, she's already scavenged the shop, only leaving behind a single set of blacksmithing toolkits.

A3. Flatpine's General Goods.name: A3. 平松杂货铺 A3. Flatpine's General Goods
A3. Flatpine's General Goods.text:
这栋建筑入口上方悬挂着一块招牌，上面写着“平松杂货铺”。褪色的字样下方画着一棵孤零零的松树。穿过店铺入口后，木制货架和柜台都已腐朽坍塌，只剩下石质结构。

平松杂货铺曾是尤娅之望的商业中心，本地商人和工匠都曾在这里兜售他们的货物。

@UUID[Actor.T5w2QpcZ0SFgAYDf]{2名食尸鬼店主}

Moderate 1

店主布利多拉·平松和她的妻子艾斯卡拉米斯曾是深受社区喜爱的成员，人们知道她们会一边倾听孩子们的烦恼，一边给他们零食吃。尤娅之望遭到入侵时，两人躲进了店铺的地窖，直到一群食尸鬼发现了她们。如今，她们受诅咒而饱受食尸鬼般的饥渴折磨，哀叹自己从未尝过那些她们曾服务过的社区成员的血肉。她们打算通过吞食PC来弥补这一点，并从那些她们生前认识的孩子开始。

任何在尤娅之望长大，或是在孩提时就认识布利多拉和艾斯卡拉米斯的PC，在遭遇平松一家时都必须进行一次 @Check[type:will|dc:13] 豁免。若失败，该PC在遭遇开始时陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 1}（若为大失败，则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}）。

@UUID[Actor.oyaEGePKWPpEThl7]{宝藏}：PC击败这些食尸鬼后，可以尝试进行一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:13] 以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}这间店铺。若成功，他们会发现一处藏匿点，里面有两瓶初级生命灵药和四瓶次级炼金火。

The sign dangling above the entrance to this building reads “Flatpine's General Goods.” A lone pine tree is painted beneath the faded words. Beyond the shop's entrance, wooden shelves and countertops have rotted and collapsed, leaving only stone behind.

Flatpine's General Goods was once the center of commerce in Yua's Hope, as local merchants and crafters peddled their wares here.

@UUID[Actor.T5w2QpcZ0SFgAYDf]{2 Ghoul Shopkeepers}

Moderate 1

Once beloved members of the community, shopkeepers Blidora Flatpine and her wife Escalamies were known for giving treats to children while listening to their problems. During the invasion of Yua's Hope, the two hid in their store's cellar until a band of ghouls discovered them. Now cursed with ghoulish hunger, Blidora and Escalamies lament never having tasted the flesh of the community they once served. They aim to make amends by devouring the PCs, beginning with those who were children they knew in life.

Any PC who grew up in Yua's Hope or otherwise knew Blidora and Escalamies as a child must attempt a @Check[type:will|dc:13] save when they encounter the Flatpines. On a failure, the PC is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{frightened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{frightened 2} on a critical failure) as the encounter begins.

@UUID[Actor.oyaEGePKWPpEThl7]{Treasure}: Once the PCs defeat the ghouls, they can attempt a @Check[type:perception|dc:13] to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the shop. On a success, they discover a cache of two minor elixirs of life and four lesser alchemist's fires.

A4. Hope's Breath Inn.name: A4. 希望之息旅店 A4. Hope's Breath Inn
A4. Hope's Breath Inn.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.F2GdKzFCH9B6VnvY]{希望之息旅店（层）}

将此作为环境音层播放，覆盖在 @UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{尤娅之望} 的播放列表之上

这间旅店曾经是个充满笑声与音乐的欢乐之地，但其壁炉中的炉火早已熄灭黯淡。这栋建筑的二层几乎已经完全坍塌，用木瓦覆盖了地面，并让内部暴露在风雨之中。

在其鼎盛时期，希望之息旅店里挤满了旅行者与十字军。如今，它的厅堂中再无歌声与欢笑，取而代之的是死亡的空洞寂静。如果赫朵·普索玛随队同行，她会轻易认出这栋建筑，因为在塔巴丰的军队入侵之前，她曾在这里担任主厨。

@UUID[Actor.Xo4IGzw28hivgMmM]{6 蹒跚丧尸}

重度 1

和摩德沙的墓穴一样，希望之息旅店曾经也有一处地下室，奥泽姆骑士团曾在其中储备应急补给。然而，塔巴丰的不死很快就发现了这个藏身处，而在那里避难的人无一幸存。当PC们到达时，一群丧尸感知到了活人的存在，便蹒跚而出，想要品尝这五年多以来的第一口鲜活血肉。如果赫朵与PC们同行，她会立刻认出其中两只丧尸分别是她的丈夫赫萨诺托，以及那个他原本计划与之私奔的男人。赫朵一见此景便发出惊恐的尖叫，使这些不死的先攻获得+2环境加值。

@UUID[Actor.kfA4VOif5lmHi7Dk]{宝藏}：地下室里的大多数补给都已毁坏，但如果PC们击败这些丧尸，他们仍可以抢救出10个铺盖卷、两份次级抗疫剂、两瓶初级生命灵药，以及一套治疗者工具包。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.F2GdKzFCH9B6VnvY]{Hope's Breath Inn (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{Yua's Hope}

Once a cheery place filled with laughter and music, this inn's hearth fires have long since darkened. The building's second story has collapsed almost entirely, blanketing the ground with shingles and exposing its interior to the elements.

In its heyday, Hope's Breath Inn bustled with travelers and crusaders alike. Now its halls are empty of song and merriment, replaced with the hollow silence of death. If Hurdauw Pulsoma accompanies the group, she easily recognizes the building, as she served as the head chef here before Tar-Baphon's forces invaded.

@UUID[Actor.Xo4IGzw28hivgMmM]{6 Zombie Shamblers}

Severe 1

Like the crypts of Mordesha, Hope's Breath Inn once featured a basement that the Knights of Ozem outfitted with emergency supplies. Tar-Baphon's undead quickly discovered this hiding place, however, and no one who took shelter there survived. When the PCs arrive, a group of zombies sense the presence of the living and shamble forth to claim their first taste of living flesh in over half a decade. If Hurdauw travels with the PCs, she immediately recognizes two of the zombies as her husband Hesanoto and the man he planned to run away with. Hurdauw lets out a frantic cry at the sight, granting the undead a +2 circumstance bonus to their initiative.

@UUID[Actor.kfA4VOif5lmHi7Dk]{Treasure}: Most of the supplies in the basement are ruined, but if the PCs defeat the zombies, they can salvage 10 bedrolls, two lesser antiplagues, two minor elixirs of life, and a healer's toolkit.

A5. Mordesha House Lodge.name: A5. 摩德沙会馆 A5. Mordesha House Lodge
A5. Mordesha House Lodge.text:
这座奇特建筑高耸于周围的废墟之间，其石灰岩外墙上嵌着一个不寻常的符号。根据建筑内破损的家具判断，这座建筑似乎是设计来容纳大量宾客的。

成功通过 @Check[type:society|dc:10] 进行回忆知识 的 PC，会认出这座建筑正面的构造中融入了开拓者协会著名的开放之路徽记。虽然这座建筑曾是协会在当地的一处驻地，但驻守于此的探路者不是逃离了，就是在夺取了尤娅之望的不死军势面前倒下了。

@UUID[Actor.NB4kWyA1xdF6PgCv]{宝藏}: 如果 PC 们搜索这座建筑，他们会在驻地后方的一间房间里发现一个被遗弃的钢盒。这个盒子没有明显的上锁机构，但受过盗贼训练的角色可以通过成功进行一次 @Check[type:thievery|dc:20|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 来操纵隐藏的门闩，将其打开。盒中装有散放的 13 cp、54 sp 和 36 gp 钱币，以及一枚其前主人逃离尤娅之望时遗弃的寻路仪。

奖励：因发现这枚被遗弃的寻路仪，给予每位 PC 10 XP。

An unusual symbol is cobbled into the limestone face of this fanciful building, which stands tall amid the neighboring ruins. Judging from the broken furniture inside the structure, the building seems to have been designed to house a multitude of guests.

A PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:society|dc:10] to Recall Knowledge recognizes the Pathfinder Society's famous Glyph of the Open Road incorporated into the building's front face. Though the building once served as a local lodge for the Society, any Pathfinders stationed here either fled or fell before the undead forces that claimed Yua's Hope.

@UUID[Actor.NB4kWyA1xdF6PgCv]{Treasure}: If the PCs search the building, they discover an abandoned steel box in one of the lodge's back rooms. The box has no obvious locking mechanism, but a character trained in Thievery can open it by succeeding at a @Check[type:thievery|dc:20|traits:action:pick-a-lock] to manipulate a secret latch. The box contains 13 cp, 54 sp, and 36 gp in loose coins, as well as a wayfinder abandoned by its former owner when they fled Yua's Hope.

Reward: Award each PC 10 XP for discovering the abandoned wayfinder.

A6. The Open Pot.name: A6. 开锅餐馆 A6. The Open Pot
A6. The Open Pot.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.F2GdKzFCH9B6VnvY]{希望之息旅店（层）}

将此作为环境音层，叠加播放在 @UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{尤娅之望} 的播放列表之上

这栋建筑的屋顶已经塌陷，残破剥落的墙壁围成了一个酷似巨大坩埚的形状。石砾之间躺着一块招牌，上面写着“开锅餐馆”。

尤娅之望的餐馆并不多，但开锅餐馆毫无疑问是其中最受欢迎的一家。可惜的是，这间昔日热闹非凡的食肆如今内部几乎尽成废墟，使整栋建筑都透着一种空荡而凄凉的感觉。

@UUID[Actor.RwNVqGmL6VjxhO82]{骷髅鼠群}

低级 1

当塔巴丰的不死生物席卷尤娅之望时，从老鼠到乌鸦的一切都被转化为默语暴君麾下的爪牙。开锅餐馆里的老鼠在变成不死生物后，靠啃食遭屠杀镇民的血肉存活了数周，最终又彼此吞食。如今只剩下它们的骷髅。等PC进入开锅餐馆时，这群骷髅老鼠会从一张翻倒的桌子后窜出并发动攻击。

@UUID[Actor.pr5jQWhdx3xECqjW]{公共餐厅}: PC若成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:search] 检定，在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{搜索}餐馆的公共餐厅时，便会发现一个做工精美的白镴酒杯。清理掉污垢后，这只酒杯价值 2 gp。

@UUID[Actor.SYLJUG9GNZJuGTSC]{办公室}：餐馆南端是一间宽敞的办公室。办公室里的家具已被洗劫一空，只剩东墙边一张沉重的橡木书桌。若PC检查书桌，就会发现其中一个抽屉被一把简单的锁锁住了。抽屉的钥匙早已不知去向，但PC可以通过三次成功的 @Check[type:thievery|dc:20|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 检定来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{撬锁}。或者，他们也可以用一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:22|traits:action:force-open] 来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行打开}抽屉。抽屉里塞满了散乱的纸张（都是关于餐馆日常经营的记录，如今已经毫无意义），而在这些纸张之间埋着一张灌注命能卷轴。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.F2GdKzFCH9B6VnvY]{Hope's Breath Inn (Layer)}

Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.imCEWUX57oOoHlM8]{Yua's Hope}

The roof of this building has caved in, leaving its crumbling walls to form a shape not unlike that of a massive cauldron. Lying amidst the rubble is a sign that reads “The Open Pot.”

Yua's Hope didn't have many restaurants, but the Open Pot was by far the most popular. Unfortunately, nearly everything inside the once-bustling eatery is in ruins, giving the building an empty, forlorn feeling.

@UUID[Actor.RwNVqGmL6VjxhO82]{Skeletal Rat Swarm}

Low 1

When Tar-Baphon's undead overran Yua's Hope, everything from rats to ravens were raised into the Whispering Tyrant's service. Upon becoming undead, the rats in the Open Pot fed for weeks upon the flesh of slaughtered townsfolk before finally consuming each other. Now only their skeletons remain. When the PCs enter the Open Pot, the skeletal rats scurry from behind an overturned table and attack.

@UUID[Actor.pr5jQWhdx3xECqjW]{Common Room}: A PC who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:13|traits:action:search] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TiNDYUGlMmxzxBYU]{Search} the restaurant's common room discovers a finely wrought pewter tankard. Once cleaned of grime, the tankard is worth 2 gp.

@UUID[Actor.SYLJUG9GNZJuGTSC]{Office}: A spacious office occupies the southern end of the restaurant. The office has been stripped of furnishings, save for a heavy oak desk against the east wall. If the PCs inspect the desk, they discover one of the drawers is secured with a simple lock.
