Once the PCs realize the group is being followed, they might try to outrun their pursuer. Unfortunately, Omelia's Speed of 30 feet means she likely outpaces the survivors, who can only move as fast as their slowest member (among both the PCs and NPCs). More concerning, because Omelia is undead, she can travel tirelessly and without being harassed by many of the Gravelands' denizens. Even if she loses the group temporarily, her familiarity with the area allows her to pick up their trail after a day or two.

The PCs might also think to turn the tables on Omelia by springing an ambush, but she is unlikely to fall for this ploy. If in doubt, make a Perception check for Omelia against the character with the lowest Stealth DC. On a success, Omelia spots the trap and backs off, hoping to lull the survivors into a false sense of security. Only once the survivors near their obvious destination of Vellumis does Omelia confront the group, hopefully on her own terms.

The PCs' final confrontation with Omelia can be found in @UUID[JournalEntry.q09cHXJPCUX6TluO.JournalEntryPage.prEIoWsbHunFg46L]{Event 18: The Chokepoint}. If the characters force an encounter with Omelia before that time, simply modify the information there to run the encounter somewhere before the end of the party's journey to Vellumis.

Event 13: Grove Under Siege.name: 事件13：被围攻的林地 Event 13: Grove Under Siege
Event 13: Grove Under Siege.text:
场景

@UUID[Scene.jcORVq9qtWkYNXwk]

你可以使用所附场景作为此次遭遇的战斗地图。

在塔巴丰入侵之前，一群德鲁伊曾祝福这片与世隔绝的小树林；尽管受到巫妖的影响，这里仍持续繁盛。当地的动物种群依靠这片树林获取食物，但这也使其成为不死恐怖猎食的场所。

  • @UUID[Actor.MF8m47hlaBWYBH84]{骷髅地精}
  • @UUID[Actor.ToGAEKKOplpXzaQQ]{骷髅狼}

遭遇

低威胁 2

一只骑着被重新赋予活动能力的骷髅狼的骷髅地精潜伏在树林之间。PC们抵达时，地精和他的坐骑会突然迅速地发动攻击。

后续发展：如果PC们沿陆路路线旅行，他们会忽略在这片树林中求生时的环境减值。如果他们沿河道路线前进，则将在这片树林中进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{求生} 的求生检定结果视为提升一级。

Scene

@UUID[Scene.jcORVq9qtWkYNXwk]

You can use the included scene as a battlemap for this encounter.

Prior to Tar-Baphon's invasion, a circle of druids blessed this isolated grove, which continues to flourish despite the lich's influence. The local animal population relies on the grove for food, but this also makes it a hunting ground for undead horrors.

  • @UUID[Actor.MF8m47hlaBWYBH84]{Goblin Skeleton}
  • @UUID[Actor.ToGAEKKOplpXzaQQ]{Wolf Skeleton}

Encounter

Low 2

A skeletal goblin riding a reanimated wolf skeleton lurks among the trees. When the PCs arrive, the goblin and his mount attack suddenly and swiftly.

Development: If the PCs travel along the overland route, they ignore the circumstance penalty to Subsist within the grove. If they are following the river road route, treat the result of Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist} within the grove as one step better.

Bloodstones of Arazni.name: 阿拉兹尼的血石 Bloodstones of Arazni
Bloodstones of Arazni.text:
• 独特
  • 神器
  • 神术

这四个卡诺卜罐的盖子被雕刻成可怖怪物的头骨模样。罐子外侧覆满干涸的血迹，而罐身摸起来温热。每个罐中都装着阿拉兹尼的一件器官，那是格布强行将她转化为巫妖时从她体内取出的。格布曾用这些血石控制阿拉兹尼，直到奥泽姆骑士团解放了这些血石，并将它们藏匿在当时仍为国家的终焉之墙各地。自那以后，阿拉兹尼一直在追寻这些神器，因为它们仍是她受幽灵王控制那段岁月的象征，而且它们或许至今仍保有再次束缚她的力量。

在阿拉兹尼晋升为神祇后，她肉身的遗骸发生了变化。它们曾经带有一丝奥罗登力量的残痕，而如今，血石中灌注的是阿拉兹尼神性的一部分。崇拜阿拉兹尼或受她眷顾之人，可以通过引导这位女神的意志来唤起血石的力量。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.xI3obWctqdVBLzSX]{阿拉兹尼的心血石}

神器 11

阿拉兹尼的心血石象征守护。持握心血石时，你能感觉到罐中有一颗心脏平缓跳动的柔和节律。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LpYBTsYCEjqY3yek]{阿拉兹尼的肝血石}

神器 11

阿拉兹尼的肝血石象征自信。持握肝血石时，你会对自己的能力更有把握。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ykNkCIv2P3dfeMlR]{阿拉兹尼的肺血石}

神器 11

阿拉兹尼的肺血石象征苦难。携带肺血石时，你获得将自己的痛苦转化为对抗敌人武器的能力。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ci9SM1RcrbR2aIoG]{阿拉兹尼的脾血石}

神器 11

阿拉兹尼的脾血石象征自由。持握脾血石会让你觉得没有任何束缚能够困住你。

  • unique
  • artifact
  • divine

The lids of these four canopic jars are carved to resemble the skulls of hideous monsters. Dried blood coats the outside of the jars, and the jars themselves feel warm to the touch. Each jar contains one of Arazni’s organs, removed from her when Geb forcibly transformed her into a lich. Geb used the Bloodstones to control Arazni until the Knights of Ozem liberated the Bloodstones and hid them throughout the then-nation of Lastwall. Since then, Arazni has been on the hunt for the artifacts, as they remain a symbol of her time under the Ghost King’s control, and they might still possess the power to bind her again today.

After Arazni’s ascension to godhood, the remains of her physical body changed. Whereas they once possessed a vestige of Aroden’s power, the Bloodstones are now imbued with a fraction of Arazni’s divinity. Those who worship Arazni or are favored by her can invoke the power of the Bloodstones by tapping into the goddess’s will.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.xI3obWctqdVBLzSX]{Heart Bloodstone of Arazni}

Artifact 11

The Heart Bloodstone of Arazni represents protection. While holding the Heart Bloodstone, you can feel the gentle rhythm of a beating heart within the jar.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LpYBTsYCEjqY3yek]{Liver Bloodstone of Arazni}

Artifact 11

The Liver Bloodstone of Arazni represents confidence. While holding the Liver Bloodstone, you feel more certain in your abilities.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ykNkCIv2P3dfeMlR]{Lung Bloodstone of Arazni}

Artifact 11

The Lung Bloodstone of Arazni represents suffering. While you carry the Lung Bloodstone, you gain the ability to turn your pain into a weapon against your enemies.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.ci9SM1RcrbR2aIoG]{Spleen Bloodstone of Arazni}

Artifact 11

The Spleen Bloodstone of Arazni represents freedom. Holding the Spleen Bloodstone makes you feel as if no bonds can contain you.

Arsiella Dei.name: 阿尔塞拉·黛伊 Arsiella Dei
Arsiella Dei.text:
切尔纳萨多守望者兼奥泽姆堡指挥官

阿尔塞拉·黛伊生来就是要成为一名切尔那萨多游侠的。她是猎人出身、后成为军事领袖的伊尔加尔·涅玛斯最小的女儿；她的父亲将一群原本组织散漫的游侠聚集到同一旗帜之下，并带领他们脱离摩尔苏恩取得独立，随后于 4655AR 遭人刺杀。阿尔塞拉在一个以她父亲之名命名、以此向他致敬的国度中长大，从小便听着关于父亲功绩的故事。

如果她生在不同的时代或地方，阿尔塞拉或许会成为一名艺术家，但现实却是，从她学会走路起，便开始在她父亲旧部“伊尔加尔之斧”的成员指导下接受训练。除了偶尔在笔记本页边草草勾勒几幅肖像之外，整个童年时期的阿尔塞拉始终专注于延续父亲守护涅玛萨斯自由的事业。她从导师们那里学到的，不仅是如何挥舞斧头与弓箭，还有潜行、诡计与破坏的技艺。无论从哪方面看，阿尔塞拉都被视为一名出色的学生，在狡黠、聪慧与洞察力上丝毫不逊于伊尔加尔·涅玛斯本人。

尽管她父亲的战友们很早便开始教导阿尔塞拉，他们也同样宠着她，切磋时往往比对待其他陪练对象更手下留情。结果，到她进入青春期时，阿尔塞拉已经相信自己几乎不可战胜。她在巡逻中屡屡冒下过大的风险，有时不仅危及自己的性命，也连带让伙伴们身陷险境。在这方面，阿尔塞拉与她父亲不同；她父亲虽然也愿意拿自己的生命冒险，却始终会以对部下安危的关切来加以节制。阿尔塞拉明白，若想成为族人的领袖，她需要的不只是技艺，还有智慧；但直到她险些死于一支摩尔苏恩前锋部队之手时，她才真正意识到，必须离开自己熟悉的南锐木森林，到外面的世界历练，才能获得成长。

阿尔塞拉迁居至终墙，在那里她向侍奉艾奥梅黛女神的军事组织奥泽姆骑士团求学。在当时终墙的首都维吉尔，她成为后继者的虔诚信徒，既敬仰这位女神的力量，也敬仰她的正义感。正是在这一时期，阿尔塞拉为自己取了“黛伊”这个姓氏，这个称谓不仅是为了向她新的女神致敬，也为了尽量减少自己因身为伊尔加尔·涅玛斯这类著名战争英雄之女而可能受到的特殊照顾。

在终墙，阿尔塞拉也进一步坚定了她长期以来对于精通多种战斗风格重要性的信念。奥泽姆骑士团中的老师们当然教会了她如何对抗亡灵，但他们也帮助她培养出她在少年时期极度缺乏的纪律性与军事作风。作为回报，阿尔塞拉也成为了一名教师，向那些年轻而缺乏经验的骑士们——其中许多人后来自己也成为了绯红复国团成员——传授潜行、生存与游击战的价值。直到今天，阿尔塞拉仍以融合切尔那萨多游侠与奥泽姆骑士团两者的技巧作战，这种结合使她在这两个组织的成员中都显得独一无二。

4719AR 维吉尔毁灭时，阿尔塞拉并不在城中，但她是最早返回这座城市、清点所受损害的部队成员之一。直到确认塔尔-巴丰已逃离囚牢、其亡灵大军正逐步压垮终墙时，她才与奥泽姆骑士团一起撤退到港口城市维卢米斯。随着终墙灭亡、死坟末土取而代之，阿尔塞拉在奥泽姆骑士团的重建中起到了关键作用，尽管她拒绝让自己成为一名“终墙骑士”。从这个意义上说，阿尔塞拉多年的训练终于开花结果——尽管抛下并肩作战的战友让她痛苦不已，但她相信，在那场注定将要到来的、对抗默语暴君的更大战争中，自己的才能若用于集结外国势力，会发挥更大作用。

当她回到南锐木森林时，阿尔塞拉已成长为一名久经沙场的战士与一位令人生畏的战略家，并迅速晋升，成为为数不多的切尔纳萨多守望者之一。尽管游侠们仍然是一个松散的自由战士联盟，阿尔塞拉却拥有一种近乎不可思议的能力，能凭借魅力、威吓与一丝不苟的组织能力来协调行动。正是这种能力，再加上她曾在奥泽姆骑士团服役的经历以及对艾奥梅黛的虔诚，使阿尔塞拉得以担任奥泽姆堡指挥官。当需要为@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}寻找安置之所时，奥泽姆堡显然是不二之选，而阿尔塞拉也欣然承担起这件圣物首席守护者的职责。阿尔塞拉并不是那种会被头衔轻易打动的人，但她将这项任命视为延续父亲遗志的一种方式，并稍稍动用了一点自己的影响力，让父亲得以在堡垒下方的地下墓穴中享有一席荣耀之地。她认为自己定期造访伊尔加尔之墓，既是对父亲的致敬，也是帮助她履行当前职责的力量来源。

战役作用

当 PCs 潜入奥泽姆堡寻找奥泽姆圣杯时，由阿尔塞拉·黛伊负责统管整座堡垒。在堡垒的所有防御者中，只有阿尔塞拉知晓圣杯藏在地下墓穴之中。阿尔塞拉对这件圣物藏身于堡中的秘密极其重视。她一直相信，她父亲之所以会遭到刺杀，只可能是因为有人无意间泄露了他的所在，因此她发誓绝不让自己所知的这座堡垒真正用途落入邪恶之手。

在担任堡垒指挥官期间，阿尔塞拉增加了奥泽姆堡前方“剑刃”区域内陷阱的使用。她还与当地的精类及其他生物达成协议，为整座堡垒增添额外一层安保措施；她信任这些生物，认为一旦堡中的类人生物守卫失守或证明不可靠，它们便会击退入侵者。不过，她仍将自己视作奥泽姆圣杯的最后一道防线。若面对无法战胜的局势，阿尔塞拉会带着圣杯弃堡而去。在那之前，任何未经她许可进入奥泽姆堡的人，都很可能会迎来她长弓射出的箭雨，或是她战斧锋利的一侧。

Chernasardo Warden and Commander of Fort Ozem

Arsiella Dei was born to be a Chernasardo Ranger. The youngest daughter of trapper-turned-military-leader Irgal Nirmath, who was assassinated in 4655AR after the disorganized groups of rangers he brought together under a common banner gained their independence from Molthune, Arsiella grew up hearing stories of her father's exploits in a nation named in his honor.

Had she been raised in a different time or place, Arsiella might have been an artist, but instead she began her training under the members of her father's former army, Irgal's Axe, from the time she could walk. Except for the occasional portrait sketched in the margins of her notebook, throughout her childhood Arsiella remained singularly focused on continuing her father's work of keeping Nirmathas a free nation. From her tutors, she learned not only how to wield an axe and bow, but also the arts of stealth, subterfuge, and sabotage. Arsiella was by all accounts considered an excellent student, no less cunning, clever, or insightful than Irgal Nirmath himself.

While her father's compatriots taught Arsiella from an early age, they also spoiled her, often going easier on her than they would another sparring partner. As a result, by the time she was an adolescent, Arsiella believed she was nearly invincible. She took outsized risks on her patrols, sometimes endangering not only her own life, but those of her companions. In this way, Arsiella differed from her father, who always tempered his willingness to risk his own life with a concern for the safety of those under his command. Arsiella knew that if she wanted to become a leader of her people, she would need wisdom as well as skill, but it wasn't until she nearly died at the hands of a Molthuni advance line that she realized the importance of leaving her familiar surroundings of the Southern Fangwood to gain experience abroad.

Arsiella relocated to Lastwall, where she sought tutelage under the Knights of Ozem, a military order dedicated to the goddess Iomedae. In Vigil, the capital of Lastwall at that time, she became a devout follower of the Inheritor, admiring both the goddess's strength and her sense of justice. During this period, Arsiella took the last name Dei, an appellation meant not only to honor her new goddess but to minimize the special treatment she might receive as the daughter of a famous war hero such as Irgal Nirmath.

In Lastwall, Arsiella also built upon her long-standing belief in the importance of mastering different combat styles. Her teachers among the Knights of Ozem taught her how to fight undead, of course, but they also helped her develop the discipline and military regimen she so sorely lacked throughout her youth. In return, Arsiella became a teacher in her own right, instructing younger, inexperienced knights (many of whom would themselves go on to become Crimson Reclaimers) in the value of stealth, survival, and guerrilla warfare. To this day, Arsiella fights using techniques borrowed from the Chernasardo Rangers and the Knights of Ozem, a combination that makes her unique among the members of both those organizations.

Arsiella wasn't in Vigil when it was destroyed in 4719AR , but she was among the first of the forces to return to the city to take a reckoning of the damage that had occurred. Only when it became clear that Tar-Baphon had escaped his prison and that his undead forces were in the process of overwhelming Lastwall did she retreat, along with the Knights of Ozem, to the port city of Vellumis. As Lastwall died and the Gravelands rose to take its place, Arsiella was vital to the reestablishment of the Knights of Ozem, though she refused to become a Knight of Lastwall herself. In this way, Arsiella's years of training came to a fruition—though it pained her to leave her comrades-in-arms behind, she believed her talents would be put to better use mustering foreign forces for the greater battle against the Whispering Tyrant that was surely to come.

By the time she returned to the Southern Fangwood, Arsiella had become both a battle-hardened warrior and a formidable strategist, and she quickly rose through the ranks to become one of the few Chernasardo wardens. While the rangers continued to be a loose confederation of freedom fighters, Arsiella possessed an uncanny ability to coordinate operations using a combination of charm, intimidation, and meticulous organization. This ability, along with her time serving with the Knights of Ozem and her devotion to Iomedae, earned Arsiella her role as the commander of Fort Ozem. When the time came to find a resting place for the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem} , Fort Ozem was the obvious choice, and Arsiella gladly assumed the role of the artifact's chief protector. Arsiella isn't one to be overly impressed by titles, but she sees her appointment as a way to continue her father's legacy, and she has used a bit of her pull to afford him a place of honor within the catacombs beneath the fort. She considers her regular visits to Irgal's tomb as both an honor to her father and a source of strength that helps her fulfill her current duties.

Campaign Role

Arsiella Dei oversees Fort Ozem as the PCs infiltrate the outpost in search of the Chalice of Ozem . Of all the fort's defenders, only Arsiella is aware of the Chalice's presence in the catacombs. Arsiella takes the secrecy of the artifact's presence in the fort with the utmost seriousness. She's long believed that her father's assassination was made possible only because someone inadvertently revealed his location, and she has vowed not to let her knowledge of the fort's true purpose fall into evil hands.

In her time as fort commander, Arsiella has increased the use of traps in the forward “sword” section of Fort Ozem. She's also made deals with local fey and other creatures to add an additional level of security throughout the fort, trusting these creatures to repel intruders should the fort's humanoid defenders fail or prove untrustworthy. She views herself as the Chalice of Ozem's last line of defense, however. If presented with unbeatable odds, Arsiella abandons the fort with the Chalice . Before then, anyone who enters Fort Ozem without her permission is likely to face a hail of arrows from her bow or the sharp side of her axe.

Seldeg Bhedlis.name: 塞尔德格·贝德利斯 Seldeg Bhedlis
Seldeg Bhedlis.text:
宣誓效忠阿拉兹尼的愤恨者墓骑士

塞尔德格·贝德利斯的故事，充满了苦涩与失败。他曾是一名骄傲的欧泽姆骑士，在闪耀远征期间与当时仍是阿罗登先驱的阿拉兹尼并肩作战。他很快便在骑士团中步步高升，并于3889AR成为六名被亲自选中潜入梅基塔城、从内部颠覆盖布国度的骑士之一。

这项任命最终成了塞尔德格的毁灭之始。在此之前，塞尔德格的人生一直遵循着严苛的军事纪律。当他终于摆脱成长经历强加于自己的道德枷锁后，发现盖布的享乐生活实在令人难以抗拒。最终，他投入了一位吸血鬼情人的怀抱，而那名女子本人其实是该国某位鲜血领主的秘密奴仆。在接下来的数周里，塞尔德格将自己所知的一切欧泽姆骑士团情报都透露给了这位新情人，给自己曾经的骑士团造成了无法挽回的损害。意识到自己的所作所为必然会受到阿罗登与法拉丝玛的严厉审判后，塞尔德格同意成为一名墓骑士，而不是去面对诸神的裁决。

成为墓骑士后的第一个任务，就是从维吉尔盗走阿拉兹尼的遗体——在她败于默语暴君之手后，遗体便安葬于此。至少在这件事上，塞尔德格成功了。墓骑士归来后，盖布将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖，并指派塞尔德格与他那些同样堕落的骑士同伴——如今被称为放荡理事会——既担任她的私人护卫，也充当她的看守。

塞尔德格曾数个世纪忠心耿耿地侍奉幽灵王，但最终这名墓骑士再次失败。4719AR，在对塔-巴冯归来的预感驱使下，阿拉兹尼逃离了放荡理事会，逃出盖布国，返回最后壁垒。数周后，她与一群凡人英雄并肩对抗默语暴君时战死，并因此获封神格。作为放任阿拉兹尼逃脱的惩罚，盖布将掩盖这次失败的苦差事交给了塞尔德格。然而，尽管这名墓骑士竭尽全力，阿拉兹尼的飞升依然无法被隐藏。当塞尔德格得知盖布打算摧毁自己的墓骑士铠甲时，这名愤恨的墓骑士逃往死坟末土，并向一位新主人塔-巴冯宣誓效忠。

塞尔德格至今仍被自己的失败所困扰，也因此愈发执着于阿拉兹尼——在他看来，她的经历与自己如出一辙。和阿拉兹尼一样，塞尔德格在很大程度上也是违背自身意愿才成为不死生物，随后又被迫犯下种种暴行；若非命运将他推上这条阴惨道路，他本会对这些行为深恶痛绝。如今，这位堕落骑士打算一劳永逸地修复阿拉兹尼的命运，也修复自己的命运。为此，他设计了一场仪式，要将阿拉兹尼的故事与另一位女神艾奥梅黛的故事互换。若能成功，塞尔德格相信自己将重写历史，让死于塔-巴冯之手的人变成艾奥梅黛，而非阿拉兹尼。

战役作用

塞尔德格·贝德利斯此前曾出现在鲜血领主冒险路径中，其中幽灵王盖布曾提议杀死这名墓骑士并摧毁他受诅咒的铠甲。尽管有这些阴谋算计，塞尔德格还是设法活了下来，不过他那套标志性的铠甲在逃亡过程中受损。盖布的背叛，再加上塞尔德格对自己身为幽灵王间谍总管这一身份日益加深的不满，促使这名墓骑士背离盖布，前往死坟末土，向默语暴君宣誓效忠。

尽管角色们可能尚未意识到这一点，但在《暴君之爪》呈现的三篇冒险中，推动故事发展的核心人物都是塞尔德格·贝德利斯。在每一篇冒险里，塞尔德格的行动都源于他那种绝望的——而且可以说近乎妄想的——信念：只要扭转阿拉兹尼的命运，他便能 somehow 改变自己的命运。然而，塞尔德格的怨恨蒙蔽了他的双眼，使他看不见自己那些试图改写历史的举动，实际上正让他离自己苦苦追寻的救赎越来越远。

在“死坟末土幸存者”中，塞尔德格派出自己的一名特工前往被毁的尤娅之望村，取回@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}之一；塞尔德格相信，这件神器对于为他的仪式提供力量至关重要。英雄们则身处一群难民之中，必须将这枚血石送到安全之人手中。

在“献给奥泽姆的余烬”中，塞尔德格命令角色们从欧泽姆堡窃取另一件遗物——@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{奥泽姆圣杯}。这里曾是欧泽姆骑士团的一处要塞，如今由切尔那萨多游侠看管。尽管圣杯并非施行他那场仪式的必要之物，塞尔德格仍相信，一件与阿拉兹尼和艾奥梅黛历史都如此紧密相连的神器，能为他的魔法增添力量。

本书的最终冒险“血与信仰”中，塞尔德格将着手进行那场交换阿拉兹尼与艾奥梅黛命运的仪式。在这篇冒险里，英雄们要与塞尔德格的爪牙竞速，夺回仍然下落不明的两枚血石。在冒险高潮处，角色们终于有机会与塞尔德格当面对峙，并一劳永逸地终结这名墓骑士的所有阴谋诡计。

Embittered Graveknight Sworn to Arazni

The tale of Seldeg Bhedlis is one of bitterness and failure. Once a proud Knight of Ozem, Seldeg fought alongside Arazni, then still the herald of Aroden, during the Shining Crusade. He rose quickly through the ranks, and in 3889AR, he was one of six knights handpicked to infiltrate the city of Mechitar to take down the nation of Geb from within.

This appointment proved to be Seldeg's undoing. Until this point, Seldeg's life had been one of strict military regimen. Once freed from the shackles of morality imposed upon him by his upbringing, Seldeg found the pleasures of Geb too tempting to resist. He eventually fell into the arms of a vampire lover, who was herself a secret thrall to one of that nation's Blood Lords. Over the following weeks, Seldeg revealed to his new lover everything he knew about the Knights of Ozem, dealing irreparable damage to his former order. Recognizing that his actions would be viewed harshly by both Aroden and Pharasma, Seldeg assented to becoming a graveknight rather than face the judgment of the gods.

Seldeg's first task as a graveknight was to steal Arazni's body from Vigil, where it had been laid to rest after her defeat at the hands of the Whispering Tyrant. In this, at least, Seldeg succeeded. Upon the graveknight's return, Geb transformed Arazni into a lich and assigned Seldeg and his fellow fallen knights, now known as the Council Libertine, to serve as both her personal bodyguards and captors.

Seldeg provided centuries of faithful service to the Ghost King, but eventually the graveknight failed again. In 4719AR, spurred by a premonition of Tar-Baphon's return, Arazni escaped the Council Libertine, fled the nation of Geb, and returned to Lastwall. Weeks later, she was killed fighting the Whispering Tyrant alongside a group of mortal heroes and, as a consequence, was granted godhood. As punishment for allowing Arazni to escape, Geb appointed Seldeg with the unenviable task of covering up this failure. Despite the graveknight's best efforts, however, hiding Arazni's ascension proved impossible. When Seldeg learned that Geb planned to destroy his graveknight armor, the embittered graveknight fled to the Gravelands and pledged his service to a new master, Tar-Baphon.

Still haunted by his failures, Seldeg has since become fixated on Arazni, whose history he believes mirrors his own. Like Arazni, Seldeg became undead largely against his will, then was forced to commit atrocities he would've otherwise abhorred had fate not set him down a grim path. The fallen knight now intends to repair Arazni's fate, along with his own, once and for all. To do so, he's devised a ritual that will swap Arazni's story with that of another goddess, Iomedae. If successful, Seldeg believes he'll rewrite history such that Iomedae, and not Arazni, will have died at the hands of Tar-Baphon.

Campaign Role

Seldeg Bhedlis previously appeared in the Blood Lords Adventure Path, where the Ghost King Geb proposed killing the graveknight and destroying his cursed armor. Despite these machinations, Seldeg managed to survive, though his iconic armor was damaged during his escape. Geb's betrayal, along with Seldeg's growing discontent with his role as the Ghost King's spymaster, inspired the graveknight to defect from Geb and travel to the Gravelands to pledge his service to the Whispering Tyrant.

While the characters might not realize it, Seldeg Bhedlis drives the story of all three adventures presented in Claws of the Tyrant. In each adventure, Seldeg's actions arise from his desperate (and arguably delusional) belief that by undoing Arazni's fate, he'll somehow change his own. Seldeg's bitterness, however, blinds him to the fact that his attempts to rewrite history lead him even further away from the redemption he so desperately seeks.

In “Gravelands Survivors,” Seldeg sends one of his agents to the ruined village of Yua's Hope to retrieve one of the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni}, an artifact Seldeg believes is vital to powering his ritual. The heroes are among a group of refugees who must deliver the Bloodstone into safe hands.

In “Ashes for Ozem,” Seldeg tasks the characters with stealing another relic, the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.sIrKMKRMlXREaO32]{Chalice of Ozem}, from Fort Ozem, a former Knights of Ozem stronghold now under the stewardship of the Chernasardo Rangers. Though the Chalice isn't required to enact his ritual, Seldeg believes an artifact so tied to the histories of Arazni and Iomedae will lend power to his magic.

The book's final adventure, “Of Blood and Faith,” sees Seldeg undertaking the ritual to swap the fates of Arazni and Iomedae. In this adventure, the heroes race Seldeg's minions to recover the two still-missing Bloodstones. At the adventure's climax, the characters finally have the chance to confront Seldeg face-to-face and put an end to the graveknight's machinations once and for all.

Vellumis Gazetteer.name: 维鲁米斯地志 Vellumis Gazetteer
Vellumis Gazetteer.text:
维鲁米斯

聚落 7

  • 城市

繁忙的港口城市，也是死坟末土幸存者最后的避难所；终焉之墙骑士团的总部。

政体 议会

人口 10,418（60%人类，10%精灵，9%兽人，7%矮人，6%卓玛尔，5%地精，3%其他）

语言 通用语，瓦里西亚语

信仰 阿拉兹妮，艾奥梅黛，法拉斯玛，萨仁雷

威胁 贝尔克岑劫掠队、公路匪患、亡灵大军、默语魔道邪教徒

最后的远征 维鲁米斯拥有骑士团中一些最虔诚且技艺最精湛的铁匠。其市场与铁匠铺中可购买或打造最高12级的神圣物品、护甲和武器。

艾伦娜·瓦尔瓦托斯（受人敬重的女性人类牧师 14）象牙大教堂的大司祭，艾奥梅黛第二圣剑骑士

克拉瑞希·艾奥梅达（狂热的非二元性别人类惩戒者 15）落日天使，赤誓骑士

克雷·达拉汉（满怀复仇之心的男性艾乌瓦林骑士 6）斯特德法斯特的守护者

贾纳提莫（睿智的男性艾乌瓦林吟游诗人 14）维鲁米斯学者的领袖

卡拉布琳·艾奥梅达（意志坚定的女性艾奥梅黛圣武士 18）终焉之墙骑士团的顾问

尽管层层污垢与灰烬染脏了维鲁米斯的白色大理石高塔与金色穹顶，这座港口城市依然是闪耀的宝石，也是摆脱死坟末土荒凉景象的一处令人欣慰的歇脚地。在高墙之内，终焉之墙骑士团努力将那些亟待救援的人送上能够带他们逃离塔尔-巴风亡灵大军的船只。

历史

维鲁米斯的历史浸透着战争。它最初是一个名为守望沼的湖畔小港镇，镇子的中心是一座被简单称为“光塔”的瞭望塔，作为导航信标，为那些在恩卡坦湖浓重夜雾中迷失的人指引方向。守望沼属于塔尔-巴风最初向该地区推进时征服的大面积土地之一。

在 AR 3754 年，闪耀远征的联军登陆在守望沼的废墟之上，重新点燃了光塔，并将城镇改名为维鲁米斯。该聚落很快成为远征军对抗巫妖斗争中的主要据点，迅速发展成一座满是骑士与港口商人的大城市。维鲁米斯以当时流行的切利亚克斯“古白”风格重建，采用白色大理石与穹顶；多年来，城中的许多地标也以远征中的英雄与传奇人物重新命名。

当终焉之墙于 4719 年陷落时，残余的终焉之墙居民与奥泽姆骑士团以维鲁米斯作为逃离日益黑暗的死坟末土的集结地。纷争与毁灭随之而来，但那座最初的希望灯塔——如今名为承继者之光——成为骑士团重新建立组织时的集结点。

地理

岩石海滩与浅滩构成了维鲁米斯海岸线的大部分，稀薄而可耕作的草地一路缓升至低矮丘陵。虽然维鲁米斯的土地便于施工，但最初吸引聚落建立、后来又适合军事用途的，是那些非常适合修建内港的天然防波地形。

政体

在终焉之墙陷落之前，一位在瓦里坦城堡执政的领主市长与一名来自奥泽姆骑士团的骑士执政官共同领导维鲁米斯。领主市长的办公室设有一个顾问议会，由各区代表组成，但并无真正权力。

在终焉之墙陷落之后，重组后的骑士团在艾伦娜·瓦尔瓦托斯的影响下接管了更多行政职责。她将统治机构重组为一个拥有 11 个席位的议会，每位成员都有同等表决权。每个城区选出一名议员，而议会最后两个席位则由瓦里坦城堡的城堡总管（通常是一位受人尊敬的骑士）以及一名终焉之墙骑士团代表担任。

居民

维鲁米斯的居民俗称“维鲁米斯人”，由骑士、侍从、手工业者、商人，以及如今来自整个死坟末土的难民混合组成。由于卡拉布琳·艾奥梅达——终焉之墙骑士团最伟大的英雄之一——以及艾伦娜·瓦尔瓦托斯这类强者的存在所带来的安全假象，这座城市的人口持续稳步增长。

城市人口大多数是人类，其余则由精灵、矮人、兽人，甚至一小部分地精构成。令人遗憾的是，这座城市的多样性之所以增加，而且还在持续增加，只是因为该地区接连不断的毁灭性灾难；但这也说明了维鲁米斯作为难民之城的地位——新来的市民不仅受到原有居民公平而友善的对待，还被张开双臂热情欢迎。

重要人物

@UUID[Actor.6EpDcX912OTMCsK5]{杜马尔·万特}（严厉的非二元性别人类游荡者 9）在这座城市最需要他们的时候成为了乌斯卡林旅馆的风险队长。当大火席卷维鲁米斯时，旅馆当时的风险队长谢瓦尔·贝斯尼克为了外出援助城市，将旅馆交给了他那位奸诈的副手薇奥拉·斯凯德林。薇奥拉试图借助恶魔势力散播纷争，并从混乱中牟利，但最终被那些正努力帮助难民逃离的探险者们挫败。谢瓦尔没能回到岗位便已身亡，于是乌斯塔拉夫的风险队长艾夫尼·宗诺斯开始寻找继任者。她在瓦里坦城堡发现了杜马尔——她信任的一位副手之一——当时他正在组织一群幸存者。看到了杜马尔的领导力与同情心后，艾夫尼任命他们负责这间旅馆。

当终焉之墙陷落时，克雷·达拉汉（满怀复仇之心的男性艾乌瓦林骑士 6）与一队骑士一同深入死坟末土，驻守点缀在荒野中的空置瞭望塔，希望夺回一些被亡灵占据的土地。此次任务失败了，克雷成了唯一的幸存者。身负创伤又满怀愧疚的克雷在一个名为斯特德法斯特的小镇难民中度过了一年，训练他们生存，直到援军到来、将他们从成群亡灵手中解救出来；与此同时，他始终暗自希望能组建一支足够强大的部队，夺回那座令他的同袍丧命的塔楼。当斯特德法斯特的居民最终获救后，克雷带着一群难民与征召士兵返回维鲁米斯，希望发起一场收复南方土地的战役。

地点

当十字军将维鲁米斯发展为他们在恩卡坦湖上的战略据点时，他们修建了这座城市著名的高耸白墙与要塞——瓦里坦城堡，用于安置和训练骑士，并为这座有城墙的城市提供防御。最初，这座城市被划分为三个城区以便行政管理。后来，湖滨区被拆分为两个城区，新码头区则作为第五个城区伸入恩卡坦湖。几个世纪以来，维鲁米斯的人口超出了城墙所能保护的范围，于是四个更大的城区在城墙防护之外兴起。

Vellumis

Settlement 7

  • City

Bustling port city and the last refuge for Gravelands survivors; headquarters of the Knights of Lastwall.

Government Council

Population 10,418 (60% humans, 10% elves, 9% orcs, 7% dwarves, 6% dromaars, 5% goblins, 3% other)

Languages Common, Varisian

Religions Arazni, Iomedae, Pharasma, Sarenrae

Threats Belkzen raiding parties, highway banditry, undead hordes, Whispering Way cultists

Last Crusade Vellumis houses some of the most pious and skilled smiths within the knighthood's ranks. Divine items, armors, and weapons of up to level 12 can be purchased or crafted in its markets and smithies.

Aylunna Varvatos (respected female human cleric 14) High Cleric of the Ivory Basilica, Second Sword Knight of Iomedae

Clarethe Iomedar (fervent nonbinary human vindicator 15) Sunset Angel, Knight of the Crimson Oath

Cray Darahan (vengeful male aiuvarin knight 6) protector of Steadfast

Janatimo (wise male aiuvarin bard 14) leader of the Vellumis Scholars

Kalabrynne Iomedar (determined female human paladin of Iomedae 18) advisor to the Knights of Lastwall

Despite the layers of grime and ash staining the white marble towers and golden domes of Vellumis, the port city remains a shining jewel and welcome respite from the desolation of the Gravelands. From within its high walls, the Knights of Lastwall work to usher those in need of rescue to vessels capable of offering flight from the hordes of Tar-Baphon.

History

Vellumis's history is steeped in war. Originally founded as a small lakeside port town called Watchmoor, the town was centered around a watchtower called simply the Light that acted as a navigational beacon for those lost in Lake Encarthan's thick night mists. Watchmoor numbered among the large swaths of land conquered by Tar-Baphon's initial push into the region.

In 3754 AR, the united forces of the Shining Crusade landed in what remained of Watchmoor, rekindled the Light, and renamed the town Vellumis. The settlement quickly became the crusade's main foothold in their struggle against the lich, rapidly growing into a large city full of knights and port traders. Vellumis was rebuilt with white marbles and domes in the era's popular Chelaxian “Old White” style, and over the years, many of its landmarks were renamed after the crusade's heroes and legends.

When Lastwall fell in 4719, the remaining Lastwall residents and Knights of Ozem used Vellumis as a staging ground for escape from the darkening Gravelands. Strife and destruction followed in their wake, but the original beacon of hope, now called the Inheritor's Light, became a rally point for the knighthood as they worked to reestablish their organization.

Geography

Rocky beaches and shoals make up the majority of the Vellumis coastline, with thin, arable grasslands sloping up into low hills. While Vellumis's lands made for easy construction, the natural breakwaters ideal for building an inner harbor attracted the initial settlement and later military use.

Government

Before the fall of Lastwall, a lord mayor ruling from Castle Varitan led Vellumis alongside a knight consul from the Knights of Ozem. The lord mayor's office had an advisory council filled with representatives from each district, which held no real power.

After the fall of Lastwall, the reformed knighthood took over greater administrative duties under the influence of Aylunna Varvatos. She restructured the governing body as an 11-seat council, each member having an equal vote. Each district elects a council member, and the final two seats of the council are filled by the castellan of Castle Varitan (usually a respected knight) and a representative of the Knights of Lastwall.

People of Vellumis

Vellumis's populace, colloquially called Vellumites, are a mix of knights, retainers, tradespeople, merchants, and now refugees from throughout the Gravelands. The city's population steadily rises thanks to the illusion of safety brought by the presence of powerful people like Kalabrynne Iomedar, one of the greatest heroes of the Knights of Lastwall, and Aylunna Varvatos.

Most of the city's population is human, the remainder being a mix of elves, dwarves, orcs, and even a small percentage of goblins. It's unfortunate that the city's diversity has only increased—and continues to increase—due to the devastating troubles in the region, but it speaks to Vellumis's status as a refugee city that its new citizens have not only been treated fairly and kindly by the original populace, but have been welcomed with open arms.

Notable Personalities

@UUID[Actor.6EpDcX912OTMCsK5]{Duimar Vant} (stern nonbinary human rogue 9) became the venture-captain of Uscalin Lodge when the city needed them most. When fires raged across Vellumis, the lodge's sitting venture-captain, Shevar Besnik, left his lodge in the hands of his treacherous second, Viora Skedrin, while he went out to aid the city. Viora attempted to sow discord and profit off the chaos with the help of demonic forces, only to be foiled by Pathfinders who were working to help refugees escape. Shevar perished before he could return to his post, leading Ustalav's venture-captain Evni Zongnoss to look for a replacement. She found Duimar, one of her trusted lieutenants, organizing a group of survivors at Castle Varitan. Seeing Duimar's leadership and compassion, Evni put them in charge of the lodge.

When Lastwall fell, Cray Darahan (vengeful male aiuvarin knight 6) went along with a cohort of knights into the thick of the Gravelands to staff the vacant watchtowers dotting the wilderness, hoping to reclaim some of the land lost to the undead. The mission was a failure, with Cray the only survivor. Wounded and guilt-ridden, Cray spent a year among refugees in a small town called Steadfast, training them to survive until reinforcements came to deliver them from hordes of undead, all the while quietly hoping to raise a force strong enough to take back the tower that cost him the lives of his comrades. When the Steadfast citizenry was finally rescued, Cray returned to Vellumis with a group of refugees and conscripted soldiers with hopes of starting a campaign to retake the lands to the south.

Locations In Vellumis

As the crusaders developed Vellumis into their strategic position on Lake Encarthan, they built the city's famous towering white walls and fortress, Castle Varitan, to house and train knights and offer defense to the walled city. The city was initially separated into three districts for easy administration. Eventually, Lakeside was split into two districts, and Newdock was added as a fifth district, reaching out into Lake Encarthan. Over the centuries, Vellumis's population exceeded what the city walls could protect, causing four larger districts to rise outside of the protection of the city's walls.

Chalice of Ozem.name: 奥泽姆圣杯 Chalice of Ozem
Chalice of Ozem.text:
• 独特
  • 神器
  • 神术

这只精美的晨银圣杯镶嵌着数十颗红宝石，杯身外侧精工打造的装饰纹样中至今仍残留着艾奥梅黛的血迹斑点。当塔-巴丰初次试图征服阿维斯坦时，奥泽姆城的骑士守护者们带着奥泽姆圣杯逃离了。数世纪后，这件圣遗物被传给了仍是凡人的艾奥梅黛，她曾用它在与埃鲁姆-赫尔——默语暴君麾下最可怕的副官之一——的一场关键战斗中对抗敌人。自艾奥梅黛升神以来，奥泽姆圣杯本身也已成为一件神器。

  • unique
  • artifact
  • divine

This fine dawnsilver chalice is studded with dozens of rubies, and the finely wrought decorative patterns on the outside of the cup still contain flecks of Iomedae’s blood. When Tar-Baphon first attempted to conquer Avistan, the knight protectors of the city of Ozem fled with the Chalice of Ozem. Centuries later, the relic was handed down to the mortal Iomedae, who used it in a critical battle against Erum-Hel, one of the Whispering Tyrant’s most fearsome lieutenants. Since Iomedae’s ascension, the Chalice of Ozem has become an artifact in its own right.

Lastwall Recruits.name: 终焉之墙新兵 Lastwall Recruits
Lastwall Recruits.text:
招募技巧

招募技巧 为终焉之墙骑士团寻找新成员是一个多种多样的过程。在某些情况下，一名骑士会在战火最炽之际加入队伍，与其他终焉之墙骑士团骑士并肩拿起武器对抗不死生物。这些新兵是在战斗中锻造而成的，而当前的终焉之墙骑士团骑士通常会在局势解决后与此人会面

在外人看来，终焉之墙骑士团一直在内海地区各处发动圣战，摧毁不死生物与邪恶，只在战斗间隙稍作喘息。虽然这种看法并非全然不实，但骑士们并不只是职业军人；他们是推进善之事业的英勇之士，无论在战场上还是战场之外皆是如此。这些努力有许多形式，而终焉之墙骑士团也希望任何愿意拿起武器——无论是字面意义上的还是比喻意义上的——对抗邪恶的人都能壮大他们的队伍。

侍从誓言

成为终焉之墙骑士团的一员很简单，尽管要被认可为真正的骑士则没那么容易。一个人只需要找到一名现有成员，比如一位从一座城市旅行到另一座城市的招募者，或是一位在阿维斯坦各地对抗较小邪恶的游历骑士，然后提出加入即可。对于未经考验的新兵，不会强加任何誓言，要求他们旅行得更远或战斗得比自身能力所及更艰难；骑士之路荆棘遍布，即便是最热忱的招募者也会强调，若是达不到要求，也并不可耻。

若新兵在战斗或其他有用技能方面证明了自己的能力——并且其内心被认定具备骑士那种正直无私的潜质——便可以通过宣誓一则简单的誓言，晋升为侍从，也就是该骑士团中较低的阶级。

以我的荣誉与勇气起誓，我将成为这世上一切美善的化身；以终焉之墙之名，并以其记忆起誓，我将反抗这世上一切邪恶。”

Recruitment Techniques

Recruitment Techniques Seeking out new members for the Knights of Lastwall is a varied process. In some cases, a knight joins the ranks in the heat of battle, taking up arms against undead alongside other Knights of Lastwall. These recruits are forged in combat, and the current Knights of Lastwall typically meet with the individual once the situation is resolved

To outsiders, the Knights of Lastwall constantly crusade to destroy undead and evil throughout the Inner Sea, stopping only to catch a breath between battles. While this assessment isn’t entirely untrue, the knights are more than career soldiers; they’re valiant individuals furthering the cause of good, on the battlefield and off. These efforts take many forms and the Knights of Lastwall seek to swell their ranks with anyone willing to take up arms—be they literal or figurative—against evil.

Squire's Oath

Becoming a member of the Knights of Lastwall is simple, though being recognized as a true knight is less so. One needs only to seek out an existing member, such as a recruiter who travels from city to city or a knight-itinerant who combats smaller evils throughout Avistan, and ask to join. No oath is laid upon untested recruits to travel farther or battle harder than they are able; the path of the knights is thorny, and even the most passionate recruiters stress that there is no shame in failing to measure up.

Recruits who prove competent at combat or other useful skills—and whose hearts are deemed to hold the potential for the righteous selflessness of the knights—may advance to the rank of squire, the lower rank of the order, by swearing a simple oath.

Upon my honor and by my courage, I shall become all that is good in this world; in the name of Lastwall and in its memory, I shall oppose all that is evil in this world.”

The Shining Sentinels.name: 辉耀哨卫 The Shining Sentinels
The Shining Sentinels.text:
辉耀哨卫角色

辉耀哨卫主要专注于保卫他人。圣武士、战士，以及其他拥有能够帮助减轻他人所受伤害选项的角色，在哨卫中都很常见。哨卫中的施法者往往专注于防护学派以及治疗魔法。

作为所有派系中活动范围最广、也最具社交性的一个，辉耀哨卫正是内海地区大多数民众一想到终焉之墙骑士团时脑海中浮现的形象：身披闪亮护甲的骑士，手持盾牌，随时准备从任何可能出现的邪恶手中守护无辜者。确实，哨卫是分布最广泛的骑士群体，其中的警醒骑士——哨卫骑士的通称——在内海地区乃至更远处的每一个角落与不公作战，并招募侍从。尽管他们的人数仍不足以在支援其他善举的同时对抗阿维斯坦各地的所有邪恶，辉耀哨卫仍不懈地朝着那一天努力。

辉光誓言

在收到许多同袍哨卫的抱怨后，贝里维尔·星光写下了如下誓词，作为《绯红誓言》的姊妹篇。它更富诗意，也更为优雅，甚至带着吟唱般的韵律，非常典型地体现了她的文风。尽管不像它的姊妹誓言那样广为流传，但知晓此誓的哨卫常会在战前齐声诵读；贝里维尔也经常用它来激励勇气。

我剑锋在手，我护甲生辉，

我盾光耀如天使之羽；

我守护无辜者纯真的梦，

绝不于厄运阴影下战栗。

纵然我踏过这些饱经战火的疲惫领域，

心中仍因希望之光而炽热；

面对暴君麾下每一名不死封臣，

我们都将整装迎战顽强英勇之敌。

身为众多骑士中的一员，我等灵魂燃烧，

并肩执兵，铸成坚不可摧之壁；

于是我等齐声宣告

这辉光誓言：暴君必将陨落！

Shining Sentinel Characters

The Shining Sentinels are focused primarily on the defense of others. Champions, fighters, and other characters with options that help mitigate damage to others are common among the sentinels. Sentinel spellcasters tend to focus on abjuration as well as healing magic.

By far the most wide-ranging and social of the factions, the Shining Sentinels are what most folk of the Inner Sea envision when they think of the Knights of Lastwall: a knight in shining armor, shield at hand, ready to defend the innocent from whatever evils may arise. Certainly, the sentinels are the most broadly distributed knights, with knights vigilant—the common name for knights among the sentinels—fighting injustice and recruiting squires in every corner of the Inner Sea and beyond. While their numbers aren’t yet enough to fight every evil of Avistan while supporting good elsewhere, the Shining Sentinels work ceaselessly toward that hour.

The Luminous Oath

After numerous complaints from fellow sentinels, Beirivelle Starshine penned the following to serve as a sister to the Crimson Oath. More poetic and elegant, even singsong, it’s highly typical of her work. While less ubiquitous than its sister oath, Sentinels who know it often recite it in unison before battle; Beirivelle frequently uses it to inspire courage.

My blade is at hand, my armor it gleams,

My shield shines bright as an angel’s plume;

I stand protector of innocent dreams,

And ne’er shall quake ’neath shadow of doom.

Though I tread these war-torn weary domains,

With the light of hope my heart is aglow;

As for each of the Tyrant’s deathless thanes,

We gird a stalwart and mettlesome foe.

As one knight of many, our souls aflame,

Together at arms an adamant wall;

And thus our voices in chorus proclaim

This Luminous Oath: the Tyrant shall fall!

The Crimson Reclaimers.name: 绯红复国团 The Crimson Reclaimers
The Crimson Reclaimers.text:
绯红复国团角色

对绯红复国团的任务而言，求生是关键，无论是在危险荒野中勉强维生，还是在遍布不死生物的废墟中躲避追捕。许多绯红复国团成员是调查员、游荡者或游侠，他们运用自己的技能熬过任务中的种种艰难。绯红复国团中的施法者包括牧师、法师和女巫，他们依靠防护系、预言系和变化系魔法来提高自己的生存机会。

如果说辉耀哨卫是终焉之墙骑士团坚不可摧的盾，那么绯红复国团便是这个骑士团势不可挡的剑，直刺敌人胸膛，撕裂其心脏。他们不愿等待同袍骑士去鼓动阿维斯坦诸国投入战争，而是将战火直接带入敌境，在动乱中拯救无辜者，并抓住一切机会破坏默语暴君的阴谋。尽管他们看似鲁莽而富于攻击性，复国团成员既非有勇无谋，也不冲动失控，虽说个别成员偶尔也会如此。复国团成员运用一切可用手段，在不被俘虏或消灭的前提下对抗占据当地的不死生物，从激进的侦察（这往往是“外科式打击”的委婉说法，意在清除敌方首领并扰乱暴君头重脚轻的指挥链）到游击战，无所不用其极。

绯红誓言

每一位加入绯红复国团的骑士都必须宣誓绯红誓言。对一些骑士而言，最初这一次宣誓就是他们唯一一次念出这段誓言。对另一些更多的骑士来说，这段誓言是战前准备例行动作的一部分，可能是在穿戴护甲时、磨利刀刃时，或是在投入战斗之前低声念诵。

我们以如死亡般冰冷的声音起誓，

只要我们仍然屹立，仍在呼吸，

我们便绝不容死者存续，

也绝不让他们玷污我们土地的青翠。

我们绝不迟疑，绝不溃逃，

而要将他们斩尽并焚烧殆尽，

我们以警醒城破碎的城墙起誓，

我们的绯红誓言：暴君陨落！

Crimson Reclaimers Characters

Survival is key for Crimson Reclaimer missions, be it subsisting in dangerous wilds or eluding capture in undead-ridden ruins. Many Crimson Reclaimers are investigators, rogues, or rangers, and they use their skills to endure the hardships of their tasks. Crimson Reclaimer spellcasters include clerics, wizards, and witches who rely on abjuration, divination, and transmutation magic to increase their chances of survival.

If the Shining Sentinels are the unbreakable shield of the Knights of Lastwall, the Crimson Reclaimers are the order’s inexorable sword, plunging deep into the enemy’s chest to rend its heart. Unwilling to wait for their fellow knights to stir the nations of Avistan to war, the reclaimers take the fight directly to enemy territory, saving innocents caught in the tumult and undermining the Whispering Tyrant’s plots at every opportunity. Despite their seemingly reckless aggression, reclaimers are neither foolhardy nor intemperate, though individual members have their moments. Reclaimers use every trick in the book to fight undead occupiers without being captured or eradicated, from aggressive scouting (often a euphemism for surgical strikes to eliminate enemy leaders and disrupt the Tyrant’s top-heavy chain of command) to guerrilla warfare.

The Crimson Oath

Every knight who joins the Crimson Reclaimers must swear the Crimson Oath. For some knights, this initial swearing is the only time they utter the oath. For many others, the oath is part of the routine of preparing for combat, either uttered while donning armor, sharpening a blade, or just before joining a fight.

We swear with voices cold as death,

While yet we stand and yet draw breath,

We shall not let the dead endure,

Nor let them taint our lands verdure.

We shall not falter, shall not rout,

But cut them down and burn them out,

We swear on Vigil’s shattered walls,

Our Crimson Oath: the Tyrant falls!

Cafe Maroon.name: 栗红咖啡馆 Cafe Maroon
Cafe Maroon.text:
这家小咖啡馆坐落在一条安静街道上，两侧是两家价格高昂的服装店。门上方一块朴素的栗红色招牌上绘着一套简单的白色茶具；这里正是栗红咖啡馆那极具标志性的门面，也是这座城市里品尝新鲜事物的最佳去处。这里虽然供应来自格拉利昂各地最上乘的咖啡与茶，真正的用途却是作为@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.vqfR7MJdIM0T8r8W]{绯红复国团}的聚会地点。成员们在此会面，讨论任务、目标，以及影响其事业的世界大事。他们珍视这里，因为馆内施了魔法的安静卡座能防止爱打听的邻居偷听他人的谈话。咖啡馆由马里坦·哈林（吹毛求疵的非二元性别艾乌瓦林吟游诗人5）经营，他们对自己高雅的品味以及所受的塔尔丹狮刃训练深感自豪。他们亲自挑选每日供应的饮品、超小型三明治和现场音乐，也会以极其严肃的态度倾听顾客的意见，以免错过任何潮流。

This small cafe sits nestled between two high-cost clothing stores on a quiet street. A modest maroon sign above the door displays a simple white tea set; this is the iconic storefront of Cafe Maroon, the best place in the city to taste something new. While it features the finest coffees and teas from across Golarion, its real purpose is as a @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.vqfR7MJdIM0T8r8W]{Crimson Reclaimers} hangout. Members meet to discuss missions, objectives, and world events that influence their cause. They prize this location for its magically quieted booths that prevent nosy neighbors from listening to others' conversations. The cafe is run by Maritan Harlin (finicky nonbinary aiuvarin bard 5), who takes great pride in their exquisite taste and Taldan Lion Blade training. They personally select the daily offerings of beverages, tiny sandwiches, and live music as well as listen to patrons' opinions with grave seriousness, lest they miss a trend.

The Dawn's Glimmer.name: 黎明微光 The Dawn's Glimmer
The Dawn's Glimmer.text:
阿尔马斯·穆洛纳普家族的内尔·穆洛纳普（一位怯懦的女性半身人、撒恩蕾的4级牧师）在塔巴丰从绞首塔逃脱前不久开了这家小型珠宝店，专营晨银饰品。它在维鲁米斯的围攻中几乎未受伤害而幸存下来，并继续为这座城市的上层阶级提供商品。自那次攻击以来，她已将经营范围扩展到便于藏匿的晨银武器和注重防护的时尚护符。

Nelle Mullonap (timid female halfling cleric of Sarenrae 4) of the Almas Mullonaps opened this small jewelry store specializing in dawnsilver adornments just before Tar-Baphon's escape from Gallowspire. It survived the siege of Vellumis with little damage and continues to provide wares to the city's upper class. Since the attack, she's expanded her offerings to concealable dawnsilver weapons and fashionable talismans focused on protection.

Ivory Basilica.name: 象牙大教堂 Ivory Basilica
Ivory Basilica.text:
在这座城市星罗棋布的18座教堂中，象牙大教堂是规模最大、装饰最华丽、也最受欢迎的圣洁神殿。它建在艾奥梅黛于维鲁米斯集结时所居住营地的旧址之上；象牙大教堂是东湖区最大的建筑，也是城中三座艾奥梅黛的教堂里地位最高的一座。在艾伦娜·瓦尔瓦托斯的领导下，这座教堂积极参与城市行政事务，并为所有骑士提供援助，无论其信仰为何。

Of the 18 churches dotting the city, the Ivory Basilica stands as the largest, most ornate, and most popular of the holy temples. Built upon the site of Iomedae's quarters while mustering in Vellumis, the Ivory Basilica is Eastlake's largest structure and the highest ranking of the city's three Iomedaean churches. Under Aylunna Varvatos's leadership, the church takes an active part in city administration and offers succor to all knights, no matter their faith.

Eastlake.name: 东湖区 Eastlake
Eastlake.text:
东湖区是昔日湖滨区的东半部，从英勇之门一直延伸到维鲁米斯的东城墙。这个富裕的街区街道整洁，住宅朴素，同时也坐落着这座城市大多数的礼拜场所。该区域尤其以作为当地日益兴盛的阿拉兹尼崇拜中心而闻名，设有数座供奉她的小型神龛。

Eastlake is the eastern half of the former Lakeside District, spanning from the Valorous Gate to the eastern wall of Vellumis. This wealthy neighborhood with clean streets and modest homes also houses most of the city's places of worship. The area is particularly known as the local center for the rising worship of Arazni, with several small shrines dedicated to her.

Eastwatch.name: 东望区 Eastwatch
Eastwatch.text:
东望区最初源于东湖区越过守护这座城市的玄武岩城墙后向外扩张而形成。多年来，由于远离塔楼区的城市卫兵营房，这里因相当程度的犯罪活动而声名狼藉。然而，每当这座城市遭逢危机时，即便是东望区里最穷凶极恶的惯犯，也会被召来协助保卫维鲁米斯。

Eastwatch originally grew from the Eastlake expansion past the basalt walls protecting the city. Over the years, it became notorious for a degree of criminal activity far from the city guard barracks in the Tower District. However, whenever crisis befalls the city, even the worst of the hardened criminals in Eastwatch can be called upon to help defend Vellumis.

Eastside Docks.name: 东码头 Eastside Docks
Eastside Docks.text:
东码头是近年来为那些想避开维鲁米斯停泊费和城市卫兵耳目的人而修建的。官府一再试图让这座城市摆脱这些码头及其所支援的犯罪势力，但无论用什么方法将它们拆除，没过几天，它们总会以某种方式被重建起来，并准备好接纳船只。

The Eastside docks were built in recent years for use by those avoiding Vellumis's docking fees and the eyes of the city guard. Authorities have tried time and again to rid the city of the docks and the criminal elements they support, but no matter what methods are used to disassemble them, within days they're always somehow rebuilt and ready to take in ships.

Endless Eats.name: 永不停口 Endless Eats
Endless Eats.text:
永不停口是一家出了名便宜的小餐馆，那里会用魔法净化低等鱼类和其他海鲜制品以供食用。虽然这里提供的餐食选择种类不多，例如炸牡蛎和烤串，但这家餐馆最出名的还是它的“鱼肉浓汁”——一种混合海鲜熬成的粥，配着扎实的面包一起食用。大多数食客都会自带调味品和配菜，彼此交换，或把所有东西都混在一起，搭配出新的餐食组合。

Endless Eats is a notoriously cheap eatery where low-grade fish and other seafood products are magically purified for consumption. While there's a small variety of meal options, such as fried oysters and roasted skewers, the eatery is best known for its “fish gravy,” a porridge of mixed seafood served with hearty bread. Most diners bring their own condiments and sides, trading with each other or throwing everything together to make new meal combinations.

Fair Feathered Ranch.name: 羽丰牧场 Fair Feathered Ranch
Fair Feathered Ranch.text:
为了帮助重建终焉之墙骑士团的骑兵部队，瓦里坦城堡在维鲁米斯围城期间牧场主及其牲畜全部遇害后，将一座牧场交由珀西瓦尔·威德申斯（富有创新精神的男性人类学者 5）使用。这位年轻学者想要检验自己关于斧喙鸟谱系的理论，正利用这座牧场培育一种新的斧喙鸟。到目前为止，这项计划进展顺利，不过曾发生过一次意外：几十只刚孵化的幼鸟逃出了牧场，在城市里四处横冲直撞，后来才被捕获并送回。

To help rebuild the cavalry of the Knights of Lastwall, Castle Varitan granted use of a ranch to Persival Widdershins (innovative male human scholar 5) after the ranch's owner and livestock were all killed during the siege of Vellumis. The young scholar wanted to put his theories on axebeak genealogy to the test and is using the ranch to breed a new kind of axebeak. So far, the project is going well, but there was an incident where a few dozen hatchlings escaped the ranch and ran amok in the city before they were captured and returned.

Treasured Things General Store.name: 珍奇百货店 Treasured Things General Store
Treasured Things General Store.text:
这家朴素的小店从岩钉到梨子应有尽有，数代以来一直为东望区社区服务。游客们觉得这里是旅途中采购所需物品的便利一站式商店，但大多数人并不知道它真正的收入来源：稀有货物。巴提·德纳姆（一名狡黠的人类男性走私者 9）经营着这家店，并可接触到一个庞大的秘密商贩网络，能够在一两天内提供巧克力或菠萝之类的稀有食品。对于愿意付钱的人，他还提供强效毒素和其他非法违禁品。他为掌权者供应他们渴求的独家物品的能力，让他一直避开卫兵的注意，并得以持续经营。

This simple shop carries everything from pitons to pears and has served the Eastwatch community for generations. While visitors find it to be a convenient one-stop shop for everything they need on their travels, most don't know of its true source of revenue: rare goods. Barty Durnam (crafty male human smuggler 9) runs the shop and has access to an extensive network of secret dealers, able to supply rare foodstuffs such as chocolate or pineapples within a day or two. For those willing to pay, he also provides potent poisons and other illegal paraphernalia. His ability to supply those with power the exclusive items they desire has kept him off the guards' radar and in continued operation.

Embassy District.name: 使馆区 Embassy District
Embassy District.text:
东望区最初是在东湖区向外扩张、越过保护这座城市的玄武岩城墙后逐渐发展起来的。多年来，由于远离塔楼区的城市卫兵营房，这里因猖獗的犯罪活动而声名狼藉。然而，每当这座城市遭遇危机时，即使是东望区最顽固凶狠的罪犯，也会被召来协助保卫维鲁米斯。

Eastwatch originally grew from the Eastlake expansion past the basalt walls protecting the city. Over the years, it became notorious for a degree of criminal activity far from the city guard barracks in the Tower District. However, whenever crisis befalls the city, even the worst of the hardened criminals in Eastwatch can be called upon to help defend Vellumis.

Castle Varitan.name: 瓦里坦城堡 Castle Varitan
Castle Varitan.text:
瓦里坦城堡以一位早期闪耀远征军将领的名字命名，是维鲁米斯议会的所在地，也是这座城市的主要防御设施。城堡内常驻数百名骑士，并始终整装待发，以应对任何形式的大规模袭击。

Named for an early Shining Crusade general, Castle Varitan is the seat of the Vellumis Council as well as the main defense for the city. It houses several hundred knights at a time and remains at the ready for any sort of large-scale assault.

Freedom's Hall.name: 自由厅 Freedom's Hall
Freedom's Hall.text:
自由厅曾是安多安繁忙的使馆，但在4719年蔓延维鲁米斯的大火中，被敌人蓄意破坏。虽然这座建筑后来被解放，安多安却至今未能收回其使馆。根据传闻，至今仍覆盖着这座建筑和该区大部分地方的灰暗灰烬污迹，是某些依然潜藏在其墙内某处的魔鬼留下的迹象。

Once a bustling embassy for the nation of Andoran, Freedom's Hall was sabotaged by enemies during the fires that spread through Vellumis in 4719. While the building was liberated, Andoran has yet to reclaim its embassy. According to rumors, the gray dinge of ash that still covers the building and most of the district is a sign of devils that remain hidden somewhere within its walls.

Gilded Tongue.name: 金舌 Gilded Tongue
Gilded Tongue.text:
金舌是一家高档咖啡馆，由卡莉拉·德夫南（冷傲的男性精灵厨师 8）经营；他以制作奇趣餐点而闻名，例如做成龙形的酥点，会从它们的颚咬中挤出火辣香甜的辣椒果酱。奇妙的食材与诱人的香气充满了这座美丽的餐馆，不过谁也不被允许坐在最左边角落里那张唯一一张腐朽的木桌旁。

Gilded Tongue is a high-end cafe owned by Kalira Devnan (aloof male elf chef 8), who's famous for creating whimsical meals, such as pastries shaped like dragons that squeeze fiery, sweet chili jam from their jaws. Wondrous ingredients and tantalizing smells fill this beautiful restaurant, though no one is allowed to sit at the single rotting wooden table in the far left corner.

The Valorous Gardens.name: 英勇花园 The Valorous Gardens
The Valorous Gardens.text:
作为牙林精灵宫廷统治者根多温女王赐予维鲁米斯的一份赋礼，树木茂密的英勇花园终年保持着美丽与葱郁。然而，这些花园也被证明相当危险，因为稍不留神的访客就可能迷失数日甚至数周——即便那位迷路的访客只感觉过去了短短几个小时。骑士们曾考虑将花园夷为平地，但一直未采取行动，因为花园为通往瓦里坦城堡的坡道提供了防护，也因为维鲁米斯的居民对这片属于他们城市的私人魔法森林深感自豪。

A gift to Vellumis from Queen Gendowyn, ruler of the fey court of the Fangwood, the thickly forested Valorous Gardens remain beautiful and lush year-round. However, the gardens have proven dangerous, as inattentive visitors can become lost for days or weeks—even if the lost visitor only experienced a few hours going by. The knights have considered razing the gardens but haven't taken action due to the defense the gardens provide the ramp to Castle Varitan as well as due to the pride the people of Vellumis feel for their city's personal enchanted forest.

Honor's Field.name: 荣誉田野 Honor's Field
Honor's Field.text:
这座城市的这一部分最初是由北望区的农夫和侍从耕种的小麦与大麦田。农场和粮仓在终焉之墙陷落时的大火中被焚毁，随后被一片由有需要之人搭建的大型棚户区所取代。难民很快涌入荣誉田野，每个街区都陆续出现了野战医院。遗憾的是，近期超自然疾病的暴发使荣誉田野变得危险了许多。

This part of the city began as wheat and barley fields tended by the farmers and squires of Northwatch. The farms and granaries were razed during the fires of the fall of Lastwall and were replaced by a large shantytown built by those in need. Refugees soon flocked to Honor's Field, with field hospitals popping up on every block. Unfortunately, recent outbreaks of supernatural diseases have made Honor's Field considerably less safe.

Pristine Produce.name: 生态农产 Pristine Produce
Pristine Produce.text:
这家农场兼杂货摊种植并出售他们自己的全部农产品，店面后方几块小型田地里自豪地种着这些作物。店主是@UUID[Actor.sXwQnsc0sU5olvf7]{阿穆斯·德斯特鲁姆}（野心勃勃的人类男性炼金术师 3），他使用特殊的植物肥料和杀虫剂，让自己的作物长得又大又美味，还没有虫害。他甚至还有一种用于堆肥制作高品质土壤的“独家配方”。尽管店里的一些送货员声称曾看见“一只腐烂的手”从堆肥箱里伸出来，卫兵们却至今尚未调查。要是他们调查了，或许就会发现阿穆斯一直在用附近罗斯勒的棺藏的腐烂植物与泥土混合，堆肥处理不死尸体。

This farm and grocery stand raises and sells all their own products, which are proudly grown on several small plots behind the storefront. The proprietor, @UUID[Actor.sXwQnsc0sU5olvf7]{Amus Derstrum} (ambitious male human alchemist 3), uses special plant food and pesticides to keep his crops big, delicious, and pest free. He even has a “proprietary blend” used for composting high-quality soil. While some of the shop's couriers have reported seeing “a rotting hand” sticking out of the compost bin, the guards have yet to investigate. If they did, they might discover that Amus has been composting undead corpses in a mix of soil and rotting plants from nearby Roslar's Coffer.

Queenie's Combs.name: 奎妮蜂坊 Queenie's Combs
Queenie's Combs.text:
围攻维鲁米斯引发的火灾和浓烟重创了当地的蜜蜂数量。奎妮（一位友善的女性向日葵蕈灵养蜂人 5）一直在努力保护她能找到的蜜蜂，并把它们带到自己的蜂场。她的蜂蜜会免费分给难民和当地居民，同时她也会卖给商人和餐馆刚好够缴纳当地税款的份量。她养了几只巨蜂来威慑强盗；这些蜜蜂会故意在受害者显眼的位置留下难看的肿痕，这样之后就能辨认出强盗。有人声称奎妮正在教蜜蜂如何拼写，这样她就能真正羞辱那些试图偷她东西的人——用诅咒字眼给他们打上烙印。

The fires and smoke from the siege of Vellumis devastated the local bee population. Queenie (friendly female sunflower leshy beekeeper 5) has been working hard to preserve the bees she can find and bring them to her apiary. Her honey is given freely to refugees and locals, while she sells just enough to merchants and restaurants to pay local taxes. She keeps a few giant bees to act as a deterrent to robbers; the bees purposely leave nasty welts in prominent places on their victims so robbers can be identified later. Some claim Queenie is teaching the bees how to spell, so she can truly shame those who try to steal from her by branding them with curse words.

Respite Row.name: 喘息街 Respite Row
Respite Row.text:
喘息街是一个露天市场，由侍从和永久居民经营，帮助涌入的难民找到食物和衣物。它实际上还充当该区的行政枢纽，帮助难民安顿下来并寻找工作，同时也作为潜在侍从的招募中心。

Respite Row is an open-air market run by squires and permanent citizens to help incoming refugees find food and clothing. It acts as a de facto district administration hub to help refugees settle in and find employment, and it also serves as a recruiting center for possible squires.

Cinderland Brews.name: 烬地佳酿 Cinderland Brews
Cinderland Brews.text:
这家酿酒坊兼酒馆举办着维鲁米斯一些最喧闹、最危险也最精彩的酒吧斗殴，其中几位常客还凭借自己的打斗本领获得了些许名气。尽管——又或者正因为——这种喧嚣的暴力，烬地佳酿仍是这一区最成功的店家之一。卡塔格（鲁莽的男性兽人酿酒大师 6）与尖啸雷鸣（无畏的女性绍安提人类斗士 6）在4701年结婚后不久开了这间酒馆，而他们的婚礼最终以一场臭名昭著、席卷全城的斗殴收场。尽管他们以暴力闻名，这两位老板仍确保街上不出乱子、无辜者不受牵连，并以一句口号为准则：“全都给我留在墙内。” 这对夫妻打理着酒馆的大部分事务，而他们的五个孩子则会在空闲时帮忙，负责点单，并照看地窖中发酵的酒酿。

This brewery and tavern hosts some of the loudest, most dangerous, and most entertaining bar fights in Vellumis, with several regulars gaining minor celebrity status for their fighting prowess. Despite—or perhaps due to—the raucous violence, Cinderland Brews is one of the most successful establishments in the district. Cartag the Ruthless (brash male orc brewmaster 6) and Screaming Thunder (fearless female Shoanti human brawler 6) opened the tavern in 4701 shortly after their marriage, a ceremony that concluded in an infamous citywide brawl. Despite their reputation for violence, the proprietors make sure to keep the streets clear of trouble and innocents out of danger with the catchphrase, “Keep it all within the walls.” The couple takes care of most of the tavern's needs, with their five children helping out during their free time, taking orders and tending to the fermenting brews in the cellar.

Newdock.name: 新埠区 Newdock
Newdock.text:
新埠区是在十字军与城市建设者改造维鲁米斯的内港时，由最初保护港湾的岩石浅滩遗迹建造而成的。新埠区由码头边的酒馆、仓库，以及为那些并非以军事身份来到这座港口城市的水手、商人和旅客提供的住所组成。由于卫兵力量有限，这个城区因流氓习气和犯罪活动而声名在外。

Newdock was constructed from the remains of the rocky shoal that originally protected the harbor as the crusaders and city builders refined Vellumis's cothon. Newdock is made up of dockside taverns, warehouses, and housing for the sailors, traders, and travelers who come to the port city in anything other than a military capacity. The district has a reputation for roguishness and criminal activity due to its limited guard presence.

The Inheritor's Light.name: 后继者之光 The Inheritor's Light
The Inheritor's Light.text:
后继者之光是维鲁米斯最高的建筑之一，仅次于令使之塔。它的光芒即使在从湖面翻涌而来的最浓重雾气中，也能在数英里之外看见。维卢米斯人宣称，只要塔上的灯光仍在闪耀，这座城市就会始终屹立不倒，而到目前为止，还没有任何势力成功挑战这一信念。

The Inheritor's Light is one of the tallest structures in Vellumis, second only to the Herald's Tower. Its light can be seen for miles around, even in the thickest fogs rolling off the lake. Vellumites claim that so long as the tower's light glows, the city will always stand, and so far no forces have succeeded in challenging that belief.

Three Hearths Inn.name: 三炉旅馆 Three Hearths Inn
Three Hearths Inn.text:
自4592 AR起，汉斯特拉姆家族便经营着这家大型旅馆，专注于待客之道与社区氛围。现任店主是丽拉·汉斯特拉姆（和蔼的乌尔芬女性人类旅店老板 8），过去32年来一直同时打理着这门生意和整个家族。宽敞的公共大厅里摆着长长的公用餐桌和三处壁炉，门口每人只需付1枚白银便可享用成盘端上的丰盛食物；三炉旅馆不提供单人餐，独自用餐的人很快就会被拉进某个群体里。只要愿意参与交谈与欢庆，来客就能尽情吃喝。這栋三层建筑的上两层设有配备休闲家具和游戏的小房间，而屋顶休息区尤其受喜欢眺望船只穿行海湾的访客欢迎。

Since 4592 AR, the Hestram family has run this large inn specializing in hospitality and community. The latest innkeeper is Lyra Hestram (gracious female Ulfen human innkeeper 8), who has taken charge of both the business and the family for the past 32 years. The spacious common room with long community tables and three hearths serves platters of hearty food to groups for a single silver piece at the door; single meals don't exist at the Three Hearths Inn, and solo diners are quickly swept up into a group. Visitors can eat and drink their fill so long as they're participating in the conversation and merriment. The top two floors of this three-story building feature small rooms with lounging furniture and games, while the rooftop lounge is particularly popular with visitors who like to watch ships traverse the bay.

Northwatch.name: 北望区 Northwatch
Northwatch.text:
北望区最初是供商贩和手艺人居住与工作的地方，位于城市城墙之外，同时仍靠近城市所提供的保护，一旦危险逼近，他们随时准备撤入维鲁米斯的城墙内自我设防。近年来，退役老兵也在这里扎下根来，他们留在近处，以表明自己守护城市的忠诚与随时保卫城市的准备。

Northwatch began as a place for tradesfolk to live and work outside the city walls while remaining close to the protection offered by the city, ready to barricade themselves within Vellumis's walls the moment danger approached. In recent years, retired veterans put down roots here, where they remain close to show their dedication and readiness to defend the city.

The Big Bowl.name: 大碗铺 The Big Bowl
The Big Bowl.text:
在维鲁米斯，前来躲避不死恐怖、寻求庇护的难民中，有芭芭·巴耶夫（慈母般的人类女性女巫 4级）。她带着一大家子来到这座城市，身边还有一只毛发蓬乱的橘猫，名叫普什克。

看到身边有数不清的饥饿嘴巴，还有那些无事可做、手脚闲不住的孩子们，芭芭·巴耶夫召集了一群孩子，派他们去执行一项任务，为她寻找“芭芭·巴耶夫的魔法炖汤”的食材。多亏了一些巧妙的法术手段，巴耶夫的炖汤无论用了什么食材都总是美味可口，不过她总是大声宣称，这是因为她充满爱意的接触。大碗铺已经成为北望区的标志之一，来到这个地区的访客经常会瞥见孩子们奔跑着，把新的物品送来加入这锅魔法炖汤。

Among the refugees seeking shelter from undead terrors in Vellumis is Baba Baev (matronly female human witch 4), who traveled to the city with her large family and a scraggly orange cat called Pushok.

Seeing the endless number of hungry mouths around her and the restless hands of children with no duties to attend, Baba Baev gathered a group of children and sent them on a mission to bring her ingredients for “Baba Baev's magic stew.” Thanks to some sly spellwork, Baev's stew is always delicious no matter the ingredients, though she always loudly claims that it's because of her loving touch. The Big Bowl has become a staple of Northwatch, and visitors to the district often glimpse children running to deliver new items to add to the magic stew.

Griffon Reach.name: 狮鹫高地 Griffon Reach
Griffon Reach.text:
在短暂的一段时间里，当科沃萨的黑檀连队向终焉之墙伸出援手时，这些场地曾被用于训练狮鹫和空降部队。那段关系恶化之后，骑士们开始将这里用作骑兵训练以及在城市城墙外集结之地，而这些场地的名字，则成了对那些曾在上空翱翔的野兽仅存的提醒。

For a brief time, these fields were dedicated to training griffons and airborne troops when Korvosa's Sable Company lent their aid to Lastwall. Once that relationship soured, the knights took to using the grounds for cavalry training and mustering outside the city walls, with only the name of the fields remaining as a reminder of the beasts that once soared in the skies above.

The Old Apple Orchard.name: 老苹果园 The Old Apple Orchard
The Old Apple Orchard.text:
尽管这座古老的果园在几个世纪间被赋予过好几个名字，但大多数人都只是称它为“老苹果园”。一位古怪的女子，@UUID[Actor.YJ73kzBHiARGlkF4]{葛萝琳·维尔斯基}（古怪的女性换生灵德鲁伊 8），负责打理这片场地，也是果园里那些异常美味苹果的唯一经营者。有些人想让这位老妇人离开她的职位，因为当地人说她会长时间对着树木说话，并声称她不利于生意；但骑士们对介入此事很谨慎，因为葛萝琳从未造成过任何已知的问题。偶尔可以在劳工市场看到葛萝琳卖苹果，或者在英勇花园与玫瑰争论。

While this ancient orchard has been given several names over the centuries, most just call it “the old apple orchard.” A peculiar woman, @UUID[Actor.YJ73kzBHiARGlkF4]{Glorine Velski} (eccentric female changeling druid 8), maintains the grounds and is the sole proprietor of the orchard's unusually delicious apples. Some want to remove the old woman from her position, as locals report her talking to the trees for long periods of time and claim that she isn't good for business, but the knights are wary of intervening when Glorine has never caused any known issues. Glorine can occasionally be found at the Laborer's Market selling apples or at the Valorous Gardens arguing with the roses.

Road of Welcome.name: 迎宾之路 Road of Welcome
Road of Welcome.text:
在默语暴君回归之前，当骑士们仍在终焉之墙寒冷的丘陵与草原间巡逻时，来访者会往返于维鲁米斯，带来贸易与欢乐。他们常常会从城镇西北方前往阿尼桑特大道，穿过北门进入使馆区，并在离开时绕回这里。随着这种路线逐渐形成，城墙外沿着这条道路也出现了一排商铺、旅店和酒馆，为所有经过的人提供服务。这个区域因此得了“迎宾之路”的绰号，并成为这座城市最繁荣的地段之一。如今，这里大多已被废弃，只剩下残破的建筑，见证着这个曾经充满生机的街区。传闻说，孩子模样的幽灵在这条路上作祟，把旅人迎向死亡，将他们锁进地窖直到死去，而整夜都无人听见他们的尖叫。

Before the return of the Whispering Tyrant, when knights still patrolled the cold hills and prairies of Lastwall, visitors would travel to and from Vellumis bringing trade and happiness. They'd often head to Arnisant's Avenue from the northwest of town, through the north gate into the Embassy District, and loop back when they left. As this pattern emerged, so too did a row of shops, inns, and taverns along the road just outside the wall, catering to anyone who came through. The area gained the nickname “Road of Welcome” and was one of the most prosperous sections of the city. Now it stands mostly abandoned, with ruined buildings all that remains of the once vibrant neighborhood. Rumors say that childlike ghosts haunt the road and welcome travelers to their deaths, locking them in cellars until they perish, with no one to hear their screams throughout the night.

Timber Town.name: 木屋镇 Timber Town
Timber Town.text:
由于最近涌入了大量难民，好几所房屋正在同时建造。虽然这些工程很可能要过上好几年才能彻底完工，但许多难民已经决定开始入住这些尚未建成的房屋；这里几乎没有一滴油漆，也没有半点艺术装饰。这种做法催生了“木屋镇”这个绰号，因为这里的人们早已习惯看见这些匆忙搭建的住所裸露在外的木墙。

Due to the recent influx of refugees, several homes are being built all at once. While these projects likely won't be fully completed for years, many refugees have decided to start occupying half-built homes with nary a drop of paint or artistic flare. This practice has given rise to the nickname “Timber Town,” as folks here are accustomed to seeing the naked wooden walls of these hastily built shelters.

Tower District.name: 塔楼区 Tower District
Tower District.text:
塔楼区是一个舒适的住宅区，居住着商人和城市官员。城市卫队在此设有兵营和两座监狱，用来关押等待在城堡出庭日期的囚犯。被判有罪的人通常会在卫队的看管下于塔楼区为城市劳作，而最恶劣的罪犯则会被押送至瓦里坦城堡下方的地牢，不过传言始终不绝，说这些罪犯常常会被征召去为骑士团充当雇佣兵。

The Tower District is a comfortable neighborhood of homes for merchants and city officials. The City Guard has their barracks and a pair of jails for holding prisoners awaiting court dates in the castle. Those found guilty often find work for the city under the guard's watch in the Tower District, while the worst criminals are remanded to the dungeons beneath Castle Varitan, though rumors persist that these criminals are often drafted into mercenary work for the Knights.

Herald's Tower.name: 令使之塔 Herald's Tower
Herald's Tower.text:
在英勇之门港湾中央的一座小岛上，令使之塔高耸而起，比周围数英里内最高的尖塔或山丘还要高出许多层。凭借魔法与高度，从这座闪耀着白色光辉的高塔顶端向外眺望的人，眼中没有任何事物能够隐藏；每一条进出这座城市的通道、每一艘驶来的船只，以及周围数英里内每一位起身迎敌的骑士，都能被看得一清二楚，仿佛他们就在隔壁房间一般。

On a small island in the middle of the Valorous Gate's harbor, Herald's Tower rises many stories above the highest spire or hill for miles around. Through magic and elevation, nothing is hidden to the eyes of those who peer from the top of the gleaming white tower; every pass into and out of the city, every boat sailing its way, and every knight rising to meet their enemy for miles around can be seen as clearly as if they were in the next chamber.

The Quick Plate.name: 速食盘 The Quick Plate
The Quick Plate.text:
速食盘是一家餐馆，专门招待那些急着在返回岗位前好好吃上一顿的商人和官员。每张桌子上都有一个盘子，能迅速根据用餐者的个人口味具现出一顿丰盛的饭菜。没人知道速食盘是如何制作这些餐食，或如何预先知晓人们想吃什么；各种相互竞争的阴谋论宣称，那位匿名老板要么是一个 jathoom、精灵大厨，要么是个与魔鬼做了交易的凡人。

The Quick Plate is an eatery that caters to merchants and officials in a rush to eat well before returning to their duties. Each table has a single plate that quickly materializes a hearty meal based on the diner's personal tastes. It's unknown how the Quick Plate produces its meals or anticipates what meals are desired, with competing conspiracies claiming that the anonymous owner is a jathoom, fey chef, or mortal who made a deal with a devil.

Ustalin Lodge.name: 乌斯卡林分部 Ustalin Lodge
Ustalin Lodge.text:
乌斯卡林分部是开拓者协会在当地的前哨，曾与逐梦王牌——一家让当地人质疑探路者真实意图的赌馆——共用一栋建筑。难民危机爆发后，风险队长杜马尔·万特让当地的探路者将整栋建筑彻底改造成无家可归者的收容所，只保留了少数几间会议室供开拓者事务使用。该分部也是开拓者特工前往贝尔克岑或乌斯塔拉夫途中至关重要的落脚点；他们常在此与当地特工交换物资，并交流有关这一更大组织的消息。

Ustalin Lodge is the local outpost of the Pathfinder Society and once shared its building with the Ace of Dreams, a gambling house that had locals questioning the true intentions of the Pathfinders. In the wake of the refugee crisis, Venture-Captain Duimar Vant had the local Pathfinders fully convert the building into a shelter for anyone without a home, reserving only a few meeting rooms for Pathfinder business. The lodge is also a crucial stopping point for Pathfinder agents making their way up to Belkzen or Ustalav, who often trade supplies with local agents and exchange news about the greater organization.

The Valorous Gate.name: 勇气之门 The Valorous Gate
The Valorous Gate.text:
英勇之门是一对由岩石浅滩建成的港湾；在骑士到来之前，这片浅滩一直保护着这座港口城市。长方形的商港入口处设有防波堤，以抵御入侵者；而环绕令使之塔的圆形内港则供军用船只停泊。

The Valorous Gate is a pair of harbors constructed from the rocky shoal that protected the port city before the knights arrived. A rectangular merchant harbor is protected from invaders by a breakwater in its mouth, with a circular cothon surrounding the Herald's Tower for military vessels.

Westlake.name: 西湖区 Westlake
Westlake.text:
西湖区是历史悠久的湖滨区西半部，从勇气之门一直延伸到城市西墙，尽管该区一直被认为与更富裕的东湖区相互分离。这个区域是维鲁米斯大多数工人阶级能找到负担得起住房的地方，也是最有可能发生民变的地区。

Westlake is the western half of the venerable Lakeside District spanning from the Valorous Gate to the western city wall, although the district has always been considered to be separate from the wealthier Eastlake. This district is where the majority of Vellumis's working class find affordable homes, and where civil unrest is most likely to occur.

The Endless Page.name: 无尽书页 The Endless Page
The Endless Page.text:
无尽书页是一家书店，里面摆满了人们所能想象到的各种书籍，从充满诱惑的爱情小说到经典预言的破旧抄本，应有尽有。这里最出名的是它那个小型舞台，店员和志愿者会在那里重演故事供人娱乐，但最近这里也成了年轻难民接受教育的场所。年轻人学习阅读和书写时，成年人则会接受关于其个人经历的采访，而店员会将这些内容记录下来，好让每个人的故事都能被铭记。

The Endless Page is a bookstore filled with every tome imaginable, from seductive romances to weathered copies of classic prophecies. It's best known for its small stage where employees and volunteers reenact stories as entertainment, but it has recently become a place for young refugees to get their schooling. While the youths learn to read and write, the adults are interviewed about their personal histories, which are in turn recorded by the employees so that every individual's story can be remembered.

Everyday Magic.name: 日常魔法 Everyday Magic
Everyday Magic.text:
这家魔法商店主要出售低等级药水、低阶法术卷轴、附魔小饰品，偶尔也会把一根“蚁力搬运”魔杖卖给过分热心的码头工人。费兰德里尔·长影（忧郁的男性精灵法师 12）经营着这家店，希望为邻居们的生活增添一点魔法带来的便利。费兰德里尔的邻居们私下里带着怜悯议论，说他的这些努力不过是让自己从失踪姐姐的思绪中分心的方式。众所周知，费兰德里尔偶尔会为骑士附魔武器，但他更喜欢把时间花在向热切的年轻人传授魔法上。在费兰德里尔休息时间里，能瞥见在店中练习法术的年轻人，要么负担不起前往他的母校奥法学院，要么有其他责任在身，无法接受正规的魔法教育。

This magic shop mostly sells low-level potions, low-ranking spell scrolls, enchanted trinkets, or the occasional wand of ant haul to an overeager dock worker. Felandriel Longshadow (forlorn male elf wizard 12) runs the store, hoping to add a bit of magical convenience to his neighbor's lives. Felandriel's neighbors whisper pityingly that his efforts are just a way to distract himself from thoughts of his lost sister. Felandriel is known to enchant the occasional weapon for knights but much prefers to spend his time teaching magic to eager youths. The young people who can be glimpsed practicing spells in the shop during Felandriel's off-hours either can't afford to go to the Arcanamirium, Felandriel's alma mater, or have other obligations preventing them from pursuing a formal magical education.

Laborer's Market.name: 劳工市场 Laborer's Market
Laborer's Market.text:
这座露天市场紧邻勇气之门的商人码头。除了大量价格实惠的食物和商品之外，维鲁米斯几乎每一次起义都始于这个市场。近来，激昂的煽动者一直把这里当作舞台，煽起激烈的政治讨论并向政府提出要求，导致卫兵巡逻有所增加。尽管许多人厌恶这些人，并将他们视为麻烦制造者，但维鲁米斯每天都有越来越多的市民开始认同这些异议者。

This open-air market is adjacent to the merchant docks of the Valorous Gate. Outside of the abundance of affordable foods and goods, nearly every uprising in Vellumis began in this very market. Recently, passionate rabble-rousers have used it as a stage to stir up heated political discussions and make demands of the government, resulting in increased guard patrols. Though many despise these individuals and view them as troublemakers, each day more and more of Vellumis's citizens have started agreeing with the dissidents.

Smith & Machinae.name: 史密斯与机械装置 Smith & Machinae
Smith & Machinae.text:
格里索姆·布拉（富有创意的男性人类发明家 7）从阿肯斯塔搬来此地兜售他的手艺，并经常穿行于废弃的西望区，搜寻可回收的废料。格里索姆会将他能找到的东西重新利用并加以改造，为维鲁米斯的居民制作货车车轴、马掌和精妙的机械。虽然他偶尔也会接下武器或护甲的订单，但他的热情在于把废弃金属变成奇妙而实用的物品。来访者都会被告诫，别试图和这人闲聊，否则很可能会被他板着脸瞪出店门。随着年纪渐长，格里索姆发现自己不得不勉强雇用冒险者代替他前往西望区，搜寻有用的材料。

Grisom Bullah (creative male human inventor 7) moved from Alkenstar to peddle his trade and regularly traverses the abandoned Westwatch district for salvageable scrap. Grisom repurposes and transforms what he can find to create wagon axles, horseshoes, and fantastic machinery for the people of Vellumis. While he fills the occasional order for weapons or armor, his passion is turning abandoned metal into fantastic yet practical items. Visitors are cautioned not to try and make small talk with the man lest they get scowled out of his shop. As his age catches up to him, Grisom has found himself reluctantly hiring adventurers to go out and comb Westwatch for useful materials in his place.

Westwatch.name: 西望区 Westwatch
Westwatch.text:
西望区最初是一个为往来商旅提供服务的商业区，但如今该区基本上已被废弃，因为它在塔巴丰的胜利中遭受了最惨重的损失。

Westwatch was originally a mercantile district that catered to traveling merchants, but the district is now largely abandoned, having suffered the greatest losses to Tar-Baphon's victory.

The Dead Alleys.name: 死巷 The Dead Alleys
The Dead Alleys.text:
尽管西望区的大部分地区都无人居住，死巷中却会有死者在夜晚复起，去寻找那些在这片废墟城区中苟活的掉队者。无论骑士们如何奋战、试图肃清这些巷道，这些不死居民总会在夜幕降临时再次归来。为何这群以对抗不死而闻名的骑士始终无法平息这一威胁，已令市民们深感忧虑；甚至有人私下阴谋论般低声议论，说骑士们是故意留下这些不死，好借此提醒当地人，他们需要骑士。

While most of Westwatch is uninhabited, the Dead Alleys see the dead rising at night to seek out the stragglers surviving in the ruined district. No matter how hard the knights fight to clear the alleys, these undead denizens always return when night falls. Why a group of knights famed for battling the undead hasn't been able to quell this threat has been of great concern to the citizens, with some whispering conspiratorially that the knights purposely leave the undead as a reminder that the locals need the knights.

Dirgespire.name: 丧歌尖塔 Dirgespire
Dirgespire.text:
在警醒城陷落的两年前，卡莉欧佩·长影（忧郁的女性报丧女妖 17）在恩卡坦湖湖畔购置了一块住宅用地。一周后，一座高塔自行由一车车木材、石料和钢铁构筑而成。深居简出的卡莉欧佩和她的兄弟一直共同住在这里，直到不死族大军袭击了维鲁米斯。就在那可怕的一天，费兰德瑞尔在城墙内的店铺里干活，而卡莉欧佩则在塔中。据说，不死族侵入了这座高塔，却再也没有出来，卡莉欧佩也一样。自那次事件后，大门便对所有人封闭，甚至连费兰德瑞尔也不例外。有人说，他们看到一位精灵少女站在塔顶，吟唱着美妙得令人虚弱、无法站立的歌曲，这也让这座高塔得了个新名字：丧歌尖塔。

Two years before Vigil fell, Calliope Longshadow (mournful female banshee 17) purchased a plot of residential land on the shores of Lake Encarthan. A week later, a tall tower had constructed itself out of carts full of lumber, stone, and steel. The reclusive Calliope and her brother lived here together until the undead hordes attacked Vellumis. On that terrible day, Felandriel was within the walls working at his shop and Calliope was in the tower. It's said that undead invaded the tower but never came out, and neither did Calliope. Ever since that incident, the door has been sealed to everyone, even Felandriel. Some say they see an elven maiden at the top of the tower singing such a beautiful song that they become weak and unable to stand, earning the tower its new moniker of Dirgespire.

The Temple of Abadar.name: 阿巴达尔神殿 The Temple of Abadar
The Temple of Abadar.text:
当这个城区被弃置时，阿巴达尔神殿的几位高阶祭司选择留下来守护他们的宝库。当骑士们前来带回这些祭司时，已无人可救；现场没有任何活物留下的痕迹，他们曾发誓要守护的黄金与产权文书也不见踪影。曾有数名冒险者试图接近此地，去“营救”失踪的祭司以及他们的大量黄金，但无人曾返回。据传，这里闹鬼，作祟的正是那些失踪的祭司；他们会杀死任何前来从他们及其神祇那里偷窃的人。

When the district was abandoned, several high-ranking priests from the Temple of Abadar chose to stay and protect their vaults. When knights came to retrieve the priests, no one remained to save; there were no traces of any living being, nor the gold or property deeds they'd vowed to defend. Several adventurers have attempted to approach the site to “rescue” the missing priests and their wealth of gold, but none have ever returned. The site is rumored to be haunted by the missing priests, who slay any who would come to steal from them and their god.

The Three Sisters.name: 三姐妹 The Three Sisters
The Three Sisters.text:
据说，如果有人怀着心中炽热的愿望徘徊于西望区，就可能会遇到一家奇特的店铺，店主是三位彼此长得毫不相像的姐妹。一位姐妹会实现有关爱情的愿望，另一位会实现有关恐惧的愿望，最后一位会实现有关复仇的愿望。那些声称去过那家店的人说，那里的价格高得令人难以承受，但这并没有阻止绝望之人在西望区的废墟中寻觅任何一个实现心愿的机会。

If one wanders Westwatch with a burning wish in their heart, it's said that they might come across a peculiar shop run by three sisters who look nothing alike. One sister will grant a wish of love, the other a wish of fear, and the last a wish of vengeance. Those who claim to have been to the shop say its prices are too high to bear, but it hasn't stopped desperate individuals from searching the ruins of Westwatch for any chance of gaining their heart's desire.

Vellumis Hinterlands.name: 维鲁米斯腹地 Vellumis Hinterlands
Vellumis Hinterlands.text:
以下地点位于城外，但距离足够近，仍处于其影响力范围之下。

阿尼森特湾：一千多年前，在闪耀远征期间，阿尼桑特将军在一场暴风雨中于这处僻静海湾登陆。远征军起初将这里用作造船港，但在终焉之墙陷落期间，这处海湾及其码头落入了默语暴君麾下部队之手。

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.xDEYnE50sDaYaOfT]{科拉克要塞}：科拉克曾控制松流河上大部分的旅行通行。终焉之墙撤离期间，要塞中的骑士在逃往维鲁米斯时将其弃置。由于这座要塞靠近维鲁米斯和其他本地贸易城镇，因此成了令人担忧的地点，因为其中很可能充斥着不死生物，并可能向任何方向扩散。

迷雾渡口：由于附近的瀑布与激流，迷雾渡口是一个逆流航行颇具挑战的地方，但终年笼罩水道的雾气也使其成为非法贸易的理想之地。

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{尤娅之望}：这是一座位于维鲁米斯以东、需数日路程的小型贸易城镇。数个世纪前，尤娅之望因回应默语魔道的活动而被奥泽姆骑士团夷为平地。就在终焉之墙被塔巴丰的军队攻陷之前，它才刚开始恢复公开贸易。关于尤娅之望当前状态的更多信息，请参见第12页开始的《死坟末土幸存者》。

The following locations are outside of the city, but close enough to fall under its influence.

Arnisant Bay: Over a thousand years ago during the Shining Crusade, General Arnisant landed at this secluded bay during a storm. The crusaders originally used it as a shipbuilding port, but during the fall of Lastwall, the bay and its docks fell to the Whispering Tyrant's forces.

@UUID[JournalEntry.Jyx5LeTfza98t3z7.JournalEntryPage.xDEYnE50sDaYaOfT]{Corlach Keep}: Corlach once controlled much of the Pineflow River's travel. During the evacuation of Lastwall, the keep's knights abandoned it in their escape to Vellumis. The keep's proximity to Vellumis and other local trade towns make it a point of concern since it's likely riddled with undead that could spread out in any direction.

Misty Crossing: As a result of nearby waterfalls and rapids, Misty Crossing is a challenging place to sail upriver, but the perpetual mists that hug the waterway make it ideal for illicit trade.

@UUID[JournalEntry.E7pPpCO9yKvEJH9Z.JournalEntryPage.Yk6QotH2TPPC2e4Z]{Yua's Hope}: A small trade town a few days east of Vellumis, Yua's Hope was razed centuries ago by the Knights of Ozem in response to Whispering Way activity. It had only begun to return to open trade when Lastwall fell to Tar-Baphon's forces. For more on Yua's Hope in its current state, see “Gravelands Survivors” starting on page 12.

Creatures & Characters.name: 生物与角色 Creatures & Characters
Creatures & Characters.text:
恩格拉（萤火虫福使）

恩格拉诞生于那些为比自身更伟大的事物献出生命之人，它们看起来像成群发光的萤火虫，有时会被误认为是鬼火，或只是光线造成的小把戏。它们最常见于传奇英雄的陵墓中，但凡是这类英雄咽下最后一口气的地方，也都可能有它们徘徊。恩格拉相信，关于高尚牺牲的故事蕴含着强大的力量。它们收集那些为崇高事业而死者的记忆，再将这些记忆分享给那些可能从中获得鼓舞或宽慰的凡人。恩格拉标志性的光辉既是悲伤的象征，也是希望的象征，因为它同时将伟大英雄之死与纪念其遗志的决心联系在一起。

墓地守护者：恩格拉会保护它们所收集记忆的亡者，并将这些故事化作武器，对抗任何想扰乱其守护对象长眠之地的人。虽然它们最常见于守卫墓穴、公墓和其他埋葬场所，但有些恩格拉更喜欢停留在其守护对象真正的死亡地点附近，因此你也可能在古老战场、废弃要塞，或任何伟大英雄陨落之处遇见它们。视角不同，个别恩格拉甚至可能会尊崇那些一生未必称得上光明磊落的英雄，尤其是在其守护对象于临死前一刻才为自己的恶行悔悟时。

信念灵卫

信念是一股强大的力量。当意志坚定的人们聚集在共同旗帜之下，他们统一的信念便可能获得属于自己的生命。其结果便是信念灵卫——一种守护创造它之派系集会地点的灵体构装体。信念灵卫通常会呈现为某个典型派系成员的闪耀理想化形象，不过它也可能在若干特定个体的外貌之间不断变换，从不固定为单一形态。无论采取何种外形，信念灵卫身上总会带有其派系的象征。例如，火印帮的信念灵卫会带着该派系交叉长剑的标记，而开拓者协会的信念灵卫则会带有开放之路徽记。

派系誓缚：虽然信念灵卫通常依附于某个既有派系，但只要所有成员都怀有同一目的，任何一群个体都可能显现出一个信念灵卫。一个派系的毁灭通常不会对其信念灵卫造成影响。若某个派系改变了宗旨，其成员甚至可能发现自己必须面对代表其过往信念的信念灵卫。如果某个派系以使用某类特定武器闻名，比如红螳螂的锯齿马刀或阿尔多利学院的决斗剑，那么它们的信念灵卫通常也会以相应武器武装现身。

米尔米凯特

米尔米凯特是崇尚物质的妖精，痴迷于收集小工具、家用品以及类似的小玩意儿。虽然它们并非特别邪恶，但在米尔米凯特看来，它们收集的物件比制造这些物件的智慧生物更有意思。它们长着毫不起眼、平平无奇的灰色面孔，以及末端生有爪状指甲的细长手指，借此从原本所在之处拈走任何它们觊觎的物品。米尔米凯特四处游荡，寻找能加入自己不断扩大的收藏中的宝物。当米尔米凯特偷走某件物品时，它通常会用一件几乎完美的复制品来替换失窃之物。当妖精就在附近时，这些复制品最具欺骗性；而随着米尔米凯特与物品之间的距离增加，它们会迅速失去原有的光彩。虽然这种调包曾让许多冒险者大失所望，但在遭遇米尔米凯特时，物质财物的损失绝不是你可能经历的最糟结果。米尔米凯特讨厌任何未经许可触碰它们赝品的人，并常常直接把那件物品本身当作武器来对付意图行窃者。

家用品掠夺者：米尔米凯特通常认为，凡是没被钉死的东西都可以拿走，不过不同个体也会对某些物品格外偏爱。例如，一只米尔米凯特可能垂涎厨具，而另一只则喜欢收集顶针、别针和其他缝纫工具。由于它们根本不真正理解金钱，米尔米凯特往往不过是些能用一把木勺或一卷线轻易打发的小麻烦。然而，若有米尔米凯特闯入墓穴或宝库，就可能给看守者带来严重问题——而且它们还可能与那些想把这些地方洗劫一空的凡人盗贼互相竞争。

腐朽战马

腐朽战马是一种即便在死后也无法被摧折其坚定意志的马匹。它披着腐烂的血肉，拖曳着自身恶臭的内脏，不屈不挠地与自己的不死状态抗争，寻找意志坚强生物的灵魂并将其吞噬，徒劳地试图修补自己破碎的灵魂。一旦嗅到目标的气息，这匹战马便会追逐猎物，直到吞噬其灵魂，或发现意志更强的猎物可供追踪。少数自然产生的腐朽战马，往往是在试图逃离洪水、火灾等绝境时死亡。更常见的情况是，死灵法师创造腐朽战马，让它们作为不死军队的坐骑。与活体坐骑不同，腐朽战马不需要喂养或照料，而且通常乐于接受那些允许它们猎杀活体猎物的不死骑手。然而，由于这种战马有着永无餍足的饥渴，活着的死灵法师必须小心，别让自己成为坐骑的下一顿餐食。

嗜圣种：技艺高超的死灵法师创造出了一种腐朽战马的变体，以降低这种生物对活体操控者的威胁。嗜圣种并不吞噬活物的意志，而是以圣洁存在与其神祇之间的联系为食。腐朽战马的“猎意志”、“虹吸意志”和“意志感知”能力不再影响所有活体生物，而是只影响具有holy特征的活体生物。

复生骑兵

在砾荒原中，不死生物数量众多，但即便如此，死灵法师有时仍不得不发挥创意，才能把手头各式各样的不死生物组织成一支协调一致的军事单位。典型的复生骑兵通常由骷髅、僵尸和食尸鬼混编而成，不过许多部队也会纳入木乃伊、幽灵以及更强大的不死生物。终焉之墙骑士团曾报告称，有成营的不死生物从它们被埋葬的田野中爬起，显然是在为未来的进攻做准备。其中最恶名昭彰的集结地之一便是荒渊——位于前矮人堡垒锤岩下方的地下隧道网络。默语暴君进攻内海诸国时，荒渊储备的不死生物被大量消耗，但那里无疑仍留有成批尸体，等待足智多谋的死灵法师加以利用。

骑兵无马：要为一支复生骑兵配备足够的坐骑，通常意味着大规模屠杀马匹。马场被毁、野生马群突然消失，或旅行者被劫走坐骑的事件增加，都可能预示着一场死灵阴谋正在酝酿。如果没有马匹或其他可供骑乘的不死坐骑，复生骑兵便处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{slowed 1}状态。

碎灵军官

一支由无心智不死生物组成的军队有一个致命缺陷：它需要创造者几乎时时刻刻地照看。然而，任何拥有足够智能来指挥此类军队的不死生物，又都有反噬其创造者的风险。技艺高明的死灵法师试图通过创造碎灵军官，在这两个极端之间取得平衡。碎灵军官能够率领小规模不死营队，同时又以一种独特方式与创造者绑定——一旦它们决定失控叛变，也可以轻易被处理掉。第一位碎灵军官诞生于一名巫妖将自己的灵魂囚笼分裂为多个部分，并将每块碎片植入不同的不死勇士体内，从而完全掌控这些个体。最终，这名巫妖认为这种做法对自己灵魂囚笼的风险不值得其带来的好处，但分裂灵魂的技术实在太有用，无法舍弃。如今，碎灵军官是在生物死亡瞬间，从法拉丝玛的掌握中夺走一个智慧生物的灵魂而创造出来的。随后，这个新鲜灵魂会被打碎，其中最大的那一部分归于碎灵军官，而其余碎片则被植入该军官所指挥的无心智不死士兵体内。

碎裂的灵魂：一个灵魂究竟能被分得多细，目前仍无定论，但迄今为止还没有哪个灵魂被分成超过50片，其中也包括用于复生碎灵军官的那一片。依照创造者的意愿，碎灵军官在战场上时，也可能被给予自己灵魂中未使用的碎片，以复生更多不死生物。然而，一个多疑到需要依靠碎灵军官来统帅不死军团的死灵法师，几乎不会心甘情愿地放弃这般力量。

斯泰勒莫拉

斯泰勒莫拉是热爱自然的妖精，致力于通过诱捕毫无戒心的生物，并将其身体由内而外转化为精致的树雕，来美化自然世界。除了膨大且布满尖刺的种荚之外，斯泰勒莫拉完全由藤蔓构成，而这些藤蔓能够随其意愿生长、收回与脱落。斯泰勒莫拉能以惊人的速度再生受损藤蔓，使它们随着时间推移能够从几乎任何伤势中恢复。年轻的斯泰勒莫拉会游历世界，寻找一片可称为己有的荒野。一旦选中合适地点，它们便会用藤蔓缠住路过的生物，将目标牢牢固定，然后强行把自己的种子植入受害者体内。植入的种子随后会生根发芽，将该生物本身当作肥料，缓慢地把它的身体转化为藤蔓与树叶的团块。完成作品后，斯泰勒莫拉会脱去自己的藤蔓，并在新的地点重新生长，开始下一件杰作。虽然斯泰勒莫拉更喜欢用曾经活着的生物填满自己的花园，但如果抓不到心仪的对象，它们也会把无生命物体封埋于藤蔓之中。众所周知，斯泰勒莫拉还会把雕像、宝箱，甚至整栋建筑都变成树雕，以引诱自己偏爱的猎物上钩。

皇家园艺师：斯泰勒莫拉有时会作为园丁侍奉哈玛德里阿德与其他高贵妖精，用开花藤蔓塑成奇妙雕像来装点它们的庭院。仁慈的统治者通常会要求麾下的斯泰勒莫拉将创作对象限制为无生命之物，而更残酷的妖精则不会对园丁的创造力施加这类限制。

塔卢西安

许多天界生物被“现今之物”所吸引，而塔卢西安所关心的却是“过往之物”。它们受驱使去保护那些已然陨落文明的遗迹，常与树精及其他自然生物并肩行动，在帮助修复遗迹周围土地的同时，击退那些企图将废弃建筑据为己有的邪恶势力。尽管鲜少有人比塔卢西安自己更了解它们所守护的古代文明，但它们几乎不会区分圣地与曾用于邪恶目的之所。在塔卢西安看来，任何建筑，无论其历史如何，都能够被重新赋予新的用途。从外形上看，塔卢西安像是放大版的小熊猫，只不过它们有六条腿、锐利的蓝色眼睛，背部和蓬松尾巴上生长着锋利的石质棘刺。静止不动时，塔卢西安几乎与其所守护的建筑毫无二致，伪装成一堆瓦砾，直到它们开始移动。它们还拥有采取类人形态的能力，而且常常会变成精力充沛的孩童模样。伪装成孩子的塔卢西安有时会带领冒险者前往那些早已从地图上消失的文明遗址，希望英雄们能帮助守护这些废墟，直到它们得以复原。

精力过剩：凭借变形能力和仿佛无穷无尽的活力，塔卢西安经常被遇见它们的冒险者误认为是妖精。事实上，许多塔卢西安在第一世界诸生灵之间，反而比在天界诸域中更感自在。天使，乃至其他阿札塔，有时也会觉得塔卢西安保护遗迹时表现出的强烈程度有些过头。然而，塔卢西安本性与它们的热情一样善良，只有在它们觉得自己的领地受到威胁时，才会陷入一阵由利齿、利爪与棘刺构成的狂暴之中。

Engerra (Firefly Agathion)

Born of those who sacrificed their lives for something greater than themselves, engerras resemble swarms of glowing fireflies and are sometimes mistaken for will-o’-wisps or simple tricks of the light. They are most often encountered in the tombs of legendary heroes but might linger anywhere such a hero has drawn their final breath. Engerras believe that tales of worthy sacrifice hold great power. They gather the memories of those who died in service of a noble cause and then share those memories with mortals who might be inspired or cheered by them. An engerra’s trademark glow is a sign of both sorrow and hope, for it simultaneously associates the death of a great hero with the determination to honor that hero’s legacy.

Graveyard Guardians: Engerras are protective of those whose memories they gather, using their stories as a weapon against anyone who would disturb their charge’s final resting place. While they’re most often found guarding tombs, graveyards, and other burial places, some engerras prefer to linger near the actual death sites of their charges and thus might be encountered on an ancient battlefield, in an abandoned keep, or anywhere a great hero has fallen. Depending on one’s point of view, individual engerras might honor heroes whose lives weren’t decidedly honorable, particularly if their charges repented for their villainous actions only moments before they died.

GARRHOLDION

Belief is a powerful force. When strong-willed individuals gather beneath a common banner, their unified conviction can take on a life of its own. The result is a garrholdion, a spirit construct that defends the meeting place of the faction that created it. A garrholdion usually appears as a shimmering, idealized version of a typical faction member, though it might instead shift its appearance among that of specific individuals, never settling on just one. Whatever form it takes, a garrholdion is always marked by its faction’s symbol. A Firebrands garrholdion, for example, bears that faction’s crossed swords symbol, while a Pathfinder Society garrholdion is marked with the Glyph of the Open Road.

Faction-bound: While typically bound to an established faction, any group of individuals can manifest a garrholdion, provided all members share the same purpose.
