12–23 Trust Points: Arazni is wary of the heroes but believes she can trust them for this task. She grants all heroes her @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.boons-and-curses.Item.LMK1RXvxxD0JP0L4]{minor boon}.

24–35 Trust Points: Arazni is certain the heroes will respect her agency and believes they can be long-term allies. She grants the heroes her @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.boons-and-curses.Item.HXRLOkyO8F374X8R]{moderate boon}, which takes the form of @UUID[Item.xJqJQhMRUGRTZ2BO]{Arazni's Freedom}, a +3 major striking holy shifting rapier made of her solidified blood.

36+ Trust Points: Arazni regards the heroes as foolish mortals ignorant of what their promise of loyalty to her actually means. All the same, she grants the heroes her @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.boons-and-curses.Item.r9hOxyTwN0DsrTPU]{major boon}.

@UUID[Actor.woqAg0luy256uoI0]{Treasure}: In addition to any boons Arazni grants the heroes, Clarethe offers the party a combination of the Crimson Reclaimers' coffers and her own personal wealth to aid them in the task ahead. She provides the heroes with a vial of antimagic oil, a set of greater marvelous medicines, a pair of major obsidian goggles, four potions of undetectability, a scroll of revival, a wand of execute (9th rank), a wand of moment of renewal, and four true elixirs of life.

@UUID[Item.IbowvqooKUNTimrF]{Fall From Grace}: If the PCs gained 24 Trust Points or more, she also gives the PCs her personal shield Fall from Grace, which is a supreme reinforcing cold iron shield.

Reward: Award the heroes 100 XP for meeting with Arazni. Additionally, reward the heroes 8 XP for every Trust Point they earn.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.ILMX8O6xgoNhMBiH]{Swearing the Crimson Oath}

If the party chooses to swear the Crimson Oath.

Development: Before the party departs, Clarethe offers the heroes an opportunity to swear the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.vqfR7MJdIM0T8r8W]{Crimson Oath} with her, although she pointedly withholds this offer from any PC who insulted Arazni during their meeting. If the heroes aren't already knight reclaimers and swear the oath, they gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.H86VNC6cNWhBI8Ed]{Knight Reclaimant Dedication} feat, provided they meet the feat's prerequisites. With the divine grace of Arazni, a hero can retrain any class feats or skill feats into Knight Reclaimant archetype feats without needing to spend any downtime or other resources. Heroes that were already Knight Reclaimants instead gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.tH5w8vIfFCFNVP7T]{Invoke the Crimson Oath} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.H63SJLkenhLDkVnN]{The Tyrant Falls!} as a bonus feat.

It's possible that one or more PCs—even those who are otherwise well intentioned—have no interest in helping Arazni. Though her former oppressors, including Tar-Baphon, Geb, and Seldeg Bhedlis, are generally regarded as villains, Arazni's own morality isn't unassailable. During her time as the queen of Geb, Arazni committed acts that most would regard as irredeemably evil, and while she took these actions against her will, she's never made a full accounting for them. That said, even PCs reluctant to ally with Arazni should at least see the value in joining forces with her temporarily, without becoming her full-throated champions. If successful, Seldeg's ritual will have catastrophic repercussions across Golarion, making Arazni's past crimes seem insignificant in comparison. Aylunna, Beirivelle, or even Clarethe can impress the importance of recovering the Bloodstones from Seldeg, even if the PCs aren't interested in helping Arazni directly.

Chasing the Bloodstones.name: 追寻血石 Chasing the Bloodstones
Chasing the Bloodstones.text:
在担任欧泽姆骑士期间，塞尔德格·贝德利斯主要负责侦察与渗透工作。经过其后数个世纪的磨炼，他有充足的时间将这些技艺进一步精进。一得知@UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{阿拉兹尼的血石}在塔巴丰对终焉之墙的袭击中幸存下来，塞尔德格便派遣手下搜集这些神器下落的情报。尽管他已经知道存放在尤娅之望与科拉克要塞的血石已脱离自己的掌控，但他仍然相信，自己调换阿拉兹尼与艾奥梅黛命运的计划依然有成功的可能。

依靠他从艾奥梅黛的学者阿迪特·卡拉金那里逼问出的情报，塞尔德格相信自己已经知晓了剩余两枚血石的位置。如果阿迪特的记忆无误，其中一枚血石仍留在@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.eZEX4cm786mQvS20]{多托特牧场}，而另一枚则被保存在@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.XSUIuMRz6HdzKrp6]{费林堡}一座礼拜堂中。艾伦娜·瓦尔瓦托斯在与英雄们初次会面时向他们指出了这两处地点；如果有必要，她也可以提醒他们，这些地方很可能就是塞尔德格接下来的目标。

英雄们可以按自己的意愿调查多托特牧场和费林堡。这两处地点都位于死坟末土北部边界附近。多托特牧场位于维鲁米斯以北100多英里处，而费林堡则位于西北方向近300英里外。若队伍的最低速度为25尺，他们从维鲁米斯前往多托特牧场需要6天，而前往费林堡则需要15天。从费林堡到多托特牧场的行程需要10天。前往锤石堡——塞尔德格计划举行仪式之地——从维鲁米斯出发需要9天，从费林堡出发需要5天，从多托特牧场出发也需要5天。当然，魔法和类似能力可以缩短这些旅行时间。除非GM希望在PC们往返这些地点的途中加入额外遭遇，否则他们沿途遇到的任何不死生物或其他生物都很容易避开或消灭。

英雄们并不知道，塞尔德格并不需要集齐全部四枚血石才能完成他的仪式。事实上，即便一枚血石也不是必需的，不过塞尔德格手中每多一件神器，英雄们在锤石堡的冒险高潮中面对他、挫败其阴谋时，任务就会变得更加困难。只要PC们不在任何一个地点逗留过久，他们就应当能在这名墓骑士完成仪式之前，从塞尔德格爪牙手中夺下剩余的两枚血石。假定凡是英雄们未能取回的血石，都会在队伍抵达锤石堡前被送到塞尔德格手中。

During his time as a Knight of Ozem, Seldeg Bhedlis worked primarily as a scout and infiltrator. In the intervening centuries, he's had time to refine his skills even further. As soon as he learned that the @UUID[JournalEntry.Z2s3SlW4rRfvc75a.JournalEntryPage.3Eypsh9qGpAOLUYo]{Bloodstones of Arazni} had survived Tar-Baphon's attack on Lastwall, Seldeg dispatched his minions to gather information about the artifacts' whereabouts. While he's already aware that the Bloodstones secured at Yua's Hope and Corlach Keep have slipped from his grasp, he remains hopeful his plan to swap the fates of Arazni and Iomedae can still succeed.

Relying on the information he extracted from the Iomedaean scholar Addit Kalakin, Seldeg believes he knows the locations of the two remaining Bloodstones. If Addit's memories are correct, one of the Bloodstones remains at @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.eZEX4cm786mQvS20]{Dortrot Ranch}, while the other is secured in a chapel at @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.XSUIuMRz6HdzKrp6]{Castle Firrine}. Aylunna Varvatos identified these locations to the heroes during their initial meeting with her, and if necessary, she can remind them that they're likely Seldeg's next targets.

The heroes can investigate Dortrot Ranch and Castle Firrine as they see fit. Both locations lie near the Gravelands' northern border. Dortrot Ranch is over 100 miles north of Vellumis, while Castle Firrine is nearly 300 miles to the northwest. A group with a minimum Speed of 25 feet can travel from Vellumis to Dortrot Ranch in 6 days, while travel to Castle Firrine takes 15 days. Travel between Castle Firrine and Dortrot Ranch takes 10 days. Travel to Hammer Rock, where Seldeg plans to enact his ritual, takes 9 days from Vellumis, 5 days from Castle Firrine, and 5 days from Dortrot Ranch. Magic and similar abilities, of course, can reduce these travel times. Unless the GM wishes to introduce additional encounters as the PCs travel between these sites, any undead or other creatures the PCs meet along the way are easily avoided or dispatched.

Unbeknownst to the heroes, Seldeg doesn't need all four of the Bloodstones to complete his ritual. In fact, even one Bloodstone is unnecessary, although each of the artifacts Seldeg possesses will make the heroes' job of foiling his plot more difficult when they face him during the adventure's climax at Hammer Rock. Provided the PCs don't linger at any particular location, they should be able to snatch both remaining Bloodstones from the clutches of Seldeg's minions before the graveknight completes his ritual. Assume that any Bloodstones the heroes don't retrieve are delivered to Seldeg before the party arrives at Hammer Rock.

B1. Dortrot Pasture.name: B1. 多托特牧场外围 B1. Dortrot Pasture
B1. Dortrot Pasture.text:
播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.5OeCIiN54tawMuyZ]{接近牧场}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{亡灵大军（层）}

随着玩家逐渐接近，在“接近牧场”的环境音上叠加“亡灵大军”这一层。

在牧场外围，那股令人作呕的恶臭源头变得显而易见。牧场大门外聚集着一支由数十个丧尸、食尸鬼和其他亡灵组成的部队，全部骑在马背上。队伍前方领头的是一对身穿胸甲的丧尸，其胸甲上标有已陨终焉之墙骑士的徽记。除非英雄们特意让对方察觉自己的存在，否则这些亡灵看起来将目标锁定在牧场上。成功通过一次 @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:35] 检定的角色会意识到，对多托特牧场的攻击已迫在眉睫。

  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{复生骑兵}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{2 亵渎丧尸}

遭遇

中等 19

在得知一块阿拉兹尼的血石被存放于多托特牧场后，塞尔德格·贝德利斯派遣了自己的一名爪牙——死灵法师布鲁姆斯加斯（谨慎的男性符文蚀刻巫妖 19）——前去取回它。布鲁姆斯加斯不愿冒险潜入，而是更想从容搜索这件神器，于是着手召集一支亡灵大军，准备将牧场居民彻底消灭。当前聚集在大门外的亡灵，是布鲁姆斯加斯部队的先锋；他打算用它们来试探牧场的防御。队伍抵达后不久，这些亡灵便向大门发起冲锋，但在英雄们现身后，很快便将注意力转向他们。布鲁姆斯加斯及其余部队正在周围的山丘中等待；如果英雄们选择留下来保卫多托特牧场，他们将在本次冒险的后续面对这些亡灵（不死扫荡队 86）。

复生骑兵 生物 19

亵渎丧尸（2） 生物 17

发展：初始的亡灵部队被击败后，英雄们会听到多托特牧场方向传来一阵骚动，牧场居民高喊着让他们赶快进墙内。牧场居民挪开他们用来加固入口的马车，急忙将英雄们迎入其中，并在他们身后重新筑起路障。根据英雄们抵达牧场时的具体时间，他们应当会在夜幕降临前拥有数小时的准备时间；届时，布鲁姆斯加斯将正式发动攻击（不死扫荡队 86）。在此之前，英雄们可以与牧场居民交谈，并说服他们将目前由其保管的血石托付给队伍（多托特的血石 86）。

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.5OeCIiN54tawMuyZ]{Approaching the Ranch}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{Undead Horde (Layer)}

Add the 'Undead Horde' layer over the 'Approaching the Ranch' ambiance as the players get closer.

On the outskirts of the ranch, the source of the sickening stench becomes apparent. Amassed outside the ranch's gate is a force of several dozen zombies, ghouls, and other undead, all mounted on horseback. A pair of zombies wearing breastplates marked with the symbols of fallen Lastwall knights leads the force. Unless the heroes go out of their way to make their presence known, the undead seem to have their sights set on the ranch. A character who succeeds at a @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:35] check realizes that an attack on Dortrot Ranch is imminent.

  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{Raised Cavalry}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{2 Desecrators}

Encounter

Moderate 19

After learning one of the Bloodstones of Arazni was secured at Dortrot Ranch, Seldeg Bhedlis dispatched one of his minions, the necromancer Brumesgarth (cautious male runecarved lich 19), to retrieve it. Preferring to search for the artifact at his leisure rather than risk an infiltration, Brumesgarth set about raising an army of undead to wipe out the ranchers. The undead currently at the gate represent the vanguard of Brumesgarth's forces, which he plans to use to test the ranch's defenses. The undead charge the gate moments after the party arrives but quickly turn their attention to the heroes once they reveal themselves. Brumesgarth and the remainder of his forces are waiting in the surrounding hills; if the heroes choose to stay and defend Dortrot Ranch, they will face these undead later in the adventure (Undead Extermination Crew 86).

Raised Cavalry Creature 19

Zombie desecrators (2) Creature 17

Development: Once the initial undead force is defeated, the heroes hear a commotion from Dortrot Ranch as the ranchers shout at them to get inside the walls. Clearing aside the wagons they used to reinforce the entry, the ranchers rush the heroes inside and rebuild the barricade behind them. Depending on the time of day the heroes arrived at the ranch, they should have several hours before nightfall, when Brumesgarth launches his attack in earnest (Undead Extermination Crew 86). Until then, the heroes can talk with the ranchers and convince them to entrust the party with the Bloodstone that's currently in the ranchers' care (The Dortrot Bloodstone 86).

B2. Dortrot Palisade.name: B2. 多托特牧场栅栏 B2. Dortrot Palisade
B2. Dortrot Palisade.text:
数根有兽人肩膀那么宽、且高出数倍的原木围绕着多托特牧场形成了一道木栅。原木的顶端被削成巨大的尖桩，其上刺穿着各种不死生物风干的遗骸。在墙体西侧的弧段上，一道路障封住了牧场的入口。

这道木栅高15尺、宽5尺。每个方格具有硬度 10、40 HP，以及 BT 20。墙体与防火带（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.2CB9fsBVkNmFT3ny]{区域 B3}）之间有两处岗哨。一处是由结实横梁建成的塔楼，另一处则不过是一个抬高的平台，上面摆着椅子、桌子和一顶用来遮阳的篷盖。堆放在这处有篷休息区旁边的是一小堆呈金字塔状码放的给养、水桶和其他补给品。

Logs as wide as an orc's shoulders and several times taller form a palisade around Dortrot Ranch. The tips of the logs have been sharpened into massive spikes, atop which are impaled the desiccated remains of various undead. On the wall's western arc, a barricade blocks the entrance to the ranch.

The palisade is 15 feet tall and 5 feet wide. Each square has Hardness 10, 40 HP, and BT 20. Between the wall and the firebreak (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.2CB9fsBVkNmFT3ny]{area B3}) are two guard stations. One is a tower constructed from sturdy beams, while the other is little more than a raised deck with chairs, tables, and a canopy for keeping the sun away. Stacked beside the canopied rest area is a small pyramid of provisions, water barrels, and other supplies.

B3. Firebreak.name: B3. 防火带 B3. Firebreak
B3. Firebreak.text:
多托特牧场在几年前挺过了数轮野火，很大程度上要归功于牧场栅墙后方挖掘的防火带。虽然如今对牧场威胁更大的是不死生物而非火灾，但这条沟渠依然很有用，因为那些突破栅墙的无心智不死生物必然会跌入防火带。防火带宽15英尺，深10英尺。

石柱从防火带中升起，正对大门。木板可以架在石柱上，形成一座临时桥梁，结实得足以让货车驶过。

Dortrot Ranch survived several waves of wildfires a few years back, thanks in large part to the firebreak dug behind the ranch's palisade. While these days undead pose a greater threat to the ranch than fires, the ditch's usefulness remains, as mindless undead that breach the palisade inevitably tumble into the firebreak. The firebreak is 15 feet wide and 10 feet deep.

Stone columns rise from the firebreak directly opposite the gate. Planks of wood can be placed over the columns to form an impromptu bridge sturdy enough for wagons to drive over.

B4. Dortrot Compound.name: B4. 多托特建筑群 B4. Dortrot Compound
B4. Dortrot Compound.text:
多托特牧场的核心区域是居民们居住的建筑。大多数建筑由石头建成，许多上面还留有先前野火灼烧的痕迹。唯一较新的建筑是牧场的厨房，它由木材建成，并独立于其他建筑之外。厨房附近的一块地上有一片长势不佳的菜园。最大的那栋建筑属于多托特牧场现任主人亨德尔·多特罗特，不过其他居民在这里也各自有住处。

这处建筑群有两口井，不过只有厨房附近的那一口有水。亨德尔房屋旁边的井据说在三代人前就干涸了。实际上，这口井从来就不能用；井底有一座地窖，绯红守护者曾将阿拉兹尼的肝血石封存在其中。在多托特牧场的所有居民中，只有亨德尔知道这座地窖的存在，而即便是他自己，也从未亲自查看过地窖。与科拉克要塞下方的地窖不同，这口井底地窖中曾用于防护的措施早已失效。如果英雄们刺探到这座地窖的位置，取回血石应该不会有什么麻烦。

地图上显示的建筑之外，还有额外的居所和附属建筑。牧场主们虽然已经学会靠他们自己能种出的食物勉强度日，但他们仍常常不得不宰杀马匹并制作肉干。屠宰房、制革棚和风干室都尽可能远离牧场主们的住处。

At the heart of Dortrot Ranch are the buildings where its inhabitants live. Most are constructed from stone, and many bear scorch marks from previous wildfires. The only recent construction is the ranch's kitchen, which is made of wood and stands apart from the other structures. A struggling vegetable garden occupies a plot of land near the kitchen. The largest structure belongs to Hendle Dortrot, the ranch's current owner, but other residents also have homes here.

The compound features two wells, although only the one near the kitchen provides water. The well next to Hendle's house purportedly ran dry three generations ago. In truth, this well was never functional; at its bottom lies a vault in which the Crimson Keepers secured the Liver Bloodstone of Arazni. Of all the inhabitants of Dortrot Ranch, only Hendle is aware of the vault's existence, and even he has never inspected the vault himself. Unlike the vault beneath Corlach Keep, any defenses that once secured the vault at the bottom of the well have long since failed. If the heroes discover the location of the vault, retrieving the Bloodstone should be little trouble.

Beyond the buildings shown on the map are additional living quarters and outbuildings. While the ranchers have learned to make do with what food they can grow themselves, they often resort to slaughtering horses and making jerky. A slaughterhouse, tanning shed, and curing chamber stand as far from the ranchers' homes as possible.

The Dortrot Bloodstone.name: 多托特的血石 The Dortrot Bloodstone
The Dortrot Bloodstone.text:
角色

与《死坟末土幸存者》中尤阿的希望的幸存者一样，本冒险没有为多托特牧场的NPC提供独特的数据表，因为他们不太可能参与战斗。不过，我们仍然提供了简明、精简的角色卡，可用于追踪用途以及在场景中放置指示物。

多托特牧场是一个由坚韧求生者组成的社区，他们拒绝将自己的土地拱手让给不死生物。在数代人以来一直为终焉之墙骑士团（以及更早之前的奥泽姆骑士团）提供坐骑之后，如今牧场由家族最后一位幸存成员，@UUID[Actor.FbXexBLWeZG9XUym]{亨德尔·多特罗特}（固执的人类男性牧场主 14）领导。在亨德尔坚定的带领下，牧场众人一直设法将死坟末土的不死生物阻挡在外，尽管多年来被不死生物包围的生活，已将牧场众人的忍耐力逼近极限。

英雄们在大门口受到几位牧场工的迎接，其中包括 @UUID[Actor.rnNn4gX5IlZUTDC7]{迪尔根}（忠诚的半身人女性牧师 12）、@UUID[Actor.d89KWIiujcRi90pu]{皮金·布拉什梅托}（足智多谋的卓玛尔女性农场帮工 6）以及 @UUID[Actor.WAGWMwgckqsbLJcQ]{艾德文鲁斯·莫里拉}（紧张的人类男性驯马师 4）。当迪尔根为英雄们处理伤势时，皮金会给队伍递上带有姜水香气的围巾。这些围巾与所有牧场工佩戴的类似，能让英雄们从笼罩牧场的死亡气味所施加的恶心（状态）中恢复过来。迪尔根忙碌时，英雄们会注意到她前臂上严重的烧伤疤痕——那是5年前这位牧师在抵御一场野火、险些丧命时留下的印记。

如果有人问起袭击牧场的不死生物，艾德文鲁斯会叹气道：“以前不是这样的。在局势恶化、那些火灾发生之前，这里是片很好的养马地。现在活着的人没剩多少了，而不死生物的袭击似乎越来越频繁。我总觉得我们撑不了多久了，但亨德尔说，多托特家族已经在这里生活了11代，没有任何不死生物能把我们赶走。”

不久之后，亨德尔本人前来迎接英雄们。他是个六十多岁、身材矮小的人类男子，顽固得像一枚弯掉的钉子，既钉不下去，也别不出来。他很乐意让英雄们在牧场休息，但如果他们决定继续前进，他也不会阻拦。“这里更安全，”他耸耸肩说，“不过看起来你们这帮人也挺能照顾自己。”

如果有人问起血石，亨德尔会立刻起疑。起初，亨德尔声称自己没听说过这件神器，但若某位角色成功通过一次 @Check[type:perception|dc:35] 察言观色，就会意识到这位牧场主知道的比他说出来的更多。如果继续追问，亨德尔最终会承认血石就在牧场里。（“没必要再隐瞒真相了，”他说，“反正你们已经知道了。”）但要说服亨德尔交出这件神器就困难得多。亨德尔解释说，多托特家族最初与绯红守护者达成了一项交易：保管血石，以换取成为奥泽姆骑士团的独家马匹供应商。亨德尔承认这项交易如今已经没有意义了，但他是个信守诺言的人，而守护血石就是他延续家族传承的方式。

要说服亨德尔将血石托付给英雄们，需要成功进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:37] 提出请求。或者，英雄也可以尝试一次 DC 37 的阿拉兹尼学识检定或 DC 39 的宗教检定，让亨德尔明白，如果血石落入不死生物手中，阿拉兹尼——乃至整个死坟末土——将面临何等危险。若成功，亨德尔会承认血石被锁在牧场干涸水井底部的一间地窖中（见区域 (B4)）。若检定失败，亨德尔拒绝交出血石，即使以死相逼也不会让步。除非英雄们选择用武力夺取这件神器，否则他们唯一能说服亨德尔放弃血石的方法，就是帮助他抵御布鲁姆斯加斯的军队对牧场的进攻（见下文“不死扫荡队”）。

Actors

As with the survivors of Yua's Hope from Gravelands Survivors, the adventure does not provide unique stat blocks for the NPCs of Dortrot Ranch, as it's unlikely that they will be involved in combat. However, we have still provided simple, streamlined actor sheets that can be used for tracking purposes and token placement on scenes.

Dortrot Ranch is a community of rugged survivalists who have refused to surrender their land to the undead. After providing mounts for the Knights of Lastwall (and before them, the Knights of Ozem) for generations, today the ranch is led by the family's last surviving member, @UUID[Actor.FbXexBLWeZG9XUym]{Hendle Dortrot} (stubborn male human rancher 14). Under Hendle's determined leadership, the ranchers have managed to keep the undead of the Gravelands at bay, although years spent surrounded by undead have tested the ranchers' endurance to the breaking point.

The heroes are met at the gate by a handful of ranchers, including @UUID[Actor.rnNn4gX5IlZUTDC7]{Deelgeen} (devoted female halfling chaplain 12), @UUID[Actor.d89KWIiujcRi90pu]{Pigeon Brushmetal} (resourceful female dromaar farmhand 6), and @UUID[Actor.WAGWMwgckqsbLJcQ]{Advenrus Morilla} (nervous male human horse trainer 4). While Deelgeen tends to any injuries the heroes have, Pigeon offers the party scarves scented with ginger water. The scarves are similar to ones all the ranchers wear and allow the heroes to recover from the sickened condition imposed by the scent of death that hangs over the ranch. While Deelgeen works, the heroes notice heavy burn scars on her forearms: reminders of when the chaplain nearly lost her life defending the ranch from a wildfire 5 years ago.

If asked about the undead that attacked the ranch, Advenrus sighs. “It didn't used to be like this. Before things went bad and the fires happened, this was good, horse-rearing land. Now there aren't many living people left, and it seems like attacks from the undead come more frequent. I keep thinking we can't hold on much longer, but Hendle says the Dortrots have been here for 11 generations, and no undead are going to drive us away.”

Before long, Hendle himself arrives to welcome the heroes. He is a short human man in his late 60s, and is stubborn as a crooked nail that refuses to be hammered down or pried loose from its board. He's glad to offer the heroes a chance to rest at the ranch but doesn't argue if they decide to move on. “It's safer here,” he shrugs, “but it looks you lot can handle yourselves.”

Hendle immediately becomes suspicious if asked about the Bloodstone. At first, Hendle claims not to have heard of the artifact, but a character who succeeds at a @Check[type:perception|dc:35] to Sense Motive recognizes that the rancher knows more than he lets on. If pressed, Hendle eventually admits that the Bloodstone is at the ranch. (“No point hiding the truth,” he says, “since you already know it.”) Convincing Hendle to give up the artifact is more difficult. Hendle explains the Dortrots originally made a deal with the Crimson Keepers to keep the Bloodstone in exchange for becoming the exclusive horse traders for the Knights of Ozem. Hendle admits the deal is meaningless now, but he's a man of his word and sees safeguarding the Bloodstone is his way of carrying on his family's legacy.

Convincing Hendle to entrust the heroes with the Bloodstone requires a successful @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:37] to Make a Request. Alternatively, a hero can attempt a DC 37 Arazni Lore or DC 39 Religion check to impress upon Hendle the danger Arazni—and the Gravelands as a whole—would face if the Bloodstone were to fall into the hands of the undead. On a success, Hendle admits the Bloodstone as locked inside a vault at the bottom of the ranch's dried-up well (described in area (B4)). On a failed check, Hendle refuses to give up the Bloodstone. even under pain of death. Unless the heroes chose to take the artifact by force, the only way they can convince Hendle to relinquish the Bloodstone is to help him defend the ranch against Brumesgarth's army (see Undead Extermination Crew below).

Castle Firrine.name: 费林堡 Castle Firrine
Castle Firrine.text:
演员

与《死坟末土幸存者》中尤娅的希望的幸存者一样，本冒险没有为费林堡的燃日氏族兽人提供独特的数据栏，因为他们不太可能会参与战斗。对于像查古格·亮剑和卡格里格·破晓这样有名有姓的角色，我们除了使用常见的“简易 NPC”角色卡之外，还选择混合使用《Monster Core》中的兽人老兵、兽人斗士和兽人指挥官，来作为各种无名兽人的替代，以便在场景中表现这些角色。我们想强调，提供这些角色卡的目的仅仅是用于追踪和放置指示物——他们的属性会远低于玩家角色和本章中的敌人，而这很可能并非本书作者的本意。

场景

@UUID[Scene.O4FYasrv6rG41AeP]

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{Gravelands River}

当队伍接近费林堡时。

费林堡是奥泽姆骑士团在终焉之墙于新近获释的默语暴君军势之下陷落时，被迫放弃的众多要塞之一；它曾作为在贝尔克岑领作战的十字军的补给站与野战医院。尽管终焉之墙骑士团目前认为费林堡仍然无人占据，但这座堡垒并未一直空置。当默语暴君归来的消息传到贝尔克岑时，燃日氏族的首领玛嘉·火发派出一支战士分队进入死坟末土，与亡灵作战并援助生者。这支分队向东前往恩卡坦湖途中，发现了费林堡。

兽人在搜刮城堡一处附属建筑中的补给时，发现了一座小礼拜堂，其中安放着阿拉兹妮的心血石。燃日氏族信奉的是撒伦蕾，而非阿拉兹妮，但兽人们立刻认出了这件神器的力量，并决定在费林堡建立据点，既可保护这块血石，也可作为他们氏族在死坟末土中的半永久基地。自那以后，燃日氏族每年都会以持续一周的庆典来纪念他们发现此物的周年日。英雄们抵达城堡之时，正值这场庆典举行。

根据他派去调查费林堡的斥候所作的报告，塞尔德格·贝德利斯已经知晓燃日氏族占据了这座堡垒并守护着这块血石。塞尔德格没有冒险发动正面强攻，而是派出一队剥皮者，由他的一名副官——名叫希卡尔夫人的吸血鬼（大胆的女性吸血鬼特工 19）率领，潜入兽人即将举行的庆典。当英雄们抵达费林堡时，剥皮者们已经披着一些燃日氏族并不熟悉的旅人的皮囊，混入了城堡。希卡尔夫人则与一大队亡灵在城堡外的丘陵中等待；如果剥皮者窃取血石的企图失败，她就准备率军直接袭击兽人。

费林堡是一座气势逼人的建筑，建在埃斯克河与红隼河之间一处隆起的高地之上。其厚重的石墙之内有数十个房间，但除少数被燃日氏族兽人用作住处的房间外，大多空无一物。本章的大部分内容都发生在一座附属建筑中，燃日氏族目前正在那里举行庆典。这座建筑位于城堡残破的外墙内侧不远处，四周环绕着一道 10 英尺深的壕沟。该建筑的 @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.qo8RklZpO21DgcxA]{C1} 和 @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{C6} 区域露天。除非另有说明，其余所有区域的天花板高度均为 15 英尺。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.YoalDan65uXrZzcA]{Five Year Celebration (Layer)}

当庆典的声音越来越近时播放。将其作为环境音层，叠加在 @UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{Gravelands River} 的播放列表之上。

当英雄们接近费林堡时，朗读或转述以下内容。

红色与橙色的彩带垂挂在费林堡的外墙上，鲜艳的色彩与外面单调阴沉的景观形成了鲜明对比。城堡庭院中，数十个身影聚集在一座受第二道内墙保护的附属建筑周围。喧闹的大笑声和其他欢庆声从这座建筑敞开的入口中传出。

聚集在附属建筑周围的人群，大多是近 5 年前定居费林堡的那支原始战帮成员。然而，其中也有相当一部分是从其他氏族据点赶来参加庆典的兽人。人群情绪欢快，尽管英雄们很可能是少见的来客，兽人们仍热情地欢迎他们。如果英雄们提出想见负责的人，他们会被指引前往附属建筑的庭院（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.qo8RklZpO21DgcxA]{area C1}），在那里他们可以与莫尔加·黎明之誓交谈。

Actors

As with the survivors of Yua's Hope from Gravelands Survivors, the adventure does not provide unique stat blocks for the Burning Sun orcs of Castle Firrine, as it's unlikely that they will be involved in combat. Along with the usual 'simple NPC' sheets for named characters like Chargug Brightsword and Khagrig Daybreak, we have chosen to use a mixture of the Orc Veteran, Orc Scrapper, and Orc Commander from Monster Core as standins for the various unnamed orcs, in order to represent these characters in the scene. We want to stress that our intention in providing these sheets is solely for tracking purposes and token placement- their statistics will far below the levels of the player characters and the enemies in this chapter, which is unlikely to have been the intention of the book's authors.

Scene

@UUID[Scene.O4FYasrv6rG41AeP]

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{Gravelands River}

As the party approaches Castle Firrine.

One of the many strongholds the Knights of Ozem were forced to abandon when Lastwall fell to the forces of the newly freed Whispering Tyrant, Castle Firrine had served as a supply station and field hospital for crusaders campaigning in the Hold of Belkzen. Though the Knights of Lastwall currently believe Castle Firrine remains unoccupied, the fortress has not sat empty. When word of the Whispering Tyrant's return reached Belkzen, the leader of the Burning Sun hold, Mahja Firehair, sent a contingent of warriors into the Gravelands to battle the undead and lend aid to the living. As this contingent traveled east toward Lake Encarthan, they came upon Castle Firrine.

While scavenging one of the castle's outbuildings for supplies, the orcs discovered a chapel in which lay the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni. The Burning Sun Hold is devoted to Sarenrae, not Arazni, but the orcs immediately recognized the artifact's power and decided that establishing a presence at Castle Firrine would both protect the Bloodstone and serve as a semi-permanent base for their hold within the Gravelands. Each year since, the Burning Sun Hold has celebrated the anniversary of their discovery with a week-long festival. The heroes' arrival at the castle coincides with this celebration.

From reports given to him by the scouts he sent to investigate Castle Firrine, Seldeg Bhedlis is already aware the Burning Sun Hold occupies the fortress and safeguards the Bloodstone. Rather than risk a frontal assault, Seldeg has sent a cadre of ecorches led by one of his lieutenants, a vampire named Lady Siccale (daring female vampire agent 19), to infiltrate the orcs' upcoming festival. As the heroes arrive at Castle Firrine, the ecorches have already infiltrated the castle wearing the skins of travelers unfamiliar to the Burning Sun Hold. Lady Siccale waits in the hills outside the castle with a larger contingent of undead, ready to attack the orcs directly should the ecorches' attempt to steal the Bloodstone fail.

Castle Firrine is an imposing structure built atop an upthrust of land between the Esk and Kestrel Rivers. Within its thick stone walls are dozens of chambers, but most are empty save for a handful that the Burning Sun Hold orcs have taken as living quarters. The bulk of this chapter takes place in an outbuilding where the Burning Sun is currently holding its celebration. The building lies just inside the castle's crumbling outer wall and is surrounded by a 10-foot-deep ditch. Areas @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.qo8RklZpO21DgcxA]{C1} and @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{C6} of this structure are open to the sky. The ceilings in all other areas are 15 feet high, unless otherwise noted.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.YoalDan65uXrZzcA]{Five Year Celebration (Layer)}

As the sounds of the celebration grow nearer. Play this as an ambient sound layer over the playlist for @UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{Gravelands River}.

As the heroes approach Castle Firrine, read or paraphrase the following.

Red and orange streamers have been draped across Castle Firrine's outer wall, their bright colors a stark contrast to the drab landscape beyond. In the castle's courtyard, dozens of figures are gathered around an outbuilding protected by a second, inner wall. The sounds of raucous laughter and other merriment can be heard through the structure's open entrance.

The bulk of the crowd gathered around the outbuilding are members of the original warband that settled in Castle Firrine nearly 5 years ago. A sizable minority, however, are orcs of other holds who have traveled to the castle to attend the celebration. The crowd's mood is festive, and while the heroes are likely an unusual sight, the orcs welcome them warmly. If the heroes ask to meet with someone in charge, they're directed to the outbuilding's courtyard (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.qo8RklZpO21DgcxA]{area C1}), where they can speak with Molgah Dawnspromise.

C1. Courtyard.name: C1. 庭院 C1. Courtyard
C1. Courtyard.text:
附属建筑的庭院是燃日氏族庆典的行动中心。鲜艳的花朵和彩带装饰着墙壁，几张桌椅被摆放出来供人就座。庭院东端搭起了一座临时舞台。

当英雄们抵达时，庭院里满是参加各种户外游戏的兽人，比如掷马蹄铁和掷斧。一名身穿撒恩蕾信徒长袍的女性兽人正在照看舞台上堆起的一小堆烟花。

正在布置烟花的兽人是 @UUID[Actor.uQQ4SXHECOunMzpy]{莫尔加·黎明之誓}（友善的女性兽人撒恩蕾祭司 9）。作为燃日氏族的一员，莫尔加在英雄们靠近时向他们问候，并立刻邀请他们加入庆典。她表示可以提供房间和餐食，费用按英雄们负担得起的金额支付（如果角色们难以确定公平价格，她提出的起始价是所有英雄每晚共 10 gp）。如果有人问她费林堡是否由她负责，莫尔加会轻笑一声，并示意英雄们跟她前往请愿大厅（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.DpsItrgfBALlZaeV]{区域 C3}），在那里他们可以见到 @UUID[Actor.YJ0y2QoWPEIHhIYF]{查古格·亮剑}，也就是驻守城堡的燃日氏族领袖。

发展：如果你们已经游玩过《死坟末土幸存者》，那么侦察兵尼斯卡·烽火、格罗娜和帕尔乔特也在参与游戏的兽人之中。如果 @UUID[Actor.JlyRbGndpRfsi0X8]{加拉格·日痕} 在那场冒险中决定加入兽人，那么他也在这里。

@UUID[Actor.Qb9WzdRfvEC0Yl9x]{宝藏}：燃日氏族为期一周的庆典每晚都会举行烟花表演。若作为武器发射，每一枚烟花都视为一枚射程 100 尺的炼金炸弹。英雄们可以如常辨认这些烟花，但如果随机抓取一枚，则掷 @UUID[RollTable.s6NPVJPAxLl4zvja]{1d4} 来决定其效果。舞台上的那堆烟花目前每种类型各有 10 枚。

The outbuilding's courtyard is the center of activity for the Burning Sun Hold's celebration. Brilliant flowers and streamers decorate the walls, and a handful of tables and chairs have been set out for seating. An impromptu stage has been erected at the east end of the courtyard.

When the heroes arrive, the courtyard is filled with orcs participating in various outdoor games, such as horseshoes and ax throwing. A single female orc dressed in the robes of a devotee of Sarenrae tends to a small mountain of fireworks assembled on the stage.

The orc setting up the fireworks is @UUID[Actor.uQQ4SXHECOunMzpy]{Molgah Dawnspromise} (friendly female orc priest of Sarenrae 9). A member of the Burning Sun Hold, Molgah greets the heroes as they approach and immediately invites them to join the celebration. She says rooms and meals are available for whatever payment the heroes can afford (if the characters struggle to determine a fair price, she offers a starting point of 10 gp per night for all the heroes). If asked whether she's the one in charge at Castle Firrine, Molgah chuckles and gestures for the heroes to follow her to the petitioning hall (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.DpsItrgfBALlZaeV]{area C3}), where they can meet with @UUID[Actor.YJ0y2QoWPEIHhIYF]{Chargug Brightsword}, the Burning Sun's leader at the castle.

Development: If you have already played “Gravelands Survivors,” the scouts Niskar Balefire, Ghrona, and Parchot are among the orcs playing in the games. If @UUID[Actor.JlyRbGndpRfsi0X8]{Garaag Sunbrand} decided to join the orcs during that adventure, he's here as well.

@UUID[Actor.Qb9WzdRfvEC0Yl9x]{Treasure}: The Burning Sun Hold's week-long celebration features nightly fireworks displays. If fired as a weapon, each of the fireworks functions as an alchemical bomb with a range of 100 feet. The heroes can identify the fireworks as normal, but if one is grabbed at random, @UUID[RollTable.s6NPVJPAxLl4zvja]{roll 1d4} to determine its function. The pile of fireworks on the stage currently contains 10 of each type of firework.

C2. Gathering Hall.name: C2. 集会厅 C2. Gathering Hall
C2. Gathering Hall.text:
这座大厅在燃日氏族年度庆典期间，作为访客的集会场所。东北角聚集着一群兽人，正在处理一些轻便的活计，例如磨利武器或修补斗篷。

This hall serves as a gathering space for visitors during the Burning Sun Hold's annual celebration. A group of orcs have assembled in the northeast corner to attend to light tasks, such as sharpening weapons or mending cloaks.

C3. Petitioning Hall.name: C3. 请愿大厅 C3. Petitioning Hall
C3. Petitioning Hall.text:
当奥泽姆骑士团仍控制着费林堡时，请愿者会被带到这个房间，向统领骑士正式提出他们的请求。燃日氏族出于几乎相同的目的使用这个房间。虽然兽人并不要求来访者必须献礼才能参加庆典，但许多人仍然会这么做。这些贡品整齐地堆放在房间东墙边。查古格·亮剑（雄性兽人、野心勃勃的酋长候补 19）是费林堡燃日氏族兽人的领袖。当英雄们抵达时，查古格正站在大厅远端与其他旅人说话，但不过一两分钟后，他就会将注意力转向队伍。作为玛嘉·火发亲自栽培的门生，查古格是个不容小觑的人物。他欢迎英雄们来参加庆典，并询问他们到费林堡有何事。

在与英雄们交谈期间，查古格解释说，自从终焉之墙陷落后不久他与自己的战帮夺取费林堡以来，燃日氏族占据费林堡已将近 5 年。自那以后，城堡中的兽人一直专注于清剿周边土地上的不死生物，并为设法来到城堡的难民提供庇护。燃日氏族与终焉之墙骑士团保持着良好关系，尤其是因为他们的一名成员，@UUID[Actor.tLym5Oqs0NLf57cJ]{卡格里格·破晓}（雄性兽人、耐心的动物驯养师 10），已被吸纳进该骑士团。然而，查古格认为，骑士们最终会对他眼中属于自己族人的费林堡正当主张提出争夺。事实上，他一开始就以为英雄们是骑士团派来收回城堡所有权的代表。

如果英雄们提起血石，查古格会承认这件神器目前被安置在附属建筑的小教堂内（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{区域 C6}）。他解释说，自从燃日氏族占据费林堡以来，他们一直妥善保管着血石，并且对于暗示它不属于兽人的说法感到愤慨。虽然他并非完全反对将这件神器交还给终焉之墙骑士团，但他认为这样的要求，是他的氏族据点最终被逐出费林堡的第一步。

发展：如果英雄们坚持要他交出血石，查古格会坚持表示，自己需要时间来作出如此重大的决定。他邀请英雄们留下参加庆典，而他会进一步思考此事。英雄们将有时间在@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.BOgEnma083JswfZQ]{事件 1：五周年庆典}期间说服查古格将血石交给他们。

@UUID[Actor.n5he4Lw98QGyhzLo]{宝藏}：堆放在东墙边的贡品大多是贸易货物，总价值为 1,000 gp。在这些普通货物中，有 4 瓶高等生命灵药和一根造粮术魔杖（8环）。

When the Knights of Ozem still held Castle Firrine, petitioners would be brought to this chamber to make their formal requests of the commanding knight. The Burning Sun Hold uses the chamber for much the same purpose. While the orcs don't require visitors to give gifts in order to attend the celebration, many still do. These tributes are stacked in neat piles against the chamber's eastern wall. Chargug Brightsword (ambitious male orc aspirant chief 19) is the leader of the Burning Sun orcs at Castle Firrine. As the heroes arrive, Chargug stands at the far end of the hall speaking with other travelers, but it's only a minute or two before he turns his attention to the party. A protégé of Mahja Firehair herself, Chargug is a formidable figure. He welcomes the heroes to the celebration and asks what business they have at Castle Firrine.

During his conversation with the heroes, Chargug explains that the Burning Sun Hold has occupied Castle Firrine for nearly 5 years, when he and his warband claimed it shortly after Lastwall's fall. Since then, the orcs at the castle have focused on clearing out the undead from the surrounding land and offering sanctuary to refugees who find their way to the castle. The Burning Sun Hold maintains good relations with the Knights of Lastwall, especially since one of their members, @UUID[Actor.tLym5Oqs0NLf57cJ]{Khagrig Daybreak} (patient male orc animal handler 10), was inducted into the order. However, Chargug believes the knights will eventually contest what he sees as his people's rightful claim to Castle Firrine. In fact, he at first assumes the heroes are representatives of the knights coming to reclaim ownership of the castle.

If the heroes bring up the subject of the Bloodstone, Chargug admits the artifact is currently secured inside the outbuilding's chapel (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{area C6}). He explains the Burning Sun Hold has kept the Bloodstone safe since their occupation of Castle Firrine and takes umbrage at suggestions it doesn't belong to the orcs. While not outright opposed to the idea of relinquishing the artifact to the Knights of Lastwall, he considers such a demand the first step in his hold's eventual eviction from Castle Firrine.

Development: If the heroes press him to relinquish the Bloodstone. Chargug insists he needs time to make such an important decision. He invites the heroes to stay for the celebration as he ponders the matter further. The heroes will have time to convince Chargug to give them the Bloodstone during @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.BOgEnma083JswfZQ]{Event 1: The Five-Year Celebration}.

@UUID[Actor.n5he4Lw98QGyhzLo]{Treasure}: The tributes piled against the eastern wall are mostly trade goods. In total, they're worth 1,000 gp. Among the mundane goods are 4 major elixirs of life and a wand of create food (8th rank).

C5. Churchyard.name: C5. 教堂墓园 C5. Churchyard
C5. Churchyard.text:
这片区域的门日夜由两名燃日战士把守。与庆典上的其他参与者形成鲜明对比的是，这些兽人的神情十分肃穆。他们坚守职责，若发现任何人试图进入教堂墓园，便会立刻发出警报。

门后，小教堂打理得井井有条的庭院中，骑士与燃日战士的墓穴并排安葬于此。墓碑上常能见到艾奥梅黛与撒恩蕾的圣徽。

The door to this area is guarded night and day by two Burning Sun warriors. In stark contrast to the other attendees at the celebration, the mood of these orcs is solemn. They're unwavering in their duty and immediately raise an alarm if they spot anyone attempting to enter the churchyard.

Beyond the door, the graves of knights and Burning Sun warriors lie side-by-side in the chapel's well-kept yard. The symbols of Iomedae and Sarenrae are a common sight among the markers.

C6. Chapel.name: C6. 小教堂 C6. Chapel
C6. Chapel.text:
木制长椅沿着小教堂纵深整齐成排摆放。小教堂尽头的石制祭坛上铺着一块绣有撒恩蕾圣徽的祭坛布。若英雄们掀起这块布，便会清楚看到这座小教堂先前是献给艾奥梅黛的，因为她的烈焰之剑被雕刻在祭坛的石面上。祭坛顶部放着一个木盒，盒身雕有一系列华丽、彼此咬合的嵌板。

@UUID[Actor.Wj7CpaPRufspcS4l]{宝藏}: 祭坛上的盒子是一只圣骸匣，里面装着阿拉兹尼的心血石。盒内衬有交替铺设的精金与白银薄板，因此它比外表看起来重得多（10 负载）。盒子的嵌板可以移动，露出一个棘手的谜题锁。要打开这个盒子，需要四次成功的 @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock] 检定来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{开锁}，或者进行一次成功的 @Check[type:games-lore|dc:44] 检定来解开谜题。莫尔加·黎明之誓在“焚阳”抵达城堡后不久便解开了这个谜题；如果英雄们卡住了，她可以与他们分享解法。

奖励: 英雄们取得阿拉兹尼的心血石时，给予他们 100 XP。

Wooden pews stand in neat rows along the chapel's length. An altar cloth bearing the symbol of Sarenrae is draped over a stone altar at the far end of the chapel. If the heroes lift the cloth, the chapel's former dedication to Iomedae becomes clear, as her flaming sword is carved into the altar's stone. Resting atop the altar is a wooden box carved with a series of ornate, interlocking panels.

@UUID[Actor.Wj7CpaPRufspcS4l]{Treasure}: The box atop the altar is a reliquary containing the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni. Lined with alternating sheets of adamantine and silver, the box is much heavier than it appears (10 Bulk). The box's panels can be shifted, exposing a tricky puzzle lock. Opening the box requires four successful @Check[type:thievery|dc:40|traits:action:pick-a-lock] checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick a Lock} or a single @Check[type:games-lore|dc:44] check to solve the puzzle. Molgah Dawnspromise solved the puzzle shortly after the Burning Sun arrived at the castle and can share the solution with the heroes if they become stuck.

Rewards: Award the heroes 100 XP for obtaining the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni.

Event 1: The Five-Year Celebration.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.YoalDan65uXrZzcA]{五周年庆典（层）}

如果它们尚未播放，此播放列表和 @UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{死坟末土河流} 旨在组合使用，以构成节庆的环境音景。

下午的庆典在附属建筑的庭院举行。参加聚会的人来来往往，但查古格始终处于庆典的中心。他和孩子们玩耍，参加友好的竞赛，并享用大量食物和饮品。整个庆典的气氛始终欢快融洽，即便是在传统上彼此敌对的据点成员之间也是如此。所有人都满怀期待地等待着烟花表演开始，按计划将在夜幕降临时举行。

英雄们可以按自己的意愿参与庆典，但这场庆典也给了他们一个博取查古格好感的机会。英雄们在整个庆典期间有三轮时间来影响查古格。在第三轮结束时，烟花点燃开始。前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.9uA5Vq6DEcxpWwKY]{事件 2：不死渗透}。

  • [[/r 1d20+33 #Perception]]{察觉 (+33)}
  • [[/r 1d20+35 #Will]]{意志 (+35)}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JLPY5hl4qiJ1zLi1]{刺探 DC}

  • @Check[type:orc-lore|dc:35|traits:action:discover,secret]
  • @Check[type:religion|dc:40|traits:action:discover,secret]
  • @Check[type:society|dc:38|traits:action:discover,secret]

查古格·亮剑

影响力 19

  • 独特
  • 中型
  • 类人生物
  • 兽人

雄心勃勃的战首

背景 查古格在过去 5 年里一直领导着费林堡的兽人，但他仍然太缺乏经验，还无法统治一个真正的据点。尽管他在外人面前展现出自信的气场，但他对自己的能力并没有看上去那样笃定。

外貌 查古格是一名肌肉发达的中年兽人，脸上已经刻着笑纹。

性格 尽管是一名令人生畏的战士，查古格却待人温暖，也很容易发笑。在危险时刻他会变得严肃，但即便如此，他也常常会用一句玩笑来缓和紧张气氛。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.6Oe9dg3Lu10slyeC]{影响}

  • @Check[type:sarenrae-lore|dc:36|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:religion|dc:38|traits:action:influence] （讨论宗教哲学）
  • @Check[type:gravelands-lore|dc:38|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:38|traits:action:influence] （指出在死坟末土这片区域生存的困难）
  • @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:40|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:athletics|dc:40|traits:action:influence] （在赛跑或其他竞赛中战胜查古格）
  • @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:42|traits:action:influence] （坦率提出血石的问题）

影响力 2 查古格提到，他最近梦见一名身穿黑甲的男子在城堡围墙外的田地里埋骨。他认为这是个不祥之兆。他对英雄们的信任让他们在 @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.fyDhxJu5r7K7Xlgg]{事件 3：侵略行动} 之前有更多时间做准备。

影响力 4 查古格对英雄们更亲近了，也愿意直接讨论血石的问题。再提起血石的归属不再会提高影响查古格的检定 DC（见“抗力”）。

影响力 6 查古格将血石托付给英雄们，前提是他们答应向终焉之墙骑士团请求一份正式放弃其对费林堡主张的文书。

抗力 起初，查古格怀疑英雄们是终焉之墙骑士团派来评估兽人实力的特使。暗示终焉之墙骑士团才是费林堡或血石任一者的 rightful owner 会使该检定的 DC 提高 2。

弱点 尽管查古格是在战场上功勋卓著的战士，但他始终志在有朝一日领导属于自己的据点。向他提供领导建议，或鼓励他的抱负，会使 DC 降低 2。

奖励：如果英雄们对查古格达到影响力 4门槛，给予英雄们 40 XP。若他们达到影响力 6门槛，再额外给予英雄们 40 XP。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.YoalDan65uXrZzcA]{Five Year Celebration (Layer)}

If they are not already playing, this playlist and @UUID[Playlist.KEF79sk42Ww6GI5Z]{Gravelands River} are intended to be combined to make up the soundscape for the festival.

The afternoon's celebration takes place in the outbuilding's courtyard. Partygoers come and go, but Chargug remains at the center of the festivities. He plays with the children, takes part in friendly competitions, and enjoys copious amounts of food and drink. The mood throughout the celebration remains jovial, even between members of traditionally rival holds. Everyone waits in anticipation for the fireworks display, which is scheduled to begin at nightfall.

The heroes can partake in the festivities as they see fit, but the celebration also gives them an opportunity to endear themselves to Chargug. The heroes have three rounds to influence Chargug throughout the celebration. At the end of the third round, the lighting of the fireworks begins. Proceed to @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.9uA5Vq6DEcxpWwKY]{Event 2: Undead Infiltration}.

  • [[/r 1d20+33 #Perception]]{Perception (+33)}
  • [[/r 1d20+35 #Will]]{Will (+35)}

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.JLPY5hl4qiJ1zLi1]{Discovery DCs}

  • @Check[type:orc-lore|dc:35|traits:action:discover,secret]
  • @Check[type:religion|dc:40|traits:action:discover,secret]
  • @Check[type:society|dc:38|traits:action:discover,secret]

Chargug Brightsword

Influence 19

  • UNIQUE
  • MEDIUM
  • HUMANOID
  • ORC

Ambitious war leader

Background Chargug has led the orcs at Castle Firrine for the last 5 years but is still too inexperienced to rule a proper hold. Though he projects an aura of confidence for outsiders, he’s less certain in his abilities than he appears.

Appearance Chargug is a muscular, middle-aged orc with laugh lines already creased into his face.

Personality Despite being a fearsome warrior, Chargug is warm and quick to laughter. He becomes serious in moments of peril, but even then he’ll often will break the tension with a joke.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.6Oe9dg3Lu10slyeC]{Influence}

  • @Check[type:sarenrae-lore|dc:36|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:religion|dc:38|traits:action:influence] (to discuss religious philosophy)
  • @Check[type:gravelands-lore|dc:38|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:38|traits:action:influence] (to note the difficulty of surviving in this area of the Gravelands)
  • @Check[type:acrobatics|dc:40|traits:action:influence] or @Check[type:athletics|dc:40|traits:action:influence] (to win a race or other contest against Chargug)
  • @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:42|traits:action:influence] (to frankly broach the matter of the Bloodstone)

Influence 2 Chargug mentions that he recently dreamed of a man in black armor burying bones in the fields beyond the castle’s walls. He considers the dream to be an ill omen. His trust in the heroes gives them more time to prepare before @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.fyDhxJu5r7K7Xlgg]{Event 3: Aggressive Action}.

Influence 4 Chargug warms up to the heroes and is willing to discuss the matter of the Bloodstone directly. Bringing up the ownership of the Bloodstone no longer increases the check DCs to influence Chargug (see Resistances).

Influence 6 Chargug entrusts the heroes with the Bloodstone, provided they promise to ask the Knights of Lastwall for a writ formally renouncing their claim on Castle Firrine.

Resistances Chargug at first suspects the heroes are agents sent by the Knights of Lastwall to judge the orcs’ strength. Suggesting that the Knights are the rightful owners of either Castle Firrine or the Bloodstone increases the check’s DC by 2.

Weaknesses Though he is an accomplished warrior on the battlefield, Chargug has his sights set on leading a hold of his own someday. Offering him leadership tips or encouraging his ambitions reduces the DC by 2.

Reward: Award the heroes 40 XP if they reach the Influence 4 threshold with Chargug. Award the heroes an additional 40 XP if they reach the Influence 6 threshold.

Event 2: Undead Infiltration.name: 事件2：不死渗透 Event 2: Undead Infiltration
Event 2: Undead Infiltration.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.jwsKoc1HKOqRA4QL]{烟花开始},@UUID[Playlist.SZDVkdwO8BJ8Lw7Q]{不死渗透}

在这里先使用第一个播放列表，让事件开始发展，并给予你机会完整叙述庆典正热闹进行的场面，之后再切换为“不死渗透”播放列表来替代它。

当五彩缤纷的烟火景象在人群中引发阵阵惊喜低语时，剥皮尸开始行动，企图偷走血石。

@UUID[Actor.IRWynEqd6QQr9CO3]{3个精英剥皮尸}

当烟花开始燃放时，三只精英剥皮尸进入庭院。剥皮尸以隐秘进行先攻。在遭遇的第一轮中，其中两只剥皮尸使用它们的肌肉跳跃能力翻过墙壁，前往@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{区域C6}，在那里进入小教堂寻找阿拉兹尼的心血石。与此同时，第三只剥皮尸留在后方，使用撕皮阻止人群追赶。

发展：在战斗期间，那两只翻过墙壁的剥皮尸会径直前往小教堂（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{区域C6}），只有在被迫进行近战时才会停下来攻击英雄。除非队伍阻止它们，否则一旦剥皮尸拿到血石，它们就会翻过外墙，带着这件圣物逃往@UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.igV5sDcav4MChpFA]{锤石堡}。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.jwsKoc1HKOqRA4QL]{Fireworks Begin},@UUID[Playlist.SZDVkdwO8BJ8Lw7Q]{Undead Infiltration}

Use the first playlist here to start events in motion and give you the opportunity to narrate the celebration in full swing, before bringing in the Undead Infiltration playlist to replace it.

As the sight of the multi-colored pyrotechnics sends murmurs of delight through the partygoers, the ecorches launch their bid to steal the Bloodstone.

@UUID[Actor.IRWynEqd6QQr9CO3]{3 Elite Ecorches}

The three elite ecorches enter the courtyard as the lighting of the fireworks begins. The ecorches use Stealth for initiative. On the first round of the encounter, two of the ecorches use their Muscular Leap ability to vault over the wall to @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{area C6}, where they enter the chapel in search of the Heart Bloodstone of Arazni. Meanwhile, the third ecorche remains behind, using Tear Skin to discourage the crowd from pursuing.

Development: During the battle, the two ecorches who jump over the wall head straight for the chapel (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{area C6}), pausing to attack the heroes only if forced to engage in melee. Unless the party stops them, once the ecorches secure the Bloodstone, they jump over the outer walls and abscond with the artifact to @UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.igV5sDcav4MChpFA]{Hammer Rock}.

Event 3: Aggressive Action.name: 事件3：侵略行动 Event 3: Aggressive Action
Event 3: Aggressive Action.text:
在与剥皮者遭遇后的片刻，一名落单的兽人骑手疾驰进入庭院，呼唤查古格去请愿大厅见他（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.DpsItrgfBALlZaeV]{区域 C3}）；骑手在那里告知他，有人发现费林堡附近山丘上出现了不死生物。如果英雄们在 @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.BOgEnma083JswfZQ]{事件 1：五周年庆典} 期间与查古格达到了 影响力 2 的门槛，这位兽人首领便会示意队伍跟上。否则，英雄们会在几分钟后查古格再次现身时得知骑手带来的消息：一支不死生物部队正逼近费林堡。

如果英雄们是直接从骑手那里得知来袭不死生物的消息，他们有 10 分钟准备迎击。否则，他们只有 1 分钟。

播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.M9X1ul3ogFbjgq8r]{礼拜堂中的希卡尔夫人}

一份紧张的战斗播放列表，适用于希卡尔夫人袭击礼拜堂的场景，并伴有附近兽人击退不死生物的声音。

  • @UUID[Actor.aEBup6SntDIOlTtY]{希卡尔夫人}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{2 名亵渎丧尸}
  • @UUID[Actor.hXEFhS8iL5d6MqdD]{3 匹腐朽战马}

遭遇

重度 19

如果剥皮者没能带着血石从城堡中出来，希卡尔夫人便决定以武力夺取这件神器。随着燃日氏族兽人撤入城堡内部，一大群骑着骸骨战马的不死生物出现在地平线上。当不死生物抵达城堡时，希卡尔夫人和两名亵渎丧尸脱离主力，直奔安放着血石的礼拜堂。希卡尔夫人与这些亵渎丧尸都骑乘着腐朽战马。

在这场遭遇期间，假定燃日氏族兽人正忙于击退不死生物主力，因此由英雄们负责保卫血石。

@UUID[Actor.valX3PiNQVVNH3HI]{宝藏}：除她的装备外，希卡尔夫人还带着一个小袋，里面装有 250 pp（塞尔德格为寻回血石而预付的款项），以及一批由幽灵王盖布在将阿拉兹尼转化为巫妖后不久委托制作的泥金装饰书页。这些书页描绘了阿拉兹尼的血石，是塞尔德格交给这名吸血鬼、用来协助她辨认这些神器的。书页价值 1,000 gp；若作为整套卖给收藏家，最高可售得 5,000 gp。

后续发展：如果剥皮者或希卡尔夫人任意一方带着血石逃脱，他们就会将这件神器带回锤石堡。

否则，队伍在袭击中的英勇表现会让查古格相信，比起留在费林堡，血石由他们保管会更安全。他向英雄们道别，并表示“等这些麻烦过去之后”，他们随时都可以再回城堡。

如果英雄们尚未取回肝脏血石，他们现在可以前往多托特牧场去取。或者，他们也可以直接前往锤石堡，去面对塞尔德格·贝德利斯，并阻止这名墓骑士完成他的仪式——继续前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.SgM27oAG2BCCXYC5]{第 3 章：阿拉兹尼的清算}。

Moments after the encounter with the ecorches, a lone orc rider gallops into the courtyard and calls for Chargug to meet him in the Petitioning Hall (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.DpsItrgfBALlZaeV]{area C3}), where the rider informs him that undead have been spotted in the hills near the castle. If the heroes reached the Influence 2 threshold with Chargug during @UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.BOgEnma083JswfZQ]{Event 1: The Five-Year Celebration}, the orc leader motions for the party to follow. Otherwise, the heroes learn the rider's news when Chargug reemerges several minutes later to announce that a force of undead approaches Castle Firrine.

If the heroes learn of the approaching undead directly from the rider, they have 10 minutes to prepare for the attack. Otherwise, they have 1 minute.

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.M9X1ul3ogFbjgq8r]{Lady Siccale in the Chapel}

A tense combat playlist for Lady Siccale's assault on the chapel, with the sounds of the orcs repelling the undead nearby.

  • @UUID[Actor.aEBup6SntDIOlTtY]{Lady Siccale}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{2 Desecrators}
  • @UUID[Actor.hXEFhS8iL5d6MqdD]{3 Moldering Steeds}

Encounter

Severe 19

If the ecorches fail to emerge from the castle with the Bloodstone, Lady Siccale decides to take the artifact by force. As the Burning Sun orcs retreat into the castle proper, a horde of undead atop skeletal steeds appear on the horizon. When the undead arrive at the castle, Lady Siccale and two zombie desecrators break from the main force and head to the chapel where the Bloodstone is secured. Lady Siccale and the desecrators all ride moldering steeds.

During the encounter, assume the Burning Sun orcs are busy repelling the main force of undead, leaving the heroes to defend the Bloodstone.

@UUID[Actor.valX3PiNQVVNH3HI]{Treasure}: In addition to her equipment, Lady Siccale carries a pouch containing 250 pp (an advance from Seldeg for recovering the Bloodstone), as well as a collection of illuminated pages commissioned by the Ghost King Geb shortly after he transformed Arazni into a lich. The pages depict the Bloodstones of Arazni and were given to the vampire by Seldeg to help her identify the artifacts. The pages are worth 1,000 gp, or up to 5,000 gp if sold as a set to a collector.

Development: If either the ecorches or Lady Siccale escape with the Bloodstone. they return to Hammer Rock with the artifact.

Otherwise, the party's bravery during the attack convinces Chargug that the Bloodstone would be safer in their hands than at Castle Firrine. He bids farewell to the heroes, leaving them with an open invitation to return to the castle “once these troubles are over.”

If the heroes haven't yet retrieved the Liver Bloodstone, they can travel to Dortrot Ranch to do so now. Alternatively, they can head directly to Hammer Rock to face Seldeg Bhedlis and prevent the graveknight from completing his ritual- continue to @UUID[JournalEntry.9d3jLqj7uqkHwz6f.JournalEntryPage.SgM27oAG2BCCXYC5]{Chapter 3: The Reckoning of Arazni}.

Dortrot Ranch.name: 多托特牧场 Dortrot Ranch
Dortrot Ranch.text:
场景

@UUID[Scene.xQR7CMC58PbTDOIg]

播放列表

@UUID[Playlist.5OeCIiN54tawMuyZ]{接近牧场}

当队伍接近多托特牧场时。

当英雄们接近多托特牧场时，他们看见克雷·范森（一名脾气暴躁的男性人类农夫 8）骑马朝相反方向而去。克雷平日里脾气就很粗暴，而今天他的心情尤其恶劣。他解释说，自己原本正前往多托特牧场买马，但无法穿过聚集在牧场外山丘上的不死生物。他警告英雄们，前方道路被“那些该死的腐烂东西堵得比我田里的杂草还多”。克雷确认，不死生物似乎打了牧场一个措手不及，而在他撤退时，牧场的人正手忙脚乱地准备防御。

一旦英雄们进入多托特牧场 1 英里范围内，空气中便弥漫着死亡的恶臭。每名角色都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|dc:44] 豁免。此效果具有嗅觉（特征）。

  • 大成功：该角色不受影响。
  • 成功：目标在多托特牧场 1 英里范围内时，察觉和先攻获得 –1 状态减值。
  • 失败：目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1（状态）}，且在该区域内无法降低其恶心（状态）。
  • 大失败：目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2（状态）}，且在该区域内无法降低其恶心（状态）。

Scene

@UUID[Scene.xQR7CMC58PbTDOIg]

Playlist

@UUID[Playlist.5OeCIiN54tawMuyZ]{Approaching the Ranch}

As the party nears Dortrot Ranch.

As the heroes approach Dortrot Ranch, they spot Cley Fanson (ornery male human farmer 8) traveling on horseback in the opposite direction. Gruff at the best of times, today Cley is in a particularly foul mood. He explains he was headed to Dortrot Ranch to buy a horse but couldn’t get past the undead assembled in the hills outside the ranch. He warns the heroes that the way ahead is blocked with “more of those forsaken rotters than there are weeds in my field.” Cley confirms the undead seemed to have caught the ranch by surprise, and that the ranchers were scrambling to prepare a defense when he retreated.

Once the heroes are within a mile of Dortrot Ranch, the air fills with the stench of death. Each character must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:44] saving throw. This effect has the olfactory trait.

  • Critical Success: The character is unaffected.
  • Success: The target takes a –1 status penalty to Perception and initiative while within 1 mile of Dortrot Ranch.
  • Failure: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 1} and can’t reduce its sickened condition while in the area.
  • Critical Failure: The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{sickened 2} and can’t reduce its sickened condition while in the area.

Undead Extermination Crew.name: 不死扫荡队 Undead Extermination Crew
Undead Extermination Crew.text:
如果英雄们说服亨德尔把血石交给他们，他们随时都可以离开牧场。然而，要向玩家明确说明，把牧场居民丢给布鲁姆斯加斯和他的军队，几乎等同于判他们死刑。如果角色们认为阻止塞尔德格的时间窗口正在关闭，他们可以继续前进；但如果他们在此次冒险稍后返回多托特牧场，就会发现牧场已被摧毁，所有牧场居民不是死了就是失踪了。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.MuUwUhyO3eguA2j6]{准备防御}

当队伍开始在多托特牧场规划并着手布置防御时。

无论英雄们是出于正义感帮助保卫牧场，还是为了向亨德尔证明自己值得被托付血石，亨德尔都会概述他所知道的、关于牧场如今所面对的不死生物的信息。朗读或转述以下内容。

“我猜他们要到夜幕降临才会真正发动攻击。它们现在都在牧场外那片丘陵里。风向对的时候，你能在风里闻到它们的味道。我还听到了一些哀嚎——很可能是女妖。你们是想骑马出去迎击它们，还是把它们引到围墙里面，都由你们决定。我相信你们才是这方面的专家。只要告诉我和其他人你们需要什么就行。”

指挥丘陵中部队的符文蚀刻巫妖布鲁姆斯加斯，已命令不死生物从夜幕降临开始分波进攻牧场。在此之前，英雄们可以通过进行“准备防御”探索行动来为多托特牧场应对袭击做准备，并获得准备点（PP）。或者，英雄们也可以利用手头任何能在现有时间内完成的能力，例如设置陷阱或施放仪式。这类动作通常会为队伍带来 1 点准备点；如果你觉得该动作特别有帮助，则可获得 2 点准备点。

准备防御

  • 探索

你强化多托特牧场对抗即将到来的袭击的防御。尝试一次 @Check[type:athletics|dc:36]、@Check[type:crafting|dc:36] 或 @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:36] 检定来加固大门或栅墙；或进行一次 @Check[type:arcana|dc:38]、@Check[type:nature|dc:38]、@Check[type:occultism|dc:38] 或 @Check[type:religion|dc:38] 检定来净化区域中的死灵能量；或进行一次 @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:40]、@Check[type:intimidation|dc:40] 或 @Check[type:performance|dc:40] 检定来协调牧场居民的行动或鼓舞他们的决心。

  • 大成功：英雄们获得 2 点准备点。
  • 成功：英雄们获得 1 点准备点。
  • 失败：英雄们不会获得准备点。
  • 大失败 英雄们失去 1 点准备点。

6+ PP：多托特牧场稳固如堡垒，而牧场居民也已准备好击退不死生物。在第一波中，英雄们的先攻获得 +3 环境加值；在第二波中，先攻获得 +2 环境加值；在最后一波中，先攻获得 +1 环境加值。

4–3 PP：牧场的防御相当稳固。英雄们在第一波中的先攻获得 +1 环境加值。

2–1 PP：防御布置得杂乱无章，而牧场居民的士气低落。

0 PP：当不死生物抵达时，牧场居民仍在手忙脚乱地准备防御。英雄们在第一波中的先攻承受 –1 环境减值。

正如亨德尔所预料的那样，布鲁姆斯加斯在夜幕降临后发动了进攻。在第一波开始之前，英雄们可以选择自己要坚守的位置。

If the heroes convince Hendle to give them the Bloodstone, they’re free to leave the ranch at any time. However, make it clear to the players that abandoning the ranchers to Brumesgarth and his army is most likely a death sentence. The characters can press on if they believe their window to stop Seldeg is closing, but if they return to Dortrot Ranch later in the adventure, they find the ranch destroyed and all the ranchers either dead or missing.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.MuUwUhyO3eguA2j6]{Preparing the Defenses}

As the party begins to plan and work on the defenses at Dortrot.

Whether the heroes help defend the ranch out of a sense of justice or to prove to Hendle they can be trusted with the Bloodstone, Hendle outlines what he knows about the undead the ranch now faces. Read or paraphrase the following.

“I’m guessing we have until nightfall before they attack in earnest. They’re all out in the hills beyond the pasture. You can smell them on the wind when it’s blowing right. I’ve heard some wailing as well—likely banshees. It’s up to you if you want to ride out to meet them or lure them inside the walls. I trust you to be the experts here. Just let me and the rest know what you need.”

Brumesgarth, the runecarved lich commanding the forces in the hills, has ordered the undead to attack the ranch in waves, starting at nightfall. Until then, the heroes can prepare Dortrot Ranch for the attack by taking the Prepare the Defenses activity to earn Preparation Points (PP). Alternatively, the heroes can use any abilities at their disposal that can be completed in the time available, such as setting snares or casting rituals. Such actions typically earn the party 1 PP, or 2 PP if you feel the action is particularly helpful.

Prepare the Defenses

  • EXPLORATION

You bolster Dortrot Ranch’s defenses against the impending attack. Attempt a @Check[type:athletics|dc:36], @Check[type:crafting|dc:36], or @Check[type:warfare-lore|dc:36] check to reinforce the gate or palisade, a @Check[type:arcana|dc:38], @Check[type:nature|dc:38], @Check[type:occultism|dc:38], or @Check[type:religion|dc:38] check to cleanse the area of necromantic energy, or a @Check[type:diplomacy|dc:40], @Check[type:intimidation|dc:40], or @Check[type:performance|dc:40] check to coordinate the ranchers’ efforts or bolster their resolve.

  • Critical Success: The heroes gain 2 Preparation Points.
  • Success: The heroes gain 1 Preparation Point.
  • Failure: The heroes gain no Preparation Points.
  • Critical Failure The heroes lose 1 Preparation Point.

6+ PP: Dortrot Ranch is as solid as a fortress, and the ranchers are prepared to repel the undead. The heroes gain a +3 circumstance bonus to initiative during the first wave, a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative during the second wave, and a +1 circumstance bonus to initiative in the final wave.

4–3 PP: The ranch’s defenses are sound. The heroes gain a +1 circumstance bonus to initiative during the first wave.

2–1 PP: The defenses are haphazard, and the ranchers’ morale is poor.

0 PP: The ranchers are still scrambling to prepare the defenses when the undead arrive. The heroes take a –1 circumstance penalty to initiative during the first wave.

As Hendle predicted, Brumesgarth launches his assault once night falls. The heroes can choose where to make their stand before the first wave begins.

Wave 1: The Banshees.name: 第 1 波：报丧女妖们 Wave 1: The Banshees
Wave 1: The Banshees.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.0ctN2mXI18bz1IoN]{Defending Dortrot (Music)}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{Undead Horde (Layer)}

这两个播放列表设计为同时播放，共同构成每一波不死生物来袭时的音效，以及与之搭配的战斗音乐。

随着落日沉入夜色，一阵哀嚎的合唱在丘陵间回荡。牧场主们严阵以待，但他们指望PC们来领导防御。片刻之后，布鲁姆斯加斯的第一波不死军势出现在地平线上。

  • @UUID[Actor.XKOQ3ll9TGNso0uB]{2 Banshees}
  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{Raised Cavalry}

遭遇

中等 19

第一波攻击者是由一对报丧女妖率领的复生骑兵。在战斗中，报丧女妖每轮轮流使用它们的“哀嚎”能力，并采用该能力的3动作版本，以克服区域内任何@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{silence}法术的影响。不使用“哀嚎”的那只报丧女妖则对尚未陷入恐慌的生物使用“恐怖之触”。

后续发展：在击败报丧女妖和复生骑兵后，英雄们有10分钟休息时间，随后下一波不死生物将会出现。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.0ctN2mXI18bz1IoN]{Defending Dortrot (Music)}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{Undead Horde (Layer)}

Intended to be played together, these two playlists make up the sound component for each wave of undead and the combat music to go with it.

As the sunset fades to night, a chorus of wails echoes through the hills. The ranchers stand ready but look to the PCs to lead the defense. Moments later, the first wave of Brumesgarth’s undead forces appears on the horizon.

  • @UUID[Actor.XKOQ3ll9TGNso0uB]{2 Banshees}
  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{Raised Cavalry}

Encounter

Moderate 19

The first wave of attacks is a raised cavalry led by a pair of banshees. During the battle, alternate banshees use their Wail ability each round, employing the 3-action version of that ability to overcome any @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gIdDLrbswTV3OBJy]{silence} spells in the area. The banshee who doesn’t Wail uses Terrifying Touch on creatures that aren’t already frightened.

Development: After defeating the banshees and raised cavalry, the heroes have 10 minutes to rest before the next wave of undead appears.

Wave 2: Focused Forces.name: 第2波：主攻部队 Wave 2: Focused Forces
Wave 2: Focused Forces.text:
音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.0ctN2mXI18bz1IoN]{Defending Dortrot (Music)}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{Undead Horde (Layer)}

这两个播放列表设计为同时播放，共同构成每一波不死来袭时的音效，以及与之配套的战斗音乐。

守军才刚刚喘过一口气，下一波不死便在急促的马蹄声中到来。

  • @UUID[Actor.RiB74rq2dsKATghi]{碎灵军官}
  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{复生骑兵}

遭遇

中等 19

第二波中还包括另一名复起骑兵。率队冲锋的碎灵军官会使用提升防御、集结乌合之众和步调一致，以最大限度发挥骑兵的效能，只有在被迫时才会投入近战。

发展：英雄们击败复起骑兵和碎灵军官后，在下一波到来前有 10 分钟休息。

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.0ctN2mXI18bz1IoN]{Defending Dortrot (Music)}, @UUID[Playlist.qTkIntPjT6Mh6Jqm]{Undead Horde (Layer)}

Intended to be played together, these two playlists make up the sound component for each wave of undead and the combat music to go with it.

The defenders have barely caught their breath when the staccato beat of hooves heralds the next wave of undead.

  • @UUID[Actor.RiB74rq2dsKATghi]{Splinter Officer}
  • @UUID[Actor.vdywUTHF4uhA7cyh]{Raised Cavalry}

Encounter

Moderate 19

The second wave includes another raised calvary. The splinter officer leading the charge uses Raise Defenses, Rally the Rabble, and Synchronized Step to maximize the effectiveness of the cavalry, engaging in melee only if forced to do so.

Development: After the heroes defeat the raised calvary and splinter officer, they have 10 minutes to rest before the next wave arrives.

Wave 3: That's Enough!.name: 第3波：够了！ Wave 3: That's Enough!
Wave 3: That's Enough!.text:
如果队伍击退了前两波不死，布鲁姆斯加斯就会亲自出手，决心将英雄们彻底从宇宙中抹除。生物：布鲁姆斯加斯在四只亵渎丧尸组成的小队陪同下接近大门。

音频播放列表：

@UUID[Playlist.kEW6aya4g5QpQhCd]{面对布鲁姆斯加斯}

一旦布鲁姆斯加斯加入战斗，就播放一些“Boss”战斗音乐。

  • @UUID[Actor.ElTYWqGvup7okvC5]{Brumesgarth}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{4 Desecrators}

遭遇

严重 19

布鲁姆斯加斯在遭遇开始时会使用他的魔杖制造一道力墙术，从远处用法术袭扰英雄，同时让他的丧尸承受近战攻击的主要压力。

后续发展：随着布鲁姆斯加斯军队的覆灭，英雄们消除了多托特牧场面临的威胁。不幸的是，布鲁姆斯加斯的灵魂囚笼目前由塞尔德格·贝德利斯持有；他拿走灵魂囚笼是为了确保这名巫妖的忠诚。除非他们有办法阻止布鲁姆斯加斯复苏，否则英雄们会在这场冒险的后续再次面对这名巫妖——届时他们将试图挫败塞尔德格在锤石堡举行的仪式。如果亨德尔之前还没有透露肝脏血石的位置，他现在会这么做，并将其托付给队伍保管。如果英雄们还没有取回心血石，他们现在可以前往费林堡。或者，他们也可以直接前往锤石堡。

奖励：如果英雄们在已经拥有肝脏血石的情况下仍留下来保卫多托特牧场，则额外给予他们 80 XP。

宝藏：抵御布鲁姆斯加斯军队、保卫多托特牧场，会为英雄们赢得亨德尔永恒的感激。为了表示感谢，这位牧场主会给予队伍牧场 10% 的股份。目前，这部分股份的价值仅为 5,000 gp，但如果终焉之墙之国恢复昔日荣光，它或许可以卖出高得多的价格（或者成为稳定的持续收入来源）。

If the party repels the first two waves of undead, Brumesgarth takes matters into his own hands, resolving to wipe the heroes from the Universe for good. Creatures: Brumesgarth approaches the gate accompanied by a cadre of four zombie desecrators.

Audio Playlist:

@UUID[Playlist.kEW6aya4g5QpQhCd]{Facing Brumesgarth}

Once Brumesgarth joins the battle, some 'boss' combat music.

  • @UUID[Actor.ElTYWqGvup7okvC5]{Brumesgarth}
  • @UUID[Actor.NzhVuwCmMTPUQPAB]{4 Desecrators}

Encounter

Severe 19

Brumesgarth begins the encounter by using his wand to create a wall of force, harrying the heroes with spells from a distance while allowing his zombies to take the brunt of melee attacks.

Development: With the defeat of Brumesgarth’s army, the heroes have eliminated the threat to Dortrot Ranch. Unfortunately, Brumesgarth’s soul cage is currently in the possession of Seldeg Bhedlis, who took the soul cage to ensure the lich’s loyalty. Unless they have some way to prevent Brumesgarth from Rejuvenating, the heroes will face the lich again later in the adventure, when they attempt to foil Seldeg’s ritual at Hammer Rock. If Hendle hasn’t already revealed the Liver Bloodstone’s location, he does so now, entrusting its care to the party. If the heroes haven’t yet retrieved the Heart Bloodstone, they can now travel to Castle Firrine. Alternatively, they can head directly to Hammer Rock.

Reward: If the heroes stayed to defend Dortrot Ranch, despite already having the Liver Bloodstone, award them an additional 80 XP.

Treasure: Defending Dortrot Ranch against Brumesgarth’s army earns Hendle’s eternal gratitude. As thanks, the rancher gives the party a 10% stake in the ranch. At the present, this stake is worth a mere 5,000 gp, but it might be sold for significantly more (or provide a reliable source of recurring income) if the nation of Lastwall is restored to its former glory.

C4. The Guts.name: C4. 肠道 C4. The Guts
C4. The Guts.text:
曾经维护这座小教堂（@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{区域 C6}）的骑士们，住在这片附属建筑区域的一系列房间中。这些房间由一连串蜿蜒的走廊相连，燃日氏族的兽人将其称为“肠道”。来自其他氏族据点的访客会被安排住在这些房间里，而不是城堡主体内部。

@UUID[Actor.IRWynEqd6QQr9CO3]{3个精英剥皮尸}

塞尔德格·贝德利斯派来潜入节庆的三只剥皮尸，正在其中一间访客居室里等待时机。燃日氏族的兽人认不出这些剥皮尸（它们目前披着来自其他氏族据点的兽人的皮），但由于前来参加庆典的访客很常见，兽人们没有理由怀疑有不死生物混入其中。剥皮尸们一直待在自己的房间里，除非英雄们开始四处打探，否则这些不死生物很可能也不会被队伍察觉。

The knights who once maintained the chapel (@UUID[JournalEntry.USPEWD92zLxjD9oU.JournalEntryPage.k8vwMDEAyZJwimPS]{area C6}) lived in a series of rooms in this section of the outbuilding. The rooms are connected by a series of twisting halls the Burning Sun orcs have dubbed “the Guts.” Visitors from other holds are invited to stay in these rooms, rather than inside the castle proper.

@UUID[Actor.IRWynEqd6QQr9CO3]{3 Elite Ecorches}

The three ecorches Seldeg Bhedlis sent to infiltrate the festival wait out their time in one of the visitors’ chambers. The Burning Sun Hold orcs don’t recognize the ecorches (who currently wear the skins of orcs from other holds), but as visitors to the celebration are common, the orcs have no reason to suspect the presence of the undead. The ecorches keep to their room, and unless the heroes begin snooping about, the undead creatures likely go unnoticed by the party as well.
